quran.arabic: وَاِلٰي ثَمُوۡدَ اَخَاهُمۡ صٰلِحًاۘ قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ مَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اِلٰهٍ غَيۡرُهٗؕ هُوَ اَنۡشَاَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَرۡضِ وَاسۡتَعۡمَرَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا فَاسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡهُ ثُمَّ تُوۡبُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهِؕ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ قَرِيۡبٌ مُّجِيۡبٌ
quran.english: And to Thamud [We sent] their brother Salih. He said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. He has produced you from the earth and settled you in it, so ask forgiveness of Him and then repent to Him. Indeed, my Lord is near and responsive

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰصٰلِحُ قَدۡ كُنۡتَ فِيۡنَا مَرۡجُوًّا قَبۡلَ هٰذَا٘ اَتَنۡهٰىنَا٘ اَنۡ نَّعۡبُدَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ اٰبَآؤُنَا وَاِنَّنَا لَفِيۡ شَكٍّ مِّمَّا تَدۡعُوۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِ مُرِيۡبٍ
quran.english: They said, "O Salih, you were among us a man of promise before this. Do you forbid us to worship what our fathers worshipped? And indeed we are, about that to which you invite us, in disquieting doubt

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُ عَلٰي بَيِّنَةٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّيۡ وَاٰتٰىنِيۡ مِنۡهُ رَحۡمَةً فَمَنۡ يَّنۡصُرُنِيۡ مِنَ اللّٰهِ اِنۡ عَصَيۡتُهٗࣞ فَمَا تَزِيۡدُوۡنَنِيۡ غَيۡرَ تَخۡسِيۡرٍ
quran.english: He said, "O my people, have you considered: if I should be upon clear evidence from my Lord and He has given me mercy from Himself, who would protect me from Allah if I disobeyed Him? So you would not increase me except in loss

quran.arabic: وَيٰقَوۡمِ هٰذِهٖ نَاقَةُ اللّٰهِ لَكُمۡ اٰيَةً فَذَرُوۡهَا تَاۡكُلۡ فِيۡ٘ اَرۡضِ اللّٰهِ وَلَا تَمَسُّوۡهَا بِسُوۡٓءٍ فَيَاۡخُذَكُمۡ عَذَابٌ قَرِيۡبٌ
quran.english: And O my people, this is the she-camel of Allah - [she is] to you a sign. So let her feed upon Allah 's earth and do not touch her with harm, or you will be taken by an impending punishment

quran.arabic: فَعَقَرُوۡهَا فَقَالَ تَمَتَّعُوۡا فِيۡ دَارِكُمۡ ثَلٰثَةَ اَيَّامٍؕ ذٰلِكَ وَعۡدٌ غَيۡرُ مَكۡذُوۡبٍ
quran.english: But they hamstrung her, so he said, "Enjoy yourselves in your homes for three days. That is a promise not to be denied

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ اَمۡرُنَا نَجَّيۡنَا صٰلِحًا وَّالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مَعَهٗ بِرَحۡمَةٍ مِّنَّا وَمِنۡ خِزۡيِ يَوۡمِئِذٍؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ الۡقَوِيُّ الۡعَزِيۡزُ
quran.english: So when Our command came, We saved Salih and those who believed with him, by mercy from Us, and [saved them] from the disgrace of that day. Indeed, it is your Lord who is the Powerful, the Exalted in Might

quran.arabic: وَاَخَذَ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوا الصَّيۡحَةُ فَاَصۡبَحُوۡا فِيۡ دِيَارِهِمۡ جٰثِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And the shriek seized those who had wronged, and they became within their homes [corpses] fallen prone

quran.arabic: كَاَنۡ لَّمۡ يَغۡنَوۡا فِيۡهَاؕ اَلَا٘ اِنَّ ثَمُوۡدَا۠ كَفَرُوۡا رَبَّهُمۡؕ اَلَا بُعۡدًا لِّثَمُوۡدَࣖ‏
quran.english: As if they had never prospered therein. Unquestionably, Thamud denied their Lord; then, away with Thamud

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَتۡ رُسُلُنَا٘ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ بِالۡبُشۡرٰي قَالُوۡا سَلٰمًاؕ قَالَ سَلٰمٌ فَمَا لَبِثَ اَنۡ جَآءَ بِعِجۡلٍ حَنِيۡذٍ
quran.english: And certainly did Our messengers come to Abraham with good tidings; they said, "Peace." He said, "Peace," and did not delay in bringing [them] a roasted calf

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَاٰ٘ اَيۡدِيَهُمۡ لَا تَصِلُ اِلَيۡهِ نَكِرَهُمۡ وَاَوۡجَسَ مِنۡهُمۡ خِيۡفَةًؕ قَالُوۡا لَا تَخَفۡ اِنَّا٘ اُرۡسِلۡنَا٘ اِلٰي قَوۡمِ لُوۡطٍؕ‏
quran.english: But when he saw their hands not reaching for it, he distrusted them and felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not. We have been sent to the people of Lot

quran.arabic: وَامۡرَاَتُهٗ قَآئِمَةٌ فَضَحِكَتۡ فَبَشَّرۡنٰهَا بِاِسۡحٰقَۙ وَمِنۡ وَّرَآءِ اِسۡحٰقَ يَعۡقُوۡبَ
quran.english: And his Wife was standing, and she smiled. Then We gave her good tidings of Isaac and after Isaac, Jacob

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ يٰوَيۡلَتٰ٘ي ءَاَلِدُ وَاَنَا عَجُوۡزٌ وَّهٰذَا بَعۡلِيۡ شَيۡخًاؕ اِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَيۡءٌ عَجِيۡبٌ
quran.english: She said, "Woe to me! Shall I give birth while I am an old woman and this, my husband, is an old man? Indeed, this is an amazing thing

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اَتَعۡجَبِيۡنَ مِنۡ اَمۡرِ اللّٰهِ رَحۡمَتُ اللّٰهِ وَبَرَكٰتُهٗ عَلَيۡكُمۡ اَهۡلَ الۡبَيۡتِؕ اِنَّهٗ حَمِيۡدٌ مَّجِيۡدٌ
quran.english: They said, "Are you amazed at the decree of Allah? May the mercy of Allah and His blessings be upon you, people of the house. Indeed, He is Praiseworthy and Honorable

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا ذَهَبَ عَنۡ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ الرَّوۡعُ وَجَآءَتۡهُ الۡبُشۡرٰي يُجَادِلُنَا فِيۡ قَوۡمِ لُوۡطٍؕ‏
quran.english: And when the fright had left Abraham and the good tidings had reached him, he began to argue with Us concerning the people of Lot

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ لَحَلِيۡمٌ اَوَّاهٌ مُّنِيۡبٌ
quran.english: Indeed, Abraham was forbearing, grieving and [frequently] returning [to Allah]

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اِبۡرٰهِيۡمُ اَعۡرِضۡ عَنۡ هٰذَاۚ اِنَّهٗ قَدۡ جَآءَ اَمۡرُ رَبِّكَۚ وَاِنَّهُمۡ اٰتِيۡهِمۡ عَذَابٌ غَيۡرُ مَرۡدُوۡدٍ
quran.english: [The angels said], "O Abraham, give up this [plea]. Indeed, the command of your Lord has come, and indeed, there will reach them a punishment that cannot be repelled

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَتۡ رُسُلُنَا لُوۡطًا سِيۡٓءَ بِهِمۡ وَضَاقَ بِهِمۡ ذَرۡعًا وَّقَالَ هٰذَا يَوۡمٌ عَصِيۡبٌ
quran.english: And when Our messengers, [the angels], came to Lot, he was anguished for them and felt for them great discomfort and said, "This is a trying day

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَهٗ قَوۡمُهٗ يُهۡرَعُوۡنَ اِلَيۡهِؕ وَمِنۡ قَبۡلُ كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ السَّيِّاٰتِؕ قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِيۡ هُنَّ اَطۡهَرُ لَكُمۡ فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَلَا تُخۡزُوۡنِ فِيۡ ضَيۡفِيۡؕ اَلَيۡسَ مِنۡكُمۡ رَجُلٌ رَّشِيۡدٌ
quran.english: And his people came hastening to him, and before [this] they had been doing evil deeds. He said, "O my people, these are my daughters; they are purer for you. So fear Allah and do not disgrace me concerning my guests. Is there not among you a man of reason

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتَ مَا لَنَا فِيۡ بَنَاتِكَ مِنۡ حَقٍّۚ وَاِنَّكَ لَتَعۡلَمُ مَا نُرِيۡدُ
quran.english: They said, "You have already known that we have not concerning your daughters any claim, and indeed, you know what we want

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَوۡ اَنَّ لِيۡ بِكُمۡ قُوَّةً اَوۡ اٰوِيۡ٘ اِلٰي رُكۡنٍ شَدِيۡدٍ
quran.english: He said, "If only I had against you some power or could take refuge in a strong support

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰلُوۡطُ اِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَنۡ يَّصِلُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡكَ فَاَسۡرِ بِاَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٍ مِّنَ الَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنۡكُمۡ اَحَدٌ اِلَّا امۡرَاَتَكَؕ اِنَّهٗ مُصِيۡبُهَا مَا٘ اَصَابَهُمۡؕ اِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ الصُّبۡحُؕ اَلَيۡسَ الصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيۡبٍ
quran.english: The angels said, "O Lot, indeed we are messengers of your Lord; [therefore], they will never reach you. So set out with your family during a portion of the night and let not any among you look back - except your wife; indeed, she will be struck by that which strikes them. Indeed, their appointment is [for] the morning. Is not the morning near

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ اَمۡرُنَا جَعَلۡنَا عَالِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَاَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهَا حِجَارَةً مِّنۡ سِجِّيۡلٍ ࣢ۙ مَّنۡضُوۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: So when Our command came, We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of layered hard clay, [which were]

quran.arabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَؕ وَمَا هِيَ مِنَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ بِبَعِيۡدٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Marked from your Lord. And Allah 's punishment is not from the wrongdoers [very] far

quran.arabic: وَاِلٰي مَدۡيَنَ اَخَاهُمۡ شُعَيۡبًاؕ قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ مَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اِلٰهٍ غَيۡرُهٗؕ وَلَا تَنۡقُصُوا الۡمِكۡيَالَ وَالۡمِيۡزَانَ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَرٰىكُمۡ بِخَيۡرٍ وَّاِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ مُّحِيۡطٍ
quran.english: And to Madyan [We sent] their brother Shu'ayb. He said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. And do not decrease from the measure and the scale. Indeed, I see you in prosperity, but indeed, I fear for you the punishment of an all-encompassing Day

quran.arabic: وَيٰقَوۡمِ اَوۡفُوا الۡمِكۡيَالَ وَالۡمِيۡزَانَ بِالۡقِسۡطِ وَلَا تَبۡخَسُوا النَّاسَ اَشۡيَآءَهُمۡ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: And O my people, give full measure and weight in justice and do not deprive the people of their due and do not commit abuse on the earth, spreading corruption

quran.arabic: بَقِيَّتُ اللّٰهِ خَيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ ࣢ۚ وَمَا٘ اَنَا عَلَيۡكُمۡ بِحَفِيۡظٍ
quran.english: What remains [lawful] from Allah is best for you, if you would be believers. But I am not a guardian over you

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰشُعَيۡبُ اَصَلٰوتُكَ تَاۡمُرُكَ اَنۡ نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ اٰبَآؤُنَا٘ اَوۡ اَنۡ نَّفۡعَلَ فِيۡ٘ اَمۡوَالِنَا مَا نَشٰٓؤُاؕ اِنَّكَ لَاَنۡتَ الۡحَلِيۡمُ الرَّشِيۡدُ
quran.english: They said, "O Shu'ayb, does your prayer command you that we should leave what our fathers worship or not do with our wealth what we please? Indeed, you are the forbearing, the discerning

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُ عَلٰي بَيِّنَةٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّيۡ وَرَزَقَنِيۡ مِنۡهُ رِزۡقًا حَسَنًاؕ وَمَا٘ اُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ اُخَالِفَكُمۡ اِلٰي مَا٘ اَنۡهٰىكُمۡ عَنۡهُؕ اِنۡ اُرِيۡدُ اِلَّا الۡاِصۡلَاحَ مَا اسۡتَطَعۡتُؕ وَمَا تَوۡفِيۡقِيۡ٘ اِلَّا بِاللّٰهِؕ عَلَيۡهِ تَوَكَّلۡتُ وَاِلَيۡهِ اُنِيۡبُ
quran.english: He said, "O my people, have you considered: if I am upon clear evidence from my Lord and He has provided me with a good provision from Him...? And I do not intend to differ from you in that which I have forbidden you; I only intend reform as much as I am able. And my success is not but through Allah. Upon him I have relied, and to Him I return

quran.arabic: وَيٰقَوۡمِ لَا يَجۡرِمَنَّكُمۡ شِقَاقِيۡ٘ اَنۡ يُّصِيۡبَكُمۡ مِّثۡلُ مَا٘ اَصَابَ قَوۡمَ نُوۡحٍ اَوۡ قَوۡمَ هُوۡدٍ اَوۡ قَوۡمَ صٰلِحٍؕ وَمَا قَوۡمُ لُوۡطٍ مِّنۡكُمۡ بِبَعِيۡدٍ
quran.english: And O my people, let not [your] dissension from me cause you to be struck by that similar to what struck the people of Noah or the people of Hud or the people of Salih. And the people of Lot are not from you far away

quran.arabic: وَاسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡا رَبَّكُمۡ ثُمَّ تُوۡبُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهِؕ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ رَحِيۡمٌ وَّدُوۡدٌ
quran.english: And ask forgiveness of your Lord and then repent to Him. Indeed, my Lord is Merciful and Affectionate

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰشُعَيۡبُ مَا نَفۡقَهُ كَثِيۡرًا مِّمَّا تَقُوۡلُ وَاِنَّا لَنَرٰىكَ فِيۡنَا ضَعِيۡفًاۚ وَلَوۡلَا رَهۡطُكَ لَرَجَمۡنٰكَؗ وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ عَلَيۡنَا بِعَزِيۡزٍ
quran.english: They said, "O Shu'ayb, we do not understand much of what you say, and indeed, we consider you among us as weak. And if not for your family, we would have stoned you [to death]; and you are not to us one respected

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اَرَهۡطِيۡ٘ اَعَزُّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِؕ وَاتَّخَذۡتُمُوۡهُ وَرَآءَكُمۡ ظِهۡرِيًّاؕ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ مُحِيۡطٌ
quran.english: He said, "O my people, is my family more respected for power by you than Allah? But you put Him behind your backs [in neglect]. Indeed, my Lord is encompassing of what you do

quran.arabic: وَيٰقَوۡمِ اعۡمَلُوۡا عَلٰي مَكَانَتِكُمۡ اِنِّيۡ عَامِلٌؕ سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ مَنۡ يَّاۡتِيۡهِ عَذَابٌ يُّخۡزِيۡهِ وَمَنۡ هُوَ كَاذِبٌؕ وَارۡتَقِبُوۡ٘ا اِنِّيۡ مَعَكُمۡ رَقِيۡبٌ
quran.english: And O my people, work according to your position; indeed, I am working. You are going to know to whom will come a punishment that will disgrace him and who is a liar. So watch; indeed, I am with you a watcher, [awaiting the outcome]

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَ اَمۡرُنَا نَجَّيۡنَا شُعَيۡبًا وَّالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مَعَهٗ بِرَحۡمَةٍ مِّنَّاۚ وَاَخَذَتِ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوا الصَّيۡحَةُ فَاَصۡبَحُوۡا فِيۡ دِيَارِهِمۡ جٰثِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And when Our command came, We saved Shu'ayb and those who believed with him, by mercy from Us. And the shriek seized those who had wronged, and they became within their homes [corpses] fallen prone

quran.arabic: كَاَنۡ لَّمۡ يَغۡنَوۡا فِيۡهَاؕ اَلَا بُعۡدًا لِّمَدۡيَنَ كَمَا بَعِدَتۡ ثَمُوۡدُࣖ‏
quran.english: As if they had never prospered therein. Then, away with Madyan as Thamud was taken away

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مُوۡسٰي بِاٰيٰتِنَا وَسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: And We did certainly send Moses with Our signs and a clear authority

quran.arabic: اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَا۠ئِهٖ فَاتَّبَعُوۡ٘ا اَمۡرَ فِرۡعَوۡنَۚ وَمَا٘ اَمۡرُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِرَشِيۡدٍ
quran.english: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they followed the command of Pharaoh, and the command of Pharaoh was not [at all] discerning

quran.arabic: يَقۡدُمُ قَوۡمَهٗ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ فَاَوۡرَدَهُمُ النَّارَؕ وَبِئۡسَ الۡوِرۡدُ الۡمَوۡرُوۡدُ
quran.english: He will precede his people on the Day of Resurrection and lead them into the Fire; and wretched is the place to which they are led

quran.arabic: وَاُتۡبِعُوۡا فِيۡ هٰذِهٖ لَعۡنَةً وَّيَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ بِئۡسَ الرِّفۡدُ الۡمَرۡفُوۡدُ
quran.english: And they were followed in this [world] with a curse and on the Day of Resurrection. And wretched is the gift which is given

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ مِنۡ اَنۭۡ بَآءِ الۡقُرٰي نَقُصُّهٗ عَلَيۡكَ مِنۡهَا قَآئِمٌ وَّحَصِيۡدٌ
quran.english: That is from the news of the cities, which We relate to you; of them, some are [still] standing and some are [as] a harvest [mowed down]

quran.arabic: وَمَا ظَلَمۡنٰهُمۡ وَلٰكِنۡ ظَلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ فَمَا٘ اَغۡنَتۡ عَنۡهُمۡ اٰلِهَتُهُمُ الَّتِيۡ يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍ لَّمَّا جَآءَ اَمۡرُ رَبِّكَؕ وَمَا زَادُوۡهُمۡ غَيۡرَ تَتۡبِيۡبٍ
quran.english: And We did not wrong them, but they wronged themselves. And they were not availed at all by their gods which they invoked other than Allah when there came the command of your Lord. And they did not increase them in other than ruin

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ اَخۡذُ رَبِّكَ اِذَا٘ اَخَذَ الۡقُرٰي وَهِيَ ظَالِمَةٌؕ اِنَّ اَخۡذَهٗ٘ اَلِيۡمٌ شَدِيۡدٌ
quran.english: And thus is the seizure of your Lord when He seizes the cities while they are committing wrong. Indeed, His seizure is painful and severe

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّمَنۡ خَافَ عَذَابَ الۡاٰخِرَةِؕ ذٰلِكَ يَوۡمٌ مَّجۡمُوۡعٌۙ لَّهُ النَّاسُ وَذٰلِكَ يَوۡمٌ مَّشۡهُوۡدٌ
quran.english: Indeed in that is a sign for those who fear the punishment of the Hereafter. That is a Day for which the people will be collected, and that is a Day [which will be] witnessed

quran.arabic: وَمَا نُؤَخِّرُهٗ٘ اِلَّا لِاَجَلٍ مَّعۡدُوۡدٍؕ‏
quran.english: And We do not delay it except for a limited term

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَاۡتِ لَا تَكَلَّمُ نَفۡسٌ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِهٖۚ فَمِنۡهُمۡ شَقِيٌّ وَّسَعِيۡدٌ
quran.english: The Day it comes no soul will speak except by His permission. And among them will be the wretched and the prosperous

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا الَّذِيۡنَ شَقُوۡا فَفِي النَّارِ لَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا زَفِيۡرٌ وَّشَهِيۡقٌۙ‏
quran.english: As for those who were [destined to be] wretched, they will be in the Fire. For them therein is [violent] exhaling and inhaling

quran.arabic: خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا مَا دَامَتِ السَّمٰوٰتُ وَالۡاَرۡضُ اِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيۡدُ
quran.english: [They will be] abiding therein as long as the heavens and the earth endure, except what your Lord should will. Indeed, your Lord is an effecter of what He intends

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا الَّذِيۡنَ سُعِدُوۡا فَفِي الۡجَنَّةِ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا مَا دَامَتِ السَّمٰوٰتُ وَالۡاَرۡضُ اِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَؕ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوۡذٍ
quran.english: And as for those who were [destined to be] prosperous, they will be in Paradise, abiding therein as long as the heavens and the earth endure, except what your Lord should will - a bestowal uninterrupted

quran.arabic: فَلَا تَكُ فِيۡ مِرۡيَةٍ مِّمَّا يَعۡبُدُ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِؕ مَا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَ اِلَّا كَمَا يَعۡبُدُ اٰبَآؤُهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَبۡلُؕ وَاِنَّا لَمُوَفُّوۡهُمۡ نَصِيۡبَهُمۡ غَيۡرَ مَنۡقُوۡصٍࣖ‏
quran.english: So do not be in doubt, [O Muhammad], as to what these [polytheists] are worshipping. They worship not except as their fathers worshipped before. And indeed, We will give them their share undiminished

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسَي الۡكِتٰبَ فَاخۡتُلِفَ فِيۡهِؕ وَلَوۡلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتۡ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ لَقُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ وَاِنَّهُمۡ لَفِيۡ شَكٍّ مِّنۡهُ مُرِيۡبٍ
quran.english: And We had certainly given Moses the Scripture, but it came under disagreement. And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it would have been judged between them. And indeed they are, concerning the Qur'an, in disquieting doubt

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ كُلًّا لَّمَّا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمۡ رَبُّكَ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡؕ اِنَّهٗ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ خَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And indeed, each [of the believers and disbelievers] - your Lord will fully compensate them for their deeds. Indeed, He is Acquainted with what they do

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَقِمۡ كَمَا٘ اُمِرۡتَ وَمَنۡ تَابَ مَعَكَ وَلَا تَطۡغَوۡاؕ اِنَّهٗ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: So remain on a right course as you have been commanded, [you] and those who have turned back with you [to Allah], and do not transgress. Indeed, He is Seeing of what you do

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَرۡكَنُوۡ٘ا اِلَي الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا فَتَمَسَّكُمُ النَّارُۙ وَمَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ اَوۡلِيَآءَ ثُمَّ لَا تُنۡصَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And do not incline toward those who do wrong, lest you be touched by the Fire, and you would not have other than Allah any protectors; then you would not be helped

quran.arabic: وَاَقِمِ الصَّلٰوةَ طَرَفَيِ النَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًا مِّنَ الَّيۡلِؕ اِنَّ الۡحَسَنٰتِ يُذۡهِبۡنَ السَّيِّاٰتِؕ ذٰلِكَ ذِكۡرٰي لِلذّٰكِرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And establish prayer at the two ends of the day and at the approach of the night. Indeed, good deeds do away with misdeeds. That is a reminder for those who remember

quran.arabic: وَاصۡبِرۡ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يُضِيۡعُ اَجۡرَ الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And be patient, for indeed, Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good

quran.arabic: فَلَوۡلَا كَانَ مِنَ الۡقُرُوۡنِ مِنۡ قَبۡلِكُمۡ اُولُوۡا بَقِيَّةٍ يَّنۡهَوۡنَ عَنِ الۡفَسَادِ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا مِّمَّنۡ اَنۡجَيۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡۚ وَاتَّبَعَ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا مَا٘ اُتۡرِفُوۡا فِيۡهِ وَكَانُوۡا مُجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: So why were there not among the generations before you those of enduring discrimination forbidding corruption on earth - except a few of those We saved from among them? But those who wronged pursued what luxury they were given therein, and they were criminals

quran.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ لِيُهۡلِكَ الۡقُرٰي بِظُلۡمٍ وَّاَهۡلُهَا مُصۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And your Lord would not have destroyed the cities unjustly while their people were reformers

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ شَآءَ رَبُّكَ لَجَعَلَ النَّاسَ اُمَّةً وَّاحِدَةً وَّلَا يَزَالُوۡنَ مُخۡتَلِفِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And if your Lord had willed, He could have made mankind one community; but they will not cease to differ

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ رَّحِمَ رَبُّكَؕ وَلِذٰلِكَ خَلَقَهُمۡؕ وَتَمَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ رَبِّكَ لَاَمۡلَـَٔنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنَ الۡجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except whom your Lord has given mercy, and for that He created them. But the word of your Lord is to be fulfilled that, "I will surely fill Hell with jinn and men all together

quran.arabic: وَكُلًّا نَّقُصُّ عَلَيۡكَ مِنۡ اَنۭۡ بَآءِ الرُّسُلِ مَا نُثَبِّتُ بِهٖ فُؤَادَكَۚ وَجَآءَكَ فِيۡ هٰذِهِ الۡحَقُّ وَمَوۡعِظَةٌ وَّذِكۡرٰي لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And each [story] We relate to you from the news of the messengers is that by which We make firm your heart. And there has come to you, in this, the truth and an instruction and a reminder for the believers

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ اعۡمَلُوۡا عَلٰي مَكَانَتِكُمۡؕ اِنَّا عٰمِلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And say to those who do not believe, "Work according to your position; indeed, we are working

quran.arabic: وَانۡتَظِرُوۡاۚ اِنَّا مُنۡتَظِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And wait, indeed, we are waiting

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ غَيۡبُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَاِلَيۡهِ يُرۡجَعُ الۡاَمۡرُ كُلُّهٗ فَاعۡبُدۡهُ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِؕ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَافِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And to Allah belong the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth and to Him will be returned the matter, all of it, so worship Him and rely upon Him. And your Lord is not unaware of that which you do

quran.arabic: الٓرٰࣞ تِلۡكَ اٰيٰتُ الۡكِتٰبِ الۡمُبِيۡنِࣞ‏
quran.english: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the clear Book

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ قُرۡءٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur'an that you might understand

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ نَقُصُّ عَلَيۡكَ اَحۡسَنَ الۡقَصَصِ بِمَا٘ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَࣗۖ وَاِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ لَمِنَ الۡغٰفِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: We relate to you, [O Muhammad], the best of stories in what We have revealed to you of this Qur'an although you were, before it, among the unaware

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ يُوۡسُفُ لِاَبِيۡهِ يٰ٘اَبَتِ اِنِّيۡ رَاَيۡتُ اَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوۡكَبًا وَّالشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَ رَاَيۡتُهُمۡ لِيۡ سٰجِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Of these stories mention] when Joseph said to his father, "O my father, indeed I have seen [in a dream] eleven stars and the sun and the moon; I saw them prostrating to me

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰبُنَيَّ لَا تَقۡصُصۡ رُءۡيَاكَ عَلٰ٘ي اِخۡوَتِكَ فَيَكِيۡدُوۡا لَكَ كَيۡدًاؕ اِنَّ الشَّيۡطٰنَ لِلۡاِنۡسَانِ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: He said, "O my son, do not relate your vision to your brothers or they will contrive against you a plan. Indeed Satan, to man, is a manifest enemy

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ يَجۡتَبِيۡكَ رَبُّكَ وَيُعَلِّمُكَ مِنۡ تَاۡوِيۡلِ الۡاَحَادِيۡثِ وَيُتِمُّ نِعۡمَتَهٗ عَلَيۡكَ وَعَلٰ٘ي اٰلِ يَعۡقُوۡبَ كَمَا٘ اَتَمَّهَا عَلٰ٘ي اَبَوَيۡكَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَاِسۡحٰقَؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ عَلِيۡمٌ حَكِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And thus will your Lord choose you and teach you the interpretation of narratives and complete His favor upon you and upon the family of Jacob, as He completed it upon your fathers before, Abraham and Isaac. Indeed, your Lord is Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ كَانَ فِيۡ يُوۡسُفَ وَاِخۡوَتِهٖ٘ اٰيٰتٌ لِّلسَّآئِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: Certainly were there in Joseph and his brothers signs for those who ask

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالُوۡا لَيُوۡسُفُ وَاَخُوۡهُ اَحَبُّ اِلٰ٘ي اَبِيۡنَا مِنَّا وَنَحۡنُ عُصۡبَةٌؕ اِنَّ اَبَانَا لَفِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنِۙۖ‏
quran.english: When they said, "Joseph and his brother are more beloved to our father than we, while we are a clan. Indeed, our father is in clear error

quran.arabic: اِۨقۡتُلُوۡا يُوۡسُفَ اَوِ اطۡرَحُوۡهُ اَرۡضًا يَّخۡلُ لَكُمۡ وَجۡهُ اَبِيۡكُمۡ وَتَكُوۡنُوۡا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖ قَوۡمًا صٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: Kill Joseph or cast him out to [another] land; the countenance of your father will [then] be only for you, and you will be after that a righteous people

quran.arabic: قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ لَا تَقۡتُلُوۡا يُوۡسُفَ وَاَلۡقُوۡهُ فِيۡ غَيٰبَتِ الۡجُبِّ يَلۡتَقِطۡهُ بَعۡضُ السَّيَّارَةِ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ فٰعِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: Said a speaker among them, "Do not kill Joseph but throw him into the bottom of the well; some travelers will pick him up - if you would do [something]

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَبَانَا مَا لَكَ لَا تَاۡمَنَّا عَلٰي يُوۡسُفَ وَاِنَّا لَهٗ لَنٰصِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "O our father, why do you not entrust us with Joseph while indeed, we are to him sincere counselors

quran.arabic: اَرۡسِلۡهُ مَعَنَا غَدًا يَّرۡتَعۡ وَيَلۡعَبۡ وَاِنَّا لَهٗ لَحٰفِظُوۡنَ
quran.english: Send him with us tomorrow that he may eat well and play. And indeed, we will be his guardians

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنِّيۡ لَيَحۡزُنُنِيۡ٘ اَنۡ تَذۡهَبُوۡا بِهٖ وَاَخَافُ اَنۡ يَّاۡكُلَهُ الذِّئۡبُ وَاَنۡتُمۡ عَنۡهُ غٰفِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Jacob] said, "Indeed, it saddens me that you should take him, and I fear that a wolf would eat him while you are of him unaware

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَئِنۡ اَكَلَهُ الذِّئۡبُ وَنَحۡنُ عُصۡبَةٌ اِنَّا٘ اِذًا لَّخٰسِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "If a wolf should eat him while we are a [strong] clan, indeed, we would then be losers

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا ذَهَبُوۡا بِهٖ وَاَجۡمَعُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ يَّجۡعَلُوۡهُ فِيۡ غَيٰبَتِ الۡجُبِّۚ وَاَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِ لَتُنَبِّئَنَّهُمۡ بِاَمۡرِهِمۡ هٰذَا وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: So when they took him [out] and agreed to put him into the bottom of the well... But We inspired to him, "You will surely inform them [someday] about this affair of theirs while they do not perceive [your identity]

quran.arabic: وَجَآءُوۡ٘ اَبَاهُمۡ عِشَآءً يَّبۡكُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And they came to their father at night, weeping

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَبَانَا٘ اِنَّا ذَهَبۡنَا نَسۡتَبِقُ وَتَرَكۡنَا يُوۡسُفَ عِنۡدَ مَتَاعِنَا فَاَكَلَهُ الذِّئۡبُۚ وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ بِمُؤۡمِنٍ لَّنَا وَلَوۡ كُنَّا صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "O our father, indeed we went racing each other and left Joseph with our possessions, and a wolf ate him. But you would not believe us, even if we were truthful

quran.arabic: وَجَآءُوۡ عَلٰي قَمِيۡصِهٖ بِدَمٍ كَذِبٍؕ قَالَ بَلۡ سَوَّلَتۡ لَكُمۡ اَنۡفُسُكُمۡ اَمۡرًاؕ فَصَبۡرٌ جَمِيۡلٌؕ وَاللّٰهُ الۡمُسۡتَعَانُ عَلٰي مَا تَصِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they brought upon his shirt false blood. [Jacob] said, "Rather, your souls have enticed you to something, so patience is most fitting. And Allah is the one sought for help against that which you describe

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَتۡ سَيَّارَةٌ فَاَرۡسَلُوۡا وَارِدَهُمۡ فَاَدۡلٰي دَلۡوَهٗؕ قَالَ يٰبُشۡرٰي هٰذَا غُلٰمٌؕ وَاَسَرُّوۡهُ بِضَاعَةًؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And there came a company of travelers; then they sent their water drawer, and he let down his bucket. He said, "Good news! Here is a boy." And they concealed him, [taking him] as merchandise; and Allah was knowing of what they did

quran.arabic: وَشَرَوۡهُ بِثَمَنٍۭ بَخۡسٍ دَرَاهِمَ مَعۡدُوۡدَةٍۚ وَكَانُوۡا فِيۡهِ مِنَ الزَّاهِدِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And they sold him for a reduced price - a few dirhams - and they were, concerning him, of those content with little

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِي اشۡتَرٰىهُ مِنۡ مِّصۡرَ لِامۡرَاَتِهٖ٘ اَكۡرِمِيۡ مَثۡوٰىهُ عَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّنۡفَعَنَا٘ اَوۡ نَتَّخِذَهٗ وَلَدًاؕ وَكَذٰلِكَ مَكَّنَّا لِيُوۡسُفَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِؗ وَلِنُعَلِّمَهٗ مِنۡ تَاۡوِيۡلِ الۡاَحَادِيۡثِؕ وَاللّٰهُ غَالِبٌ عَلٰ٘ي اَمۡرِهٖ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the one from Egypt who bought him said to his wife, "Make his residence comfortable. Perhaps he will benefit us, or we will adopt him as a son." And thus, We established Joseph in the land that We might teach him the interpretation of events. And Allah is predominant over His affair, but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا بَلَغَ اَشُدَّهٗ٘ اٰتَيۡنٰهُ حُكۡمًا وَّعِلۡمًاؕ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when Joseph reached maturity, We gave him judgment and knowledge. And thus We reward the doers of good

quran.arabic: وَرَاوَدَتۡهُ الَّتِيۡ هُوَ فِيۡ بَيۡتِهَا عَنۡ نَّفۡسِهٖ وَغَلَّقَتِ الۡاَبۡوَابَ وَقَالَتۡ هَيۡتَ لَكَؕ قَالَ مَعَاذَ اللّٰهِ اِنَّهٗ رَبِّيۡ٘ اَحۡسَنَ مَثۡوَايَؕ اِنَّهٗ لَا يُفۡلِحُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And she, in whose house he was, sought to seduce him. She closed the doors and said, "Come, you." He said, "[I seek] the refuge of Allah. Indeed, he is my master, who has made good my residence. Indeed, wrongdoers will not succeed

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ هَمَّتۡ بِهٖ وَهَمَّ بِهَاۚ لَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ رَّاٰ بُرۡهَانَ رَبِّهٖؕ كَذٰلِكَ لِنَصۡرِفَ عَنۡهُ السُّوۡٓءَ وَالۡفَحۡشَآءَؕ اِنَّهٗ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا الۡمُخۡلَصِيۡنَ
quran.english: And she certainly determined [to seduce] him, and he would have inclined to her had he not seen the proof of his Lord. And thus [it was] that We should avert from him evil and immorality. Indeed, he was of Our chosen servants

quran.arabic: وَاسۡتَبَقَا الۡبَابَ وَقَدَّتۡ قَمِيۡصَهٗ مِنۡ دُبُرٍ وَّاَلۡفَيَا سَيِّدَهَا لَدَا الۡبَابِؕ قَالَتۡ مَا جَزَآءُ مَنۡ اَرَادَ بِاَهۡلِكَ سُوۡٓءًا اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يُّسۡجَنَ اَوۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And they both raced to the door, and she tore his shirt from the back, and they found her husband at the door. She said, "What is the recompense of one who intended evil for your wife but that he be imprisoned or a painful punishment

quran.arabic: قَالَ هِيَ رَاوَدَتۡنِيۡ عَنۡ نَّفۡسِيۡ وَشَهِدَ شَاهِدٌ مِّنۡ اَهۡلِهَاۚ اِنۡ كَانَ قَمِيۡصُهٗ قُدَّ مِنۡ قُبُلٍ فَصَدَقَتۡ وَهُوَ مِنَ الۡكٰذِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Joseph] said, "It was she who sought to seduce me." And a witness from her family testified. "If his shirt is torn from the front, then she has told the truth, and he is of the liars

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ كَانَ قَمِيۡصُهٗ قُدَّ مِنۡ دُبُرٍ فَكَذَبَتۡ وَهُوَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: But if his shirt is torn from the back, then she has lied, and he is of the truthful

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَاٰ قَمِيۡصَهٗ قُدَّ مِنۡ دُبُرٍ قَالَ اِنَّهٗ مِنۡ كَيۡدِكُنَّؕ اِنَّ كَيۡدَكُنَّ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: So when her husband saw his shirt torn from the back, he said, "Indeed, it is of the women's plan. Indeed, your plan is great

quran.arabic: يُوۡسُفُ اَعۡرِضۡ عَنۡ هٰذَاࣝ وَاسۡتَغۡفِرِيۡ لِذَنۭۡ بِكِۚۖ اِنَّكِ كُنۡتِ مِنَ الۡخٰطِـِٕيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Joseph, ignore this. And, [my wife], ask forgiveness for your sin. Indeed, you were of the sinful

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ نِسۡوَةٌ فِي الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ امۡرَاَتُ الۡعَزِيۡزِ تُرَاوِدُ فَتٰىهَا عَنۡ نَّفۡسِهٖۚ قَدۡ شَغَفَهَا حُبًّاؕ اِنَّا لَنَرٰىهَا فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: And women in the city said, "The wife of al-'Azeez is seeking to seduce her slave boy; he has impassioned her with love. Indeed, we see her [to be] in clear error

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا سَمِعَتۡ بِمَكۡرِهِنَّ اَرۡسَلَتۡ اِلَيۡهِنَّ وَاَعۡتَدَتۡ لَهُنَّ مُتَّكَاً وَّاٰتَتۡ كُلَّ وَاحِدَةٍ مِّنۡهُنَّ سِكِّيۡنًا وَّقَالَتِ اخۡرُجۡ عَلَيۡهِنَّۚ فَلَمَّا رَاَيۡنَهٗ٘ اَكۡبَرۡنَهٗ وَقَطَّعۡنَ اَيۡدِيَهُنَّؗ وَقُلۡنَ حَاشَ لِلّٰهِ مَا هٰذَا بَشَرًاؕ اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا مَلَكٌ كَرِيۡمٌ
quran.english: So when she heard of their scheming, she sent for them and prepared for them a banquet and gave each one of them a knife and said [to Joseph], "Come out before them." And when they saw him, they greatly admired him and cut their hands and said, "Perfect is Allah! This is not a man; this is none but a noble angel

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ فَذٰلِكُنَّ الَّذِيۡ لُمۡتُنَّنِيۡ فِيۡهِؕ وَلَقَدۡ رَاوَدۡتُّهٗ عَنۡ نَّفۡسِهٖ فَاسۡتَعۡصَمَؕ وَلَئِنۡ لَّمۡ يَفۡعَلۡ مَا٘ اٰمُرُهٗ لَيُسۡجَنَنَّ وَلَيَكُوۡنًا مِّنَ الصّٰغِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: She said, "That is the one about whom you blamed me. And I certainly sought to seduce him, but he firmly refused; and if he will not do what I order him, he will surely be imprisoned and will be of those debased

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ السِّجۡنُ اَحَبُّ اِلَيَّ مِمَّا يَدۡعُوۡنَنِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِۚ وَاِلَّا تَصۡرِفۡ عَنِّيۡ كَيۡدَهُنَّ اَصۡبُ اِلَيۡهِنَّ وَاَكُنۡ مِّنَ الۡجٰهِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, prison is more to my liking than that to which they invite me. And if You do not avert from me their plan, I might incline toward them and [thus] be of the ignorant

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَجَابَ لَهٗ رَبُّهٗ فَصَرَفَ عَنۡهُ كَيۡدَهُنَّؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: So his Lord responded to him and averted from him their plan. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ بَدَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا رَاَوُا الۡاٰيٰتِ لَيَسۡجُنُنَّهٗ حَتّٰي حِيۡنٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Then it appeared to them after they had seen the signs that al-'Azeez should surely imprison him for a time

quran.arabic: وَدَخَلَ مَعَهُ السِّجۡنَ فَتَيٰنِؕ قَالَ اَحَدُهُمَا٘ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَرٰىنِيۡ٘ اَعۡصِرُ خَمۡرًاۚ وَقَالَ الۡاٰخَرُ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَرٰىنِيۡ٘ اَحۡمِلُ فَوۡقَ رَاۡسِيۡ خُبۡزًا تَاۡكُلُ الطَّيۡرُ مِنۡهُؕ نَبِّئۡنَا بِتَاۡوِيۡلِهٖۚ اِنَّا نَرٰىكَ مِنَ الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And there entered the prison with him two young men. One of them said, "Indeed, I have seen myself [in a dream] pressing wine." The other said, "Indeed, I have seen myself carrying upon my head [some] bread, from which the birds were eating. Inform us of its interpretation; indeed, we see you to be of those who do good

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَا يَاۡتِيۡكُمَا طَعَامٌ تُرۡزَقٰنِهٖ٘ اِلَّا نَبَّاۡتُكُمَا بِتَاۡوِيۡلِهٖ قَبۡلَ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَكُمَاؕ ذٰلِكُمَا مِمَّا عَلَّمَنِيۡ رَبِّيۡؕ اِنِّيۡ تَرَكۡتُ مِلَّةَ قَوۡمٍ لَّا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِاللّٰهِ وَهُمۡ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ هُمۡ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "You will not receive food that is provided to you except that I will inform you of its interpretation before it comes to you. That is from what my Lord has taught me. Indeed, I have left the religion of a people who do not believe in Allah, and they, in the Hereafter, are disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَاتَّبَعۡتُ مِلَّةَ اٰبَآءِيۡ٘ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَاِسۡحٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوۡبَؕ مَا كَانَ لَنَا٘ اَنۡ نُّشۡرِكَ بِاللّٰهِ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ ذٰلِكَ مِنۡ فَضۡلِ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡنَا وَعَلَي النَّاسِ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And I have followed the religion of my fathers, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob. And it was not for us to associate anything with Allah. That is from the favor of Allah upon us and upon the people, but most of the people are not grateful

quran.arabic: يٰصَاحِبَيِ السِّجۡنِ ءَاَرۡبَابٌ مُّتَفَرِّقُوۡنَ خَيۡرٌ اَمِ اللّٰهُ الۡوَاحِدُ الۡقَهَّارُؕ‏
quran.english: O [my] two companions of prison, are separate lords better or Allah, the One, the Prevailing

quran.arabic: مَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اِلَّا٘ اَسۡمَآءً سَمَّيۡتُمُوۡهَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ وَاٰبَآؤُكُمۡ مَّا٘ اَنۡزَلَ اللّٰهُ بِهَا مِنۡ سُلۡطٰنٍؕ اِنِ الۡحُكۡمُ اِلَّا لِلّٰهِؕ اَمَرَ اَلَّا تَعۡبُدُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا٘ اِيَّاهُؕ ذٰلِكَ الدِّيۡنُ الۡقَيِّمُ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: You worship not besides Him except [mere] names you have named them, you and your fathers, for which Allah has sent down no authority. Legislation is not but for Allah. He has commanded that you worship not except Him. That is the correct religion, but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: يٰصَاحِبَيِ السِّجۡنِ اَمَّا٘ اَحَدُكُمَا فَيَسۡقِيۡ رَبَّهٗ خَمۡرًاۚ وَاَمَّا الۡاٰخَرُ فَيُصۡلَبُ فَتَاۡكُلُ الطَّيۡرُ مِنۡ رَّاۡسِهٖؕ قُضِيَ الۡاَمۡرُ الَّذِيۡ فِيۡهِ تَسۡتَفۡتِيٰنِؕ‏
quran.english: O two companions of prison, as for one of you, he will give drink to his master of wine; but as for the other, he will be crucified, and the birds will eat from his head. The matter has been decreed about which you both inquire

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ لِلَّذِيۡ ظَنَّ اَنَّهٗ نَاجٍ مِّنۡهُمَا اذۡكُرۡنِيۡ عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَؗ فَاَنۡسٰىهُ الشَّيۡطٰنُ ذِكۡرَ رَبِّهٖ فَلَبِثَ فِي السِّجۡنِ بِضۡعَ سِنِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And he said to the one whom he knew would go free, "Mention me before your master." But Satan made him forget the mention [to] his master, and Joseph remained in prison several years

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الۡمَلِكُ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَرٰي سَبۡعَ بَقَرٰتٍ سِمَانٍ يَّاۡكُلُهُنَّ سَبۡعٌ عِجَافٌ وَّسَبۡعَ سُنۭۡ بُلٰتٍ خُضۡرٍ وَّاُخَرَ يٰبِسٰتٍؕ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡمَلَاُ اَفۡتُوۡنِيۡ فِيۡ رُءۡيَايَ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ لِلرُّءۡيَا تَعۡبُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [subsequently] the king said, "Indeed, I have seen [in a dream] seven fat cows being eaten by seven [that were] lean, and seven green spikes [of grain] and others [that were] dry. O eminent ones, explain to me my vision, if you should interpret visions

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اَضۡغَاثُ اَحۡلَامٍۚ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِتَاۡوِيۡلِ الۡاَحۡلَامِ بِعٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "[It is but] a mixture of false dreams, and we are not learned in the interpretation of dreams

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡ نَجَا مِنۡهُمَا وَادَّكَرَ بَعۡدَ اُمَّةٍ اَنَا اُنَبِّئُكُمۡ بِتَاۡوِيۡلِهٖ فَاَرۡسِلُوۡنِ
quran.english: But the one who was freed and remembered after a time said, "I will inform you of its interpretation, so send me forth

quran.arabic: يُوۡسُفُ اَيُّهَا الصِّدِّيۡقُ اَفۡتِنَا فِيۡ سَبۡعِ بَقَرٰتٍ سِمَانٍ يَّاۡكُلُهُنَّ سَبۡعٌ عِجَافٌ وَّسَبۡعِ سُنۭۡ بُلٰتٍ خُضۡرٍ وَّاُخَرَ يٰبِسٰتٍۙ لَّعَلِّيۡ٘ اَرۡجِعُ اِلَي النَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: [He said], "Joseph, O man of truth, explain to us about seven fat cows eaten by seven [that were] lean, and seven green spikes [of grain] and others [that were] dry - that I may return to the people; perhaps they will know [about you]

quran.arabic: قَالَ تَزۡرَعُوۡنَ سَبۡعَ سِنِيۡنَ دَاَبًاۚ فَمَا حَصَدۡتُّمۡ فَذَرُوۡهُ فِيۡ سُنۭۡ بُلِهٖ٘ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا مِّمَّا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Joseph] said, "You will plant for seven years consecutively; and what you harvest leave in its spikes, except a little from which you will eat

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ يَاۡتِيۡ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ ذٰلِكَ سَبۡعٌ شِدَادٌ يَّاۡكُلۡنَ مَا قَدَّمۡتُمۡ لَهُنَّ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا مِّمَّا تُحۡصِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then will come after that seven difficult [years] which will consume what you saved for them, except a little from which you will store

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ يَاۡتِيۡ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ ذٰلِكَ عَامٌ فِيۡهِ يُغَاثُ النَّاسُ وَفِيۡهِ يَعۡصِرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Then will come after that a year in which the people will be given rain and in which they will press [olives and grapes]

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الۡمَلِكُ ائۡتُوۡنِيۡ بِهٖۚ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُ الرَّسُوۡلُ قَالَ ارۡجِعۡ اِلٰي رَبِّكَ فَسۡـَٔلۡهُ مَا بَالُ النِّسۡوَةِ الّٰتِيۡ قَطَّعۡنَ اَيۡدِيَهُنَّؕ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ بِكَيۡدِهِنَّ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And the king said, "Bring him to me." But when the messenger came to him, [Joseph] said, "Return to your master and ask him what is the case of the women who cut their hands. Indeed, my Lord is Knowing of their plan

quran.arabic: قَالَ مَا خَطۡبُكُنَّ اِذۡ رَاوَدۡتُّنَّ يُوۡسُفَ عَنۡ نَّفۡسِهٖؕ قُلۡنَ حَاشَ لِلّٰهِ مَا عَلِمۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ سُوۡٓءٍؕ قَالَتِ امۡرَاَتُ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡـٰٔنَ حَصۡحَصَ الۡحَقُّؗ اَنَا رَاوَدۡتُّهٗ عَنۡ نَّفۡسِهٖ وَاِنَّهٗ لَمِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Said [the king to the women], "What was your condition when you sought to seduce Joseph?" They said, "Perfect is Allah! We know about him no evil." The wife of al-'Azeez said, "Now the truth has become evident. It was I who sought to seduce him, and indeed, he is of the truthful

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ لِيَعۡلَمَ اَنِّيۡ لَمۡ اَخُنۡهُ بِالۡغَيۡبِ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَهۡدِيۡ كَيۡدَ الۡخَآئِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: That is so al-'Azeez will know that I did not betray him in [his] absence and that Allah does not guide the plan of betrayers

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اُبَرِّئُ نَفۡسِيۡۚ اِنَّ النَّفۡسَ لَاَمَّارَةٌۭ بِالسُّوۡٓءِ اِلَّا مَا رَحِمَ رَبِّيۡؕ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And I do not acquit myself. Indeed, the soul is a persistent enjoiner of evil, except those upon which my Lord has mercy. Indeed, my Lord is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الۡمَلِكُ ائۡتُوۡنِيۡ بِهٖ٘ اَسۡتَخۡلِصۡهُ لِنَفۡسِيۡۚ فَلَمَّا كَلَّمَهٗ قَالَ اِنَّكَ الۡيَوۡمَ لَدَيۡنَا مَكِيۡنٌ اَمِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And the king said, "Bring him to me; I will appoint him exclusively for myself." And when he spoke to him, he said, "Indeed, you are today established [in position] and trusted

quran.arabic: قَالَ اجۡعَلۡنِيۡ عَلٰي خَزَآئِنِ الۡاَرۡضِۚ اِنِّيۡ حَفِيۡظٌ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: [Joseph] said, "Appoint me over the storehouses of the land. Indeed, I will be a knowing guardian

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ مَكَّنَّا لِيُوۡسُفَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِۚ يَتَبَوَّاُ مِنۡهَا حَيۡثُ يَشَآءُؕ نُصِيۡبُ بِرَحۡمَتِنَا مَنۡ نَّشَآءُ وَلَا نُضِيۡعُ اَجۡرَ الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And thus We established Joseph in the land to settle therein wherever he willed. We touch with Our mercy whom We will, and We do not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good

quran.arabic: وَلَاَجۡرُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ خَيۡرٌ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَكَانُوۡا يَتَّقُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And the reward of the Hereafter is better for those who believed and were fearing Allah

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَ اِخۡوَةُ يُوۡسُفَ فَدَخَلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِ فَعَرَفَهُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَهٗ مُنۡكِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the brothers of Joseph came [seeking food], and they entered upon him; and he recognized them, but he was to them unknown

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا جَهَّزَهُمۡ بِجَهَازِهِمۡ قَالَ ائۡتُوۡنِيۡ بِاَخٍ لَّكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَبِيۡكُمۡۚ اَلَا تَرَوۡنَ اَنِّيۡ٘ اُوۡفِي الۡكَيۡلَ وَاَنَا خَيۡرُ الۡمُنۡزِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when he had furnished them with their supplies, he said, "Bring me a brother of yours from your father. Do not you see that I give full measure and that I am the best of accommodators

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ لَّمۡ تَاۡتُوۡنِيۡ بِهٖ فَلَا كَيۡلَ لَكُمۡ عِنۡدِيۡ وَلَا تَقۡرَبُوۡنِ
quran.english: But if you do not bring him to me, no measure will there be [hereafter] for you from me, nor will you approach me

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا سَنُرَاوِدُ عَنۡهُ اَبَاهُ وَاِنَّا لَفٰعِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "We will attempt to dissuade his father from [keeping] him, and indeed, we will do [it]

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ لِفِتۡيٰنِهِ اجۡعَلُوۡا بِضَاعَتَهُمۡ فِيۡ رِحَالِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَعۡرِفُوۡنَهَا٘ اِذَا انۡقَلَبُوۡ٘ا اِلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [Joseph] said to his servants, "Put their merchandise into their saddlebags so they might recognize it when they have gone back to their people that perhaps they will [again] return

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَجَعُوۡ٘ا اِلٰ٘ي اَبِيۡهِمۡ قَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَبَانَا مُنِعَ مِنَّا الۡكَيۡلُ فَاَرۡسِلۡ مَعَنَا٘ اَخَانَا نَكۡتَلۡ وَاِنَّا لَهٗ لَحٰفِظُوۡنَ
quran.english: So when they returned to their father, they said, "O our father, [further] measure has been denied to us, so send with us our brother [that] we will be given measure. And indeed, we will be his guardians

quran.arabic: قَالَ هَلۡ اٰمَنُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ اِلَّا كَمَا٘ اَمِنۡتُكُمۡ عَلٰ٘ي اَخِيۡهِ مِنۡ قَبۡلُؕ فَاللّٰهُ خَيۡرٌ حٰفِظًاࣕ وَّهُوَ اَرۡحَمُ الرّٰحِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Should I entrust you with him except [under coercion] as I entrusted you with his brother before? But Allah is the best guardian, and He is the most merciful of the merciful

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا فَتَحُوۡا مَتَاعَهُمۡ وَجَدُوۡا بِضَاعَتَهُمۡ رُدَّتۡ اِلَيۡهِمۡؕ قَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَبَانَا مَا نَبۡغِيۡؕ هٰذِهٖ بِضَاعَتُنَا رُدَّتۡ اِلَيۡنَاۚ وَنَمِيۡرُ اَهۡلَنَا وَنَحۡفَظُ اَخَانَا وَنَزۡدَادُ كَيۡلَ بَعِيۡرٍؕ ذٰلِكَ كَيۡلٌ يَّسِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And when they opened their baggage, they found their merchandise returned to them. They said, "O our father, what [more] could we desire? This is our merchandise returned to us. And we will obtain supplies for our family and protect our brother and obtain an increase of a camel's load; that is an easy measurement

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَنۡ اُرۡسِلَهٗ مَعَكُمۡ حَتّٰي تُؤۡتُوۡنِ مَوۡثِقًا مِّنَ اللّٰهِ لَتَاۡتُنَّنِيۡ بِهٖ٘ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يُّحَاطَ بِكُمۡۚ فَلَمَّا٘ اٰتَوۡهُ مَوۡثِقَهُمۡ قَالَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي مَا نَقُوۡلُ وَكِيۡلٌ
quran.english: [Jacob] said, "Never will I send him with you until you give me a promise by Allah that you will bring him [back] to me, unless you should be surrounded by enemies." And when they had given their promise, he said, "Allah, over what we say, is Witness

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ يٰبَنِيَّ لَا تَدۡخُلُوۡا مِنۭۡ بَابٍ وَّاحِدٍ وَّادۡخُلُوۡا مِنۡ اَبۡوَابٍ مُّتَفَرِّقَةٍؕ وَمَا٘ اُغۡنِيۡ عَنۡكُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ اِنِ الۡحُكۡمُ اِلَّا لِلّٰهِؕ عَلَيۡهِ تَوَكَّلۡتُۚ وَعَلَيۡهِ فَلۡيَتَوَكَّلِ الۡمُتَوَكِّلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And he said, "O my sons, do not enter from one gate but enter from different gates; and I cannot avail you against [the decree of] Allah at all. The decision is only for Allah; upon Him I have relied, and upon Him let those who would rely [indeed] rely

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا دَخَلُوۡا مِنۡ حَيۡثُ اَمَرَهُمۡ اَبُوۡهُمۡؕ مَا كَانَ يُغۡنِيۡ عَنۡهُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍ اِلَّا حَاجَةً فِيۡ نَفۡسِ يَعۡقُوۡبَ قَضٰىهَاؕ وَاِنَّهٗ لَذُوۡ عِلۡمٍ لِّمَا عَلَّمۡنٰهُ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And when they entered from where their father had ordered them, it did not avail them against Allah at all except [it was] a need within the soul of Jacob, which he satisfied. And indeed, he was a possessor of knowledge because of what We had taught him, but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا دَخَلُوۡا عَلٰي يُوۡسُفَ اٰوٰ٘ي اِلَيۡهِ اَخَاهُ قَالَ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَنَا اَخُوۡكَ فَلَا تَبۡتَئِسۡ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when they entered upon Joseph, he took his brother to himself; he said, "Indeed, I am your brother, so do not despair over what they used to do [to me]

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَهَّزَهُمۡ بِجَهَازِهِمۡ جَعَلَ السِّقَايَةَ فِيۡ رَحۡلِ اَخِيۡهِ ثُمَّ اَذَّنَ مُؤَذِّنٌ اَيَّتُهَا الۡعِيۡرُ اِنَّكُمۡ لَسٰرِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: So when he had furnished them with their supplies, he put the [gold measuring] bowl into the bag of his brother. Then an announcer called out, "O caravan, indeed you are thieves

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا وَاَقۡبَلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مَّاذَا تَفۡقِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said while approaching them, "What is it you are missing

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا نَفۡقِدُ صُوَاعَ الۡمَلِكِ وَلِمَنۡ جَآءَ بِهٖ حِمۡلُ بَعِيۡرٍ وَّاَنَا بِهٖ زَعِيۡمٌ
quran.english: They said, "We are missing the measure of the king. And for he who produces it is [the reward of] a camel's load, and I am responsible for it

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا تَاللّٰهِ لَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمۡ مَّا جِئۡنَا لِنُفۡسِدَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا كُنَّا سٰرِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "By Allah, you have certainly known that we did not come to cause corruption in the land, and we have not been thieves

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا فَمَا جَزَآؤُهٗ٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ كٰذِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: The accusers said, "Then what would be its recompense if you should be liars

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا جَزَآؤُهٗ مَنۡ وُّجِدَ فِيۡ رَحۡلِهٖ فَهُوَ جَزَآؤُهٗؕ كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: [The brothers] said, "Its recompense is that he in whose bag it is found - he [himself] will be its recompense. Thus do we recompense the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: فَبَدَاَ بِاَوۡعِيَتِهِمۡ قَبۡلَ وِعَآءِ اَخِيۡهِ ثُمَّ اسۡتَخۡرَجَهَا مِنۡ وِّعَآءِ اَخِيۡهِؕ كَذٰلِكَ كِدۡنَا لِيُوۡسُفَؕ مَا كَانَ لِيَاۡخُذَ اَخَاهُ فِيۡ دِيۡنِ الۡمَلِكِ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يَّشَآءَ اللّٰهُؕ نَرۡفَعُ دَرَجٰتٍ مَّنۡ نَّشَآءُؕ وَفَوۡقَ كُلِّ ذِيۡ عِلۡمٍ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: So he began [the search] with their bags before the bag of his brother; then he extracted it from the bag of his brother. Thus did We plan for Joseph. He could not have taken his brother within the religion of the king except that Allah willed. We raise in degrees whom We will, but over every possessor of knowledge is one [more] knowing

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ يَّسۡرِقۡ فَقَدۡ سَرَقَ اَخٌ لَّهٗ مِنۡ قَبۡلُۚ فَاَسَرَّهَا يُوۡسُفُ فِيۡ نَفۡسِهٖ وَلَمۡ يُبۡدِهَا لَهُمۡۚ قَالَ اَنۡتُمۡ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًاۚ وَاللّٰهُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا تَصِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "If he steals - a brother of his has stolen before." But Joseph kept it within himself and did not reveal it to them. He said, "You are worse in position, and Allah is most knowing of what you describe

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡعَزِيۡزُ اِنَّ لَهٗ٘ اَبًا شَيۡخًا كَبِيۡرًا فَخُذۡ اَحَدَنَا مَكَانَهٗۚ اِنَّا نَرٰىكَ مِنَ الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "O 'Azeez, indeed he has a father [who is] an old man, so take one of us in place of him. Indeed, we see you as a doer of good

quran.arabic: قَالَ مَعَاذَ اللّٰهِ اَنۡ نَّاۡخُذَ اِلَّا مَنۡ وَّجَدۡنَا مَتَاعَنَا عِنۡدَهٗ٘ۙ اِنَّا٘ اِذًا لَّظٰلِمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: He said, "[I seek] the refuge of Allah [to prevent] that we take except him with whom we found our possession. Indeed, we would then be unjust

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا اسۡتَيۡـَٔسُوۡا مِنۡهُ خَلَصُوۡا نَجِيًّاؕ قَالَ كَبِيۡرُهُمۡ اَلَمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّ اَبَاكُمۡ قَدۡ اَخَذَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ مَّوۡثِقًا مِّنَ اللّٰهِ وَمِنۡ قَبۡلُ مَا فَرَّطۡتُّمۡ فِيۡ يُوۡسُفَۚ فَلَنۡ اَبۡرَحَ الۡاَرۡضَ حَتّٰي يَاۡذَنَ لِيۡ٘ اَبِيۡ٘ اَوۡ يَحۡكُمَ اللّٰهُ لِيۡۚ وَهُوَ خَيۡرُ الۡحٰكِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: So when they had despaired of him, they secluded themselves in private consultation. The eldest of them said, "Do you not know that your father has taken upon you an oath by Allah and [that] before you failed in [your duty to] Joseph? So I will never leave [this] land until my father permits me or Allah decides for me, and He is the best of judges

quran.arabic: اِرۡجِعُوۡ٘ا اِلٰ٘ي اَبِيۡكُمۡ فَقُوۡلُوۡا يٰ٘اَبَانَا٘ اِنَّ ابۡنَكَ سَرَقَۚ وَمَا شَهِدۡنَا٘ اِلَّا بِمَا عَلِمۡنَا وَمَا كُنَّا لِلۡغَيۡبِ حٰفِظِيۡنَ
quran.english: Return to your father and say, "O our father, indeed your son has stolen, and we did not testify except to what we knew. And we were not witnesses of the unseen

quran.arabic: وَسۡـَٔلِ الۡقَرۡيَةَ الَّتِيۡ كُنَّا فِيۡهَا وَالۡعِيۡرَ الَّتِيۡ٘ اَقۡبَلۡنَا فِيۡهَاؕ وَاِنَّا لَصٰدِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And ask the city in which we were and the caravan in which we came - and indeed, we are truthful

quran.arabic: قَالَ بَلۡ سَوَّلَتۡ لَكُمۡ اَنۡفُسُكُمۡ اَمۡرًاؕ فَصَبۡرٌ جَمِيۡلٌؕ عَسَي اللّٰهُ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَنِيۡ بِهِمۡ جَمِيۡعًاؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡعَلِيۡمُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: [Jacob] said, "Rather, your souls have enticed you to something, so patience is most fitting. Perhaps Allah will bring them to me all together. Indeed it is He who is the Knowing, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَتَوَلّٰي عَنۡهُمۡ وَقَالَ يٰ٘اَسَفٰي عَلٰي يُوۡسُفَ وَابۡيَضَّتۡ عَيۡنٰهُ مِنَ الۡحُزۡنِ فَهُوَ كَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And he turned away from them and said, "Oh, my sorrow over Joseph," and his eyes became white from grief, for he was [of that] a suppressor

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا تَاللّٰهِ تَفۡتَؤُا تَذۡكُرُ يُوۡسُفَ حَتّٰي تَكُوۡنَ حَرَضًا اَوۡ تَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡهٰلِكِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "By Allah, you will not cease remembering Joseph until you become fatally ill or become of those who perish

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّمَا٘ اَشۡكُوۡا بَثِّيۡ وَحُزۡنِيۡ٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِ وَاَعۡلَمُ مِنَ اللّٰهِ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "I only complain of my suffering and my grief to Allah, and I know from Allah that which you do not know

quran.arabic: يٰبَنِيَّ اذۡهَبُوۡا فَتَحَسَّسُوۡا مِنۡ يُّوۡسُفَ وَاَخِيۡهِ وَلَا تَايۡـَٔسُوۡا مِنۡ رَّوۡحِ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّهٗ لَا يَايۡـَٔسُ مِنۡ رَّوۡحِ اللّٰهِ اِلَّا الۡقَوۡمُ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: O my sons, go and find out about Joseph and his brother and despair not of relief from Allah. Indeed, no one despairs of relief from Allah except the disbelieving people

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا دَخَلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِ قَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡعَزِيۡزُ مَسَّنَا وَاَهۡلَنَا الضُّرُّ وَجِئۡنَا بِبِضَاعَةٍ مُّزۡجٰىةٍ فَاَوۡفِ لَنَا الۡكَيۡلَ وَتَصَدَّقۡ عَلَيۡنَاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَجۡزِي الۡمُتَصَدِّقِيۡنَ
quran.english: So when they entered upon Joseph, they said, "O 'Azeez, adversity has touched us and our family, and we have come with goods poor in quality, but give us full measure and be charitable to us. Indeed, Allah rewards the charitable

quran.arabic: قَالَ هَلۡ عَلِمۡتُمۡ مَّا فَعَلۡتُمۡ بِيُوۡسُفَ وَاَخِيۡهِ اِذۡ اَنۡتُمۡ جٰهِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Do you know what you did with Joseph and his brother when you were ignorant

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا ءَاِنَّكَ لَاَنۡتَ يُوۡسُفُؕ قَالَ اَنَا يُوۡسُفُ وَهٰذَا٘ اَخِيۡؗ قَدۡ مَنَّ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡنَاؕ اِنَّهٗ مَنۡ يَّتَّقِ وَيَصۡبِرۡ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يُضِيۡعُ اَجۡرَ الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Are you indeed Joseph?" He said "I am Joseph, and this is my brother. Allah has certainly favored us. Indeed, he who fears Allah and is patient, then indeed, Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا تَاللّٰهِ لَقَدۡ اٰثَرَكَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡنَا وَاِنۡ كُنَّا لَخٰطِـِٕيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "By Allah, certainly has Allah preferred you over us, and indeed, we have been sinners

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَثۡرِيۡبَ عَلَيۡكُمُ الۡيَوۡمَؕ يَغۡفِرُ اللّٰهُ لَكُمۡؗ وَهُوَ اَرۡحَمُ الرّٰحِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "No blame will there be upon you today. Allah will forgive you; and He is the most merciful of the merciful

quran.arabic: اِذۡهَبُوۡا بِقَمِيۡصِيۡ هٰذَا فَاَلۡقُوۡهُ عَلٰي وَجۡهِ اَبِيۡ يَاۡتِ بَصِيۡرًاۚ وَاۡتُوۡنِيۡ بِاَهۡلِكُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Take this, my shirt, and cast it over the face of my father; he will become seeing. And bring me your family, all together

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا فَصَلَتِ الۡعِيۡرُ قَالَ اَبُوۡهُمۡ اِنِّيۡ لَاَجِدُ رِيۡحَ يُوۡسُفَ لَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ تُفَنِّدُوۡنِ
quran.english: And when the caravan departed [from Egypt], their father said, "Indeed, I find the smell of Joseph [and would say that he was alive] if you did not think me weakened in mind

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا تَاللّٰهِ اِنَّكَ لَفِيۡ ضَلٰلِكَ الۡقَدِيۡمِ
quran.english: They said, "By Allah, indeed you are in your [same] old error

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا٘ اَنۡ جَآءَ الۡبَشِيۡرُ اَلۡقٰىهُ عَلٰي وَجۡهِهٖ فَارۡتَدَّ بَصِيۡرًاؕۚ قَالَ اَلَمۡ اَقُلۡ لَّكُمۡۚ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَعۡلَمُ مِنَ اللّٰهِ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when the bearer of good tidings arrived, he cast it over his face, and he returned [once again] seeing. He said, "Did I not tell you that I know from Allah that which you do not know

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَبَانَا اسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَنَا ذُنُوۡبَنَا٘ اِنَّا كُنَّا خٰطِـِٕيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "O our father, ask for us forgiveness of our sins; indeed, we have been sinners

quran.arabic: قَالَ سَوۡفَ اَسۡتَغۡفِرُ لَكُمۡ رَبِّيۡؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡغَفُوۡرُ الرَّحِيۡمُ
quran.english: He said, "I will ask forgiveness for you from my Lord. Indeed, it is He who is the Forgiving, the Merciful

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا دَخَلُوۡا عَلٰي يُوۡسُفَ اٰوٰ٘ي اِلَيۡهِ اَبَوَيۡهِ وَقَالَ ادۡخُلُوۡا مِصۡرَ اِنۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ اٰمِنِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And when they entered upon Joseph, he took his parents to himself and said, "Enter Egypt, Allah willing, safe [and secure]

quran.arabic: وَرَفَعَ اَبَوَيۡهِ عَلَي الۡعَرۡشِ وَخَرُّوۡا لَهٗ سُجَّدًاۚ وَقَالَ يٰ٘اَبَتِ هٰذَا تَاۡوِيۡلُ رُءۡيَايَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُؗ قَدۡ جَعَلَهَا رَبِّيۡ حَقًّاؕ وَقَدۡ اَحۡسَنَ بِيۡ٘ اِذۡ اَخۡرَجَنِيۡ مِنَ السِّجۡنِ وَجَآءَ بِكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡبَدۡوِ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ اَنۡ نَّزَغَ الشَّيۡطٰنُ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنَ اِخۡوَتِيۡؕ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ لَطِيۡفٌ لِّمَا يَشَآءُؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡعَلِيۡمُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: And he raised his parents upon the throne, and they bowed to him in prostration. And he said, "O my father, this is the explanation of my vision of before. My Lord has made it reality. And He was certainly good to me when He took me out of prison and brought you [here] from bedouin life after Satan had induced [estrangement] between me and my brothers. Indeed, my Lord is Subtle in what He wills. Indeed, it is He who is the Knowing, the Wise

quran.arabic: رَبِّ قَدۡ اٰتَيۡتَنِيۡ مِنَ الۡمُلۡكِ وَعَلَّمۡتَنِيۡ مِنۡ تَاۡوِيۡلِ الۡاَحَادِيۡثِۚ فَاطِرَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِࣞ اَنۡتَ وَلِيّٖ فِي الدُّنۡيَا وَالۡاٰخِرَةِۚ تَوَفَّنِيۡ مُسۡلِمًا وَّاَلۡحِقۡنِيۡ بِالصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: My Lord, You have given me [something] of sovereignty and taught me of the interpretation of dreams. Creator of the heavens and earth, You are my protector in this world and in the Hereafter. Cause me to die a Muslim and join me with the righteous

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ مِنۡ اَنۭۡ بَآءِ الۡغَيۡبِ نُوۡحِيۡهِ اِلَيۡكَۚ وَمَا كُنۡتَ لَدَيۡهِمۡ اِذۡ اَجۡمَعُوۡ٘ا اَمۡرَهُمۡ وَهُمۡ يَمۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: That is from the news of the unseen which We reveal, [O Muhammad], to you. And you were not with them when they put together their plan while they conspired

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَكۡثَرُ النَّاسِ وَلَوۡ حَرَصۡتَ بِمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And most of the people, although you strive [for it], are not believers

quran.arabic: وَمَا تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍؕ اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا ذِكۡرٌ لِّلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And you do not ask of them for it any payment. It is not except a reminder to the worlds

quran.arabic: وَكَاَيِّنۡ مِّنۡ اٰيَةٍ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ يَمُرُّوۡنَ عَلَيۡهَا وَهُمۡ عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضُوۡنَ
quran.english: And how many a sign within the heavens and earth do they pass over while they, therefrom, are turning away

quran.arabic: وَمَا يُؤۡمِنُ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ بِاللّٰهِ اِلَّا وَهُمۡ مُّشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: And most of them believe not in Allah except while they associate others with Him

quran.arabic: اَفَاَمِنُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ تَاۡتِيَهُمۡ غَاشِيَةٌ مِّنۡ عَذَابِ اللّٰهِ اَوۡ تَاۡتِيَهُمُ السَّاعَةُ بَغۡتَةً وَّهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then do they feel secure that there will not come to them an overwhelming [aspect] of the punishment of Allah or that the Hour will not come upon them suddenly while they do not perceive

quran.arabic: قُلۡ هٰذِهٖ سَبِيۡلِيۡ٘ اَدۡعُوۡ٘ا اِلَي اللّٰهِࣞؔ عَلٰي بَصِيۡرَةٍ اَنَا وَمَنِ اتَّبَعَنِيۡؕ وَسُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ وَمَا٘ اَنَا مِنَ الۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "This is my way; I invite to Allah with insight, I and those who follow me. And exalted is Allah; and I am not of those who associate others with Him

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَ اِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوۡحِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ اَهۡلِ الۡقُرٰيؕ اَفَلَمۡ يَسِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَيَنۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡؕ وَلَدَارُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ خَيۡرٌ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوۡاؕ اَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We sent not before you [as messengers] except men to whom We revealed from among the people of cities. So have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them? And the home of the Hereafter is best for those who fear Allah; then will you not reason

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا اسۡتَيۡـَٔسَ الرُّسُلُ وَظَنُّوۡ٘ا اَنَّهُمۡ قَدۡ كُذِبُوۡا جَآءَهُمۡ نَصۡرُنَاۙ فَنُجِّيَ مَنۡ نَّشَآءُؕ وَلَا يُرَدُّ بَاۡسُنَا عَنِ الۡقَوۡمِ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: [They continued] until, when the messengers despaired and were certain that they had been denied, there came to them Our victory, and whoever We willed was saved. And Our punishment cannot be repelled from the people who are criminals

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ كَانَ فِيۡ قَصَصِهِمۡ عِبۡرَةٌ لِّاُولِي الۡاَلۡبَابِؕ مَا كَانَ حَدِيۡثًا يُّفۡتَرٰي وَلٰكِنۡ تَصۡدِيۡقَ الَّذِيۡ بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِ وَتَفۡصِيۡلَ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ وَّهُدًي وَّرَحۡمَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: There was certainly in their stories a lesson for those of understanding. Never was the Qur'an a narration invented, but a confirmation of what was before it and a detailed explanation of all things and guidance and mercy for a people who believe

quran.arabic: الٓمّٓرٰࣞ تِلۡكَ اٰيٰتُ الۡكِتٰبِؕ وَالَّذِيۡ٘ اُنۡزِلَ اِلَيۡكَ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ الۡحَقُّ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Alif, Lam, Meem, Ra. These are the verses of the Book; and what has been revealed to you from your Lord is the truth, but most of the people do not believe

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ رَفَعَ السَّمٰوٰتِ بِغَيۡرِ عَمَدٍ تَرَوۡنَهَا ثُمَّ اسۡتَوٰي عَلَي الۡعَرۡشِ وَسَخَّرَ الشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَؕ كُلٌّ يَّجۡرِيۡ لِاَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيؕ يُدَبِّرُ الۡاَمۡرَ يُفَصِّلُ الۡاٰيٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ بِلِقَآءِ رَبِّكُمۡ تُوۡقِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: It is Allah who erected the heavens without pillars that you [can] see; then He established Himself above the Throne and made subject the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term. He arranges [each] matter; He details the signs that you may, of the meeting with your Lord, be certain

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ مَدَّ الۡاَرۡضَ وَجَعَلَ فِيۡهَا رَوَاسِيَ وَاَنۡهٰرًاؕ وَمِنۡ كُلِّ الثَّمَرٰتِ جَعَلَ فِيۡهَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ اثۡنَيۡنِ يُغۡشِي الَّيۡلَ النَّهَارَؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّتَفَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it is He who spread the earth and placed therein firmly set mountains and rivers; and from all of the fruits He made therein two mates; He causes the night to cover the day. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought

quran.arabic: وَفِي الۡاَرۡضِ قِطَعٌ مُّتَجٰوِرٰتٌ وَّجَنّٰتٌ مِّنۡ اَعۡنَابٍ وَّزَرۡعٌ وَّنَخِيۡلٌ صِنۡوَانٌ وَّغَيۡرُ صِنۡوَانٍ يُّسۡقٰي بِمَآءٍ وَّاحِدٍࣞ وَنُفَضِّلُ بَعۡضَهَا عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ فِي الۡاُكُلِؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And within the land are neighboring plots and gardens of grapevines and crops and palm trees, [growing] several from a root or otherwise, watered with one water; but We make some of them exceed others in [quality of] fruit. Indeed in that are signs for a people who reason

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ تَعۡجَبۡ فَعَجَبٌ قَوۡلُهُمۡ ءَاِذَا كُنَّا تُرٰبًا ءَاِنَّا لَفِيۡ خَلۡقٍ جَدِيۡدٍ ࣢ؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِرَبِّهِمۡۚ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ الۡاَغۡلٰلُ فِيۡ٘ اَعۡنَاقِهِمۡۚ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ اَصۡحٰبُ النَّارِۚ هُمۡ فِيۡهَا خٰلِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if you are astonished, [O Muhammad] - then astonishing is their saying, "When we are dust, will we indeed be [brought] into a new creation?" Those are the ones who have disbelieved in their Lord, and those will have shackles upon their necks, and those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally

quran.arabic: وَيَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَكَ بِالسَّيِّئَةِ قَبۡلَ الۡحَسَنَةِ وَقَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمُ الۡمَثُلٰتُؕ وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُوۡ مَغۡفِرَةٍ لِّلنَّاسِ عَلٰي ظُلۡمِهِمۡۚ وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَشَدِيۡدُ الۡعِقَابِ
quran.english: They impatiently urge you to bring about evil before good, while there has already occurred before them similar punishments [to what they demand]. And indeed, your Lord is full of forgiveness for the people despite their wrongdoing, and indeed, your Lord is severe in penalty

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَوۡلَا٘ اُنۡزِلَ عَلَيۡهِ اٰيَةٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهٖؕ اِنَّمَا٘ اَنۡتَ مُنۡذِرٌ وَّلِكُلِّ قَوۡمٍ هَادٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And those who disbelieved say, "Why has a sign not been sent down to him from his Lord?" You are only a warner, and for every people is a guide

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَحۡمِلُ كُلُّ اُنۡثٰي وَمَا تَغِيۡضُ الۡاَرۡحَامُ وَمَا تَزۡدَادُؕ وَكُلُّ شَيۡءٍ عِنۡدَهٗ بِمِقۡدَارٍ
quran.english: Allah knows what every female carries and what the wombs lose [prematurely] or exceed. And everything with Him is by due measure

quran.arabic: عٰلِمُ الۡغَيۡبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ الۡكَبِيۡرُ الۡمُتَعَالِ
quran.english: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Grand, the Exalted

quran.arabic: سَوَآءٌ مِّنۡكُمۡ مَّنۡ اَسَرَّ الۡقَوۡلَ وَمَنۡ جَهَرَ بِهٖ وَمَنۡ هُوَ مُسۡتَخۡفٍۭ بِالَّيۡلِ وَسَارِبٌۭ بِالنَّهَارِ
quran.english: It is the same [to Him] concerning you whether one conceals [his] speech or one publicizes it and whether one is hidden by night or conspicuous [among others] by day

quran.arabic: لَهٗ مُعَقِّبٰتٌ مِّنۭۡ بَيۡنِ يَدَيۡهِ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهٖ يَحۡفَظُوۡنَهٗ مِنۡ اَمۡرِ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يُغَيِّرُ مَا بِقَوۡمٍ حَتّٰي يُغَيِّرُوۡا مَا بِاَنۡفُسِهِمۡؕ وَاِذَا٘ اَرَادَ اللّٰهُ بِقَوۡمٍ سُوۡٓءًا فَلَا مَرَدَّ لَهٗۚ وَمَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مِنۡ وَّالٍ
quran.english: For each one are successive [angels] before and behind him who protect him by the decree of Allah. Indeed, Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is in themselves. And when Allah intends for a people ill, there is no repelling it. And there is not for them besides Him any patron

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ يُرِيۡكُمُ الۡبَرۡقَ خَوۡفًا وَّطَمَعًا وَّيُنۡشِئُ السَّحَابَ الثِّقَالَۚ‏
quran.english: It is He who shows you lightening, [causing] fear and aspiration, and generates the heavy clouds

quran.arabic: وَيُسَبِّحُ الرَّعۡدُ بِحَمۡدِهٖ وَالۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ مِنۡ خِيۡفَتِهٖۚ وَيُرۡسِلُ الصَّوَاعِقَ فَيُصِيۡبُ بِهَا مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَهُمۡ يُجَادِلُوۡنَ فِي اللّٰهِۚ وَهُوَ شَدِيۡدُ الۡمِحَالِؕ‏
quran.english: And the thunder exalts [Allah] with praise of Him - and the angels [as well] from fear of Him - and He sends thunderbolts and strikes therewith whom He wills while they dispute about Allah; and He is severe in assault

quran.arabic: لَهٗ دَعۡوَةُ الۡحَقِّؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ لَا يَسۡتَجِيۡبُوۡنَ لَهُمۡ بِشَيۡءٍ اِلَّا كَبَاسِطِ كَفَّيۡهِ اِلَي الۡمَآءِ لِيَبۡلُغَ فَاهُ وَمَا هُوَ بِبَالِغِهٖؕ وَمَا دُعَآءُ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ اِلَّا فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ
quran.english: To Him [alone] is the supplication of truth. And those they call upon besides Him do not respond to them with a thing, except as one who stretches his hands toward water [from afar, calling it] to reach his mouth, but it will not reach it [thus]. And the supplication of the disbelievers is not but in error [i.e. futility]

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ يَسۡجُدُ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ طَوۡعًا وَّكَرۡهًا وَّظِلٰلُهُمۡ بِالۡغُدُوِّ وَالۡاٰصَالِࣛ‏
quran.english: And to Allah prostrates whoever is within the heavens and the earth, willingly or by compulsion, and their shadows [as well] in the mornings and the afternoons

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَنۡ رَّبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ قُلِ اللّٰهُؕ قُلۡ اَفَاتَّخَذۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اَوۡلِيَآءَ لَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ لِاَنۡفُسِهِمۡ نَفۡعًا وَّلَا ضَرًّاؕ قُلۡ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِي الۡاَعۡمٰي وَالۡبَصِيۡرُ ࣢ۙ اَمۡ هَلۡ تَسۡتَوِي الظُّلُمٰتُ وَالنُّوۡرُ ࣢ۚ اَمۡ جَعَلُوۡا لِلّٰهِ شُرَكَآءَ خَلَقُوۡا كَخَلۡقِهٖ فَتَشَابَهَ الۡخَلۡقُ عَلَيۡهِمۡؕ قُلِ اللّٰهُ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ وَّهُوَ الۡوَاحِدُ الۡقَهَّارُ
quran.english: Say, "Who is Lord of the heavens and earth?" Say, "Allah." Say, "Have you then taken besides Him allies not possessing [even] for themselves any benefit or any harm?" Say, "Is the blind equivalent to the seeing? Or is darkness equivalent to light? Or have they attributed to Allah partners who created like His creation so that the creation [of each] seemed similar to them?" Say, "Allah is the Creator of all things, and He is the One, the Prevailing

quran.arabic: اَنۡزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَسَالَتۡ اَوۡدِيَةٌۭ بِقَدَرِهَا فَاحۡتَمَلَ السَّيۡلُ زَبَدًا رَّابِيًاؕ وَمِمَّا يُوۡقِدُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِ فِي النَّارِ ابۡتِغَآءَ حِلۡيَةٍ اَوۡ مَتَاعٍ زَبَدٌ مِّثۡلُهٗؕ كَذٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ اللّٰهُ الۡحَقَّ وَالۡبَاطِلَ ࣢ؕ فَاَمَّا الزَّبَدُ فَيَذۡهَبُ جُفَآءًۚ وَاَمَّا مَا يَنۡفَعُ النَّاسَ فَيَمۡكُثُ فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ كَذٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ اللّٰهُ الۡاَمۡثَالَؕ‏
quran.english: He sends down from the sky, rain, and valleys flow according to their capacity, and the torrent carries a rising foam. And from that [ore] which they heat in the fire, desiring adornments and utensils, is a foam like it. Thus Allah presents [the example of] truth and falsehood. As for the foam, it vanishes, [being] cast off; but as for that which benefits the people, it remains on the earth. Thus does Allah present examples

quran.arabic: لِلَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتَجَابُوۡا لِرَبِّهِمُ الۡحُسۡنٰيؕؔ وَالَّذِيۡنَ لَمۡ يَسۡتَجِيۡبُوۡا لَهٗ لَوۡ اَنَّ لَهُمۡ مَّا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ جَمِيۡعًا وَّمِثۡلَهٗ مَعَهٗ لَافۡتَدَوۡا بِهٖؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ سُوۡٓءُ الۡحِسَابِ ࣢ۙ وَمَاۡوٰىهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُؕ وَبِئۡسَ الۡمِهَادُࣖ‏
quran.english: For those who have responded to their Lord is the best [reward], but those who did not respond to Him - if they had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it, they would [attempt to] ransom themselves thereby. Those will have the worst account, and their refuge is Hell, and wretched is the resting place

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ يَّعۡلَمُ اَنَّمَا٘ اُنۡزِلَ اِلَيۡكَ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ الۡحَقُّ كَمَنۡ هُوَ اَعۡمٰيؕ اِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ اُولُوا الۡاَلۡبَابِۙ‏
quran.english: Then is he who knows that what has been revealed to you from your Lord is the truth like one who is blind? They will only be reminded who are people of understanding

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يُوۡفُوۡنَ بِعَهۡدِ اللّٰهِ وَلَا يَنۡقُضُوۡنَ الۡمِيۡثَاقَۙ‏
quran.english: Those who fulfill the covenant of Allah and do not break the contract

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَصِلُوۡنَ مَا٘ اَمَرَ اللّٰهُ بِهٖ٘ اَنۡ يُّوۡصَلَ وَيَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡ وَيَخَافُوۡنَ سُوۡٓءَ الۡحِسَابِؕ‏
quran.english: And those who join that which Allah has ordered to be joined and fear their Lord and are afraid of the evil of [their] account

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ صَبَرُوا ابۡتِغَآءَ وَجۡهِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَاَقَامُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاَنۡفَقُوۡا مِمَّا رَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ سِرًّا وَّعَلَانِيَةً وَّيَدۡرَءُوۡنَ بِالۡحَسَنَةِ السَّيِّئَةَ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عُقۡبَي الدَّارِۙ‏
quran.english: And those who are patient, seeking the countenance of their Lord, and establish prayer and spend from what We have provided for them secretly and publicly and prevent evil with good - those will have the good consequence of [this] home

quran.arabic: جَنّٰتُ عَدۡنٍ يَّدۡخُلُوۡنَهَا وَمَنۡ صَلَحَ مِنۡ اٰبَآئِهِمۡ وَاَزۡوَاجِهِمۡ وَذُرِّيّٰتِهِمۡ وَالۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ يَدۡخُلُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ كُلِّ بَابٍۚ‏
quran.english: Gardens of perpetual residence; they will enter them with whoever were righteous among their fathers, their spouses and their descendants. And the angels will enter upon them from every gate, [saying]

quran.arabic: سَلٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ بِمَا صَبَرۡتُمۡ فَنِعۡمَ عُقۡبَي الدَّارِؕ‏
quran.english: Peace be upon you for what you patiently endured. And excellent is the final home

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَنۡقُضُوۡنَ عَهۡدَ اللّٰهِ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مِيۡثَاقِهٖ وَيَقۡطَعُوۡنَ مَا٘ اَمَرَ اللّٰهُ بِهٖ٘ اَنۡ يُّوۡصَلَ وَيُفۡسِدُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِۚ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ اللَّعۡنَةُ وَلَهُمۡ سُوۡٓءُ الدَّارِ
quran.english: But those who break the covenant of Allah after contracting it and sever that which Allah has ordered to be joined and spread corruption on earth - for them is the curse, and they will have the worst home

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَقۡدِرُؕ وَفَرِحُوۡا بِالۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاؕ وَمَا الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَا فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ اِلَّا مَتَاعٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Allah extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]. And they rejoice in the worldly life, while the worldly life is not, compared to the Hereafter, except [brief] enjoyment

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَوۡلَا٘ اُنۡزِلَ عَلَيۡهِ اٰيَةٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهٖؕ قُلۡ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُضِلُّ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِ مَنۡ اَنَابَۖۚ‏
quran.english: And those who disbelieved say, "Why has a sign not been sent down to him from his Lord?" Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, Allah leaves astray whom He wills and guides to Himself whoever turns back [to Him]

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَتَطۡمَئِنُّ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡ بِذِكۡرِ اللّٰهِؕ اَلَا بِذِكۡرِ اللّٰهِ تَطۡمَئِنُّ الۡقُلُوۡبُؕ‏
quran.english: Those who have believed and whose hearts are assured by the remembrance of Allah. Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ طُوۡبٰي لَهُمۡ وَحُسۡنُ مَاٰبٍ
quran.english: Those who have believed and done righteous deeds - a good state is theirs and a good return

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ فِيۡ٘ اُمَّةٍ قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهَا٘ اُمَمٌ لِّتَتۡلُوَا۠ عَلَيۡهِمُ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ وَهُمۡ يَكۡفُرُوۡنَ بِالرَّحۡمٰنِؕ قُلۡ هُوَ رَبِّيۡ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَۚ عَلَيۡهِ تَوَكَّلۡتُ وَاِلَيۡهِ مَتَابِ
quran.english: Thus have We sent you to a community before which [other] communities have passed on so you might recite to them that which We revealed to you, while they disbelieve in the Most Merciful. Say, "He is my Lord; there is no deity except Him. Upon Him I rely, and to Him is my return

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ اَنَّ قُرۡاٰنًا سُيِّرَتۡ بِهِ الۡجِبَالُ اَوۡ قُطِّعَتۡ بِهِ الۡاَرۡضُ اَوۡ كُلِّمَ بِهِ الۡمَوۡتٰيؕ بَلۡ لِّلّٰهِ الۡاَمۡرُ جَمِيۡعًاؕ اَفَلَمۡ يَايۡـَٔسِ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ لَّوۡ يَشَآءُ اللّٰهُ لَهَدَي النَّاسَ جَمِيۡعًاؕ وَلَا يَزَالُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا تُصِيۡبُهُمۡ بِمَا صَنَعُوۡا قَارِعَةٌ اَوۡ تَحُلُّ قَرِيۡبًا مِّنۡ دَارِهِمۡ حَتّٰي يَاۡتِيَ وَعۡدُ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يُخۡلِفُ الۡمِيۡعَادَࣖ‏
quran.english: And if there was any qur'an by which the mountains would be removed or the earth would be broken apart or the dead would be made to speak, [it would be this Qur'an], but to Allah belongs the affair entirely. Then have those who believed not accepted that had Allah willed, He would have guided the people, all of them? And those who disbelieve do not cease to be struck, for what they have done, by calamity - or it will descend near their home - until there comes the promise of Allah. Indeed, Allah does not fail in [His] promise

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدِ اسۡتُهۡزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَ فَاَمۡلَيۡتُ لِلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا ثُمَّ اَخَذۡتُهُمۡࣞ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عِقَابِ
quran.english: And already were [other] messengers ridiculed before you, and I extended the time of those who disbelieved; then I seized them, and how [terrible] was My penalty

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ هُوَ قَآئِمٌ عَلٰي كُلِّ نَفۡسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡۚ وَجَعَلُوۡا لِلّٰهِ شُرَكَآءَؕ قُلۡ سَمُّوۡهُمۡؕ اَمۡ تُنَبِّـُٔوۡنَهٗ بِمَا لَا يَعۡلَمُ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ اَمۡ بِظَاهِرٍ مِّنَ الۡقَوۡلِؕ بَلۡ زُيِّنَ لِلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مَكۡرُهُمۡ وَصُدُّوۡا عَنِ السَّبِيۡلِؕ وَمَنۡ يُّضۡلِلِ اللّٰهُ فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ هَادٍ
quran.english: Then is He who is a maintainer of every soul, [knowing] what it has earned, [like any other]? But to Allah they have attributed partners. Say, "Name them. Or do you inform Him of that which He knows not upon the earth or of what is apparent of speech?" Rather, their [own] plan has been made attractive to those who disbelieve, and they have been averted from the way. And whomever Allah leaves astray - there will be for him no guide

quran.arabic: لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا وَلَعَذَابُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ اَشَقُّۚ وَمَا لَهُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ وَّاقٍ
quran.english: For them will be punishment in the life of [this] world, and the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe. And they will not have from Allah any protector

quran.arabic: مَثَلُ الۡجَنَّةِ الَّتِيۡ وُعِدَ الۡمُتَّقُوۡنَؕ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُؕ اُكُلُهَا دَآئِمٌ وَّظِلُّهَاؕ تِلۡكَ عُقۡبَي الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوۡاࣗۖ وَّعُقۡبَي الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ النَّارُ
quran.english: The example of Paradise, which the righteous have been promised, is [that] beneath it rivers flow. Its fruit is lasting, and its shade. That is the consequence for the righteous, and the consequence for the disbelievers is the Fire

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمُ الۡكِتٰبَ يَفۡرَحُوۡنَ بِمَا٘ اُنۡزِلَ اِلَيۡكَ وَمِنَ الۡاَحۡزَابِ مَنۡ يُّنۡكِرُ بَعۡضَهٗؕ قُلۡ اِنَّمَا٘ اُمِرۡتُ اَنۡ اَعۡبُدَ اللّٰهَ وَلَا٘ اُشۡرِكَ بِهٖؕ اِلَيۡهِ اَدۡعُوۡا وَاِلَيۡهِ مَاٰبِ
quran.english: And [the believers among] those to whom We have given the [previous] Scripture rejoice at what has been revealed to you, [O Muhammad], but among the [opposing] factions are those who deny part of it. Say, "I have only been commanded to worship Allah and not associate [anything] with Him. To Him I invite, and to Him is my return

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ حُكۡمًا عَرَبِيًّاؕ وَلَئِنِ اتَّبَعۡتَ اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ بَعۡدَ مَا جَآءَكَ مِنَ الۡعِلۡمِۙ مَا لَكَ مِنَ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ وَّلِيٍّ وَّلَا وَاقٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And thus We have revealed it as an Arabic legislation. And if you should follow their inclinations after what has come to you of knowledge, you would not have against Allah any ally or any protector

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلًا مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَ وَجَعَلۡنَا لَهُمۡ اَزۡوَاجًا وَّذُرِّيَّةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ لِرَسُوۡلٍ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَ بِاٰيَةٍ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ لِكُلِّ اَجَلٍ كِتَابٌ
quran.english: And We have already sent messengers before you and assigned to them wives and descendants. And it was not for a messenger to come with a sign except by permission of Allah. For every term is a decree

quran.arabic: يَمۡحُوا اللّٰهُ مَا يَشَآءُ وَيُثۡبِتُۚۖ وَعِنۡدَهٗ٘ اُمُّ الۡكِتٰبِ
quran.english: Allah eliminates what He wills or confirms, and with Him is the Mother of the Book

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ مَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعۡضَ الَّذِيۡ نَعِدُهُمۡ اَوۡ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَاِنَّمَا عَلَيۡكَ الۡبَلٰغُ وَعَلَيۡنَا الۡحِسَابُ
quran.english: And whether We show you part of what We promise them or take you in death, upon you is only the [duty of] notification, and upon Us is the account

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّا نَاۡتِي الۡاَرۡضَ نَنۡقُصُهَا مِنۡ اَطۡرَافِهَاؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَحۡكُمُ لَا مُعَقِّبَ لِحُكۡمِهٖؕ وَهُوَ سَرِيۡعُ الۡحِسَابِ
quran.english: Have they not seen that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? And Allah decides; there is no adjuster of His decision. And He is swift in account

quran.arabic: وَقَدۡ مَكَرَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَلِلّٰهِ الۡمَكۡرُ جَمِيۡعًاؕ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَكۡسِبُ كُلُّ نَفۡسٍؕ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ الۡكُفّٰرُ لِمَنۡ عُقۡبَي الدَّارِ
quran.english: And those before them had plotted, but to Allah belongs the plan entirely. He knows what every soul earns, and the disbelievers will know for whom is the final home

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَسۡتَ مُرۡسَلًاؕ قُلۡ كَفٰي بِاللّٰهِ شَهِيۡدًاۭ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنَكُمۡۙ وَمَنۡ عِنۡدَهٗ عِلۡمُ الۡكِتٰبِࣖ‏
quran.english: And those who have disbelieved say, "You are not a messenger." Say, [O Muhammad], "Sufficient is Allah as Witness between me and you, and [the witness of] whoever has knowledge of the Scripture

quran.arabic: الٓرٰࣞ كِتٰبٌ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ اِلَيۡكَ لِتُخۡرِجَ النَّاسَ مِنَ الظُّلُمٰتِ اِلَي النُّوۡرِ ࣢ۙ بِاِذۡنِ رَبِّهِمۡ اِلٰي صِرَاطِ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡحَمِيۡدِۙ‏
quran.english: Alif, Lam, Ra. [This is] a Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], that you might bring mankind out of darknesses into the light by permission of their Lord - to the path of the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: اللّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ لَهٗ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ وَوَيۡلٌ لِّلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ شَدِيۡدِۙ‏
quran.english: Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. And woe to the disbelievers from a severe punishment

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡنَ يَسۡتَحِبُّوۡنَ الۡحَيٰوةَ الدُّنۡيَا عَلَي الۡاٰخِرَةِ وَيَصُدُّوۡنَ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ وَيَبۡغُوۡنَهَا عِوَجًاؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍ
quran.english: The ones who prefer the worldly life over the Hereafter and avert [people] from the way of Allah, seeking to make it (seem) deviant. Those are in extreme error

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ رَّسُوۡلٍ اِلَّا بِلِسَانِ قَوۡمِهٖ لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمۡؕ فَيُضِلُّ اللّٰهُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: And We did not send any messenger except [speaking] in the language of his people to state clearly for them, and Allah sends astray [thereby] whom He wills and guides whom He wills. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مُوۡسٰي بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اَنۡ اَخۡرِجۡ قَوۡمَكَ مِنَ الظُّلُمٰتِ اِلَي النُّوۡرِ ࣢ۙ وَذَكِّرۡهُمۡ بِاَيّٰىمِ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٍ شَكُوۡرٍ
quran.english: And We certainly sent Moses with Our signs, [saying], "Bring out your people from darknesses into the light and remind them of the days of Allah." Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَ مُوۡسٰي لِقَوۡمِهِ اذۡكُرُوۡا نِعۡمَةَ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ اِذۡ اَنۡجٰىكُمۡ مِّنۡ اٰلِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ يَسُوۡمُوۡنَكُمۡ سُوۡٓءَ الۡعَذَابِ وَيُذَبِّحُوۡنَ اَبۡنَآءَكُمۡ وَيَسۡتَحۡيُوۡنَ نِسَآءَكُمۡؕ وَفِيۡ ذٰلِكُمۡ بَلَآءٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكُمۡ عَظِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And [recall, O Children of Israel], when Moses said to His people, "Remember the favor of Allah upon you when He saved you from the people of Pharaoh, who were afflicting you with the worst torment and were slaughtering your [newborn] sons and keeping your females alive. And in that was a great trial from your Lord

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ تَاَذَّنَ رَبُّكُمۡ لَئِنۡ شَكَرۡتُمۡ لَاَزِيۡدَنَّكُمۡ وَلَئِنۡ كَفَرۡتُمۡ اِنَّ عَذَابِيۡ لَشَدِيۡدٌ
quran.english: And [remember] when your Lord proclaimed, 'If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor]; but if you deny, indeed, My punishment is severe

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اِنۡ تَكۡفُرُوۡ٘ا اَنۡتُمۡ وَمَنۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ جَمِيۡعًاۙ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَغَنِيٌّ حَمِيۡدٌ
