quran.english: And Moses said, "If you should disbelieve, you and whoever is on the earth entirely - indeed, Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَاۡتِكُمۡ نَبَؤُا الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِكُمۡ قَوۡمِ نُوۡحٍ وَّعَادٍ وَّثَمُوۡدَ ࣢ؕۛ وَالَّذِيۡنَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡؕۛ لَا يَعۡلَمُهُمۡ اِلَّا اللّٰهُؕ جَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ فَرَدُّوۡ٘ا اَيۡدِيَهُمۡ فِيۡ٘ اَفۡوَاهِهِمۡ وَقَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا كَفَرۡنَا بِمَا٘ اُرۡسِلۡتُمۡ بِهٖ وَاِنَّا لَفِيۡ شَكٍّ مِّمَّا تَدۡعُوۡنَنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِ مُرِيۡبٍ
quran.english: Has there not reached you the news of those before you - the people of Noah and 'Aad and Thamud and those after them? No one knows them but Allah. Their messengers brought them clear proofs, but they returned their hands to their mouths and said, "Indeed, we disbelieve in that with which you have been sent, and indeed we are, about that to which you invite us, in disquieting doubt

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ رُسُلُهُمۡ اَفِي اللّٰهِ شَكٌّ فَاطِرِ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ يَدۡعُوۡكُمۡ لِيَغۡفِرَ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ ذُنُوۡبِكُمۡ وَيُؤَخِّرَكُمۡ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيؕ قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ اَنۡتُمۡ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُنَاؕ تُرِيۡدُوۡنَ اَنۡ تَصُدُّوۡنَا عَمَّا كَانَ يَعۡبُدُ اٰبَآؤُنَا فَاۡتُوۡنَا بِسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: Their messengers said, "Can there be doubt about Allah, Creator of the heavens and earth? He invites you that He may forgive you of your sins, and He delays your death for a specified term." They said, "You are not but men like us who wish to avert us from what our fathers were worshipping. So bring us a clear authority

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ لَهُمۡ رُسُلُهُمۡ اِنۡ نَّحۡنُ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُكُمۡ وَلٰكِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَمُنُّ عَلٰي مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهٖؕ وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا٘ اَنۡ نَّاۡتِيَكُمۡ بِسُلۡطٰنٍ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ وَعَلَي اللّٰهِ فَلۡيَتَوَكَّلِ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Their messengers said to them, "We are only men like you, but Allah confers favor upon whom He wills of His servants. It has never been for us to bring you evidence except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely

quran.arabic: وَمَا لَنَا٘ اَلَّا نَتَوَكَّلَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ وَقَدۡ هَدٰىنَا سُبُلَنَاؕ وَلَنَصۡبِرَنَّ عَلٰي مَا٘ اٰذَيۡتُمُوۡنَاؕ وَعَلَي اللّٰهِ فَلۡيَتَوَكَّلِ الۡمُتَوَكِّلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And why should we not rely upon Allah while He has guided us to our [good] ways. And we will surely be patient against whatever harm you should cause us. And upon Allah let those who would rely [indeed] rely

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لِرُسُلِهِمۡ لَنُخۡرِجَنَّكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَرۡضِنَا٘ اَوۡ لَتَعُوۡدُنَّ فِيۡ مِلَّتِنَاؕ فَاَوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيۡهِمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ لَنُهۡلِكَنَّ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And those who disbelieved said to their messengers, "We will surely drive you out of our land, or you must return to our religion." So their Lord inspired to them, "We will surely destroy the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: وَلَنُسۡكِنَنَّكُمُ الۡاَرۡضَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡؕ ذٰلِكَ لِمَنۡ خَافَ مَقَامِيۡ وَخَافَ وَعِيۡدِ
quran.english: And We will surely cause you to dwell in the land after them. That is for he who fears My position and fears My threat

quran.arabic: وَاسۡتَفۡتَحُوۡا وَخَابَ كُلُّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: And they requested victory from Allah, and disappointed, [therefore], was every obstinate tyrant

quran.arabic: مِّنۡ وَّرَآئِهٖ جَهَنَّمُ وَيُسۡقٰي مِنۡ مَّآءٍ صَدِيۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: Before him is Hell, and he will be given a drink of purulent water

quran.arabic: يَّتَجَرَّعُهٗ وَلَا يَكَادُ يُسِيۡغُهٗ وَيَاۡتِيۡهِ الۡمَوۡتُ مِنۡ كُلِّ مَكَانٍ وَّمَا هُوَ بِمَيِّتٍؕ وَمِنۡ وَّرَآئِهٖ عَذَابٌ غَلِيۡظٌ
quran.english: He will gulp it but will hardly [be able to] swallow it. And death will come to him from everywhere, but he is not to die. And before him is a massive punishment

quran.arabic: مَثَلُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِرَبِّهِمۡ اَعۡمَالُهُمۡ كَرَمَادِ اِۨشۡتَدَّتۡ بِهِ الرِّيۡحُ فِيۡ يَوۡمٍ عَاصِفٍؕ لَا يَقۡدِرُوۡنَ مِمَّا كَسَبُوۡا عَلٰي شَيۡءٍؕ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الضَّلٰلُ الۡبَعِيۡدُ
quran.english: The example of those who disbelieve in their Lord is [that] their deeds are like ashes which the wind blows forcefully on a stormy day; they are unable [to keep] from what they earned a [single] thing. That is what is extreme error

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ بِالۡحَقِّؕ اِنۡ يَّشَاۡ يُذۡهِبۡكُمۡ وَيَاۡتِ بِخَلۡقٍ جَدِيۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: Have you not seen that Allah created the heavens and the earth in truth? If He wills, He can do away with you and produce a new creation

quran.arabic: وَّمَا ذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ بِعَزِيۡزٍ
quran.english: And that is not difficult for Allah

quran.arabic: وَبَرَزُوۡا لِلّٰهِ جَمِيۡعًا فَقَالَ الضُّعَفٰٓؤُا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا كُنَّا لَكُمۡ تَبَعًا فَهَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ مُّغۡنُوۡنَ عَنَّا مِنۡ عَذَابِ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ قَالُوۡا لَوۡ هَدٰىنَا اللّٰهُ لَهَدَيۡنٰكُمۡؕ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡنَا٘ اَجَزِعۡنَا٘ اَمۡ صَبَرۡنَا مَا لَنَا مِنۡ مَّحِيۡصٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And they will come out [for judgement] before Allah all together, and the weak will say to those who were arrogant, "Indeed, we were your followers, so can you avail us anything against the punishment of Allah?" They will say, "If Allah had guided us, we would have guided you. It is all the same for us whether we show intolerance or are patient: there is for us no place of escape

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الشَّيۡطٰنُ لَمَّا قُضِيَ الۡاَمۡرُ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ وَعَدَكُمۡ وَعۡدَ الۡحَقِّ وَوَعَدۡتُّكُمۡ فَاَخۡلَفۡتُكُمۡؕ وَمَا كَانَ لِيَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ سُلۡطٰنٍ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ دَعَوۡتُكُمۡ فَاسۡتَجَبۡتُمۡ لِيۡۚ فَلَا تَلُوۡمُوۡنِيۡ وَلُوۡمُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَكُمۡؕ مَا٘ اَنَا بِمُصۡرِخِكُمۡ وَمَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ بِمُصۡرِخِيَّؕ اِنِّيۡ كَفَرۡتُ بِمَا٘ اَشۡرَكۡتُمُوۡنِ مِنۡ قَبۡلُؕ اِنَّ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And Satan will say when the matter has been concluded, "Indeed, Allah had promised you the promise of truth. And I promised you, but I betrayed you. But I had no authority over you except that I invited you, and you responded to me. So do not blame me; but blame yourselves. I cannot be called to your aid, nor can you be called to my aid. Indeed, I deny your association of me [with Allah] before. Indeed, for the wrongdoers is a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَاُدۡخِلَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا بِاِذۡنِ رَبِّهِمۡؕ تَحِيَّتُهُمۡ فِيۡهَا سَلٰمٌ
quran.english: And those who believed and did righteous deeds will be admitted to gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding eternally therein by permission of their Lord; and their greeting therein will be, "Peace

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ ضَرَبَ اللّٰهُ مَثَلًا كَلِمَةً طَيِّبَةً كَشَجَرَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ اَصۡلُهَا ثَابِتٌ وَّفَرۡعُهَا فِي السَّمَآءِۙ‏
quran.english: Have you not considered how Allah presents an example, [making] a good word like a good tree, whose root is firmly fixed and its branches [high] in the sky

quran.arabic: تُؤۡتِيۡ٘ اُكُلَهَا كُلَّ حِيۡنٍۭ بِاِذۡنِ رَبِّهَاؕ وَيَضۡرِبُ اللّٰهُ الۡاَمۡثَالَ لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: It produces its fruit all the time, by permission of its Lord. And Allah presents examples for the people that perhaps they will be reminded

quran.arabic: وَمَثَلُ كَلِمَةٍ خَبِيۡثَةٍ كَشَجَرَةٍ خَبِيۡثَةِ اِۨجۡتُثَّتۡ مِنۡ فَوۡقِ الۡاَرۡضِ مَا لَهَا مِنۡ قَرَارٍ
quran.english: And the example of a bad word is like a bad tree, uprooted from the surface of the earth, not having any stability

quran.arabic: يُثَبِّتُ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا بِالۡقَوۡلِ الثَّابِتِ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا وَفِي الۡاٰخِرَةِۚ وَيُضِلُّ اللّٰهُ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَࣞۙ وَيَفۡعَلُ اللّٰهُ مَا يَشَآءُࣖ‏
quran.english: Allah keeps firm those who believe, with the firm word, in worldly life and in the Hereafter. And Allah sends astray the wrongdoers. And Allah does what He wills

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اِلَي الَّذِيۡنَ بَدَّلُوۡا نِعۡمَتَ اللّٰهِ كُفۡرًا وَّاَحَلُّوۡا قَوۡمَهُمۡ دَارَ الۡبَوَارِۙ‏
quran.english: Have you not considered those who exchanged the favor of Allah for disbelief and settled their people [in] the home of ruin

quran.arabic: جَهَنَّمَۚ يَصۡلَوۡنَهَاؕ وَبِئۡسَ الۡقَرَارُ
quran.english: [It is] Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the settlement

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلُوۡا لِلّٰهِ اَنۡدَادًا لِّيُضِلُّوۡا عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِهٖؕ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعُوۡا فَاِنَّ مَصِيۡرَكُمۡ اِلَي النَّارِ
quran.english: And they have attributed to Allah equals to mislead [people] from His way. Say, "Enjoy yourselves, for indeed, your destination is the Fire

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لِّعِبَادِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا يُقِيۡمُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَيُنۡفِقُوۡا مِمَّا رَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ سِرًّا وَّعَلَانِيَةً مِّنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَ يَوۡمٌ لَّا بَيۡعٌ فِيۡهِ وَلَا خِلٰلٌ
quran.english: [O Muhammad], tell My servants who have believed to establish prayer and spend from what We have provided them, secretly and publicly, before a Day comes in which there will be no exchange, nor any friendships

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَاَنۡزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَاَخۡرَجَ بِهٖ مِنَ الثَّمَرٰتِ رِزۡقًا لَّكُمۡۚ وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ الۡفُلۡكَ لِتَجۡرِيَ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ بِاَمۡرِهٖۚ وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ الۡاَنۡهٰرَۚ‏
quran.english: It is Allah who created the heavens and the earth and sent down rain from the sky and produced thereby some fruits as provision for you and subjected for you the ships to sail through the sea by His command and subjected for you the rivers

quran.arabic: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ الشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَ دَآئِبَيۡنِۚ وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَۚ‏
quran.english: And He subjected for you the sun and the moon, continuous [in orbit], and subjected for you the night and the day

quran.arabic: وَاٰتٰىكُمۡ مِّنۡ كُلِّ مَا سَاَلۡتُمُوۡهُؕ وَاِنۡ تَعُدُّوۡا نِعۡمَتَ اللّٰهِ لَا تُحۡصُوۡهَاؕ اِنَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ لَظَلُوۡمٌ كَفَّارٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And He gave you from all you asked of Him. And if you should count the favor of Allah, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, mankind is [generally] most unjust and ungrateful

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمُ رَبِّ اجۡعَلۡ هٰذَا الۡبَلَدَ اٰمِنًا وَّاجۡنُبۡنِيۡ وَبَنِيَّ اَنۡ نَّعۡبُدَ الۡاَصۡنَامَؕ‏
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Abraham said, "My Lord, make this city [Makkah] secure and keep me and my sons away from worshipping idols

quran.arabic: رَبِّ اِنَّهُنَّ اَضۡلَلۡنَ كَثِيۡرًا مِّنَ النَّاسِۚ فَمَنۡ تَبِعَنِيۡ فَاِنَّهٗ مِنِّيۡۚ وَمَنۡ عَصَانِيۡ فَاِنَّكَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: My Lord, indeed they have led astray many among the people. So whoever follows me - then he is of me; and whoever disobeys me - indeed, You are [yet] Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: رَبَّنَا٘ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَسۡكَنۡتُ مِنۡ ذُرِّيَّتِيۡ بِوَادٍ غَيۡرِ ذِيۡ زَرۡعٍ عِنۡدَ بَيۡتِكَ الۡمُحَرَّمِۙ رَبَّنَا لِيُقِيۡمُوا الصَّلٰوةَ فَاجۡعَلۡ اَفۡـِٕدَةً مِّنَ النَّاسِ تَهۡوِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِمۡ وَارۡزُقۡهُمۡ مِّنَ الثَّمَرٰتِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Our Lord, I have settled some of my descendants in an uncultivated valley near Your sacred House, our Lord, that they may establish prayer. So make hearts among the people incline toward them and provide for them from the fruits that they might be grateful

quran.arabic: رَبَّنَا٘ اِنَّكَ تَعۡلَمُ مَا نُخۡفِيۡ وَمَا نُعۡلِنُؕ وَمَا يَخۡفٰي عَلَي اللّٰهِ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَآءِ
quran.english: Our Lord, indeed You know what we conceal and what we declare, and nothing is hidden from Allah on the earth or in the heaven

quran.arabic: اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ وَهَبَ لِيۡ عَلَي الۡكِبَرِ اِسۡمٰعِيۡلَ وَاِسۡحٰقَؕ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ لَسَمِيۡعُ الدُّعَآءِ
quran.english: Praise to Allah, who has granted to me in old age Ishmael and Isaac. Indeed, my Lord is the Hearer of supplication

quran.arabic: رَبِّ اجۡعَلۡنِيۡ مُقِيۡمَ الصَّلٰوةِ وَمِنۡ ذُرِّيَّتِيۡࣗۖ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلۡ دُعَآءِ
quran.english: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and [many] from my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication

quran.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغۡفِرۡ لِيۡ وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ يَوۡمَ يَقُوۡمُ الۡحِسَابُࣖ‏
quran.english: Our Lord, forgive me and my parents and the believers the Day the account is established

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَحۡسَبَنَّ اللّٰهَ غَافِلًا عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ ࣢ؕ اِنَّمَا يُؤَخِّرُهُمۡ لِيَوۡمٍ تَشۡخَصُ فِيۡهِ الۡاَبۡصَارُۙ‏
quran.english: And never think that Allah is unaware of what the wrongdoers do. He only delays them for a Day when eyes will stare [in horror]

quran.arabic: مُهۡطِعِيۡنَ مُقۡنِعِيۡ رُءُوۡسِهِمۡ لَا يَرۡتَدُّ اِلَيۡهِمۡ طَرۡفُهُمۡۚ وَاَفۡـِٕدَتُهُمۡ هَوَآءٌؕ‏
quran.english: Racing ahead, their heads raised up, their glance does not come back to them, and their hearts are void

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡذِرِ النَّاسَ يَوۡمَ يَاۡتِيۡهِمُ الۡعَذَابُ فَيَقُوۡلُ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا رَبَّنَا٘ اَخِّرۡنَا٘ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ قَرِيۡبٍۙ نُّجِبۡ دَعۡوَتَكَ وَنَتَّبِعِ الرُّسُلَؕ اَوَلَمۡ تَكُوۡنُوۡ٘ا اَقۡسَمۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ قَبۡلُ مَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ زَوَالٍۙ‏
quran.english: And, [O Muhammad], warn the people of a Day when the punishment will come to them and those who did wrong will say, "Our Lord, delay us for a short term; we will answer Your call and follow the messengers." [But it will be said], "Had you not sworn, before, that for you there would be no cessation

quran.arabic: وَّسَكَنۡتُمۡ فِيۡ مَسٰكِنِ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ وَتَبَيَّنَ لَكُمۡ كَيۡفَ فَعَلۡنَا بِهِمۡ وَضَرَبۡنَا لَكُمُ الۡاَمۡثَالَ
quran.english: And you lived among the dwellings of those who wronged themselves, and it had become clear to you how We dealt with them. And We presented for you [many] examples

quran.arabic: وَقَدۡ مَكَرُوۡا مَكۡرَهُمۡ وَعِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ مَكۡرُهُمۡؕ وَاِنۡ كَانَ مَكۡرُهُمۡ لِتَزُوۡلَ مِنۡهُ الۡجِبَالُ
quran.english: And they had planned their plan, but with Allah is [recorded] their plan, even if their plan had been [sufficient] to do away with the mountains

quran.arabic: فَلَا تَحۡسَبَنَّ اللّٰهَ مُخۡلِفَ وَعۡدِهٖ رُسُلَهٗؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَزِيۡزٌ ذُو انۡتِقَامٍؕ‏
quran.english: So never think that Allah will fail in His promise to His messengers. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تُبَدَّلُ الۡاَرۡضُ غَيۡرَ الۡاَرۡضِ وَالسَّمٰوٰتُ وَبَرَزُوۡا لِلّٰهِ الۡوَاحِدِ الۡقَهَّارِ
quran.english: [It will be] on the Day the earth will be replaced by another earth, and the heavens [as well], and all creatures will come out before Allah, the One, the Prevailing

quran.arabic: وَتَرَي الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ مُّقَرَّنِيۡنَ فِي الۡاَصۡفَادِۚ‏
quran.english: And you will see the criminals that Day bound together in shackles

quran.arabic: سَرَابِيۡلُهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَطِرَانٍ وَّتَغۡشٰي وُجُوۡهَهُمُ النَّارُۙ‏
quran.english: Their garments of liquid pitch and their faces covered by the Fire

quran.arabic: لِيَجۡزِيَ اللّٰهُ كُلَّ نَفۡسٍ مَّا كَسَبَتۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ سَرِيۡعُ الۡحِسَابِ
quran.english: So that Allah will recompense every soul for what it earned. Indeed, Allah is swift in account

quran.arabic: هٰذَا بَلٰغٌ لِّلنَّاسِ وَلِيُنۡذَرُوۡا بِهٖ وَلِيَعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّمَا هُوَ اِلٰهٌ وَّاحِدٌ وَّلِيَذَّكَّرَ اُولُوا الۡاَلۡبَابِࣖ‏
quran.english: This [Qur'an] is notification for the people that they may be warned thereby and that they may know that He is but one God and that those of understanding will be reminded

quran.arabic: الٓرٰࣞ تِلۡكَ اٰيٰتُ الۡكِتٰبِ وَقُرۡاٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur'an

quran.arabic: رُبَمَا يَوَدُّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَوۡ كَانُوۡا مُسۡلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims

quran.arabic: ذَرۡهُمۡ يَاۡكُلُوۡا وَيَتَمَتَّعُوۡا وَيُلۡهِهِمُ الۡاَمَلُ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَهۡلَكۡنَا مِنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ اِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعۡلُوۡمٌ
quran.english: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree

quran.arabic: مَا تَسۡبِقُ مِنۡ اُمَّةٍ اَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسۡتَاۡخِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡ نُزِّلَ عَلَيۡهِ الذِّكۡرُ اِنَّكَ لَمَجۡنُوۡنٌؕ‏
quran.english: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad

quran.arabic: لَوۡمَا تَاۡتِيۡنَا بِالۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful

quran.arabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةَ اِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوۡ٘ا اِذًا مُّنۡظَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and the disbelievers would not then be reprieved

quran.arabic: اِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا الذِّكۡرَ وَاِنَّا لَهٗ لَحٰفِظُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, it is We who sent down the Qur'an and indeed, We will be its guardian

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَ فِيۡ شِيَعِ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muhammad], among the sects of the former peoples

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ رَّسُوۡلٍ اِلَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَ
quran.english: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ نَسۡلُكُهٗ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Thus do We insert denial into the hearts of the criminals

quran.arabic: لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِهٖ وَقَدۡ خَلَتۡ سُنَّةُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ فَتَحۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ بَابًا مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوۡا فِيۡهِ يَعۡرُجُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend

quran.arabic: لَقَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتۡ اَبۡصَارُنَا بَلۡ نَحۡنُ قَوۡمٌ مَّسۡحُوۡرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَعَلۡنَا فِي السَّمَآءِ بُرُوۡجًا وَّزَيَّنّٰهَا لِلنّٰظِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers

quran.arabic: وَحَفِظۡنٰهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ شَيۡطٰنٍ رَّجِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allah]

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنِ اسۡتَرَقَ السَّمۡعَ فَاَتۡبَعَهٗ شِهَابٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame

quran.arabic: وَالۡاَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنٰهَا وَاَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيۡهَا رَوَاسِيَ وَاَنۭۡ بَتۡنَا فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ مَّوۡزُوۡنٍ
quran.english: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا لَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَعَايِشَ وَمَنۡ لَّسۡتُمۡ لَهٗ بِرٰزِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍ اِلَّا عِنۡدَنَا خَزَآئِنُهٗؗ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهٗ٘ اِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعۡلُوۡمٍ
quran.english: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known measure

quran.arabic: وَاَرۡسَلۡنَا الرِّيٰحَ لَوَاقِحَ فَاَنۡزَلۡنَا مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَاَسۡقَيۡنٰكُمُوۡهُۚ وَمَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ لَهٗ بِخٰزِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ نُحۡيٖ وَنُمِيۡتُ وَنَحۡنُ الۡوٰرِثُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا الۡمُسۡتَقۡدِمِيۡنَ مِنۡكُمۡ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا الۡمُسۡتَاۡخِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come]

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحۡشُرُهُمۡؕ اِنَّهٗ حَكِيۡمٌ عَلِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ مِنۡ صَلۡصَالٍ مِّنۡ حَمَاٍ مَّسۡنُوۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud

quran.arabic: وَالۡجَآنَّ خَلَقۡنٰهُ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ مِنۡ نَّارِ السَّمُوۡمِ
quran.english: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ اِنِّيۡ خَالِقٌۭ بَشَرًا مِّنۡ صَلۡصَالٍ مِّنۡ حَمَاٍ مَّسۡنُوۡنٍ
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهٗ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيۡهِ مِنۡ رُّوۡحِيۡ فَقَعُوۡا لَهٗ سٰجِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration

quran.arabic: فَسَجَدَ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ اَجۡمَعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely

quran.arabic: اِلَّا٘ اِبۡلِيۡسَؕ اَبٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّكُوۡنَ مَعَ السّٰجِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except Iblees, he refused to be with those who prostrated

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰ٘اِبۡلِيۡسُ مَا لَكَ اَلَّا تَكُوۡنَ مَعَ السّٰجِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Allah] said, O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَمۡ اَكُنۡ لِّاَسۡجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقۡتَهٗ مِنۡ صَلۡصَالٍ مِّنۡ حَمَاٍ مَّسۡنُوۡنٍ
quran.english: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَاخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَاِنَّكَ رَجِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: [Allah] said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled

quran.arabic: وَّاِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ اللَّعۡنَةَ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الدِّيۡنِ
quran.english: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَاَنۡظِرۡنِيۡ٘ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَاِنَّكَ مِنَ الۡمُنۡظَرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

quran.arabic: اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡوَقۡتِ الۡمَعۡلُوۡمِ
quran.english: Until the Day of the time well-known

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَا٘ اَغۡوَيۡتَنِيۡ لَاُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَاُغۡوِيَنَّهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ الۡمُخۡلَصِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except, among them, Your chosen servants

quran.arabic: قَالَ هٰذَا صِرَاطٌ عَلَيَّ مُسۡتَقِيۡمٌ
quran.english: [Allah] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight

quran.arabic: اِنَّ عِبَادِيۡ لَيۡسَ لَكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ سُلۡطٰنٌ اِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الۡغٰوِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوۡعِدُهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all

quran.arabic: لَهَا سَبۡعَةُ اَبۡوَابٍؕ لِكُلِّ بَابٍ مِّنۡهُمۡ جُزۡءٌ مَّقۡسُوۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ فِيۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs

quran.arabic: اُدۡخُلُوۡهَا بِسَلٰمٍ اٰمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]

quran.arabic: وَنَزَعۡنَا مَا فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِهِمۡ مِّنۡ غِلٍّ اِخۡوَانًا عَلٰي سُرُرٍ مُّتَقٰبِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other

quran.arabic: لَا يَمَسُّهُمۡ فِيۡهَا نَصَبٌ وَّمَا هُمۡ مِّنۡهَا بِمُخۡرَجِيۡنَ
quran.english: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed

quran.arabic: نَبِّئۡ عِبَادِيۡ٘ اَنِّيۡ٘ اَنَا الۡغَفُوۡرُ الرَّحِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: [O Muhammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّ عَذَابِيۡ هُوَ الۡعَذَابُ الۡاَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ عَنۡ ضَيۡفِ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَۘ‏
quran.english: And inform them about the guests of Abraham

quran.arabic: اِذۡ دَخَلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُوۡا سَلٰمًاؕ قَالَ اِنَّا مِنۡكُمۡ وَجِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَا تَوۡجَلۡ اِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلٰمٍ عَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَبَشَّرۡتُمُوۡنِيۡ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ مَّسَّنِيَ الۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا بَشَّرۡنٰكَ بِالۡحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُنۡ مِّنَ الۡقٰنِطِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing

quran.arabic: قَالَ وَمَنۡ يَّقۡنَطُ مِنۡ رَّحۡمَةِ رَبِّهٖ٘ اِلَّا الضَّآلُّوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ اَيُّهَا الۡمُرۡسَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا٘ اُرۡسِلۡنَا٘ اِلٰي قَوۡمٍ مُّجۡرِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals

quran.arabic: اِلَّا٘ اٰلَ لُوۡطٍؕ اِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوۡهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all

quran.arabic: اِلَّا امۡرَاَتَهٗ قَدَّرۡنَا٘ۙ اِنَّهَا لَمِنَ الۡغٰبِرِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ اٰلَ لُوۡطِ اِۨلۡمُرۡسَلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّكُمۡ قَوۡمٌ مُّنۡكَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا بَلۡ جِئۡنٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوۡا فِيۡهِ يَمۡتَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing

quran.arabic: وَاَتَيۡنٰكَ بِالۡحَقِّ وَاِنَّا لَصٰدِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful

quran.arabic: فَاَسۡرِ بِاَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٍ مِّنَ الَّيۡلِ وَاتَّبِعۡ اَدۡبَارَهُمۡ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنۡكُمۡ اَحَدٌ وَّامۡضُوۡا حَيۡثُ تُؤۡمَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded

quran.arabic: وَقَضَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِ ذٰلِكَ الۡاَمۡرَ اَنَّ دَابِرَ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ مَقۡطُوۡعٌ مُّصۡبِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَ اَهۡلُ الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the people of the city came rejoicing

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ ضَيۡفِيۡ فَلَا تَفۡضَحُوۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me

quran.arabic: وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَلَا تُخۡزُوۡنِ
quran.english: And fear Allah and do not disgrace me

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اَوَلَمۡ نَنۡهَكَ عَنِ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people

quran.arabic: قَالَ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِيۡ٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ فٰعِلِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]

quran.arabic: لَعَمۡرُكَ اِنَّهُمۡ لَفِيۡ سَكۡرَتِهِمۡ يَعۡمَهُوۡنَ
quran.english: By your life, [O Muhammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly

quran.arabic: فَاَخَذَتۡهُمُ الصَّيۡحَةُ مُشۡرِقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So the shriek seized them at sunrise

quran.arabic: فَجَعَلۡنَا عَالِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَاَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةً مِّنۡ سِجِّيۡلٍؕ‏
quran.english: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّلۡمُتَوَسِّمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيۡلٍ مُّقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And indeed, those cities are [situated] on an established road

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ كَانَ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡاَيۡكَةِ لَظٰلِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And the companions of the thicket were [also] wrongdoers

quran.arabic: فَانۡتَقَمۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡۘ وَاِنَّهُمَا لَبِاِمَامٍ مُّبِيۡنٍؕࣖ‏
quran.english: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡحِجۡرِ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And certainly did the companions of Thamud deny the messengers

quran.arabic: وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡ اٰيٰتِنَا فَكَانُوۡا عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away

quran.arabic: وَكَانُوۡا يَنۡحِتُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡجِبَالِ بُيُوۡتًا اٰمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure

quran.arabic: فَاَخَذَتۡهُمُ الصَّيۡحَةُ مُصۡبِحِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: But the shriek seized them at early morning

quran.arabic: فَمَا٘ اَغۡنٰي عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَكۡسِبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn

quran.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا٘ اِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّؕ وَاِنَّ السَّاعَةَ لَاٰتِيَةٌ فَاصۡفَحِ الصَّفۡحَ الۡجَمِيۡلَ
quran.english: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness

quran.arabic: اِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ الۡخَلّٰقُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنٰكَ سَبۡعًا مِّنَ الۡمَثَانِيۡ وَالۡقُرۡاٰنَ الۡعَظِيۡمَ
quran.english: And We have certainly given you, [O Muhammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur'an

quran.arabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيۡنَيۡكَ اِلٰي مَا مَتَّعۡنَا بِهٖ٘ اَزۡوَاجًا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَاخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of the disbelievers, and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing to the believers

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَنَا النَّذِيۡرُ الۡمُبِيۡنُۚ‏
quran.english: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner

quran.arabic: كَمَا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلَي الۡمُقۡتَسِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ جَعَلُوا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ عِضِيۡنَ
quran.english: Who have made the Qur'an into portions

quran.arabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسۡـَٔلَنَّهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all

quran.arabic: عَمَّا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَࣔ‏
quran.english: About what they used to do

quran.arabic: فَاصۡدَعۡ بِمَا تُؤۡمَرُ وَاَعۡرِضۡ عَنِ الۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كَفَيۡنٰكَ الۡمُسۡتَهۡزِءِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يَجۡعَلُوۡنَ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَۚ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Who make [equal] with Allah another deity. But they are going to know

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ نَعۡلَمُ اَنَّكَ يَضِيۡقُ صَدۡرُكَ بِمَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say

quran.arabic: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُنۡ مِّنَ السّٰجِدِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him]

quran.arabic: وَاعۡبُدۡ رَبَّكَ حَتّٰي يَاۡتِيَكَ الۡيَقِيۡنُࣖ‏
quran.english: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death)

quran.arabic: اَتٰ٘ي اَمۡرُ اللّٰهِ فَلَا تَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡهُؕ سُبۡحٰنَهٗ وَتَعٰلٰي عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: The command of Allah is coming, so be not impatient for it. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him

quran.arabic: يُنَزِّلُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةَ بِالرُّوۡحِ مِنۡ اَمۡرِهٖ عَلٰي مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهٖ٘ اَنۡ اَنۡذِرُوۡ٘ا اَنَّهٗ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا٘ اَنَا فَاتَّقُوۡنِ
quran.english: He sends down the angels, with the inspiration of His command, upon whom He wills of His servants, [telling them], "Warn that there is no deity except Me; so fear Me

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ بِالۡحَقِّؕ تَعٰلٰي عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: He created the heavens and earth in truth. High is He above what they associate with Him

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ الۡاِنۡسَانَ مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍ فَاِذَا هُوَ خَصِيۡمٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: He created man from a sperm-drop; then at once, he is a clear adversary

quran.arabic: وَالۡاَنۡعَامَ خَلَقَهَا لَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا دِفۡءٌ وَّمَنَافِعُ وَمِنۡهَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the grazing livestock He has created for you; in them is warmth and [numerous] benefits, and from them you eat

quran.arabic: وَلَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا جَمَالٌ حِيۡنَ تُرِيۡحُوۡنَ وَحِيۡنَ تَسۡرَحُوۡنَࣕ‏
quran.english: And for you in them is [the enjoyment of] beauty when you bring them in [for the evening] and when you send them out [to pasture]

quran.arabic: وَتَحۡمِلُ اَثۡقَالَكُمۡ اِلٰي بَلَدٍ لَّمۡ تَكُوۡنُوۡا بٰلِغِيۡهِ اِلَّا بِشِقِّ الۡاَنۡفُسِؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكُمۡ لَرَءُوۡفٌ رَّحِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: And they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves. Indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَّالۡخَيۡلَ وَالۡبِغَالَ وَالۡحَمِيۡرَ لِتَرۡكَبُوۡهَا وَزِيۡنَةًؕ وَيَخۡلُقُ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [He created] the horses, mules and donkeys for you to ride and [as] adornment. And He creates that which you do not know

quran.arabic: وَعَلَي اللّٰهِ قَصۡدُ السَّبِيۡلِ وَمِنۡهَا جَآئِرٌؕ وَلَوۡ شَآءَ لَهَدٰىكُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And upon Allah is the direction of the [right] way, and among the various paths are those deviating. And if He willed, He could have guided you all

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً لَّكُمۡ مِّنۡهُ شَرَابٌ وَّمِنۡهُ شَجَرٌ فِيۡهِ تُسِيۡمُوۡنَ
quran.english: It is He who sends down rain from the sky; from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture [animals]

quran.arabic: يُنۭۡ بِتُ لَكُمۡ بِهِ الزَّرۡعَ وَالزَّيۡتُوۡنَ وَالنَّخِيۡلَ وَالۡاَعۡنَابَ وَمِنۡ كُلِّ الثَّمَرٰتِؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّتَفَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: He causes to grow for you thereby the crops, olives, palm trees, grapevines, and from all the fruits. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought

quran.arabic: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَۙ وَالشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَؕ وَالنُّجُوۡمُ مُسَخَّرٰتٌۭ بِاَمۡرِهٖؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡقِلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And He has subjected for you the night and day and the sun and moon, and the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed in that are signs for a people who reason

quran.arabic: وَمَا ذَرَاَ لَكُمۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مُخۡتَلِفًا اَلۡوَانُهٗؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّذَّكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [He has subjected] whatever He multiplied for you on the earth of varying colors. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who remember

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ سَخَّرَ الۡبَحۡرَ لِتَاۡكُلُوۡا مِنۡهُ لَحۡمًا طَرِيًّا وَّتَسۡتَخۡرِجُوۡا مِنۡهُ حِلۡيَةً تَلۡبَسُوۡنَهَاۚ وَتَرَي الۡفُلۡكَ مَوَاخِرَ فِيۡهِ وَلِتَبۡتَغُوۡا مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖ وَلَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful

quran.arabic: وَاَلۡقٰي فِي الۡاَرۡضِ رَوَاسِيَ اَنۡ تَمِيۡدَ بِكُمۡ وَاَنۡهٰرًا وَّسُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَهۡتَدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And He has cast into the earth firmly set mountains, lest it shift with you, and [made] rivers and roads, that you may be guided

quran.arabic: وَعَلٰمٰتٍؕ وَبِالنَّجۡمِ هُمۡ يَهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And landmarks. And by the stars they are [also] guided

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ يَّخۡلُقُ كَمَنۡ لَّا يَخۡلُقُؕ اَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then is He who creates like one who does not create? So will you not be reminded

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ تَعُدُّوۡا نِعۡمَةَ اللّٰهِ لَا تُحۡصُوۡهَاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَغَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And if you should count the favors of Allah, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّوۡنَ وَمَا تُعۡلِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Allah knows what you conceal and what you declare

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ لَا يَخۡلُقُوۡنَ شَيۡـًٔا وَّهُمۡ يُخۡلَقُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And those they invoke other than Allah create nothing, and they [themselves] are created

quran.arabic: اَمۡوَاتٌ غَيۡرُ اَحۡيَآءٍۚؕ وَمَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَۙ اَيَّانَ يُبۡعَثُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: They are, [in fact], dead, not alive, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected

quran.arabic: اِلٰهُكُمۡ اِلٰهٌ وَّاحِدٌۚ فَالَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡ مُّنۡكِرَةٌ وَّهُمۡ مُّسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant

quran.arabic: لَا جَرَمَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّوۡنَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُوۡنَؕ اِنَّهٗ لَا يُحِبُّ الۡمُسۡتَكۡبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Assuredly, Allah knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ مَّاذَا٘ اَنۡزَلَ رَبُّكُمۡۙ قَالُوۡ٘ا اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And when it is said to them, "What has your Lord sent down?" They say, "Legends of the former peoples

quran.arabic: لِيَحۡمِلُوۡ٘ا اَوۡزَارَهُمۡ كَامِلَةً يَّوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِۙ وَمِنۡ اَوۡزَارِ الَّذِيۡنَ يُضِلُّوۡنَهُمۡ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٍؕ اَلَا سَآءَ مَا يَزِرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: That they may bear their own burdens in full on the Day of Resurrection and some of the burdens of those whom they misguide without knowledge. Unquestionably, evil is that which they bear

quran.arabic: قَدۡ مَكَرَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَاَتَي اللّٰهُ بُنۡيَانَهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡقَوَاعِدِ فَخَرَّ عَلَيۡهِمُ السَّقۡفُ مِنۡ فَوۡقِهِمۡ وَاَتٰىهُمُ الۡعَذَابُ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those before them had already plotted, but Allah came at their building from the foundations, so the roof fell upon them from above them, and the punishment came to them from where they did not perceive

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ يُخۡزِيۡهِمۡ وَيَقُوۡلُ اَيۡنَ شُرَكَآءِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ كُنۡتُمۡ تُشَآقُّوۡنَ فِيۡهِمۡؕ قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَ اِنَّ الۡخِزۡيَ الۡيَوۡمَ وَالسُّوۡٓءَ عَلَي الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then on the Day of Resurrection He will disgrace them and say, "Where are My 'partners' for whom you used to oppose [the believers]?" Those who were given knowledge will say, "Indeed disgrace, this Day, and evil are upon the disbelievers

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ تَتَوَفّٰىهُمُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ ظَالِمِيۡ٘ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡࣕ فَاَلۡقَوُا السَّلَمَ مَا كُنَّا نَعۡمَلُ مِنۡ سُوۡٓءٍؕ بَلٰ٘ي اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: The ones whom the angels take in death [while] wronging themselves, and [who] then offer submission, [saying], "We were not doing any evil." But, yes! Indeed, Allah is Knowing of what you used to do

quran.arabic: فَادۡخُلُوۡ٘ا اَبۡوَابَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ فَلَبِئۡسَ مَثۡوَي الۡمُتَكَبِّرِيۡنَ
quran.english: So enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and how wretched is the residence of the arrogant

quran.arabic: وَقِيۡلَ لِلَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوۡا مَاذَا٘ اَنۡزَلَ رَبُّكُمۡؕ قَالُوۡا خَيۡرًاؕ لِلَّذِيۡنَ اَحۡسَنُوۡا فِيۡ هٰذِهِ الدُّنۡيَا حَسَنَةٌؕ وَلَدَارُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ خَيۡرٌؕ وَلَنِعۡمَ دَارُ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And it will be said to those who feared Allah, "What did your Lord send down?" They will say, "[That which is] good." For those who do good in this world is good; and the home of the Hereafter is better. And how excellent is the home of the righteous

quran.arabic: جَنّٰتُ عَدۡنٍ يَّدۡخُلُوۡنَهَا تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ لَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَا يَشَآءُوۡنَؕ كَذٰلِكَ يَجۡزِي اللّٰهُ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Gardens of perpetual residence, which they will enter, beneath which rivers flow. They will have therein whatever they wish. Thus does Allah reward the righteous

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ تَتَوَفّٰىهُمُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ طَيِّبِيۡنَۙ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ سَلٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمُۙ ادۡخُلُوا الۡجَنَّةَ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: The ones whom the angels take in death, [being] good and pure; [the angels] will say, "Peace be upon you. Enter Paradise for what you used to do

quran.arabic: هَلۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ تَاۡتِيَهُمُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ اَوۡ يَاۡتِيَ اَمۡرُ رَبِّكَؕ كَذٰلِكَ فَعَلَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡؕ وَمَا ظَلَمَهُمُ اللّٰهُ وَلٰكِنۡ كَانُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ يَظۡلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do the disbelievers await [anything] except that the angels should come to them or there comes the command of your Lord? Thus did those do before them. And Allah wronged them not, but they had been wronging themselves

quran.arabic: فَاَصَابَهُمۡ سَيِّاٰتُ مَا عَمِلُوۡا وَحَاقَ بِهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So they were struck by the evil consequences of what they did and were enveloped by what they used to ridicule

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَشۡرَكُوۡا لَوۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ مَا عَبَدۡنَا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍ نَّحۡنُ وَلَا٘ اٰبَآؤُنَا وَلَا حَرَّمۡنَا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ كَذٰلِكَ فَعَلَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡۚ فَهَلۡ عَلَي الرُّسُلِ اِلَّا الۡبَلٰغُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: And those who associate others with Allah say, "If Allah had willed, we would not have worshipped anything other than Him, neither we nor our fathers, nor would we have forbidden anything through other than Him." Thus did those do before them. So is there upon the messengers except [the duty of] clear notification

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ بَعَثۡنَا فِيۡ كُلِّ اُمَّةٍ رَّسُوۡلًا اَنِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ وَاجۡتَنِبُوا الطَّاغُوۡتَۚ فَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ هَدَي اللّٰهُ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ حَقَّتۡ عَلَيۡهِ الضَّلٰلَةُؕ فَسِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَانۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We certainly sent into every nation a messenger, [saying], "Worship Allah and avoid Taghut." And among them were those whom Allah guided, and among them were those upon whom error was [deservedly] decreed. So proceed through the earth and observe how was the end of the deniers

quran.arabic: اِنۡ تَحۡرِصۡ عَلٰي هُدٰىهُمۡ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ يُّضِلُّ وَمَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ نّٰصِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Even] if you should strive for their guidance, [O Muhammad], indeed, Allah does not guide those He sends astray, and they will have no helpers

quran.arabic: وَاَقۡسَمُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ جَهۡدَ اَيۡمَانِهِمۡۙ لَا يَبۡعَثُ اللّٰهُ مَنۡ يَّمُوۡتُؕ بَلٰي وَعۡدًا عَلَيۡهِ حَقًّا وَّلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they swear by Allah their strongest oaths [that] Allah will not resurrect one who dies. But yes - [it is] a true promise [binding] upon Him, but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمُ الَّذِيۡ يَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ فِيۡهِ وَلِيَعۡلَمَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اَنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا كٰذِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: [It is] so He will make clear to them [the truth of] that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا قَوۡلُنَا لِشَيۡءٍ اِذَا٘ اَرَدۡنٰهُ اَنۡ نَّقُوۡلَ لَهٗ كُنۡ فَيَكُوۡنُࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Our word to a thing when We intend it is but that We say to it, "Be," and it is

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هَاجَرُوۡا فِي اللّٰهِ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا ظُلِمُوۡا لَنُبَوِّئَنَّهُمۡ فِي الدُّنۡيَا حَسَنَةًؕ وَلَاَجۡرُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ اَكۡبَرُۘ لَوۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And those who emigrated for [the cause of] Allah after they had been wronged - We will surely settle them in this world in a good place; but the reward of the Hereafter is greater, if only they could know

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ صَبَرُوۡا وَعَلٰي رَبِّهِمۡ يَتَوَكَّلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [They are] those who endured patiently and upon their Lord relied

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَ اِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوۡحِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِمۡ فَسۡـَٔلُوۡ٘ا اَهۡلَ الذِّكۡرِ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message if you do not know

quran.arabic: بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ وَالزُّبُرِؕ وَاَنۡزَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ الذِّكۡرَ لِتُبَيِّنَ لِلنَّاسِ مَا نُزِّلَ اِلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَفَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: [We sent them] with clear proofs and written ordinances. And We revealed to you the message that you may make clear to the people what was sent down to them and that they might give thought

quran.arabic: اَفَاَمِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ مَكَرُوا السَّيِّاٰتِ اَنۡ يَّخۡسِفَ اللّٰهُ بِهِمُ الۡاَرۡضَ اَوۡ يَاۡتِيَهُمُ الۡعَذَابُ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allah will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يَاۡخُذَهُمۡ فِيۡ تَقَلُّبِهِمۡ فَمَا هُمۡ بِمُعۡجِزِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Or that He would not seize them during their [usual] activity, and they could not cause failure

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يَاۡخُذَهُمۡ عَلٰي تَخَوُّفٍؕ فَاِنَّ رَبَّكُمۡ لَرَءُوۡفٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Or that He would not seize them gradually [in a state of dread]? But indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اِلٰي مَا خَلَقَ اللّٰهُ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍ يَّتَفَيَّؤُا ظِلٰلُهٗ عَنِ الۡيَمِيۡنِ وَالشَّمَآئِلِ سُجَّدًا لِّلّٰهِ وَهُمۡ دٰخِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Have they not considered what things Allah has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allah, while they are humble

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ يَسۡجُدُ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مِنۡ دَآبَّةٍ وَّالۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ وَهُمۡ لَا يَسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And to Allah prostrates whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth of creatures, and the angels [as well], and they are not arrogant

quran.arabic: يَخَافُوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡ مِّنۡ فَوۡقِهِمۡ وَيَفۡعَلُوۡنَ مَا يُؤۡمَرُوۡنَࣛࣖ‏
quran.english: They fear their Lord above them, and they do what they are commanded

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ اللّٰهُ لَا تَتَّخِذُوۡ٘ا اِلٰهَيۡنِ اثۡنَيۡنِۚ اِنَّمَا هُوَ اِلٰهٌ وَّاحِدٌۚ فَاِيَّايَ فَارۡهَبُوۡنِ
quran.english: And Allah has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He is but one God, so fear only Me

quran.arabic: وَلَهٗ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَلَهُ الدِّيۡنُ وَاصِبًاؕ اَفَغَيۡرَ اللّٰهِ تَتَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And to Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth, and to Him is [due] worship constantly. Then is it other than Allah that you fear

quran.arabic: وَمَا بِكُمۡ مِّنۡ نِّعۡمَةٍ فَمِنَ اللّٰهِ ثُمَّ اِذَا مَسَّكُمُ الضُّرُّ فَاِلَيۡهِ تَجۡـَٔرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And whatever you have of favor - it is from Allah. Then when adversity touches you, to Him you cry for help

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِذَا كَشَفَ الضُّرَّ عَنۡكُمۡ اِذَا فَرِيۡقٌ مِّنۡكُمۡ بِرَبِّهِمۡ يُشۡرِكُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then when He removes the adversity from you, at once a party of you associates others with their Lord

quran.arabic: لِيَكۡفُرُوۡا بِمَا٘ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡؕ فَتَمَتَّعُوۡاࣞ فَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: So they will deny what We have given them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know

quran.arabic: وَيَجۡعَلُوۡنَ لِمَا لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ نَصِيۡبًا مِّمَّا رَزَقۡنٰهُمۡؕ تَاللّٰهِ لَتُسۡـَٔلُنَّ عَمَّا كُنۡتُمۡ تَفۡتَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they assign to what they do not know a portion of that which We have provided them. By Allah, you will surely be questioned about what you used to invent

quran.arabic: وَيَجۡعَلُوۡنَ لِلّٰهِ الۡبَنٰتِ سُبۡحٰنَهٗۙ وَلَهُمۡ مَّا يَشۡتَهُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they attribute to Allah daughters - exalted is He - and for them is what they desire

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا بُشِّرَ اَحَدُهُمۡ بِالۡاُنۡثٰي ظَلَّ وَجۡهُهٗ مُسۡوَدًّا وَّهُوَ كَظِيۡمٌۚ‏
quran.english: And when one of them is informed of [the birth of] a female, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief

quran.arabic: يَتَوَارٰي مِنَ الۡقَوۡمِ مِنۡ سُوۡٓءِ مَا بُشِّرَ بِهٖؕ اَيُمۡسِكُهٗ عَلٰي هُوۡنٍ اَمۡ يَدُسُّهٗ فِي التُّرَابِؕ اَلَا سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُوۡنَ
quran.english: He hides himself from the people because of the ill of which he has been informed. Should he keep it in humiliation or bury it in the ground? Unquestionably, evil is what they decide

quran.arabic: لِلَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ مَثَلُ السَّوۡءِۚ وَلِلّٰهِ الۡمَثَلُ الۡاَعۡلٰيؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: For those who do not believe in the Hereafter is the description of evil; and for Allah is the highest attribute. And He is Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ يُؤَاخِذُ اللّٰهُ النَّاسَ بِظُلۡمِهِمۡ مَّا تَرَكَ عَلَيۡهَا مِنۡ دَآبَّةٍ وَّلٰكِنۡ يُّؤَخِّرُهُمۡ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيۚ فَاِذَا جَآءَ اَجَلُهُمۡ لَا يَسۡتَاۡخِرُوۡنَ سَاعَةً وَّلَا يَسۡتَقۡدِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if Allah were to impose blame on the people for their wrongdoing, He would not have left upon the earth any creature, but He defers them for a specified term. And when their term has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it]

quran.arabic: وَيَجۡعَلُوۡنَ لِلّٰهِ مَا يَكۡرَهُوۡنَ وَتَصِفُ اَلۡسِنَتُهُمُ الۡكَذِبَ اَنَّ لَهُمُ الۡحُسۡنٰيؕ لَا جَرَمَ اَنَّ لَهُمُ النَّارَ وَاَنَّهُمۡ مُّفۡرَطُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they attribute to Allah that which they dislike, and their tongues assert the lie that they will have the best [from Him]. Assuredly, they will have the Fire, and they will be [therein] neglected

quran.arabic: تَاللّٰهِ لَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا٘ اِلٰ٘ي اُمَمٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَ فَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ الشَّيۡطٰنُ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ فَهُوَ وَلِيُّهُمُ الۡيَوۡمَ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: By Allah, We did certainly send [messengers] to nations before you, but Satan made their deeds attractive to them. And he is the disbelievers' ally today [as well], and they will have a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ الۡكِتٰبَ اِلَّا لِتُبَيِّنَ لَهُمُ الَّذِي اخۡتَلَفُوۡا فِيۡهِۙ وَهُدًي وَّرَحۡمَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have not revealed to you the Book, [O Muhammad], except for you to make clear to them that wherein they have differed and as guidance and mercy for a people who believe

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ اَنۡزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَاَحۡيَا بِهِ الۡاَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّسۡمَعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And Allah has sent down rain from the sky and given life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who listen

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ لَكُمۡ فِي الۡاَنۡعَامِ لَعِبۡرَةًؕ نُسۡقِيۡكُمۡ مِّمَّا فِيۡ بُطُوۡنِهٖ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِ فَرۡثٍ وَّدَمٍ لَّبَنًا خَالِصًا سَآئِغًا لِّلشّٰرِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, for you in grazing livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from what is in their bellies - between excretion and blood - pure milk, palatable to drinkers

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ ثَمَرٰتِ النَّخِيۡلِ وَالۡاَعۡنَابِ تَتَّخِذُوۡنَ مِنۡهُ سَكَرًا وَّرِزۡقًا حَسَنًاؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And from the fruits of the palm trees and grapevines you take intoxicant and good provision. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who reason

quran.arabic: وَاَوۡحٰي رَبُّكَ اِلَي النَّحۡلِ اَنِ اتَّخِذِيۡ مِنَ الۡجِبَالِ بُيُوۡتًا وَّمِنَ الشَّجَرِ وَمِمَّا يَعۡرِشُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And your Lord inspired to the bee, "Take for yourself among the mountains, houses, and among the trees and [in] that which they construct

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ كُلِيۡ مِنۡ كُلِّ الثَّمَرٰتِ فَاسۡلُكِيۡ سُبُلَ رَبِّكِ ذُلُلًاؕ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۭۡ بُطُوۡنِهَا شَرَابٌ مُّخۡتَلِفٌ اَلۡوَانُهٗ فِيۡهِ شِفَآءٌ لِّلنَّاسِؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّتَفَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then eat from all the fruits and follow the ways of your Lord laid down [for you]." There emerges from their bellies a drink, varying in colors, in which there is healing for people. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ خَلَقَكُمۡ ثُمَّ يَتَوَفّٰىكُمۡ وَمِنۡكُمۡ مَّنۡ يُّرَدُّ اِلٰ٘ي اَرۡذَلِ الۡعُمُرِ لِكَيۡ لَا يَعۡلَمَ بَعۡدَ عِلۡمٍ شَيۡـًٔاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلِيۡمٌ قَدِيۡرٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And Allah created you; then He will take you in death. And among you is he who is reversed to the most decrepit [old] age so that he will not know, after [having had] knowledge, a thing. Indeed, Allah is Knowing and Competent

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ فَضَّلَ بَعۡضَكُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ فِي الرِّزۡقِۚ فَمَا الَّذِيۡنَ فُضِّلُوۡا بِرَآدِّيۡ رِزۡقِهِمۡ عَلٰي مَا مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيۡهِ سَوَآءٌؕ اَفَبِنِعۡمَةِ اللّٰهِ يَجۡحَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Allah has favored some of you over others in provision. But those who were favored would not hand over their provision to those whom their right hands possess so they would be equal to them therein. Then is it the favor of Allah they reject

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَنۡفُسِكُمۡ اَزۡوَاجًا وَّجَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَزۡوَاجِكُمۡ بَنِيۡنَ وَحَفَدَةً وَّرَزَقَكُمۡ مِّنَ الطَّيِّبٰتِؕ اَفَبِالۡبَاطِلِ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ وَبِنِعۡمَتِ اللّٰهِ هُمۡ يَكۡفُرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And Allah has made for you from yourselves mates and has made for you from your mates sons and grandchildren and has provided for you from the good things. Then in falsehood do they believe and in the favor of Allah they disbelieve

quran.arabic: وَيَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مَا لَا يَمۡلِكُ لَهُمۡ رِزۡقًا مِّنَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And they worship besides Allah that which does not possess for them [the power of] provision from the heavens and the earth at all, and [in fact], they are unable

quran.arabic: فَلَا تَضۡرِبُوۡا لِلّٰهِ الۡاَمۡثَالَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَعۡلَمُ وَاَنۡتُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: So do not assert similarities to Allah. Indeed, Allah knows and you do not know

quran.arabic: ضَرَبَ اللّٰهُ مَثَلًا عَبۡدًا مَّمۡلُوۡكًا لَّا يَقۡدِرُ عَلٰي شَيۡءٍ وَّمَنۡ رَّزَقۡنٰهُ مِنَّا رِزۡقًا حَسَنًا فَهُوَ يُنۡفِقُ مِنۡهُ سِرًّا وَّجَهۡرًاؕ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوٗنَؕ اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِؕ بَلۡ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah presents an example: a slave [who is] owned and unable to do a thing and he to whom We have provided from Us good provision, so he spends from it secretly and publicly. Can they be equal? Praise to Allah! But most of them do not know

quran.arabic: وَضَرَبَ اللّٰهُ مَثَلًا رَّجُلَيۡنِ اَحَدُهُمَا٘ اَبۡكَمُ لَا يَقۡدِرُ عَلٰي شَيۡءٍ وَّهُوَ كَلٌّ عَلٰي مَوۡلٰىهُۙ اَيۡنَمَا يُوَجِّهۡهُّ لَا يَاۡتِ بِخَيۡرٍؕ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيۡ هُوَۙ وَمَنۡ يَّاۡمُرُ بِالۡعَدۡلِۙ وَهُوَ عَلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And Allah presents an example of two men, one of them dumb and unable to do a thing, while he is a burden to his guardian. Wherever he directs him, he brings no good. Is he equal to one who commands justice, while he is on a straight path

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ غَيۡبُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَمَا٘ اَمۡرُ السَّاعَةِ اِلَّا كَلَمۡحِ الۡبَصَرِ اَوۡ هُوَ اَقۡرَبُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And to Allah belongs the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth. And the command for the Hour is not but as a glance of the eye or even nearer. Indeed, Allah is over all things competent

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ اَخۡرَجَكُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بُطُوۡنِ اُمَّهٰتِكُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ شَيۡـًٔاۙ وَّجَعَلَ لَكُمُ السَّمۡعَ وَالۡاَبۡصَارَ وَالۡاَفۡـِٕدَةَۙ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Allah has extracted you from the wombs of your mothers not knowing a thing, and He made for you hearing and vision and intellect that perhaps you would be grateful

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اِلَي الطَّيۡرِ مُسَخَّرٰتٍ فِيۡ جَوِّ السَّمَآءِؕ مَا يُمۡسِكُهُنَّ اِلَّا اللّٰهُؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do they not see the birds controlled in the atmosphere of the sky? None holds them up except Allah. Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بُيُوۡتِكُمۡ سَكَنًا وَّجَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ جُلُوۡدِ الۡاَنۡعَامِ بُيُوۡتًا تَسۡتَخِفُّوۡنَهَا يَوۡمَ ظَعۡنِكُمۡ وَيَوۡمَ اِقَامَتِكُمۡۙ وَمِنۡ اَصۡوَافِهَا وَاَوۡبَارِهَا وَاَشۡعَارِهَا٘ اَثَاثًا وَّمَتَاعًا اِلٰي حِيۡنٍ
quran.english: And Allah has made for you from your homes a place of rest and made for you from the hides of the animals tents which you find light on your day of travel and your day of encampment; and from their wool, fur and hair is furnishing and enjoyment for a time

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّمَّا خَلَقَ ظِلٰلًا وَّجَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡجِبَالِ اَكۡنَانًا وَّجَعَلَ لَكُمۡ سَرَابِيۡلَ تَقِيۡكُمُ الۡحَرَّ وَسَرَابِيۡلَ تَقِيۡكُمۡ بَاۡسَكُمۡؕ كَذٰلِكَ يُتِمُّ نِعۡمَتَهٗ عَلَيۡكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُسۡلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Allah has made for you, from that which He has created, shadows and has made for you from the mountains, shelters and has made for you garments which protect you from the heat and garments which protect you from your [enemy in] battle. Thus does He complete His favor upon you that you might submit [to Him]

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ تَوَلَّوۡا فَاِنَّمَا عَلَيۡكَ الۡبَلٰغُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: But if they turn away, [O Muhammad] - then only upon you is [responsibility for] clear notification

quran.arabic: يَعۡرِفُوۡنَ نِعۡمَتَ اللّٰهِ ثُمَّ يُنۡكِرُوۡنَهَا وَاَكۡثَرُهُمُ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: They recognize the favor of Allah; then they deny it. And most of them are disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ نَبۡعَثُ مِنۡ كُلِّ اُمَّةٍ شَهِيۡدًا ثُمَّ لَا يُؤۡذَنُ لِلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَلَا هُمۡ يُسۡتَعۡتَبُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention] the Day when We will resurrect from every nation a witness. Then it will not be permitted to the disbelievers [to apologize or make excuses], nor will they be asked to appease [Allah]

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاَ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوا الۡعَذَابَ فَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنۡظَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when those who wronged see the punishment, it will not be lightened for them, nor will they be reprieved

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَشۡرَكُوۡا شُرَكَآءَهُمۡ قَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ شُرَكَآؤُنَا الَّذِيۡنَ كُنَّا نَدۡعُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِكَۚ فَاَلۡقَوۡا اِلَيۡهِمُ الۡقَوۡلَ اِنَّكُمۡ لَكٰذِبُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And when those who associated others with Allah see their "partners," they will say," Our Lord, these are our partners [to You] whom we used to invoke besides You." But they will throw at them the statement, "Indeed, you are liars

quran.arabic: وَاَلۡقَوۡا اِلَي اللّٰهِ يَوۡمَئِذِ اِۨلسَّلَمَ وَضَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَفۡتَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they will impart to Allah that Day [their] submission, and lost from them is what they used to invent

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَصَدُّوۡا عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ زِدۡنٰهُمۡ عَذَابًا فَوۡقَ الۡعَذَابِ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يُفۡسِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those who disbelieved and averted [others] from the way of Allah - We will increase them in punishment over [their] punishment for what corruption they were causing

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ نَبۡعَثُ فِيۡ كُلِّ اُمَّةٍ شَهِيۡدًا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ وَجِئۡنَا بِكَ شَهِيۡدًا عَلٰي هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِؕ وَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ الۡكِتٰبَ تِبۡيَانًا لِّكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ وَّهُدًي وَّرَحۡمَةً وَّبُشۡرٰي لِلۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And [mention] the Day when We will resurrect among every nation a witness over them from themselves. And We will bring you, [O Muhammad], as a witness over your nation. And We have sent down to you the Book as clarification for all things and as guidance and mercy and good tidings for the Muslims

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَاۡمُرُ بِالۡعَدۡلِ وَالۡاِحۡسَانِ وَاِيۡتَآئِ ذِي الۡقُرۡبٰي وَيَنۡهٰي عَنِ الۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَالۡمُنۡكَرِ وَالۡبَغۡيِۚ يَعِظُكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, Allah orders justice and good conduct and giving to relatives and forbids immorality and bad conduct and oppression. He admonishes you that perhaps you will be reminded

quran.arabic: وَاَوۡفُوۡا بِعَهۡدِ اللّٰهِ اِذَا عٰهَدۡتُّمۡ وَلَا تَنۡقُضُوا الۡاَيۡمَانَ بَعۡدَ تَوۡكِيۡدِهَا وَقَدۡ جَعَلۡتُمُ اللّٰهَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ كَفِيۡلًاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَفۡعَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And fulfill the covenant of Allah when you have taken it, [O believers], and do not break oaths after their confirmation while you have made Allah, over you, a witness. Indeed, Allah knows what you do

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَكُوۡنُوۡا كَالَّتِيۡ نَقَضَتۡ غَزۡلَهَا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ قُوَّةٍ اَنۡكَاثًاؕ تَتَّخِذُوۡنَ اَيۡمَانَكُمۡ دَخَلًاۭ بَيۡنَكُمۡ اَنۡ تَكُوۡنَ اُمَّةٌ هِيَ اَرۡبٰي مِنۡ اُمَّةٍؕ اِنَّمَا يَبۡلُوۡكُمُ اللّٰهُ بِهٖؕ وَلَيُبَيِّنَنَّ لَكُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ مَا كُنۡتُمۡ فِيۡهِ تَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: And do not be like she who untwisted her spun thread after it was strong [by] taking your oaths as [means of] deceit between you because one community is more plentiful [in number or wealth] than another community. Allah only tries you thereby. And He will surely make clear to you on the Day of Resurrection that over which you used to differ

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ لَجَعَلَكُمۡ اُمَّةً وَّاحِدَةً وَّلٰكِنۡ يُّضِلُّ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَلَتُسۡـَٔلُنَّ عَمَّا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if Allah had willed, He could have made you [of] one religion, but He causes to stray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. And you will surely be questioned about what you used to do

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَتَّخِذُوۡ٘ا اَيۡمَانَكُمۡ دَخَلًاۭ بَيۡنَكُمۡ فَتَزِلَّ قَدَمٌۭ بَعۡدَ ثُبُوۡتِهَا وَتَذُوۡقُوا السُّوۡٓءَ بِمَا صَدَدۡتُّمۡ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِۚ وَلَكُمۡ عَذَابٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And do not take your oaths as [means of] deceit between you, lest a foot slip after it was [once] firm, and you would taste evil [in this world] for what [people] you diverted from the way of Allah, and you would have [in the Hereafter] a great punishment

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَشۡتَرُوۡا بِعَهۡدِ اللّٰهِ ثَمَنًا قَلِيۡلًاؕ اِنَّمَا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ هُوَ خَيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And do not exchange the covenant of Allah for a small price. Indeed, what is with Allah is best for you, if only you could know

quran.arabic: مَا عِنۡدَكُمۡ يَنۡفَدُ وَمَا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ بَاقٍؕ وَلَنَجۡزِيَنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ صَبَرُوۡ٘ا اَجۡرَهُمۡ بِاَحۡسَنِ مَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Whatever you have will end, but what Allah has is lasting. And We will surely give those who were patient their reward according to the best of what they used to do

quran.arabic: مَنۡ عَمِلَ صَالِحًا مِّنۡ ذَكَرٍ اَوۡ اُنۡثٰي وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٌ فَلَنُحۡيِيَنَّهٗ حَيٰوةً طَيِّبَةًۚ وَلَنَجۡزِيَنَّهُمۡ اَجۡرَهُمۡ بِاَحۡسَنِ مَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Whoever does righteousness, whether male or female, while he is a believer - We will surely cause him to live a good life, and We will surely give them their reward [in the Hereafter] according to the best of what they used to do

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا قَرَاۡتَ الۡقُرۡاٰنَ فَاسۡتَعِذۡ بِاللّٰهِ مِنَ الشَّيۡطٰنِ الرَّجِيۡمِ
quran.english: So when you recite the Qur'an, [first] seek refuge in Allah from Satan, the expelled [from His mercy]

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ لَيۡسَ لَهٗ سُلۡطٰنٌ عَلَي الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَلٰي رَبِّهِمۡ يَتَوَكَّلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, there is for him no authority over those who have believed and rely upon their Lord

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا سُلۡطٰنُهٗ عَلَي الَّذِيۡنَ يَتَوَلَّوۡنَهٗ وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ بِهٖ مُشۡرِكُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: His authority is only over those who take him as an ally and those who through him associate others with Allah

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا بَدَّلۡنَا٘ اٰيَةً مَّكَانَ اٰيَةٍۙ وَّاللّٰهُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يُنَزِّلُ قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّمَا٘ اَنۡتَ مُفۡتَرٍؕ بَلۡ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when We substitute a verse in place of a verse - and Allah is most knowing of what He sends down - they say, "You, [O Muhammad], are but an inventor [of lies]." But most of them do not know

quran.arabic: قُلۡ نَزَّلَهٗ رُوۡحُ الۡقُدُسِ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ بِالۡحَقِّ لِيُثَبِّتَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَهُدًي وَّبُشۡرٰي لِلۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "The Pure Spirit has brought it down from your Lord in truth to make firm those who believe and as guidance and good tidings to the Muslims

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ نَعۡلَمُ اَنَّهُمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اِنَّمَا يُعَلِّمُهٗ بَشَرٌؕ لِسَانُ الَّذِيۡ يُلۡحِدُوۡنَ اِلَيۡهِ اَعۡجَمِيٌّ وَّهٰذَا لِسَانٌ عَرَبِيٌّ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And We certainly know that they say, "It is only a human being who teaches the Prophet." The tongue of the one they refer to is foreign, and this Qur'an is [in] a clear Arabic language

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِاٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِۙ لَا يَهۡدِيۡهِمُ اللّٰهُ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Indeed, those who do not believe in the verses of Allah - Allah will not guide them, and for them is a painful punishment

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا يَفۡتَرِي الۡكَذِبَ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِاٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِۚ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡكٰذِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: They only invent falsehood who do not believe in the verses of Allah, and it is those who are the liars

quran.arabic: مَنۡ كَفَرَ بِاللّٰهِ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ اِيۡمَانِهٖ٘ اِلَّا مَنۡ اُكۡرِهَ وَقَلۡبُهٗ مُطۡمَئِنٌّۭ بِالۡاِيۡمَانِ وَلٰكِنۡ مَّنۡ شَرَحَ بِالۡكُفۡرِ صَدۡرًا فَعَلَيۡهِمۡ غَضَبٌ مِّنَ اللّٰهِۚ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Whoever disbelieves in Allah after his belief... except for one who is forced [to renounce his religion] while his heart is secure in faith. But those who [willingly] open their breasts to disbelief, upon them is wrath from Allah, and for them is a great punishment

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمُ اسۡتَحَبُّوا الۡحَيٰوةَ الدُّنۡيَا عَلَي الۡاٰخِرَةِۙ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَهۡدِي الۡقَوۡمَ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: That is because they preferred the worldly life over the Hereafter and that Allah does not guide the disbelieving people

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ طَبَعَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ وَسَمۡعِهِمۡ وَاَبۡصَارِهِمۡۚ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡغٰفِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those are the ones over whose hearts and hearing and vision Allah has sealed, and it is those who are the heedless

quran.arabic: لَا جَرَمَ اَنَّهُمۡ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ هُمُ الۡخٰسِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Assuredly, it is they, in the Hereafter, who will be the losers

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ لِلَّذِيۡنَ هَاجَرُوۡا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا فُتِنُوۡا ثُمَّ جٰهَدُوۡا وَصَبَرُوۡ٘اۙ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهَا لَغَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Then, indeed your Lord, to those who emigrated after they had been compelled [to renounce their religion] and thereafter fought [for the cause of Allah] and were patient - indeed, your Lord, after that, is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَاۡتِيۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٍ تُجَادِلُ عَنۡ نَّفۡسِهَا وَتُوَفّٰي كُلُّ نَفۡسٍ مَّا عَمِلَتۡ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: On the Day when every soul will come disputing for itself, and every soul will be fully compensated for what it did, and they will not be wronged

quran.arabic: وَضَرَبَ اللّٰهُ مَثَلًا قَرۡيَةً كَانَتۡ اٰمِنَةً مُّطۡمَئِنَّةً يَّاۡتِيۡهَا رِزۡقُهَا رَغَدًا مِّنۡ كُلِّ مَكَانٍ فَكَفَرَتۡ بِاَنۡعُمِ اللّٰهِ فَاَذَاقَهَا اللّٰهُ لِبَاسَ الۡجُوۡعِ وَالۡخَوۡفِ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَصۡنَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Allah presents an example: a city which was safe and secure, its provision coming to it in abundance from every location, but it denied the favors of Allah. So Allah made it taste the envelopment of hunger and fear for what they had been doing

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَكَذَّبُوۡهُ فَاَخَذَهُمُ الۡعَذَابُ وَهُمۡ ظٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And there had certainly come to them a Messenger from among themselves, but they denied him; so punishment overtook them while they were wrongdoers

quran.arabic: فَكُلُوۡا مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ اللّٰهُ حَلٰلًا طَيِّبًاࣕ وَّاشۡكُرُوۡا نِعۡمَتَ اللّٰهِ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ اِيَّاهُ تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then eat of what Allah has provided for you [which is] lawful and good. And be grateful for the favor of Allah, if it is [indeed] Him that you worship

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ عَلَيۡكُمُ الۡمَيۡتَةَ وَالدَّمَ وَلَحۡمَ الۡخِنۡزِيۡرِ وَمَا٘ اُهِلَّ لِغَيۡرِ اللّٰهِ بِهٖۚ فَمَنِ اضۡطُرَّ غَيۡرَ بَاغٍ وَّلَا عَادٍ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: He has only forbidden to you dead animals, blood, the flesh of swine, and that which has been dedicated to other than Allah. But whoever is forced [by necessity], neither desiring [it] nor transgressing [its limit] - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَقُوۡلُوۡا لِمَا تَصِفُ اَلۡسِنَتُكُمُ الۡكَذِبَ هٰذَا حَلٰلٌ وَّهٰذَا حَرَامٌ لِّتَفۡتَرُوۡا عَلَي اللّٰهِ الۡكَذِبَؕ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يَفۡتَرُوۡنَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ الۡكَذِبَ لَا يُفۡلِحُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And do not say about what your tongues assert of untruth, "This is lawful and this is unlawful," to invent falsehood about Allah. Indeed, those who invent falsehood about Allah will not succeed

quran.arabic: مَتَاعٌ قَلِيۡلٌࣕ وَّلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: [It is but] a brief enjoyment, and they will have a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَعَلَي الَّذِيۡنَ هَادُوۡا حَرَّمۡنَا مَا قَصَصۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُۚ وَمَا ظَلَمۡنٰهُمۡ وَلٰكِنۡ كَانُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ يَظۡلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And to those who are Jews We have prohibited that which We related to you before. And We did not wrong them [thereby], but they were wronging themselves

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ لِلَّذِيۡنَ عَمِلُوا السُّوۡٓءَ بِجَهَالَةٍ ثُمَّ تَابُوۡا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ ذٰلِكَ وَاَصۡلَحُوۡ٘ا اِنَّ رَبَّكَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهَا لَغَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Then, indeed your Lord, to those who have done wrong out of ignorance and then repent after that and correct themselves - indeed, your Lord, thereafter, is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ كَانَ اُمَّةً قَانِتًا لِّلّٰهِ حَنِيۡفًاؕ وَلَمۡ يَكُ مِنَ الۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Abraham was a [comprehensive] leader, devoutly obedient to Allah, inclining toward truth, and he was not of those who associate others with Allah

quran.arabic: شَاكِرًا لِّاَنۡعُمِهٖؕ اِجۡتَبٰىهُ وَهَدٰىهُ اِلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: [He was] grateful for His favors. Allah chose him and guided him to a straight path

quran.arabic: وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُ فِي الدُّنۡيَا حَسَنَةًؕ وَاِنَّهٗ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ لَمِنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And We gave him good in this world, and indeed, in the Hereafter he will be among the righteous

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ اَنِ اتَّبِعۡ مِلَّةَ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ حَنِيۡفًاؕ وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then We revealed to you, [O Muhammad], to follow the religion of Abraham, inclining toward truth; and he was not of those who associate with Allah

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا جُعِلَ السَّبۡتُ عَلَي الَّذِيۡنَ اخۡتَلَفُوۡا فِيۡهِؕ وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ فِيۡمَا كَانُوۡا فِيۡهِ يَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: The sabbath was only appointed for those who differed over it. And indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ

quran.arabic: اُدۡعُ اِلٰي سَبِيۡلِ رَبِّكَ بِالۡحِكۡمَةِ وَالۡمَوۡعِظَةِ الۡحَسَنَةِ وَجَادِلۡهُمۡ بِالَّتِيۡ هِيَ اَحۡسَنُؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنۡ ضَلَّ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِهٖ وَهُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِالۡمُهۡتَدِيۡنَ
quran.english: Invite to the way of your Lord with wisdom and good instruction, and argue with them in a way that is best. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has strayed from His way, and He is most knowing of who is [rightly] guided

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ عَاقَبۡتُمۡ فَعَاقِبُوۡا بِمِثۡلِ مَا عُوۡقِبۡتُمۡ بِهٖؕ وَلَئِنۡ صَبَرۡتُمۡ لَهُوَ خَيۡرٌ لِّلصّٰبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And if you punish [an enemy, O believers], punish with an equivalent of that with which you were harmed. But if you are patient - it is better for those who are patient

quran.arabic: وَاصۡبِرۡ وَمَا صَبۡرُكَ اِلَّا بِاللّٰهِ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا تَكُ فِيۡ ضَيۡقٍ مِّمَّا يَمۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And be patient, [O Muhammad], and your patience is not but through Allah. And do not grieve over them and do not be in distress over what they conspire

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ مَعَ الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوۡا وَّالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ مُّحۡسِنُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Allah is with those who fear Him and those who are doers of good

quran.arabic: سُبۡحٰنَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَسۡرٰي بِعَبۡدِهٖ لَيۡلًا مِّنَ الۡمَسۡجِدِ الۡحَرَامِ اِلَي الۡمَسۡجِدِ الۡاَقۡصَا الَّذِيۡ بٰرَكۡنَا حَوۡلَهٗ لِنُرِيَهٗ مِنۡ اٰيٰتِنَاؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡبَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: Exalted is He who took His Servant by night from al-Masjid al-Haram to al-Masjid al-Aqsa, whose surroundings We have blessed, to show him of Our signs. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Seeing

quran.arabic: وَاٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسَي الۡكِتٰبَ وَجَعَلۡنٰهُ هُدًي لِّبَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ اَلَّا تَتَّخِذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِيۡ وَكِيۡلًاؕ‏
quran.english: And We gave Moses the Scripture and made it a guidance for the Children of Israel that you not take other than Me as Disposer of affairs

quran.arabic: ذُرِّيَّةَ مَنۡ حَمَلۡنَا مَعَ نُوۡحٍؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ عَبۡدًا شَكُوۡرًا
quran.english: O descendants of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah. Indeed, he was a grateful servant

quran.arabic: وَقَضَيۡنَا٘ اِلٰي بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ فِي الۡكِتٰبِ لَتُفۡسِدُنَّ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مَرَّتَيۡنِ وَلَتَعۡلُنَّ عُلُوًّا كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: And We conveyed to the Children of Israel in the Scripture that, "You will surely cause corruption on the earth twice, and you will surely reach [a degree of] great haughtiness

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا جَآءَ وَعۡدُ اُوۡلٰىهُمَا بَعَثۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمۡ عِبَادًا لَّنَا٘ اُولِيۡ بَاۡسٍ شَدِيۡدٍ فَجَاسُوۡا خِلٰلَ الدِّيَارِؕ وَكَانَ وَعۡدًا مَّفۡعُوۡلًا
quran.english: So when the [time of] promise came for the first of them, We sent against you servants of Ours - those of great military might, and they probed [even] into the homes, and it was a promise fulfilled

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ رَدَدۡنَا لَكُمُ الۡكَرَّةَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَاَمۡدَدۡنٰكُمۡ بِاَمۡوَالٍ وَّبَنِيۡنَ وَجَعَلۡنٰكُمۡ اَكۡثَرَ نَفِيۡرًا
quran.english: Then We gave back to you a return victory over them. And We reinforced you with wealth and sons and made you more numerous in manpower

quran.arabic: اِنۡ اَحۡسَنۡتُمۡ اَحۡسَنۡتُمۡ لِاَنۡفُسِكُمۡࣞ وَاِنۡ اَسَاۡتُمۡ فَلَهَاؕ فَاِذَا جَآءَ وَعۡدُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ لِيَسُوۡٓءٗا وُجُوۡهَكُمۡ وَلِيَدۡخُلُوا الۡمَسۡجِدَ كَمَا دَخَلُوۡهُ اَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ وَّلِيُتَبِّرُوۡا مَا عَلَوۡا تَتۡبِيۡرًا
quran.english: [And said], "If you do good, you do good for yourselves; and if you do evil, [you do it] to yourselves." Then when the final promise came, [We sent your enemies] to sadden your faces and to enter the temple in Jerusalem, as they entered it the first time, and to destroy what they had taken over with [total] destruction

quran.arabic: عَسٰي رَبُّكُمۡ اَنۡ يَّرۡحَمَكُمۡۚ وَاِنۡ عُدۡتُّمۡ عُدۡنَاۘ وَجَعَلۡنَا جَهَنَّمَ لِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ حَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: [Then Allah said], "It is expected, [if you repent], that your Lord will have mercy upon you. But if you return [to sin], We will return [to punishment]. And We have made Hell, for the disbelievers, a prison-bed

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ يَهۡدِيۡ لِلَّتِيۡ هِيَ اَقۡوَمُ وَيُبَشِّرُ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ الصّٰلِحٰتِ اَنَّ لَهُمۡ اَجۡرًا كَبِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, this Qur'an guides to that which is most suitable and gives good tidings to the believers who do righteous deeds that they will have a great reward

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ اَعۡتَدۡنَا لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا اَلِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And that those who do not believe in the Hereafter - We have prepared for them a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَيَدۡعُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ بِالشَّرِّ دُعَآءَهٗ بِالۡخَيۡرِؕ وَكَانَ الۡاِنۡسَانُ عَجُوۡلًا
quran.english: And man supplicates for evil as he supplicates for good, and man is ever hasty

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَ اٰيَتَيۡنِ فَمَحَوۡنَا٘ اٰيَةَ الَّيۡلِ وَجَعَلۡنَا٘ اٰيَةَ النَّهَارِ مُبۡصِرَةً لِّتَبۡتَغُوۡا فَضۡلًا مِّنۡ رَّبِّكُمۡ وَلِتَعۡلَمُوۡا عَدَدَ السِّنِيۡنَ وَالۡحِسَابَؕ وَكُلَّ شَيۡءٍ فَصَّلۡنٰهُ تَفۡصِيۡلًا
quran.english: And We have made the night and day two signs, and We erased the sign of the night and made the sign of the day visible that you may seek bounty from your Lord and may know the number of years and the account [of time]. And everything We have set out in detail

quran.arabic: وَكُلَّ اِنۡسَانٍ اَلۡزَمۡنٰهُ طٰٓئِرَهٗ فِيۡ عُنُقِهٖؕ وَنُخۡرِجُ لَهٗ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ كِتٰبًا يَّلۡقٰىهُ مَنۡشُوۡرًا
quran.english: And [for] every person We have imposed his fate upon his neck, and We will produce for him on the Day of Resurrection a record which he will encounter spread open

quran.arabic: اِقۡرَاۡ كِتٰبَكَؕ كَفٰي بِنَفۡسِكَ الۡيَوۡمَ عَلَيۡكَ حَسِيۡبًاؕ‏
quran.english: [It will be said], "Read your record. Sufficient is yourself against you this Day as accountant

quran.arabic: مَنِ اهۡتَدٰي فَاِنَّمَا يَهۡتَدِيۡ لِنَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ ضَلَّ فَاِنَّمَا يَضِلُّ عَلَيۡهَاؕ وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِّزۡرَ اُخۡرٰيؕ وَمَا كُنَّا مُعَذِّبِيۡنَ حَتّٰي نَبۡعَثَ رَسُوۡلًا
quran.english: Whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] his soul. And whoever errs only errs against it. And no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. And never would We punish until We sent a messenger

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا٘ اَرَدۡنَا٘ اَنۡ نُّهۡلِكَ قَرۡيَةً اَمَرۡنَا مُتۡرَفِيۡهَا فَفَسَقُوۡا فِيۡهَا فَحَقَّ عَلَيۡهَا الۡقَوۡلُ فَدَمَّرۡنٰهَا تَدۡمِيۡرًا
quran.english: And when We intend to destroy a city, We command its affluent but they defiantly disobey therein; so the word comes into effect upon it, and We destroy it with [complete] destruction

quran.arabic: وَكَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا مِنَ الۡقُرُوۡنِ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ نُوۡحٍؕ وَكَفٰي بِرَبِّكَ بِذُنُوۡبِ عِبَادِهٖ خَبِيۡرًاۭ بَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: And how many have We destroyed from the generations after Noah. And sufficient is your Lord, concerning the sins of His servants, as Acquainted and Seeing

quran.arabic: مَنۡ كَانَ يُرِيۡدُ الۡعَاجِلَةَ عَجَّلۡنَا لَهٗ فِيۡهَا مَا نَشَآءُ لِمَنۡ نُّرِيۡدُ ثُمَّ جَعَلۡنَا لَهٗ جَهَنَّمَۚ يَصۡلٰىهَا مَذۡمُوۡمًا مَّدۡحُوۡرًا
quran.english: Whoever should desire the immediate - We hasten for him from it what We will to whom We intend. Then We have made for him Hell, which he will [enter to] burn, censured and banished

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ اَرَادَ الۡاٰخِرَةَ وَسَعٰي لَهَا سَعۡيَهَا وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٌ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ كَانَ سَعۡيُهُمۡ مَّشۡكُوۡرًا
quran.english: But whoever desires the Hereafter and exerts the effort due to it while he is a believer - it is those whose effort is ever appreciated [by Allah]
