quran.arabic: كُلًّا نُّمِدُّ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ وَهٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ مِنۡ عَطَآءِ رَبِّكَؕ وَمَا كَانَ عَطَآءُ رَبِّكَ مَحۡظُوۡرًا
quran.english: To each [category] We extend - to these and to those - from the gift of your Lord. And never has the gift of your Lord been restricted

quran.arabic: اُنۡظُرۡ كَيۡفَ فَضَّلۡنَا بَعۡضَهُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍؕ وَلَلۡاٰخِرَةُ اَكۡبَرُ دَرَجٰتٍ وَّاَكۡبَرُ تَفۡضِيۡلًا
quran.english: Look how We have favored [in provision] some of them over others. But the Hereafter is greater in degrees [of difference] and greater in distinction

quran.arabic: لَا تَجۡعَلۡ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَ فَتَقۡعُدَ مَذۡمُوۡمًا مَّخۡذُوۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity and [thereby] become censured and forsaken

quran.arabic: وَقَضٰي رَبُّكَ اَلَّا تَعۡبُدُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا٘ اِيَّاهُ وَبِالۡوَالِدَيۡنِ اِحۡسَانًاؕ اِمَّا يَبۡلُغَنَّ عِنۡدَكَ الۡكِبَرَ اَحَدُهُمَا٘ اَوۡ كِلٰهُمَا فَلَا تَقُلۡ لَّهُمَا٘ اُفٍّ وَّلَا تَنۡهَرۡهُمَا وَقُلۡ لَّهُمَا قَوۡلًا كَرِيۡمًا
quran.english: And your Lord has decreed that you not worship except Him, and to parents, good treatment. Whether one or both of them reach old age [while] with you, say not to them [so much as], "uff," and do not repel them but speak to them a noble word

quran.arabic: وَاخۡفِضۡ لَهُمَا جَنَاحَ الذُّلِّ مِنَ الرَّحۡمَةِ وَقُلۡ رَّبِّ ارۡحَمۡهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيٰنِيۡ صَغِيۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And lower to them the wing of humility out of mercy and say, "My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up [when I was] small

quran.arabic: رَبُّكُمۡ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا فِيۡ نُفُوۡسِكُمۡؕ اِنۡ تَكُوۡنُوۡا صٰلِحِيۡنَ فَاِنَّهٗ كَانَ لِلۡاَوَّابِيۡنَ غَفُوۡرًا
quran.english: Your Lord is most knowing of what is within yourselves. If you should be righteous [in intention] - then indeed He is ever, to the often returning [to Him], Forgiving

quran.arabic: وَاٰتِ ذَا الۡقُرۡبٰي حَقَّهٗ وَالۡمِسۡكِيۡنَ وَابۡنَ السَّبِيۡلِ وَلَا تُبَذِّرۡ تَبۡذِيۡرًا
quran.english: And give the relative his right, and [also] the poor and the traveler, and do not spend wastefully

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُبَذِّرِيۡنَ كَانُوۡ٘ا اِخۡوَانَ الشَّيٰطِيۡنِؕ وَكَانَ الشَّيۡطٰنُ لِرَبِّهٖ كَفُوۡرًا
quran.english: Indeed, the wasteful are brothers of the devils, and ever has Satan been to his Lord ungrateful

quran.arabic: وَاِمَّا تُعۡرِضَنَّ عَنۡهُمُ ابۡتِغَآءَ رَحۡمَةٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَ تَرۡجُوۡهَا فَقُلۡ لَّهُمۡ قَوۡلًا مَّيۡسُوۡرًا
quran.english: And if you [must] turn away from the needy awaiting mercy from your Lord which you expect, then speak to them a gentle word

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَجۡعَلۡ يَدَكَ مَغۡلُوۡلَةً اِلٰي عُنُقِكَ وَلَا تَبۡسُطۡهَا كُلَّ الۡبَسۡطِ فَتَقۡعُدَ مَلُوۡمًا مَّحۡسُوۡرًا
quran.english: And do not make your hand [as] chained to your neck or extend it completely and [thereby] become blamed and insolvent

quran.arabic: اِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَقۡدِرُؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ بِعِبَادِهٖ خَبِيۡرًاۭ بَصِيۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, your Lord extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]. Indeed He is ever, concerning His servants, Acquainted and Seeing

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَقۡتُلُوۡ٘ا اَوۡلَادَكُمۡ خَشۡيَةَ اِمۡلَاقٍؕ نَحۡنُ نَرۡزُقُهُمۡ وَاِيَّاكُمۡؕ اِنَّ قَتۡلَهُمۡ كَانَ خِطۡاً كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: And do not kill your children for fear of poverty. We provide for them and for you. Indeed, their killing is ever a great sin

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَقۡرَبُوا الزِّنٰ٘ي اِنَّهٗ كَانَ فَاحِشَةًؕ وَسَآءَ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: And do not approach unlawful sexual intercourse. Indeed, it is ever an immorality and is evil as a way

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَقۡتُلُوا النَّفۡسَ الَّتِيۡ حَرَّمَ اللّٰهُ اِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّؕ وَمَنۡ قُتِلَ مَظۡلُوۡمًا فَقَدۡ جَعَلۡنَا لِوَلِيِّهٖ سُلۡطٰنًا فَلَا يُسۡرِفۡ فِّي الۡقَتۡلِؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ مَنۡصُوۡرًا
quran.english: And do not kill the soul which Allah has forbidden, except by right. And whoever is killed unjustly - We have given his heir authority, but let him not exceed limits in [the matter of] taking life. Indeed, he has been supported [by the law]

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَقۡرَبُوۡا مَالَ الۡيَتِيۡمِ اِلَّا بِالَّتِيۡ هِيَ اَحۡسَنُ حَتّٰي يَبۡلُغَ اَشُدَّهٗࣕ وَاَوۡفُوۡا بِالۡعَهۡدِۚ اِنَّ الۡعَهۡدَ كَانَ مَسۡـُٔوۡلًا
quran.english: And do not approach the property of an orphan, except in the way that is best, until he reaches maturity. And fulfill [every] commitment. Indeed, the commitment is ever [that about which one will be] questioned

quran.arabic: وَاَوۡفُوا الۡكَيۡلَ اِذَا كِلۡتُمۡ وَزِنُوۡا بِالۡقِسۡطَاسِ الۡمُسۡتَقِيۡمِؕ ذٰلِكَ خَيۡرٌ وَّاَحۡسَنُ تَاۡوِيۡلًا
quran.english: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with an even balance. That is the best [way] and best in result

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَقۡفُ مَا لَيۡسَ لَكَ بِهٖ عِلۡمٌؕ اِنَّ السَّمۡعَ وَالۡبَصَرَ وَالۡفُؤَادَ كُلُّ اُولٰٓئِكَ كَانَ عَنۡهُ مَسۡـُٔوۡلًا
quran.english: And do not pursue that of which you have no knowledge. Indeed, the hearing, the sight and the heart - about all those [one] will be questioned

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَمۡشِ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مَرَحًاۚ اِنَّكَ لَنۡ تَخۡرِقَ الۡاَرۡضَ وَلَنۡ تَبۡلُغَ الۡجِبَالَ طُوۡلًا
quran.english: And do not walk upon the earth exultantly. Indeed, you will never tear the earth [apart], and you will never reach the mountains in height

quran.arabic: كُلُّ ذٰلِكَ كَانَ سَيِّئُهٗ عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ مَكۡرُوۡهًا
quran.english: All that - its evil is ever, in the sight of your Lord, detested

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ مِمَّا٘ اَوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيۡكَ رَبُّكَ مِنَ الۡحِكۡمَةِؕ وَلَا تَجۡعَلۡ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَ فَتُلۡقٰي فِيۡ جَهَنَّمَ مَلُوۡمًا مَّدۡحُوۡرًا
quran.english: That is from what your Lord has revealed to you, [O Muhammad], of wisdom. And, [O mankind], do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity, lest you be thrown into Hell, blamed and banished

quran.arabic: اَفَاَصۡفٰىكُمۡ رَبُّكُمۡ بِالۡبَنِيۡنَ وَاتَّخَذَ مِنَ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ اِنَاثًاؕ اِنَّكُمۡ لَتَقُوۡلُوۡنَ قَوۡلًا عَظِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Then, has your Lord chosen you for [having] sons and taken from among the angels daughters? Indeed, you say a grave saying

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ صَرَّفۡنَا فِيۡ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنِ لِيَذَّكَّرُوۡاؕ وَمَا يَزِيۡدُهُمۡ اِلَّا نُفُوۡرًا
quran.english: And We have certainly diversified [the contents] in this Qur'an that mankind may be reminded, but it does not increase the disbelievers except in aversion

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّوۡ كَانَ مَعَهٗ٘ اٰلِهَةٌ كَمَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اِذًا لَّابۡتَغَوۡا اِلٰي ذِي الۡعَرۡشِ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "If there had been with Him [other] gods, as they say, then they [each] would have sought to the Owner of the Throne a way

quran.arabic: سُبۡحٰنَهٗ وَتَعٰلٰي عَمَّا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ عُلُوًّا كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: Exalted is He and high above what they say by great sublimity

quran.arabic: تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ السَّمٰوٰتُ السَّبۡعُ وَالۡاَرۡضُ وَمَنۡ فِيۡهِنَّؕ وَاِنۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍ اِلَّا يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمۡدِهٖ وَلٰكِنۡ لَّا تَفۡقَهُوۡنَ تَسۡبِيۡحَهُمۡؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ حَلِيۡمًا غَفُوۡرًا
quran.english: The seven heavens and the earth and whatever is in them exalt Him. And there is not a thing except that it exalts [Allah] by His praise, but you do not understand their [way of] exalting. Indeed, He is ever Forbearing and Forgiving

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قَرَاۡتَ الۡقُرۡاٰنَ جَعَلۡنَا بَيۡنَكَ وَبَيۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ حِجَابًا مَّسۡتُوۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And when you recite the Qur'an, We put between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter a concealed partition

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلۡنَا عَلٰي قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ اَكِنَّةً اَنۡ يَّفۡقَهُوۡهُ وَفِيۡ٘ اٰذَانِهِمۡ وَقۡرًاؕ وَاِذَا ذَكَرۡتَ رَبَّكَ فِي الۡقُرۡاٰنِ وَحۡدَهٗ وَلَّوۡا عَلٰ٘ي اَدۡبَارِهِمۡ نُفُوۡرًا
quran.english: And We have placed over their hearts coverings, lest they understand it, and in their ears deafness. And when you mention your Lord alone in the Qur'an, they turn back in aversion

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَسۡتَمِعُوۡنَ بِهٖ٘ اِذۡ يَسۡتَمِعُوۡنَ اِلَيۡكَ وَاِذۡ هُمۡ نَجۡوٰ٘ي اِذۡ يَقُوۡلُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ اِنۡ تَتَّبِعُوۡنَ اِلَّا رَجُلًا مَّسۡحُوۡرًا
quran.english: We are most knowing of how they listen to it when they listen to you and [of] when they are in private conversation, when the wrongdoers say, "You follow not but a man affected by magic

quran.arabic: اُنۡظُرۡ كَيۡفَ ضَرَبُوۡا لَكَ الۡاَمۡثَالَ فَضَلُّوۡا فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: Look how they strike for you comparisons; but they have strayed, so they cannot [find] a way

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡ٘ا ءَاِذَا كُنَّا عِظَامًا وَّرُفَاتًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوۡثُوۡنَ خَلۡقًا جَدِيۡدًا
quran.english: And they say, "When we are bones and crumbled particles, will we [truly] be resurrected as a new creation

quran.arabic: قُلۡ كُوۡنُوۡا حِجَارَةً اَوۡ حَدِيۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "Be you stones or iron

quran.arabic: اَوۡ خَلۡقًا مِّمَّا يَكۡبُرُ فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِكُمۡۚ فَسَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَنۡ يُّعِيۡدُنَاؕ قُلِ الَّذِيۡ فَطَرَكُمۡ اَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍۚ فَسَيُنۡغِضُوۡنَ اِلَيۡكَ رُءُوۡسَهُمۡ وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَتٰي هُوَؕ قُلۡ عَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّكُوۡنَ قَرِيۡبًا
quran.english: Or [any] creation of that which is great within your breasts." And they will say, "Who will restore us?" Say, "He who brought you forth the first time." Then they will nod their heads toward you and say, "When is that?" Say, "Perhaps it will be soon

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَدۡعُوۡكُمۡ فَتَسۡتَجِيۡبُوۡنَ بِحَمۡدِهٖ وَتَظُنُّوۡنَ اِنۡ لَّبِثۡتُمۡ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: On the Day He will call you and you will respond with praise of Him and think that you had not remained [in the world] except for a little

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ لِّعِبَادِيۡ يَقُوۡلُوا الَّتِيۡ هِيَ اَحۡسَنُؕ اِنَّ الشَّيۡطٰنَ يَنۡزَغُ بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ اِنَّ الشَّيۡطٰنَ كَانَ لِلۡاِنۡسَانِ عَدُوًّا مُّبِيۡنًا
quran.english: And tell My servants to say that which is best. Indeed, Satan induces [dissension] among them. Indeed Satan is ever, to mankind, a clear enemy

quran.arabic: رَبُّكُمۡ اَعۡلَمُ بِكُمۡؕ اِنۡ يَّشَاۡ يَرۡحَمۡكُمۡ اَوۡ اِنۡ يَّشَاۡ يُعَذِّبۡكُمۡؕ وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَكِيۡلًا
quran.english: Your Lord is most knowing of you. If He wills, He will have mercy upon you; or if He wills, He will punish you. And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], over them as a manager

quran.arabic: وَرَبُّكَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَلَقَدۡ فَضَّلۡنَا بَعۡضَ النَّبِيّٖنَ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ وَّاٰتَيۡنَا دَاوٗدَ زَبُوۡرًا
quran.english: And your Lord is most knowing of whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And We have made some of the prophets exceed others [in various ways], and to David We gave the book [of Psalms]

quran.arabic: قُلِ ادۡعُوا الَّذِيۡنَ زَعَمۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ فَلَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ كَشۡفَ الضُّرِّ عَنۡكُمۡ وَلَا تَحۡوِيۡلًا
quran.english: Say, "Invoke those you have claimed [as gods] besides Him, for they do not possess the [ability for] removal of adversity from you or [for its] transfer [to someone else]

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ يَدۡعُوۡنَ يَبۡتَغُوۡنَ اِلٰي رَبِّهِمُ الۡوَسِيۡلَةَ اَيُّهُمۡ اَقۡرَبُ وَيَرۡجُوۡنَ رَحۡمَتَهٗ وَيَخَافُوۡنَ عَذَابَهٗؕ اِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ كَانَ مَحۡذُوۡرًا
quran.english: Those whom they invoke seek means of access to their Lord, [striving as to] which of them would be nearest, and they hope for His mercy and fear His punishment. Indeed, the punishment of your Lord is ever feared

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ اِلَّا نَحۡنُ مُهۡلِكُوۡهَا قَبۡلَ يَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِ اَوۡ مُعَذِّبُوۡهَا عَذَابًا شَدِيۡدًاؕ كَانَ ذٰلِكَ فِي الۡكِتٰبِ مَسۡطُوۡرًا
quran.english: And there is no city but that We will destroy it before the Day of Resurrection or punish it with a severe punishment. That has ever been in the Register inscribed

quran.arabic: وَمَا مَنَعَنَا٘ اَنۡ نُّرۡسِلَ بِالۡاٰيٰتِ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ كَذَّبَ بِهَا الۡاَوَّلُوۡنَؕ وَاٰتَيۡنَا ثَمُوۡدَ النَّاقَةَ مُبۡصِرَةً فَظَلَمُوۡا بِهَاؕ وَمَا نُرۡسِلُ بِالۡاٰيٰتِ اِلَّا تَخۡوِيۡفًا
quran.english: And nothing has prevented Us from sending signs except that the former peoples denied them. And We gave Thamud the she-camel as a visible sign, but they wronged her. And We send not the signs except as a warning

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قُلۡنَا لَكَ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ اَحَاطَ بِالنَّاسِؕ وَمَا جَعَلۡنَا الرُّءۡيَا الَّتِيۡ٘ اَرَيۡنٰكَ اِلَّا فِتۡنَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَالشَّجَرَةَ الۡمَلۡعُوۡنَةَ فِي الۡقُرۡاٰنِؕ وَنُخَوِّفُهُمۡۙ فَمَا يَزِيۡدُهُمۡ اِلَّا طُغۡيَانًا كَبِيۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And [remember, O Muhammad], when We told you, "Indeed, your Lord has encompassed the people." And We did not make the sight which We showed you except as a trial for the people, as was the accursed tree [mentioned] in the Qur'an. And We threaten them, but it increases them not except in great transgression

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قُلۡنَا لِلۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ اسۡجُدُوۡا لِاٰدَمَ فَسَجَدُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا٘ اِبۡلِيۡسَؕ قَالَ ءَاَسۡجُدُ لِمَنۡ خَلَقۡتَ طِيۡنًاۚ‏
quran.english: And [mention] when We said to the angles, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except for Iblees. He said, "Should I prostrate to one You created from clay

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَرَءَيۡتَكَ هٰذَا الَّذِيۡ كَرَّمۡتَ عَلَيَّؗ لَئِنۡ اَخَّرۡتَنِ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِ لَاَحۡتَنِكَنَّ ذُرِّيَّتَهٗ٘ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا
quran.english: [Iblees] said, "Do You see this one whom You have honored above me? If You delay me until the Day of Resurrection, I will surely destroy his descendants, except for a few

quran.arabic: قَالَ اذۡهَبۡ فَمَنۡ تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ فَاِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ جَزَآؤُكُمۡ جَزَآءً مَّوۡفُوۡرًا
quran.english: [Allah] said, "Go, for whoever of them follows you, indeed Hell will be the recompense of you - an ample recompense

quran.arabic: وَاسۡتَفۡزِزۡ مَنِ اسۡتَطَعۡتَ مِنۡهُمۡ بِصَوۡتِكَ وَاَجۡلِبۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِخَيۡلِكَ وَرَجِلِكَ وَشَارِكۡهُمۡ فِي الۡاَمۡوَالِ وَالۡاَوۡلَادِ وَعِدۡهُمۡؕ وَمَا يَعِدُهُمُ الشَّيۡطٰنُ اِلَّا غُرُوۡرًا
quran.english: And incite [to senselessness] whoever you can among them with your voice and assault them with your horses and foot soldiers and become a partner in their wealth and their children and promise them." But Satan does not promise them except delusion

quran.arabic: اِنَّ عِبَادِيۡ لَيۡسَ لَكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ سُلۡطٰنٌؕ وَكَفٰي بِرَبِّكَ وَكِيۡلًا
quran.english: Indeed, over My [believing] servants there is for you no authority. And sufficient is your Lord as Disposer of affairs

quran.arabic: رَبُّكُمُ الَّذِيۡ يُزۡجِيۡ لَكُمُ الۡفُلۡكَ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ لِتَبۡتَغُوۡا مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ بِكُمۡ رَحِيۡمًا
quran.english: It is your Lord who drives the ship for you through the sea that you may seek of His bounty. Indeed, He is ever, to you, Merciful

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا مَسَّكُمُ الضُّرُّ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ ضَلَّ مَنۡ تَدۡعُوۡنَ اِلَّا٘ اِيَّاهُۚ فَلَمَّا نَجّٰىكُمۡ اِلَي الۡبَرِّ اَعۡرَضۡتُمۡؕ وَكَانَ الۡاِنۡسَانُ كَفُوۡرًا
quran.english: And when adversity touches you at sea, lost are [all] those you invoke except for Him. But when He delivers you to the land, you turn away [from Him]. And ever is man ungrateful

quran.arabic: اَفَاَمِنۡتُمۡ اَنۡ يَّخۡسِفَ بِكُمۡ جَانِبَ الۡبَرِّ اَوۡ يُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ حَاصِبًا ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُوۡا لَكُمۡ وَكِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Then do you feel secure that [instead] He will not cause a part of the land to swallow you or send against you a storm of stones? Then you would not find for yourselves an advocate

quran.arabic: اَمۡ اَمِنۡتُمۡ اَنۡ يُّعِيۡدَكُمۡ فِيۡهِ تَارَةً اُخۡرٰي فَيُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ قَاصِفًا مِّنَ الرِّيۡحِ فَيُغۡرِقَكُمۡ بِمَا كَفَرۡتُمۡۙ ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُوۡا لَكُمۡ عَلَيۡنَا بِهٖ تَبِيۡعًا
quran.english: Or do you feel secure that He will not send you back into the sea another time and send upon you a hurricane of wind and drown you for what you denied? Then you would not find for yourselves against Us an avenger

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ كَرَّمۡنَا بَنِيۡ٘ اٰدَمَ وَحَمَلۡنٰهُمۡ فِي الۡبَرِّ وَالۡبَحۡرِ وَرَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ مِّنَ الطَّيِّبٰتِ وَفَضَّلۡنٰهُمۡ عَلٰي كَثِيۡرٍ مِّمَّنۡ خَلَقۡنَا تَفۡضِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And We have certainly honored the children of Adam and carried them on the land and sea and provided for them of the good things and preferred them over much of what We have created, with [definite] preference

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَدۡعُوۡا كُلَّ اُنَاسٍۭ بِاِمَامِهِمۡۚ فَمَنۡ اُوۡتِيَ كِتٰبَهٗ بِيَمِيۡنِهٖ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ يَقۡرَءُوۡنَ كِتٰبَهُمۡ وَلَا يُظۡلَمُوۡنَ فَتِيۡلًا
quran.english: [Mention, O Muhammad], the Day We will call forth every people with their record [of deeds]. Then whoever is given his record in his right hand - those will read their records, and injustice will not be done to them, [even] as much as a thread [inside the date seed]

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ كَانَ فِيۡ هٰذِهٖ٘ اَعۡمٰي فَهُوَ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ اَعۡمٰي وَاَضَلُّ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: And whoever is blind in this [life] will be blind in the Hereafter and more astray in way

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ كَادُوۡا لَيَفۡتِنُوۡنَكَ عَنِ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ لِتَفۡتَرِيَ عَلَيۡنَا غَيۡرَهٗࣗۖ وَاِذًا لَّاتَّخَذُوۡكَ خَلِيۡلًا
quran.english: And indeed, they were about to tempt you away from that which We revealed to you in order to [make] you invent about Us something else; and then they would have taken you as a friend

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ ثَبَّتۡنٰكَ لَقَدۡ كِدۡتَّ تَرۡكَنُ اِلَيۡهِمۡ شَيۡـًٔا قَلِيۡلًاۙࣗ‏
quran.english: And if We had not strengthened you, you would have almost inclined to them a little

quran.arabic: اِذًا لَّاَذَقۡنٰكَ ضِعۡفَ الۡحَيٰوةِ وَضِعۡفَ الۡمَمَاتِ ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُ لَكَ عَلَيۡنَا نَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: Then [if you had], We would have made you taste double [punishment in] life and double [after] death. Then you would not find for yourself against Us a helper

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ كَادُوۡا لَيَسۡتَفِزُّوۡنَكَ مِنَ الۡاَرۡضِ لِيُخۡرِجُوۡكَ مِنۡهَا وَاِذًا لَّا يَلۡبَثُوۡنَ خِلٰفَكَ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا
quran.english: And indeed, they were about to drive you from the land to evict you therefrom. And then [when they do], they will not remain [there] after you, except for a little

quran.arabic: سُنَّةَ مَنۡ قَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا قَبۡلَكَ مِنۡ رُّسُلِنَا وَلَا تَجِدُ لِسُنَّتِنَا تَحۡوِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: [That is Our] established way for those We had sent before you of Our messengers; and you will not find in Our way any alteration

quran.arabic: اَقِمِ الصَّلٰوةَ لِدُلُوۡكِ الشَّمۡسِ اِلٰي غَسَقِ الَّيۡلِ وَقُرۡاٰنَ الۡفَجۡرِؕ اِنَّ قُرۡاٰنَ الۡفَجۡرِ كَانَ مَشۡهُوۡدًا
quran.english: Establish prayer at the decline of the sun [from its meridian] until the darkness of the night and [also] the Qur'an of dawn. Indeed, the recitation of dawn is ever witnessed

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ الَّيۡلِ فَتَهَجَّدۡ بِهٖ نَافِلَةً لَّكَࣗۖ عَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّبۡعَثَكَ رَبُّكَ مَقَامًا مَّحۡمُوۡدًا
quran.english: And from [part of] the night, pray with it as additional [worship] for you; it is expected that your Lord will resurrect you to a praised station

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ رَّبِّ اَدۡخِلۡنِيۡ مُدۡخَلَ صِدۡقٍ وَّاَخۡرِجۡنِيۡ مُخۡرَجَ صِدۡقٍ وَّاجۡعَلۡ لِّيۡ مِنۡ لَّدُنۡكَ سُلۡطٰنًا نَّصِيۡرًا
quran.english: And say, "My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance and to exit a sound exit and grant me from Yourself a supporting authority

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ جَآءَ الۡحَقُّ وَزَهَقَ الۡبَاطِلُؕ اِنَّ الۡبَاطِلَ كَانَ زَهُوۡقًا
quran.english: And say, "Truth has come, and falsehood has departed. Indeed is falsehood, [by nature], ever bound to depart

quran.arabic: وَنُنَزِّلُ مِنَ الۡقُرۡاٰنِ مَا هُوَ شِفَآءٌ وَّرَحۡمَةٌ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَۙ وَلَا يَزِيۡدُ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ اِلَّا خَسَارًا
quran.english: And We send down of the Qur'an that which is healing and mercy for the believers, but it does not increase the wrongdoers except in loss

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا٘ اَنۡعَمۡنَا عَلَي الۡاِنۡسَانِ اَعۡرَضَ وَنَاٰ بِجَانِبِهٖۚ وَاِذَا مَسَّهُ الشَّرُّ كَانَ يَـُٔوۡسًا
quran.english: And when We bestow favor upon the disbeliever, he turns away and distances himself; and when evil touches him, he is ever despairing

quran.arabic: قُلۡ كُلٌّ يَّعۡمَلُ عَلٰي شَاكِلَتِهٖؕ فَرَبُّكُمۡ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنۡ هُوَ اَهۡدٰي سَبِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "Each works according to his manner, but your Lord is most knowing of who is best guided in way

quran.arabic: وَيَسۡـَٔلُوۡنَكَ عَنِ الرُّوۡحِؕ قُلِ الرُّوۡحُ مِنۡ اَمۡرِ رَبِّيۡ وَمَا٘ اُوۡتِيۡتُمۡ مِّنَ الۡعِلۡمِ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا
quran.english: And they ask you, [O Muhammad], about the soul. Say, "The soul is of the affair of my Lord. And mankind have not been given of knowledge except a little

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ شِئۡنَا لَنَذۡهَبَنَّ بِالَّذِيۡ٘ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُ لَكَ بِهٖ عَلَيۡنَا وَكِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: And if We willed, We could surely do away with that which We revealed to you. Then you would not find for yourself concerning it an advocate against Us

quran.arabic: اِلَّا رَحۡمَةً مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَؕ اِنَّ فَضۡلَهٗ كَانَ عَلَيۡكَ كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: Except [We have left it with you] as a mercy from your Lord. Indeed, His favor upon you has ever been great

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّئِنِ اجۡتَمَعَتِ الۡاِنۡسُ وَالۡجِنُّ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّاۡتُوۡا بِمِثۡلِ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنِ لَا يَاۡتُوۡنَ بِمِثۡلِهٖ وَلَوۡ كَانَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ ظَهِيۡرًا
quran.english: Say, "If mankind and the jinn gathered in order to produce the like of this Qur'an, they could not produce the like of it, even if they were to each other assistants

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ صَرَّفۡنَا لِلنَّاسِ فِيۡ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنِ مِنۡ كُلِّ مَثَلٍؗ فَاَبٰ٘ي اَكۡثَرُ النَّاسِ اِلَّا كُفُوۡرًا
quran.english: And We have certainly diversified for the people in this Qur'an from every [kind] of example, but most of the people refused [anything] except disbelief

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا لَنۡ نُّؤۡمِنَ لَكَ حَتّٰي تَفۡجُرَ لَنَا مِنَ الۡاَرۡضِ يَنۭۡ بُوۡعًاۙ‏
quran.english: And they say, "We will not believe you until you break open for us from the ground a spring

quran.arabic: اَوۡ تَكُوۡنَ لَكَ جَنَّةٌ مِّنۡ نَّخِيۡلٍ وَّعِنَبٍ فَتُفَجِّرَ الۡاَنۡهٰرَ خِلٰلَهَا تَفۡجِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: Or [until] you have a garden of palm tress and grapes and make rivers gush forth within them in force [and abundance]

quran.arabic: اَوۡ تُسۡقِطَ السَّمَآءَ كَمَا زَعَمۡتَ عَلَيۡنَا كِسَفًا اَوۡ تَاۡتِيَ بِاللّٰهِ وَالۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ قَبِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Or you make the heaven fall upon us in fragments as you have claimed or you bring Allah and the angels before [us]

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يَكُوۡنَ لَكَ بَيۡتٌ مِّنۡ زُخۡرُفٍ اَوۡ تَرۡقٰي فِي السَّمَآءِؕ وَلَنۡ نُّؤۡمِنَ لِرُقِيِّكَ حَتّٰي تُنَزِّلَ عَلَيۡنَا كِتٰبًا نَّقۡرَؤُهٗؕ قُلۡ سُبۡحَانَ رَبِّيۡ هَلۡ كُنۡتُ اِلَّا بَشَرًا رَّسُوۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Or you have a house of gold or you ascend into the sky. And [even then], we will not believe in your ascension until you bring down to us a book we may read." Say, "Exalted is my Lord! Was I ever but a human messenger

quran.arabic: وَمَا مَنَعَ النَّاسَ اَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡ٘ا اِذۡ جَآءَهُمُ الۡهُدٰ٘ي اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ قَالُوۡ٘ا اَبَعَثَ اللّٰهُ بَشَرًا رَّسُوۡلًا
quran.english: And what prevented the people from believing when guidance came to them except that they said, "Has Allah sent a human messenger

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّوۡ كَانَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مَلٰٓئِكَةٌ يَّمۡشُوۡنَ مُطۡمَئِنِّيۡنَ لَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ مَلَكًا رَّسُوۡلًا
quran.english: Say, "If there were upon the earth angels walking securely, We would have sent down to them from the heaven an angel [as a] messenger

quran.arabic: قُلۡ كَفٰي بِاللّٰهِ شَهِيۡدًاۭ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنَكُمۡؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ بِعِبَادِهٖ خَبِيۡرًاۭ بَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: Say, "Sufficient is Allah as Witness between me and you. Indeed he is ever, concerning His servants, Acquainted and Seeing

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّهۡدِ اللّٰهُ فَهُوَ الۡمُهۡتَدِۚ وَمَنۡ يُّضۡلِلۡ فَلَنۡ تَجِدَ لَهُمۡ اَوۡلِيَآءَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖؕ وَنَحۡشُرُهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ عَلٰي وُجُوۡهِهِمۡ عُمۡيًا وَّبُكۡمًا وَّصُمًّاؕ مَاۡوٰىهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُؕ كُلَّمَا خَبَتۡ زِدۡنٰهُمۡ سَعِيۡرًا
quran.english: And whoever Allah guides - he is the [rightly] guided; and whoever He sends astray - you will never find for them protectors besides Him, and We will gather them on the Day of Resurrection [fallen] on their faces - blind, dumb and deaf. Their refuge is Hell; every time it subsides We increase them in blazing fire

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ جَزَآؤُهُمۡ بِاَنَّهُمۡ كَفَرُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا وَقَالُوۡ٘ا ءَاِذَا كُنَّا عِظَامًا وَّرُفَاتًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوۡثُوۡنَ خَلۡقًا جَدِيۡدًا
quran.english: That is their recompense because they disbelieved in Our verses and said, "When we are bones and crumbled particles, will we [truly] be resurrected [in] a new creation

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّ اللّٰهَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ قَادِرٌ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّخۡلُقَ مِثۡلَهُمۡ وَجَعَلَ لَهُمۡ اَجَلًا لَّا رَيۡبَ فِيۡهِؕ فَاَبَي الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ اِلَّا كُفُوۡرًا
quran.english: Do they not see that Allah, who created the heavens and earth, is [the one] Able to create the likes of them? And He has appointed for them a term, about which there is no doubt. But the wrongdoers refuse [anything] except disbelief

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّوۡ اَنۡتُمۡ تَمۡلِكُوۡنَ خَزَآئِنَ رَحۡمَةِ رَبِّيۡ٘ اِذًا لَّاَمۡسَكۡتُمۡ خَشۡيَةَ الۡاِنۡفَاقِؕ وَكَانَ الۡاِنۡسَانُ قَتُوۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Say [to them], "If you possessed the depositories of the mercy of my Lord, then you would withhold out of fear of spending." And ever has man been stingy

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسٰي تِسۡعَ اٰيٰتٍۭ بَيِّنٰتٍ فَسۡـَٔلۡ بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ اِذۡ جَآءَهُمۡ فَقَالَ لَهٗ فِرۡعَوۡنُ اِنِّيۡ لَاَظُنُّكَ يٰمُوۡسٰي مَسۡحُوۡرًا
quran.english: And We had certainly given Moses nine evident signs, so ask the Children of Israel [about] when he came to them and Pharaoh said to him, "Indeed I think, O Moses, that you are affected by magic

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتَ مَا٘ اَنۡزَلَ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ اِلَّا رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ بَصَآئِرَۚ وَاِنِّيۡ لَاَظُنُّكَ يٰفِرۡعَوۡنُ مَثۡبُوۡرًا
quran.english: [Moses] said, "You have already known that none has sent down these [signs] except the Lord of the heavens and the earth as evidence, and indeed I think, O Pharaoh, that you are destroyed

quran.arabic: فَاَرَادَ اَنۡ يَّسۡتَفِزَّهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَرۡضِ فَاَغۡرَقۡنٰهُ وَمَنۡ مَّعَهٗ جَمِيۡعًاۙ‏
quran.english: So he intended to drive them from the land, but We drowned him and those with him all together

quran.arabic: وَّقُلۡنَا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖ لِبَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ اسۡكُنُوا الۡاَرۡضَ فَاِذَا جَآءَ وَعۡدُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ جِئۡنَا بِكُمۡ لَفِيۡفًاؕ‏
quran.english: And We said after Pharaoh to the Children of Israel, "Dwell in the land, and when there comes the promise of the Hereafter, We will bring you forth in [one] gathering

quran.arabic: وَبِالۡحَقِّ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ وَبِالۡحَقِّ نَزَلَؕ وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ اِلَّا مُبَشِّرًا وَّنَذِيۡرًاۘ‏
quran.english: And with the truth We have sent the Qur'an down, and with the truth it has descended. And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner

quran.arabic: وَقُرۡاٰنًا فَرَقۡنٰهُ لِتَقۡرَاَهٗ عَلَي النَّاسِ عَلٰي مُكۡثٍ وَّنَزَّلۡنٰهُ تَنۡزِيۡلًا
quran.english: And [it is] a Qur'an which We have separated [by intervals] that you might recite it to the people over a prolonged period. And We have sent it down progressively

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اٰمِنُوۡا بِهٖ٘ اَوۡ لَا تُؤۡمِنُوۡاؕ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ٘ اِذَا يُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ يَخِرُّوۡنَ لِلۡاَذۡقَانِ سُجَّدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "Believe in it or do not believe. Indeed, those who were given knowledge before it - when it is recited to them, they fall upon their faces in prostration

quran.arabic: وَّيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ سُبۡحٰنَ رَبِّنَا٘ اِنۡ كَانَ وَعۡدُ رَبِّنَا لَمَفۡعُوۡلًا
quran.english: And they say, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, the promise of our Lord has been fulfilled

quran.arabic: وَيَخِرُّوۡنَ لِلۡاَذۡقَانِ يَبۡكُوۡنَ وَيَزِيۡدُهُمۡ خُشُوۡعًاࣛ‏
quran.english: And they fall upon their faces weeping, and the Qur'an increases them in humble submission

quran.arabic: قُلِ ادۡعُوا اللّٰهَ اَوِ ادۡعُوا الرَّحۡمٰنَؕ اَيًّا مَّا تَدۡعُوۡا فَلَهُ الۡاَسۡمَآءُ الۡحُسۡنٰيۚ وَلَا تَجۡهَرۡ بِصَلَاتِكَ وَلَا تُخَافِتۡ بِهَا وَابۡتَغِ بَيۡنَ ذٰلِكَ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: Say, "Call upon Allah or call upon the Most Merciful. Whichever [name] you call - to Him belong the best names." And do not recite [too] loudly in your prayer or [too] quietly but seek between that an [intermediate] way

quran.arabic: وَقُلِ الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ لَمۡ يَتَّخِذۡ وَلَدًا وَّلَمۡ يَكُنۡ لَّهٗ شَرِيۡكٌ فِي الۡمُلۡكِ وَلَمۡ يَكُنۡ لَّهٗ وَلِيٌّ مِّنَ الذُّلِّ وَكَبِّرۡهُ تَكۡبِيۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And say, "Praise to Allah, who has not taken a son and has had no partner in [His] dominion and has no [need of a] protector out of weakness; and glorify Him with [great] glorification

quran.arabic: اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡزَلَ عَلٰي عَبۡدِهِ الۡكِتٰبَ وَلَمۡ يَجۡعَلۡ لَّهٗ عِوَجًاؕࣝ‏
quran.english: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, who has sent down upon His Servant the Book and has not made therein any deviance

quran.arabic: قَيِّمًا لِّيُنۡذِرَ بَاۡسًا شَدِيۡدًا مِّنۡ لَّدُنۡهُ وَيُبَشِّرَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ الصّٰلِحٰتِ اَنَّ لَهُمۡ اَجۡرًا حَسَنًاۙ‏
quran.english: [He has made it] straight, to warn of severe punishment from Him and to give good tidings to the believers who do righteous deeds that they will have a good reward

quran.arabic: مَّاكِثِيۡنَ فِيۡهِ اَبَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: In which they will remain forever

quran.arabic: وَّيُنۡذِرَ الَّذِيۡنَ قَالُوا اتَّخَذَ اللّٰهُ وَلَدًاࣗ‏
quran.english: And to warn those who say, "Allah has taken a son

quran.arabic: مَا لَهُمۡ بِهٖ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍ وَّلَا لِاٰبَآئِهِمۡؕ كَبُرَتۡ كَلِمَةً تَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ اَفۡوَاهِهِمۡؕ اِنۡ يَّقُوۡلُوۡنَ اِلَّا كَذِبًا
quran.english: They have no knowledge of it, nor had their fathers. Grave is the word that comes out of their mouths; they speak not except a lie

quran.arabic: فَلَعَلَّكَ بَاخِعٌ نَّفۡسَكَ عَلٰ٘ي اٰثَارِهِمۡ اِنۡ لَّمۡ يُؤۡمِنُوۡا بِهٰذَا الۡحَدِيۡثِ اَسَفًا
quran.english: Then perhaps you would kill yourself through grief over them, [O Muhammad], if they do not believe in this message, [and] out of sorrow

quran.arabic: اِنَّا جَعَلۡنَا مَا عَلَي الۡاَرۡضِ زِيۡنَةً لَّهَا لِنَبۡلُوَهُمۡ اَيُّهُمۡ اَحۡسَنُ عَمَلًا
quran.english: Indeed, We have made that which is on the earth adornment for it that We may test them [as to] which of them is best in deed

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّا لَجٰعِلُوۡنَ مَا عَلَيۡهَا صَعِيۡدًا جُرُزًاؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed, We will make that which is upon it [into] a barren ground

quran.arabic: اَمۡ حَسِبۡتَ اَنَّ اَصۡحٰبَ الۡكَهۡفِ وَالرَّقِيۡمِ كَانُوۡا مِنۡ اٰيٰتِنَا عَجَبًا
quran.english: Or have you thought that the companions of the cave and the inscription were, among Our signs, a wonder

quran.arabic: اِذۡ اَوَي الۡفِتۡيَةُ اِلَي الۡكَهۡفِ فَقَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا٘ اٰتِنَا مِنۡ لَّدُنۡكَ رَحۡمَةً وَّهَيِّئۡ لَنَا مِنۡ اَمۡرِنَا رَشَدًا
quran.english: [Mention] when the youths retreated to the cave and said, "Our Lord, grant us from Yourself mercy and prepare for us from our affair right guidance

quran.arabic: فَضَرَبۡنَا عَلٰ٘ي اٰذَانِهِمۡ فِي الۡكَهۡفِ سِنِيۡنَ عَدَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: So We cast [a cover of sleep] over their ears within the cave for a number of years

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ بَعَثۡنٰهُمۡ لِنَعۡلَمَ اَيُّ الۡحِزۡبَيۡنِ اَحۡصٰي لِمَا لَبِثُوۡ٘ا اَمَدًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Then We awakened them that We might show which of the two factions was most precise in calculating what [extent] they had remained in time

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ نَقُصُّ عَلَيۡكَ نَبَاَهُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّؕ اِنَّهُمۡ فِتۡيَةٌ اٰمَنُوۡا بِرَبِّهِمۡ وَزِدۡنٰهُمۡ هُدًيࣗۖ‏
quran.english: It is We who relate to you, [O Muhammad], their story in truth. Indeed, they were youths who believed in their Lord, and We increased them in guidance

quran.arabic: وَّرَبَطۡنَا عَلٰي قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ اِذۡ قَامُوۡا فَقَالُوۡا رَبُّنَا رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ لَنۡ نَّدۡعُوَا۠ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اِلٰهًا لَّقَدۡ قُلۡنَا٘ اِذًا شَطَطًا
quran.english: And We made firm their hearts when they stood up and said, "Our Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth. Never will we invoke besides Him any deity. We would have certainly spoken, then, an excessive transgression

quran.arabic: هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ قَوۡمُنَا اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اٰلِهَةًؕ لَوۡلَا يَاۡتُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِسُلۡطٰنٍۭ بَيِّنٍؕ فَمَنۡ اَظۡلَمُ مِمَّنِ افۡتَرٰي عَلَي اللّٰهِ كَذِبًاؕ‏
quran.english: These, our people, have taken besides Him deities. Why do they not bring for [worship of] them a clear authority? And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah a lie

quran.arabic: وَاِذِ اعۡتَزَلۡتُمُوۡهُمۡ وَمَا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَ اِلَّا اللّٰهَ فَاۡوٗ٘ا اِلَي الۡكَهۡفِ يَنۡشُرۡ لَكُمۡ رَبُّكُمۡ مِّنۡ رَّحۡمَتِهٖ وَيُهَيِّئۡ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَمۡرِكُمۡ مِّرۡفَقًا
quran.english: [The youths said to one another], "And when you have withdrawn from them and that which they worship other than Allah, retreat to the cave. Your Lord will spread out for you of His mercy and will prepare for you from your affair facility

quran.arabic: وَتَرَي الشَّمۡسَ اِذَا طَلَعَتۡ تَّزٰوَرُ عَنۡ كَهۡفِهِمۡ ذَاتَ الۡيَمِيۡنِ وَاِذَا غَرَبَتۡ تَّقۡرِضُهُمۡ ذَاتَ الشِّمَالِ وَهُمۡ فِيۡ فَجۡوَةٍ مِّنۡهُؕ ذٰلِكَ مِنۡ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِؕ مَنۡ يَّهۡدِ اللّٰهُ فَهُوَ الۡمُهۡتَدِۚ وَمَنۡ يُّضۡلِلۡ فَلَنۡ تَجِدَ لَهٗ وَلِيًّا مُّرۡشِدًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And [had you been present], you would see the sun when it rose, inclining away from their cave on the right, and when it set, passing away from them on the left, while they were [laying] within an open space thereof. That was from the signs of Allah. He whom Allah guides is the [rightly] guided, but he whom He leaves astray - never will you find for him a protecting guide

quran.arabic: وَتَحۡسَبُهُمۡ اَيۡقَاظًا وَّهُمۡ رُقُوۡدٌࣗۖ وَّنُقَلِّبُهُمۡ ذَاتَ الۡيَمِيۡنِ وَذَاتَ الشِّمَالِࣗۖ وَكَلۡبُهُمۡ بَاسِطٌ ذِرَاعَيۡهِ بِالۡوَصِيۡدِؕ لَوِ اطَّلَعۡتَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ لَوَلَّيۡتَ مِنۡهُمۡ فِرَارًا وَّلَمُلِئۡتَ مِنۡهُمۡ رُعۡبًا
quran.english: And you would think them awake, while they were asleep. And We turned them to the right and to the left, while their dog stretched his forelegs at the entrance. If you had looked at them, you would have turned from them in flight and been filled by them with terror

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ بَعَثۡنٰهُمۡ لِيَتَسَآءَلُوۡا بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ كَمۡ لَبِثۡتُمۡؕ قَالُوۡا لَبِثۡنَا يَوۡمًا اَوۡ بَعۡضَ يَوۡمٍؕ قَالُوۡا رَبُّكُمۡ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا لَبِثۡتُمۡؕ فَابۡعَثُوۡ٘ا اَحَدَكُمۡ بِوَرِقِكُمۡ هٰذِهٖ٘ اِلَي الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ فَلۡيَنۡظُرۡ اَيُّهَا٘ اَزۡكٰي طَعَامًا فَلۡيَاۡتِكُمۡ بِرِزۡقٍ مِّنۡهُ وَلۡيَتَۙلَطَّفۡ وَلَا يُشۡعِرَنَّ بِكُمۡ اَحَدًا
quran.english: And similarly, We awakened them that they might question one another. Said a speaker from among them, "How long have you remained [here]?" They said, "We have remained a day or part of a day." They said, "Your Lord is most knowing of how long you remained. So send one of you with this silver coin of yours to the city and let him look to which is the best of food and bring you provision from it and let him be cautious. And let no one be aware of you

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ اِنۡ يَّظۡهَرُوۡا عَلَيۡكُمۡ يَرۡجُمُوۡكُمۡ اَوۡ يُعِيۡدُوۡكُمۡ فِيۡ مِلَّتِهِمۡ وَلَنۡ تُفۡلِحُوۡ٘ا اِذًا اَبَدًا
quran.english: Indeed, if they come to know of you, they will stone you or return you to their religion. And never would you succeed, then - ever

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ اَعۡثَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ لِيَعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّ وَّاَنَّ السَّاعَةَ لَا رَيۡبَ فِيۡهَاࣗۚ اِذۡ يَتَنَازَعُوۡنَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ اَمۡرَهُمۡ فَقَالُوا ابۡنُوۡا عَلَيۡهِمۡ بُنۡيَانًاؕ رَبُّهُمۡ اَعۡلَمُ بِهِمۡؕ قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ غَلَبُوۡا عَلٰ٘ي اَمۡرِهِمۡ لَنَتَّخِذَنَّ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مَّسۡجِدًا
quran.english: And similarly, We caused them to be found that they [who found them] would know that the promise of Allah is truth and that of the Hour there is no doubt. [That was] when they disputed among themselves about their affair and [then] said, "Construct over them a structure. Their Lord is most knowing about them." Said those who prevailed in the matter, "We will surely take [for ourselves] over them a masjid

quran.arabic: سَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ ثَلٰثَةٌ رَّابِعُهُمۡ كَلۡبُهُمۡۚ وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ خَمۡسَةٌ سَادِسُهُمۡ كَلۡبُهُمۡ رَجۡمًاۭ بِالۡغَيۡبِۚ وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ سَبۡعَةٌ وَّثَامِنُهُمۡ كَلۡبُهُمۡؕ قُلۡ رَّبِّيۡ٘ اَعۡلَمُ بِعِدَّتِهِمۡ مَّا يَعۡلَمُهُمۡ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلٌ ࣢ࣞ فَلَا تُمَارِ فِيۡهِمۡ اِلَّا مِرَآءً ظَاهِرًاࣕ وَّلَا تَسۡتَفۡتِ فِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡهُمۡ اَحَدًاࣖ‏
quran.english: They will say there were three, the fourth of them being their dog; and they will say there were five, the sixth of them being their dog - guessing at the unseen; and they will say there were seven, and the eighth of them was their dog. Say, [O Muhammad], "My Lord is most knowing of their number. None knows them except a few. So do not argue about them except with an obvious argument and do not inquire about them among [the speculators] from anyone

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَقُوۡلَنَّ لِشَايۡءٍ اِنِّيۡ فَاعِلٌ ذٰلِكَ غَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And never say of anything, "Indeed, I will do that tomorrow

quran.arabic: اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يَّشَآءَ اللّٰهُؗ وَاذۡكُرۡ رَّبَّكَ اِذَا نَسِيۡتَ وَقُلۡ عَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّهۡدِيَنِ رَبِّيۡ لِاَقۡرَبَ مِنۡ هٰذَا رَشَدًا
quran.english: Except [when adding], "If Allah wills." And remember your Lord when you forget [it] and say, "Perhaps my Lord will guide me to what is nearer than this to right conduct

quran.arabic: وَلَبِثُوۡا فِيۡ كَهۡفِهِمۡ ثَلٰثَ مِائَةٍ سِنِيۡنَ وَازۡدَادُوۡا تِسۡعًا
quran.english: And they remained in their cave for three hundred years and exceeded by nine

quran.arabic: قُلِ اللّٰهُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا لَبِثُوۡاۚ لَهٗ غَيۡبُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ اَبۡصِرۡ بِهٖ وَاَسۡمِعۡؕ مَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مِنۡ وَّلِيٍّؗ وَّلَا يُشۡرِكُ فِيۡ حُكۡمِهٖ٘ اَحَدًا
quran.english: Say, "Allah is most knowing of how long they remained. He has [knowledge of] the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth. How Seeing is He and how Hearing! They have not besides Him any protector, and He shares not His legislation with anyone

quran.arabic: وَاتۡلُ مَا٘ اُوۡحِيَ اِلَيۡكَ مِنۡ كِتَابِ رَبِّكَؕ لَا مُبَدِّلَ لِكَلِمٰتِهٖۚࣞ وَلَنۡ تَجِدَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مُلۡتَحَدًا
quran.english: And recite, [O Muhammad], what has been revealed to you of the Book of your Lord. There is no changer of His words, and never will you find in other than Him a refuge

quran.arabic: وَاصۡبِرۡ نَفۡسَكَ مَعَ الَّذِيۡنَ يَدۡعُوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡ بِالۡغَدٰوةِ وَالۡعَشِيِّ يُرِيۡدُوۡنَ وَجۡهَهٗ وَلَا تَعۡدُ عَيۡنٰكَ عَنۡهُمۡۚ تُرِيۡدُ زِيۡنَةَ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاۚ وَلَا تُطِعۡ مَنۡ اَغۡفَلۡنَا قَلۡبَهٗ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِنَا وَاتَّبَعَ هَوٰىهُ وَكَانَ اَمۡرُهٗ فُرُطًا
quran.english: And keep yourself patient [by being] with those who call upon their Lord in the morning and the evening, seeking His countenance. And let not your eyes pass beyond them, desiring adornments of the worldly life, and do not obey one whose heart We have made heedless of Our remembrance and who follows his desire and whose affair is ever [in] neglect

quran.arabic: وَقُلِ الۡحَقُّ مِنۡ رَّبِّكُمۡࣞ فَمَنۡ شَآءَ فَلۡيُؤۡمِنۡ وَّمَنۡ شَآءَ فَلۡيَكۡفُرۡۚ اِنَّا٘ اَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلظّٰلِمِيۡنَ نَارًا اَحَاطَ بِهِمۡ سُرَادِقُهَاؕ وَاِنۡ يَّسۡتَغِيۡثُوۡا يُغَاثُوۡا بِمَآءٍ كَالۡمُهۡلِ يَشۡوِي الۡوُجُوۡهَؕ بِئۡسَ الشَّرَابُؕ وَسَآءَتۡ مُرۡتَفَقًا
quran.english: And say, "The truth is from your Lord, so whoever wills - let him believe; and whoever wills - let him disbelieve." Indeed, We have prepared for the wrongdoers a fire whose walls will surround them. And if they call for relief, they will be relieved with water like murky oil, which scalds [their] faces. Wretched is the drink, and evil is the resting place

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ اِنَّا لَا نُضِيۡعُ اَجۡرَ مَنۡ اَحۡسَنَ عَمَلًاۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - indeed, We will not allow to be lost the reward of any who did well in deeds

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ جَنّٰتُ عَدۡنٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهِمُ الۡاَنۡهٰرُ يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيۡهَا مِنۡ اَسَاوِرَ مِنۡ ذَهَبٍ وَّيَلۡبَسُوۡنَ ثِيَابًا خُضۡرًا مِّنۡ سُنۡدُسٍ وَّاِسۡتَبۡرَقٍ مُّتَّكِـِٕيۡنَ فِيۡهَا عَلَي الۡاَرَآئِكِؕ نِعۡمَ الثَّوَابُؕ وَحَسُنَتۡ مُرۡتَفَقًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Those will have gardens of perpetual residence; beneath them rivers will flow. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and will wear green garments of fine silk and brocade, reclining therein on adorned couches. Excellent is the reward, and good is the resting place

quran.arabic: وَاضۡرِبۡ لَهُمۡ مَّثَلًا رَّجُلَيۡنِ جَعَلۡنَا لِاَحَدِهِمَا جَنَّتَيۡنِ مِنۡ اَعۡنَابٍ وَّحَفَفۡنٰهُمَا بِنَخۡلٍ وَّجَعَلۡنَا بَيۡنَهُمَا زَرۡعًاؕ‏
quran.english: And present to them an example of two men: We granted to one of them two gardens of grapevines, and We bordered them with palm trees and placed between them [fields of] crops

quran.arabic: كِلۡتَا الۡجَنَّتَيۡنِ اٰتَتۡ اُكُلَهَا وَلَمۡ تَظۡلِمۡ مِّنۡهُ شَيۡـًٔاۙ وَّفَجَّرۡنَا خِلٰلَهُمَا نَهَرًاۙ‏
quran.english: Each of the two gardens produced its fruit and did not fall short thereof in anything. And We caused to gush forth within them a river

quran.arabic: وَّكَانَ لَهٗ ثَمَرٌۚ فَقَالَ لِصَاحِبِهٖ وَهُوَ يُحَاوِرُهٗ٘ اَنَا اَكۡثَرُ مِنۡكَ مَالًا وَّاَعَزُّ نَفَرًا
quran.english: And he had fruit, so he said to his companion while he was conversing with him, "I am greater than you in wealth and mightier in [numbers of] men

quran.arabic: وَدَخَلَ جَنَّتَهٗ وَهُوَ ظَالِمٌ لِّنَفۡسِهٖۚ قَالَ مَا٘ اَظُنُّ اَنۡ تَبِيۡدَ هٰذِهٖ٘ اَبَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And he entered his garden while he was unjust to himself. He said, "I do not think that this will perish - ever

quran.arabic: وَّمَا٘ اَظُنُّ السَّاعَةَ قَآئِمَةًۙ وَّلَئِنۡ رُّدِدۡتُّ اِلٰي رَبِّيۡ لَاَجِدَنَّ خَيۡرًا مِّنۡهَا مُنۡقَلَبًاۚ‏
quran.english: And I do not think the Hour will occur. And even if I should be brought back to my Lord, I will surely find better than this as a return

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَهٗ صَاحِبُهٗ وَهُوَ يُحَاوِرُهٗ٘ اَكَفَرۡتَ بِالَّذِيۡ خَلَقَكَ مِنۡ تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍ ثُمَّ سَوّٰىكَ رَجُلًاؕ‏
quran.english: His companion said to him while he was conversing with him, "Have you disbelieved in He who created you from dust and then from a sperm-drop and then proportioned you [as] a man

quran.arabic: لٰكِنَّا۠ هُوَ اللّٰهُ رَبِّيۡ وَلَا٘ اُشۡرِكُ بِرَبِّيۡ٘ اَحَدًا
quran.english: But as for me, He is Allah, my Lord, and I do not associate with my Lord anyone

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا٘ اِذۡ دَخَلۡتَ جَنَّتَكَ قُلۡتَ مَا شَآءَ اللّٰهُۙ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللّٰهِۚ اِنۡ تَرَنِ اَنَا اَقَلَّ مِنۡكَ مَالًا وَّوَلَدًاۚ‏
quran.english: And why did you, when you entered your garden, not say, 'What Allah willed [has occurred]; there is no power except in Allah '? Although you see me less than you in wealth and children

quran.arabic: فَعَسٰي رَبِّيۡ٘ اَنۡ يُّؤۡتِيَنِ خَيۡرًا مِّنۡ جَنَّتِكَ وَيُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡهَا حُسۡبَانًا مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ فَتُصۡبِحَ صَعِيۡدًا زَلَقًاۙ‏
quran.english: It may be that my Lord will give me [something] better than your garden and will send upon it a calamity from the sky, and it will become a smooth, dusty ground

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يُصۡبِحَ مَآؤُهَا غَوۡرًا فَلَنۡ تَسۡتَطِيۡعَ لَهٗ طَلَبًا
quran.english: Or its water will become sunken [into the earth], so you would never be able to seek it

quran.arabic: وَاُحِيۡطَ بِثَمَرِهٖ فَاَصۡبَحَ يُقَلِّبُ كَفَّيۡهِ عَلٰي مَا٘ اَنۡفَقَ فِيۡهَا وَهِيَ خَاوِيَةٌ عَلٰي عُرُوۡشِهَا وَيَقُوۡلُ يٰلَيۡتَنِيۡ لَمۡ اُشۡرِكۡ بِرَبِّيۡ٘ اَحَدًا
quran.english: And his fruits were encompassed [by ruin], so he began to turn his hands about [in dismay] over what he had spent on it, while it had collapsed upon its trellises, and said, "Oh, I wish I had not associated with my Lord anyone

quran.arabic: وَلَمۡ تَكُنۡ لَّهٗ فِئَةٌ يَّنۡصُرُوۡنَهٗ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ وَمَا كَانَ مُنۡتَصِرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And there was for him no company to aid him other than Allah, nor could he defend himself

quran.arabic: هُنَالِكَ الۡوَلَايَةُ لِلّٰهِ الۡحَقِّؕ هُوَ خَيۡرٌ ثَوَابًا وَّخَيۡرٌ عُقۡبًاࣖ‏
quran.english: There the authority is [completely] for Allah, the Truth. He is best in reward and best in outcome

quran.arabic: وَاضۡرِبۡ لَهُمۡ مَّثَلَ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا كَمَآءٍ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ فَاخۡتَلَطَ بِهٖ نَبَاتُ الۡاَرۡضِ فَاَصۡبَحَ هَشِيۡمًا تَذۡرُوۡهُ الرِّيٰحُؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ مُّقۡتَدِرًا
quran.english: And present to them the example of the life of this world, [its being] like rain which We send down from the sky, and the vegetation of the earth mingles with it and [then] it becomes dry remnants, scattered by the winds. And Allah is ever, over all things, Perfect in Ability

quran.arabic: اَلۡمَالُ وَالۡبَنُوۡنَ زِيۡنَةُ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاۚ وَالۡبٰقِيٰتُ الصّٰلِحٰتُ خَيۡرٌ عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَّخَيۡرٌ اَمَلًا
quran.english: Wealth and children are [but] adornment of the worldly life. But the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for [one's] hope

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ نُسَيِّرُ الۡجِبَالَ وَتَرَي الۡاَرۡضَ بَارِزَةًۙ وَّحَشَرۡنٰهُمۡ فَلَمۡ نُغَادِرۡ مِنۡهُمۡ اَحَدًاۚ‏
quran.english: And [warn of] the Day when We will remove the mountains and you will see the earth prominent, and We will gather them and not leave behind from them anyone

quran.arabic: وَعُرِضُوۡا عَلٰي رَبِّكَ صَفًّاؕ لَقَدۡ جِئۡتُمُوۡنَا كَمَا خَلَقۡنٰكُمۡ اَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍۭؗ بَلۡ زَعَمۡتُمۡ اَلَّنۡ نَّجۡعَلَ لَكُمۡ مَّوۡعِدًا
quran.english: And they will be presented before your Lord in rows, [and He will say], "You have certainly come to Us just as We created you the first time. But you claimed that We would never make for you an appointment

quran.arabic: وَوُضِعَ الۡكِتٰبُ فَتَرَي الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ مُشۡفِقِيۡنَ مِمَّا فِيۡهِ وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ يٰوَيۡلَتَنَا مَالِ هٰذَا الۡكِتٰبِ لَا يُغَادِرُ صَغِيۡرَةً وَّلَا كَبِيۡرَةً اِلَّا٘ اَحۡصٰىهَاۚ وَوَجَدُوۡا مَا عَمِلُوۡا حَاضِرًاؕ وَلَا يَظۡلِمُ رَبُّكَ اَحَدًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And the record [of deeds] will be placed [open], and you will see the criminals fearful of that within it, and they will say, "Oh, woe to us! What is this book that leaves nothing small or great except that it has enumerated it?" And they will find what they did present [before them]. And your Lord does injustice to no one

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قُلۡنَا لِلۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ اسۡجُدُوۡا لِاٰدَمَ فَسَجَدُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا٘ اِبۡلِيۡسَؕ كَانَ مِنَ الۡجِنِّ فَفَسَقَ عَنۡ اَمۡرِ رَبِّهٖؕ اَفَتَتَّخِذُوۡنَهٗ وَذُرِّيَّتَهٗ٘ اَوۡلِيَآءَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِيۡ وَهُمۡ لَكُمۡ عَدُوٌّؕ بِئۡسَ لِلظّٰلِمِيۡنَ بَدَلًا
quran.english: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was of the jinn and departed from the command of his Lord. Then will you take him and his descendants as allies other than Me while they are enemies to you? Wretched it is for the wrongdoers as an exchange

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَشۡهَدۡتُّهُمۡ خَلۡقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَلَا خَلۡقَ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡࣕ وَمَا كُنۡتُ مُتَّخِذَ الۡمُضِلِّيۡنَ عَضُدًا
quran.english: I did not make them witness to the creation of the heavens and the earth or to the creation of themselves, and I would not have taken the misguiders as assistants

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يَقُوۡلُ نَادُوۡا شُرَكَآءِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ زَعَمۡتُمۡ فَدَعَوۡهُمۡ فَلَمۡ يَسۡتَجِيۡبُوۡا لَهُمۡ وَجَعَلۡنَا بَيۡنَهُمۡ مَّوۡبِقًا
quran.english: And [warn of] the Day when He will say, "Call 'My partners' whom you claimed," and they will invoke them, but they will not respond to them. And We will put between them [a valley of] destruction

quran.arabic: وَرَاَ الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ النَّارَ فَظَنُّوۡ٘ا اَنَّهُمۡ مُّوَاقِعُوۡهَا وَلَمۡ يَجِدُوۡا عَنۡهَا مَصۡرِفًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And the criminals will see the Fire and will be certain that they are to fall therein. And they will not find from it a way elsewhere

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ صَرَّفۡنَا فِيۡ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنِ لِلنَّاسِ مِنۡ كُلِّ مَثَلٍؕ وَكَانَ الۡاِنۡسَانُ اَكۡثَرَ شَيۡءٍ جَدَلًا
quran.english: And We have certainly diversified in this Qur'an for the people from every [kind of] example; but man has ever been, most of anything, [prone to] dispute

quran.arabic: وَمَا مَنَعَ النَّاسَ اَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡ٘ا اِذۡ جَآءَهُمُ الۡهُدٰي وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡا رَبَّهُمۡ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ تَاۡتِيَهُمۡ سُنَّةُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ اَوۡ يَاۡتِيَهُمُ الۡعَذَابُ قُبُلًا
quran.english: And nothing has prevented the people from believing when guidance came to them and from asking forgiveness of their Lord except that there [must] befall them the [accustomed] precedent of the former peoples or that the punishment should come [directly] before them

quran.arabic: وَمَا نُرۡسِلُ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَ اِلَّا مُبَشِّرِيۡنَ وَمُنۡذِرِيۡنَۚ وَيُجَادِلُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِالۡبَاطِلِ لِيُدۡحِضُوۡا بِهِ الۡحَقَّ وَاتَّخَذُوۡ٘ا اٰيٰتِيۡ وَمَا٘ اُنۡذِرُوۡا هُزُوًا
quran.english: And We send not the messengers except as bringers of good tidings and warners. And those who disbelieve dispute by [using] falsehood to [attempt to] invalidate thereby the truth and have taken My verses, and that of which they are warned, in ridicule

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ اَظۡلَمُ مِمَّنۡ ذُكِّرَ بِاٰيٰتِ رَبِّهٖ فَاَعۡرَضَ عَنۡهَا وَنَسِيَ مَا قَدَّمَتۡ يَدٰهُؕ اِنَّا جَعَلۡنَا عَلٰي قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ اَكِنَّةً اَنۡ يَّفۡقَهُوۡهُ وَفِيۡ٘ اٰذَانِهِمۡ وَقۡرًاؕ وَاِنۡ تَدۡعُهُمۡ اِلَي الۡهُدٰي فَلَنۡ يَّهۡتَدُوۡ٘ا اِذًا اَبَدًا
quran.english: And who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the verses of his Lord but turns away from them and forgets what his hands have put forth? Indeed, We have placed over their hearts coverings, lest they understand it, and in their ears deafness. And if you invite them to guidance - they will never be guided, then - ever

quran.arabic: وَرَبُّكَ الۡغَفُوۡرُ ذُو الرَّحۡمَةِؕ لَوۡ يُؤَاخِذُهُمۡ بِمَا كَسَبُوۡا لَعَجَّلَ لَهُمُ الۡعَذَابَؕ بَلۡ لَّهُمۡ مَّوۡعِدٌ لَّنۡ يَّجِدُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مَوۡئِلًا
quran.english: And your Lord is the Forgiving, full of mercy. If He were to impose blame upon them for what they earned, He would have hastened for them the punishment. Rather, for them is an appointment from which they will never find an escape

quran.arabic: وَتِلۡكَ الۡقُرٰ٘ي اَهۡلَكۡنٰهُمۡ لَمَّا ظَلَمُوۡا وَجَعَلۡنَا لِمَهۡلِكِهِمۡ مَّوۡعِدًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And those cities - We destroyed them when they wronged, and We made for their destruction an appointed time

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَ مُوۡسٰي لِفَتٰىهُ لَا٘ اَبۡرَحُ حَتّٰ٘ي اَبۡلُغَ مَجۡمَعَ الۡبَحۡرَيۡنِ اَوۡ اَمۡضِيَ حُقُبًا
quran.english: And [mention] when Moses said to his servant, "I will not cease [traveling] until I reach the junction of the two seas or continue for a long period

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَا مَجۡمَعَ بَيۡنِهِمَا نَسِيَا حُوۡتَهُمَا فَاتَّخَذَ سَبِيۡلَهٗ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ سَرَبًا
quran.english: But when they reached the junction between them, they forgot their fish, and it took its course into the sea, slipping away

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَاوَزَا قَالَ لِفَتٰىهُ اٰتِنَا غَدَآءَنَاؗ لَقَدۡ لَقِيۡنَا مِنۡ سَفَرِنَا هٰذَا نَصَبًا
quran.english: So when they had passed beyond it, [Moses] said to his boy, "Bring us our morning meal. We have certainly suffered in this, our journey, [much] fatigue

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَرَءَيۡتَ اِذۡ اَوَيۡنَا٘ اِلَي الصَّخۡرَةِ فَاِنِّيۡ نَسِيۡتُ الۡحُوۡتَؗ وَمَا٘ اَنۡسٰىنِيۡهُ اِلَّا الشَّيۡطٰنُ اَنۡ اَذۡكُرَهٗۚ وَاتَّخَذَ سَبِيۡلَهٗ فِي الۡبَحۡرِࣗۖ عَجَبًا
quran.english: He said, "Did you see when we retired to the rock? Indeed, I forgot [there] the fish. And none made me forget it except Satan - that I should mention it. And it took its course into the sea amazingly

quran.arabic: قَالَ ذٰلِكَ مَا كُنَّا نَبۡغِࣗۖ فَارۡتَدَّا عَلٰ٘ي اٰثَارِهِمَا قَصَصًاۙ‏
quran.english: [Moses] said, "That is what we were seeking." So they returned, following their footprints

quran.arabic: فَوَجَدَا عَبۡدًا مِّنۡ عِبَادِنَا٘ اٰتَيۡنٰهُ رَحۡمَةً مِّنۡ عِنۡدِنَا وَعَلَّمۡنٰهُ مِنۡ لَّدُنَّا عِلۡمًا
quran.english: And they found a servant from among Our servants to whom we had given mercy from us and had taught him from Us a [certain] knowledge

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَهٗ مُوۡسٰي هَلۡ اَتَّبِعُكَ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ تُعَلِّمَنِ مِمَّا عُلِّمۡتَ رُشۡدًا
quran.english: Moses said to him, "May I follow you on [the condition] that you teach me from what you have been taught of sound judgement

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّكَ لَنۡ تَسۡتَطِيۡعَ مَعِيَ صَبۡرًا
quran.english: He said, "Indeed, with me you will never be able to have patience

quran.arabic: وَكَيۡفَ تَصۡبِرُ عَلٰي مَا لَمۡ تُحِطۡ بِهٖ خُبۡرًا
quran.english: And how can you have patience for what you do not encompass in knowledge

quran.arabic: قَالَ سَتَجِدُنِيۡ٘ اِنۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ صَابِرًا وَّلَا٘ اَعۡصِيۡ لَكَ اَمۡرًا
quran.english: [Moses] said, "You will find me, if Allah wills, patient, and I will not disobey you in [any] order

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَاِنِ اتَّبَعۡتَنِيۡ فَلَا تَسۡـَٔلۡنِيۡ عَنۡ شَيۡءٍ حَتّٰ٘ي اُحۡدِثَ لَكَ مِنۡهُ ذِكۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: He said, "Then if you follow me, do not ask me about anything until I make to you about it mention

quran.arabic: فَانۡطَلَقَاࣞ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا رَكِبَا فِي السَّفِيۡنَةِ خَرَقَهَاؕ قَالَ اَخَرَقۡتَهَا لِتُغۡرِقَ اَهۡلَهَاۚ لَقَدۡ جِئۡتَ شَيۡـًٔا اِمۡرًا
quran.english: So they set out, until when they had embarked on the ship, al-Khidh r tore it open. [Moses] said, "Have you torn it open to drown its people? You have certainly done a grave thing

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَلَمۡ اَقُلۡ اِنَّكَ لَنۡ تَسۡتَطِيۡعَ مَعِيَ صَبۡرًا
quran.english: [Al-Khidh r] said, "Did I not say that with me you would never be able to have patience

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَا تُؤَاخِذۡنِيۡ بِمَا نَسِيۡتُ وَلَا تُرۡهِقۡنِيۡ مِنۡ اَمۡرِيۡ عُسۡرًا
quran.english: [Moses] said, "Do not blame me for what I forgot and do not cover me in my matter with difficulty

quran.arabic: فَانۡطَلَقَاࣞ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا لَقِيَا غُلٰمًا فَقَتَلَهٗۙ قَالَ اَقَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسًا زَكِيَّةًۭ بِغَيۡرِ نَفۡسٍؕ لَقَدۡ جِئۡتَ شَيۡـًٔا نُّكۡرًا
quran.english: So they set out, until when they met a boy, al-Khidh r killed him. [Moses] said, "Have you killed a pure soul for other than [having killed] a soul? You have certainly done a deplorable thing

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَلَمۡ اَقُلۡ لَّكَ اِنَّكَ لَنۡ تَسۡتَطِيۡعَ مَعِيَ صَبۡرًا
quran.english: [Al-Khidh r] said, "Did I not tell you that with me you would never be able to have patience

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنۡ سَاَلۡتُكَ عَنۡ شَيۡءٍۭ بَعۡدَهَا فَلَا تُصٰحِبۡنِيۡۚ قَدۡ بَلَغۡتَ مِنۡ لَّدُنِّيۡ عُذۡرًا
quran.english: [Moses] said, "If I should ask you about anything after this, then do not keep me as a companion. You have obtained from me an excuse

quran.arabic: فَانۡطَلَقَاࣞ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا٘ اَتَيَا٘ اَهۡلَ قَرۡيَةِ اِۨسۡتَطۡعَمَا٘ اَهۡلَهَا فَاَبَوۡا اَنۡ يُّضَيِّفُوۡهُمَا فَوَجَدَا فِيۡهَا جِدَارًا يُّرِيۡدُ اَنۡ يَّنۡقَضَّ فَاَقَامَهٗؕ قَالَ لَوۡ شِئۡتَ لَتَّخَذۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ اَجۡرًا
quran.english: So they set out, until when they came to the people of a town, they asked its people for food, but they refused to offer them hospitality. And they found therein a wall about to collapse, so al-Khidh r restored it. [Moses] said, "If you wished, you could have taken for it a payment

quran.arabic: قَالَ هٰذَا فِرَاقُ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنِكَۚ سَاُنَبِّئُكَ بِتَاۡوِيۡلِ مَا لَمۡ تَسۡتَطِعۡ عَّلَيۡهِ صَبۡرًا
quran.english: [Al-Khidh r] said, "This is parting between me and you. I will inform you of the interpretation of that about which you could not have patience

quran.arabic: اَمَّا السَّفِيۡنَةُ فَكَانَتۡ لِمَسٰكِيۡنَ يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ فَاَرَدۡتُّ اَنۡ اَعِيۡبَهَا وَكَانَ وَرَآءَهُمۡ مَّلِكٌ يَّاۡخُذُ كُلَّ سَفِيۡنَةٍ غَصۡبًا
quran.english: As for the ship, it belonged to poor people working at sea. So I intended to cause defect in it as there was after them a king who seized every [good] ship by force

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا الۡغُلٰمُ فَكَانَ اَبَوٰهُ مُؤۡمِنَيۡنِ فَخَشِيۡنَا٘ اَنۡ يُّرۡهِقَهُمَا طُغۡيَانًا وَّكُفۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: And as for the boy, his parents were believers, and we feared that he would overburden them by transgression and disbelief

quran.arabic: فَاَرَدۡنَا٘ اَنۡ يُّبۡدِلَهُمَا رَبُّهُمَا خَيۡرًا مِّنۡهُ زَكٰوةً وَّاَقۡرَبَ رُحۡمًا
quran.english: So we intended that their Lord should substitute for them one better than him in purity and nearer to mercy

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا الۡجِدَارُ فَكَانَ لِغُلٰمَيۡنِ يَتِيۡمَيۡنِ فِي الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ وَكَانَ تَحۡتَهٗ كَنۡزٌ لَّهُمَا وَكَانَ اَبُوۡهُمَا صَالِحًاۚ فَاَرَادَ رَبُّكَ اَنۡ يَّبۡلُغَا٘ اَشُدَّهُمَا وَيَسۡتَخۡرِجَا كَنۡزَهُمَاࣗۖ رَحۡمَةً مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَۚ وَمَا فَعَلۡتُهٗ عَنۡ اَمۡرِيۡؕ ذٰلِكَ تَاۡوِيۡلُ مَا لَمۡ تَسۡطِعۡ عَّلَيۡهِ صَبۡرًاؕࣖ‏
quran.english: And as for the wall, it belonged to two orphan boys in the city, and there was beneath it a treasure for them, and their father had been righteous. So your Lord intended that they reach maturity and extract their treasure, as a mercy from your Lord. And I did it not of my own accord. That is the interpretation of that about which you could not have patience

quran.arabic: وَيَسۡـَٔلُوۡنَكَ عَنۡ ذِي الۡقَرۡنَيۡنِؕ قُلۡ سَاَتۡلُوۡا عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡهُ ذِكۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And they ask you, [O Muhammad], about Dhul-Qarnayn. Say, "I will recite to you about him a report

quran.arabic: اِنَّا مَكَّنَّا لَهٗ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُ مِنۡ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ سَبَبًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed We established him upon the earth, and We gave him to everything a way

quran.arabic: فَاَتۡبَعَ سَبَبًا
quran.english: So he followed a way

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا بَلَغَ مَغۡرِبَ الشَّمۡسِ وَجَدَهَا تَغۡرُبُ فِيۡ عَيۡنٍ حَمِئَةٍ وَّوَجَدَ عِنۡدَهَا قَوۡمًا ࣢ؕ قُلۡنَا يٰذَا الۡقَرۡنَيۡنِ اِمَّا٘ اَنۡ تُعَذِّبَ وَاِمَّا٘ اَنۡ تَتَّخِذَ فِيۡهِمۡ حُسۡنًا
quran.english: Until, when he reached the setting of the sun, he found it [as if] setting in a spring of dark mud, and he found near it a people. Allah said, "O Dhul-Qarnayn, either you punish [them] or else adopt among them [a way of] goodness

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَمَّا مَنۡ ظَلَمَ فَسَوۡفَ نُعَذِّبُهٗ ثُمَّ يُرَدُّ اِلٰي رَبِّهٖ فَيُعَذِّبُهٗ عَذَابًا نُّكۡرًا
quran.english: He said, "As for one who wrongs, we will punish him. Then he will be returned to his Lord, and He will punish him with a terrible punishment

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا مَنۡ اٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَلَهٗ جَزَآءَ اِۨلۡحُسۡنٰيۚ وَسَنَقُوۡلُ لَهٗ مِنۡ اَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: But as for one who believes and does righteousness, he will have a reward of Paradise, and we will speak to him from our command with ease

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَتۡبَعَ سَبَبًا
quran.english: Then he followed a way

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا بَلَغَ مَطۡلِعَ الشَّمۡسِ وَجَدَهَا تَطۡلُعُ عَلٰي قَوۡمٍ لَّمۡ نَجۡعَلۡ لَّهُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِهَا سِتۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: Until, when he came to the rising of the sun, he found it rising on a people for whom We had not made against it any shield

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَؕ وَقَدۡ اَحَطۡنَا بِمَا لَدَيۡهِ خُبۡرًا
quran.english: Thus. And We had encompassed [all] that he had in knowledge

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَتۡبَعَ سَبَبًا
quran.english: Then he followed a way

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا بَلَغَ بَيۡنَ السَّدَّيۡنِ وَجَدَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهِمَا قَوۡمًاۙ لَّا يَكَادُوۡنَ يَفۡقَهُوۡنَ قَوۡلًا
quran.english: Until, when he reached [a pass] between two mountains, he found beside them a people who could hardly understand [his] speech

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰذَا الۡقَرۡنَيۡنِ اِنَّ يَاۡجُوۡجَ وَمَاۡجُوۡجَ مُفۡسِدُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَهَلۡ نَجۡعَلُ لَكَ خَرۡجًا عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ تَجۡعَلَ بَيۡنَنَا وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ سَدًّا
quran.english: They said, "O Dhul-Qarnayn, indeed Gog and Magog are [great] corrupters in the land. So may we assign for you an expenditure that you might make between us and them a barrier

quran.arabic: قَالَ مَا مَكَّنِّيۡ فِيۡهِ رَبِّيۡ خَيۡرٌ فَاَعِيۡنُوۡنِيۡ بِقُوَّةٍ اَجۡعَلۡ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ رَدۡمًاۙ‏
quran.english: He said, "That in which my Lord has established me is better [than what you offer], but assist me with strength; I will make between you and them a dam

quran.arabic: اٰتُوۡنِيۡ زُبَرَ الۡحَدِيۡدِؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا سَاوٰي بَيۡنَ الصَّدَفَيۡنِ قَالَ انۡفُخُوۡاؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا جَعَلَهٗ نَارًاۙ قَالَ اٰتُوۡنِيۡ٘ اُفۡرِغۡ عَلَيۡهِ قِطۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: Bring me sheets of iron" - until, when he had leveled [them] between the two mountain walls, he said, "Blow [with bellows]," until when he had made it [like] fire, he said, "Bring me, that I may pour over it molten copper

quran.arabic: فَمَا اسۡطَاعُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ يَّظۡهَرُوۡهُ وَمَا اسۡتَطَاعُوۡا لَهٗ نَقۡبًا
quran.english: So Gog and Magog were unable to pass over it, nor were they able [to effect] in it any penetration

quran.arabic: قَالَ هٰذَا رَحۡمَةٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّيۡۚ فَاِذَا جَآءَ وَعۡدُ رَبِّيۡ جَعَلَهٗ دَكَّآءَۚ وَكَانَ وَعۡدُ رَبِّيۡ حَقًّاؕ‏
quran.english: [Dhul-Qarnayn] said, "This is a mercy from my Lord; but when the promise of my Lord comes, He will make it level, and ever is the promise of my Lord true

quran.arabic: وَتَرَكۡنَا بَعۡضَهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّمُوۡجُ فِيۡ بَعۡضٍ وَّنُفِخَ فِي الصُّوۡرِ فَجَمَعۡنٰهُمۡ جَمۡعًاۙ‏
quran.english: And We will leave them that day surging over each other, and [then] the Horn will be blown, and We will assemble them in [one] assembly

quran.arabic: وَّعَرَضۡنَا جَهَنَّمَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ عَرۡضَاۙ‏
quran.english: And We will present Hell that Day to the Disbelievers, on display

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡنَ كَانَتۡ اَعۡيُنُهُمۡ فِيۡ غِطَآءٍ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِيۡ وَكَانُوۡا لَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَ سَمۡعًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Those whose eyes had been within a cover [removed] from My remembrance, and they were not able to hear

quran.arabic: اَفَحَسِبَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ يَّتَّخِذُوۡا عِبَادِيۡ مِنۡ دُوۡنِيۡ٘ اَوۡلِيَآءَؕ اِنَّا٘ اَعۡتَدۡنَا جَهَنَّمَ لِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ نُزُلًا
quran.english: Then do those who disbelieve think that they can take My servants instead of Me as allies? Indeed, We have prepared Hell for the disbelievers as a lodging

quran.arabic: قُلۡ هَلۡ نُنَبِّئُكُمۡ بِالۡاَخۡسَرِيۡنَ اَعۡمَالًاؕ‏
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Shall we [believers] inform you of the greatest losers as to [their] deeds

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ ضَلَّ سَعۡيُهُمۡ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا وَهُمۡ يَحۡسَبُوۡنَ اَنَّهُمۡ يُحۡسِنُوۡنَ صُنۡعًا
quran.english: [They are] those whose effort is lost in worldly life, while they think that they are doing well in work

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَلِقَآئِهٖ فَحَبِطَتۡ اَعۡمَالُهُمۡ فَلَا نُقِيۡمُ لَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ وَزۡنًا
quran.english: Those are the ones who disbelieve in the verses of their Lord and in [their] meeting Him, so their deeds have become worthless; and We will not assign to them on the Day of Resurrection any importance

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ جَزَآؤُهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُ بِمَا كَفَرُوۡا وَاتَّخَذُوۡ٘ا اٰيٰتِيۡ وَرُسُلِيۡ هُزُوًا
quran.english: That is their recompense - Hell - for what they denied and [because] they took My signs and My messengers in ridicule

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ كَانَتۡ لَهُمۡ جَنّٰتُ الۡفِرۡدَوۡسِ نُزُلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - they will have the Gardens of Paradise as a lodging

quran.arabic: خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا لَا يَبۡغُوۡنَ عَنۡهَا حِوَلًا
quran.english: Wherein they abide eternally. They will not desire from it any transfer

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّوۡ كَانَ الۡبَحۡرُ مِدَادًا لِّكَلِمٰتِ رَبِّيۡ لَنَفِدَ الۡبَحۡرُ قَبۡلَ اَنۡ تَنۡفَدَ كَلِمٰتُ رَبِّيۡ وَلَوۡ جِئۡنَا بِمِثۡلِهٖ مَدَدًا
quran.english: Say, "If the sea were ink for [writing] the words of my Lord, the sea would be exhausted before the words of my Lord were exhausted, even if We brought the like of it as a supplement

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّمَا٘ اَنَا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُكُمۡ يُوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيَّ اَنَّمَا٘ اِلٰهُكُمۡ اِلٰهٌ وَّاحِدٌۚ فَمَنۡ كَانَ يَرۡجُوۡا لِقَآءَ رَبِّهٖ فَلۡيَعۡمَلۡ عَمَلًا صَالِحًا وَّلَا يُشۡرِكۡ بِعِبَادَةِ رَبِّهٖ٘ اَحَدًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "I am only a man like you, to whom has been revealed that your god is one God. So whoever would hope for the meeting with his Lord - let him do righteous work and not associate in the worship of his Lord anyone

quran.arabic: كٓهٰيٰعٓصٓ
quran.english: Kaf, Ha, Ya, 'Ayn, Sad

quran.arabic: ذِكۡرُ رَحۡمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَبۡدَهٗ زَكَرِيَّاۖۚ‏
quran.english: [This is] a mention of the mercy of your Lord to His servant Zechariah

quran.arabic: اِذۡ نَادٰي رَبَّهٗ نِدَآءً خَفِيًّا
quran.english: When he called to his Lord a private supplication

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّيۡ وَهَنَ الۡعَظۡمُ مِنِّيۡ وَاشۡتَعَلَ الرَّاۡسُ شَيۡبًا وَّلَمۡ اَكُنۭۡ بِدُعَآئِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, indeed my bones have weakened, and my head has filled with white, and never have I been in my supplication to You, my Lord, unhappy

quran.arabic: وَاِنِّيۡ خِفۡتُ الۡمَوَالِيَ مِنۡ وَّرَآءِيۡ وَكَانَتِ امۡرَاَتِيۡ عَاقِرًا فَهَبۡ لِيۡ مِنۡ لَّدُنۡكَ وَلِيًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, I fear the successors after me, and my wife has been barren, so give me from Yourself an heir

quran.arabic: يَّرِثُنِيۡ وَيَرِثُ مِنۡ اٰلِ يَعۡقُوۡبَࣗ وَاجۡعَلۡهُ رَبِّ رَضِيًّا
quran.english: Who will inherit me and inherit from the family of Jacob. And make him, my Lord, pleasing [to You]

quran.arabic: يٰزَكَرِيَّا٘ اِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلٰمِ اِۨسۡمُهٗ يَحۡيٰيۙ لَمۡ نَجۡعَلۡ لَّهٗ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ سَمِيًّا
quran.english: [He was told], "O Zechariah, indeed We give you good tidings of a boy whose name will be John. We have not assigned to any before [this] name

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اَنّٰي يَكُوۡنُ لِيۡ غُلٰمٌ وَّكَانَتِ امۡرَاَتِيۡ عَاقِرًا وَّقَدۡ بَلَغۡتُ مِنَ الۡكِبَرِ عِتِيًّا
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, how will I have a boy when my wife has been barren and I have reached extreme old age

quran.arabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكَۚ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَيَّ هَيِّنٌ وَّقَدۡ خَلَقۡتُكَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَلَمۡ تَكُ شَيۡـًٔا
quran.english: [An angel] said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, for I created you before, while you were nothing

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اجۡعَلۡ لِّيۡ٘ اٰيَةًؕ قَالَ اٰيَتُكَ اَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ النَّاسَ ثَلٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا
quran.english: [Zechariah] said, "My Lord, make for me a sign." He said, "Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound

quran.arabic: فَخَرَجَ عَلٰي قَوۡمِهٖ مِنَ الۡمِحۡرَابِ فَاَوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيۡهِمۡ اَنۡ سَبِّحُوۡا بُكۡرَةً وَّعَشِيًّا
quran.english: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allah] in the morning and afternoon

quran.arabic: يٰيَحۡيٰي خُذِ الۡكِتٰبَ بِقُوَّةٍؕ وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُ الۡحُكۡمَ صَبِيًّاۙ‏
quran.english: [Allah] said, "O John, take the Scripture with determination." And We gave him judgement [while yet] a boy

quran.arabic: وَّحَنَانًا مِّنۡ لَّدُنَّا وَزَكٰوةًؕ وَكَانَ تَقِيًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allah

quran.arabic: وَّبَرًّاۭ بِوَالِدَيۡهِ وَلَمۡ يَكُنۡ جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا
quran.english: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant

quran.arabic: وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَيۡهِ يَوۡمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوۡمَ يَمُوۡتُ وَيَوۡمَ يُبۡعَثُ حَيًّاࣖ‏
quran.english: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِي الۡكِتٰبِ مَرۡيَمَۘ اِذِ انۡتَبَذَتۡ مِنۡ اَهۡلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرۡقِيًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And mention, [O Muhammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east

quran.arabic: فَاتَّخَذَتۡ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهِمۡ حِجَابًاࣞ فَاَرۡسَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهَا رُوۡحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
quran.english: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel, and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَعُوۡذُ بِالرَّحۡمٰنِ مِنۡكَ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ تَقِيًّا
quran.english: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allah

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّمَا٘ اَنَا رَسُوۡلُ رَبِّكِࣗۖ لِاَهَبَ لَكِ غُلٰمًا زَكِيًّا
quran.english: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ اَنّٰي يَكُوۡنُ لِيۡ غُلٰمٌ وَّلَمۡ يَمۡسَسۡنِيۡ بَشَرٌ وَّلَمۡ اَكُ بَغِيًّا
quran.english: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste

quran.arabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكِۚ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَيَّ هَيِّنٌۚ وَلِنَجۡعَلَهٗ٘ اٰيَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحۡمَةً مِّنَّاۚ وَكَانَ اَمۡرًا مَّقۡضِيًّا
quran.english: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed

quran.arabic: فَحَمَلَتۡهُ فَانۡتَبَذَتۡ بِهٖ مَكَانًا قَصِيًّا
quran.english: So she conceived him, and she withdrew with him to a remote place

quran.arabic: فَاَجَآءَهَا الۡمَخَاضُ اِلٰي جِذۡعِ النَّخۡلَةِۚ قَالَتۡ يٰلَيۡتَنِيۡ مِتُّ قَبۡلَ هٰذَا وَكُنۡتُ نَسۡيًا مَّنۡسِيًّا
quran.english: And the pains of childbirth drove her to the trunk of a palm tree. She said, "Oh, I wish I had died before this and was in oblivion, forgotten

quran.arabic: فَنَادٰىهَا مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا٘ اَلَّا تَحۡزَنِيۡ قَدۡ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحۡتَكِ سَرِيًّا
quran.english: But he called her from below her, "Do not grieve; your Lord has provided beneath you a stream

quran.arabic: وَهُزِّيۡ٘ اِلَيۡكِ بِجِذۡعِ النَّخۡلَةِ تُسٰقِطۡ عَلَيۡكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّاؗ‏
quran.english: And shake toward you the trunk of the palm tree; it will drop upon you ripe, fresh dates

quran.arabic: فَكُلِيۡ وَاشۡرَبِيۡ وَقَرِّيۡ عَيۡنًاۚ فَاِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ الۡبَشَرِ اَحَدًاۙ فَقُوۡلِيۡ٘ اِنِّيۡ نَذَرۡتُ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ صَوۡمًا فَلَنۡ اُكَلِّمَ الۡيَوۡمَ اِنۡسِيًّاۚ‏
quran.english: So eat and drink and be contented. And if you see from among humanity anyone, say, 'Indeed, I have vowed to the Most Merciful abstention, so I will not speak today to [any] man

quran.arabic: فَاَتَتۡ بِهٖ قَوۡمَهَا تَحۡمِلُهٗؕ قَالُوۡا يٰمَرۡيَمُ لَقَدۡ جِئۡتِ شَيۡـًٔا فَرِيًّا
quran.english: Then she brought him to her people, carrying him. They said, "O Mary, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اُخۡتَ هٰرُوۡنَ مَا كَانَ اَبُوۡكِ امۡرَاَ سَوۡءٍ وَّمَا كَانَتۡ اُمُّكِ بَغِيًّاۚۖ‏
quran.english: O sister of Aaron, your father was not a man of evil, nor was your mother unchaste

quran.arabic: فَاَشَارَتۡ اِلَيۡهِؕࣞ قَالُوۡا كَيۡفَ نُكَلِّمُ مَنۡ كَانَ فِي الۡمَهۡدِ صَبِيًّا
quran.english: So she pointed to him. They said, "How can we speak to one who is in the cradle a child

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنِّيۡ عَبۡدُ اللّٰهِؕࣞ اٰتٰىنِيَ الۡكِتٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِيۡ نَبِيًّاۙ‏
quran.english: [Jesus] said, "Indeed, I am the servant of Allah. He has given me the Scripture and made me a prophet

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلَنِيۡ مُبٰرَكًا اَيۡنَ مَا كُنۡتُࣕ وَاَوۡصٰنِيۡ بِالصَّلٰوةِ وَالزَّكٰوةِ مَا دُمۡتُ حَيًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And He has made me blessed wherever I am and has enjoined upon me prayer and zakah as long as I remain alive

quran.arabic: وَّبَرًّاۭ بِوَالِدَتِيۡؗ وَلَمۡ يَجۡعَلۡنِيۡ جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا
quran.english: And [made me] dutiful to my mother, and He has not made me a wretched tyrant

quran.arabic: وَالسَّلٰمُ عَلَيَّ يَوۡمَ وُلِدۡتُّ وَيَوۡمَ اَمُوۡتُ وَيَوۡمَ اُبۡعَثُ حَيًّا
quran.english: And peace is on me the day I was born and the day I will die and the day I am raised alive

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ عِيۡسَي ابۡنُ مَرۡيَمَۚ قَوۡلَ الۡحَقِّ الَّذِيۡ فِيۡهِ يَمۡتَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: That is Jesus, the son of Mary - the word of truth about which they are in dispute

quran.arabic: مَا كَانَ لِلّٰهِ اَنۡ يَّتَّخِذَ مِنۡ وَّلَدٍۙ سُبۡحٰنَهٗؕ اِذَا قَضٰ٘ي اَمۡرًا فَاِنَّمَا يَقُوۡلُ لَهٗ كُنۡ فَيَكُوۡنُؕ‏
quran.english: It is not [befitting] for Allah to take a son; exalted is He! When He decrees an affair, He only says to it, "Be," and it is

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ رَبِّيۡ وَرَبُّكُمۡ فَاعۡبُدُوۡهُؕ هٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٌ
quran.english: [Jesus said], "And indeed, Allah is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. That is a straight path

quran.arabic: فَاخۡتَلَفَ الۡاَحۡزَابُ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِهِمۡۚ فَوَيۡلٌ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ مَّشۡهَدِ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Then the factions differed [concerning Jesus] from among them, so woe to those who disbelieved - from the scene of a tremendous Day

quran.arabic: اَسۡمِعۡ بِهِمۡ وَاَبۡصِرۡۙ يَوۡمَ يَاۡتُوۡنَنَا لٰكِنِ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ الۡيَوۡمَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: How [clearly] they will hear and see the Day they come to Us, but the wrongdoers today are in clear error

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡذِرۡهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡحَسۡرَةِ اِذۡ قُضِيَ الۡاَمۡرُۘ وَهُمۡ فِيۡ غَفۡلَةٍ وَّهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And warn them, [O Muhammad], of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be concluded; and [yet], they are in [a state of] heedlessness, and they do not believe

quran.arabic: اِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَرِثُ الۡاَرۡضَ وَمَنۡ عَلَيۡهَا وَاِلَيۡنَا يُرۡجَعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِي الۡكِتٰبِ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ ࣢ؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ صِدِّيۡقًا نَّبِيًّا
quran.english: And mention in the Book [the story of] Abraham. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لِاَبِيۡهِ يٰ٘اَبَتِ لِمَ تَعۡبُدُ مَا لَا يَسۡمَعُ وَلَا يُبۡصِرُ وَلَا يُغۡنِيۡ عَنۡكَ شَيۡـًٔا
quran.english: [Mention] when he said to his father, "O my father, why do you worship that which does not hear and does not see and will not benefit you at all

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَبَتِ اِنِّيۡ قَدۡ جَآءَنِيۡ مِنَ الۡعِلۡمِ مَا لَمۡ يَاۡتِكَ فَاتَّبِعۡنِيۡ٘ اَهۡدِكَ صِرَاطًا سَوِيًّا
quran.english: O my father, indeed there has come to me of knowledge that which has not come to you, so follow me; I will guide you to an even path

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَبَتِ لَا تَعۡبُدِ الشَّيۡطٰنَؕ اِنَّ الشَّيۡطٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ عَصِيًّا
quran.english: O my father, do not worship Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَبَتِ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ اَنۡ يَّمَسَّكَ عَذَابٌ مِّنَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ فَتَكُوۡنَ لِلشَّيۡطٰنِ وَلِيًّا
quran.english: O my father, indeed I fear that there will touch you a punishment from the Most Merciful so you would be to Satan a companion [in Hellfire]

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَرَاغِبٌ اَنۡتَ عَنۡ اٰلِهَتِيۡ يٰ٘اِبۡرٰهِيۡمُۚ لَئِنۡ لَّمۡ تَنۡتَهِ لَاَرۡجُمَنَّكَ وَاهۡجُرۡنِيۡ مَلِيًّا
quran.english: [His father] said, "Have you no desire for my gods, O Abraham? If you do not desist, I will surely stone you, so avoid me a prolonged time

quran.arabic: قَالَ سَلٰمٌ عَلَيۡكَۚ سَاَسۡتَغۡفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّيۡؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ بِيۡ حَفِيًّا
quran.english: [Abraham] said, "Peace will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me

quran.arabic: وَاَعۡتَزِلُكُمۡ وَمَا تَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ وَاَدۡعُوۡا رَبِّيۡؗۖ عَسٰ٘ي اَلَّا٘ اَكُوۡنَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّيۡ شَقِيًّا
quran.english: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allah and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا اعۡتَزَلَهُمۡ وَمَا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِۙ وَهَبۡنَا لَهٗ٘ اِسۡحٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوۡبَؕ وَكُلًّا جَعَلۡنَا نَبِيًّا
quran.english: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allah, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet

quran.arabic: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ رَّحۡمَتِنَا وَجَعَلۡنَا لَهُمۡ لِسَانَ صِدۡقٍ عَلِيًّاࣖ‏
quran.english: And We gave them of Our mercy, and we made for them a reputation of high honor

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِي الۡكِتٰبِ مُوۡسٰ٘يؗ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ مُخۡلَصًا وَّكَانَ رَسُوۡلًا نَّبِيًّا
quran.english: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet

quran.arabic: وَنَادَيۡنٰهُ مِنۡ جَانِبِ الطُّوۡرِ الۡاَيۡمَنِ وَقَرَّبۡنٰهُ نَجِيًّا
quran.english: And We called him from the side of the mount at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him]

quran.arabic: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهٗ مِنۡ رَّحۡمَتِنَا٘ اَخَاهُ هٰرُوۡنَ نَبِيًّا
quran.english: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِي الۡكِتٰبِ اِسۡمٰعِيۡلَؗ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ صَادِقَ الۡوَعۡدِ وَكَانَ رَسُوۡلًا نَّبِيًّاۚ‏
quran.english: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet

quran.arabic: وَكَانَ يَاۡمُرُ اَهۡلَهٗ بِالصَّلٰوةِ وَالزَّكٰوةِࣕ وَكَانَ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهٖ مَرۡضِيًّا
quran.english: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakah and was to his Lord pleasing

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِي الۡكِتٰبِ اِدۡرِيۡسَؗ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ صِدِّيۡقًا نَّبِيًّاࣗۙ‏
quran.english: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet

quran.arabic: وَّرَفَعۡنٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا
quran.english: And We raised him to a high station

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَنۡعَمَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنَ النَّبِيّٖنَ مِنۡ ذُرِّيَّةِ اٰدَمَࣗ وَمِمَّنۡ حَمَلۡنَا مَعَ نُوۡحٍؗ وَّمِنۡ ذُرِّيَّةِ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَاِسۡرَآءِيۡلَؗ وَمِمَّنۡ هَدَيۡنَا وَاجۡتَبَيۡنَاؕ اِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتُ الرَّحۡمٰنِ خَرُّوۡا سُجَّدًا وَّبُكِيًّاࣛ‏
quran.english: Those were the ones upon whom Allah bestowed favor from among the prophets of the descendants of Adam and of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah, and of the descendants of Abraham and Israel, and of those whom We guided and chose. When the verses of the Most Merciful were recited to them, they fell in prostration and weeping

quran.arabic: فَخَلَفَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡ خَلۡفٌ اَضَاعُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاتَّبَعُوا الشَّهَوٰتِ فَسَوۡفَ يَلۡقَوۡنَ غَيًّاۙ‏
quran.english: But there came after them successors who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ تَابَ وَاٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَاُولٰٓئِكَ يَدۡخُلُوۡنَ الۡجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظۡلَمُوۡنَ شَيۡـًٔاۙ‏
quran.english: Except those who repent, believe and do righteousness; for those will enter Paradise and will not be wronged at all

quran.arabic: جَنّٰتِ عَدۡنِ اِۨلَّتِيۡ وَعَدَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ عِبَادَهٗ بِالۡغَيۡبِؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ وَعۡدُهٗ مَاۡتِيًّا
quran.english: [Therein are] gardens of perpetual residence which the Most Merciful has promised His servants in the unseen. Indeed, His promise has ever been coming

quran.arabic: لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا لَغۡوًا اِلَّا سَلٰمًاؕ وَلَهُمۡ رِزۡقُهُمۡ فِيۡهَا بُكۡرَةً وَّعَشِيًّا
quran.english: They will not hear therein any ill speech - only [greetings of] peace - and they will have their provision therein, morning and afternoon

quran.arabic: تِلۡكَ الۡجَنَّةُ الَّتِيۡ نُوۡرِثُ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا مَنۡ كَانَ تَقِيًّا
quran.english: That is Paradise, which We give as inheritance to those of Our servants who were fearing of Allah

quran.arabic: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ اِلَّا بِاَمۡرِ رَبِّكَۚ لَهٗ مَا بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡنَا وَمَا خَلۡفَنَا وَمَا بَيۡنَ ذٰلِكَۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّاۚ‏
quran.english: [Gabriel said], "And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful

quran.arabic: رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فَاعۡبُدۡهُ وَاصۡطَبِرۡ لِعِبَادَتِهٖؕ هَلۡ تَعۡلَمُ لَهٗ سَمِيًّاࣖ‏
quran.english: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ ءَاِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوۡفَ اُخۡرَجُ حَيًّا
quran.english: And the disbeliever says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive

quran.arabic: اَوَلَا يَذۡكُرُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ اَنَّا خَلَقۡنٰهُ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَلَمۡ يَكُ شَيۡـًٔا
quran.english: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing
