quran.arabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحۡشُرَنَّهُمۡ وَالشَّيٰطِيۡنَ ثُمَّ لَنُحۡضِرَنَّهُمۡ حَوۡلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّاۚ‏
quran.english: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ لَنَنۡزِعَنَّ مِنۡ كُلِّ شِيۡعَةٍ اَيُّهُمۡ اَشَدُّ عَلَي الرَّحۡمٰنِ عِتِيًّاۚ‏
quran.english: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ لَنَحۡنُ اَعۡلَمُ بِالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ اَوۡلٰي بِهَا صِلِيًّا
quran.english: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ مِّنۡكُمۡ اِلَّا وَارِدُهَاۚ كَانَ عَلٰي رَبِّكَ حَتۡمًا مَّقۡضِيًّاۚ‏
quran.english: And there is none of you except he will come to it. This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوۡا وَّنَذَرُ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا جِثِيًّا
quran.english: Then We will save those who feared Allah and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتُنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘اۙ اَيُّ الۡفَرِيۡقَيۡنِ خَيۡرٌ مَّقَامًا وَّاَحۡسَنُ نَدِيًّا
quran.english: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Which of [our] two parties is best in position and best in association

quran.arabic: وَكَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ اَحۡسَنُ اَثَاثًا وَّرِئۡيًا
quran.english: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَنۡ كَانَ فِي الضَّلٰلَةِ فَلۡيَمۡدُدۡ لَهُ الرَّحۡمٰنُ مَدًّا ࣢ۚ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا رَاَوۡا مَا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَ اِمَّا الۡعَذَابَ وَاِمَّا السَّاعَةَ ࣢ؕ فَسَيَعۡلَمُوۡنَ مَنۡ هُوَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَّاَضۡعَفُ جُنۡدًا
quran.english: Say, "Whoever is in error - let the Most Merciful extend for him an extension [in wealth and time] until, when they see that which they were promised - either punishment [in this world] or the Hour [of resurrection] - they will come to know who is worst in position and weaker in soldiers

quran.arabic: وَيَزِيۡدُ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اهۡتَدَوۡا هُدًيؕ وَالۡبٰقِيٰتُ الصّٰلِحٰتُ خَيۡرٌ عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَّخَيۡرٌ مَّرَدًّا
quran.english: And Allah increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتَ الَّذِيۡ كَفَرَ بِاٰيٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَاُوۡتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَّوَلَدًاؕ‏
quran.english: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]

quran.arabic: اَطَّلَعَ الۡغَيۡبَ اَمِ اتَّخَذَ عِنۡدَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ عَهۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise

quran.arabic: كَلَّاؕ سَنَكۡتُبُ مَا يَقُوۡلُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهٗ مِنَ الۡعَذَابِ مَدًّاۙ‏
quran.english: No! We will record what he says and extend for him from the punishment extensively

quran.arabic: وَّنَرِثُهٗ مَا يَقُوۡلُ وَيَاۡتِيۡنَا فَرۡدًا
quran.english: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone

quran.arabic: وَاتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اٰلِهَةً لِّيَكُوۡنُوۡا لَهُمۡ عِزًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor

quran.arabic: كَلَّاؕ سَيَكۡفُرُوۡنَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمۡ وَيَكُوۡنُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضِدًّاࣖ‏
quran.english: No! Those "gods" will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents [on the Day of Judgement]

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا الشَّيٰطِيۡنَ عَلَي الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ تَؤُزُّهُمۡ اَزًّاۙ‏
quran.english: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them to [evil] with [constant] incitement

quran.arabic: فَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡؕ اِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمۡ عَدًّاۚ‏
quran.english: So be not impatient over them. We only count out to them a [limited] number

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ اِلَي الرَّحۡمٰنِ وَفۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: On the Day We will gather the righteous to the Most Merciful as a delegation

quran.arabic: وَّنَسُوۡقُ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ اِلٰي جَهَنَّمَ وِرۡدًاۘ‏
quran.english: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst

quran.arabic: لَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ الشَّفَاعَةَ اِلَّا مَنِ اتَّخَذَ عِنۡدَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ عَهۡدًاۘ‏
quran.english: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوا اتَّخَذَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وَلَدًاؕ‏
quran.english: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ جِئۡتُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا اِدًّاۙ‏
quran.english: You have done an atrocious thing

quran.arabic: تَكَادُ السَّمٰوٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرۡنَ مِنۡهُ وَتَنۡشَقُّ الۡاَرۡضُ وَتَخِرُّ الۡجِبَالُ هَدًّاۙ‏
quran.english: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation

quran.arabic: اَنۡ دَعَوۡا لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ وَلَدًاۚ‏
quran.english: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَنۭۡ بَغِيۡ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ اَنۡ يَّتَّخِذَ وَلَدًاؕ‏
quran.english: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son

quran.arabic: اِنۡ كُلُّ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ اِلَّا٘ اٰتِي الرَّحۡمٰنِ عَبۡدًاؕ‏
quran.english: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ اَحۡصٰىهُمۡ وَعَدَّهُمۡ عَدًّاؕ‏
quran.english: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting

quran.arabic: وَكُلُّهُمۡ اٰتِيۡهِ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ فَرۡدًا
quran.english: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ سَيَجۡعَلُ لَهُمُ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وُدًّا
quran.english: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّمَا يَسَّرۡنٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ وَتُنۡذِرَ بِهٖ قَوۡمًا لُّدًّا
quran.english: So, [O Muhammad], We have only made Qur'an easy in the Arabic language that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people

quran.arabic: وَكَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡنٍؕ هَلۡ تُحِسُّ مِنۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ اَحَدٍ اَوۡ تَسۡمَعُ لَهُمۡ رِكۡزًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound

quran.arabic: طٰهٰ
quran.english: Ta, Ha

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِتَشۡقٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: We have not sent down to you the Qur'an that you be distressed

quran.arabic: اِلَّا تَذۡكِرَةً لِّمَنۡ يَّخۡشٰيۙ‏
quran.english: But only as a reminder for those who fear [Allah]

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلًا مِّمَّنۡ خَلَقَ الۡاَرۡضَ وَالسَّمٰوٰتِ الۡعُلٰيؕ‏
quran.english: A revelation from He who created the earth and highest heavens

quran.arabic: اَلرَّحۡمٰنُ عَلَي الۡعَرۡشِ اسۡتَوٰي
quran.english: The Most Merciful [who is] above the Throne established

quran.arabic: لَهٗ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحۡتَ الثَّرٰي
quran.english: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and what is between them and what is under the soil

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ تَجۡهَرۡ بِالۡقَوۡلِ فَاِنَّهٗ يَعۡلَمُ السِّرَّ وَاَخۡفٰي
quran.english: And if you speak aloud - then indeed, He knows the secret and what is [even] more hidden

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَؕ لَهُ الۡاَسۡمَآءُ الۡحُسۡنٰي
quran.english: Allah - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names

quran.arabic: وَهَلۡ اَتٰىكَ حَدِيۡثُ مُوۡسٰيۘ‏
quran.english: And has the story of Moses reached you

quran.arabic: اِذۡ رَاٰ نَارًا فَقَالَ لِاَهۡلِهِ امۡكُثُوۡ٘ا اِنِّيۡ٘ اٰنَسۡتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّيۡ٘ اٰتِيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡهَا بِقَبَسٍ اَوۡ اَجِدُ عَلَي النَّارِ هُدًي
quran.english: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا٘ اَتٰىهَا نُوۡدِيَ يٰمُوۡسٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And when he came to it, he was called, "O Moses

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ٘ اَنَا رَبُّكَ فَاخۡلَعۡ نَعۡلَيۡكَۚ اِنَّكَ بِالۡوَادِ الۡمُقَدَّسِ طُوًيؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the sacred valley of Tuwa

quran.arabic: وَاَنَا اخۡتَرۡتُكَ فَاسۡتَمِعۡ لِمَا يُوۡحٰي
quran.english: And I have chosen you, so listen to what is revealed [to you]

quran.arabic: اِنَّنِيۡ٘ اَنَا اللّٰهُ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا٘ اَنَا فَاعۡبُدۡنِيۡۙ وَاَقِمِ الصَّلٰوةَ لِذِكۡرِيۡ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I am Allah. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance

quran.arabic: اِنَّ السَّاعَةَ اٰتِيَةٌ اَكَادُ اُخۡفِيۡهَا لِتُجۡزٰي كُلُّ نَفۡسٍۭ بِمَا تَسۡعٰي
quran.english: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives

quran.arabic: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنۡهَا مَنۡ لَّا يُؤۡمِنُ بِهَا وَاتَّبَعَ هَوٰىهُ فَتَرۡدٰي
quran.english: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish

quran.arabic: وَمَا تِلۡكَ بِيَمِيۡنِكَ يٰمُوۡسٰي
quran.english: And what is that in your right hand, O Moses

quran.arabic: قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَۚ اَتَوَكَّؤُا عَلَيۡهَا وَاَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلٰي غَنَمِيۡ وَلِيَ فِيۡهَا مَاٰرِبُ اُخۡرٰي
quran.english: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَلۡقِهَا يٰمُوۡسٰي
quran.english: [Allah] said, "Throw it down, O Moses

quran.arabic: فَاَلۡقٰىهَا فَاِذَا هِيَ حَيَّةٌ تَسۡعٰي
quran.english: So he threw it down, and thereupon it was a snake, moving swiftly

quran.arabic: قَالَ خُذۡهَا وَلَا تَخَفۡࣞ سَنُعِيۡدُهَا سِيۡرَتَهَا الۡاُوۡلٰي
quran.english: [Allah] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition

quran.arabic: وَاضۡمُمۡ يَدَكَ اِلٰي جَنَاحِكَ تَخۡرُجۡ بَيۡضَآءَ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ سُوۡٓءٍ اٰيَةً اُخۡرٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And draw in your hand to your side; it will come out white without disease - another sign

quran.arabic: لِنُرِيَكَ مِنۡ اٰيٰتِنَا الۡكُبۡرٰيۚ‏
quran.english: That We may show you [some] of Our greater signs

quran.arabic: اِذۡهَبۡ اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ اِنَّهٗ طَغٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اشۡرَحۡ لِيۡ صَدۡرِيۡۙ‏
quran.english: [Moses] said, "My Lord, expand for me my breast [with assurance]

quran.arabic: وَيَسِّرۡ لِيۡ٘ اَمۡرِيۡۙ‏
quran.english: And ease for me my task

quran.arabic: وَاحۡلُلۡ عُقۡدَةً مِّنۡ لِّسَانِيۡۙ‏
quran.english: And untie the knot from my tongue

quran.arabic: يَفۡقَهُوۡا قَوۡلِيۡࣕ‏
quran.english: That they may understand my speech

quran.arabic: وَاجۡعَلۡ لِّيۡ وَزِيۡرًا مِّنۡ اَهۡلِيۡۙ‏
quran.english: And appoint for me a minister from my family

quran.arabic: هٰرُوۡنَ اَخِيۙ‏
quran.english: Aaron, my brother

quran.arabic: اشۡدُدۡ بِهٖ٘ اَزۡرِيۡۙ‏
quran.english: Increase through him my strength

quran.arabic: وَاَشۡرِكۡهُ فِيۡ٘ اَمۡرِيۡۙ‏
quran.english: And let him share my task

quran.arabic: كَيۡ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: That we may exalt You much

quran.arabic: وَّنَذۡكُرَكَ كَثِيۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And remember You much

quran.arabic: اِنَّكَ كُنۡتَ بِنَا بَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: Indeed, You are of us ever Seeing

quran.arabic: قَالَ قَدۡ اُوۡتِيۡتَ سُؤۡلَكَ يٰمُوۡسٰي
quran.english: [Allah] said, "You have been granted your request, O Moses

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ مَنَنَّا عَلَيۡكَ مَرَّةً اُخۡرٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: And We had already conferred favor upon you another time

quran.arabic: اِذۡ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلٰ٘ي اُمِّكَ مَا يُوۡحٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired

quran.arabic: اَنِ اقۡذِفِيۡهِ فِي التَّابُوۡتِ فَاقۡذِفِيۡهِ فِي الۡيَمِّ فَلۡيُلۡقِهِ الۡيَمُّ بِالسَّاحِلِ يَاۡخُذۡهُ عَدُوٌّ لِّيۡ وَعَدُوٌّ لَّهٗؕ وَاَلۡقَيۡتُ عَلَيۡكَ مَحَبَّةً مِّنِّيۡ ࣢ۚ وَلِتُصۡنَعَ عَلٰي عَيۡنِيۡۘ‏
quran.english: [Saying], 'Cast him into the chest and cast it into the river, and the river will throw it onto the bank; there will take him an enemy to Me and an enemy to him.' And I bestowed upon you love from Me that you would be brought up under My eye

quran.arabic: اِذۡ تَمۡشِيۡ٘ اُخۡتُكَ فَتَقُوۡلُ هَلۡ اَدُلُّكُمۡ عَلٰي مَنۡ يَّكۡفُلُهٗؕ فَرَجَعۡنٰكَ اِلٰ٘ي اُمِّكَ كَيۡ تَقَرَّ عَيۡنُهَا وَلَا تَحۡزَنَ ࣢ؕ وَقَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسًا فَنَجَّيۡنٰكَ مِنَ الۡغَمِّ وَفَتَنّٰكَ فُتُوۡنًا ࣢ࣞ فَلَبِثۡتَ سِنِيۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اَهۡلِ مَدۡيَنَ ࣢ۙ ثُمَّ جِئۡتَ عَلٰي قَدَرٍ يّٰمُوۡسٰي
quran.english: [And We favored you] when your sister went and said, 'Shall I direct you to someone who will be responsible for him?' So We restored you to your mother that she might be content and not grieve. And you killed someone, but We saved you from retaliation and tried you with a [severe] trial. And you remained [some] years among the people of Madyan. Then you came [here] at the decreed time, O Moses

quran.arabic: وَاصۡطَنَعۡتُكَ لِنَفۡسِيۡۚ‏
quran.english: And I produced you for Myself

quran.arabic: اِذۡهَبۡ اَنۡتَ وَاَخُوۡكَ بِاٰيٰتِيۡ وَلَا تَنِيَا فِيۡ ذِكۡرِيۡۚ‏
quran.english: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance

quran.arabic: اِذۡهَبَا٘ اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ اِنَّهٗ طَغٰيۚۖ‏
quran.english: Go, both of you, to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed

quran.arabic: فَقُوۡلَا لَهٗ قَوۡلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهٗ يَتَذَكَّرُ اَوۡ يَخۡشٰي
quran.english: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allah]

quran.arabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَا٘ اِنَّنَا نَخَافُ اَنۡ يَّفۡرُطَ عَلَيۡنَا٘ اَوۡ اَنۡ يَّطۡغٰي
quran.english: They said, "Our Lord, indeed we are afraid that he will hasten [punishment] against us or that he will transgress

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَا٘ اِنَّنِيۡ مَعَكُمَا٘ اَسۡمَعُ وَاَرٰي
quran.english: [Allah] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see

quran.arabic: فَاۡتِيٰهُ فَقُوۡلَا٘ اِنَّا رَسُوۡلَا رَبِّكَ فَاَرۡسِلۡ مَعَنَا بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ ࣢ۙ وَلَا تُعَذِّبۡهُمۡؕ قَدۡ جِئۡنٰكَ بِاٰيَةٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَؕ وَالسَّلٰمُ عَلٰي مَنِ اتَّبَعَ الۡهُدٰي
quran.english: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance

quran.arabic: اِنَّا قَدۡ اُوۡحِيَ اِلَيۡنَا٘ اَنَّ الۡعَذَابَ عَلٰي مَنۡ كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلّٰي
quran.english: Indeed, it has been revealed to us that the punishment will be upon whoever denies and turns away

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَمَنۡ رَّبُّكُمَا يٰمُوۡسٰي
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said, "So who is the Lord of you two, O Moses

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّنَا الَّذِيۡ٘ اَعۡطٰي كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلۡقَهٗ ثُمَّ هَدٰي
quran.english: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ الۡقُرُوۡنِ الۡاُوۡلٰي
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said, "Then what is the case of the former generations

quran.arabic: قَالَ عِلۡمُهَا عِنۡدَ رَبِّيۡ فِيۡ كِتٰبٍۚ لَا يَضِلُّ رَبِّيۡ وَلَا يَنۡسَيؗ‏
quran.english: [Moses] said, "The knowledge thereof is with my Lord in a record. My Lord neither errs nor forgets

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الۡاَرۡضَ مَهۡدًا وَّسَلَكَ لَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا سُبُلًا وَّاَنۡزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءًؕ فَاَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهٖ٘ اَزۡوَاجًا مِّنۡ نَّبَاتٍ شَتّٰي
quran.english: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants

quran.arabic: كُلُوۡا وَارۡعَوۡا اَنۡعَامَكُمۡؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّاُولِي النُّهٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: Eat [therefrom] and pasture your livestock. Indeed, in that are signs for those of intelligence

quran.arabic: مِنۡهَا خَلَقۡنٰكُمۡ وَفِيۡهَا نُعِيۡدُكُمۡ وَمِنۡهَا نُخۡرِجُكُمۡ تَارَةً اُخۡرٰي
quran.english: From the earth We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرَيۡنٰهُ اٰيٰتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَاَبٰي
quran.english: And We certainly showed Pharaoh Our signs - all of them - but he denied and refused

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَجِئۡتَنَا لِتُخۡرِجَنَا مِنۡ اَرۡضِنَا بِسِحۡرِكَ يٰمُوۡسٰي
quran.english: He said, "Have you come to us to drive us out of our land with your magic, O Moses

quran.arabic: فَلَنَاۡتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحۡرٍ مِّثۡلِهٖ فَاجۡعَلۡ بَيۡنَنَا وَبَيۡنَكَ مَوۡعِدًا لَّا نُخۡلِفُهٗ نَحۡنُ وَلَا٘ اَنۡتَ مَكَانًا سُوًي
quran.english: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned

quran.arabic: قَالَ مَوۡعِدُكُمۡ يَوۡمُ الزِّيۡنَةِ وَاَنۡ يُّحۡشَرَ النَّاسُ ضُحًي
quran.english: [Moses] said, "Your appointment is on the day of the festival when the people assemble at mid-morning

quran.arabic: فَتَوَلّٰي فِرۡعَوۡنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيۡدَهٗ ثُمَّ اَتٰي
quran.english: So Pharaoh went away, put together his plan, and then came [to Moses]

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَهُمۡ مُّوۡسٰي وَيۡلَكُمۡ لَا تَفۡتَرُوۡا عَلَي اللّٰهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسۡحِتَكُمۡ بِعَذَابٍۚ وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنِ افۡتَرٰي
quran.english: Moses said to the magicians summoned by Pharaoh, "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allah or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]

quran.arabic: فَتَنَازَعُوۡ٘ا اَمۡرَهُمۡ بَيۡنَهُمۡ وَاَسَرُّوا النَّجۡوٰي
quran.english: So they disputed over their affair among themselves and concealed their private conversation

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ هٰذٰنِ لَسٰحِرٰنِ يُرِيۡدٰنِ اَنۡ يُّخۡرِجٰكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَرۡضِكُمۡ بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيۡقَتِكُمُ الۡمُثۡلٰي
quran.english: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way

quran.arabic: فَاَجۡمِعُوۡا كَيۡدَكُمۡ ثُمَّ ائۡتُوۡا صَفًّاۚ وَقَدۡ اَفۡلَحَ الۡيَوۡمَ مَنِ اسۡتَعۡلٰي
quran.english: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰمُوۡسٰ٘ي اِمَّا٘ اَنۡ تُلۡقِيَ وَاِمَّا٘ اَنۡ نَّكُوۡنَ اَوَّلَ مَنۡ اَلۡقٰي
quran.english: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw

quran.arabic: قَالَ بَلۡ اَلۡقُوۡاۚ فَاِذَا حِبَالُهُمۡ وَعِصِيُّهُمۡ يُخَيَّلُ اِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ سِحۡرِهِمۡ اَنَّهَا تَسۡعٰي
quran.english: He said, "Rather, you throw." And suddenly their ropes and staffs seemed to him from their magic that they were moving [like snakes]

quran.arabic: فَاَوۡجَسَ فِيۡ نَفۡسِهٖ خِيۡفَةً مُّوۡسٰي
quran.english: And he sensed within himself apprehension, did Moses

quran.arabic: قُلۡنَا لَا تَخَفۡ اِنَّكَ اَنۡتَ الۡاَعۡلٰي
quran.english: Allah said, "Fear not. Indeed, it is you who are superior

quran.arabic: وَاَلۡقِ مَا فِيۡ يَمِيۡنِكَ تَلۡقَفۡ مَا صَنَعُوۡاؕ اِنَّمَا صَنَعُوۡا كَيۡدُ سٰحِرٍؕ وَلَا يُفۡلِحُ السَّاحِرُ حَيۡثُ اَتٰي
quran.english: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is

quran.arabic: فَاُلۡقِيَ السَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوۡ٘ا اٰمَنَّا بِرَبِّ هٰرُوۡنَ وَمُوۡسٰي
quran.english: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses

quran.arabic: قَالَ اٰمَنۡتُمۡ لَهٗ قَبۡلَ اَنۡ اٰذَنَ لَكُمۡؕ اِنَّهٗ لَكَبِيۡرُكُمُ الَّذِيۡ عَلَّمَكُمُ السِّحۡرَۚ فَلَاُقَطِّعَنَّ اَيۡدِيَكُمۡ وَاَرۡجُلَكُمۡ مِّنۡ خِلَافٍ وَّلَاُوصَلِّبَنَّكُمۡ فِيۡ جُذُوۡعِ النَّخۡلِؗ وَلَتَعۡلَمُنَّ اَيُّنَا٘ اَشَدُّ عَذَابًا وَّاَبۡقٰي
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed him before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic. So I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will crucify you on the trunks of palm trees, and you will surely know which of us is more severe in [giving] punishment and more enduring

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَنۡ نُّؤۡثِرَكَ عَلٰي مَا جَآءَنَا مِنَ الۡبَيِّنٰتِ وَالَّذِيۡ فَطَرَنَا فَاقۡضِ مَا٘ اَنۡتَ قَاضٍؕ اِنَّمَا تَقۡضِيۡ هٰذِهِ الۡحَيٰوةَ الدُّنۡيَاؕ‏
quran.english: They said, "Never will we prefer you over what has come to us of clear proofs and [over] He who created us. So decree whatever you are to decree. You can only decree for this worldly life

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اٰمَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغۡفِرَ لَنَا خَطٰيٰنَا وَمَا٘ اَكۡرَهۡتَنَا عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ السِّحۡرِؕ وَاللّٰهُ خَيۡرٌ وَّاَبۡقٰي
quran.english: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allah is better and more enduring

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ مَنۡ يَّاۡتِ رَبَّهٗ مُجۡرِمًا فَاِنَّ لَهٗ جَهَنَّمَؕ لَا يَمُوۡتُ فِيۡهَا وَلَا يَحۡيٰي
quran.english: Indeed, whoever comes to his Lord as a criminal - indeed, for him is Hell; he will neither die therein nor live

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّاۡتِهٖ مُؤۡمِنًا قَدۡ عَمِلَ الصّٰلِحٰتِ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ الدَّرَجٰتُ الۡعُلٰيۙ‏
quran.english: But whoever comes to Him as a believer having done righteous deeds - for those will be the highest degrees [in position]

quran.arabic: جَنّٰتُ عَدۡنٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ وَذٰلِكَ جَزٰٓؤُا مَنۡ تَزَكّٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: Gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. And that is the reward of one who purifies himself

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلٰي مُوۡسٰ٘ي ࣢ۙ اَنۡ اَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِيۡ فَاضۡرِبۡ لَهُمۡ طَرِيۡقًا فِي الۡبَحۡرِ يَبَسًاۙ لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَّلَا تَخۡشٰي
quran.english: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]

quran.arabic: فَاَتۡبَعَهُمۡ فِرۡعَوۡنُ بِجُنُوۡدِهٖ فَغَشِيَهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمۡؕ‏
quran.english: So Pharaoh pursued them with his soldiers, and there covered them from the sea that which covered them

quran.arabic: وَاَضَلَّ فِرۡعَوۡنُ قَوۡمَهٗ وَمَا هَدٰي
quran.english: And Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide [them]

quran.arabic: يٰبَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ قَدۡ اَنۡجَيۡنٰكُمۡ مِّنۡ عَدُوِّكُمۡ وَوٰعَدۡنٰكُمۡ جَانِبَ الطُّوۡرِ الۡاَيۡمَنَ وَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمُ الۡمَنَّ وَالسَّلۡوٰي
quran.english: O Children of Israel, We delivered you from your enemy, and We made an appointment with you at the right side of the mount, and We sent down to you manna and quails

quran.arabic: كُلُوۡا مِنۡ طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقۡنٰكُمۡ وَلَا تَطۡغَوۡا فِيۡهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ غَضَبِيۡۚ وَمَنۡ يَّحۡلِلۡ عَلَيۡهِ غَضَبِيۡ فَقَدۡ هَوٰي
quran.english: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen

quran.arabic: وَاِنِّيۡ لَغَفَّارٌ لِّمَنۡ تَابَ وَاٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا ثُمَّ اهۡتَدٰي
quran.english: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَعۡجَلَكَ عَنۡ قَوۡمِكَ يٰمُوۡسٰي
quran.english: [Allah] said, "And what made you hasten from your people, O Moses

quran.arabic: قَالَ هُمۡ اُولَآءِ عَلٰ٘ي اَثَرِيۡ وَعَجِلۡتُ اِلَيۡكَ رَبِّ لِتَرۡضٰي
quran.english: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَاِنَّا قَدۡ فَتَنَّا قَوۡمَكَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِكَ وَاَضَلَّهُمُ السَّامِرِيُّ
quran.english: [Allah] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Samiri has led them astray

quran.arabic: فَرَجَعَ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اِلٰي قَوۡمِهٖ غَضۡبَانَ اَسِفًا ࣢ۚ قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اَلَمۡ يَعِدۡكُمۡ رَبُّكُمۡ وَعۡدًا حَسَنًا ࣢ؕ اَفَطَالَ عَلَيۡكُمُ الۡعَهۡدُ اَمۡ اَرَدۡتُّمۡ اَنۡ يَّحِلَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ غَضَبٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكُمۡ فَاَخۡلَفۡتُمۡ مَّوۡعِدِيۡ‏
quran.english: So Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved. He said, "O my people, did your Lord not make you a good promise? Then, was the time [of its fulfillment] too long for you, or did you wish that wrath from your Lord descend upon you, so you broke your promise [of obedience] to me

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا مَا٘ اَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمَلۡكِنَا وَلٰكِنَّا حُمِّلۡنَا٘ اَوۡزَارًا مِّنۡ زِيۡنَةِ الۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنٰهَا فَكَذٰلِكَ اَلۡقَي السَّامِرِيُّۙ‏
quran.english: They said, "We did not break our promise to you by our will, but we were made to carry burdens from the ornaments of the people [of Pharaoh], so we threw them [into the fire], and thus did the Samiri throw

quran.arabic: فَاَخۡرَجَ لَهُمۡ عِجۡلًا جَسَدًا لَّهٗ خُوَارٌ فَقَالُوۡا هٰذَا٘ اِلٰهُكُمۡ وَاِلٰهُ مُوۡسٰي ࣢ۙۚ فَنَسِيَؕ‏
quran.english: And he extracted for them [the statue of] a calf which had a lowing sound, and they said, "This is your god and the god of Moses, but he forgot

quran.arabic: اَفَلَا يَرَوۡنَ اَلَّا يَرۡجِعُ اِلَيۡهِمۡ قَوۡلًا ࣢ۙ وَّلَا يَمۡلِكُ لَهُمۡ ضَرًّا وَّلَا نَفۡعًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Did they not see that it could not return to them any speech and that it did not possess for them any harm or benefit

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ هٰرُوۡنُ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ يٰقَوۡمِ اِنَّمَا فُتِنۡتُمۡ بِهٖۚ وَاِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ الرَّحۡمٰنُ فَاتَّبِعُوۡنِيۡ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡ٘ا اَمۡرِيۡ‏
quran.english: And Aaron had already told them before [the return of Moses], "O my people, you are only being tested by it, and indeed, your Lord is the Most Merciful, so follow me and obey my order

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَنۡ نَّبۡرَحَ عَلَيۡهِ عٰكِفِيۡنَ حَتّٰي يَرۡجِعَ اِلَيۡنَا مُوۡسٰي
quran.english: They said, "We will never cease being devoted to the calf until Moses returns to us

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰهٰرُوۡنُ مَا مَنَعَكَ اِذۡ رَاَيۡتَهُمۡ ضَلُّوۡ٘اۙ‏
quran.english: [Moses] said, "O Aaron, what prevented you, when you saw them going astray

quran.arabic: اَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِؕ اَفَعَصَيۡتَ اَمۡرِيۡ‏
quran.english: From following me? Then have you disobeyed my order

quran.arabic: قَالَ يَبۡنَؤُمَّ لَا تَاۡخُذۡ بِلِحۡيَتِيۡ وَلَا بِرَاۡسِيۡۚ اِنِّيۡ خَشِيۡتُ اَنۡ تَقُوۡلَ فَرَّقۡتَ بَيۡنَ بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ وَلَمۡ تَرۡقُبۡ قَوۡلِيۡ‏
quran.english: [Aaron] said, "O son of my mother, do not seize [me] by my beard or by my head. Indeed, I feared that you would say, 'You caused division among the Children of Israel, and you did not observe [or await] my word

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكَ يٰسَامِرِيُّ
quran.english: [Moses] said, "And what is your case, O Samiri

quran.arabic: قَالَ بَصُرۡتُ بِمَا لَمۡ يَبۡصُرُوۡا بِهٖ فَقَبَضۡتُ قَبۡضَةً مِّنۡ اَثَرِ الرَّسُوۡلِ فَنَبَذۡتُهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتۡ لِيۡ نَفۡسِيۡ‏
quran.english: He said, "I saw what they did not see, so I took a handful [of dust] from the track of the messenger and threw it, and thus did my soul entice me

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَاذۡهَبۡ فَاِنَّ لَكَ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ اَنۡ تَقُوۡلَ لَا مِسَاسَࣕ وَاِنَّ لَكَ مَوۡعِدًا لَّنۡ تُخۡلَفَهٗۚ وَانۡظُرۡ اِلٰ٘ي اِلٰهِكَ الَّذِيۡ ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ عَاكِفًاؕ لَنُحَرِّقَنَّهٗ ثُمَّ لَنَنۡسِفَنَّهٗ فِي الۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا
quran.english: [Moses] said, "Then go. And indeed, it is [decreed] for you in [this] life to say, 'No contact.' And indeed, you have an appointment [in the Hereafter] you will not fail to keep. And look at your 'god' to which you remained devoted. We will surely burn it and blow it into the sea with a blast

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا٘ اِلٰهُكُمُ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَؕ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ عِلۡمًا
quran.english: Your god is only Allah, except for whom there is no deity. He has encompassed all things in knowledge

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيۡكَ مِنۡ اَنۭۡ بَآءِ مَا قَدۡ سَبَقَۚ وَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنٰكَ مِنۡ لَّدُنَّا ذِكۡرًاۖۚ‏
quran.english: Thus, [O Muhammad], We relate to you from the news of what has preceded. And We have certainly given you from Us the Qur'an

quran.arabic: مَنۡ اَعۡرَضَ عَنۡهُ فَاِنَّهٗ يَحۡمِلُ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ وِزۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: Whoever turns away from it - then indeed, he will bear on the Day of Resurrection a burden

quran.arabic: خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهِؕ وَسَآءَ لَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ حِمۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: [Abiding] eternally therein, and evil it is for them on the Day of Resurrection as a load

quran.arabic: يَّوۡمَ يُنۡفَخُ فِي الصُّوۡرِ وَنَحۡشُرُ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ زُرۡقًاۚۖۙ‏
quran.english: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed

quran.arabic: يَّتَخَافَتُوۡنَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ اِنۡ لَّبِثۡتُمۡ اِلَّا عَشۡرًا
quran.english: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اِذۡ يَقُوۡلُ اَمۡثَلُهُمۡ طَرِيۡقَةً اِنۡ لَّبِثۡتُمۡ اِلَّا يَوۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner will say, "You remained not but one day

quran.arabic: وَيَسۡـَٔلُوۡنَكَ عَنِ الۡجِبَالِ فَقُلۡ يَنۡسِفُهَا رَبِّيۡ نَسۡفًاۙ‏
quran.english: And they ask you about the mountains, so say, "My Lord will blow them away with a blast

quran.arabic: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفۡصَفًاۙ‏
quran.english: And He will leave the earth a level plain

quran.arabic: لَّا تَرٰي فِيۡهَا عِوَجًا وَّلَا٘ اَمۡتًاؕ‏
quran.english: You will not see therein a depression or an elevation

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّتَّبِعُوۡنَ الدَّاعِيَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهٗۚ وَخَشَعَتِ الۡاَصۡوَاتُ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ فَلَا تَسۡمَعُ اِلَّا هَمۡسًا
quran.english: That Day, everyone will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps]

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنۡفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ اِلَّا مَنۡ اَذِنَ لَهُ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وَرَضِيَ لَهٗ قَوۡلًا
quran.english: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word

quran.arabic: يَعۡلَمُ مَا بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ وَلَا يُحِيۡطُوۡنَ بِهٖ عِلۡمًا
quran.english: Allah knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it in knowledge

quran.arabic: وَعَنَتِ الۡوُجُوۡهُ لِلۡحَيِّ الۡقَيُّوۡمِؕ وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنۡ حَمَلَ ظُلۡمًا
quran.english: And [all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. And he will have failed who carries injustice

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّعۡمَلۡ مِنَ الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٌ فَلَا يَخٰفُ ظُلۡمًا وَّلَا هَضۡمًا
quran.english: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ قُرۡاٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا وَّصَرَّفۡنَا فِيۡهِ مِنَ الۡوَعِيۡدِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَّقُوۡنَ اَوۡ يُحۡدِثُ لَهُمۡ ذِكۡرًا
quran.english: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur'an and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance

quran.arabic: فَتَعٰلَي اللّٰهُ الۡمَلِكُ الۡحَقُّۚ وَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ بِالۡقُرۡاٰنِ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يُّقۡضٰ٘ي اِلَيۡكَ وَحۡيُهٗؗ وَقُلۡ رَّبِّ زِدۡنِيۡ عِلۡمًا
quran.english: So high [above all] is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muhammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur'an before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَهِدۡنَا٘ اِلٰ٘ي اٰدَمَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ فَنَسِيَ وَلَمۡ نَجِدۡ لَهٗ عَزۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قُلۡنَا لِلۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ اسۡجُدُوۡا لِاٰدَمَ فَسَجَدُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا٘ اِبۡلِيۡسَؕ اَبٰي
quran.english: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused

quran.arabic: فَقُلۡنَا يٰ٘اٰدَمُ اِنَّ هٰذَا عَدُوٌّ لَّكَ وَلِزَوۡجِكَ فَلَا يُخۡرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ الۡجَنَّةِ فَتَشۡقٰي
quran.english: So We said, "O Adam, indeed this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Then let him not remove you from Paradise so you would suffer

quran.arabic: اِنَّ لَكَ اَلَّا تَجُوۡعَ فِيۡهَا وَلَا تَعۡرٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is [promised] for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّكَ لَا تَظۡمَؤُا فِيۡهَا وَلَا تَضۡحٰي
quran.english: And indeed, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun

quran.arabic: فَوَسۡوَسَ اِلَيۡهِ الشَّيۡطٰنُ قَالَ يٰ٘اٰدَمُ هَلۡ اَدُلُّكَ عَلٰي شَجَرَةِ الۡخُلۡدِ وَمُلۡكٍ لَّا يَبۡلٰي
quran.english: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate

quran.arabic: فَاَكَلَا مِنۡهَا فَبَدَتۡ لَهُمَا سَوۡاٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخۡصِفٰنِ عَلَيۡهِمَا مِنۡ وَّرَقِ الۡجَنَّةِؗ وَعَصٰ٘ي اٰدَمُ رَبَّهٗ فَغَوٰيࣕۖ‏
quran.english: And Adam and his wife ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اجۡتَبٰهُ رَبُّهٗ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡهِ وَهَدٰي
quran.english: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him]

quran.arabic: قَالَ اهۡبِطَا مِنۡهَا جَمِيۡعًاۭ بَعۡضُكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ عَدُوٌّۚ فَاِمَّا يَاۡتِيَنَّكُمۡ مِّنِّيۡ هُدًي ࣢ۙ فَمَنِ اتَّبَعَ هُدَايَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشۡقٰي
quran.english: [Allah] said, "Descend from Paradise - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter]

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ اَعۡرَضَ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِيۡ فَاِنَّ لَهٗ مَعِيۡشَةً ضَنۡكًا وَّنَحۡشُرُهٗ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ اَعۡمٰي
quran.english: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - indeed, he will have a depressed life, and We will gather him on the Day of Resurrection blind

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرۡتَنِيۡ٘ اَعۡمٰي وَقَدۡ كُنۡتُ بَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing

quran.arabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكَ اَتَتۡكَ اٰيٰتُنَا فَنَسِيۡتَهَاۚ وَكَذٰلِكَ الۡيَوۡمَ تُنۡسٰي
quran.english: [Allah] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِيۡ مَنۡ اَسۡرَفَ وَلَمۡ يُؤۡمِنۭۡ بِاٰيٰتِ رَبِّهٖؕ وَلَعَذَابُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ اَشَدُّ وَاَبۡقٰي
quran.english: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring

quran.arabic: اَفَلَمۡ يَهۡدِ لَهُمۡ كَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡقُرُوۡنِ يَمۡشُوۡنَ فِيۡ مَسٰكِنِهِمۡؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّاُولِي النُّهٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: Then, has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them as they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs for those of intelligence

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتۡ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ لَكَانَ لِزَامًا وَّاَجَلٌ مُّسَمًّيؕ‏
quran.english: And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, punishment would have been an obligation [due immediately], and [if not for] a specified term [decreed]

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ عَلٰي مَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوۡعِ الشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ غُرُوۡبِهَاۚ وَمِنۡ اٰنَآئِ الَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡ وَاَطۡرَافَ النَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرۡضٰي
quran.english: So be patient over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting; and during periods of the night [exalt Him] and at the ends of the day, that you may be satisfied

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيۡنَيۡكَ اِلٰي مَا مَتَّعۡنَا بِهٖ٘ اَزۡوَاجًا مِّنۡهُمۡ زَهۡرَةَ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا ࣢ۙ لِنَفۡتِنَهُمۡ فِيۡهِؕ وَرِزۡقُ رَبِّكَ خَيۡرٌ وَّاَبۡقٰي
quran.english: And do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [some] categories of them, [its being but] the splendor of worldly life by which We test them. And the provision of your Lord is better and more enduring

quran.arabic: وَاۡمُرۡ اَهۡلَكَ بِالصَّلٰوةِ وَاصۡطَبِرۡ عَلَيۡهَاؕ لَا نَسۡـَٔلُكَ رِزۡقًاؕ نَحۡنُ نَرۡزُقُكَؕ وَالۡعَاقِبَةُ لِلتَّقۡوٰي
quran.english: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا لَوۡلَا يَاۡتِيۡنَا بِاٰيَةٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهٖؕ اَوَلَمۡ تَاۡتِهِمۡ بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِي الصُّحُفِ الۡاُوۡلٰي
quran.english: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ اَنَّا٘ اَهۡلَكۡنٰهُمۡ بِعَذَابٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ لَقَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا لَوۡلَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡتَ اِلَيۡنَا رَسُوۡلًا فَنَتَّبِعَ اٰيٰتِكَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ نَّذِلَّ وَنَخۡزٰي
quran.english: And if We had destroyed them with a punishment before him, they would have said, "Our Lord, why did You not send to us a messenger so we could have followed Your verses before we were humiliated and disgraced

quran.arabic: قُلۡ كُلٌّ مُّتَرَبِّصٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوۡاۚ فَسَتَعۡلَمُوۡنَ مَنۡ اَصۡحٰبُ الصِّرَاطِ السَّوِيِّ وَمَنِ اهۡتَدٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "Each [of us] is waiting; so wait. For you will know who are the companions of the sound path and who is guided

quran.arabic: اِقۡتَرَبَ لِلنَّاسِ حِسَابُهُمۡ وَهُمۡ فِيۡ غَفۡلَةٍ مُّعۡرِضُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [The time of] their account has approached for the people, while they are in heedlessness turning away

quran.arabic: مَا يَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ ذِكۡرٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهِمۡ مُّحۡدَثٍ اِلَّا اسۡتَمَعُوۡهُ وَهُمۡ يَلۡعَبُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: No mention comes to them anew from their Lord except that they listen to it while they are at play

quran.arabic: لَاهِيَةً قُلُوۡبُهُمۡؕ وَاَسَرُّوا النَّجۡوَيࣗۖ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡاࣗۖ هَلۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُكُمۡۚ اَفَتَاۡتُوۡنَ السِّحۡرَ وَاَنۡتُمۡ تُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: With their hearts distracted. And those who do wrong conceal their private conversation, [saying], "Is this [Prophet] except a human being like you? So would you approach magic while you are aware [of it]

quran.arabic: قٰلَ رَبِّيۡ يَعۡلَمُ الۡقَوۡلَ فِي السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؗ وَهُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: The Prophet said, "My Lord knows whatever is said throughout the heaven and earth, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing

quran.arabic: بَلۡ قَالُوۡ٘ا اَضۡغَاثُ اَحۡلَامٍۭ بَلِ افۡتَرٰىهُ بَلۡ هُوَ شَاعِرٌۚۖ فَلۡيَاۡتِنَا بِاٰيَةٍ كَمَا٘ اُرۡسِلَ الۡاَوَّلُوۡنَ
quran.english: But they say, "[The revelation is but] a mixture of false dreams; rather, he has invented it; rather, he is a poet. So let him bring us a sign just as the previous [messengers] were sent [with miracles]

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اٰمَنَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ اَهۡلَكۡنٰهَاۚ اَفَهُمۡ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Not a [single] city which We destroyed believed before them, so will they believe

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا قَبۡلَكَ اِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوۡحِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِمۡ فَسۡـَٔلُوۡ٘ا اَهۡلَ الذِّكۡرِ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We sent not before you, [O Muhammad], except men to whom We revealed [the message], so ask the people of the message if you do not know

quran.arabic: وَمَا جَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ جَسَدًا لَّا يَاۡكُلُوۡنَ الطَّعَامَ وَمَا كَانُوۡا خٰلِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We did not make the prophets forms not eating food, nor were they immortal [on earth]

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ صَدَقۡنٰهُمُ الۡوَعۡدَ فَاَنۡجَيۡنٰهُمۡ وَمَنۡ نَّشَآءُ وَاَهۡلَكۡنَا الۡمُسۡرِفِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then We fulfilled for them the promise, and We saved them and whom We willed and destroyed the transgressors

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ اَنۡزَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكُمۡ كِتٰبًا فِيۡهِ ذِكۡرُكُمۡؕ اَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: We have certainly sent down to you a Book in which is your mention. Then will you not reason

quran.arabic: وَكَمۡ قَصَمۡنَا مِنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ كَانَتۡ ظَالِمَةً وَّاَنۡشَاۡنَا بَعۡدَهَا قَوۡمًا اٰخَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And how many a city which was unjust have We shattered and produced after it another people

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا٘ اَحَسُّوۡا بَاۡسَنَا٘ اِذَا هُمۡ مِّنۡهَا يَرۡكُضُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And when its inhabitants perceived Our punishment, at once they fled from it

quran.arabic: لَا تَرۡكُضُوۡا وَارۡجِعُوۡ٘ا اِلٰي مَا٘ اُتۡرِفۡتُمۡ فِيۡهِ وَمَسٰكِنِكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُسۡـَٔلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Some angels said], "Do not flee but return to where you were given luxury and to your homes - perhaps you will be questioned

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰوَيۡلَنَا٘ اِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers

quran.arabic: فَمَا زَالَتۡ تِّلۡكَ دَعۡوٰىهُمۡ حَتّٰي جَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ حَصِيۡدًا خٰمِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: And that declaration of theirs did not cease until We made them [as] a harvest [mowed down], extinguished [like a fire]

quran.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا السَّمَآءَ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا لٰعِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play

quran.arabic: لَوۡ اَرَدۡنَا٘ اَنۡ نَّتَّخِذَ لَهۡوًا لَّاتَّخَذۡنٰهُ مِنۡ لَّدُنَّا٘ࣗۖ اِنۡ كُنَّا فٰعِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: Had We intended to take a diversion, We could have taken it from [what is] with Us - if [indeed] We were to do so

quran.arabic: بَلۡ نَقۡذِفُ بِالۡحَقِّ عَلَي الۡبَاطِلِ فَيَدۡمَغُهٗ فَاِذَا هُوَ زَاهِقٌؕ وَلَكُمُ الۡوَيۡلُ مِمَّا تَصِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, We dash the truth upon falsehood, and it destroys it, and thereupon it departs. And for you is destruction from that which you describe

quran.arabic: وَلَهٗ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَمَنۡ عِنۡدَهٗ لَا يَسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَ عَنۡ عِبَادَتِهٖ وَلَا يَسۡتَحۡسِرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: To Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And those near Him are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, nor do they tire

quran.arabic: يُسَبِّحُوۡنَ الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَ لَا يَفۡتُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: They exalt [Him] night and day [and] do not slacken

quran.arabic: اَمِ اتَّخَذُوۡ٘ا اٰلِهَةً مِّنَ الۡاَرۡضِ هُمۡ يُنۡشِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or have men taken for themselves gods from the earth who resurrect [the dead]

quran.arabic: لَوۡ كَانَ فِيۡهِمَا٘ اٰلِهَةٌ اِلَّا اللّٰهُ لَفَسَدَتَاۚ فَسُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ رَبِّ الۡعَرۡشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: Had there been within the heavens and earth gods besides Allah, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allah, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe

quran.arabic: لَا يُسۡـَٔلُ عَمَّا يَفۡعَلُ وَهُمۡ يُسۡـَٔلُوۡنَ
quran.english: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned

quran.arabic: اَمِ اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اٰلِهَةًؕ قُلۡ هَاتُوۡا بُرۡهَانَكُمۡۚ هٰذَا ذِكۡرُ مَنۡ مَّعِيَ وَذِكۡرُ مَنۡ قَبۡلِيۡؕ بَلۡ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ الۡحَقَّ فَهُمۡ مُّعۡرِضُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or have they taken gods besides Him? Say, [O Muhammad], "Produce your proof. This [Qur'an] is the message for those with me and the message of those before me." But most of them do not know the truth, so they are turning away

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَ مِنۡ رَّسُوۡلٍ اِلَّا نُوۡحِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِ اَنَّهٗ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا٘ اَنَا فَاعۡبُدُوۡنِ
quran.english: And We sent not before you any messenger except that We revealed to him that, "There is no deity except Me, so worship Me

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوا اتَّخَذَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وَلَدًا سُبۡحٰنَهٗؕ بَلۡ عِبَادٌ مُّكۡرَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants

quran.arabic: لَا يَسۡبِقُوۡنَهٗ بِالۡقَوۡلِ وَهُمۡ بِاَمۡرِهٖ يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command

quran.arabic: يَعۡلَمُ مَا بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ وَلَا يَشۡفَعُوۡنَۙ اِلَّا لِمَنِ ارۡتَضٰي وَهُمۡ مِّنۡ خَشۡيَتِهٖ مُشۡفِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they cannot intercede except on behalf of one whom He approves. And they, from fear of Him, are apprehensive

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّقُلۡ مِنۡهُمۡ اِنِّيۡ٘ اِلٰهٌ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ فَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِيۡهِ جَهَنَّمَؕ كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الظّٰلِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And whoever of them should say, "Indeed, I am a god besides Him"- that one We would recompense with Hell. Thus do We recompense the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اَنَّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ كَانَتَا رَتۡقًا فَفَتَقۡنٰهُمَاؕ وَجَعَلۡنَا مِنَ الۡمَآءِ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ حَيٍّؕ اَفَلَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Have those who disbelieved not considered that the heavens and the earth were a joined entity, and We separated them and made from water every living thing? Then will they not believe

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ رَوَاسِيَ اَنۡ تَمِيۡدَ بِهِمۡ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيۡهَا فِجَاجًا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يَهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We placed within the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with them, and We made therein [mountain] passes [as] roads that they might be guided

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا السَّمَآءَ سَقۡفًا مَّحۡفُوۡظًاۚۖ وَّهُمۡ عَنۡ اٰيٰتِهَا مُعۡرِضُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We made the sky a protected ceiling, but they, from its signs, are turning away

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَ وَالشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَؕ كُلٌّ فِيۡ فَلَكٍ يَّسۡبَحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it is He who created the night and the day and the sun and the moon; all [heavenly bodies] in an orbit are swimming

quran.arabic: وَمَا جَعَلۡنَا لِبَشَرٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَ الۡخُلۡدَؕ اَفَا۠ئِنۡ مِّتَّ فَهُمُ الۡخٰلِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We did not grant to any man before you eternity [on earth]; so if you die - would they be eternal

quran.arabic: كُلُّ نَفۡسٍ ذَآئِقَةُ الۡمَوۡتِؕ وَنَبۡلُوۡكُمۡ بِالشَّرِّ وَالۡخَيۡرِ فِتۡنَةًؕ وَاِلَيۡنَا تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاٰكَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ يَّتَّخِذُوۡنَكَ اِلَّا هُزُوًاؕ اَهٰذَا الَّذِيۡ يَذۡكُرُ اٰلِهَتَكُمۡۚ وَهُمۡ بِذِكۡرِ الرَّحۡمٰنِ هُمۡ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when those who disbelieve see you, [O Muhammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], "Is this the one who insults your gods?" And they are, at the mention of the Most Merciful, disbelievers

quran.arabic: خُلِقَ الۡاِنۡسَانُ مِنۡ عَجَلٍؕ سَاُورِيۡكُمۡ اٰيٰتِيۡ فَلَا تَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنِ
quran.english: Man was created of haste. I will show you My signs, so do not impatiently urge Me

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَتٰي هٰذَا الۡوَعۡدُ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: لَوۡ يَعۡلَمُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا حِيۡنَ لَا يَكُفُّوۡنَ عَنۡ وُّجُوۡهِهِمُ النَّارَ وَلَا عَنۡ ظُهُوۡرِهِمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنۡصَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: If those who disbelieved but knew the time when they will not avert the Fire from their faces or from their backs and they will not be aided

quran.arabic: بَلۡ تَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ بَغۡتَةً فَتَبۡهَتُهُمۡ فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَ رَدَّهَا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنۡظَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, it will come to them unexpectedly and bewilder them, and they will not be able to repel it, nor will they be reprieved

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدِ اسۡتُهۡزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِالَّذِيۡنَ سَخِرُوۡا مِنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَنۡ يَّكۡلَؤُكُمۡ بِالَّيۡلِ وَالنَّهَارِ مِنَ الرَّحۡمٰنِؕ بَلۡ هُمۡ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ مُّعۡرِضُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَهُمۡ اٰلِهَةٌ تَمۡنَعُهُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِنَاؕ لَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَ نَصۡرَ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ مِّنَّا يُصۡحَبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us

quran.arabic: بَلۡ مَتَّعۡنَا هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ وَاٰبَآءَهُمۡ حَتّٰي طَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡعُمُرُؕ اَفَلَا يَرَوۡنَ اَنَّا نَاۡتِي الۡاَرۡضَ نَنۡقُصُهَا مِنۡ اَطۡرَافِهَاؕ اَفَهُمُ الۡغٰلِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: But, [on the contrary], We have provided good things for these [disbelievers] and their fathers until life was prolonged for them. Then do they not see that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? So it is they who will overcome

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّمَا٘ اُنۡذِرُكُمۡ بِالۡوَحۡيِؗۖ وَلَا يَسۡمَعُ الصُّمُّ الدُّعَآءَ اِذَا مَا يُنۡذَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ مَّسَّتۡهُمۡ نَفۡحَةٌ مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّكَ لَيَقُوۡلُنَّ يٰوَيۡلَنَا٘ اِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And if [as much as] a whiff of the punishment of your Lord should touch them, they would surely say, "O woe to us! Indeed, we have been wrongdoers

quran.arabic: وَنَضَعُ الۡمَوَازِيۡنَ الۡقِسۡطَ لِيَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِ فَلَا تُظۡلَمُ نَفۡسٌ شَيۡـًٔاؕ وَاِنۡ كَانَ مِثۡقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِّنۡ خَرۡدَلٍ اَتَيۡنَا بِهَاؕ وَكَفٰي بِنَا حٰسِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We place the scales of justice for the Day of Resurrection, so no soul will be treated unjustly at all. And if there is [even] the weight of a mustard seed, We will bring it forth. And sufficient are We as accountant

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسٰي وَهٰرُوۡنَ الۡفُرۡقَانَ وَضِيَآءً وَّذِكۡرًا لِّلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We had already given Moses and Aaron the criterion and a light and a reminder for the righteous

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡ بِالۡغَيۡبِ وَهُمۡ مِّنَ السَّاعَةِ مُشۡفِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Who fear their Lord unseen, while they are of the Hour apprehensive

quran.arabic: وَهٰذَا ذِكۡرٌ مُّبٰرَكٌ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُؕ اَفَاَنۡتُمۡ لَهٗ مُنۡكِرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And this [Qur'an] is a blessed message which We have sent down. Then are you with it unacquainted

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا٘ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ رُشۡدَهٗ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَكُنَّا بِهٖ عٰلِمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We had certainly given Abraham his sound judgement before, and We were of him well-Knowing

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لِاَبِيۡهِ وَقَوۡمِهٖ مَا هٰذِهِ التَّمَاثِيۡلُ الَّتِيۡ٘ اَنۡتُمۡ لَهَا عٰكِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: When he said to his father and his people, "What are these statues to which you are devoted

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا وَجَدۡنَا٘ اٰبَآءَنَا لَهَا عٰبِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "We found our fathers worshippers of them

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَقَدۡ كُنۡتُمۡ اَنۡتُمۡ وَاٰبَآؤُكُمۡ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: He said, "You were certainly, you and your fathers, in manifest error

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اَجِئۡتَنَا بِالۡحَقِّ اَمۡ اَنۡتَ مِنَ اللّٰعِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Have you come to us with truth, or are you of those who jest

quran.arabic: قَالَ بَلۡ رَّبُّكُمۡ رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ الَّذِيۡ فَطَرَهُنَّؗۖ وَاَنَا عَلٰي ذٰلِكُمۡ مِّنَ الشّٰهِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "[No], rather, your Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth who created them, and I, to that, am of those who testify

quran.arabic: وَتَاللّٰهِ لَاَكِيۡدَنَّ اَصۡنَامَكُمۡ بَعۡدَ اَنۡ تُوَلُّوۡا مُدۡبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [I swear] by Allah, I will surely plan against your idols after you have turned and gone away

quran.arabic: فَجَعَلَهُمۡ جُذٰذًا اِلَّا كَبِيۡرًا لَّهُمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ اِلَيۡهِ يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: So he made them into fragments, except a large one among them, that they might return to it [and question]

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا مَنۡ فَعَلَ هٰذَا بِاٰلِهَتِنَا٘ اِنَّهٗ لَمِنَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Who has done this to our gods? Indeed, he is of the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا سَمِعۡنَا فَتًي يَّذۡكُرُهُمۡ يُقَالُ لَهٗ٘ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمُؕ‏
quran.english: They said, "We heard a young man mention them who is called Abraham

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا فَاۡتُوۡا بِهٖ عَلٰ٘ي اَعۡيُنِ النَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَشۡهَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Then bring him before the eyes of the people that they may testify

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا ءَاَنۡتَ فَعَلۡتَ هٰذَا بِاٰلِهَتِنَا يٰ٘اِبۡرٰهِيۡمُؕ‏
quran.english: They said, "Have you done this to our gods, O Abraham

quran.arabic: قَالَ بَلۡ فَعَلَهٗࣗۖ كَبِيۡرُهُمۡ هٰذَا فَسۡـَٔلُوۡهُمۡ اِنۡ كَانُوۡا يَنۡطِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Rather, this - the largest of them - did it, so ask them, if they should [be able to] speak

quran.arabic: فَرَجَعُوۡ٘ا اِلٰ٘ي اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ فَقَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّكُمۡ اَنۡتُمُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], "Indeed, you are the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ نُكِسُوۡا عَلٰي رُءُوۡسِهِمۡۚ لَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتَ مَا هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ يَنۡطِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَفَتَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مَا لَا يَنۡفَعُكُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا يَضُرُّكُمۡؕ‏
quran.english: He said, "Then do you worship instead of Allah that which does not benefit you at all or harm you

quran.arabic: اُفٍّ لَّكُمۡ وَلِمَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ اَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Uff to you and to what you worship instead of Allah. Then will you not use reason

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا حَرِّقُوۡهُ وَانۡصُرُوۡ٘ا اٰلِهَتَكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ فٰعِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Burn him and support your gods - if you are to act

quran.arabic: قُلۡنَا يٰنَارُ كُوۡنِيۡ بَرۡدًا وَّسَلٰمًا عَلٰ٘ي اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَۙ‏
quran.english: Allah said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham

quran.arabic: وَاَرَادُوۡا بِهٖ كَيۡدًا فَجَعَلۡنٰهُمُ الۡاَخۡسَرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And they intended for him harm, but We made them the greatest losers

quran.arabic: وَنَجَّيۡنٰهُ وَلُوۡطًا اِلَي الۡاَرۡضِ الَّتِيۡ بٰرَكۡنَا فِيۡهَا لِلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds

quran.arabic: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهٗ٘ اِسۡحٰقَؕ وَيَعۡقُوۡبَ نَافِلَةًؕ وَكُلًّا جَعَلۡنَا صٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We gave him Isaac and Jacob in addition, and all [of them] We made righteous

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ اَئِمَّةً يَّهۡدُوۡنَ بِاَمۡرِنَا وَاَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِمۡ فِعۡلَ الۡخَيۡرٰتِ وَاِقَامَ الصَّلٰوةِ وَاِيۡتَآءَ الزَّكٰوةِۚ وَكَانُوۡا لَنَا عٰبِدِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakah; and they were worshippers of Us

quran.arabic: وَلُوۡطًا اٰتَيۡنٰهُ حُكۡمًا وَّعِلۡمًا وَّنَجَّيۡنٰهُ مِنَ الۡقَرۡيَةِ الَّتِيۡ كَانَتۡ تَّعۡمَلُ الۡخَبٰٓئِثَؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَوۡمَ سَوۡءٍ فٰسِقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And to Lot We gave judgement and knowledge, and We saved him from the city that was committing wicked deeds. Indeed, they were a people of evil, defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: وَاَدۡخَلۡنٰهُ فِيۡ رَحۡمَتِنَاؕ اِنَّهٗ مِنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We admitted him into Our mercy. Indeed, he was of the righteous

quran.arabic: وَنُوۡحًا اِذۡ نَادٰي مِنۡ قَبۡلُ فَاسۡتَجَبۡنَا لَهٗ فَنَجَّيۡنٰهُ وَاَهۡلَهٗ مِنَ الۡكَرۡبِ الۡعَظِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: And [mention] Noah, when he called [to Allah] before [that time], so We responded to him and saved him and his family from the great flood

quran.arabic: وَنَصَرۡنٰهُ مِنَ الۡقَوۡمِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَاؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَوۡمَ سَوۡءٍ فَاَغۡرَقۡنٰهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We saved him from the people who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a people of evil, so We drowned them, all together

quran.arabic: وَدَاوٗدَ وَسُلَيۡمٰنَ اِذۡ يَحۡكُمٰنِ فِي الۡحَرۡثِ اِذۡ نَفَشَتۡ فِيۡهِ غَنَمُ الۡقَوۡمِۚ وَكُنَّا لِحُكۡمِهِمۡ شٰهِدِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And [mention] David and Solomon, when they judged concerning the field - when the sheep of a people overran it [at night], and We were witness to their judgement

quran.arabic: فَفَهَّمۡنٰهَا سُلَيۡمٰنَۚ وَكُلًّا اٰتَيۡنَا حُكۡمًا وَّعِلۡمًاؗ وَّسَخَّرۡنَا مَعَ دَاوٗدَ الۡجِبَالَ يُسَبِّحۡنَ وَالطَّيۡرَؕ وَكُنَّا فٰعِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We gave understanding of the case to Solomon, and to each [of them] We gave judgement and knowledge. And We subjected the mountains to exalt [Us], along with David and [also] the birds. And We were doing [that]

quran.arabic: وَعَلَّمۡنٰهُ صَنۡعَةَ لَبُوۡسٍ لَّكُمۡ لِتُحۡصِنَكُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَاۡسِكُمۡۚ فَهَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ شٰكِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We taught him the fashioning of coats of armor to protect you from your [enemy in] battle. So will you then be grateful

quran.arabic: وَلِسُلَيۡمٰنَ الرِّيۡحَ عَاصِفَةً تَجۡرِيۡ بِاَمۡرِهٖ٘ اِلَي الۡاَرۡضِ الَّتِيۡ بٰرَكۡنَا فِيۡهَاؕ وَكُنَّا بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ الشَّيٰطِيۡنِ مَنۡ يَّغُوۡصُوۡنَ لَهٗ وَيَعۡمَلُوۡنَ عَمَلًا دُوۡنَ ذٰلِكَۚ وَكُنَّا لَهُمۡ حٰفِظِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And of the devils were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian

quran.arabic: وَاَيُّوۡبَ اِذۡ نَادٰي رَبَّهٗ٘ اَنِّيۡ مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَاَنۡتَ اَرۡحَمُ الرّٰحِمِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and you are the Most Merciful of the merciful

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَجَبۡنَا لَهٗ فَكَشَفۡنَا مَا بِهٖ مِنۡ ضُرٍّ وَّاٰتَيۡنٰهُ اَهۡلَهٗ وَمِثۡلَهُمۡ مَّعَهُمۡ رَحۡمَةً مِّنۡ عِنۡدِنَا وَذِكۡرٰي لِلۡعٰبِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: So We responded to him and removed what afflicted him of adversity. And We gave him [back] his family and the like thereof with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for the worshippers [of Allah]

quran.arabic: وَاِسۡمٰعِيۡلَ وَاِدۡرِيۡسَ وَذَا الۡكِفۡلِؕ كُلٌّ مِّنَ الصّٰبِرِيۡنَۙۚۖ‏
quran.english: And [mention] Ishmael and Idrees and Dhul-Kifl; all were of the patient

quran.arabic: وَاَدۡخَلۡنٰهُمۡ فِيۡ رَحۡمَتِنَاؕ اِنَّهُمۡ مِّنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We admitted them into Our mercy. Indeed, they were of the righteous

quran.arabic: وَذَا النُّوۡنِ اِذۡ ذَّهَبَ مُغَاضِبًا فَظَنَّ اَنۡ لَّنۡ نَّقۡدِرَ عَلَيۡهِ فَنَادٰي فِي الظُّلُمٰتِ اَنۡ لَّا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡتَ سُبۡحٰنَكَࣗۖ اِنِّيۡ كُنۡتُ مِنَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: And [mention] the man of the fish, when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him. And he called out within the darknesses, "There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَجَبۡنَا لَهٗۙ وَنَجَّيۡنٰهُ مِنَ الۡغَمِّؕ وَكَذٰلِكَ نُۨجِي الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: So We responded to him and saved him from the distress. And thus do We save the believers

quran.arabic: وَزَكَرِيَّا٘ اِذۡ نَادٰي رَبَّهٗ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرۡنِيۡ فَرۡدًا وَّاَنۡتَ خَيۡرُ الۡوٰرِثِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while you are the best of inheritors

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَجَبۡنَا لَهٗؗ وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهٗ يَحۡيٰي وَاَصۡلَحۡنَا لَهٗ زَوۡجَهٗؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا يُسٰرِعُوۡنَ فِي الۡخَيۡرٰتِ وَيَدۡعُوۡنَنَا رَغَبًا وَّرَهَبًاؕ وَكَانُوۡا لَنَا خٰشِعِيۡنَ
quran.english: So We responded to him, and We gave to him John, and amended for him his wife. Indeed, they used to hasten to good deeds and supplicate Us in hope and fear, and they were to Us humbly submissive

quran.arabic: وَالَّتِيۡ٘ اَحۡصَنَتۡ فَرۡجَهَا فَنَفَخۡنَا فِيۡهَا مِنۡ رُّوۡحِنَا وَجَعَلۡنٰهَا وَابۡنَهَا٘ اٰيَةً لِّلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention] the one who guarded her chastity, so We blew into her [garment] through Our angel [Gabriel], and We made her and her son a sign for the worlds

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذِهٖ٘ اُمَّتُكُمۡ اُمَّةً وَّاحِدَةًؗۖ وَّاَنَا رَبُّكُمۡ فَاعۡبُدُوۡنِ
quran.english: Indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me

quran.arabic: وَتَقَطَّعُوۡ٘ا اَمۡرَهُمۡ بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ كُلٌّ اِلَيۡنَا رٰجِعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And [yet] they divided their affair among themselves, [but] all to Us will return

quran.arabic: فَمَنۡ يَّعۡمَلۡ مِنَ الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٌ فَلَا كُفۡرَانَ لِسَعۡيِهٖۚ وَاِنَّا لَهٗ كٰتِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: So whoever does righteous deeds while he is a believer - no denial will there be for his effort, and indeed We, of it, are recorders

quran.arabic: وَحَرٰمٌ عَلٰي قَرۡيَةٍ اَهۡلَكۡنٰهَا٘ اَنَّهُمۡ لَا يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And there is prohibition upon [the people of] a city which We have destroyed that they will [ever] return

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا فُتِحَتۡ يَاۡجُوۡجُ وَمَاۡجُوۡجُ وَهُمۡ مِّنۡ كُلِّ حَدَبٍ يَّنۡسِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Until when [the dam of] Gog and Magog has been opened and they, from every elevation, descend

quran.arabic: وَاقۡتَرَبَ الۡوَعۡدُ الۡحَقُّ فَاِذَا هِيَ شَاخِصَةٌ اَبۡصَارُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡاؕ يٰوَيۡلَنَا قَدۡ كُنَّا فِيۡ غَفۡلَةٍ مِّنۡ هٰذَا بَلۡ كُنَّا ظٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [when] the true promise has approached; then suddenly the eyes of those who disbelieved will be staring [in horror, while they say], "O woe to us; we had been unmindful of this; rather, we were wrongdoers

quran.arabic: اِنَّكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ حَصَبُ جَهَنَّمَؕ اَنۡتُمۡ لَهَا وٰرِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, you [disbelievers] and what you worship other than Allah are the firewood of Hell. You will be coming to [enter] it

quran.arabic: لَوۡ كَانَ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ اٰلِهَةً مَّا وَرَدُوۡهَاؕ وَكُلٌّ فِيۡهَا خٰلِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Had these [false deities] been [actual] gods, they would not have come to it, but all are eternal therein

quran.arabic: لَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا زَفِيۡرٌ وَّهُمۡ فِيۡهَا لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: For them therein is heavy sighing, and they therein will not hear

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ سَبَقَتۡ لَهُمۡ مِّنَّا الۡحُسۡنٰ٘يۙ اُولٰٓئِكَ عَنۡهَا مُبۡعَدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those for whom the best [reward] has preceded from Us - they are from it far removed

quran.arabic: لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ حَسِيۡسَهَاۚ وَهُمۡ فِيۡ مَا اشۡتَهَتۡ اَنۡفُسُهُمۡ خٰلِدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: They will not hear its sound, while they are, in that which their souls desire, abiding eternally

quran.arabic: لَا يَحۡزُنُهُمُ الۡفَزَعُ الۡاَكۡبَرُ وَتَتَلَقّٰىهُمُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُؕ هٰذَا يَوۡمُكُمُ الَّذِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: They will not be grieved by the greatest terror, and the angels will meet them, [saying], "This is your Day which you have been promised

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَطۡوِي السَّمَآءَ كَطَيِّ السِّجِلِّ لِلۡكُتُبِؕ كَمَا بَدَاۡنَا٘ اَوَّلَ خَلۡقٍ نُّعِيۡدُهٗؕ وَعۡدًا عَلَيۡنَاؕ اِنَّا كُنَّا فٰعِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ كَتَبۡنَا فِي الزَّبُوۡرِ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ الذِّكۡرِ اَنَّ الۡاَرۡضَ يَرِثُهَا عِبَادِيَ الصّٰلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ هٰذَا لَبَلٰغًا لِّقَوۡمٍ عٰبِدِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, in this [Qur'an] is notification for a worshipping people

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ اِلَّا رَحۡمَةً لِّلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], except as a mercy to the worlds

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّمَا يُوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيَّ اَنَّمَا٘ اِلٰهُكُمۡ اِلٰهٌ وَّاحِدٌۚ فَهَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ مُّسۡلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "It is only revealed to me that your god is but one God; so will you be Muslims [in submission to Him]

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ تَوَلَّوۡا فَقُلۡ اٰذَنۡتُكُمۡ عَلٰي سَوَآءٍؕ وَاِنۡ اَدۡرِيۡ٘ اَقَرِيۡبٌ اَمۡ بَعِيۡدٌ مَّا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: But if they turn away, then say, "I have announced to [all of] you equally. And I know not whether near or far is that which you are promised

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ يَعۡلَمُ الۡجَهۡرَ مِنَ الۡقَوۡلِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تَكۡتُمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, He knows what is declared of speech, and He knows what you conceal

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ اَدۡرِيۡ لَعَلَّهٗ فِتۡنَةٌ لَّكُمۡ وَمَتَاعٌ اِلٰي حِيۡنٍ
quran.english: And I know not; perhaps it is a trial for you and enjoyment for a time

quran.arabic: قٰلَ رَبِّ احۡكُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّؕ وَرَبُّنَا الرَّحۡمٰنُ الۡمُسۡتَعَانُ عَلٰي مَا تَصِفُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: [The Prophet] has said, "My Lord, judge [between us] in truth. And our Lord is the Most Merciful, the one whose help is sought against that which you describe

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوۡا رَبَّكُمۡۚ اِنَّ زَلۡزَلَةَ السَّاعَةِ شَيۡءٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O mankind, fear your Lord. Indeed, the convulsion of the [final] Hour is a terrible thing

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَرَوۡنَهَا تَذۡهَلُ كُلُّ مُرۡضِعَةٍ عَمَّا٘ اَرۡضَعَتۡ وَتَضَعُ كُلُّ ذَاتِ حَمۡلٍ حَمۡلَهَا وَتَرَي النَّاسَ سُكٰرٰي وَمَا هُمۡ بِسُكٰرٰي وَلٰكِنَّ عَذَابَ اللّٰهِ شَدِيۡدٌ
quran.english: On the Day you see it every nursing mother will be distracted from that [child] she was nursing, and every pregnant woman will abort her pregnancy, and you will see the people [appearing] intoxicated while they are not intoxicated; but the punishment of Allah is severe

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنۡ يُّجَادِلُ فِي اللّٰهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٍ وَّيَتَّبِعُ كُلَّ شَيۡطٰنٍ مَّرِيۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: And of the people is he who disputes about Allah without knowledge and follows every rebellious devil

quran.arabic: كُتِبَ عَلَيۡهِ اَنَّهٗ مَنۡ تَوَلَّاهُ فَاَنَّهٗ يُضِلُّهٗ وَيَهۡدِيۡهِ اِلٰي عَذَابِ السَّعِيۡرِ
quran.english: It has been decreed for every devil that whoever turns to him - he will misguide him and will lead him to the punishment of the Blaze

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ فِيۡ رَيۡبٍ مِّنَ الۡبَعۡثِ فَاِنَّا خَلَقۡنٰكُمۡ مِّنۡ تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍ ثُمَّ مِنۡ عَلَقَةٍ ثُمَّ مِنۡ مُّضۡغَةٍ مُّخَلَّقَةٍ وَّغَيۡرِ مُخَلَّقَةٍ لِّنُبَيِّنَ لَكُمۡؕ وَنُقِرُّ فِي الۡاَرۡحَامِ مَا نَشَآءُ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّي ثُمَّ نُخۡرِجُكُمۡ طِفۡلًا ثُمَّ لِتَبۡلُغُوۡ٘ا اَشُدَّكُمۡۚ وَمِنۡكُمۡ مَّنۡ يُّتَوَفّٰي وَمِنۡكُمۡ مَّنۡ يُّرَدُّ اِلٰ٘ي اَرۡذَلِ الۡعُمُرِ لِكَيۡلَا يَعۡلَمَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ عِلۡمٍ شَيۡـًٔاؕ وَتَرَي الۡاَرۡضَ هَامِدَةً فَاِذَا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهَا الۡمَآءَ اهۡتَزَّتۡ وَرَبَتۡ وَاَنۭۡ بَتَتۡ مِنۡ كُلِّ زَوۡجٍۭ بَهِيۡجٍ
quran.english: O People, if you should be in doubt about the Resurrection, then [consider that] indeed, We created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop, then from a clinging clot, and then from a lump of flesh, formed and unformed - that We may show you. And We settle in the wombs whom We will for a specified term, then We bring you out as a child, and then [We develop you] that you may reach your [time of] maturity. And among you is he who is taken in [early] death, and among you is he who is returned to the most decrepit [old] age so that he knows, after [once having] knowledge, nothing. And you see the earth barren, but when We send down upon it rain, it quivers and swells and grows [something] of every beautiful kind

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡحَقُّ وَاَنَّهٗ يُحۡيِ الۡمَوۡتٰي وَاَنَّهٗ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌۙ‏
quran.english: That is because Allah is the Truth and because He gives life to the dead and because He is over all things competent

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّ السَّاعَةَ اٰتِيَةٌ لَّا رَيۡبَ فِيۡهَاۙ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَبۡعَثُ مَنۡ فِي الۡقُبُوۡرِ
quran.english: And [that they may know] that the Hour is coming - no doubt about it - and that Allah will resurrect those in the graves

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنۡ يُّجَادِلُ فِي اللّٰهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٍ وَّلَا هُدًي وَّلَا كِتٰبٍ مُّنِيۡرٍۙ‏
quran.english: And of the people is he who disputes about Allah without knowledge or guidance or an enlightening book [from Him]

quran.arabic: ثَانِيَ عِطۡفِهٖ لِيُضِلَّ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِؕ لَهٗ فِي الدُّنۡيَا خِزۡيٌ وَّنُذِيۡقُهٗ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ عَذَابَ الۡحَرِيۡقِ
quran.english: Twisting his neck [in arrogance] to mislead [people] from the way of Allah. For him in the world is disgrace, and We will make him taste on the Day of Resurrection the punishment of the Burning Fire [while it is said]

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِمَا قَدَّمَتۡ يَدٰكَ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ لَيۡسَ بِظَلَّامٍ لِّلۡعَبِيۡدِࣖ‏
quran.english: That is for what your hands have put forth and because Allah is not ever unjust to [His] servants

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنۡ يَّعۡبُدُ اللّٰهَ عَلٰي حَرۡفٍۚ فَاِنۡ اَصَابَهٗ خَيۡرُ اِۨطۡمَاَنَّ بِهٖۚ وَاِنۡ اَصَابَتۡهُ فِتۡنَةُ اِۨنۡقَلَبَ عَلٰي وَجۡهِهٖۚࣞ خَسِرَ الدُّنۡيَا وَالۡاٰخِرَةَؕ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الۡخُسۡرَانُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: And of the people is he who worships Allah on an edge. If he is touched by good, he is reassured by it; but if he is struck by trial, he turns on his face [to the other direction]. He has lost [this] world and the Hereafter. That is what is the manifest loss

quran.arabic: يَدۡعُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مَا لَا يَضُرُّهٗ وَمَا لَا يَنۡفَعُهٗؕ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الضَّلٰلُ الۡبَعِيۡدُۚ‏
quran.english: He invokes instead of Allah that which neither harms him nor benefits him. That is what is the extreme error

quran.arabic: يَدۡعُوۡا لَمَنۡ ضَرُّهٗ٘ اَقۡرَبُ مِنۡ نَّفۡعِهٖؕ لَبِئۡسَ الۡمَوۡلٰي وَلَبِئۡسَ الۡعَشِيۡرُ
quran.english: He invokes one whose harm is closer than his benefit - how wretched the protector and how wretched the associate

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُدۡخِلُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَفۡعَلُ مَا يُرِيۡدُ
quran.english: Indeed, Allah will admit those who believe and do righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow. Indeed, Allah does what He intends

quran.arabic: مَنۡ كَانَ يَظُنُّ اَنۡ لَّنۡ يَّنۡصُرَهُ اللّٰهُ فِي الدُّنۡيَا وَالۡاٰخِرَةِ فَلۡيَمۡدُدۡ بِسَبَبٍ اِلَي السَّمَآءِ ثُمَّ لۡيَقۡطَعۡ فَلۡيَنۡظُرۡ هَلۡ يُذۡهِبَنَّ كَيۡدُهٗ مَا يَغِيۡظُ
quran.english: Whoever should think that Allah will not support [Prophet Muhammad] in this world and the Hereafter - let him extend a rope to the ceiling, then cut off [his breath], and let him see: will his effort remove that which enrages [him]

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ اٰيٰتٍۭ بَيِّنٰتٍۙ وَّاَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ يُّرِيۡدُ
quran.english: And thus have We sent the Qur'an down as verses of clear evidence and because Allah guides whom He intends

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَالَّذِيۡنَ هَادُوۡا وَالصّٰبِـِٕيۡنَ وَالنَّصٰرٰي وَالۡمَجُوۡسَ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اَشۡرَكُوۡ٘اࣗۖ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَفۡصِلُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ شَهِيۡدٌ
quran.english: Indeed, those who have believed and those who were Jews and the Sabeans and the Christians and the Magians and those who associated with Allah - Allah will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection. Indeed Allah is, over all things, Witness

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَسۡجُدُ لَهٗ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَنۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَالشَّمۡسُ وَالۡقَمَرُ وَالنُّجُوۡمُ وَالۡجِبَالُ وَالشَّجَرُ وَالدَّوَآبُّ وَكَثِيۡرٌ مِّنَ النَّاسِؕ وَكَثِيۡرٌ حَقَّ عَلَيۡهِ الۡعَذَابُؕ وَمَنۡ يُّهِنِ اللّٰهُ فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ مُّكۡرِمٍؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَفۡعَلُ مَا يَشَآءُࣛ‏
quran.english: Do you not see that to Allah prostrates whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth and the sun, the moon, the stars, the mountains, the trees, the moving creatures and many of the people? But upon many the punishment has been justified. And he whom Allah humiliates - for him there is no bestower of honor. Indeed, Allah does what He wills

quran.arabic: هٰذٰنِ خَصۡمٰنِ اخۡتَصَمُوۡا فِيۡ رَبِّهِمۡؗ فَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا قُطِّعَتۡ لَهُمۡ ثِيَابٌ مِّنۡ نَّارٍؕ يُصَبُّ مِنۡ فَوۡقِ رُءُوۡسِهِمُ الۡحَمِيۡمُۚ‏
quran.english: These are two adversaries who have disputed over their Lord. But those who disbelieved will have cut out for them garments of fire. Poured upon their heads will be scalding water

quran.arabic: يُصۡهَرُ بِهٖ مَا فِيۡ بُطُوۡنِهِمۡ وَالۡجُلُوۡدُؕ‏
quran.english: By which is melted that within their bellies and [their] skins

quran.arabic: وَلَهُمۡ مَّقَامِعُ مِنۡ حَدِيۡدٍ
quran.english: And for [striking] them are maces of iron

quran.arabic: كُلَّمَا٘ اَرَادُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ يَّخۡرُجُوۡا مِنۡهَا مِنۡ غَمٍّ اُعِيۡدُوۡا فِيۡهَاࣗ وَذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابَ الۡحَرِيۡقِࣖ‏
quran.english: Every time they want to get out of Hellfire from anguish, they will be returned to it, and [it will be said], "Taste the punishment of the Burning Fire

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُدۡخِلُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيۡهَا مِنۡ اَسَاوِرَ مِنۡ ذَهَبٍ وَّلُؤۡلُؤًاؕ وَلِبَاسُهُمۡ فِيۡهَا حَرِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Indeed, Allah will admit those who believe and do righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearl, and their garments therein will be silk

quran.arabic: وَهُدُوۡ٘ا اِلَي الطَّيِّبِ مِنَ الۡقَوۡلِۚࣗۖ وَهُدُوۡ٘ا اِلٰي صِرَاطِ الۡحَمِيۡدِ
quran.english: And they had been guided [in worldly life] to good speech, and they were guided to the path of the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَيَصُدُّوۡنَ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ وَالۡمَسۡجِدِ الۡحَرَامِ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلۡنٰهُ لِلنَّاسِ سَوَآءَ اِۨلۡعَاكِفُ فِيۡهِ وَالۡبَادِؕ وَمَنۡ يُّرِدۡ فِيۡهِ بِاِلۡحَادٍۭ بِظُلۡمٍ نُّذِقۡهُ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ اَلِيۡمٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who have disbelieved and avert [people] from the way of Allah and [from] al-Masjid al-Haram, which We made for the people - equal are the resident therein and one from outside; and [also] whoever intends [a deed] therein of deviation [in religion] or wrongdoing - We will make him taste of a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ بَوَّاۡنَا لِاِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ مَكَانَ الۡبَيۡتِ اَنۡ لَّا تُشۡرِكۡ بِيۡ شَيۡـًٔا وَّطَهِّرۡ بَيۡتِيَ لِلطَّآئِفِيۡنَ وَالۡقَآئِمِيۡنَ وَالرُّكَّعِ السُّجُوۡدِ
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when We designated for Abraham the site of the House, [saying], "Do not associate anything with Me and purify My House for those who perform Tawaf and those who stand [in prayer] and those who bow and prostrate

quran.arabic: وَاَذِّنۡ فِي النَّاسِ بِالۡحَجِّ يَاۡتُوۡكَ رِجَالًا وَّعَلٰي كُلِّ ضَامِرٍ يَّاۡتِيۡنَ مِنۡ كُلِّ فَجٍّ عَمِيۡقٍۙ‏
quran.english: And proclaim to the people the Hajj [pilgrimage]; they will come to you on foot and on every lean camel; they will come from every distant pass

quran.arabic: لِّيَشۡهَدُوۡا مَنَافِعَ لَهُمۡ وَيَذۡكُرُوا اسۡمَ اللّٰهِ فِيۡ٘ اَيَّامٍ مَّعۡلُوۡمٰتٍ عَلٰي مَا رَزَقَهُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَهِيۡمَةِ الۡاَنۡعَامِۚ فَكُلُوۡا مِنۡهَا وَاَطۡعِمُوا الۡبَآئِسَ الۡفَقِيۡرَؗ‏
quran.english: That they may witness benefits for themselves and mention the name of Allah on known days over what He has provided for them of [sacrificial] animals. So eat of them and feed the miserable and poor

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ لۡيَقۡضُوۡا تَفَثَهُمۡ وَلۡيُوۡفُوۡا نُذُوۡرَهُمۡ وَلۡيَطَّوَّفُوۡا بِالۡبَيۡتِ الۡعَتِيۡقِ
quran.english: Then let them end their untidiness and fulfill their vows and perform Tawaf around the ancient House

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَࣗ وَمَنۡ يُّعَظِّمۡ حُرُمٰتِ اللّٰهِ فَهُوَ خَيۡرٌ لَّهٗ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهٖؕ وَاُحِلَّتۡ لَكُمُ الۡاَنۡعَامُ اِلَّا مَا يُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَاجۡتَنِبُوا الرِّجۡسَ مِنَ الۡاَوۡثَانِ وَاجۡتَنِبُوۡا قَوۡلَ الزُّوۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: That [has been commanded], and whoever honors the sacred ordinances of Allah - it is best for him in the sight of his Lord. And permitted to you are the grazing livestock, except what is recited to you. So avoid the uncleanliness of idols and avoid false statement

quran.arabic: حُنَفَآءَ لِلّٰهِ غَيۡرَ مُشۡرِكِيۡنَ بِهٖؕ وَمَنۡ يُّشۡرِكۡ بِاللّٰهِ فَكَاَنَّمَا خَرَّ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ فَتَخۡطَفُهُ الطَّيۡرُ اَوۡ تَهۡوِيۡ بِهِ الرِّيۡحُ فِيۡ مَكَانٍ سَحِيۡقٍ
quran.english: Inclining [only] to Allah, not associating [anything] with Him. And he who associates with Allah - it is as though he had fallen from the sky and was snatched by the birds or the wind carried him down into a remote place

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَࣗ وَمَنۡ يُّعَظِّمۡ شَعَآئِرَ اللّٰهِ فَاِنَّهَا مِنۡ تَقۡوَي الۡقُلُوۡبِ
quran.english: That [is so]. And whoever honors the symbols of Allah - indeed, it is from the piety of hearts

quran.arabic: لَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَنَافِعُ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّي ثُمَّ مَحِلُّهَا٘ اِلَي الۡبَيۡتِ الۡعَتِيۡقِࣖ‏
quran.english: For you the animals marked for sacrifice are benefits for a specified term; then their place of sacrifice is at the ancient House

quran.arabic: وَلِكُلِّ اُمَّةٍ جَعَلۡنَا مَنۡسَكًا لِّيَذۡكُرُوا اسۡمَ اللّٰهِ عَلٰي مَا رَزَقَهُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَهِيۡمَةِ الۡاَنۡعَامِؕ فَاِلٰهُكُمۡ اِلٰهٌ وَّاحِدٌ فَلَهٗ٘ اَسۡلِمُوۡاؕ وَبَشِّرِ الۡمُخۡبِتِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And for all religion We have appointed a rite [of sacrifice] that they may mention the name of Allah over what He has provided for them of [sacrificial] animals. For your god is one God, so to Him submit. And, [O Muhammad], give good tidings to the humble [before their Lord]

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ اِذَا ذُكِرَ اللّٰهُ وَجِلَتۡ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡ وَالصّٰبِرِيۡنَ عَلٰي مَا٘ اَصَابَهُمۡ وَالۡمُقِيۡمِي الصَّلٰوةِۙ وَمِمَّا رَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ يُنۡفِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Who, when Allah is mentioned, their hearts are fearful, and [to] the patient over what has afflicted them, and the establishers of prayer and those who spend from what We have provided them

quran.arabic: وَالۡبُدۡنَ جَعَلۡنٰهَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ شَعَآئِرِ اللّٰهِ لَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا خَيۡرٌࣗۖ فَاذۡكُرُوا اسۡمَ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡهَا صَوَآفَّۚ فَاِذَا وَجَبَتۡ جُنُوۡبُهَا فَكُلُوۡا مِنۡهَا وَاَطۡعِمُوا الۡقَانِعَ وَالۡمُعۡتَرَّؕ كَذٰلِكَ سَخَّرۡنٰهَا لَكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the camels and cattle We have appointed for you as among the symbols of Allah; for you therein is good. So mention the name of Allah upon them when lined up [for sacrifice]; and when they are [lifeless] on their sides, then eat from them and feed the needy and the beggar. Thus have We subjected them to you that you may be grateful

quran.arabic: لَنۡ يَّنَالَ اللّٰهَ لُحُوۡمُهَا وَلَا دِمَآؤُهَا وَلٰكِنۡ يَّنَالُهُ التَّقۡوٰي مِنۡكُمۡؕ كَذٰلِكَ سَخَّرَهَا لَكُمۡ لِتُكَبِّرُوا اللّٰهَ عَلٰي مَا هَدٰىكُمۡؕ وَبَشِّرِ الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Their meat will not reach Allah, nor will their blood, but what reaches Him is piety from you. Thus have We subjected them to you that you may glorify Allah for that [to] which He has guided you; and give good tidings to the doers of good

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُدٰفِعُ عَنِ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ خَوَّانٍ كَفُوۡرٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Allah defends those who have believed. Indeed, Allah does not like everyone treacherous and ungrateful

quran.arabic: اُذِنَ لِلَّذِيۡنَ يُقٰتَلُوۡنَ بِاَنَّهُمۡ ظُلِمُوۡاؕ وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلٰي نَصۡرِهِمۡ لَقَدِيۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: Permission [to fight] has been given to those who are being fought, because they were wronged. And indeed, Allah is competent to give them victory

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡنَ اُخۡرِجُوۡا مِنۡ دِيَارِهِمۡ بِغَيۡرِ حَقٍّ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يَّقُوۡلُوۡا رَبُّنَا اللّٰهُؕ وَلَوۡلَا دَفۡعُ اللّٰهِ النَّاسَ بَعۡضَهُمۡ بِبَعۡضٍ لَّهُدِّمَتۡ صَوَامِعُ وَبِيَعٌ وَّصَلَوٰتٌ وَّمَسٰجِدُ يُذۡكَرُ فِيۡهَا اسۡمُ اللّٰهِ كَثِيۡرًاؕ وَلَيَنۡصُرَنَّ اللّٰهُ مَنۡ يَّنۡصُرُهٗؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَقَوِيٌّ عَزِيۡزٌ
quran.english: [They are] those who have been evicted from their homes without right - only because they say, "Our Lord is Allah."
