And were it not that Allah checks the people, some by means of others, there would have been demolished monasteries, churches, synagogues, and mosques in which the name of Allah is much mentioned. And Allah will surely support those who support Him. Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ اِنۡ مَّكَّنّٰهُمۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ اَقَامُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاٰتَوُا الزَّكٰوةَ وَاَمَرُوۡا بِالۡمَعۡرُوۡفِ وَنَهَوۡا عَنِ الۡمُنۡكَرِؕ وَلِلّٰهِ عَاقِبَةُ الۡاُمُوۡرِ
quran.english: [And they are] those who, if We give them authority in the land, establish prayer and give zakah and enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong. And to Allah belongs the outcome of [all] matters

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ يُّكَذِّبُوۡكَ فَقَدۡ كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوۡحٍ وَّعَادٌ وَّثَمُوۡدُۙ‏
quran.english: And if they deny you, [O Muhammad] - so, before them, did the people of Noah and 'Aad and Thamud deny [their prophets]

quran.arabic: وَقَوۡمُ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَقَوۡمُ لُوۡطٍۙ‏
quran.english: And the people of Abraham and the people of Lot

quran.arabic: وَّاَصۡحٰبُ مَدۡيَنَۚ وَكُذِّبَ مُوۡسٰي فَاَمۡلَيۡتُ لِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ ثُمَّ اَخَذۡتُهُمۡۚ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيۡرِ
quran.english: And the inhabitants of Madyan. And Moses was denied, so I prolonged enjoyment for the disbelievers; then I seized them, and how [terrible] was My reproach

quran.arabic: فَكَاَيِّنۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ اَهۡلَكۡنٰهَا وَهِيَ ظَالِمَةٌ فَهِيَ خَاوِيَةٌ عَلٰي عُرُوۡشِهَاؗ وَبِئۡرٍ مُّعَطَّلَةٍ وَّقَصۡرٍ مَّشِيۡدٍ
quran.english: And how many a city did We destroy while it was committing wrong - so it is [now] fallen into ruin - and [how many] an abandoned well and [how many] a lofty palace

quran.arabic: اَفَلَمۡ يَسِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَتَكُوۡنَ لَهُمۡ قُلُوۡبٌ يَّعۡقِلُوۡنَ بِهَا٘ اَوۡ اٰذَانٌ يَّسۡمَعُوۡنَ بِهَاۚ فَاِنَّهَا لَا تَعۡمَي الۡاَبۡصَارُ وَلٰكِنۡ تَعۡمَي الۡقُلُوۡبُ الَّتِيۡ فِي الصُّدُوۡرِ
quran.english: So have they not traveled through the earth and have hearts by which to reason and ears by which to hear? For indeed, it is not eyes that are blinded, but blinded are the hearts which are within the breasts

quran.arabic: وَيَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَكَ بِالۡعَذَابِ وَلَنۡ يُّخۡلِفَ اللّٰهُ وَعۡدَهٗؕ وَاِنَّ يَوۡمًا عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ كَاَلۡفِ سَنَةٍ مِّمَّا تَعُدُّوۡنَ
quran.english: And they urge you to hasten the punishment. But Allah will never fail in His promise. And indeed, a day with your Lord is like a thousand years of those which you count

quran.arabic: وَكَاَيِّنۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ اَمۡلَيۡتُ لَهَا وَهِيَ ظَالِمَةٌ ثُمَّ اَخَذۡتُهَاۚ وَاِلَيَّ الۡمَصِيۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: And for how many a city did I prolong enjoyment while it was committing wrong. Then I seized it, and to Me is the [final] destination

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اِنَّمَا٘ اَنَا لَكُمۡ نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۚ‏
quran.english: Say, "O people, I am only to you a clear warner

quran.arabic: فَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَهُمۡ مَّغۡفِرَةٌ وَّرِزۡقٌ كَرِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And those who have believed and done righteous deeds - for them is forgiveness and noble provision

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ سَعَوۡا فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِنَا مُعٰجِزِيۡنَ اُولٰٓئِكَ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡجَحِيۡمِ
quran.english: But the ones who strove against Our verses, [seeking] to cause failure - those are the companions of Hellfire

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَ مِنۡ رَّسُوۡلٍ وَّلَا نَبِيٍّ اِلَّا٘ اِذَا تَمَنّٰ٘ي اَلۡقَي الشَّيۡطٰنُ فِيۡ٘ اُمۡنِيَّتِهٖۚ فَيَنۡسَخُ اللّٰهُ مَا يُلۡقِي الشَّيۡطٰنُ ثُمَّ يُحۡكِمُ اللّٰهُ اٰيٰتِهٖؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌ حَكِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: And We did not send before you any messenger or prophet except that when he spoke [or recited], Satan threw into it [some misunderstanding]. But Allah abolishes that which Satan throws in; then Allah makes precise His verses. And Allah is Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: لِّيَجۡعَلَ مَا يُلۡقِي الشَّيۡطٰنُ فِتۡنَةً لِّلَّذِيۡنَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّرَضٌ وَّالۡقَاسِيَةِ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡؕ وَاِنَّ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ لَفِيۡ شِقَاقٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: [That is] so He may make what Satan throws in a trial for those within whose hearts is disease and those hard of heart. And indeed, the wrongdoers are in extreme dissension

quran.arabic: وَّلِيَعۡلَمَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَ اَنَّهُ الۡحَقُّ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ فَيُؤۡمِنُوۡا بِهٖ فَتُخۡبِتَ لَهٗ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡؕ وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَهَادِ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And so those who were given knowledge may know that it is the truth from your Lord and [therefore] believe in it, and their hearts humbly submit to it. And indeed is Allah the Guide of those who have believed to a straight path

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَزَالُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا فِيۡ مِرۡيَةٍ مِّنۡهُ حَتّٰي تَاۡتِيَهُمُ السَّاعَةُ بَغۡتَةً اَوۡ يَاۡتِيَهُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمٍ عَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: But those who disbelieve will not cease to be in doubt of it until the Hour comes upon them unexpectedly or there comes to them the punishment of a barren Day

quran.arabic: اَلۡمُلۡكُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلّٰهِؕ يَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ فَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ فِيۡ جَنّٰتِ النَّعِيۡمِ
quran.english: [All] sovereignty that Day is for Allah; He will judge between them. So they who believed and did righteous deeds will be in the Gardens of Pleasure

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَكَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا فَاُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ مُّهِيۡنٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And they who disbelieved and denied Our signs - for those there will be a humiliating punishment

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هَاجَرُوۡا فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ ثُمَّ قُتِلُوۡ٘ا اَوۡ مَاتُوۡا لَيَرۡزُقَنَّهُمُ اللّٰهُ رِزۡقًا حَسَنًاؕ وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَهُوَ خَيۡرُ الرّٰزِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And those who emigrated for the cause of Allah and then were killed or died - Allah will surely provide for them a good provision. And indeed, it is Allah who is the best of providers

quran.arabic: لَيُدۡخِلَنَّهُمۡ مُّدۡخَلًا يَّرۡضَوۡنَهٗؕ وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَعَلِيۡمٌ حَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: He will surely cause them to enter an entrance with which they will be pleased, and indeed, Allah is Knowing and Forbearing

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَۚ وَمَنۡ عَاقَبَ بِمِثۡلِ مَا عُوۡقِبَ بِهٖ ثُمَّ بُغِيَ عَلَيۡهِ لَيَنۡصُرَنَّهُ اللّٰهُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَعَفُوٌّ غَفُوۡرٌ
quran.english: That [is so]. And whoever responds [to injustice] with the equivalent of that with which he was harmed and then is tyrannized - Allah will surely aid him. Indeed, Allah is Pardoning and Forgiving

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّ اللّٰهَ يُوۡلِجُ الَّيۡلَ فِي النَّهَارِ وَيُوۡلِجُ النَّهَارَ فِي الَّيۡلِ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ سَمِيۡعٌۭ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: That is because Allah causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and because Allah is Hearing and Seeing

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡحَقُّ وَاَنَّ مَا يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ هُوَ الۡبَاطِلُ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡعَلِيُّ الۡكَبِيۡرُ
quran.english: That is because Allah is the Truth, and that which they call upon other than Him is falsehood, and because Allah is the Most High, the Grand

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ اَنۡزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءًؗ فَتُصۡبِحُ الۡاَرۡضُ مُخۡضَرَّةًؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَطِيۡفٌ خَبِيۡرٌۚ‏
quran.english: Do you not see that Allah has sent down rain from the sky and the earth becomes green? Indeed, Allah is Subtle and Acquainted

quran.arabic: لَهٗ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَهُوَ الۡغَنِيُّ الۡحَمِيۡدُࣖ‏
quran.english: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth. And indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ سَخَّرَ لَكُمۡ مَّا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَالۡفُلۡكَ تَجۡرِيۡ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ بِاَمۡرِهٖؕ وَيُمۡسِكُ السَّمَآءَ اَنۡ تَقَعَ عَلَي الۡاَرۡضِ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِهٖؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ بِالنَّاسِ لَرَءُوۡفٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Do you not see that Allah has subjected to you whatever is on the earth and the ships which run through the sea by His command? And He restrains the sky from falling upon the earth, unless by His permission. Indeed Allah, to the people, is Kind and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَحۡيَاكُمۡؗ ثُمَّ يُمِيۡتُكُمۡ ثُمَّ يُحۡيِيۡكُمۡؕ اِنَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ لَكَفُوۡرٌ
quran.english: And He is the one who gave you life; then He causes you to die and then will [again] give you life. Indeed, mankind is ungrateful

quran.arabic: لِكُلِّ اُمَّةٍ جَعَلۡنَا مَنۡسَكًا هُمۡ نَاسِكُوۡهُ فَلَا يُنَازِعُنَّكَ فِي الۡاَمۡرِ وَادۡعُ اِلٰي رَبِّكَؕ اِنَّكَ لَعَلٰي هُدًي مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: For every religion We have appointed rites which they perform. So, [O Muhammad], let the disbelievers not contend with you over the matter but invite them to your Lord. Indeed, you are upon straight guidance

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ جٰدَلُوۡكَ فَقُلِ اللّٰهُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if they dispute with you, then say, "Allah is most knowing of what you do

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ يَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَكُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ فِيۡمَا كُنۡتُمۡ فِيۡهِ تَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَعۡلَمۡ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ فِيۡ كِتٰبٍؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ يَسِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Do you not know that Allah knows what is in the heaven and earth? Indeed, that is in a Record. Indeed that, for Allah, is easy

quran.arabic: وَيَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مَا لَمۡ يُنَزِّلۡ بِهٖ سُلۡطٰنًا وَّمَا لَيۡسَ لَهُمۡ بِهٖ عِلۡمٌؕ وَمَا لِلظّٰلِمِيۡنَ مِنۡ نَّصِيۡرٍ
quran.english: And they worship besides Allah that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتُنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ تَعۡرِفُ فِيۡ وُجُوۡهِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوا الۡمُنۡكَرَؕ يَكَادُوۡنَ يَسۡطُوۡنَ بِالَّذِيۡنَ يَتۡلُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتِنَاؕ قُلۡ اَفَاُنَبِّئُكُمۡ بِشَرٍّ مِّنۡ ذٰلِكُمۡؕ اَلنَّارُؕ وَعَدَهَا اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡاؕ وَبِئۡسَ الۡمَصِيۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, you recognize in the faces of those who disbelieve disapproval. They are almost on the verge of assaulting those who recite to them Our verses. Say, "Then shall I inform you of [what is] worse than that? [It is] the Fire which Allah has promised those who disbelieve, and wretched is the destination

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ ضُرِبَ مَثَلٌ فَاسۡتَمِعُوۡا لَهٗؕ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ تَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ لَنۡ يَّخۡلُقُوۡا ذُبَابًا وَّلَوِ اجۡتَمَعُوۡا لَهٗؕ وَاِنۡ يَّسۡلُبۡهُمُ الذُّبَابُ شَيۡـًٔا لَّا يَسۡتَنۡقِذُوۡهُ مِنۡهُؕ ضَعُفَ الطَّالِبُ وَالۡمَطۡلُوۡبُ
quran.english: O people, an example is presented, so listen to it. Indeed, those you invoke besides Allah will never create [as much as] a fly, even if they gathered together for that purpose. And if the fly should steal away from them a [tiny] thing, they could not recover it from him. Weak are the pursuer and pursued

quran.arabic: مَا قَدَرُوا اللّٰهَ حَقَّ قَدۡرِهٖؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَقَوِيٌّ عَزِيۡزٌ
quran.english: They have not appraised Allah with true appraisal. Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ يَصۡطَفِيۡ مِنَ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا وَّمِنَ النَّاسِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ سَمِيۡعٌۭ بَصِيۡرٌۚ‏
quran.english: Allah chooses from the angels messengers and from the people. Indeed, Allah is Hearing and Seeing

quran.arabic: يَعۡلَمُ مَا بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡؕ وَاِلَي اللّٰهِ تُرۡجَعُ الۡاُمُوۡرُ
quran.english: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them. And to Allah will be returned [all] matters

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا ارۡكَعُوۡا وَاسۡجُدُوۡا وَاعۡبُدُوۡا رَبَّكُمۡ وَافۡعَلُوا الۡخَيۡرَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُفۡلِحُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed

quran.arabic: وَجَاهِدُوۡا فِي اللّٰهِ حَقَّ جِهَادِهٖؕ هُوَ اجۡتَبٰىكُمۡ وَمَا جَعَلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فِي الدِّيۡنِ مِنۡ حَرَجٍؕ مِلَّةَ اَبِيۡكُمۡ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَؕ هُوَ سَمّٰىكُمُ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَ ࣢ۙ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَفِيۡ هٰذَا لِيَكُوۡنَ الرَّسُوۡلُ شَهِيۡدًا عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَتَكُوۡنُوۡا شُهَدَآءَ عَلَي النَّاسِۚۖ فَاَقِيۡمُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاٰتُوا الزَّكٰوةَ وَاعۡتَصِمُوۡا بِاللّٰهِؕ هُوَ مَوۡلٰىكُمۡۚ فَنِعۡمَ الۡمَوۡلٰي وَنِعۡمَ النَّصِيۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: And strive for Allah with the striving due to Him. He has chosen you and has not placed upon you in the religion any difficulty. [It is] the religion of your father, Abraham. Allah named you "Muslims" before [in former scriptures] and in this [revelation] that the Messenger may be a witness over you and you may be witnesses over the people. So establish prayer and give zakah and hold fast to Allah. He is your protector; and excellent is the protector, and excellent is the helper

quran.arabic: قَدۡ اَفۡلَحَ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Certainly will the believers have succeeded

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ فِيۡ صَلَاتِهِمۡ خٰشِعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They who are during their prayer humbly submissive

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ عَنِ اللَّغۡوِ مُعۡرِضُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they who turn away from ill speech

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ لِلزَّكٰوةِ فٰعِلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they who are observant of zakah

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ لِفُرُوۡجِهِمۡ حٰفِظُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they who guard their private parts

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عَلٰ٘ي اَزۡوَاجِهِمۡ اَوۡ مَا مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُهُمۡ فَاِنَّهُمۡ غَيۡرُ مَلُوۡمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they will not be blamed

quran.arabic: فَمَنِ ابۡتَغٰي وَرَآءَ ذٰلِكَ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡعٰدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: But whoever seeks beyond that, then those are the transgressors

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ لِاَمٰنٰتِهِمۡ وَعَهۡدِهِمۡ رٰعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they who are to their trusts and their promises attentive

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ عَلٰي صَلَوٰتِهِمۡ يُحَافِظُوۡنَۘ‏
quran.english: And they who carefully maintain their prayers

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡوٰرِثُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Those are the inheritors

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يَرِثُوۡنَ الۡفِرۡدَوۡسَؕ هُمۡ فِيۡهَا خٰلِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Who will inherit al-Firdaus. They will abide therein eternally

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ مِنۡ سُلٰلَةٍ مِّنۡ طِيۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: And certainly did We create man from an extract of clay

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ جَعَلۡنٰهُ نُطۡفَةً فِيۡ قَرَارٍ مَّكِيۡنٍࣕ‏
quran.english: Then We placed him as a sperm-drop in a firm lodging

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ خَلَقۡنَا النُّطۡفَةَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقۡنَا الۡعَلَقَةَ مُضۡغَةً فَخَلَقۡنَا الۡمُضۡغَةَ عِظٰمًا فَكَسَوۡنَا الۡعِظٰمَ لَحۡمًاࣗ ثُمَّ اَنۡشَاۡنٰهُ خَلۡقًا اٰخَرَؕ فَتَبٰرَكَ اللّٰهُ اَحۡسَنُ الۡخٰلِقِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then We made the sperm-drop into a clinging clot, and We made the clot into a lump [of flesh], and We made [from] the lump, bones, and We covered the bones with flesh; then We developed him into another creation. So blessed is Allah, the best of creators

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّكُمۡ بَعۡدَ ذٰلِكَ لَمَيِّتُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then indeed, after that you are to die

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّكُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ تُبۡعَثُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, will be resurrected

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا فَوۡقَكُمۡ سَبۡعَ طَرَآئِقَࣗۖ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ الۡخَلۡقِ غٰفِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡزَلۡنَا مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ بِقَدَرٍ فَاَسۡكَنّٰهُ فِي الۡاَرۡضِࣗۖ وَاِنَّا عَلٰي ذَهَابٍۭ بِهٖ لَقٰدِرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth. And indeed, We are Able to take it away

quran.arabic: فَاَنۡشَاۡنَا لَكُمۡ بِهٖ جَنّٰتٍ مِّنۡ نَّخِيۡلٍ وَّاَعۡنَابٍۘ لَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا فَوَاكِهُ كَثِيۡرَةٌ وَّمِنۡهَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat

quran.arabic: وَشَجَرَةً تَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ طُوۡرِ سَيۡنَآءَ تَنۭۡ بُتُ بِالدُّهۡنِ وَصِبۡغٍ لِّلۡاٰكِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [We brought forth] a tree issuing from Mount Sinai which produces oil and food for those who eat

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ لَكُمۡ فِي الۡاَنۡعَامِ لَعِبۡرَةًؕ نُسۡقِيۡكُمۡ مِّمَّا فِيۡ بُطُوۡنِهَا وَلَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَنَافِعُ كَثِيۡرَةٌ وَّمِنۡهَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, for you in livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from that which is in their bellies, and for you in them are numerous benefits, and from them you eat

quran.arabic: وَعَلَيۡهَا وَعَلَي الۡفُلۡكِ تُحۡمَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And upon them and on ships you are carried

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوۡحًا اِلٰي قَوۡمِهٖ فَقَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ مَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اِلٰهٍ غَيۡرُهٗؕ اَفَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him

quran.arabic: فَقَالَ الۡمَلَؤُا الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ قَوۡمِهٖ مَا هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُكُمۡۙ يُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ يَّتَفَضَّلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡؕ وَلَوۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ لَاَنۡزَلَ مَلٰٓئِكَةًۚۖ مَّا سَمِعۡنَا بِهٰذَا فِيۡ٘ اٰبَآئِنَا الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: But the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, "This is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you; and if Allah had willed [to send a messenger], He would have sent down angels. We have not heard of this among our forefathers

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا رَجُلٌۭ بِهٖ جِنَّةٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوۡا بِهٖ حَتّٰي حِيۡنٍ
quran.english: He is not but a man possessed with madness, so wait concerning him for a time

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ انۡصُرۡنِيۡ بِمَا كَذَّبُوۡنِ
quran.english: [Noah] said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me

quran.arabic: فَاَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِ اَنِ اصۡنَعِ الۡفُلۡكَ بِاَعۡيُنِنَا وَوَحۡيِنَا فَاِذَا جَآءَ اَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ التَّنُّوۡرُۙ فَاسۡلُكۡ فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلٍّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ اثۡنَيۡنِ وَاَهۡلَكَ اِلَّا مَنۡ سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ الۡقَوۡلُ مِنۡهُمۡۚ وَلَا تُخَاطِبۡنِيۡ فِي الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡاۚ اِنَّهُمۡ مُّغۡرَقُوۡنَ
quran.english: So We inspired to him, "Construct the ship under Our observation, and Our inspiration, and when Our command comes and the oven overflows, put into the ship from each [creature] two mates and your family, except those for whom the decree [of destruction] has proceeded. And do not address Me concerning those who have wronged; indeed, they are to be drowned

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا اسۡتَوَيۡتَ اَنۡتَ وَمَنۡ مَّعَكَ عَلَي الۡفُلۡكِ فَقُلِ الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ نَجّٰىنَا مِنَ الۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when you have boarded the ship, you and those with you, then say, 'Praise to Allah who has saved us from the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ رَّبِّ اَنۡزِلۡنِيۡ مُنۡزَلًا مُّبٰرَكًا وَّاَنۡتَ خَيۡرُ الۡمُنۡزِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And say, 'My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, and You are the best to accommodate [us]

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ وَّاِنۡ كُنَّا لَمُبۡتَلِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed in that are signs, and indeed, We are ever testing [Our servants]

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَنۡشَاۡنَا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡ قَرۡنًا اٰخَرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Then We produced after them a generation of others

quran.arabic: فَاَرۡسَلۡنَا فِيۡهِمۡ رَسُوۡلًا مِّنۡهُمۡ اَنِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ مَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اِلٰهٍ غَيۡرُهٗؕ اَفَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We sent among them a messenger from themselves, [saying], "Worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الۡمَلَاُ مِنۡ قَوۡمِهِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَكَذَّبُوۡا بِلِقَآءِ الۡاٰخِرَةِ وَاَتۡرَفۡنٰهُمۡ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاۙ مَا هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُكُمۡۙ يَاۡكُلُ مِمَّا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَ مِنۡهُ وَيَشۡرَبُ مِمَّا تَشۡرَبُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And the eminent among his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter while We had given them luxury in the worldly life said, "This is not but a man like yourselves. He eats of that from which you eat and drinks of what you drink

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ اَطَعۡتُمۡ بَشَرًا مِّثۡلَكُمۡۙ اِنَّكُمۡ اِذًا لَّخٰسِرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And if you should obey a man like yourselves, indeed, you would then be losers

quran.arabic: اَيَعِدُكُمۡ اَنَّكُمۡ اِذَا مِتُّمۡ وَكُنۡتُمۡ تُرَابًا وَّعِظَامًا اَنَّكُمۡ مُّخۡرَجُوۡنَࣕۙ‏
quran.english: Does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones that you will be brought forth [once more]

quran.arabic: هَيۡهَاتَ هَيۡهَاتَ لِمَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَࣕۙ‏
quran.english: How far, how far, is that which you are promised

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هِيَ اِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا الدُّنۡيَا نَمُوۡتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَبۡعُوۡثِيۡنَࣕۙ‏
quran.english: Life is not but our worldly life - we die and live, but we will not be resurrected

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا رَجُلُ اِۨفۡتَرٰي عَلَي اللّٰهِ كَذِبًا وَّمَا نَحۡنُ لَهٗ بِمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allah, and we will not believe him

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ انۡصُرۡنِيۡ بِمَا كَذَّبُوۡنِ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me

quran.arabic: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيۡلٍ لَّيُصۡبِحُنَّ نٰدِمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [Allah] said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful

quran.arabic: فَاَخَذَتۡهُمُ الصَّيۡحَةُ بِالۡحَقِّ فَجَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ غُثَآءًۚ فَبُعۡدًا لِّلۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: So the shriek seized them in truth, and We made them as [plant] stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَنۡشَاۡنَا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡ قُرُوۡنًا اٰخَرِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then We produced after them other generations

quran.arabic: مَا تَسۡبِقُ مِنۡ اُمَّةٍ اَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسۡتَاۡخِرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter]

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتۡرَاؕ كُلَّمَا جَآءَ اُمَّةً رَّسُوۡلُهَا كَذَّبُوۡهُ فَاَتۡبَعۡنَا بَعۡضَهُمۡ بَعۡضًا وَّجَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ اَحَادِيۡثَۚ فَبُعۡدًا لِّقَوۡمٍ لَّا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another [to destruction], and We made them narrations. So away with a people who do not believe

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مُوۡسٰي وَاَخَاهُ هٰرُوۡنَ ࣢ۙ بِاٰيٰتِنَا وَسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority

quran.arabic: اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَا۠ئِهٖ فَاسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡا وَكَانُوۡا قَوۡمًا عَالِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people

quran.arabic: فَقَالُوۡ٘ا اَنُؤۡمِنُ لِبَشَرَيۡنِ مِثۡلِنَا وَقَوۡمُهُمَا لَنَا عٰبِدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude

quran.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوۡهُمَا فَكَانُوۡا مِنَ الۡمُهۡلَكِيۡنَ
quran.english: So they denied them and were of those destroyed

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسَي الۡكِتٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا ابۡنَ مَرۡيَمَ وَاُمَّهٗ٘ اٰيَةً وَّاٰوَيۡنٰهُمَا٘ اِلٰي رَبۡوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَّمَعِيۡنٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الرُّسُلُ كُلُوۡا مِنَ الطَّيِّبٰتِ وَاعۡمَلُوۡا صَالِحًاؕ اِنِّيۡ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ عَلِيۡمٌؕ‏
quran.english: [Allah said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed, I, of what you do, am Knowing

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ هٰذِهٖ٘ اُمَّتُكُمۡ اُمَّةً وَّاحِدَةً وَّاَنَا رَبُّكُمۡ فَاتَّقُوۡنِ
quran.english: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me

quran.arabic: فَتَقَطَّعُوۡ٘ا اَمۡرَهُمۡ بَيۡنَهُمۡ زُبُرًاؕ كُلُّ حِزۡبٍۭ بِمَا لَدَيۡهِمۡ فَرِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: But the people divided their religion among them into sects - each faction, in what it has, rejoicing

quran.arabic: فَذَرۡهُمۡ فِيۡ غَمۡرَتِهِمۡ حَتّٰي حِيۡنٍ
quran.english: So leave them in their confusion for a time

quran.arabic: اَيَحۡسَبُوۡنَ اَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُمۡ بِهٖ مِنۡ مَّالٍ وَّبَنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children

quran.arabic: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمۡ فِي الۡخَيۡرٰتِؕ بَلۡ لَّا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ مِّنۡ خَشۡيَةِ رَبِّهِمۡ مُّشۡفِقُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ بِاٰيٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ بِرَبِّهِمۡ لَا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يُؤۡتُوۡنَ مَا٘ اٰتَوۡا وَّقُلُوۡبُهُمۡ وَجِلَةٌ اَنَّهُمۡ اِلٰي رَبِّهِمۡ رٰجِعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ يُسٰرِعُوۡنَ فِي الۡخَيۡرٰتِ وَهُمۡ لَهَا سٰبِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein

quran.arabic: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفۡسًا اِلَّا وُسۡعَهَا وَلَدَيۡنَا كِتٰبٌ يَّنۡطِقُ بِالۡحَقِّ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged

quran.arabic: بَلۡ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡ فِيۡ غَمۡرَةٍ مِّنۡ هٰذَا وَلَهُمۡ اَعۡمَالٌ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ ذٰلِكَ هُمۡ لَهَا عٰمِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides disbelief which they are doing

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا٘ اَخَذۡنَا مُتۡرَفِيۡهِمۡ بِالۡعَذَابِ اِذَا هُمۡ يَجۡـَٔرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allah] for help

quran.arabic: لَا تَجۡـَٔرُوا الۡيَوۡمَࣞ اِنَّكُمۡ مِّنَّا لَا تُنۡصَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do not cry out today. Indeed, by Us you will not be helped

quran.arabic: قَدۡ كَانَتۡ اٰيٰتِيۡ تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَكُنۡتُمۡ عَلٰ٘ي اَعۡقَابِكُمۡ تَنۡكِصُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels

quran.arabic: مُسۡتَكۡبِرِيۡنَࣗۚۖ بِهٖ سٰمِرًا تَهۡجُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: In arrogance regarding it, conversing by night, speaking evil

quran.arabic: اَفَلَمۡ يَدَّبَّرُوا الۡقَوۡلَ اَمۡ جَآءَهُمۡ مَّا لَمۡ يَاۡتِ اٰبَآءَهُمُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: Then have they not reflected over the Qur'an, or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَمۡ يَعۡرِفُوۡا رَسُوۡلَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ لَهٗ مُنۡكِرُوۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ بِهٖ جِنَّةٌؕ بَلۡ جَآءَهُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّ وَاَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لِلۡحَقِّ كٰرِهُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or do they say, "In him is madness?" Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse

quran.arabic: وَلَوِ اتَّبَعَ الۡحَقُّ اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ لَفَسَدَتِ السَّمٰوٰتُ وَالۡاَرۡضُ وَمَنۡ فِيۡهِنَّؕ بَلۡ اَتَيۡنٰهُمۡ بِذِكۡرِهِمۡ فَهُمۡ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِهِمۡ مُّعۡرِضُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: But if the Truth had followed their inclinations, the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined. Rather, We have brought them their message, but they, from their message, are turning away

quran.arabic: اَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ خَرۡجًا فَخَرَاجُ رَبِّكَ خَيۡرٌࣗۖ وَّهُوَ خَيۡرُ الرّٰزِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask them for payment? But the reward of your Lord is best, and He is the best of providers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّكَ لَتَدۡعُوۡهُمۡ اِلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And indeed, you invite them to a straight path

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ لَنٰكِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: But indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from the path

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ رَحِمۡنٰهُمۡ وَكَشَفۡنَا مَا بِهِمۡ مِّنۡ ضُرٍّ لَّلَجُّوۡا فِيۡ طُغۡيَانِهِمۡ يَعۡمَهُوۡنَ
quran.english: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَخَذۡنٰهُمۡ بِالۡعَذَابِ فَمَا اسۡتَكَانُوۡا لِرَبِّهِمۡ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا فَتَحۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ بَابًا ذَا عَذَابٍ شَدِيۡدٍ اِذَا هُمۡ فِيۡهِ مُبۡلِسُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Until when We have opened before them a door of severe punishment, immediately they will be therein in despair

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡشَاَ لَكُمُ السَّمۡعَ وَالۡاَبۡصَارَ وَالۡاَفۡـِٕدَةَؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it is He who produced for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ ذَرَاَكُمۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَاِلَيۡهِ تُحۡشَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ يُحۡيٖ وَيُمِيۡتُ وَلَهُ اخۡتِلَافُ الَّيۡلِ وَالنَّهَارِؕ اَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it is He who gives life and causes death, and His is the alternation of the night and the day. Then will you not reason

quran.arabic: بَلۡ قَالُوۡا مِثۡلَ مَا قَالَ الۡاَوَّلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, they say like what the former peoples said

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا ءَاِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَّعِظَامًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوۡثُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ وُعِدۡنَا نَحۡنُ وَاٰبَآؤُنَا هٰذَا مِنۡ قَبۡلُ اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا٘ اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before; this is not but legends of the former peoples

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لِّمَنِ الۡاَرۡضُ وَمَنۡ فِيۡهَا٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "To whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it, if you should know

quran.arabic: سَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ لِلّٰهِؕ قُلۡ اَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: They will say, "To Allah." Say, "Then will you not remember

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَنۡ رَّبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ السَّبۡعِ وَرَبُّ الۡعَرۡشِ الۡعَظِيۡمِ
quran.english: Say, "Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Great Throne

quran.arabic: سَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ لِلّٰهِؕ قُلۡ اَفَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: They will say, "[They belong] to Allah." Say, "Then will you not fear Him

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَنۭۡ بِيَدِهٖ مَلَكُوۡتُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ وَّهُوَ يُجِيۡرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيۡهِ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "In whose hand is the realm of all things - and He protects while none can protect against Him - if you should know

quran.arabic: سَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ لِلّٰهِؕ قُلۡ فَاَنّٰي تُسۡحَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: They will say, "[All belongs] to Allah." Say, "Then how are you deluded

quran.arabic: بَلۡ اَتَيۡنٰهُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّ وَاِنَّهُمۡ لَكٰذِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and indeed they are liars

quran.arabic: مَا اتَّخَذَ اللّٰهُ مِنۡ وَّلَدٍ وَّمَا كَانَ مَعَهٗ مِنۡ اِلٰهٍ اِذًا لَّذَهَبَ كُلُّ اِلٰهٍۭ بِمَا خَلَقَ وَلَعَلَا بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍؕ سُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Allah has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. [If there had been], then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have sought to overcome others. Exalted is Allah above what they describe [concerning Him]

quran.arabic: عٰلِمِ الۡغَيۡبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَتَعٰلٰي عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, so high is He above what they associate [with Him]

quran.arabic: قُلۡ رَّبِّ اِمَّا تُرِيَنِّيۡ مَا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "My Lord, if You should show me that which they are promised

quran.arabic: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجۡعَلۡنِيۡ فِي الۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: My Lord, then do not place me among the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّا عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ نُّرِيَكَ مَا نَعِدُهُمۡ لَقٰدِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, We are able to show you what We have promised them

quran.arabic: اِدۡفَعۡ بِالَّتِيۡ هِيَ اَحۡسَنُ السَّيِّئَةَؕ نَحۡنُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَصِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: Repel, by [means of] what is best, [their] evil. We are most knowing of what they describe

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ رَّبِّ اَعُوۡذُ بِكَ مِنۡ هَمَزٰتِ الشَّيٰطِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And say, "My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils

quran.arabic: وَاَعُوۡذُ بِكَ رَبِّ اَنۡ يَّحۡضُرُوۡنِ
quran.english: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا جَآءَ اَحَدَهُمُ الۡمَوۡتُ قَالَ رَبِّ ارۡجِعُوۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: [For such is the state of the disbelievers], until, when death comes to one of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back

quran.arabic: لَعَلِّيۡ٘ اَعۡمَلُ صَالِحًا فِيۡمَا تَرَكۡتُ كَلَّاؕ اِنَّهَا كَلِمَةٌ هُوَ قَآئِلُهَاؕ وَمِنۡ وَّرَآئِهِمۡ بَرۡزَخٌ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُوۡنَ
quran.english: That I might do righteousness in that which I left behind." No! It is only a word he is saying; and behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا نُفِخَ فِي الصُّوۡرِ فَلَا٘ اَنۡسَابَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٍ وَّلَا يَتَسَآءَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: So when the Horn is blown, no relationship will there be among them that Day, nor will they ask about one another

quran.arabic: فَمَنۡ ثَقُلَتۡ مَوَازِيۡنُهٗ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡمُفۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And those whose scales are heavy [with good deeds] - it is they who are the successful

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ خَفَّتۡ مَوَازِيۡنُهٗ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ خَسِرُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ فِيۡ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: But those whose scales are light - those are the ones who have lost their souls, [being] in Hell, abiding eternally

quran.arabic: تَلۡفَحُ وُجُوۡهَهُمُ النَّارُ وَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا كٰلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: The Fire will sear their faces, and they therein will have taut smiles

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَكُنۡ اٰيٰتِيۡ تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَكُنۡتُمۡ بِهَا تُكَذِّبُوۡنَ
quran.english: [It will be said]. "Were not My verses recited to you and you used to deny them

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا غَلَبَتۡ عَلَيۡنَا شِقۡوَتُنَا وَكُنَّا قَوۡمًا ضَآلِّيۡنَ
quran.english: They will say, "Our Lord, our wretchedness overcame us, and we were a people astray

quran.arabic: رَبَّنَا٘ اَخۡرِجۡنَا مِنۡهَا فَاِنۡ عُدۡنَا فَاِنَّا ظٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Our Lord, remove us from it, and if we were to return [to evil], we would indeed be wrongdoers

quran.arabic: قَالَ اخۡسَـُٔوۡا فِيۡهَا وَلَا تُكَلِّمُوۡنِ
quran.english: He will say, "Remain despised therein and do not speak to Me

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ كَانَ فَرِيۡقٌ مِّنۡ عِبَادِيۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ رَبَّنَا٘ اٰمَنَّا فَاغۡفِرۡ لَنَا وَارۡحَمۡنَا وَاَنۡتَ خَيۡرُ الرّٰحِمِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, there was a party of My servants who said, 'Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful

quran.arabic: فَاتَّخَذۡتُمُوۡهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّا حَتّٰ٘ي اَنۡسَوۡكُمۡ ذِكۡرِيۡ وَكُنۡتُمۡ مِّنۡهُمۡ تَضۡحَكُوۡنَ
quran.english: But you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ جَزَيۡتُهُمُ الۡيَوۡمَ بِمَا صَبَرُوۡ٘اۙ اَنَّهُمۡ هُمُ الۡفَآئِزُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - that they are the attainers [of success]

quran.arabic: قٰلَ كَمۡ لَبِثۡتُمۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ عَدَدَ سِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Allah] will say, "How long did you remain on earth in number of years

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَبِثۡنَا يَوۡمًا اَوۡ بَعۡضَ يَوۡمٍ فَسۡـَٔلِ الۡعَآدِّيۡنَ
quran.english: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate

quran.arabic: قٰلَ اِنۡ لَّبِثۡتُمۡ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا لَّوۡ اَنَّكُمۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known

quran.arabic: اَفَحَسِبۡتُمۡ اَنَّمَا خَلَقۡنٰكُمۡ عَبَثًا وَّاَنَّكُمۡ اِلَيۡنَا لَا تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned

quran.arabic: فَتَعٰلَي اللّٰهُ الۡمَلِكُ الۡحَقُّۚ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَۚ رَبُّ الۡعَرۡشِ الۡكَرِيۡمِ
quran.english: So exalted is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّدۡعُ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَۙ لَا بُرۡهَانَ لَهٗ بِهٖۙ فَاِنَّمَا حِسَابُهٗ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهٖؕ اِنَّهٗ لَا يُفۡلِحُ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And whoever invokes besides Allah another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ رَّبِّ اغۡفِرۡ وَارۡحَمۡ وَاَنۡتَ خَيۡرُ الرّٰحِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And, [O Muhammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful

quran.arabic: سُوۡرَةٌ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهَا وَفَرَضۡنٰهَا وَاَنۡزَلۡنَا فِيۡهَا٘ اٰيٰتٍۭ بَيِّنٰتٍ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: [This is] a surah which We have sent down and made [that within it] obligatory and revealed therein verses of clear evidence that you might remember

quran.arabic: اَلزَّانِيَةُ وَالزَّانِيۡ فَاجۡلِدُوۡا كُلَّ وَاحِدٍ مِّنۡهُمَا مِائَةَ جَلۡدَةٍࣕ وَّلَا تَاۡخُذۡكُمۡ بِهِمَا رَاۡفَةٌ فِيۡ دِيۡنِ اللّٰهِ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِاللّٰهِ وَالۡيَوۡمِ الۡاٰخِرِۚ وَلۡيَشۡهَدۡ عَذَابَهُمَا طَآئِفَةٌ مِّنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: The [unmarried] woman or [unmarried] man found guilty of sexual intercourse - lash each one of them with a hundred lashes, and do not be taken by pity for them in the religion of Allah, if you should believe in Allah and the Last Day. And let a group of the believers witness their punishment

quran.arabic: اَلزَّانِيۡ لَا يَنۡكِحُ اِلَّا زَانِيَةً اَوۡ مُشۡرِكَةًؗ وَّالزَّانِيَةُ لَا يَنۡكِحُهَا٘ اِلَّا زَانٍ اَوۡ مُشۡرِكٌۚ وَحُرِّمَ ذٰلِكَ عَلَي الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: The fornicator does not marry except a [female] fornicator or polytheist, and none marries her except a fornicator or a polytheist, and that has been made unlawful to the believers

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَرۡمُوۡنَ الۡمُحۡصَنٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَاۡتُوۡا بِاَرۡبَعَةِ شُهَدَآءَ فَاجۡلِدُوۡهُمۡ ثَمٰنِيۡنَ جَلۡدَةً وَّلَا تَقۡبَلُوۡا لَهُمۡ شَهَادَةً اَبَدًاۚ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡفٰسِقُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And those who accuse chaste women and then do not produce four witnesses - lash them with eighty lashes and do not accept from them testimony ever after. And those are the defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ تَابُوۡا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ ذٰلِكَ وَاَصۡلَحُوۡاۚ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Except for those who repent thereafter and reform, for indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَرۡمُوۡنَ اَزۡوَاجَهُمۡ وَلَمۡ يَكُنۡ لَّهُمۡ شُهَدَآءُ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡفُسُهُمۡ فَشَهَادَةُ اَحَدِهِمۡ اَرۡبَعُ شَهٰدٰتٍۭ بِاللّٰهِۙ اِنَّهٗ لَمِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And those who accuse their wives [of adultery] and have no witnesses except themselves - then the witness of one of them [shall be] four testimonies [swearing] by Allah that indeed, he is of the truthful

quran.arabic: وَالۡخَامِسَةُ اَنَّ لَعۡنَتَ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡهِ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنَ الۡكٰذِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And the fifth [oath will be] that the curse of Allah be upon him if he should be among the liars

quran.arabic: وَيَدۡرَؤُا عَنۡهَا الۡعَذَابَ اَنۡ تَشۡهَدَ اَرۡبَعَ شَهٰدٰتٍۭ بِاللّٰهِۙ اِنَّهٗ لَمِنَ الۡكٰذِبِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: But it will prevent punishment from her if she gives four testimonies [swearing] by Allah that indeed, he is of the liars

quran.arabic: وَالۡخَامِسَةَ اَنَّ غَضَبَ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡهَا٘ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And the fifth [oath will be] that the wrath of Allah be upon her if he was of the truthful

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا فَضۡلُ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَرَحۡمَتُهٗ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ تَوَّابٌ حَكِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And if not for the favor of Allah upon you and His mercy... and because Allah is Accepting of repentance and Wise

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ جَآءُوۡ بِالۡاِفۡكِ عُصۡبَةٌ مِّنۡكُمۡؕ لَا تَحۡسَبُوۡهُ شَرًّا لَّكُمۡؕ بَلۡ هُوَ خَيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡؕ لِكُلِّ امۡرِئٍ مِّنۡهُمۡ مَّا اكۡتَسَبَ مِنَ الۡاِثۡمِۚ وَالَّذِيۡ تَوَلّٰي كِبۡرَهٗ مِنۡهُمۡ لَهٗ عَذَابٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Indeed, those who came with falsehood are a group among you. Do not think it bad for you; rather it is good for you. For every person among them is what [punishment] he has earned from the sin, and he who took upon himself the greater portion thereof - for him is a great punishment

quran.arabic: لَوۡلَا٘ اِذۡ سَمِعۡتُمُوۡهُ ظَنَّ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتُ بِاَنۡفُسِهِمۡ خَيۡرًاۙ وَّقَالُوۡا هٰذَا٘ اِفۡكٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: Why, when you heard it, did not the believing men and believing women think good of one another and say, "This is an obvious falsehood

quran.arabic: لَوۡلَا جَآءُوۡ عَلَيۡهِ بِاَرۡبَعَةِ شُهَدَآءَۚ فَاِذۡ لَمۡ يَاۡتُوۡا بِالشُّهَدَآءِ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ هُمُ الۡكٰذِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Why did they [who slandered] not produce for it four witnesses? And when they do not produce the witnesses, then it is they, in the sight of Allah, who are the liars

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا فَضۡلُ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَرَحۡمَتُهٗ فِي الدُّنۡيَا وَالۡاٰخِرَةِ لَمَسَّكُمۡ فِيۡ مَا٘ اَفَضۡتُمۡ فِيۡهِ عَذَابٌ عَظِيۡمٌۚ‏
quran.english: And if it had not been for the favor of Allah upon you and His mercy in this world and the Hereafter, you would have been touched for that [lie] in which you were involved by a great punishment

quran.arabic: اِذۡ تَلَقَّوۡنَهٗ بِاَلۡسِنَتِكُمۡ وَتَقُوۡلُوۡنَ بِاَفۡوَاهِكُمۡ مَّا لَيۡسَ لَكُمۡ بِهٖ عِلۡمٌ وَّتَحۡسَبُوۡنَهٗ هَيِّنًاࣗۖ وَّهُوَ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: When you received it with your tongues and said with your mouths that of which you had no knowledge and thought it was insignificant while it was, in the sight of Allah, tremendous

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا٘ اِذۡ سَمِعۡتُمُوۡهُ قُلۡتُمۡ مَّا يَكُوۡنُ لَنَا٘ اَنۡ نَّتَكَلَّمَ بِهٰذَاࣗۖ سُبۡحٰنَكَ هٰذَا بُهۡتَانٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And why, when you heard it, did you not say, "It is not for us to speak of this. Exalted are You, [O Allah]; this is a great slander

quran.arabic: يَعِظُكُمُ اللّٰهُ اَنۡ تَعُوۡدُوۡا لِمِثۡلِهٖ٘ اَبَدًا اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Allah warns you against returning to the likes of this [conduct], ever, if you should be believers

quran.arabic: وَيُبَيِّنُ اللّٰهُ لَكُمُ الۡاٰيٰتِؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌ حَكِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And Allah makes clear to you the verses, and Allah is Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُحِبُّوۡنَ اَنۡ تَشِيۡعَ الۡفَاحِشَةُ فِي الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌۙ فِي الدُّنۡيَا وَالۡاٰخِرَةِؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ وَاَنۡتُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, those who like that immorality should be spread [or publicized] among those who have believed will have a painful punishment in this world and the Hereafter. And Allah knows and you do not know

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا فَضۡلُ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَرَحۡمَتُهٗ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ رَءُوۡفٌ رَّحِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And if it had not been for the favor of Allah upon you and His mercy... and because Allah is Kind and Merciful

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تَتَّبِعُوۡا خُطُوٰتِ الشَّيۡطٰنِؕ وَمَنۡ يَّتَّبِعۡ خُطُوٰتِ الشَّيۡطٰنِ فَاِنَّهٗ يَاۡمُرُ بِالۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَالۡمُنۡكَرِؕ وَلَوۡلَا فَضۡلُ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَرَحۡمَتُهٗ مَا زَكٰي مِنۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَحَدٍ اَبَدًاۙ وَّلٰكِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُزَكِّيۡ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَاللّٰهُ سَمِيۡعٌ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, do not follow the footsteps of Satan. And whoever follows the footsteps of Satan - indeed, he enjoins immorality and wrongdoing. And if not for the favor of Allah upon you and His mercy, not one of you would have been pure, ever, but Allah purifies whom He wills, and Allah is Hearing and Knowing

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَاۡتَلِ اُولُوا الۡفَضۡلِ مِنۡكُمۡ وَالسَّعَةِ اَنۡ يُّؤۡتُوۡ٘ا اُولِي الۡقُرۡبٰي وَالۡمَسٰكِيۡنَ وَالۡمُهٰجِرِيۡنَ فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِࣕۖ وَلۡيَعۡفُوۡا وَلۡيَصۡفَحُوۡاؕ اَلَا تُحِبُّوۡنَ اَنۡ يَّغۡفِرَ اللّٰهُ لَكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And let not those of virtue among you and wealth swear not to give [aid] to their relatives and the needy and the emigrants for the cause of Allah, and let them pardon and overlook. Would you not like that Allah should forgive you? And Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يَرۡمُوۡنَ الۡمُحۡصَنٰتِ الۡغٰفِلٰتِ الۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ لُعِنُوۡا فِي الدُّنۡيَا وَالۡاٰخِرَةِࣕ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ عَظِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who [falsely] accuse chaste, unaware and believing women are cursed in this world and the Hereafter; and they will have a great punishment

quran.arabic: يَّوۡمَ تَشۡهَدُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ اَلۡسِنَتُهُمۡ وَاَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَاَرۡجُلُهُمۡ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: On a Day when their tongues, their hands and their feet will bear witness against them as to what they used to do

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَئِذٍ يُّوَفِّيۡهِمُ اللّٰهُ دِيۡنَهُمُ الۡحَقَّ وَيَعۡلَمُوۡنَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡحَقُّ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: That Day, Allah will pay them in full their deserved recompense, and they will know that it is Allah who is the perfect in justice

quran.arabic: اَلۡخَبِيۡثٰتُ لِلۡخَبِيۡثِيۡنَ وَالۡخَبِيۡثُوۡنَ لِلۡخَبِيۡثٰتِۚ وَالطَّيِّبٰتُ لِلطَّيِّبِيۡنَ وَالطَّيِّبُوۡنَ لِلطَّيِّبٰتِۚ اُولٰٓئِكَ مُبَرَّءُوۡنَ مِمَّا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَؕ لَهُمۡ مَّغۡفِرَةٌ وَّرِزۡقٌ كَرِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Evil words are for evil men, and evil men are [subjected] to evil words. And good words are for good men, and good men are [an object] of good words. Those [good people] are declared innocent of what the slanderers say. For them is forgiveness and noble provision

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تَدۡخُلُوۡا بُيُوۡتًا غَيۡرَ بُيُوۡتِكُمۡ حَتّٰي تَسۡتَاۡنِسُوۡا وَتُسَلِّمُوۡا عَلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِهَاؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ خَيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, do not enter houses other than your own houses until you ascertain welcome and greet their inhabitants. That is best for you; perhaps you will be reminded

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ لَّمۡ تَجِدُوۡا فِيۡهَا٘ اَحَدًا فَلَا تَدۡخُلُوۡهَا حَتّٰي يُؤۡذَنَ لَكُمۡۚ وَاِنۡ قِيۡلَ لَكُمُ ارۡجِعُوۡا فَارۡجِعُوۡا هُوَ اَزۡكٰي لَكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And if you do not find anyone therein, do not enter them until permission has been given you. And if it is said to you, "Go back," then go back; it is purer for you. And Allah is Knowing of what you do

quran.arabic: لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ جُنَاحٌ اَنۡ تَدۡخُلُوۡا بُيُوۡتًا غَيۡرَ مَسۡكُوۡنَةٍ فِيۡهَا مَتَاعٌ لَّكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تُبۡدُوۡنَ وَمَا تَكۡتُمُوۡنَ
quran.english: There is no blame upon you for entering houses not inhabited in which there is convenience for you. And Allah knows what you reveal and what you conceal

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ يَغُضُّوۡا مِنۡ اَبۡصَارِهِمۡ وَيَحۡفَظُوۡا فُرُوۡجَهُمۡؕ ذٰلِكَ اَزۡكٰي لَهُمۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ خَبِيۡرٌۭ بِمَا يَصۡنَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Tell the believing men to reduce [some] of their vision and guard their private parts. That is purer for them. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what they do

quran.arabic: وَقُلۡ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ يَغۡضُضۡنَ مِنۡ اَبۡصَارِهِنَّ وَيَحۡفَظۡنَ فُرُوۡجَهُنَّ وَلَا يُبۡدِيۡنَ زِيۡنَتَهُنَّ اِلَّا مَا ظَهَرَ مِنۡهَا وَلۡيَضۡرِبۡنَ بِخُمُرِهِنَّ عَلٰي جُيُوۡبِهِنَّࣕ وَلَا يُبۡدِيۡنَ زِيۡنَتَهُنَّ اِلَّا لِبُعُوۡلَتِهِنَّ اَوۡ اٰبَآئِهِنَّ اَوۡ اٰبَآءِ بُعُوۡلَتِهِنَّ اَوۡ اَبۡنَآئِهِنَّ اَوۡ اَبۡنَآءِ بُعُوۡلَتِهِنَّ اَوۡ اِخۡوَانِهِنَّ اَوۡ بَنِيۡ٘ اِخۡوَانِهِنَّ اَوۡ بَنِيۡ٘ اَخَوٰتِهِنَّ اَوۡ نِسَآئِهِنَّ اَوۡ مَا مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُهُنَّ اَوِ التّٰبِعِيۡنَ غَيۡرِ اُولِي الۡاِرۡبَةِ مِنَ الرِّجَالِ اَوِ الطِّفۡلِ الَّذِيۡنَ لَمۡ يَظۡهَرُوۡا عَلٰي عَوۡرٰتِ النِّسَآءِࣕ وَلَا يَضۡرِبۡنَ بِاَرۡجُلِهِنَّ لِيُعۡلَمَ مَا يُخۡفِيۡنَ مِنۡ زِيۡنَتِهِنَّؕ وَتُوۡبُوۡ٘ا اِلَي اللّٰهِ جَمِيۡعًا اَيُّهَ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُفۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And tell the believing women to reduce [some] of their vision and guard their private parts and not expose their adornment except that which [necessarily] appears thereof and to wrap [a portion of] their headcovers over their chests and not expose their adornment except to their husbands, their fathers, their husbands' fathers, their sons, their husbands' sons, their brothers, their brothers' sons, their sisters' sons, their women, that which their right hands possess, or those male attendants having no physical desire, or children who are not yet aware of the private aspects of women. And let them not stamp their feet to make known what they conceal of their adornment. And turn to Allah in repentance, all of you, O believers, that you might succeed

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡكِحُوا الۡاَيَامٰي مِنۡكُمۡ وَالصّٰلِحِيۡنَ مِنۡ عِبَادِكُمۡ وَاِمَآئِكُمۡؕ اِنۡ يَّكُوۡنُوۡا فُقَرَآءَ يُغۡنِهِمُ اللّٰهُ مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖؕ وَاللّٰهُ وَاسِعٌ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And marry the unmarried among you and the righteous among your male slaves and female slaves. If they should be poor, Allah will enrich them from His bounty, and Allah is all-Encompassing and Knowing

quran.arabic: وَلۡيَسۡتَعۡفِفِ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَجِدُوۡنَ نِكَاحًا حَتّٰي يُغۡنِيَهُمُ اللّٰهُ مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَبۡتَغُوۡنَ الۡكِتٰبَ مِمَّا مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُكُمۡ فَكَاتِبُوۡهُمۡ اِنۡ عَلِمۡتُمۡ فِيۡهِمۡ خَيۡرًاࣗۖ وَّاٰتُوۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّالِ اللّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ٘ اٰتٰىكُمۡؕ وَلَا تُكۡرِهُوۡا فَتَيٰتِكُمۡ عَلَي الۡبِغَآءِ اِنۡ اَرَدۡنَ تَحَصُّنًا لِّتَبۡتَغُوۡا عَرَضَ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاؕ وَمَنۡ يُّكۡرِهۡهُّنَّ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ اِكۡرَاهِهِنَّ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: But let them who find not [the means for] marriage abstain [from sexual relations] until Allah enriches them from His bounty. And those who seek a contract [for eventual emancipation] from among whom your right hands possess - then make a contract with them if you know there is within them goodness and give them from the wealth of Allah which He has given you. And do not compel your slave girls to prostitution, if they desire chastity, to seek [thereby] the temporary interests of worldly life. And if someone should compel them, then indeed, Allah is [to them], after their compulsion, Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَنۡزَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكُمۡ اٰيٰتٍ مُّبَيِّنٰتٍ وَّمَثَلًا مِّنَ الَّذِيۡنَ خَلَوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكُمۡ وَمَوۡعِظَةً لِّلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We have certainly sent down to you distinct verses and examples from those who passed on before you and an admonition for those who fear Allah

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ نُوۡرُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ مَثَلُ نُوۡرِهٖ كَمِشۡكٰوةٍ فِيۡهَا مِصۡبَاحٌؕ اَلۡمِصۡبَاحُ فِيۡ زُجَاجَةٍؕ اَلزُّجَاجَةُ كَاَنَّهَا كَوۡكَبٌ دُرِّيٌّ يُّوۡقَدُ مِنۡ شَجَرَةٍ مُّبٰرَكَةٍ زَيۡتُوۡنَةٍ لَّا شَرۡقِيَّةٍ وَّلَا غَرۡبِيَّةٍۙ يَّكَادُ زَيۡتُهَا يُضِيۡٓءُ وَلَوۡ لَمۡ تَمۡسَسۡهُ نَارٌؕ نُوۡرٌ عَلٰي نُوۡرٍؕ يَهۡدِي اللّٰهُ لِنُوۡرِهٖ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَيَضۡرِبُ اللّٰهُ الۡاَمۡثَالَ لِلنَّاسِؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth. The example of His light is like a niche within which is a lamp, the lamp is within glass, the glass as if it were a pearly [white] star lit from [the oil of] a blessed olive tree, neither of the east nor of the west, whose oil would almost glow even if untouched by fire. Light upon light. Allah guides to His light whom He wills. And Allah presents examples for the people, and Allah is Knowing of all things

quran.arabic: فِيۡ بُيُوۡتٍ اَذِنَ اللّٰهُ اَنۡ تُرۡفَعَ وَيُذۡكَرَ فِيۡهَا اسۡمُهٗۙ يُسَبِّحُ لَهٗ فِيۡهَا بِالۡغُدُوِّ وَالۡاٰصَالِۙ‏
quran.english: [Such niches are] in mosques which Allah has ordered to be raised and that His name be mentioned therein; exalting Him within them in the morning and the evenings

quran.arabic: رِجَالٌۙ لَّا تُلۡهِيۡهِمۡ تِجَارَةٌ وَّلَا بَيۡعٌ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِ اللّٰهِ وَاِقَامِ الصَّلٰوةِ وَاِيۡتَآءِ الزَّكٰوةِࣕۙ يَخَافُوۡنَ يَوۡمًا تَتَقَلَّبُ فِيۡهِ الۡقُلُوۡبُ وَالۡاَبۡصَارُۙ‏
quran.english: [Are] men whom neither commerce nor sale distracts from the remembrance of Allah and performance of prayer and giving of zakah. They fear a Day in which the hearts and eyes will [fearfully] turn about

quran.arabic: لِيَجۡزِيَهُمُ اللّٰهُ اَحۡسَنَ مَا عَمِلُوۡا وَيَزِيۡدَهُمۡ مِّنۡ فَضۡلِهٖؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَرۡزُقُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٍ
quran.english: That Allah may reward them [according to] the best of what they did and increase them from His bounty. And Allah gives provision to whom He wills without account

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اَعۡمَالُهُمۡ كَسَرَابٍۭ بِقِيۡعَةٍ يَّحۡسَبُهُ الظَّمۡاٰنُ مَآءًؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا جَآءَهٗ لَمۡ يَجِدۡهُ شَيۡـًٔا وَّوَجَدَ اللّٰهَ عِنۡدَهٗ فَوَفّٰىهُ حِسَابَهٗؕ وَاللّٰهُ سَرِيۡعُ الۡحِسَابِۙ‏
quran.english: But those who disbelieved - their deeds are like a mirage in a lowland which a thirsty one thinks is water until, when he comes to it, he finds it is nothing but finds Allah before Him, and He will pay him in full his due; and Allah is swift in account

quran.arabic: اَوۡ كَظُلُمٰتٍ فِيۡ بَحۡرٍ لُّجِّيٍّ يَّغۡشٰىهُ مَوۡجٌ مِّنۡ فَوۡقِهٖ مَوۡجٌ مِّنۡ فَوۡقِهٖ سَحَابٌؕ ظُلُمٰتٌۭ بَعۡضُهَا فَوۡقَ بَعۡضٍؕ اِذَا٘ اَخۡرَجَ يَدَهٗ لَمۡ يَكَدۡ يَرٰىهَاؕ وَمَنۡ لَّمۡ يَجۡعَلِ اللّٰهُ لَهٗ نُوۡرًا فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ نُّوۡرٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Or [they are] like darknesses within an unfathomable sea which is covered by waves, upon which are waves, over which are clouds - darknesses, some of them upon others. When one puts out his hand [therein], he can hardly see it. And he to whom Allah has not granted light - for him there is no light

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يُسَبِّحُ لَهٗ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَالطَّيۡرُ صٰٓفّٰتٍؕ كُلٌّ قَدۡ عَلِمَ صَلَاتَهٗ وَتَسۡبِيۡحَهٗؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do you not see that Allah is exalted by whomever is within the heavens and the earth and [by] the birds with wings spread [in flight]? Each [of them] has known his [means of] prayer and exalting [Him], and Allah is Knowing of what they do

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِۚ وَاِلَي اللّٰهِ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and to Allah is the destination

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يُزۡجِيۡ سَحَابًا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهٗ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهٗ رُكَامًا فَتَرَي الۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلٰلِهٖۚ وَيُنَزِّلُ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مِنۡ جِبَالٍ فِيۡهَا مِنۭۡ بَرَدٍ فَيُصِيۡبُ بِهٖ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَصۡرِفُهٗ عَنۡ مَّنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرۡقِهٖ يَذۡهَبُ بِالۡاَبۡصَارِؕ‏
quran.english: Do you not see that Allah drives clouds? Then He brings them together, then He makes them into a mass, and you see the rain emerge from within it. And He sends down from the sky, mountains [of clouds] within which is hail, and He strikes with it whom He wills and averts it from whom He wills. The flash of its lightening almost takes away the eyesight

quran.arabic: يُقَلِّبُ اللّٰهُ الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةً لِّاُولِي الۡاَبۡصَارِ
quran.english: Allah alternates the night and the day. Indeed in that is a lesson for those who have vision

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ خَلَقَ كُلَّ دَآبَّةٍ مِّنۡ مَّآءٍۚ فَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ يَّمۡشِيۡ عَلٰي بَطۡنِهٖۚ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ يَّمۡشِيۡ عَلٰي رِجۡلَيۡنِۚ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ يَّمۡشِيۡ عَلٰ٘ي اَرۡبَعٍؕ يَخۡلُقُ اللّٰهُ مَا يَشَآءُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Allah has created every [living] creature from water. And of them are those that move on their bellies, and of them are those that walk on two legs, and of them are those that walk on four. Allah creates what He wills. Indeed, Allah is over all things competent

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ اَنۡزَلۡنَا٘ اٰيٰتٍ مُّبَيِّنٰتٍؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ اِلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: We have certainly sent down distinct verses. And Allah guides whom He wills to a straight path

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اٰمَنَّا بِاللّٰهِ وَبِالرَّسُوۡلِ وَاَطَعۡنَا ثُمَّ يَتَوَلّٰي فَرِيۡقٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِ ذٰلِكَؕ وَمَا٘ اُولٰٓئِكَ بِالۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: But the hypocrites say, "We have believed in Allah and in the Messenger, and we obey"; then a party of them turns away after that. And those are not believers

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا دُعُوۡ٘ا اِلَي اللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ لِيَحۡكُمَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ اِذَا فَرِيۡقٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ مُّعۡرِضُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when they are called to [the words of] Allah and His Messenger to judge between them, at once a party of them turns aside [in refusal]

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ يَّكُنۡ لَّهُمُ الۡحَقُّ يَاۡتُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهِ مُذۡعِنِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: But if the right is theirs, they come to him in prompt obedience

quran.arabic: اَفِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّرَضٌ اَمِ ارۡتَابُوۡ٘ا اَمۡ يَخَافُوۡنَ اَنۡ يَّحِيۡفَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَرَسُوۡلُهٗؕ بَلۡ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Is there disease in their hearts? Or have they doubted? Or do they fear that Allah will be unjust to them, or His Messenger? Rather, it is they who are the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا كَانَ قَوۡلَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ اِذَا دُعُوۡ٘ا اِلَي اللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ لِيَحۡكُمَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ اَنۡ يَّقُوۡلُوۡا سَمِعۡنَا وَاَطَعۡنَاؕ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡمُفۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: The only statement of the [true] believers when they are called to Allah and His Messenger to judge between them is that they say, "We hear and we obey." And those are the successful

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يُّطِعِ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ وَيَخۡشَ اللّٰهَ وَيَتَّقۡهِ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡفَآئِزُوۡنَ
quran.english: And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger and fears Allah and is conscious of Him - it is those who are the attainers

quran.arabic: وَاَقۡسَمُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ جَهۡدَ اَيۡمَانِهِمۡ لَئِنۡ اَمَرۡتَهُمۡ لَيَخۡرُجُنَّؕ قُلۡ لَّا تُقۡسِمُوۡاۚ طَاعَةٌ مَّعۡرُوۡفَةٌؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ خَبِيۡرٌۭ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they swear by Allah their strongest oaths that if you ordered them, they would go forth [in Allah 's cause]. Say, "Do not swear. [Such] obedience is known. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with that which you do

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَطِيۡعُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوا الرَّسُوۡلَۚ فَاِنۡ تَوَلَّوۡا فَاِنَّمَا عَلَيۡهِ مَا حُمِّلَ وَعَلَيۡكُمۡ مَّا حُمِّلۡتُمۡؕ وَاِنۡ تُطِيۡعُوۡهُ تَهۡتَدُوۡاؕ وَمَا عَلَي الرَّسُوۡلِ اِلَّا الۡبَلٰغُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: Say, "Obey Allah and obey the Messenger; but if you turn away - then upon him is only that [duty] with which he has been charged, and upon you is that with which you have been charged. And if you obey him, you will be [rightly] guided. And there is not upon the Messenger except the [responsibility for] clear notification

quran.arabic: وَعَدَ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مِنۡكُمۡ وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَيَسۡتَخۡلِفَنَّهُمۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ كَمَا اسۡتَخۡلَفَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡࣕ وَلَيُمَكِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ دِيۡنَهُمُ الَّذِي ارۡتَضٰي لَهُمۡ وَلَيُبَدِّلَنَّهُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِ خَوۡفِهِمۡ اَمۡنًاؕ يَعۡبُدُوۡنَنِيۡ لَا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ بِيۡ شَيۡـًٔاؕ وَمَنۡ كَفَرَ بَعۡدَ ذٰلِكَ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡفٰسِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah has promised those who have believed among you and done righteous deeds that He will surely grant them succession [to authority] upon the earth just as He granted it to those before them and that He will surely establish for them [therein] their religion which He has preferred for them and that He will surely substitute for them, after their fear, security, [for] they worship Me, not associating anything with Me. But whoever disbelieves after that - then those are the defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: وَاَقِيۡمُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاٰتُوا الزَّكٰوةَ وَاَطِيۡعُوا الرَّسُوۡلَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And establish prayer and give zakah and obey the Messenger - that you may receive mercy

quran.arabic: لَا تَحۡسَبَنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مُعۡجِزِيۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِۚ وَمَاۡوٰىهُمُ النَّارُؕ وَلَبِئۡسَ الۡمَصِيۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: Never think that the disbelievers are causing failure [to Allah] upon the earth. Their refuge will be the Fire - and how wretched the destination

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لِيَسۡتَاۡذِنۡكُمُ الَّذِيۡنَ مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُكُمۡ وَالَّذِيۡنَ لَمۡ يَبۡلُغُوا الۡحُلُمَ مِنۡكُمۡ ثَلٰثَ مَرّٰتٍؕ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ صَلٰوةِ الۡفَجۡرِ وَحِيۡنَ تَضَعُوۡنَ ثِيَابَكُمۡ مِّنَ الظَّهِيۡرَةِ وَمِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ صَلٰوةِ الۡعِشَآءِؕࣞ ثَلٰثُ عَوۡرٰتٍ لَّكُمۡؕ لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَلَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ جُنَاحٌۭ بَعۡدَهُنَّؕ طَوّٰفُوۡنَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ بَعۡضُكُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍؕ كَذٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ اللّٰهُ لَكُمُ الۡاٰيٰتِؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌ حَكِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, let those whom your right hands possess and those who have not [yet] reached puberty among you ask permission of you [before entering] at three times: before the dawn prayer and when you put aside your clothing [for rest] at noon and after the night prayer. [These are] three times of privacy for you. There is no blame upon you nor upon them beyond these [periods], for they continually circulate among you - some of you, among others. Thus does Allah make clear to you the verses; and Allah is Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا بَلَغَ الۡاَطۡفَالُ مِنۡكُمُ الۡحُلُمَ فَلۡيَسۡتَاۡذِنُوۡا كَمَا اسۡتَاۡذَنَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡؕ كَذٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ اللّٰهُ لَكُمۡ اٰيٰتِهٖؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌ حَكِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And when the children among you reach puberty, let them ask permission [at all times] as those before them have done. Thus does Allah make clear to you His verses; and Allah is Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: وَالۡقَوَاعِدُ مِنَ النِّسَآءِ الّٰتِيۡ لَا يَرۡجُوۡنَ نِكَاحًا فَلَيۡسَ عَلَيۡهِنَّ جُنَاحٌ اَنۡ يَّضَعۡنَ ثِيَابَهُنَّ غَيۡرَ مُتَبَرِّجٰتٍۭ بِزِيۡنَةٍؕ وَاَنۡ يَّسۡتَعۡفِفۡنَ خَيۡرٌ لَّهُنَّؕ وَاللّٰهُ سَمِيۡعٌ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And women of post-menstrual age who have no desire for marriage - there is no blame upon them for putting aside their outer garments [but] not displaying adornment. But to modestly refrain [from that] is better for them. And Allah is Hearing and Knowing

quran.arabic: لَيۡسَ عَلَي الۡاَعۡمٰي حَرَجٌ وَّلَا عَلَي الۡاَعۡرَجِ حَرَجٌ وَّلَا عَلَي الۡمَرِيۡضِ حَرَجٌ وَّلَا عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡفُسِكُمۡ اَنۡ تَاۡكُلُوۡا مِنۭۡ بُيُوۡتِكُمۡ اَوۡ بُيُوۡتِ اٰبَآئِكُمۡ اَوۡ بُيُوۡتِ اُمَّهٰتِكُمۡ اَوۡ بُيُوۡتِ اِخۡوَانِكُمۡ اَوۡ بُيُوۡتِ اَخَوٰتِكُمۡ اَوۡ بُيُوۡتِ اَعۡمَامِكُمۡ اَوۡ بُيُوۡتِ عَمّٰتِكُمۡ اَوۡ بُيُوۡتِ اَخۡوَالِكُمۡ اَوۡ بُيُوۡتِ خٰلٰتِكُمۡ اَوۡ مَا مَلَكۡتُمۡ مَّفَاتِحَهٗ٘ اَوۡ صَدِيۡقِكُمۡؕ لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ جُنَاحٌ اَنۡ تَاۡكُلُوۡا جَمِيۡعًا اَوۡ اَشۡتَاتًاؕ فَاِذَا دَخَلۡتُمۡ بُيُوۡتًا فَسَلِّمُوۡا عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡفُسِكُمۡ تَحِيَّةً مِّنۡ عِنۡدِ اللّٰهِ مُبٰرَكَةً طَيِّبَةًؕ كَذٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ اللّٰهُ لَكُمُ الۡاٰيٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَعۡقِلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: There is not upon the blind [any] constraint nor upon the lame constraint nor upon the ill constraint nor upon yourselves when you eat from your [own] houses or the houses of your fathers or the houses of your mothers or the houses of your brothers or the houses of your sisters or the houses of your father's brothers or the houses of your father's sisters or the houses of your mother's brothers or the houses of your mother's sisters or [from houses] whose keys you possess or [from the house] of your friend. There is no blame upon you whether you eat together or separately. But when you enter houses, give greetings of peace upon each other - a greeting from Allah, blessed and good. Thus does Allah make clear to you the verses [of ordinance] that you may understand

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ وَاِذَا كَانُوۡا مَعَهٗ عَلٰ٘ي اَمۡرٍ جَامِعٍ لَّمۡ يَذۡهَبُوۡا حَتّٰي يَسۡتَاۡذِنُوۡهُؕ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يَسۡتَاۡذِنُوۡنَكَ اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖۚ فَاِذَا اسۡتَاۡذَنُوۡكَ لِبَعۡضِ شَاۡنِهِمۡ فَاۡذَنۡ لِّمَنۡ شِئۡتَ مِنۡهُمۡ وَاسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَهُمُ اللّٰهَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: The believers are only those who believe in Allah and His Messenger and, when they are [meeting] with him for a matter of common interest, do not depart until they have asked his permission. Indeed, those who ask your permission, [O Muhammad] - those are the ones who believe in Allah and His Messenger. So when they ask your permission for something of their affairs, then give permission to whom you will among them and ask forgiveness for them of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: لَا تَجۡعَلُوۡا دُعَآءَ الرَّسُوۡلِ بَيۡنَكُمۡ كَدُعَآءِ بَعۡضِكُمۡ بَعۡضًاؕ قَدۡ يَعۡلَمُ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ يَتَسَلَّلُوۡنَ مِنۡكُمۡ لِوَاذًاۚ فَلۡيَحۡذَرِ الَّذِيۡنَ يُخَالِفُوۡنَ عَنۡ اَمۡرِهٖ٘ اَنۡ تُصِيۡبَهُمۡ فِتۡنَةٌ اَوۡ يُصِيۡبَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Do not make [your] calling of the Messenger among yourselves as the call of one of you to another. Already Allah knows those of you who slip away, concealed by others. So let those beware who dissent from the Prophet's order, lest fitnah strike them or a painful punishment

quran.arabic: اَلَا٘ اِنَّ لِلّٰهِ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ قَدۡ يَعۡلَمُ مَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ عَلَيۡهِؕ وَيَوۡمَ يُرۡجَعُوۡنَ اِلَيۡهِ فَيُنَبِّئُهُمۡ بِمَا عَمِلُوۡاؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Unquestionably, to Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and earth. Already He knows that upon which you [stand] and [knows] the Day when they will be returned to Him and He will inform them of what they have done. And Allah is Knowing of all things

quran.arabic: تَبٰرَكَ الَّذِيۡ نَزَّلَ الۡفُرۡقَانَ عَلٰي عَبۡدِهٖ لِيَكُوۡنَ لِلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ نَذِيۡرَاۙ‏
quran.english: Blessed is He who sent down the Criterion upon His Servant that he may be to the worlds a warner

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡ لَهٗ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَلَمۡ يَتَّخِذۡ وَلَدًا وَّلَمۡ يَكُنۡ لَّهٗ شَرِيۡكٌ فِي الۡمُلۡكِ وَخَلَقَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ فَقَدَّرَهٗ تَقۡدِيۡرًا
quran.english: He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and who has not taken a son and has not had a partner in dominion and has created each thing and determined it with [precise] determination

quran.arabic: وَاتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اٰلِهَةً لَّا يَخۡلُقُوۡنَ شَيۡـًٔا وَّهُمۡ يُخۡلَقُوۡنَ وَلَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ لِاَنۡفُسِهِمۡ ضَرًّا وَّلَا نَفۡعًا وَّلَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ مَوۡتًا وَّلَا حَيٰوةً وَّلَا نُشُوۡرًا
quran.english: But they have taken besides Him gods which create nothing, while they are created, and possess not for themselves any harm or benefit and possess not [power to cause] death or life or resurrection

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا٘ اِفۡكُ اِۨفۡتَرٰىهُ وَاَعَانَهٗ عَلَيۡهِ قَوۡمٌ اٰخَرُوۡنَۚۛ فَقَدۡ جَآءُوۡ ظُلۡمًا وَّزُوۡرًاۚۛ‏
quran.english: And those who disbelieve say, "This [Qur'an] is not except a falsehood he invented, and another people assisted him in it." But they have committed an injustice and a lie

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡ٘ا اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ اكۡتَتَبَهَا فَهِيَ تُمۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِ بُكۡرَةً وَّاَصِيۡلًا
quran.english: And they say, "Legends of the former peoples which he has written down, and they are dictated to him morning and afternoon

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَنۡزَلَهُ الَّذِيۡ يَعۡلَمُ السِّرَّ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ غَفُوۡرًا رَّحِيۡمًا
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed by He who knows [every] secret within the heavens and the earth. Indeed, He is ever Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا مَالِ هٰذَا الرَّسُوۡلِ يَاۡكُلُ الطَّعَامَ وَيَمۡشِيۡ فِي الۡاَسۡوَاقِؕ لَوۡلَا٘ اُنۡزِلَ اِلَيۡهِ مَلَكٌ فَيَكُوۡنَ مَعَهٗ نَذِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And they say, "What is this messenger that eats food and walks in the markets? Why was there not sent down to him an angel so he would be with him a warner

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يُلۡقٰ٘ي اِلَيۡهِ كَنۡزٌ اَوۡ تَكُوۡنُ لَهٗ جَنَّةٌ يَّاۡكُلُ مِنۡهَاؕ وَقَالَ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ اِنۡ تَتَّبِعُوۡنَ اِلَّا رَجُلًا مَّسۡحُوۡرًا
quran.english: Or [why is not] a treasure presented to him [from heaven], or does he [not] have a garden from which he eats?" And the wrongdoers say, "You follow not but a man affected by magic

quran.arabic: اُنۡظُرۡ كَيۡفَ ضَرَبُوۡا لَكَ الۡاَمۡثَالَ فَضَلُّوۡا فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَ سَبِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Look how they strike for you comparisons; but they have strayed, so they cannot [find] a way

quran.arabic: تَبٰرَكَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اِنۡ شَآءَ جَعَلَ لَكَ خَيۡرًا مِّنۡ ذٰلِكَ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُۙ وَيَجۡعَلۡ لَّكَ قُصُوۡرًا
quran.english: Blessed is He who, if He willed, could have made for you [something] better than that - gardens beneath which rivers flow - and could make for you palaces

quran.arabic: بَلۡ كَذَّبُوۡا بِالسَّاعَةِ وَاَعۡتَدۡنَا لِمَنۡ كَذَّبَ بِالسَّاعَةِ سَعِيۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: But they have denied the Hour, and We have prepared for those who deny the Hour a Blaze

quran.arabic: اِذَا رَاَتۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍ سَمِعُوۡا لَهَا تَغَيُّظًا وَّزَفِيۡرًا
quran.english: When the Hellfire sees them from a distant place, they will hear its fury and roaring

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا٘ اُلۡقُوۡا مِنۡهَا مَكَانًا ضَيِّقًا مُّقَرَّنِيۡنَ دَعَوۡا هُنَالِكَ ثُبُوۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And when they are thrown into a narrow place therein bound in chains, they will cry out thereupon for destruction

quran.arabic: لَا تَدۡعُوا الۡيَوۡمَ ثُبُوۡرًا وَّاحِدًا وَّادۡعُوۡا ثُبُوۡرًا كَثِيۡرًا
quran.english: [They will be told], "Do not cry this Day for one destruction but cry for much destruction

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَذٰلِكَ خَيۡرٌ اَمۡ جَنَّةُ الۡخُلۡدِ الَّتِيۡ وُعِدَ الۡمُتَّقُوۡنَؕ كَانَتۡ لَهُمۡ جَزَآءً وَّمَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: Say, "Is that better or the Garden of Eternity which is promised to the righteous? It will be for them a reward and destination

quran.arabic: لَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَا يَشَآءُوۡنَ خٰلِدِيۡنَؕ كَانَ عَلٰي رَبِّكَ وَعۡدًا مَّسۡـُٔوۡلًا
quran.english: For them therein is whatever they wish, [while] abiding eternally. It is ever upon your Lord a promise [worthy to be] requested

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يَحۡشُرُهُمۡ وَمَا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ فَيَقُوۡلُ ءَاَنۡتُمۡ اَضۡلَلۡتُمۡ عِبَادِيۡ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ اَمۡ هُمۡ ضَلُّوا السَّبِيۡلَؕ‏
quran.english: And [mention] the Day He will gather them and that which they worship besides Allah and will say, "Did you mislead these, My servants, or did they [themselves] stray from the way

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا سُبۡحٰنَكَ مَا كَانَ يَنۭۡ بَغِيۡ لَنَا٘ اَنۡ نَّتَّخِذَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِكَ مِنۡ اَوۡلِيَآءَ وَلٰكِنۡ مَّتَّعۡتَهُمۡ وَاٰبَآءَهُمۡ حَتّٰي نَسُوا الذِّكۡرَۚ وَكَانُوۡا قَوۡمًاۭ بُوۡرًا
quran.english: They will say, "Exalted are You! It was not for us to take besides You any allies. But You provided comforts for them and their fathers until they forgot the message and became a people ruined

quran.arabic: فَقَدۡ كَذَّبُوۡكُمۡ بِمَا تَقُوۡلُوۡنَۙ فَمَا تَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَ صَرۡفًا وَّلَا نَصۡرًاۚ وَمَنۡ يَّظۡلِمۡ مِّنۡكُمۡ نُذِقۡهُ عَذَابًا كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: So they will deny you, [disbelievers], in what you say, and you cannot avert [punishment] or [find] help. And whoever commits injustice among you - We will make him taste a great punishment

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا قَبۡلَكَ مِنَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَ اِلَّا٘ اِنَّهُمۡ لَيَاۡكُلُوۡنَ الطَّعَامَ وَيَمۡشُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَسۡوَاقِؕ وَجَعَلۡنَا بَعۡضَكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ فِتۡنَةًؕ اَتَصۡبِرُوۡنَۚ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ بَصِيۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And We did not send before you, [O Muhammad], any of the messengers except that they ate food and walked in the markets. And We have made some of you [people] as trial for others - will you have patience? And ever is your Lord, Seeing

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَرۡجُوۡنَ لِقَآءَنَا لَوۡلَا٘ اُنۡزِلَ عَلَيۡنَا الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ اَوۡ نَرٰي رَبَّنَاؕ لَقَدِ اسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡا فِيۡ٘ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ وَعَتَوۡ عُتُوًّا كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: And those who do not expect the meeting with Us say, "Why were not angels sent down to us, or [why] do we [not] see our Lord?" They have certainly become arrogant within themselves and [become] insolent with great insolence

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَرَوۡنَ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةَ لَا بُشۡرٰي يَوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ حِجۡرًا مَّحۡجُوۡرًا
quran.english: The day they see the angels - no good tidings will there be that day for the criminals, and [the angels] will say, "Prevented and inaccessible

quran.arabic: وَقَدِمۡنَا٘ اِلٰي مَا عَمِلُوۡا مِنۡ عَمَلٍ فَجَعَلۡنٰهُ هَبَآءً مَّنۡثُوۡرًا
quran.english: And We will regard what they have done of deeds and make them as dust dispersed

quran.arabic: اَصۡحٰبُ الۡجَنَّةِ يَوۡمَئِذٍ خَيۡرٌ مُّسۡتَقَرًّا وَّاَحۡسَنُ مَقِيۡلًا
quran.english: The companions of Paradise, that Day, are [in] a better settlement and better resting place

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ تَشَقَّقُ السَّمَآءُ بِالۡغَمَامِ وَنُزِّلَ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ تَنۡزِيۡلًا
quran.english: And [mention] the Day when the heaven will split open with [emerging] clouds, and the angels will be sent down in successive descent

quran.arabic: اَلۡمُلۡكُ يَوۡمَئِذِ اِۨلۡحَقُّ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِؕ وَكَانَ يَوۡمًا عَلَي الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ عَسِيۡرًا
quran.english: True sovereignty, that Day, is for the Most Merciful. And it will be upon the disbelievers a difficult Day

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يَعَضُّ الظَّالِمُ عَلٰي يَدَيۡهِ يَقُوۡلُ يٰلَيۡتَنِي اتَّخَذۡتُ مَعَ الرَّسُوۡلِ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: And the Day the wrongdoer will bite on his hands [in regret] he will say, "Oh, I wish I had taken with the Messenger a way

quran.arabic: يٰوَيۡلَتٰي لَيۡتَنِيۡ لَمۡ اَتَّخِذۡ فُلَانًا خَلِيۡلًا
quran.english: Oh, woe to me! I wish I had not taken that one as a friend

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ اَضَلَّنِيۡ عَنِ الذِّكۡرِ بَعۡدَ اِذۡ جَآءَنِيۡؕ وَكَانَ الشَّيۡطٰنُ لِلۡاِنۡسَانِ خَذُوۡلًا
quran.english: He led me away from the remembrance after it had come to me. And ever is Satan, to man, a deserter

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الرَّسُوۡلُ يٰرَبِّ اِنَّ قَوۡمِي اتَّخَذُوۡا هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ مَهۡجُوۡرًا
quran.english: And the Messenger has said, "O my Lord, indeed my people have taken this Qur'an as [a thing] abandoned

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ جَعَلۡنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِيٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَؕ وَكَفٰي بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَّنَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: And thus have We made for every prophet an enemy from among the criminals. But sufficient is your Lord as a guide and a helper

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَوۡلَا نُزِّلَ عَلَيۡهِ الۡقُرۡاٰنُ جُمۡلَةً وَّاحِدَةًۚۛ كَذٰلِكَۚۛ لِنُثَبِّتَ بِهٖ فُؤَادَكَ وَرَتَّلۡنٰهُ تَرۡتِيۡلًا
quran.english: And those who disbelieve say, "Why was the Qur'an not revealed to him all at once?" Thus [it is] that We may strengthen thereby your heart. And We have spaced it distinctly

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَاۡتُوۡنَكَ بِمَثَلٍ اِلَّا جِئۡنٰكَ بِالۡحَقِّ وَاَحۡسَنَ تَفۡسِيۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And they do not come to you with an argument except that We bring you the truth and the best explanation

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ يُحۡشَرُوۡنَ عَلٰي وُجُوۡهِهِمۡ اِلٰي جَهَنَّمَۙ اُولٰٓئِكَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَّاَضَلُّ سَبِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: The ones who are gathered on their faces to Hell - those are the worst in position and farthest astray in [their] way

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسَي الۡكِتٰبَ وَجَعَلۡنَا مَعَهٗ٘ اَخَاهُ هٰرُوۡنَ وَزِيۡرًاۚۖ‏
quran.english: And We had certainly given Moses the Scripture and appointed with him his brother Aaron as an assistant

quran.arabic: فَقُلۡنَا اذۡهَبَا٘ اِلَي الۡقَوۡمِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَاؕ فَدَمَّرۡنٰهُمۡ تَدۡمِيۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And We said, "Go both of you to the people who have denied Our signs." Then We destroyed them with [complete] destruction

quran.arabic: وَقَوۡمَ نُوۡحٍ لَّمَّا كَذَّبُوا الرُّسُلَ اَغۡرَقۡنٰهُمۡ وَجَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ لِلنَّاسِ اٰيَةًؕ وَاَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلظّٰلِمِيۡنَ عَذَابًا اَلِيۡمًاۚۙ‏
quran.english: And the people of Noah - when they denied the messengers, We drowned them, and We made them for mankind a sign. And We have prepared for the wrongdoers a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَّعَادًا وَّثَمُوۡدَا۠ وَاَصۡحٰبَ الرَّسِّ وَقُرُوۡنًاۭ بَيۡنَ ذٰلِكَ كَثِيۡرًا
quran.english: And [We destroyed] 'Aad and Thamud and the companions of the well and many generations between them

quran.arabic: وَكُلًّا ضَرَبۡنَا لَهُ الۡاَمۡثَالَؗ وَكُلًّا تَبَّرۡنَا تَتۡبِيۡرًا
quran.english: And for each We presented examples [as warnings], and each We destroyed with [total] destruction

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَتَوۡا عَلَي الۡقَرۡيَةِ الَّتِيۡ٘ اُمۡطِرَتۡ مَطَرَ السَّوۡءِؕ اَفَلَمۡ يَكُوۡنُوۡا يَرَوۡنَهَاۚ بَلۡ كَانُوۡا لَا يَرۡجُوۡنَ نُشُوۡرًا
quran.english: And they have already come upon the town which was showered with a rain of evil. So have they not seen it? But they are not expecting resurrection

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاَوۡكَ اِنۡ يَّتَّخِذُوۡنَكَ اِلَّا هُزُوًاؕ اَهٰذَا الَّذِيۡ بَعَثَ اللّٰهُ رَسُوۡلًا
quran.english: And when they see you, [O Muhammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], "Is this the one whom Allah has sent as a messenger

quran.arabic: اِنۡ كَادَ لَيُضِلُّنَا عَنۡ اٰلِهَتِنَا لَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ صَبَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهَاؕ وَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ حِيۡنَ يَرَوۡنَ الۡعَذَابَ مَنۡ اَضَلُّ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: He almost would have misled us from our gods had we not been steadfast in [worship of] them." But they are going to know, when they see the punishment, who is farthest astray in [his] way

quran.arabic: اَرَءَيۡتَ مَنِ اتَّخَذَ اِلٰهَهٗ هَوٰىهُؕ اَفَاَنۡتَ تَكُوۡنُ عَلَيۡهِ وَكِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Have you seen the one who takes as his god his own desire? Then would you be responsible for him

quran.arabic: اَمۡ تَحۡسَبُ اَنَّ اَكۡثَرَهُمۡ يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ اَوۡ يَعۡقِلُوۡنَؕ اِنۡ هُمۡ اِلَّا كَالۡاَنۡعَامِ بَلۡ هُمۡ اَضَلُّ سَبِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Or do you think that most of them hear or reason? They are not except like livestock. Rather, they are [even] more astray in [their] way

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اِلٰي رَبِّكَ كَيۡفَ مَدَّ الظِّلَّۚ وَلَوۡ شَآءَ لَجَعَلَهٗ سَاكِنًاۚ ثُمَّ جَعَلۡنَا الشَّمۡسَ عَلَيۡهِ دَلِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Have you not considered your Lord - how He extends the shadow, and if He willed, He could have made it stationary? Then We made the sun for it an indication

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ قَبَضۡنٰهُ اِلَيۡنَا قَبۡضًا يَّسِيۡرًا
quran.english: Then We hold it in hand for a brief grasp

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الَّيۡلَ لِبَاسًا وَّالنَّوۡمَ سُبَاتًا وَّجَعَلَ النَّهَارَ نُشُوۡرًا
quran.english: And it is He who has made the night for you as clothing and sleep [a means for] rest and has made the day a resurrection

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَرۡسَلَ الرِّيٰحَ بُشۡرًاۭ بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهٖۚ وَاَنۡزَلۡنَا مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً طَهُوۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And it is He who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy, and We send down from the sky pure water

quran.arabic: لِّنُحۡيِۦَ بِهٖ بَلۡدَةً مَّيۡتًا وَّنُسۡقِيَهٗ مِمَّا خَلَقۡنَا٘ اَنۡعَامًا وَّاَنَاسِيَّ كَثِيۡرًا
quran.english: That We may bring to life thereby a dead land and give it as drink to those We created of numerous livestock and men
