quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ صَرَّفۡنٰهُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ لِيَذَّكَّرُوۡاؗۖ فَاَبٰ٘ي اَكۡثَرُ النَّاسِ اِلَّا كُفُوۡرًا
quran.english: And We have certainly distributed it among them that they might be reminded, but most of the people refuse except disbelief

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ شِئۡنَا لَبَعَثۡنَا فِيۡ كُلِّ قَرۡيَةٍ نَّذِيۡرًاؗۖ‏
quran.english: And if We had willed, We could have sent into every city a warner

quran.arabic: فَلَا تُطِعِ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ وَجَاهِدۡهُمۡ بِهٖ جِهَادًا كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: So do not obey the disbelievers, and strive against them with the Qur'an a great striving

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ مَرَجَ الۡبَحۡرَيۡنِ هٰذَا عَذۡبٌ فُرَاتٌ وَّهٰذَا مِلۡحٌ اُجَاجٌۚ وَجَعَلَ بَيۡنَهُمَا بَرۡزَخًا وَّحِجۡرًا مَّحۡجُوۡرًا
quran.english: And it is He who has released [simultaneously] the two seas, one fresh and sweet and one salty and bitter, and He placed between them a barrier and prohibiting partition

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ مِنَ الۡمَآءِ بَشَرًا فَجَعَلَهٗ نَسَبًا وَّصِهۡرًاؕ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ قَدِيۡرًا
quran.english: And it is He who has created from water a human being and made him [a relative by] lineage and marriage. And ever is your Lord competent [concerning creation]

quran.arabic: وَيَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مَا لَا يَنۡفَعُهُمۡ وَلَا يَضُرُّهُمۡؕ وَكَانَ الۡكَافِرُ عَلٰي رَبِّهٖ ظَهِيۡرًا
quran.english: But they worship rather than Allah that which does not benefit them or harm them, and the disbeliever is ever, against his Lord, an assistant [to Satan]

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ اِلَّا مُبَشِّرًا وَّنَذِيۡرًا
quran.english: And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَا٘ اَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍ اِلَّا مَنۡ شَآءَ اَنۡ يَّتَّخِذَ اِلٰي رَبِّهٖ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: Say, "I do not ask of you for it any payment - only that whoever wills might take to his Lord a way

quran.arabic: وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَي الۡحَيِّ الَّذِيۡ لَا يَمُوۡتُ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِهٖؕ وَكَفٰي بِهٖ بِذُنُوۡبِ عِبَادِهٖ خَبِيۡرَاۚۛۙ‏
quran.english: And rely upon the Ever-Living who does not die, and exalt [Allah] with His praise. And sufficient is He to be, with the sins of His servants, Acquainted

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِيۡ سِتَّةِ اَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ اسۡتَوٰي عَلَي الۡعَرۡشِۚۛ اَلرَّحۡمٰنُ فَسۡـَٔلۡ بِهٖ خَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: He who created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days and then established Himself above the Throne - the Most Merciful, so ask about Him one well informed

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمُ اسۡجُدُوۡا لِلرَّحۡمٰنِۚ قَالُوۡا وَمَا الرَّحۡمٰنُࣗ اَنَسۡجُدُ لِمَا تَاۡمُرُنَا وَزَادَهُمۡ نُفُوۡرًاࣛࣖ‏
quran.english: And when it is said to them, "Prostrate to the Most Merciful," they say, "And what is the Most Merciful? Should we prostrate to that which you order us?" And it increases them in aversion

quran.arabic: تَبٰرَكَ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ فِي السَّمَآءِ بُرُوۡجًا وَّجَعَلَ فِيۡهَا سِرٰجًا وَّقَمَرًا مُّنِيۡرًا
quran.english: Blessed is He who has placed in the sky great stars and placed therein a [burning] lamp and luminous moon

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَ خِلۡفَةً لِّمَنۡ اَرَادَ اَنۡ يَّذَّكَّرَ اَوۡ اَرَادَ شُكُوۡرًا
quran.english: And it is He who has made the night and the day in succession for whoever desires to remember or desires gratitude

quran.arabic: وَعِبَادُ الرَّحۡمٰنِ الَّذِيۡنَ يَمۡشُوۡنَ عَلَي الۡاَرۡضِ هَوۡنًا وَّاِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ الۡجٰهِلُوۡنَ قَالُوۡا سَلٰمًا
quran.english: And the servants of the Most Merciful are those who walk upon the earth easily, and when the ignorant address them [harshly], they say [words of] peace

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَبِيۡتُوۡنَ لِرَبِّهِمۡ سُجَّدًا وَّقِيَامًا
quran.english: And those who spend [part of] the night to their Lord prostrating and standing [in prayer]

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ رَبَّنَا اصۡرِفۡ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَࣗۖ اِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًاࣗۖ‏
quran.english: And those who say, "Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is ever adhering

quran.arabic: اِنَّهَا سَآءَتۡ مُسۡتَقَرًّا وَّمُقَامًا
quran.english: Indeed, it is evil as a settlement and residence

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اِذَا٘ اَنۡفَقُوۡا لَمۡ يُسۡرِفُوۡا وَلَمۡ يَقۡتُرُوۡا وَكَانَ بَيۡنَ ذٰلِكَ قَوَامًا
quran.english: And [they are] those who, when they spend, do so not excessively or sparingly but are ever, between that, [justly] moderate

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَدۡعُوۡنَ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَ وَلَا يَقۡتُلُوۡنَ النَّفۡسَ الَّتِيۡ حَرَّمَ اللّٰهُ اِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَزۡنُوۡنَؕۚ وَمَنۡ يَّفۡعَلۡ ذٰلِكَ يَلۡقَ اَثَامًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those who do not invoke with Allah another deity or kill the soul which Allah has forbidden [to be killed], except by right, and do not commit unlawful sexual intercourse. And whoever should do that will meet a penalty

quran.arabic: يُّضٰعَفۡ لَهُ الۡعَذَابُ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ وَيَخۡلُدۡ فِيۡهٖ مُهَانًاࣗۖ‏
quran.english: Multiplied for him is the punishment on the Day of Resurrection, and he will abide therein humiliated

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ تَابَ وَاٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صَالِحًا فَاُولٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ اللّٰهُ سَيِّاٰتِهِمۡ حَسَنٰتٍؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرًا رَّحِيۡمًا
quran.english: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allah will replace their evil deeds with good. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَاِنَّهٗ يَتُوۡبُ اِلَي اللّٰهِ مَتَابًا
quran.english: And he who repents and does righteousness does indeed turn to Allah with [accepted] repentance

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَشۡهَدُوۡنَ الزُّوۡرَۙ وَاِذَا مَرُّوۡا بِاللَّغۡوِ مَرُّوۡا كِرَامًا
quran.english: And [they are] those who do not testify to falsehood, and when they pass near ill speech, they pass by with dignity

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اِذَا ذُكِّرُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَمۡ يَخِرُّوۡا عَلَيۡهَا صُمًّا وَّعُمۡيَانًا
quran.english: And those who, when reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall upon them deaf and blind

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ رَبَّنَا هَبۡ لَنَا مِنۡ اَزۡوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيّٰتِنَا قُرَّةَ اَعۡيُنٍ وَّاجۡعَلۡنَا لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ اِمَامًا
quran.english: And those who say, "Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ يُجۡزَوۡنَ الۡغُرۡفَةَ بِمَا صَبَرُوۡا وَيُلَقَّوۡنَ فِيۡهَا تَحِيَّةً وَّسَلٰمًاۙ‏
quran.english: Those will be awarded the Chamber for what they patiently endured, and they will be received therein with greetings and [words of] peace

quran.arabic: خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ حَسُنَتۡ مُسۡتَقَرًّا وَّمُقَامًا
quran.english: Abiding eternally therein. Good is the settlement and residence

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَا يَعۡبَؤُا بِكُمۡ رَبِّيۡ لَوۡلَا دُعَآؤُكُمۡۚ فَقَدۡ كَذَّبۡتُمۡ فَسَوۡفَ يَكُوۡنُ لِزَامًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "What would my Lord care for you if not for your supplication?" For you [disbelievers] have denied, so your denial is going to be adherent

quran.arabic: طٰسٓمّٓ
quran.english: Ta, Seen, Meem

quran.arabic: تِلۡكَ اٰيٰتُ الۡكِتٰبِ الۡمُبِيۡنِ
quran.english: These are the verses of the clear Book

quran.arabic: لَعَلَّكَ بَاخِعٌ نَّفۡسَكَ اَلَّا يَكُوۡنُوۡا مُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Perhaps, [O Muhammad], you would kill yourself with grief that they will not be believers

quran.arabic: اِنۡ نَّشَاۡ نُنَزِّلۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ اٰيَةً فَظَلَّتۡ اَعۡنَاقُهُمۡ لَهَا خٰضِعِيۡنَ
quran.english: If We willed, We could send down to them from the sky a sign for which their necks would remain humbled

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ ذِكۡرٍ مِّنَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ مُحۡدَثٍ اِلَّا كَانُوۡا عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضِيۡنَ
quran.english: And no revelation comes to them anew from the Most Merciful except that they turn away from it

quran.arabic: فَقَدۡ كَذَّبُوۡا فَسَيَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ اَنۭۡ بٰٓؤُا مَا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَ
quran.english: For they have already denied, but there will come to them the news of that which they used to ridicule

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اِلَي الۡاَرۡضِ كَمۡ اَنۭۡ بَتۡنَا فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ زَوۡجٍ كَرِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Did they not look at the earth - how much We have produced therein from every noble kind

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ نَادٰي رَبُّكَ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اَنِ ائۡتِ الۡقَوۡمَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And [mention] when your Lord called Moses, [saying], "Go to the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: قَوۡمَ فِرۡعَوۡنَؕ اَلَا يَتَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: The people of Pharaoh. Will they not fear Allah

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ اَنۡ يُّكَذِّبُوۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, indeed I fear that they will deny me

quran.arabic: وَيَضِيۡقُ صَدۡرِيۡ وَلَا يَنۡطَلِقُ لِسَانِيۡ فَاَرۡسِلۡ اِلٰي هٰرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And that my breast will tighten and my tongue will not be fluent, so send for Aaron

quran.arabic: وَلَهُمۡ عَلَيَّ ذَنۭۡ بٌ فَاَخَافُ اَنۡ يَّقۡتُلُوۡنِۚۖ‏
quran.english: And they have upon me a [claim due to] sin, so I fear that they will kill me

quran.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّاۚ فَاذۡهَبَا بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اِنَّا مَعَكُمۡ مُّسۡتَمِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Allah] said, "No. Go both of you with Our signs; indeed, We are with you, listening

quran.arabic: فَاۡتِيَا فِرۡعَوۡنَ فَقُوۡلَا٘ اِنَّا رَسُوۡلُ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Go to Pharaoh and say, 'We are the messengers of the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: اَنۡ اَرۡسِلۡ مَعَنَا بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَؕ‏
quran.english: [Commanded to say], "Send with us the Children of Israel

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَلَمۡ نُرَبِّكَ فِيۡنَا وَلِيۡدًا وَّلَبِثۡتَ فِيۡنَا مِنۡ عُمُرِكَ سِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said, "Did we not raise you among us as a child, and you remained among us for years of your life

quran.arabic: وَفَعَلۡتَ فَعۡلَتَكَ الَّتِيۡ فَعَلۡتَ وَاَنۡتَ مِنَ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [then] you did your deed which you did, and you were of the ungrateful

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَعَلۡتُهَا٘ اِذًا وَّاَنَا مِنَ الضَّآلِّيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: [Moses] said, "I did it, then, while I was of those astray

quran.arabic: فَفَرَرۡتُ مِنۡكُمۡ لَمَّا خِفۡتُكُمۡ فَوَهَبَ لِيۡ رَبِّيۡ حُكۡمًا وَّجَعَلَنِيۡ مِنَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَ
quran.english: So I fled from you when I feared you. Then my Lord granted me wisdom and prophethood and appointed me [as one] of the messengers

quran.arabic: وَتِلۡكَ نِعۡمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَيَّ اَنۡ عَبَّدۡتَّ بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَؕ‏
quran.english: And is this a favor of which you remind me - that you have enslaved the Children of Israel

quran.arabic: قَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ وَمَا رَبُّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Said Pharaoh, "And what is the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاؕ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ مُّوۡقِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Moses] said, "The Lord of the heavens and earth and that between them, if you should be convinced

quran.arabic: قَالَ لِمَنۡ حَوۡلَهٗ٘ اَلَا تَسۡتَمِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said to those around him, "Do you not hear

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّكُمۡ وَرَبُّ اٰبَآئِكُمُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Moses] said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّ رَسُوۡلَكُمُ الَّذِيۡ٘ اُرۡسِلَ اِلَيۡكُمۡ لَمَجۡنُوۡنٌ
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said, "Indeed, your 'messenger' who has been sent to you is mad

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ الۡمَشۡرِقِ وَالۡمَغۡرِبِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاؕ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Moses] said, "Lord of the east and the west and that between them, if you were to reason

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَئِنِ اتَّخَذۡتَ اِلٰهًا غَيۡرِيۡ لَاَجۡعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ الۡمَسۡجُوۡنِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said, "If you take a god other than me, I will surely place you among those imprisoned

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَوَلَوۡ جِئۡتُكَ بِشَيۡءٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: [Moses] said, "Even if I brought you proof manifest

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَاۡتِ بِهٖ٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said, "Then bring it, if you should be of the truthful

quran.arabic: فَاَلۡقٰي عَصَاهُ فَاِذَا هِيَ ثُعۡبَانٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۚۖ‏
quran.english: So [Moses] threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent manifest

quran.arabic: وَّنَزَعَ يَدَهٗ فَاِذَا هِيَ بَيۡضَآءُ لِلنّٰظِرِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white for the observers

quran.arabic: قَالَ لِلۡمَلَاِ حَوۡلَهٗ٘ اِنَّ هٰذَا لَسٰحِرٌ عَلِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said to the eminent ones around him, "Indeed, this is a learned magician

quran.arabic: يُّرِيۡدُ اَنۡ يُّخۡرِجَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَرۡضِكُمۡ بِسِحۡرِهٖࣗۖ فَمَاذَا تَاۡمُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: He wants to drive you out of your land by his magic, so what do you advise

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اَرۡجِهۡ وَاَخَاهُ وَابۡعَثۡ فِي الۡمَدَآئِنِ حٰشِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers

quran.arabic: يَاۡتُوۡكَ بِكُلِّ سَحَّارٍ عَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Who will bring you every learned, skilled magician

quran.arabic: فَجُمِعَ السَّحَرَةُ لِمِيۡقَاتِ يَوۡمٍ مَّعۡلُوۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: So the magicians were assembled for the appointment of a well-known day

quran.arabic: وَّقِيۡلَ لِلنَّاسِ هَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ مُّجۡتَمِعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And it was said to the people, "Will you congregate

quran.arabic: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ السَّحَرَةَ اِنۡ كَانُوۡا هُمُ الۡغٰلِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: That we might follow the magicians if they are the predominant

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ السَّحَرَةُ قَالُوۡا لِفِرۡعَوۡنَ اَئِنَّ لَنَا لَاَجۡرًا اِنۡ كُنَّا نَحۡنُ الۡغٰلِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when the magicians arrived, they said to Pharaoh, "Is there indeed for us a reward if we are the predominant

quran.arabic: قَالَ نَعَمۡ وَاِنَّكُمۡ اِذًا لَّمِنَ الۡمُقَرَّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Yes, and indeed, you will then be of those near [to me]

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَهُمۡ مُّوۡسٰ٘ي اَلۡقُوۡا مَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ مُّلۡقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Moses said to them, "Throw whatever you will throw

quran.arabic: فَاَلۡقَوۡا حِبَالَهُمۡ وَعِصِيَّهُمۡ وَقَالُوۡا بِعِزَّةِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ اِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ الۡغٰلِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: So they threw their ropes and their staffs and said, "By the might of Pharaoh, indeed it is we who are predominant

quran.arabic: فَاَلۡقٰي مُوۡسٰي عَصَاهُ فَاِذَا هِيَ تَلۡقَفُ مَا يَاۡفِكُوۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: Then Moses threw his staff, and at once it devoured what they falsified

quran.arabic: فَاُلۡقِيَ السَّحَرَةُ سٰجِدِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allah]

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اٰمَنَّا بِرَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: رَبِّ مُوۡسٰي وَهٰرُوۡنَ
quran.english: The Lord of Moses and Aaron

quran.arabic: قَالَ اٰمَنۡتُمۡ لَهٗ قَبۡلَ اَنۡ اٰذَنَ لَكُمۡۚ اِنَّهٗ لَكَبِيۡرُكُمُ الَّذِيۡ عَلَّمَكُمُ السِّحۡرَۚ فَلَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ ࣢ؕ لَاُقَطِّعَنَّ اَيۡدِيَكُمۡ وَاَرۡجُلَكُمۡ مِّنۡ خِلَافٍ وَّلَاُوصَلِّبَنَّكُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed Moses before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic, but you are going to know. I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will surely crucify you all

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَا ضَيۡرَؗ اِنَّا٘ اِلٰي رَبِّنَا مُنۡقَلِبُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: They said, "No harm. Indeed, to our Lord we will return

quran.arabic: اِنَّا نَطۡمَعُ اَنۡ يَّغۡفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطٰيٰنَا٘ اَنۡ كُنَّا٘ اَوَّلَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَࣖؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, we aspire that our Lord will forgive us our sins because we were the first of the believers

quran.arabic: وَاَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلٰي مُوۡسٰ٘ي اَنۡ اَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِيۡ٘ اِنَّكُمۡ مُّتَّبَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants; indeed, you will be pursued

quran.arabic: فَاَرۡسَلَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ فِي الۡمَدَآئِنِ حٰشِرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Then Pharaoh sent among the cities gatherers

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ لَشِرۡذِمَةٌ قَلِيۡلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [And said], "Indeed, those are but a small band

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهُمۡ لَنَا لَغَآئِظُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, they are enraging us

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّا لَجَمِيۡعٌ حٰذِرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed, we are a cautious society

quran.arabic: فَاَخۡرَجۡنٰهُمۡ مِّنۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: So We removed them from gardens and springs

quran.arabic: وَّكُنُوۡزٍ وَّمَقَامٍ كَرِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: And treasures and honorable station

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَؕ وَاَوۡرَثۡنٰهَا بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَؕ‏
quran.english: Thus. And We caused to inherit it the Children of Israel

quran.arabic: فَاَتۡبَعُوۡهُمۡ مُّشۡرِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: So they pursued them at sunrise

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا تَرَآءَ الۡجَمۡعٰنِ قَالَ اَصۡحٰبُ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اِنَّا لَمُدۡرَكُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And when the two companies saw one another, the companions of Moses said, "Indeed, we are to be overtaken

quran.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّاۚ اِنَّ مَعِيَ رَبِّيۡ سَيَهۡدِيۡنِ
quran.english: [Moses] said, "No! Indeed, with me is my Lord; He will guide me

quran.arabic: فَاَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلٰي مُوۡسٰ٘ي اَنِ اضۡرِبۡ بِّعَصَاكَ الۡبَحۡرَؕ فَانۡفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرۡقٍ كَالطَّوۡدِ الۡعَظِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: Then We inspired to Moses, "Strike with your staff the sea," and it parted, and each portion was like a great towering mountain

quran.arabic: وَاَزۡلَفۡنَا ثَمَّ الۡاٰخَرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We advanced thereto the pursuers

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡجَيۡنَا مُوۡسٰي وَمَنۡ مَّعَهٗ٘ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We saved Moses and those with him, all together

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَغۡرَقۡنَا الۡاٰخَرِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then We drowned the others

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: وَاتۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ نَبَاَ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَۘ‏
quran.english: And recite to them the news of Abraham

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لِاَبِيۡهِ وَقَوۡمِهٖ مَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ
quran.english: When he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا نَعۡبُدُ اَصۡنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عٰكِفِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "We worship idols and remain to them devoted

quran.arabic: قَالَ هَلۡ يَسۡمَعُوۡنَكُمۡ اِذۡ تَدۡعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: He said, "Do they hear you when you supplicate

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يَنۡفَعُوۡنَكُمۡ اَوۡ يَضُرُّوۡنَ
quran.english: Or do they benefit you, or do they harm

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا بَلۡ وَجَدۡنَا٘ اٰبَآءَنَا كَذٰلِكَ يَفۡعَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَفَرَءَيۡتُمۡ مَّا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping

quran.arabic: اَنۡتُمۡ وَاٰبَآؤُكُمُ الۡاَقۡدَمُوۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: You and your ancient forefathers

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّهُمۡ عَدُوٌّ لِّيۡ٘ اِلَّا رَبَّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَنِيۡ فَهُوَ يَهۡدِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ هُوَ يُطۡعِمُنِيۡ وَيَسۡقِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا مَرِضۡتُ فَهُوَ يَشۡفِيۡنِࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when I am ill, it is He who cures me

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ يُمِيۡتُنِيۡ ثُمَّ يُحۡيِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ٘ اَطۡمَعُ اَنۡ يَّغۡفِرَ لِيۡ خَطِيۡٓـَٔتِيۡ يَوۡمَ الدِّيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: And who I aspire that He will forgive me my sin on the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِيۡ حُكۡمًا وَّاَلۡحِقۡنِيۡ بِالصّٰلِحِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous

quran.arabic: وَاجۡعَلۡ لِّيۡ لِسَانَ صِدۡقٍ فِي الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And grant me a reputation of honor among later generations

quran.arabic: وَاجۡعَلۡنِيۡ مِنۡ وَّرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ النَّعِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure

quran.arabic: وَاغۡفِرۡ لِاَبِيۡ٘ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ مِنَ الضَّآلِّيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray

quran.arabic: وَلَا تُخۡزِنِيۡ يَوۡمَ يُبۡعَثُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And do not disgrace me on the Day they are [all] resurrected

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ لَا يَنۡفَعُ مَالٌ وَّلَا بَنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: The Day when there will not benefit [anyone] wealth or children

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ اَتَي اللّٰهَ بِقَلۡبٍ سَلِيۡمٍؕ‏
quran.english: But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart

quran.arabic: وَاُزۡلِفَتِ الۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous

quran.arabic: وَبُرِّزَتِ الۡجَحِيۡمُ لِلۡغٰوِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators

quran.arabic: وَقِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ اَيۡنَمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship

quran.arabic: مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ هَلۡ يَنۡصُرُوۡنَكُمۡ اَوۡ يَنۡتَصِرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Other than Allah? Can they help you or help themselves

quran.arabic: فَكُبۡكِبُوۡا فِيۡهَا هُمۡ وَالۡغَاوٗنَۙ‏
quran.english: So they will be overturned into Hellfire, they and the deviators

quran.arabic: وَجُنُوۡدُ اِبۡلِيۡسَ اَجۡمَعُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And the soldiers of Iblees, all together

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا وَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا يَخۡتَصِمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They will say while they dispute therein

quran.arabic: تَاللّٰهِ اِنۡ كُنَّا لَفِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: By Allah, we were indeed in manifest error

quran.arabic: اِذۡ نُسَوِّيۡكُمۡ بِرَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَضَلَّنَا٘ اِلَّا الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And no one misguided us except the criminals

quran.arabic: فَمَا لَنَا مِنۡ شَافِعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So now we have no intercessors

quran.arabic: وَلَا صَدِيۡقٍ حَمِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And not a devoted friend

quran.arabic: فَلَوۡ اَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ نُوۡحِ اِۨلۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: The people of Noah denied the messengers

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ اَخُوۡهُمۡ نُوۡحٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ اَمِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: So fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِيَ اِلَّا عَلٰي رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: So fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اَنُؤۡمِنُ لَكَ وَاتَّبَعَكَ الۡاَرۡذَلُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]

quran.arabic: قَالَ وَمَا عِلۡمِيۡ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do

quran.arabic: اِنۡ حِسَابُهُمۡ اِلَّا عَلٰي رَبِّيۡ لَوۡ تَشۡعُرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَنَا بِطَارِدِ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And I am not one to drive away the believers

quran.arabic: اِنۡ اَنَا اِلَّا نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌؕ‏
quran.english: I am only a clear warner

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَئِنۡ لَّمۡ تَنۡتَهِ يٰنُوۡحُ لَتَكُوۡنَنَّ مِنَ الۡمَرۡجُوۡمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنَّ قَوۡمِيۡ كَذَّبُوۡنِۚۖ‏
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me

quran.arabic: فَافۡتَحۡ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ فَتۡحًا وَّنَجِّنِيۡ وَمَنۡ مَّعِيَ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then judge between me and them with decisive judgement and save me and those with me of the believers

quran.arabic: فَاَنۡجَيۡنٰهُ وَمَنۡ مَّعَهٗ فِي الۡفُلۡكِ الۡمَشۡحُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ship

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَغۡرَقۡنَا بَعۡدُ الۡبَاقِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادُ اِۨلۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: Aad denied the messengers

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ اَخُوۡهُمۡ هُوۡدٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: When their brother Hud said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ اَمِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: So fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِيَ اِلَّا عَلٰي رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: اَتَبۡنُوۡنَ بِكُلِّ رِيۡعٍ اٰيَةً تَعۡبَثُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves

quran.arabic: وَتَتَّخِذُوۡنَ مَصَانِعَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَخۡلُدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And take for yourselves palaces and fortresses that you might abide eternally

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا بَطَشۡتُمۡ بَطَشۡتُمۡ جَبَّارِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And when you strike, you strike as tyrants

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: So fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: وَاتَّقُوا الَّذِيۡ٘ اَمَدَّكُمۡ بِمَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And fear He who provided you with that which you know

quran.arabic: اَمَدَّكُمۡ بِاَنۡعَامٍ وَّبَنِيۡنَۚۙ‏
quran.english: Provided you with grazing livestock and children

quran.arabic: وَجَنّٰتٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: And gardens and springs

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡنَا٘ اَوَعَظۡتَ اَمۡ لَمۡ تَكُنۡ مِّنَ الۡوٰعِظِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا خُلُقُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: This is not but the custom of the former peoples

quran.arabic: وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And we are not to be punished

quran.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوۡهُ فَاَهۡلَكۡنٰهُمۡؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they denied him, so We destroyed them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُوۡدُ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: Thamud denied the messengers

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ اَخُوۡهُمۡ صٰلِحٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ اَمِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: So fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِيَ اِلَّا عَلٰي رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: اَتُتۡرَكُوۡنَ فِيۡ مَا هٰهُنَا٘ اٰمِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Will you be left in what is here, secure [from death]

quran.arabic: فِيۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Within gardens and springs

quran.arabic: وَّزُرُوۡعٍ وَّنَخۡلٍ طَلۡعُهَا هَضِيۡمٌۚ‏
quran.english: And fields of crops and palm trees with softened fruit

quran.arabic: وَتَنۡحِتُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡجِبَالِ بُيُوۡتًا فٰرِهِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And you carve out of the mountains, homes, with skill

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: So fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: وَلَا تُطِيۡعُوۡ٘ا اَمۡرَ الۡمُسۡرِفِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And do not obey the order of the transgressors

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يُفۡسِدُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَا يُصۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: Who cause corruption in the land and do not amend

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّمَا٘ اَنۡتَ مِنَ الۡمُسَحَّرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَنۡتَ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُنَاۚۖ فَاۡتِ بِاٰيَةٍ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: You are but a man like ourselves, so bring a sign, if you should be of the truthful

quran.arabic: قَالَ هٰذِهٖ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرۡبٌ وَّلَكُمۡ شِرۡبُ يَوۡمٍ مَّعۡلُوۡمٍۚ‏
quran.english: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَمَسُّوۡهَا بِسُوۡٓءٍ فَيَاۡخُذَكُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And do not touch her with harm, lest you be seized by the punishment of a terrible day

quran.arabic: فَعَقَرُوۡهَا فَاَصۡبَحُوۡا نٰدِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: But they hamstrung her and so became regretful

quran.arabic: فَاَخَذَهُمُ الۡعَذَابُؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And the punishment seized them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ لُوۡطِ اِۨلۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: The people of Lot denied the messengers

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ اَخُوۡهُمۡ لُوۡطٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: When their brother Lot said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ اَمِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: So fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِيَ اِلَّا عَلٰي رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: اَتَاۡتُوۡنَ الذُّكۡرَانَ مِنَ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Do you approach males among the worlds

quran.arabic: وَتَذَرُوۡنَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمۡ رَبُّكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَزۡوَاجِكُمۡؕ بَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ عٰدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَئِنۡ لَّمۡ تَنۡتَهِ يٰلُوۡطُ لَتَكُوۡنَنَّ مِنَ الۡمُخۡرَجِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنِّيۡ لِعَمَلِكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡقَالِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it]

quran.arabic: رَبِّ نَجِّنِيۡ وَاَهۡلِيۡ مِمَّا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do

quran.arabic: فَنَجَّيۡنٰهُ وَاَهۡلَهٗ٘ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So We saved him and his family, all

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عَجُوۡزًا فِي الۡغٰبِرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Except an old woman among those who remained behind

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ دَمَّرۡنَا الۡاٰخَرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Then We destroyed the others

quran.arabic: وَاَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مَّطَرًاۚ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ الۡمُنۡذَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَ اَصۡحٰبُ لۡـَٔيۡكَةِ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: The companions of the thicket denied the messengers

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ شُعَيۡبٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: When Shu'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ اَمِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: So fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِيَ اِلَّا عَلٰي رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: اَوۡفُوا الۡكَيۡلَ وَلَا تَكُوۡنُوۡا مِنَ الۡمُخۡسِرِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss

quran.arabic: وَزِنُوۡا بِالۡقِسۡطَاسِ الۡمُسۡتَقِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: And weigh with an even balance

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَبۡخَسُوا النَّاسَ اَشۡيَآءَهُمۡ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption

quran.arabic: وَاتَّقُوا الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ وَالۡجِبِلَّةَ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And fear He who created you and the former creation

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّمَا٘ اَنۡتَ مِنَ الۡمُسَحَّرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُنَا وَاِنۡ نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ الۡكٰذِبِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars

quran.arabic: فَاَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّيۡ٘ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do

quran.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوۡهُ فَاَخَذَهُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمِ الظُّلَّةِؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And they denied him, so the punishment of the day of the black cloud seized them. Indeed, it was the punishment of a terrible day

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَتَنۡزِيۡلُ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed, the Qur'an is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: نَزَلَ بِهِ الرُّوۡحُ الۡاَمِيۡنُۙ‏
quran.english: The Trustworthy Spirit has brought it down

quran.arabic: عَلٰي قَلۡبِكَ لِتَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُنۡذِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Upon your heart, [O Muhammad] - that you may be of the warners

quran.arabic: بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِيٍّ مُّبِيۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: In a clear Arabic language

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَفِيۡ زُبُرِ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَكُنۡ لَّهُمۡ اٰيَةً اَنۡ يَّعۡلَمَهٗ عُلَمٰٓؤُا بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَؕ‏
quran.english: And has it not been a sign to them that it is recognized by the scholars of the Children of Israel

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ نَزَّلۡنٰهُ عَلٰي بَعۡضِ الۡاَعۡجَمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And even if We had revealed it to one among the foreigners

quran.arabic: فَقَرَاَهٗ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ مُؤۡمِنِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And he had recited it to them [perfectly], they would [still] not have been believers in it

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ سَلَكۡنٰهُ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Thus have We inserted disbelief into the hearts of the criminals

quran.arabic: لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِهٖ حَتّٰي يَرَوُا الۡعَذَابَ الۡاَلِيۡمَۙ‏
quran.english: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment

quran.arabic: فَيَاۡتِيَهُمۡ بَغۡتَةً وَّهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not

quran.arabic: فَيَقُوۡلُوۡا هَلۡ نَحۡنُ مُنۡظَرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And they will say, "May we be reprieved

quran.arabic: اَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: So for Our punishment are they impatient

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتَ اِنۡ مَّتَّعۡنٰهُمۡ سِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ جَآءَهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And then there came to them that which they were promised

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَغۡنٰي عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يُمَتَّعُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَهۡلَكۡنَا مِنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ اِلَّا لَهَا مُنۡذِرُوۡنَࣗۖۛ‏
quran.english: And We did not destroy any city except that it had warners

quran.arabic: ذِكۡرٰيࣞۛ وَمَا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust

quran.arabic: وَمَا تَنَزَّلَتۡ بِهِ الشَّيٰطِيۡنُۚ‏
quran.english: And the devils have not brought the revelation down

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَنۭۡ بَغِيۡ لَهُمۡ وَمَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ عَنِ السَّمۡعِ لَمَعۡزُوۡلُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed

quran.arabic: فَلَا تَدۡعُ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَ فَتَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُعَذَّبِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: So do not invoke with Allah another deity and [thus] be among the punished

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡذِرۡ عَشِيۡرَتَكَ الۡاَقۡرَبِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And warn, [O Muhammad], your closest kindred

quran.arabic: وَاخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And lower your wing to those who follow you of the believers

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ عَصَوۡكَ فَقُلۡ اِنِّيۡ بَرِيۡٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing

quran.arabic: وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَي الۡعَزِيۡزِ الرَّحِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ يَرٰىكَ حِيۡنَ تَقُوۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: Who sees you when you arise

quran.arabic: وَتَقَلُّبَكَ فِي السّٰجِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: And your movement among those who prostrate

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ هُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing

quran.arabic: هَلۡ اُنَبِّئُكُمۡ عَلٰي مَنۡ تَنَزَّلُ الشَّيٰطِيۡنُؕ‏
quran.english: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend

quran.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ عَلٰي كُلِّ اَفَّاكٍ اَثِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: They descend upon every sinful liar

quran.arabic: يُّلۡقُوۡنَ السَّمۡعَ وَاَكۡثَرُهُمۡ كٰذِبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars

quran.arabic: وَالشُّعَرَآءُ يَتَّبِعُهُمُ الۡغَاوٗنَؕ‏
quran.english: And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّهُمۡ فِيۡ كُلِّ وَادٍ يَّهِيۡمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Do you not see that in every valley they roam

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّهُمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَا لَا يَفۡعَلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And that they say what they do not do

quran.arabic: اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا اللّٰهَ كَثِيۡرًا وَّانۡتَصَرُوۡا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا ظُلِمُوۡاؕ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡ٘ا اَيَّ مُنۡقَلَبٍ يَّنۡقَلِبُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned

quran.arabic: طٰسٓࣞ تِلۡكَ اٰيٰتُ الۡقُرۡاٰنِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Ta, Seen. These are the verses of the Qur'an and a clear Book

quran.arabic: هُدًي وَّبُشۡرٰي لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: As guidance and good tidings for the believers

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يُقِيۡمُوۡنَ الصَّلٰوةَ وَيُؤۡتُوۡنَ الزَّكٰوةَ وَهُمۡ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ هُمۡ يُوۡقِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Who establish prayer and give zakah, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith]

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمۡ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ يَعۡمَهُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ لَهُمۡ سُوۡٓءُ الۡعَذَابِ وَهُمۡ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ هُمُ الۡاَخۡسَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those are the ones for whom there will be the worst of punishment, and in the Hereafter they are the greatest losers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّي الۡقُرۡاٰنَ مِنۡ لَّدُنۡ حَكِيۡمٍ عَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And indeed, [O Muhammad], you receive the Qur'an from one Wise and Knowing

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ مُوۡسٰي لِاَهۡلِهٖ٘ اِنِّيۡ٘ اٰنَسۡتُ نَارًاؕ سَاٰتِيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ اَوۡ اٰتِيۡكُمۡ بِشِهَابٍ قَبَسٍ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَصۡطَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Mention] when Moses said to his family, "Indeed, I have perceived a fire. I will bring you from there information or will bring you a burning torch that you may warm yourselves

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهَا نُوۡدِيَ اَنۭۡ بُوۡرِكَ مَنۡ فِي النَّارِ وَمَنۡ حَوۡلَهَاؕ وَسُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: But when he came to it, he was called, "Blessed is whoever is at the fire and whoever is around it. And exalted is Allah, Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: يٰمُوۡسٰ٘ي اِنَّهٗ٘ اَنَا اللّٰهُ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: O Moses, indeed it is I - Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَاَلۡقِ عَصَاكَؕ فَلَمَّا رَاٰهَا تَهۡتَزُّ كَاَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَّلّٰي مُدۡبِرًا وَّلَمۡ يُعَقِّبۡؕ يٰمُوۡسٰي لَا تَخَفۡࣞ اِنِّيۡ لَا يَخَافُ لَدَيَّ الۡمُرۡسَلُوۡنَࣗۖ‏
quran.english: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allah said], "O Moses, fear not. Indeed, in My presence the messengers do not fear

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسۡنًاۭ بَعۡدَ سُوۡٓءٍ فَاِنِّيۡ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَاَدۡخِلۡ يَدَكَ فِيۡ جَيۡبِكَ تَخۡرُجۡ بَيۡضَآءَ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ سُوۡٓءٍࣞ فِيۡ تِسۡعِ اٰيٰتٍ اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَقَوۡمِهٖؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَوۡمًا فٰسِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And put your hand into the opening of your garment [at the breast]; it will come out white without disease. [These are] among the nine signs [you will take] to Pharaoh and his people. Indeed, they have been a people defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتۡهُمۡ اٰيٰتُنَا مُبۡصِرَةً قَالُوۡا هٰذَا سِحۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۚ‏
quran.english: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic

quran.arabic: وَجَحَدُوۡا بِهَا وَاسۡتَيۡقَنَتۡهَا٘ اَنۡفُسُهُمۡ ظُلۡمًا وَّعُلُوًّاؕ فَانۡظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الۡمُفۡسِدِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And they rejected them, while their [inner] selves were convinced thereof, out of injustice and haughtiness. So see how was the end of the corrupters

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا دَاوٗدَ وَسُلَيۡمٰنَ عِلۡمًاۚ وَقَالَا الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ فَضَّلَنَا عَلٰي كَثِيۡرٍ مِّنۡ عِبَادِهِ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We had certainly given to David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, "Praise [is due] to Allah, who has favored us over many of His believing servants

quran.arabic: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيۡمٰنُ دَاوٗدَ وَقَالَ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ عُلِّمۡنَا مَنۡطِقَ الطَّيۡرِ وَاُوۡتِيۡنَا مِنۡ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍؕ اِنَّ هٰذَا لَهُوَ الۡفَضۡلُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: And Solomon inherited David. He said, "O people, we have been taught the language of birds, and we have been given from all things. Indeed, this is evident bounty

quran.arabic: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيۡمٰنَ جُنُوۡدُهٗ مِنَ الۡجِنِّ وَالۡاِنۡسِ وَالطَّيۡرِ فَهُمۡ يُوۡزَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And gathered for Solomon were his soldiers of the jinn and men and birds, and they were [marching] in rows

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا٘ اَتَوۡا عَلٰي وَادِ النَّمۡلِۙ قَالَتۡ نَمۡلَةٌ يّٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّمۡلُ ادۡخُلُوۡا مَسٰكِنَكُمۡۚ لَا يَحۡطِمَنَّكُمۡ سُلَيۡمٰنُ وَجُنُوۡدُهٗۙ وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Until, when they came upon the valley of the ants, an ant said, "O ants, enter your dwellings that you not be crushed by Solomon and his soldiers while they perceive not

quran.arabic: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّنۡ قَوۡلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ اَوۡزِعۡنِيۡ٘ اَنۡ اَشۡكُرَ نِعۡمَتَكَ الَّتِيۡ٘ اَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلٰي وَالِدَيَّ وَاَنۡ اَعۡمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرۡضٰىهُ وَاَدۡخِلۡنِيۡ بِرَحۡمَتِكَ فِيۡ عِبَادِكَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants

quran.arabic: وَتَفَقَّدَ الطَّيۡرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِيَ لَا٘ اَرَي الۡهُدۡهُدَؗۖ اَمۡ كَانَ مِنَ الۡغَآئِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And he took attendance of the birds and said, "Why do I not see the hoopoe - or is he among the absent

quran.arabic: لَاُعَذِّبَنَّهٗ عَذَابًا شَدِيۡدًا اَوۡ لَاَاذۡبَحَنَّهٗ٘ اَوۡ لَيَاۡتِيَنِّيۡ بِسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: I will surely punish him with a severe punishment or slaughter him unless he brings me clear authorization

quran.arabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيۡدٍ فَقَالَ اَحَطۡتُّ بِمَا لَمۡ تُحِطۡ بِهٖ وَجِئۡتُكَ مِنۡ سَبَاٍۭ بِنَبَاٍ يَّقِيۡنٍ
quran.english: But the hoopoe stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ وَجَدۡتُّ امۡرَاَةً تَمۡلِكُهُمۡ وَاُوۡتِيَتۡ مِنۡ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ وَّلَهَا عَرۡشٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne

quran.arabic: وَجَدۡتُّهَا وَقَوۡمَهَا يَسۡجُدُوۡنَ لِلشَّمۡسِ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ الشَّيۡطٰنُ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ فَصَدَّهُمۡ عَنِ السَّبِيۡلِ فَهُمۡ لَا يَهۡتَدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allah, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided

quran.arabic: اَلَّا يَسۡجُدُوۡا لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ يُخۡرِجُ الۡخَبۡءَ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تُخۡفُوۡنَ وَمَا تُعۡلِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allah, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ الۡعَرۡشِ الۡعَظِيۡمِࣛ‏
quran.english: Allah - there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Great Throne

quran.arabic: قَالَ سَنَنۡظُرُ اَصَدَقۡتَ اَمۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الۡكٰذِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Solomon] said, "We will see whether you were truthful or were of the liars

quran.arabic: اِذۡهَبۡ بِّكِتٰبِيۡ هٰذَا فَاَلۡقِهۡ اِلَيۡهِمۡ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ فَانۡظُرۡ مَاذَا يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then leave them and see what [answer] they will return

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡمَلَؤُا اِنِّيۡ٘ اُلۡقِيَ اِلَيَّ كِتٰبٌ كَرِيۡمٌ
quran.english: She said, "O eminent ones, indeed, to me has been delivered a noble letter

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ مِنۡ سُلَيۡمٰنَ وَاِنَّهٗ بِسۡمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحۡمٰنِ الرَّحِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is from Solomon, and indeed, it reads: 'In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful

quran.arabic: اَلَّا تَعۡلُوۡا عَلَيَّ وَاۡتُوۡنِيۡ مُسۡلِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Be not haughty with me but come to me in submission [as Muslims]

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡمَلَؤُا اَفۡتُوۡنِيۡ فِيۡ٘ اَمۡرِيۡۚ مَا كُنۡتُ قَاطِعَةً اَمۡرًا حَتّٰي تَشۡهَدُوۡنِ
quran.english: She said, "O eminent ones, advise me in my affair. I would not decide a matter until you witness [for] me

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا نَحۡنُ اُولُوۡا قُوَّةٍ وَّاُولُوۡا بَاۡسٍ شَدِيۡدٍ ࣢ۙ وَّالۡاَمۡرُ اِلَيۡكِ فَانۡظُرِيۡ مَاذَا تَاۡمُرِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "We are men of strength and of great military might, but the command is yours, so see what you will command

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ اِنَّ الۡمُلُوۡكَ اِذَا دَخَلُوۡا قَرۡيَةً اَفۡسَدُوۡهَا وَجَعَلُوۡ٘ا اَعِزَّةَ اَهۡلِهَا٘ اَذِلَّةًۚ وَكَذٰلِكَ يَفۡعَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: She said, "Indeed kings - when they enter a city, they ruin it and render the honored of its people humbled. And thus do they do

quran.arabic: وَاِنِّيۡ مُرۡسِلَةٌ اِلَيۡهِمۡ بِهَدِيَّةٍ فَنٰظِرَةٌۭ بِمَ يَرۡجِعُ الۡمُرۡسَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: But indeed, I will send to them a gift and see with what [reply] the messengers will return

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ سُلَيۡمٰنَ قَالَ اَتُمِدُّوۡنَنِ بِمَالٍؗ فَمَا٘ اٰتٰىنِۦَ اللّٰهُ خَيۡرٌ مِّمَّا٘ اٰتٰىكُمۡۚ بَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ بِهَدِيَّتِكُمۡ تَفۡرَحُوۡنَ
quran.english: So when they came to Solomon, he said, "Do you provide me with wealth? But what Allah has given me is better than what He has given you. Rather, it is you who rejoice in your gift

quran.arabic: اِرۡجِعۡ اِلَيۡهِمۡ فَلَنَاۡتِيَنَّهُمۡ بِجُنُوۡدٍ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُمۡ بِهَا وَلَنُخۡرِجَنَّهُمۡ مِّنۡهَا٘ اَذِلَّةً وَّهُمۡ صٰغِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Return to them, for we will surely come to them with soldiers that they will be powerless to encounter, and we will surely expel them therefrom in humiliation, and they will be debased

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡمَلَؤُا اَيُّكُمۡ يَاۡتِيۡنِيۡ بِعَرۡشِهَا قَبۡلَ اَنۡ يَّاۡتُوۡنِيۡ مُسۡلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Solomon] said, "O assembly [of jinn], which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in submission

quran.arabic: قَالَ عِفۡرِيۡتٌ مِّنَ الۡجِنِّ اَنَا اٰتِيۡكَ بِهٖ قَبۡلَ اَنۡ تَقُوۡمَ مِنۡ مَّقَامِكَۚ وَاِنِّيۡ عَلَيۡهِ لَقَوِيٌّ اَمِيۡنٌ
quran.english: A powerful one from among the jinn said, "I will bring it to you before you rise from your place, and indeed, I am for this [task] strong and trustworthy

quran.arabic: قَالَ الَّذِيۡ عِنۡدَهٗ عِلۡمٌ مِّنَ الۡكِتٰبِ اَنَا اٰتِيۡكَ بِهٖ قَبۡلَ اَنۡ يَّرۡتَدَّ اِلَيۡكَ طَرۡفُكَؕ فَلَمَّا رَاٰهُ مُسۡتَقِرًّا عِنۡدَهٗ قَالَ هٰذَا مِنۡ فَضۡلِ رَبِّيۡࣞ لِيَبۡلُوَنِيۡ٘ ءَاَشۡكُرُ اَمۡ اَكۡفُرُؕ وَمَنۡ شَكَرَ فَاِنَّمَا يَشۡكُرُ لِنَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ كَفَرَ فَاِنَّ رَبِّيۡ غَنِيٌّ كَرِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Said one who had knowledge from the Scripture, "I will bring it to you before your glance returns to you." And when [Solomon] saw it placed before him, he said, "This is from the favor of my Lord to test me whether I will be grateful or ungrateful. And whoever is grateful - his gratitude is only for [the benefit of] himself. And whoever is ungrateful - then indeed, my Lord is Free of need and Generous

quran.arabic: قَالَ نَكِّرُوۡا لَهَا عَرۡشَهَا نَنۡظُرۡ اَتَهۡتَدِيۡ٘ اَمۡ تَكُوۡنُ مِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Disguise for her her throne; we will see whether she will be guided [to truth] or will be of those who is not guided

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتۡ قِيۡلَ اَهٰكَذَا عَرۡشُكِؕ قَالَتۡ كَاَنَّهٗ هُوَۚ وَاُوۡتِيۡنَا الۡعِلۡمَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهَا وَكُنَّا مُسۡلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: So when she arrived, it was said [to her], "Is your throne like this?" She said, "[It is] as though it was it." [Solomon said], "And we were given knowledge before her, and we have been Muslims [in submission to Allah]

quran.arabic: وَصَدَّهَا مَا كَانَتۡ تَّعۡبُدُ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّهَا كَانَتۡ مِنۡ قَوۡمٍ كٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And that which she was worshipping other than Allah had averted her [from submission to Him]. Indeed, she was from a disbelieving people

quran.arabic: قِيۡلَ لَهَا ادۡخُلِي الصَّرۡحَۚ فَلَمَّا رَاَتۡهُ حَسِبَتۡهُ لُجَّةً وَّكَشَفَتۡ عَنۡ سَاقَيۡهَاؕ قَالَ اِنَّهٗ صَرۡحٌ مُّمَرَّدٌ مِّنۡ قَوَارِيۡرَ ࣢ؕ قَالَتۡ رَبِّ اِنِّيۡ ظَلَمۡتُ نَفۡسِيۡ وَاَسۡلَمۡتُ مَعَ سُلَيۡمٰنَ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: She was told, "Enter the palace." But when she saw it, she thought it was a body of water and uncovered her shins [to wade through]. He said, "Indeed, it is a palace [whose floor is] made smooth with glass." She said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, and I submit with Solomon to Allah, Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا٘ اِلٰي ثَمُوۡدَ اَخَاهُمۡ صٰلِحًا اَنِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ فَاِذَا هُمۡ فَرِيۡقٰنِ يَخۡتَصِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We had certainly sent to Thamud their brother Salih, [saying], "Worship Allah," and at once they were two parties conflicting

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ لِمَ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَ بِالسَّيِّئَةِ قَبۡلَ الۡحَسَنَةِۚ لَوۡلَا تَسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡنَ اللّٰهَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "O my people, why are you impatient for evil instead of good? Why do you not seek forgiveness of Allah that you may receive mercy

quran.arabic: قَالُوا اطَّيَّرۡنَا بِكَ وَبِمَنۡ مَّعَكَؕ قَالَ طٰٓئِرُكُمۡ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ بَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ تُفۡتَنُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "We consider you a bad omen, you and those with you." He said, "Your omen is with Allah. Rather, you are a people being tested

quran.arabic: وَكَانَ فِي الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ تِسۡعَةُ رَهۡطٍ يُّفۡسِدُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَا يُصۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And there were in the city nine family heads causing corruption in the land and not amending [its affairs]

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا تَقَاسَمُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهٗ وَاَهۡلَهٗ ثُمَّ لَنَقُوۡلَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهٖ مَا شَهِدۡنَا مَهۡلِكَ اَهۡلِهٖ وَاِنَّا لَصٰدِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Take a mutual oath by Allah that we will kill him by night, he and his family. Then we will say to his executor, 'We did not witness the destruction of his family, and indeed, we are truthful

quran.arabic: وَمَكَرُوۡا مَكۡرًا وَّمَكَرۡنَا مَكۡرًا وَّهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they planned a plan, and We planned a plan, while they perceived not

quran.arabic: فَانۡظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمۡۙ اَنَّا دَمَّرۡنٰهُمۡ وَقَوۡمَهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then look how was the outcome of their plan - that We destroyed them and their people, all

quran.arabic: فَتِلۡكَ بُيُوۡتُهُمۡ خَاوِيَةًۭ بِمَا ظَلَمُوۡاؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: So those are their houses, desolate because of the wrong they had done. Indeed in that is a sign for people who know

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡجَيۡنَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَكَانُوۡا يَتَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We saved those who believed and used to fear Allah

quran.arabic: وَلُوۡطًا اِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهٖ٘ اَتَاۡتُوۡنَ الۡفَاحِشَةَ وَاَنۡتُمۡ تُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention] Lot, when he said to his people, "Do you commit immorality while you are seeing

quran.arabic: اَئِنَّكُمۡ لَتَاۡتُوۡنَ الرِّجَالَ شَهۡوَةً مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ النِّسَآءِؕ بَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ تَجۡهَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do you indeed approach men with desire instead of women? Rather, you are a people behaving ignorantly

quran.arabic: فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوۡمِهٖ٘ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ قَالُوۡ٘ا اَخۡرِجُوۡ٘ا اٰلَ لُوۡطٍ مِّنۡ قَرۡيَتِكُمۡۚ اِنَّهُمۡ اُنَاسٌ يَّتَطَهَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: But the answer of his people was not except that they said, "Expel the family of Lot from your city. Indeed, they are people who keep themselves pure

quran.arabic: فَاَنۡجَيۡنٰهُ وَاَهۡلَهٗ٘ اِلَّا امۡرَاَتَهٗؗ قَدَّرۡنٰهَا مِنَ الۡغٰبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: So We saved him and his family, except for his wife; We destined her to be of those who remained behind

quran.arabic: وَاَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مَّطَرًاۚ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ الۡمُنۡذَرِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned

quran.arabic: قُلِ الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ وَسَلٰمٌ عَلٰي عِبَادِهِ الَّذِيۡنَ اصۡطَفٰيؕ ءٰٓاللّٰهُ خَيۡرٌ اَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Praise be to Allah, and peace upon His servants whom He has chosen. Is Allah better or what they associate with Him

quran.arabic: اَمَّنۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَاَنۡزَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءًۚ فَاَنۭۡ بَتۡنَا بِهٖ حَدَآئِقَ ذَاتَ بَهۡجَةٍۚ مَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ اَنۡ تُنۭۡ بِتُوۡا شَجَرَهَاؕ ءَاِلٰهٌ مَّعَ اللّٰهِؕ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٌ يَّعۡدِلُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: [More precisely], is He [not best] who created the heavens and the earth and sent down for you rain from the sky, causing to grow thereby gardens of joyful beauty which you could not [otherwise] have grown the trees thereof? Is there a deity with Allah? [No], but they are a people who ascribe equals [to Him]

quran.arabic: اَمَّنۡ جَعَلَ الۡاَرۡضَ قَرَارًا وَّجَعَلَ خِلٰلَهَا٘ اَنۡهٰرًا وَّجَعَلَ لَهَا رَوَاسِيَ وَجَعَلَ بَيۡنَ الۡبَحۡرَيۡنِ حَاجِزًاؕ ءَاِلٰهٌ مَّعَ اللّٰهِؕ بَلۡ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Is He [not best] who made the earth a stable ground and placed within it rivers and made for it firmly set mountains and placed between the two seas a barrier? Is there a deity with Allah? [No], but most of them do not know

quran.arabic: اَمَّنۡ يُّجِيۡبُ الۡمُضۡطَرَّ اِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ السُّوۡٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ الۡاَرۡضِؕ ءَاِلٰهٌ مَّعَ اللّٰهِؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Little do you remember

quran.arabic: اَمَّنۡ يَّهۡدِيۡكُمۡ فِيۡ ظُلُمٰتِ الۡبَرِّ وَالۡبَحۡرِ وَمَنۡ يُّرۡسِلُ الرِّيٰحَ بُشۡرًاۭ بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهٖؕ ءَاِلٰهٌ مَّعَ اللّٰهِؕ تَعٰلَي اللّٰهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Is He [not best] who guides you through the darknesses of the land and sea and who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy? Is there a deity with Allah? High is Allah above whatever they associate with Him

quran.arabic: اَمَّنۡ يَّبۡدَؤُا الۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيۡدُهٗ وَمَنۡ يَّرۡزُقُكُمۡ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ ءَاِلٰهٌ مَّعَ اللّٰهِؕ قُلۡ هَاتُوۡا بُرهَانَكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Is He [not best] who begins creation and then repeats it and who provides for you from the heaven and earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Say, "Produce your proof, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّا يَعۡلَمُ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ الۡغَيۡبَ اِلَّا اللّٰهُؕ وَمَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ اَيَّانَ يُبۡعَثُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allah, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected

quran.arabic: بَلِ ادّٰرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمۡ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِࣞ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِيۡ شَكٍّ مِّنۡهَاࣞ بَلۡ هُمۡ مِّنۡهَا عَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا ءَاِذَا كُنَّا تُرٰبًا وَّاٰبَآؤُنَا٘ اَئِنَّا لَمُخۡرَجُوۡنَ
quran.english: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ وُعِدۡنَا هٰذَا نَحۡنُ وَاٰبَآؤُنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلُۙ اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا٘ اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples

quran.arabic: قُلۡ سِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَانۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا تَكُنۡ فِيۡ ضَيۡقٍ مِّمَّا يَمۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَتٰي هٰذَا الۡوَعۡدُ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: قُلۡ عَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّكُوۡنَ رَدِفَ لَكُمۡ بَعۡضُ الَّذِيۡ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you - some of that for which you are impatient

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُوۡ فَضۡلٍ عَلَي النَّاسِ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord is full of bounty for the people, but most of them do not show gratitude

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُوۡرُهُمۡ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare

quran.arabic: وَمَا مِنۡ غَآئِبَةٍ فِي السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ اِلَّا فِيۡ كِتٰبٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ يَقُصُّ عَلٰي بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ اَكۡثَرَ الَّذِيۡ هُمۡ فِيۡهِ يَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, this Qur'an relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَهُدًي وَّرَحۡمَةٌ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, it is guidance and mercy for the believers

quran.arabic: اِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقۡضِيۡ بَيۡنَهُمۡ بِحُكۡمِهٖۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡعَلِيۡمُۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them by His [wise] judgement. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Knowing

quran.arabic: فَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَي اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّكَ عَلَي الۡحَقِّ الۡمُبِيۡنِ
quran.english: So rely upon Allah; indeed, you are upon the clear truth

quran.arabic: اِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ الۡمَوۡتٰي وَلَا تُسۡمِعُ الصُّمَّ الدُّعَآءَ اِذَا وَلَّوۡا مُدۡبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ بِهٰدِي الۡعُمۡيِ عَنۡ ضَلٰلَتِهِمۡؕ اِنۡ تُسۡمِعُ اِلَّا مَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنُ بِاٰيٰتِنَا فَهُمۡ مُّسۡلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [submitting to Allah]

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا وَقَعَ الۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ اَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمۡ دَآبَّةً مِّنَ الۡاَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمۡۙ اَنَّ النَّاسَ كَانُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا لَا يُوۡقِنُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And when the word befalls them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, [saying] that the people were, of Our verses, not certain [in faith]

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُ مِنۡ كُلِّ اُمَّةٍ فَوۡجًا مِّمَّنۡ يُّكَذِّبُ بِاٰيٰتِنَا فَهُمۡ يُوۡزَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا جَآءُوۡ قَالَ اَكَذَّبۡتُمۡ بِاٰيٰتِيۡ وَلَمۡ تُحِيۡطُوۡا بِهَا عِلۡمًا اَمَّاذَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing

quran.arabic: وَوَقَعَ الۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِمَا ظَلَمُوۡا فَهُمۡ لَا يَنۡطِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the decree will befall them for the wrong they did, and they will not [be able to] speak

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّا جَعَلۡنَا الَّيۡلَ لِيَسۡكُنُوۡا فِيۡهِ وَالنَّهَارَ مُبۡصِرًاؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يُنۡفَخُ فِي الصُّوۡرِ فَفَزِعَ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَنۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ اِلَّا مَنۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُؕ وَكُلٌّ اَتَوۡهُ دٰخِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allah wills. And all will come to Him humbled

quran.arabic: وَتَرَي الۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسَبُهَا جَامِدَةً وَّهِيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ السَّحَابِؕ صُنۡعَ اللّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍؕ اِنَّهٗ خَبِيۡرٌۭ بِمَا تَفۡعَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And you see the mountains, thinking them rigid, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allah, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Acquainted with that which you do

quran.arabic: مَنۡ جَآءَ بِالۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهٗ خَيۡرٌ مِّنۡهَاۚ وَهُمۡ مِّنۡ فَزَعٍ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ اٰمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Whoever comes [at Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it, and they, from the terror of that Day, will be safe

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ جَآءَ بِالسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتۡ وُجُوۡهُهُمۡ فِي النَّارِؕ هَلۡ تُجۡزَوۡنَ اِلَّا مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا٘ اُمِرۡتُ اَنۡ اَعۡبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ الۡبَلۡدَةِ الَّذِيۡ حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهٗ كُلُّ شَيۡءٍؗ وَّاُمِرۡتُ اَنۡ اَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Say, O Muhammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [those who submit to Allah]

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡ اَتۡلُوَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَۚ فَمَنِ اهۡتَدٰي فَاِنَّمَا يَهۡتَدِيۡ لِنَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ ضَلَّ فَقُلۡ اِنَّمَا٘ اَنَا مِنَ الۡمُنۡذِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And to recite the Qur'an." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners

quran.arabic: وَقُلِ الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ سَيُرِيۡكُمۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ فَتَعۡرِفُوۡنَهَاؕ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَافِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And say, "[All] praise is [due] to Allah. He will show you His signs, and you will recognize them. And your Lord is not unaware of what you do

quran.arabic: طٰسٓمّٓ
quran.english: Ta, Seen, Meem

quran.arabic: تِلۡكَ اٰيٰتُ الۡكِتٰبِ الۡمُبِيۡنِ
quran.english: These are the verses of the clear Book

quran.arabic: نَتۡلُوۡا عَلَيۡكَ مِنۡ نَّبَاِ مُوۡسٰي وَفِرۡعَوۡنَ بِالۡحَقِّ لِقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: We recite to you from the news of Moses and Pharaoh in truth for a people who believe

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِرۡعَوۡنَ عَلَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَجَعَلَ اَهۡلَهَا شِيَعًا يَّسۡتَضۡعِفُ طَآئِفَةً مِّنۡهُمۡ يُذَبِّحُ اَبۡنَآءَهُمۡ وَيَسۡتَحۡيٖ نِسَآءَهُمۡؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ مِنَ الۡمُفۡسِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, Pharaoh exalted himself in the land and made its people into factions, oppressing a sector among them, slaughtering their [newborn] sons and keeping their females alive. Indeed, he was of the corrupters

quran.arabic: وَنُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ نَّمُنَّ عَلَي الَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتُضۡعِفُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَنَجۡعَلَهُمۡ اَئِمَّةً وَّنَجۡعَلَهُمُ الۡوٰرِثِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We wanted to confer favor upon those who were oppressed in the land and make them leaders and make them inheritors

quran.arabic: وَنُمَكِّنَ لَهُمۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَنُرِيَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَهَامٰنَ وَجُنُوۡدَهُمَا مِنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَحۡذَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And establish them in the land and show Pharaoh and [his minister] Haman and their soldiers through them that which they had feared

quran.arabic: وَاَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلٰ٘ي اُمِّ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اَنۡ اَرۡضِعِيۡهِۚ فَاِذَا خِفۡتِ عَلَيۡهِ فَاَلۡقِيۡهِ فِي الۡيَمِّ وَلَا تَخَافِيۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنِيۡۚ اِنَّا رَآدُّوۡهُ اِلَيۡكِ وَجَاعِلُوۡهُ مِنَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We inspired to the mother of Moses, "Suckle him; but when you fear for him, cast him into the river and do not fear and do not grieve. Indeed, We will return him to you and will make him [one] of the messengers

quran.arabic: فَالۡتَقَطَهٗ٘ اٰلُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ لِيَكُوۡنَ لَهُمۡ عَدُوًّا وَّحَزَنًاؕ اِنَّ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَهَامٰنَ وَجُنُوۡدَهُمَا كَانُوۡا خٰطِـِٕيۡنَ
quran.english: And the family of Pharaoh picked him up [out of the river] so that he would become to them an enemy and a [cause of] grief. Indeed, Pharaoh and Haman and their soldiers were deliberate sinners

quran.arabic: وَقَالَتِ امۡرَاَتُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ قُرَّتُ عَيۡنٍ لِّيۡ وَلَكَؕ لَا تَقۡتُلُوۡهُࣗۖ عَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّنۡفَعَنَا٘ اَوۡ نَتَّخِذَهٗ وَلَدًا وَّهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the wife of Pharaoh said, "[He will be] a comfort of the eye for me and for you. Do not kill him; perhaps he may benefit us, or we may adopt him as a son." And they perceived not

quran.arabic: وَاَصۡبَحَ فُؤَادُ اُمِّ مُوۡسٰي فٰرِغًاؕ اِنۡ كَادَتۡ لَتُبۡدِيۡ بِهٖ لَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ رَّبَطۡنَا عَلٰي قَلۡبِهَا لِتَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And the heart of Moses' mother became empty [of all else]. She was about to disclose [the matter concerning] him had We not bound fast her heart that she would be of the believers

quran.arabic: وَقَالَتۡ لِاُخۡتِهٖ قُصِّيۡهِؗ فَبَصُرَتۡ بِهٖ عَنۡ جُنُبٍ وَّهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And she said to his sister, "Follow him"; so she watched him from a distance while they perceived not

quran.arabic: وَحَرَّمۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ الۡمَرَاضِعَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ فَقَالَتۡ هَلۡ اَدُلُّكُمۡ عَلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِ بَيۡتٍ يَّكۡفُلُوۡنَهٗ لَكُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَهٗ نٰصِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We had prevented from him [all] wet nurses before, so she said, "Shall I direct you to a household that will be responsible for him for you while they are to him [for his upbringing] sincere

quran.arabic: فَرَدَدۡنٰهُ اِلٰ٘ي اُمِّهٖ كَيۡ تَقَرَّ عَيۡنُهَا وَلَا تَحۡزَنَ وَلِتَعۡلَمَ اَنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّ وَّلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So We restored him to his mother that she might be content and not grieve and that she would know that the promise of Allah is true. But most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا بَلَغَ اَشُدَّهٗ وَاسۡتَوٰ٘ي اٰتَيۡنٰهُ حُكۡمًا وَّعِلۡمًاؕ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when he attained his full strength and was [mentally] mature, We bestowed upon him judgement and knowledge. And thus do We reward the doers of good

quran.arabic: وَدَخَلَ الۡمَدِيۡنَةَ عَلٰي حِيۡنِ غَفۡلَةٍ مِّنۡ اَهۡلِهَا فَوَجَدَ فِيۡهَا رَجُلَيۡنِ يَقۡتَتِلٰنِؗ هٰذَا مِنۡ شِيۡعَتِهٖ وَهٰذَا مِنۡ عَدُوِّهٖۚ فَاسۡتَغَاثَهُ الَّذِيۡ مِنۡ شِيۡعَتِهٖ عَلَي الَّذِيۡ مِنۡ عَدُوِّهٖۙ فَوَكَزَهٗ مُوۡسٰي فَقَضٰي عَلَيۡهِؗ قَالَ هٰذَا مِنۡ عَمَلِ الشَّيۡطٰنِؕ اِنَّهٗ عَدُوٌّ مُّضِلٌّ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And he entered the city at a time of inattention by its people and found therein two men fighting: one from his faction and one from among his enemy. And the one from his faction called for help to him against the one from his enemy, so Moses struck him and [unintentionally] killed him. [Moses] said, "This is from the work of Satan. Indeed, he is a manifest, misleading enemy

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّيۡ ظَلَمۡتُ نَفۡسِيۡ فَاغۡفِرۡ لِيۡ فَغَفَرَ لَهٗؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡغَفُوۡرُ الرَّحِيۡمُ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, so forgive me," and He forgave him. Indeed, He is the Forgiving, the Merciful

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَا٘ اَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ فَلَنۡ اَكُوۡنَ ظَهِيۡرًا لِّلۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, for the favor You bestowed upon me, I will never be an assistant to the criminals

quran.arabic: فَاَصۡبَحَ فِي الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ خَآئِفًا يَّتَرَقَّبُ فَاِذَا الَّذِي اسۡتَنۡصَرَهٗ بِالۡاَمۡسِ يَسۡتَصۡرِخُهٗؕ قَالَ لَهٗ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اِنَّكَ لَغَوِيٌّ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And he became inside the city fearful and anticipating [exposure], when suddenly the one who sought his help the previous day cried out to him [once again]. Moses said to him, "Indeed, you are an evident, [persistent] deviator

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا٘ اَنۡ اَرَادَ اَنۡ يَّبۡطِشَ بِالَّذِيۡ هُوَ عَدُوٌّ لَّهُمَاۙ قَالَ يٰمُوۡسٰ٘ي اَتُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ تَقۡتُلَنِيۡ كَمَا قَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسًاۭ بِالۡاَمۡسِࣗ اِنۡ تُرِيۡدُ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ تَكُوۡنَ جَبَّارًا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا تُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ تَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُصۡلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when he wanted to strike the one who was an enemy to both of them, he said, "O Moses, do you intend to kill me as you killed someone yesterday? You only want to be a tyrant in the land and do not want to be of the amenders

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَ رَجُلٌ مِّنۡ اَقۡصَا الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ يَسۡعٰيؗ قَالَ يٰمُوۡسٰ٘ي اِنَّ الۡمَلَاَ يَاۡتَمِرُوۡنَ بِكَ لِيَقۡتُلُوۡكَ فَاخۡرُجۡ اِنِّيۡ لَكَ مِنَ النّٰصِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And a man came from the farthest end of the city, running. He said, "O Moses, indeed the eminent ones are conferring over you [intending] to kill you, so leave [the city]; indeed, I am to you of the sincere advisors

quran.arabic: فَخَرَجَ مِنۡهَا خَآئِفًا يَّتَرَقَّبُؗ قَالَ رَبِّ نَجِّنِيۡ مِنَ الۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So he left it, fearful and anticipating [apprehension]. He said, "My Lord, save me from the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا تَوَجَّهَ تِلۡقَآءَ مَدۡيَنَ قَالَ عَسٰي رَبِّيۡ٘ اَنۡ يَّهۡدِيَنِيۡ سَوَآءَ السَّبِيۡلِ
quran.english: And when he directed himself toward Madyan, he said, "Perhaps my Lord will guide me to the sound way

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا وَرَدَ مَآءَ مَدۡيَنَ وَجَدَ عَلَيۡهِ اُمَّةً مِّنَ النَّاسِ يَسۡقُوۡنَ ࣢ؗ وَوَجَدَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهِمُ امۡرَاَتَيۡنِ تَذُوۡدٰنِۚ قَالَ مَا خَطۡبُكُمَاؕ قَالَتَا لَا نَسۡقِيۡ حَتّٰي يُصۡدِرَ الرِّعَآءُࣝ وَاَبُوۡنَا شَيۡخٌ كَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And when he came to the well of Madyan, he found there a crowd of people watering [their flocks], and he found aside from them two women driving back [their flocks]. He said, "What is your circumstance?" They said, "We do not water until the shepherds dispatch [their flocks]; and our father is an old man

quran.arabic: فَسَقٰي لَهُمَا ثُمَّ تَوَلّٰ٘ي اِلَي الظِّلِّ فَقَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّيۡ لِمَا٘ اَنۡزَلۡتَ اِلَيَّ مِنۡ خَيۡرٍ فَقِيۡرٌ
quran.english: So he watered [their flocks] for them; then he went back to the shade and said, "My Lord, indeed I am, for whatever good You would send down to me, in need

quran.arabic: فَجَآءَتۡهُ اِحۡدٰىهُمَا تَمۡشِيۡ عَلَي اسۡتِحۡيَآءٍؗ قَالَتۡ اِنَّ اَبِيۡ يَدۡعُوۡكَ لِيَجۡزِيَكَ اَجۡرَ مَا سَقَيۡتَ لَنَاؕ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهٗ وَقَصَّ عَلَيۡهِ الۡقَصَصَۙ قَالَ لَا تَخَفۡࣞ نَجَوۡتَ مِنَ الۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then one of the two women came to him walking with shyness. She said, "Indeed, my father invites you that he may reward you for having watered for us." So when he came to him and related to him the story, he said, "Fear not. You have escaped from the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: قَالَتۡ اِحۡدٰىهُمَا يٰ٘اَبَتِ اسۡتَاۡجِرۡهُؗ اِنَّ خَيۡرَ مَنِ اسۡتَاۡجَرۡتَ الۡقَوِيُّ الۡاَمِيۡنُ
quran.english: One of the women said, "O my father, hire him. Indeed, the best one you can hire is the strong and the trustworthy

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنِّيۡ٘ اُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ اُنۡكِحَكَ اِحۡدَي ابۡنَتَيَّ هٰتَيۡنِ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ تَاۡجُرَنِيۡ ثَمٰنِيَ حِجَجٍۚ فَاِنۡ اَتۡمَمۡتَ عَشۡرًا فَمِنۡ عِنۡدِكَۚ وَمَا٘ اُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ اَشُقَّ عَلَيۡكَؕ سَتَجِدُنِيۡ٘ اِنۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ مِنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Indeed, I wish to wed you one of these, my two daughters, on [the condition] that you serve me for eight years; but if you complete ten, it will be [as a favor] from you. And I do not wish to put you in difficulty. You will find me, if Allah wills, from among the righteous

quran.arabic: قَالَ ذٰلِكَ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنَكَؕ اَيَّمَا الۡاَجَلَيۡنِ قَضَيۡتُ فَلَا عُدۡوَانَ عَلَيَّؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلٰي مَا نَقُوۡلُ وَكِيۡلٌࣖ‏
quran.english: [Moses] said, "That is [established] between me and you. Whichever of the two terms I complete - there is no injustice to me, and Allah, over what we say, is Witness

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا قَضٰي مُوۡسَي الۡاَجَلَ وَسَارَ بِاَهۡلِهٖ٘ اٰنَسَ مِنۡ جَانِبِ الطُّوۡرِ نَارًاۚ قَالَ لِاَهۡلِهِ امۡكُثُوۡ٘ا اِنِّيۡ٘ اٰنَسۡتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّيۡ٘ اٰتِيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ اَوۡ جَذۡوَةٍ مِّنَ النَّارِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَصۡطَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when Moses had completed the term and was traveling with his family, he perceived from the direction of the mount a fire. He said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire. Perhaps I will bring you from there [some] information or burning wood from the fire that you may warm yourselves

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا٘ اَتٰىهَا نُوۡدِيَ مِنۡ شَاطِئِ الۡوَادِ الۡاَيۡمَنِ فِي الۡبُقۡعَةِ الۡمُبٰرَكَةِ مِنَ الشَّجَرَةِ اَنۡ يّٰمُوۡسٰ٘ي اِنِّيۡ٘ اَنَا اللّٰهُ رَبُّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: But when he came to it, he was called from the right side of the valley in a blessed spot - from the tree, "O Moses, indeed I am Allah, Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡ اَلۡقِ عَصَاكَؕ فَلَمَّا رَاٰهَا تَهۡتَزُّ كَاَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَّلّٰي مُدۡبِرًا وَّلَمۡ يُعَقِّبۡؕ يٰمُوۡسٰ٘ي اَقۡبِلۡ وَلَا تَخَفۡࣞ اِنَّكَ مِنَ الۡاٰمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it was a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allah said], "O Moses, approach and fear not. Indeed, you are of the secure

quran.arabic: اُسۡلُكۡ يَدَكَ فِيۡ جَيۡبِكَ تَخۡرُجۡ بَيۡضَآءَ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ سُوۡٓءٍؗ وَّاضۡمُمۡ اِلَيۡكَ جَنَاحَكَ مِنَ الرَّهۡبِ فَذٰنِكَ بُرۡهَانٰنِ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَا۠ئِهٖؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَوۡمًا فٰسِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Insert your hand into the opening of your garment; it will come out white, without disease. And draw in your arm close to you [as prevention] from fear, for those are two proofs from your Lord to Pharaoh and his establishment. Indeed, they have been a people defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّيۡ قَتَلۡتُ مِنۡهُمۡ نَفۡسًا فَاَخَافُ اَنۡ يَّقۡتُلُوۡنِ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, indeed, I killed from among them someone, and I fear they will kill me

quran.arabic: وَاَخِيۡ هٰرُوۡنُ هُوَ اَفۡصَحُ مِنِّيۡ لِسَانًا فَاَرۡسِلۡهُ مَعِيَ رِدۡاً يُّصَدِّقُنِيۡ٘ؗ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ اَنۡ يُّكَذِّبُوۡنِ
quran.english: And my brother Aaron is more fluent than me in tongue, so send him with me as support, verifying me. Indeed, I fear that they will deny me

quran.arabic: قَالَ سَنَشُدُّ عَضُدَكَ بِاَخِيۡكَ وَنَجۡعَلُ لَكُمَا سُلۡطٰنًا فَلَا يَصِلُوۡنَ اِلَيۡكُمَاۛۚ بِاٰيٰتِنَاۛۚ اَنۡتُمَا وَمَنِ اتَّبَعَكُمَا الۡغٰلِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Allah] said, "We will strengthen your arm through your brother and grant you both supremacy so they will not reach you. [It will be] through Our signs; you and those who follow you will be the predominant

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ مُّوۡسٰي بِاٰيٰتِنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ قَالُوۡا مَا هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا سِحۡرٌ مُّفۡتَرًي وَّمَا سَمِعۡنَا بِهٰذَا فِيۡ٘ اٰبَآئِنَا الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: But when Moses came to them with Our signs as clear evidences, they said, "This is not except invented magic, and we have not heard of this [religion] among our forefathers

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ مُوۡسٰي رَبِّيۡ٘ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنۡ جَآءَ بِالۡهُدٰي مِنۡ عِنۡدِهٖ وَمَنۡ تَكُوۡنُ لَهٗ عَاقِبَةُ الدَّارِؕ اِنَّهٗ لَا يُفۡلِحُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Moses said, "My Lord is more knowing [than we or you] of who has come with guidance from Him and to whom will be succession in the home. Indeed, wrongdoers do not succeed

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡمَلَاُ مَا عَلِمۡتُ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اِلٰهٍ غَيۡرِيۡۚ فَاَوۡقِدۡ لِيۡ يٰهَامٰنُ عَلَي الطِّيۡنِ فَاجۡعَلۡ لِّيۡ صَرۡحًا لَّعَلِّيۡ٘ اَطَّلِعُ اِلٰ٘ي اِلٰهِ مُوۡسٰيۙ وَاِنِّيۡ لَاَظُنُّهٗ مِنَ الۡكٰذِبِيۡنَ
