quran.english: And Pharaoh said, "O eminent ones, I have not known you to have a god other than me. Then ignite for me, O Haman, [a fire] upon the clay and make for me a tower that I may look at the God of Moses. And indeed, I do think he is among the liars

quran.arabic: وَاسۡتَكۡبَرَ هُوَ وَجُنُوۡدُهٗ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ الۡحَقِّ وَظَنُّوۡ٘ا اَنَّهُمۡ اِلَيۡنَا لَا يُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And he was arrogant, he and his soldiers, in the land, without right, and they thought that they would not be returned to Us

quran.arabic: فَاَخَذۡنٰهُ وَجُنُوۡدَهٗ فَنَبَذۡنٰهُمۡ فِي الۡيَمِّۚ فَانۡظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: So We took him and his soldiers and threw them into the sea. So see how was the end of the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ اَئِمَّةً يَّدۡعُوۡنَ اِلَي النَّارِۚ وَيَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ لَا يُنۡصَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We made them leaders inviting to the Fire, and on the Day of Resurrection they will not be helped

quran.arabic: وَاَتۡبَعۡنٰهُمۡ فِيۡ هٰذِهِ الدُّنۡيَا لَعۡنَةًۚ وَيَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ هُمۡ مِّنَ الۡمَقۡبُوۡحِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We caused to overtake them in this world a curse, and on the Day of Resurrection they will be of the despised

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسَي الۡكِتٰبَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا٘ اَهۡلَكۡنَا الۡقُرُوۡنَ الۡاُوۡلٰي بَصَآئِرَ لِلنَّاسِ وَهُدًي وَّرَحۡمَةً لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We gave Moses the Scripture, after We had destroyed the former generations, as enlightenment for the people and guidance and mercy that they might be reminded

quran.arabic: وَمَا كُنۡتَ بِجَانِبِ الۡغَرۡبِيِّ اِذۡ قَضَيۡنَا٘ اِلٰي مُوۡسَي الۡاَمۡرَ وَمَا كُنۡتَ مِنَ الشّٰهِدِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And you, [O Muhammad], were not on the western side [of the mount] when We revealed to Moses the command, and you were not among the witnesses [to that]

quran.arabic: وَلٰكِنَّا٘ اَنۡشَاۡنَا قُرُوۡنًا فَتَطَاوَلَ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡعُمُرُۚ وَمَا كُنۡتَ ثَاوِيًا فِيۡ٘ اَهۡلِ مَدۡيَنَ تَتۡلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتِنَاۙ وَلٰكِنَّا كُنَّا مُرۡسِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: But We produced [many] generations [after Moses], and prolonged was their duration. And you were not a resident among the people of Madyan, reciting to them Our verses, but We were senders [of this message]

quran.arabic: وَمَا كُنۡتَ بِجَانِبِ الطُّوۡرِ اِذۡ نَادَيۡنَا وَلٰكِنۡ رَّحۡمَةً مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَ لِتُنۡذِرَ قَوۡمًا مَّا٘ اَتٰىهُمۡ مِّنۡ نَّذِيۡرٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And you were not at the side of the mount when We called [Moses] but [were sent] as a mercy from your Lord to warn a people to whom no warner had come before you that they might be reminded

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ تُصِيۡبَهُمۡ مُّصِيۡبَةٌۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَتۡ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ فَيَقُوۡلُوۡا رَبَّنَا لَوۡلَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡتَ اِلَيۡنَا رَسُوۡلًا فَنَتَّبِعَ اٰيٰتِكَ وَنَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And if not that a disaster should strike them for what their hands put forth [of sins] and they would say, "Our Lord, why did You not send us a messenger so we could have followed Your verses and been among the believers

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ الۡحَقُّ مِنۡ عِنۡدِنَا قَالُوۡا لَوۡلَا٘ اُوۡتِيَ مِثۡلَ مَا٘ اُوۡتِيَ مُوۡسٰيؕ اَوَلَمۡ يَكۡفُرُوۡا بِمَا٘ اُوۡتِيَ مُوۡسٰي مِنۡ قَبۡلُۚ قَالُوۡا سِحۡرٰنِ تَظَاهَرَاࣞ وَقَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا بِكُلٍّ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: But when the truth came to them from Us, they said, "Why was he not given like that which was given to Moses?" Did they not disbelieve in that which was given to Moses before? They said, "[They are but] two works of magic supporting each other, and indeed we are, in both, disbelievers

quran.arabic: قُلۡ فَاۡتُوۡا بِكِتٰبٍ مِّنۡ عِنۡدِ اللّٰهِ هُوَ اَهۡدٰي مِنۡهُمَا٘ اَتَّبِعۡهُ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "Then bring a scripture from Allah which is more guiding than either of them that I may follow it, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ لَّمۡ يَسۡتَجِيۡبُوۡا لَكَ فَاعۡلَمۡ اَنَّمَا يَتَّبِعُوۡنَ اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡؕ وَمَنۡ اَضَلُّ مِمَّنِ اتَّبَعَ هَوٰىهُ بِغَيۡرِ هُدًي مِّنَ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَهۡدِي الۡقَوۡمَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: But if they do not respond to you - then know that they only follow their [own] desires. And who is more astray than one who follows his desire without guidance from Allah? Indeed, Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ وَصَّلۡنَا لَهُمُ الۡقَوۡلَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And We have [repeatedly] conveyed to them the Qur'an that they might be reminded

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمُ الۡكِتٰبَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ هُمۡ بِهٖ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those to whom We gave the Scripture before it - they are believers in it

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا يُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ قَالُوۡ٘ا اٰمَنَّا بِهٖ٘ اِنَّهُ الۡحَقُّ مِنۡ رَّبِّنَا٘ اِنَّا كُنَّا مِنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ مُسۡلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when it is recited to them, they say, "We have believed in it; indeed, it is the truth from our Lord. Indeed we were, [even] before it, Muslims [submitting to Allah]

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ يُؤۡتَوۡنَ اَجۡرَهُمۡ مَّرَّتَيۡنِ بِمَا صَبَرُوۡا وَيَدۡرَءُوۡنَ بِالۡحَسَنَةِ السَّيِّئَةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ يُنۡفِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those will be given their reward twice for what they patiently endured and [because] they avert evil through good, and from what We have provided them they spend

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا سَمِعُوا اللَّغۡوَ اَعۡرَضُوۡا عَنۡهُ وَقَالُوۡا لَنَا٘ اَعۡمَالُنَا وَلَكُمۡ اَعۡمَالُكُمۡؗ سَلٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡؗ لَا نَبۡتَغِي الۡجٰهِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when they hear ill speech, they turn away from it and say, "For us are our deeds, and for you are your deeds. Peace will be upon you; we seek not the ignorant

quran.arabic: اِنَّكَ لَا تَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ اَحۡبَبۡتَ وَلٰكِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُۚ وَهُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِالۡمُهۡتَدِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, [O Muhammad], you do not guide whom you like, but Allah guides whom He wills. And He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ نَّتَّبِعِ الۡهُدٰي مَعَكَ نُتَخَطَّفۡ مِنۡ اَرۡضِنَاؕ اَوَلَمۡ نُمَكِّنۡ لَّهُمۡ حَرَمًا اٰمِنًا يُّجۡبٰ٘ي اِلَيۡهِ ثَمَرٰتُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ رِّزۡقًا مِّنۡ لَّدُنَّا وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "If we were to follow the guidance with you, we would be swept from our land." Have we not established for them a safe sanctuary to which are brought the fruits of all things as provision from Us? But most of them do not know

quran.arabic: وَكَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا مِنۡ قَرۡيَةٍۭ بَطِرَتۡ مَعِيۡشَتَهَاۚ فَتِلۡكَ مَسٰكِنُهُمۡ لَمۡ تُسۡكَنۡ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًاؕ وَكُنَّا نَحۡنُ الۡوٰرِثِيۡنَ
quran.english: And how many a city have We destroyed that was insolent in its [way of] living, and those are their dwellings which have not been inhabited after them except briefly. And it is We who were the inheritors

quran.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ مُهۡلِكَ الۡقُرٰي حَتّٰي يَبۡعَثَ فِيۡ٘ اُمِّهَا رَسُوۡلًا يَّتۡلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتِنَاۚ وَمَا كُنَّا مُهۡلِكِي الۡقُرٰ٘ي اِلَّا وَاَهۡلُهَا ظٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And never would your Lord have destroyed the cities until He had sent to their mother a messenger reciting to them Our verses. And We would not destroy the cities except while their people were wrongdoers

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اُوۡتِيۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍ فَمَتَاعُ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا وَزِيۡنَتُهَاۚ وَمَا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ خَيۡرٌ وَّاَبۡقٰيؕ اَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And whatever thing you [people] have been given - it is [only for] the enjoyment of worldly life and its adornment. And what is with Allah is better and more lasting; so will you not use reason

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ وَّعَدۡنٰهُ وَعۡدًا حَسَنًا فَهُوَ لَاقِيۡهِ كَمَنۡ مَّتَّعۡنٰهُ مَتَاعَ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا ثُمَّ هُوَ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ مِنَ الۡمُحۡضَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then is he whom We have promised a good promise which he will obtain like he for whom We provided enjoyment of worldly life [but] then he is, on the Day of Resurrection, among those presented [for punishment in Hell]

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يُنَادِيۡهِمۡ فَيَقُوۡلُ اَيۡنَ شُرَكَآءِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ كُنۡتُمۡ تَزۡعُمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [warn of] the Day He will call them and say, "Where are My 'partners' which you used to claim

quran.arabic: قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ حَقَّ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡقَوۡلُ رَبَّنَا هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ الَّذِيۡنَ اَغۡوَيۡنَاۚ اَغۡوَيۡنٰهُمۡ كَمَا غَوَيۡنَاۚ تَبَرَّاۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَؗ مَا كَانُوۡ٘ا اِيَّانَا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those upon whom the word will have come into effect will say, "Our Lord, these are the ones we led to error. We led them to error just as we were in error. We declare our disassociation [from them] to You. They did not used to worship us

quran.arabic: وَقِيۡلَ ادۡعُوۡا شُرَكَآءَكُمۡ فَدَعَوۡهُمۡ فَلَمۡ يَسۡتَجِيۡبُوۡا لَهُمۡ وَرَاَوُا الۡعَذَابَۚ لَوۡ اَنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا يَهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it will be said, "Invoke your 'partners' " and they will invoke them; but they will not respond to them, and they will see the punishment. If only they had followed guidance

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يُنَادِيۡهِمۡ فَيَقُوۡلُ مَاذَا٘ اَجَبۡتُمُ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention] the Day He will call them and say, "What did you answer the messengers

quran.arabic: فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡاَنۭۡ بَآءُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ فَهُمۡ لَا يَتَسَآءَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: But the information will be unapparent to them that Day, so they will not [be able to] ask one another

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا مَنۡ تَابَ وَاٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَعَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُفۡلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: But as for one who had repented, believed, and done righteousness, it is promised by Allah that he will be among the successful

quran.arabic: وَرَبُّكَ يَخۡلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُ وَيَخۡتَارُؕ مَا كَانَ لَهُمُ الۡخِيَرَةُؕ سُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ وَتَعٰلٰي عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: And your Lord creates what He wills and chooses; not for them was the choice. Exalted is Allah and high above what they associate with Him

quran.arabic: وَرَبُّكَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُوۡرُهُمۡ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ اللّٰهُ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَؕ لَهُ الۡحَمۡدُ فِي الۡاُوۡلٰي وَالۡاٰخِرَةِؗ وَلَهُ الۡحُكۡمُ وَاِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And He is Allah; there is no deity except Him. To Him is [due all] praise in the first [life] and the Hereafter. And His is the [final] decision, and to Him you will be returned

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ جَعَلَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡكُمُ الَّيۡلَ سَرۡمَدًا اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِ مَنۡ اِلٰهٌ غَيۡرُ اللّٰهِ يَاۡتِيۡكُمۡ بِضِيَآءٍؕ اَفَلَا تَسۡمَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "Have you considered: if Allah should make for you the night continuous until the Day of Resurrection, what deity other than Allah could bring you light? Then will you not hear

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ جَعَلَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡكُمُ النَّهَارَ سَرۡمَدًا اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِ مَنۡ اِلٰهٌ غَيۡرُ اللّٰهِ يَاۡتِيۡكُمۡ بِلَيۡلٍ تَسۡكُنُوۡنَ فِيۡهِؕ اَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "Have you considered: if Allah should make for you the day continuous until the Day of Resurrection, what deity other than Allah could bring you a night in which you may rest? Then will you not see

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ رَّحۡمَتِهٖ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَ لِتَسۡكُنُوۡا فِيۡهِ وَلِتَبۡتَغُوۡا مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖ وَلَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And out of His mercy He made for you the night and the day that you may rest therein and [by day] seek from His bounty and [that] perhaps you will be grateful

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يُنَادِيۡهِمۡ فَيَقُوۡلُ اَيۡنَ شُرَكَآءِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ كُنۡتُمۡ تَزۡعُمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [warn of] the Day He will call them and say, "Where are my 'partners' which you used to claim

quran.arabic: وَنَزَعۡنَا مِنۡ كُلِّ اُمَّةٍ شَهِيۡدًا فَقُلۡنَا هَاتُوۡا بُرۡهَانَكُمۡ فَعَلِمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّ الۡحَقَّ لِلّٰهِ وَضَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَفۡتَرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We will extract from every nation a witness and say, "Produce your proof," and they will know that the truth belongs to Allah, and lost from them is that which they used to invent

quran.arabic: اِنَّ قَارُوۡنَ كَانَ مِنۡ قَوۡمِ مُوۡسٰي فَبَغٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡࣕ وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُ مِنَ الۡكُنُوۡزِ مَا٘ اِنَّ مَفَاتِحَهٗ لَتَنُوۡٓاُ بِالۡعُصۡبَةِ اُولِي الۡقُوَّةِࣗ اِذۡ قَالَ لَهٗ قَوۡمُهٗ لَا تَفۡرَحۡ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يُحِبُّ الۡفَرِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, Qarun was from the people of Moses, but he tyrannized them. And We gave him of treasures whose keys would burden a band of strong men; thereupon his people said to him, "Do not exult. Indeed, Allah does not like the exultant

quran.arabic: وَابۡتَغِ فِيۡمَا٘ اٰتٰىكَ اللّٰهُ الدَّارَ الۡاٰخِرَةَ وَلَا تَنۡسَ نَصِيۡبَكَ مِنَ الدُّنۡيَا وَاَحۡسِنۡ كَمَا٘ اَحۡسَنَ اللّٰهُ اِلَيۡكَ وَلَا تَبۡغِ الۡفَسَادَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يُحِبُّ الۡمُفۡسِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: But seek, through that which Allah has given you, the home of the Hereafter; and [yet], do not forget your share of the world. And do good as Allah has done good to you. And desire not corruption in the land. Indeed, Allah does not like corrupters

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّمَا٘ اُوۡتِيۡتُهٗ عَلٰي عِلۡمٍ عِنۡدِيۡؕ اَوَلَمۡ يَعۡلَمۡ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ قَدۡ اَهۡلَكَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ مِنَ الۡقُرُوۡنِ مَنۡ هُوَ اَشَدُّ مِنۡهُ قُوَّةً وَّاَكۡثَرُ جَمۡعًاؕ وَلَا يُسۡـَٔلُ عَنۡ ذُنُوۡبِهِمُ الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "I was only given it because of knowledge I have." Did he not know that Allah had destroyed before him of generations those who were greater than him in power and greater in accumulation [of wealth]? But the criminals, about their sins, will not be asked

quran.arabic: فَخَرَجَ عَلٰي قَوۡمِهٖ فِيۡ زِيۡنَتِهٖؕ قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ يُرِيۡدُوۡنَ الۡحَيٰوةَ الدُّنۡيَا يٰلَيۡتَ لَنَا مِثۡلَ مَا٘ اُوۡتِيَ قَارُوۡنُۙ اِنَّهٗ لَذُوۡ حَظٍّ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: So he came out before his people in his adornment. Those who desired the worldly life said, "Oh, would that we had like what was given to Qarun. Indeed, he is one of great fortune

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَ وَيۡلَكُمۡ ثَوَابُ اللّٰهِ خَيۡرٌ لِّمَنۡ اٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًاۚ وَلَا يُلَقّٰىهَا٘ اِلَّا الصّٰبِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: But those who had been given knowledge said, "Woe to you! The reward of Allah is better for he who believes and does righteousness. And none are granted it except the patient

quran.arabic: فَخَسَفۡنَا بِهٖ وَبِدَارِهِ الۡاَرۡضَࣞ فَمَا كَانَ لَهٗ مِنۡ فِئَةٍ يَّنۡصُرُوۡنَهٗ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِࣗؗ وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الۡمُنۡتَصِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We caused the earth to swallow him and his home. And there was for him no company to aid him other than Allah, nor was he of those who [could] defend themselves

quran.arabic: وَاَصۡبَحَ الَّذِيۡنَ تَمَنَّوۡا مَكَانَهٗ بِالۡاَمۡسِ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ وَيۡكَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهٖ وَيَقۡدِرُۚ لَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ مَّنَّ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡنَا لَخَسَفَ بِنَاؕ وَيۡكَاَنَّهٗ لَا يُفۡلِحُ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And those who had wished for his position the previous day began to say, "Oh, how Allah extends provision to whom He wills of His servants and restricts it! If not that Allah had conferred favor on us, He would have caused it to swallow us. Oh, how the disbelievers do not succeed

quran.arabic: تِلۡكَ الدَّارُ الۡاٰخِرَةُ نَجۡعَلُهَا لِلَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُرِيۡدُوۡنَ عُلُوًّا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَا فَسَادًاؕ وَالۡعَاقِبَةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ
quran.english: That home of the Hereafter We assign to those who do not desire exaltedness upon the earth or corruption. And the [best] outcome is for the righteous

quran.arabic: مَنۡ جَآءَ بِالۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهٗ خَيۡرٌ مِّنۡهَاۚ وَمَنۡ جَآءَ بِالسَّيِّئَةِ فَلَا يُجۡزَي الَّذِيۡنَ عَمِلُوا السَّيِّاٰتِ اِلَّا مَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Whoever comes [on the Day of Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it; and whoever comes with an evil deed - then those who did evil deeds will not be recompensed except [as much as] what they used to do

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡ فَرَضَ عَلَيۡكَ الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لَرَآدُّكَ اِلٰي مَعَادٍؕ قُلۡ رَّبِّيۡ٘ اَعۡلَمُ مَنۡ جَآءَ بِالۡهُدٰي وَمَنۡ هُوَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: Indeed, [O Muhammad], He who imposed upon you the Qur'an will take you back to a place of return. Say, "My Lord is most knowing of who brings guidance and who is in clear error

quran.arabic: وَمَا كُنۡتَ تَرۡجُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ يُّلۡقٰ٘ي اِلَيۡكَ الۡكِتٰبُ اِلَّا رَحۡمَةً مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَ فَلَا تَكُوۡنَنَّ ظَهِيۡرًا لِّلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: And you were not expecting that the Book would be conveyed to you, but [it is] a mercy from your Lord. So do not be an assistant to the disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَصُدُّنَّكَ عَنۡ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ بَعۡدَ اِذۡ اُنۡزِلَتۡ اِلَيۡكَ وَادۡعُ اِلٰي رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُوۡنَنَّ مِنَ الۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And never let them avert you from the verses of Allah after they have been revealed to you. And invite [people] to your Lord. And never be of those who associate others with Allah

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَدۡعُ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَۘ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَࣞ كُلُّ شَيۡءٍ هَالِكٌ اِلَّا وَجۡهَهٗؕ لَهُ الۡحُكۡمُ وَاِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And do not invoke with Allah another deity. There is no deity except Him. Everything will be destroyed except His Face. His is the judgement, and to Him you will be returned
Alif, Lam, Meem

quran.arabic: اَحَسِبَ النَّاسُ اَنۡ يُّتۡرَكُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ يَّقُوۡلُوۡ٘ا اٰمَنَّا وَهُمۡ لَا يُفۡتَنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do the people think that they will be left to say, "We believe" and they will not be tried

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ فَتَنَّا الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَلَيَعۡلَمَنَّ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ صَدَقُوۡا وَلَيَعۡلَمَنَّ الۡكٰذِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: But We have certainly tried those before them, and Allah will surely make evident those who are truthful, and He will surely make evident the liars

quran.arabic: اَمۡ حَسِبَ الَّذِيۡنَ يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ السَّيِّاٰتِ اَنۡ يَّسۡبِقُوۡنَاؕ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or do those who do evil deeds think they can outrun Us? Evil is what they judge

quran.arabic: مَنۡ كَانَ يَرۡجُوۡا لِقَآءَ اللّٰهِ فَاِنَّ اَجَلَ اللّٰهِ لَاٰتٍؕ وَهُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: Whoever should hope for the meeting with Allah - indeed, the term decreed by Allah is coming. And He is the Hearing, the Knowing

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ جٰهَدَ فَاِنَّمَا يُجَاهِدُ لِنَفۡسِهٖؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَغَنِيٌّ عَنِ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And whoever strives only strives for [the benefit of] himself. Indeed, Allah is free from need of the worlds

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَنُكَفِّرَنَّ عَنۡهُمۡ سَيِّاٰتِهِمۡ وَلَنَجۡزِيَنَّهُمۡ اَحۡسَنَ الَّذِيۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And those who believe and do righteous deeds - We will surely remove from them their misdeeds and will surely reward them according to the best of what they used to do

quran.arabic: وَوَصَّيۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ بِوَالِدَيۡهِ حُسۡنًاؕ وَاِنۡ جٰهَدٰكَ لِتُشۡرِكَ بِيۡ مَا لَيۡسَ لَكَ بِهٖ عِلۡمٌ فَلَا تُطِعۡهُمَاؕ اِلَيَّ مَرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَاُنَبِّئُكُمۡ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have enjoined upon man goodness to parents. But if they endeavor to make you associate with Me that of which you have no knowledge, do not obey them. To Me is your return, and I will inform you about what you used to do

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَنُدۡخِلَنَّهُمۡ فِي الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And those who believe and do righteous deeds - We will surely admit them among the righteous [into Paradise]

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنۡ يَّقُوۡلُ اٰمَنَّا بِاللّٰهِ فَاِذَا٘ اُوۡذِيَ فِي اللّٰهِ جَعَلَ فِتۡنَةَ النَّاسِ كَعَذَابِ اللّٰهِؕ وَلَئِنۡ جَآءَ نَصۡرٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَ لَيَقُوۡلُنَّ اِنَّا كُنَّا مَعَكُمۡؕ اَوَلَيۡسَ اللّٰهُ بِاَعۡلَمَ بِمَا فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And of the people are some who say, "We believe in Allah," but when one [of them] is harmed for [the cause of] Allah, they consider the trial of the people as [if it were] the punishment of Allah. But if victory comes from your Lord, they say, "Indeed, We were with you." Is not Allah most knowing of what is within the breasts of all creatures

quran.arabic: وَلَيَعۡلَمَنَّ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَلَيَعۡلَمَنَّ الۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And Allah will surely make evident those who believe, and He will surely make evident the hypocrites

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اتَّبِعُوۡا سَبِيۡلَنَا وَلۡنَحۡمِلۡ خَطٰيٰكُمۡؕ وَمَا هُمۡ بِحٰمِلِيۡنَ مِنۡ خَطٰيٰهُمۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ اِنَّهُمۡ لَكٰذِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: And those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Follow our way, and we will carry your sins." But they will not carry anything of their sins. Indeed, they are liars

quran.arabic: وَلَيَحۡمِلُنَّ اَثۡقَالَهُمۡ وَاَثۡقَالًا مَّعَ اَثۡقَالِهِمۡؗ وَلَيُسۡـَٔلُنَّ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ عَمَّا كَانُوۡا يَفۡتَرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: But they will surely carry their [own] burdens and [other] burdens along with their burdens, and they will surely be questioned on the Day of Resurrection about what they used to invent

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوۡحًا اِلٰي قَوۡمِهٖ فَلَبِثَ فِيۡهِمۡ اَلۡفَ سَنَةٍ اِلَّا خَمۡسِيۡنَ عَامًاؕ فَاَخَذَهُمُ الطُّوۡفَانُ وَهُمۡ ظٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We certainly sent Noah to his people, and he remained among them a thousand years minus fifty years, and the flood seized them while they were wrongdoers

quran.arabic: فَاَنۡجَيۡنٰهُ وَاَصۡحٰبَ السَّفِيۡنَةِ وَجَعَلۡنٰهَا٘ اٰيَةً لِّلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: But We saved him and the companions of the ship, and We made it a sign for the worlds

quran.arabic: وَاِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ اِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ وَاتَّقُوۡهُؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ خَيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [We sent] Abraham, when he said to his people, "Worship Allah and fear Him. That is best for you, if you should know

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اَوۡثَانًا وَّتَخۡلُقُوۡنَ اِفۡكًاؕ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ لَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ لَكُمۡ رِزۡقًا فَابۡتَغُوۡا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ الرِّزۡقَ وَاعۡبُدُوۡهُ وَاشۡكُرُوۡا لَهٗؕ اِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: You only worship, besides Allah, idols, and you produce a falsehood. Indeed, those you worship besides Allah do not possess for you [the power of] provision. So seek from Allah provision and worship Him and be grateful to Him. To Him you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ تُكَذِّبُوۡا فَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ اُمَمٌ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكُمۡؕ وَمَا عَلَي الرَّسُوۡلِ اِلَّا الۡبَلٰغُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: And if you [people] deny [the message] - already nations before you have denied. And there is not upon the Messenger except [the duty of] clear notification

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا كَيۡفَ يُبۡدِئُ اللّٰهُ الۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيۡدُهٗؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ يَسِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Have they not considered how Allah begins creation and then repeats it? Indeed that, for Allah, is easy

quran.arabic: قُلۡ سِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَانۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ بَدَاَ الۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ اللّٰهُ يُنۡشِئُ النَّشۡاَةَ الۡاٰخِرَةَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌۚ‏
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how He began creation. Then Allah will produce the final creation. Indeed Allah, over all things, is competent

quran.arabic: يُعَذِّبُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَرۡحَمُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُۚ وَاِلَيۡهِ تُقۡلَبُوۡنَ
quran.english: He punishes whom He wills and has mercy upon whom He wills, and to Him you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ بِمُعۡجِزِيۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَآءِؗ وَمَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ وَّلِيٍّ وَّلَا نَصِيۡرٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And you will not cause failure [to Allah] upon the earth or in the heaven. And you have not other than Allah any protector or any helper

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ وَلِقَآئِهٖ٘ اُولٰٓئِكَ يَئِسُوۡا مِنۡ رَّحۡمَتِيۡ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And the ones who disbelieve in the signs of Allah and the meeting with Him - those have despaired of My mercy, and they will have a painful punishment

quran.arabic: فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوۡمِهٖ٘ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ قَالُوا اقۡتُلُوۡهُ اَوۡ حَرِّقُوۡهُ فَاَنۡجٰىهُ اللّٰهُ مِنَ النَّارِؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the answer of Abraham's people was not but that they said, "Kill him or burn him," but Allah saved him from the fire. Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ اِنَّمَا اتَّخَذۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اَوۡثَانًاۙ مَّوَدَّةَ بَيۡنِكُمۡ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاۚ ثُمَّ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ يَكۡفُرُ بَعۡضُكُمۡ بِبَعۡضٍ وَّيَلۡعَنُ بَعۡضُكُمۡ بَعۡضًاؗ وَّمَاۡوٰىكُمُ النَّارُ وَمَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ نّٰصِرِيۡنَࣗۖ‏
quran.english: And [Abraham] said, "You have only taken, other than Allah, idols as [a bond of] affection among you in worldly life. Then on the Day of Resurrection you will deny one another and curse one another, and your refuge will be the Fire, and you will not have any helpers

quran.arabic: فَاٰمَنَ لَهٗ لُوۡطٌۘ وَقَالَ اِنِّيۡ مُهَاجِرٌ اِلٰي رَبِّيۡؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: And Lot believed him. [Abraham] said, "Indeed, I will emigrate to [the service of] my Lord. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهٗ٘ اِسۡحٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوۡبَ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيۡ ذُرِّيَّتِهِ النُّبُوَّةَ وَالۡكِتٰبَ وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُ اَجۡرَهٗ فِي الدُّنۡيَاۚ وَاِنَّهٗ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ لَمِنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We gave to Him Isaac and Jacob and placed in his descendants prophethood and scripture. And We gave him his reward in this world, and indeed, he is in the Hereafter among the righteous

quran.arabic: وَلُوۡطًا اِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهٖ٘ اِنَّكُمۡ لَتَاۡتُوۡنَ الۡفَاحِشَةَؗ مَا سَبَقَكُمۡ بِهَا مِنۡ اَحَدٍ مِّنَ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention] Lot, when he said to his people, "Indeed, you commit such immorality as no one has preceded you with from among the worlds

quran.arabic: اَئِنَّكُمۡ لَتَاۡتُوۡنَ الرِّجَالَ وَتَقۡطَعُوۡنَ السَّبِيۡلَ ࣢ۙ وَتَاۡتُوۡنَ فِيۡ نَادِيۡكُمُ الۡمُنۡكَرَؕ فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوۡمِهٖ٘ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ قَالُوا ائۡتِنَا بِعَذَابِ اللّٰهِ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, you approach men and obstruct the road and commit in your meetings [every] evil." And the answer of his people was not but they said, "Bring us the punishment of Allah, if you should be of the truthful

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ انۡصُرۡنِيۡ عَلَي الۡقَوۡمِ الۡمُفۡسِدِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, support me against the corrupting people

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَتۡ رُسُلُنَا٘ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ بِالۡبُشۡرٰيۙ قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا مُهۡلِكُوۡ٘ا اَهۡلِ هٰذِهِ الۡقَرۡيَةِۚ اِنَّ اَهۡلَهَا كَانُوۡا ظٰلِمِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: And when Our messengers came to Abraham with the good tidings, they said, "Indeed, we will destroy the people of that Lot's city. Indeed, its people have been wrongdoers

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّ فِيۡهَا لُوۡطًاؕ قَالُوۡا نَحۡنُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنۡ فِيۡهَاؗ لَنُنَجِّيَنَّهٗ وَاَهۡلَهٗ٘ اِلَّا امۡرَاَتَهٗؗ كَانَتۡ مِنَ الۡغٰبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Abraham] said, "Indeed, within it is Lot." They said, "We are more knowing of who is within it. We will surely save him and his family, except his wife. She is to be of those who remain behind

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا٘ اَنۡ جَآءَتۡ رُسُلُنَا لُوۡطًا سِيۡٓءَ بِهِمۡ وَضَاقَ بِهِمۡ ذَرۡعًا وَّقَالُوۡا لَا تَخَفۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡࣞ اِنَّا مُنَجُّوۡكَ وَاَهۡلَكَ اِلَّا امۡرَاَتَكَ كَانَتۡ مِنَ الۡغٰبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when Our messengers came to Lot, he was distressed for them and felt for them great discomfort. They said, "Fear not, nor grieve. Indeed, we will save you and your family, except your wife; she is to be of those who remain behind

quran.arabic: اِنَّا مُنۡزِلُوۡنَ عَلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِ هٰذِهِ الۡقَرۡيَةِ رِجۡزًا مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَفۡسُقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, we will bring down on the people of this city punishment from the sky because they have been defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ تَّرَكۡنَا مِنۡهَا٘ اٰيَةًۭ بَيِّنَةً لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have certainly left of it a sign as clear evidence for a people who use reason

quran.arabic: وَاِلٰي مَدۡيَنَ اَخَاهُمۡ شُعَيۡبًاۙ فَقَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ وَارۡجُوا الۡيَوۡمَ الۡاٰخِرَ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: And to Madyan [We sent] their brother Shu'ayb, and he said, "O my people, worship Allah and expect the Last Day and do not commit abuse on the earth, spreading corruption

quran.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوۡهُ فَاَخَذَتۡهُمُ الرَّجۡفَةُ فَاَصۡبَحُوۡا فِيۡ دَارِهِمۡ جٰثِمِيۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: But they denied him, so the earthquake seized them, and they became within their home [corpses] fallen prone

quran.arabic: وَعَادًا وَّثَمُوۡدَا۠ وَقَدۡ تَّبَيَّنَ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّسٰكِنِهِمۡࣟ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ الشَّيۡطٰنُ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ فَصَدَّهُمۡ عَنِ السَّبِيۡلِ وَكَانُوۡا مُسۡتَبۡصِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And [We destroyed] 'Aad and Thamud, and it has become clear to you from their [ruined] dwellings. And Satan had made pleasing to them their deeds and averted them from the path, and they were endowed with perception

quran.arabic: وَقَارُوۡنَ وَفِرۡعَوۡنَ وَهَامٰنَࣞ وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُمۡ مُّوۡسٰي بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ فَاسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا كَانُوۡا سٰبِقِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And [We destroyed] Qarun and Pharaoh and Haman. And Moses had already come to them with clear evidences, and they were arrogant in the land, but they were not outrunners [of Our punishment]

quran.arabic: فَكُلًّا اَخَذۡنَا بِذَنۭۡ بِهٖۚ فَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ حَاصِبًاۚ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ اَخَذَتۡهُ الصَّيۡحَةُۚ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ خَسَفۡنَا بِهِ الۡاَرۡضَۚ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ اَغۡرَقۡنَاۚ وَمَا كَانَ اللّٰهُ لِيَظۡلِمَهُمۡ وَلٰكِنۡ كَانُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ يَظۡلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: So each We seized for his sin; and among them were those upon whom We sent a storm of stones, and among them were those who were seized by the blast [from the sky], and among them were those whom We caused the earth to swallow, and among them were those whom We drowned. And Allah would not have wronged them, but it was they who were wronging themselves

quran.arabic: مَثَلُ الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اَوۡلِيَآءَ كَمَثَلِ الۡعَنۡكَبُوۡتِۚ اِتَّخَذَتۡ بَيۡتًاؕ وَاِنَّ اَوۡهَنَ الۡبُيُوۡتِ لَبَيۡتُ الۡعَنۡكَبُوۡتِۘ لَوۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: The example of those who take allies other than Allah is like that of the spider who takes a home. And indeed, the weakest of homes is the home of the spider, if they only knew

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Indeed, Allah knows whatever thing they call upon other than Him. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَتِلۡكَ الۡاَمۡثَالُ نَضۡرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِۚ وَمَا يَعۡقِلُهَا٘ اِلَّا الۡعٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And these examples We present to the people, but none will understand them except those of knowledge

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ اللّٰهُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ بِالۡحَقِّؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Allah created the heavens and the earth in truth. Indeed in that is a sign for the believers

quran.arabic: اُتۡلُ مَا٘ اُوۡحِيَ اِلَيۡكَ مِنَ الۡكِتٰبِ وَاَقِمِ الصَّلٰوةَؕ اِنَّ الصَّلٰوةَ تَنۡهٰي عَنِ الۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَالۡمُنۡكَرِؕ وَلَذِكۡرُ اللّٰهِ اَكۡبَرُؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَصۡنَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Recite, [O Muhammad], what has been revealed to you of the Book and establish prayer. Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing, and the remembrance of Allah is greater. And Allah knows that which you do

quran.arabic: وَلَا تُجَادِلُوۡ٘ا اَهۡلَ الۡكِتٰبِ اِلَّا بِالَّتِيۡ هِيَ اَحۡسَنُؗ اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا مِنۡهُمۡ وَقُوۡلُوۡ٘ا اٰمَنَّا بِالَّذِيۡ٘ اُنۡزِلَ اِلَيۡنَا وَاُنۡزِلَ اِلَيۡكُمۡ وَاِلٰهُنَا وَاِلٰهُكُمۡ وَاحِدٌ وَّنَحۡنُ لَهٗ مُسۡلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And do not argue with the People of the Scripture except in a way that is best, except for those who commit injustice among them, and say, "We believe in that which has been revealed to us and revealed to you. And our God and your God is one; and we are Muslims [in submission] to Him

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ اَنۡزَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ الۡكِتٰبَؕ فَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمُ الۡكِتٰبَ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِهٖۚ وَمِنۡ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ مَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنُ بِهٖؕ وَمَا يَجۡحَدُ بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اِلَّا الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And thus We have sent down to you the Qur'an. And those to whom We [previously] gave the Scripture believe in it. And among these [people of Makkah] are those who believe in it. And none reject Our verses except the disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَمَا كُنۡتَ تَتۡلُوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ مِنۡ كِتٰبٍ وَّلَا تَخُطُّهٗ بِيَمِيۡنِكَ اِذًا لَّارۡتَابَ الۡمُبۡطِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And you did not recite before it any scripture, nor did you inscribe one with your right hand. Otherwise the falsifiers would have had [cause for] doubt

quran.arabic: بَلۡ هُوَ اٰيٰتٌۭ بَيِّنٰتٌ فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَؕ وَمَا يَجۡحَدُ بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اِلَّا الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, the Qur'an is distinct verses [preserved] within the breasts of those who have been given knowledge. And none reject Our verses except the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا لَوۡلَا٘ اُنۡزِلَ عَلَيۡهِ اٰيٰتٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهٖؕ قُلۡ اِنَّمَا الۡاٰيٰتُ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِؕ وَاِنَّمَا٘ اَنَا نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: But they say, "Why are not signs sent down to him from his Lord?" Say, "The signs are only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَكۡفِهِمۡ اَنَّا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ الۡكِتٰبَ يُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَرَحۡمَةً وَّذِكۡرٰي لِقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And is it not sufficient for them that We revealed to you the Book which is recited to them? Indeed in that is a mercy and reminder for a people who believe

quran.arabic: قُلۡ كَفٰي بِاللّٰهِ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنَكُمۡ شَهِيۡدًاۚ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا بِالۡبَاطِلِ وَكَفَرُوۡا بِاللّٰهِۙ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡخٰسِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "Sufficient is Allah between me and you as Witness. He knows what is in the heavens and earth. And they who have believed in falsehood and disbelieved in Allah - it is those who are the losers

quran.arabic: وَيَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَكَ بِالۡعَذَابِؕ وَلَوۡلَا٘ اَجَلٌ مُّسَمًّي لَّجَآءَهُمُ الۡعَذَابُؕ وَلَيَاۡتِيَنَّهُمۡ بَغۡتَةً وَّهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they urge you to hasten the punishment. And if not for [the decree of] a specified term, punishment would have reached them. But it will surely come to them suddenly while they perceive not

quran.arabic: يَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَكَ بِالۡعَذَابِؕ وَاِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمُحِيۡطَةٌۭ بِالۡكٰفِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They urge you to hasten the punishment. And indeed, Hell will be encompassing of the disbelievers

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَغۡشٰىهُمُ الۡعَذَابُ مِنۡ فَوۡقِهِمۡ وَمِنۡ تَحۡتِ اَرۡجُلِهِمۡ وَيَقُوۡلُ ذُوۡقُوۡا مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: On the Day the punishment will cover them from above them and from below their feet and it is said, "Taste [the result of] what you used to do

quran.arabic: يٰعِبَادِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِنَّ اَرۡضِيۡ وَاسِعَةٌ فَاِيَّايَ فَاعۡبُدُوۡنِ
quran.english: O My servants who have believed, indeed My earth is spacious, so worship only Me

quran.arabic: كُلُّ نَفۡسٍ ذَآئِقَةُ الۡمَوۡتِࣞ ثُمَّ اِلَيۡنَا تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Every soul will taste death. Then to Us will you be returned

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَنُبَوِّئَنَّهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡجَنَّةِ غُرَفًا تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ نِعۡمَ اَجۡرُ الۡعٰمِلِيۡنَࣗۖ‏
quran.english: And those who have believed and done righteous deeds - We will surely assign to them of Paradise [elevated] chambers beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. Excellent is the reward of the [righteous] workers

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ صَبَرُوۡا وَعَلٰي رَبِّهِمۡ يَتَوَكَّلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Who have been patient and upon their Lord rely

quran.arabic: وَكَاَيِّنۡ مِّنۡ دَآبَّةٍ لَّا تَحۡمِلُ رِزۡقَهَاؗࣗۖ اَللّٰهُ يَرۡزُقُهَا وَاِيَّاكُمۡؗۖ وَهُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: And how many a creature carries not its [own] provision. Allah provides for it and for you. And He is the Hearing, the Knowing

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ سَاَلۡتَهُمۡ مَّنۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَسَخَّرَ الشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَ لَيَقُوۡلُنَّ اللّٰهُۚ فَاَنّٰي يُؤۡفَكُوۡنَ
quran.english: If you asked them, "Who created the heavens and earth and subjected the sun and the moon?" they would surely say, "Allah." Then how are they deluded

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهٖ وَيَقۡدِرُ لَهٗؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Allah extends provision for whom He wills of His servants and restricts for him. Indeed Allah is, of all things, Knowing

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ سَاَلۡتَهُمۡ مَّنۡ نَّزَّلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَاَحۡيَا بِهِ الۡاَرۡضَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَوۡتِهَا لَيَقُوۡلُنَّ اللّٰهُؕ قُلِ الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِؕ بَلۡ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡقِلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And if you asked them, "Who sends down rain from the sky and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness?" they would surely say " Allah." Say, "Praise to Allah "; but most of them do not reason

quran.arabic: وَمَا هٰذِهِ الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَا٘ اِلَّا لَهۡوٌ وَّلَعِبٌؕ وَاِنَّ الدَّارَ الۡاٰخِرَةَ لَهِيَ الۡحَيَوَانُۘ لَوۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And this worldly life is not but diversion and amusement. And indeed, the home of the Hereafter - that is the [eternal] life, if only they knew

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا رَكِبُوۡا فِي الۡفُلۡكِ دَعَوُا اللّٰهَ مُخۡلِصِيۡنَ لَهُ الدِّيۡنَ ࣢ۚ فَلَمَّا نَجّٰىهُمۡ اِلَي الۡبَرِّ اِذَا هُمۡ يُشۡرِكُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And when they board a ship, they supplicate Allah, sincere to Him in religion. But when He delivers them to the land, at once they associate others with Him

quran.arabic: لِيَكۡفُرُوۡا بِمَا٘ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡۚۙ وَلِيَتَمَتَّعُوۡاࣟ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: So that they will deny what We have granted them, and they will enjoy themselves. But they are going to know

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّا جَعَلۡنَا حَرَمًا اٰمِنًا وَّيُتَخَطَّفُ النَّاسُ مِنۡ حَوۡلِهِمۡؕ اَفَبِالۡبَاطِلِ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ وَبِنِعۡمَةِ اللّٰهِ يَكۡفُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Have they not seen that We made [Makkah] a safe sanctuary, while people are being taken away all around them? Then in falsehood do they believe, and in the favor of Allah they disbelieve

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ اَظۡلَمُ مِمَّنِ افۡتَرٰي عَلَي اللّٰهِ كَذِبًا اَوۡ كَذَّبَ بِالۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهٗؕ اَلَيۡسَ فِيۡ جَهَنَّمَ مَثۡوًي لِّلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And who is more unjust than one who invents a lie about Allah or denies the truth when it has come to him? Is there not in Hell a [sufficient] residence for the disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ جٰهَدُوۡا فِيۡنَا لَنَهۡدِيَنَّهُمۡ سُبُلَنَاؕ وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَمَعَ الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And those who strive for Us - We will surely guide them to Our ways. And indeed, Allah is with the doers of good
Alif, Lam, Meem

quran.arabic: غُلِبَتِ الرُّوۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: The Byzantines have been defeated

quran.arabic: فِيۡ٘ اَدۡنَي الۡاَرۡضِ وَهُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِ غَلَبِهِمۡ سَيَغۡلِبُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: In the nearest land. But they, after their defeat, will overcome

quran.arabic: فِيۡ بِضۡعِ سِنِيۡنَ ࣢ؕ لِلّٰهِ الۡاَمۡرُ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَمِنۭۡ بَعۡدُؕ وَيَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّفۡرَحُ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Within three to nine years. To Allah belongs the command before and after. And that day the believers will rejoice

quran.arabic: بِنَصۡرِ اللّٰهِؕ يَنۡصُرُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: In the victory of Allah. He gives victory to whom He wills, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِؕ لَا يُخۡلِفُ اللّٰهُ وَعۡدَهٗ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: [It is] the promise of Allah. Allah does not fail in His promise, but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ ظَاهِرًا مِّنَ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاۚۖ وَهُمۡ عَنِ الۡاٰخِرَةِ هُمۡ غٰفِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: They know what is apparent of the worldly life, but they, of the Hereafter, are unaware

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَتَفَكَّرُوۡا فِيۡ٘ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡࣞ مَا خَلَقَ اللّٰهُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا٘ اِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَاَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيؕ وَاِنَّ كَثِيۡرًا مِّنَ النَّاسِ بِلِقَآئِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَكٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do they not contemplate within themselves? Allah has not created the heavens and the earth and what is between them except in truth and for a specified term. And indeed, many of the people, in [the matter of] the meeting with their Lord, are disbelievers

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَسِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَيَنۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡؕ كَانُوۡ٘ا اَشَدَّ مِنۡهُمۡ قُوَّةً وَّاَثَارُوا الۡاَرۡضَ وَعَمَرُوۡهَا٘ اَكۡثَرَ مِمَّا عَمَرُوۡهَا وَجَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِؕ فَمَا كَانَ اللّٰهُ لِيَظۡلِمَهُمۡ وَلٰكِنۡ كَانُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ يَظۡلِمُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them? They were greater than them in power, and they plowed the earth and built it up more than they have built it up, and their messengers came to them with clear evidences. And Allah would not ever have wronged them, but they were wronging themselves

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَاقِبَةَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَسَآءُوا السُّوۡٓاٰ٘ي اَنۡ كَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ وَكَانُوۡا بِهَا يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Then the end of those who did evil was the worst [consequence] because they denied the signs of Allah and used to ridicule them

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ يَبۡدَؤُا الۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيۡدُهٗ ثُمَّ اِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah begins creation; then He will repeat it; then to Him you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ تَقُوۡمُ السَّاعَةُ يُبۡلِسُ الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will be in despair

quran.arabic: وَلَمۡ يَكُنۡ لَّهُمۡ مِّنۡ شُرَكَآئِهِمۡ شُفَعٰٓؤُا وَكَانُوۡا بِشُرَكَآئِهِمۡ كٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And there will not be for them among their [alleged] partners any intercessors, and they will [then] be disbelievers in their partners

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ تَقُوۡمُ السَّاعَةُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّتَفَرَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the Day the Hour appears - that Day they will become separated

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ فَهُمۡ فِيۡ رَوۡضَةٍ يُّحۡبَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And as for those who had believed and done righteous deeds, they will be in a garden [of Paradise], delighted

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَكَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا وَلِقَآئِ الۡاٰخِرَةِ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ فِي الۡعَذَابِ مُحۡضَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: But as for those who disbelieved and denied Our verses and the meeting of the Hereafter, those will be brought into the punishment [to remain]

quran.arabic: فَسُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ حِيۡنَ تُمۡسُوۡنَ وَحِيۡنَ تُصۡبِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: So exalted is Allah when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning

quran.arabic: وَلَهُ الۡحَمۡدُ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَعَشِيًّا وَّحِيۡنَ تُظۡهِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And to Him is [due all] praise throughout the heavens and the earth. And [exalted is He] at night and when you are at noon

quran.arabic: يُخۡرِجُ الۡحَيَّ مِنَ الۡمَيِّتِ وَيُخۡرِجُ الۡمَيِّتَ مِنَ الۡحَيِّ وَيُحۡيِ الۡاَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاؕ وَكَذٰلِكَ تُخۡرَجُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. And thus will you be brought out

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ٘ اَنۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ مِّنۡ تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ اِذَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ بَشَرٌ تَنۡتَشِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth]

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ٘ اَنۡ خَلَقَ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَنۡفُسِكُمۡ اَزۡوَاجًا لِّتَسۡكُنُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيۡنَكُمۡ مَّوَدَّةً وَّرَحۡمَةًؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّتَفَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquillity in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ خَلۡقُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَاخۡتِلَافُ اَلۡسِنَتِكُمۡ وَاَلۡوَانِكُمۡؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّلۡعٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ مَنَامُكُمۡ بِالَّيۡلِ وَالنَّهَارِ وَابۡتِغَآؤُكُمۡ مِّنۡ فَضۡلِهٖؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّسۡمَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And of His signs is your sleep by night and day and your seeking of His bounty. Indeed in that are signs for a people who listen

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ يُرِيۡكُمُ الۡبَرۡقَ خَوۡفًا وَّطَمَعًا وَّيُنَزِّلُ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَيُحۡيٖ بِهِ الۡاَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And of His signs is [that] He shows you the lightning [causing] fear and aspiration, and He sends down rain from the sky by which He brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed in that are signs for a people who use reason

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ٘ اَنۡ تَقُوۡمَ السَّمَآءُ وَالۡاَرۡضُ بِاَمۡرِهٖؕ ثُمَّ اِذَا دَعَاكُمۡ دَعۡوَةًࣗۖ مِّنَ الۡاَرۡضِ اِذَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ تَخۡرُجُوۡنَ
quran.english: And of His signs is that the heaven and earth remain by His command. Then when He calls you with a [single] call from the earth, immediately you will come forth

quran.arabic: وَلَهٗ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ كُلٌّ لَّهٗ قٰنِتُوۡنَ
quran.english: And to Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and earth. All are to Him devoutly obedient

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ يَبۡدَؤُا الۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيۡدُهٗ وَهُوَ اَهۡوَنُ عَلَيۡهِؕ وَلَهُ الۡمَثَلُ الۡاَعۡلٰي فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And it is He who begins creation; then He repeats it, and that is [even] easier for Him. To Him belongs the highest attribute in the heavens and earth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: ضَرَبَ لَكُمۡ مَّثَلًا مِّنۡ اَنۡفُسِكُمۡؕ هَلۡ لَّكُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّا مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُكُمۡ مِّنۡ شُرَكَآءَ فِيۡ مَا رَزَقۡنٰكُمۡ فَاَنۡتُمۡ فِيۡهِ سَوَآءٌ تَخَافُوۡنَهُمۡ كَخِيۡفَتِكُمۡ اَنۡفُسَكُمۡؕ كَذٰلِكَ نُفَصِّلُ الۡاٰيٰتِ لِقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: He presents to you an example from yourselves. Do you have among those whom your right hands possess any partners in what We have provided for you so that you are equal therein [and] would fear them as your fear of one another [within a partnership]? Thus do We detail the verses for a people who use reason

quran.arabic: بَلِ اتَّبَعَ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡ٘ا اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٍۚ فَمَنۡ يَّهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ اَضَلَّ اللّٰهُؕ وَمَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ نّٰصِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: But those who wrong follow their [own] desires without knowledge. Then who can guide one whom Allah has sent astray? And for them there are no helpers

quran.arabic: فَاَقِمۡ وَجۡهَكَ لِلدِّيۡنِ حَنِيۡفًاؕ فِطۡرَتَ اللّٰهِ الَّتِيۡ فَطَرَ النَّاسَ عَلَيۡهَاؕ لَا تَبۡدِيۡلَ لِخَلۡقِ اللّٰهِؕ ذٰلِكَ الدِّيۡنُ الۡقَيِّمُࣗۙ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَࣗۙ‏
quran.english: So direct your face toward the religion, inclining to truth. [Adhere to] the fitrah of Allah upon which He has created [all] people. No change should there be in the creation of Allah. That is the correct religion, but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: مُنِيۡبِيۡنَ اِلَيۡهِ وَاتَّقُوۡهُ وَاَقِيۡمُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَلَا تَكُوۡنُوۡا مِنَ الۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Adhere to it], turning in repentance to Him, and fear Him and establish prayer and do not be of those who associate others with Allah

quran.arabic: مِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ فَرَّقُوۡا دِيۡنَهُمۡ وَكَانُوۡا شِيَعًاؕ كُلُّ حِزۡبٍۭ بِمَا لَدَيۡهِمۡ فَرِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Or] of those who have divided their religion and become sects, every faction rejoicing in what it has

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا مَسَّ النَّاسَ ضُرٌّ دَعَوۡا رَبَّهُمۡ مُّنِيۡبِيۡنَ اِلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ اِذَا٘ اَذَاقَهُمۡ مِّنۡهُ رَحۡمَةً اِذَا فَرِيۡقٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ بِرَبِّهِمۡ يُشۡرِكُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And when adversity touches the people, they call upon their Lord, turning in repentance to Him. Then when He lets them taste mercy from Him, at once a party of them associate others with their Lord

quran.arabic: لِيَكۡفُرُوۡا بِمَا٘ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡؕ فَتَمَتَّعُوۡاࣟ فَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: So that they will deny what We have granted them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know

quran.arabic: اَمۡ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ سُلۡطٰنًا فَهُوَ يَتَكَلَّمُ بِمَا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or have We sent down to them an authority, and it speaks of what they were associating with Him

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا٘ اَذَقۡنَا النَّاسَ رَحۡمَةً فَرِحُوۡا بِهَاؕ وَاِنۡ تُصِبۡهُمۡ سَيِّئَةٌۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَتۡ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ اِذَا هُمۡ يَقۡنَطُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when We let the people taste mercy, they rejoice therein, but if evil afflicts them for what their hands have put forth, immediately they despair

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَقۡدِرُؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do they not see that Allah extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed, in that are signs for a people who believe

quran.arabic: فَاٰتِ ذَا الۡقُرۡبٰي حَقَّهٗ وَالۡمِسۡكِيۡنَ وَابۡنَ السَّبِيۡلِؕ ذٰلِكَ خَيۡرٌ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ يُرِيۡدُوۡنَ وَجۡهَ اللّٰهِؗ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡمُفۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: So give the relative his right, as well as the needy and the traveler. That is best for those who desire the countenance of Allah, and it is they who will be the successful

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اٰتَيۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ رِّبًا لِّيَرۡبُوَا۠ فِيۡ٘ اَمۡوَالِ النَّاسِ فَلَا يَرۡبُوۡا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِۚ وَمَا٘ اٰتَيۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ زَكٰوةٍ تُرِيۡدُوۡنَ وَجۡهَ اللّٰهِ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡمُضۡعِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: And whatever you give for interest to increase within the wealth of people will not increase with Allah. But what you give in zakah, desiring the countenance of Allah - those are the multipliers

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ ثُمَّ رَزَقَكُمۡ ثُمَّ يُمِيۡتُكُمۡ ثُمَّ يُحۡيِيۡكُمۡؕ هَلۡ مِنۡ شُرَكَآئِكُمۡ مَّنۡ يَّفۡعَلُ مِنۡ ذٰلِكُمۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ سُبۡحٰنَهٗ وَتَعٰلٰي عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Allah is the one who created you, then provided for you, then will cause you to die, and then will give you life. Are there any of your "partners" who does anything of that? Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him

quran.arabic: ظَهَرَ الۡفَسَادُ فِي الۡبَرِّ وَالۡبَحۡرِ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡ اَيۡدِي النَّاسِ لِيُذِيۡقَهُمۡ بَعۡضَ الَّذِيۡ عَمِلُوۡا لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Corruption has appeared throughout the land and sea by [reason of] what the hands of people have earned so He may let them taste part of [the consequence of] what they have done that perhaps they will return [to righteousness]

quran.arabic: قُلۡ سِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَانۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُؕ كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّشۡرِكِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of those before. Most of them were associators [of others with Allah]

quran.arabic: فَاَقِمۡ وَجۡهَكَ لِلدِّيۡنِ الۡقَيِّمِ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَ يَوۡمٌ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهٗ مِنَ اللّٰهِ يَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّصَّدَّعُوۡنَ
quran.english: So direct your face toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allah of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided

quran.arabic: مَنۡ كَفَرَ فَعَلَيۡهِ كُفۡرُهٗۚ وَمَنۡ عَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَلِاَنۡفُسِهِمۡ يَمۡهَدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Whoever disbelieves - upon him is [the consequence of] his disbelief. And whoever does righteousness - they are for themselves preparing

quran.arabic: لِيَجۡزِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖؕ اِنَّهٗ لَا يُحِبُّ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: That He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out of His bounty. Indeed, He does not like the disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ٘ اَنۡ يُّرۡسِلَ الرِّيٰحَ مُبَشِّرٰتٍ وَّلِيُذِيۡقَكُمۡ مِّنۡ رَّحۡمَتِهٖ وَلِتَجۡرِيَ الۡفُلۡكُ بِاَمۡرِهٖ وَلِتَبۡتَغُوۡا مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖ وَلَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And of His signs is that He sends the winds as bringers of good tidings and to let you taste His mercy and so the ships may sail at His command and so you may seek of His bounty, and perhaps you will be grateful

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَ رُسُلًا اِلٰي قَوۡمِهِمۡ فَجَآءُوۡهُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ فَانۡتَقَمۡنَا مِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَجۡرَمُوۡاؕ وَكَانَ حَقًّا عَلَيۡنَا نَصۡرُ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We have already sent messengers before you to their peoples, and they came to them with clear evidences; then We took retribution from those who committed crimes, and incumbent upon Us was support of the believers

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ يُرۡسِلُ الرِّيٰحَ فَتُثِيۡرُ سَحَابًا فَيَبۡسُطُهٗ فِي السَّمَآءِ كَيۡفَ يَشَآءُ وَيَجۡعَلُهٗ كِسَفًا فَتَرَي الۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلٰلِهٖۚ فَاِذَا٘ اَصَابَ بِهٖ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهٖ٘ اِذَا هُمۡ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: It is Allah who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds and spread them in the sky however He wills, and He makes them fragments so you see the rain emerge from within them. And when He causes it to fall upon whom He wills of His servants, immediately they rejoice

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ كَانُوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يُّنَزَّلَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ لَمُبۡلِسِيۡنَ
quran.english: Although they were, before it was sent down upon them - before that, in despair

quran.arabic: فَانۡظُرۡ اِلٰ٘ي اٰثٰرِ رَحۡمَتِ اللّٰهِ كَيۡفَ يُحۡيِ الۡاَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ لَمُحۡيِ الۡمَوۡتٰيۚ وَهُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: So observe the effects of the mercy of Allah - how He gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed, that [same one] will give life to the dead, and He is over all things competent

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا رِيۡحًا فَرَاَوۡهُ مُصۡفَرًّا لَّظَلُّوۡا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖ يَكۡفُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: But if We should send a [bad] wind and they saw [their crops] turned yellow, they would remain thereafter disbelievers

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ الۡمَوۡتٰي وَلَا تُسۡمِعُ الصُّمَّ الدُّعَآءَ اِذَا وَلَّوۡا مُدۡبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: So indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they turn their backs, retreating

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ بِهٰدِ الۡعُمۡيِ عَنۡ ضَلٰلَتِهِمۡؕ اِنۡ تُسۡمِعُ اِلَّا مَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنُ بِاٰيٰتِنَا فَهُمۡ مُّسۡلِمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [in submission to Allah]

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ مِّنۡ ضُۙعۡفٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ ضُۙعۡفٍ قُوَّةً ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ قُوَّةٍ ضُۙعۡفًا وَّشَيۡبَةًؕ يَخۡلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَلِيۡمُ الۡقَدِيۡرُ
quran.english: Allah is the one who created you from weakness, then made after weakness strength, then made after strength weakness and white hair. He creates what He wills, and He is the Knowing, the Competent

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ تَقُوۡمُ السَّاعَةُ يُقۡسِمُ الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ ࣢ۙ مَا لَبِثُوۡا غَيۡرَ سَاعَةٍؕ كَذٰلِكَ كَانُوۡا يُؤۡفَكُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will swear they had remained but an hour. Thus they were deluded

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَ وَالۡاِيۡمَانَ لَقَدۡ لَبِثۡتُمۡ فِيۡ كِتٰبِ اللّٰهِ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡبَعۡثِؗ فَهٰذَا يَوۡمُ الۡبَعۡثِ وَلٰكِنَّكُمۡ كُنۡتُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: But those who were given knowledge and faith will say, "You remained the extent of Allah 's decree until the Day of Resurrection, and this is the Day of Resurrection, but you did not used to know

quran.arabic: فَيَوۡمَئِذٍ لَّا يَنۡفَعُ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا مَعۡذِرَتُهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُسۡتَعۡتَبُوۡنَ
quran.english: So that Day, their excuse will not benefit those who wronged, nor will they be asked to appease [Allah]

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ ضَرَبۡنَا لِلنَّاسِ فِيۡ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنِ مِنۡ كُلِّ مَثَلٍؕ وَلَئِنۡ جِئۡتَهُمۡ بِاٰيَةٍ لَّيَقُوۡلَنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ اَنۡتُمۡ اِلَّا مُبۡطِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have certainly presented to the people in this Qur'an from every [kind of] example. But, [O Muhammad], if you should bring them a sign, the disbelievers will surely say, "You [believers] are but falsifiers

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ يَطۡبَعُ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي قُلُوۡبِ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Thus does Allah seal the hearts of those who do not know

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ اِنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّ وَّلَا يَسۡتَخِفَّنَّكَ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُوۡقِنُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So be patient. Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And let them not disquiet you who are not certain [in faith]
Alif, Lam, Meem

quran.arabic: تِلۡكَ اٰيٰتُ الۡكِتٰبِ الۡحَكِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: These are verses of the wise Book

quran.arabic: هُدًي وَّرَحۡمَةً لِّلۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: As guidance and mercy for the doers of good

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يُقِيۡمُوۡنَ الصَّلٰوةَ وَيُؤۡتُوۡنَ الزَّكٰوةَ وَهُمۡ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ هُمۡ يُوۡقِنُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Who establish prayer and give zakah, and they, of the Hereafter, are certain [in faith]

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ عَلٰي هُدًي مِّنۡ رَّبِّهِمۡ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡمُفۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those are on [right] guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنۡ يَّشۡتَرِيۡ لَهۡوَ الۡحَدِيۡثِ لِيُضِلَّ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٍࣗۖ وَّيَتَّخِذَهَا هُزُوًاؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ مُّهِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And of the people is he who buys the amusement of speech to mislead [others] from the way of Allah without knowledge and who takes it in ridicule. Those will have a humiliating punishment

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِ اٰيٰتُنَا وَلّٰي مُسۡتَكۡبِرًا كَاَنۡ لَّمۡ يَسۡمَعۡهَا كَاَنَّ فِيۡ٘ اُذُنَيۡهِ وَقۡرًاۚ فَبَشِّرۡهُ بِعَذَابٍ اَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And when our verses are recited to him, he turns away arrogantly as if he had not heard them, as if there was in his ears deafness. So give him tidings of a painful punishment

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَهُمۡ جَنّٰتُ النَّعِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who believe and do righteous deeds - for them are the Gardens of Pleasure

quran.arabic: خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقًّاؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Wherein they abide eternally; [it is] the promise of Allah [which is] truth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ بِغَيۡرِ عَمَدٍ تَرَوۡنَهَا وَاَلۡقٰي فِي الۡاَرۡضِ رَوَاسِيَ اَنۡ تَمِيۡدَ بِكُمۡ وَبَثَّ فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ دَآبَّةٍؕ وَاَنۡزَلۡنَا مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَاَنۭۡ بَتۡنَا فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ زَوۡجٍ كَرِيۡمٍ
quran.english: He created the heavens without pillars that you see and has cast into the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with you, and dispersed therein from every creature. And We sent down rain from the sky and made grow therein [plants] of every noble kind

quran.arabic: هٰذَا خَلۡقُ اللّٰهِ فَاَرُوۡنِيۡ مَاذَا خَلَقَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖؕ بَلِ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍࣖ‏
quran.english: This is the creation of Allah. So show Me what those other than Him have created. Rather, the wrongdoers are in clear error

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا لُقۡمٰنَ الۡحِكۡمَةَ اَنِ اشۡكُرۡ لِلّٰهِؕ وَمَنۡ يَّشۡكُرۡ فَاِنَّمَا يَشۡكُرُ لِنَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ كَفَرَ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَنِيٌّ حَمِيۡدٌ
quran.english: And We had certainly given Luqman wisdom [and said], "Be grateful to Allah." And whoever is grateful is grateful for [the benefit of] himself. And whoever denies [His favor] - then indeed, Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَ لُقۡمٰنُ لِابۡنِهٖ وَهُوَ يَعِظُهٗ يٰبُنَيَّ لَا تُشۡرِكۡ بِاللّٰهِؕؔ اِنَّ الشِّرۡكَ لَظُلۡمٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Luqman said to his son while he was instructing him, "O my son, do not associate [anything] with Allah. Indeed, association [with him] is great injustice

quran.arabic: وَوَصَّيۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ بِوَالِدَيۡهِۚ حَمَلَتۡهُ اُمُّهٗ وَهۡنًا عَلٰي وَهۡنٍ وَّفِصٰلُهٗ فِيۡ عَامَيۡنِ اَنِ اشۡكُرۡ لِيۡ وَلِوَالِدَيۡكَؕ اِلَيَّ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: And We have enjoined upon man [care] for his parents. His mother carried him, [increasing her] in weakness upon weakness, and his weaning is in two years. Be grateful to Me and to your parents; to Me is the [final] destination

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ جٰهَدٰكَ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ تُشۡرِكَ بِيۡ مَا لَيۡسَ لَكَ بِهٖ عِلۡمٌ فَلَا تُطِعۡهُمَا وَصَاحِبۡهُمَا فِي الدُّنۡيَا مَعۡرُوۡفًاؗ وَّاتَّبِعۡ سَبِيۡلَ مَنۡ اَنَابَ اِلَيَّۚ ثُمَّ اِلَيَّ مَرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَاُنَبِّئُكُمۡ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: But if they endeavor to make you associate with Me that of which you have no knowledge, do not obey them but accompany them in [this] world with appropriate kindness and follow the way of those who turn back to Me [in repentance]. Then to Me will be your return, and I will inform you about what you used to do

quran.arabic: يٰبُنَيَّ اِنَّهَا٘ اِنۡ تَكُ مِثۡقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِّنۡ خَرۡدَلٍ فَتَكُنۡ فِيۡ صَخۡرَةٍ اَوۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ اَوۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ يَاۡتِ بِهَا اللّٰهُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَطِيۡفٌ خَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: [And Luqman said], "O my son, indeed if wrong should be the weight of a mustard seed and should be within a rock or [anywhere] in the heavens or in the earth, Allah will bring it forth. Indeed, Allah is Subtle and Acquainted

quran.arabic: يٰبُنَيَّ اَقِمِ الصَّلٰوةَ وَاۡمُرۡ بِالۡمَعۡرُوۡفِ وَانۡهَ عَنِ الۡمُنۡكَرِ وَاصۡبِرۡ عَلٰي مَا٘ اَصَابَكَؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ مِنۡ عَزۡمِ الۡاُمُوۡرِۚ‏
quran.english: O my son, establish prayer, enjoin what is right, forbid what is wrong, and be patient over what befalls you. Indeed, [all] that is of the matters [requiring] determination

quran.arabic: وَلَا تُصَعِّرۡ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمۡشِ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مَرَحًاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخۡتَالٍ فَخُوۡرٍۚ‏
quran.english: And do not turn your cheek [in contempt] toward people and do not walk through the earth exultantly. Indeed, Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful

quran.arabic: وَاقۡصِدۡ فِيۡ مَشۡيِكَ وَاغۡضُضۡ مِنۡ صَوۡتِكَؕ اِنَّ اَنۡكَرَ الۡاَصۡوَاتِ لَصَوۡتُ الۡحَمِيۡرِࣖ‏
quran.english: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice; indeed, the most disagreeable of sounds is the voice of donkeys

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَوۡا اَنَّ اللّٰهَ سَخَّرَ لَكُمۡ مَّا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَاَسۡبَغَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ نِعَمَهٗ ظَاهِرَةً وَّبَاطِنَةًؕ وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنۡ يُّجَادِلُ فِي اللّٰهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٍ وَّلَا هُدًي وَّلَا كِتٰبٍ مُّنِيۡرٍ
quran.english: Do you not see that Allah has made subject to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth and amply bestowed upon you His favors, [both] apparent and unapparent? But of the people is he who disputes about Allah without knowledge or guidance or an enlightening Book [from Him]

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمُ اتَّبِعُوۡا مَا٘ اَنۡزَلَ اللّٰهُ قَالُوۡا بَلۡ نَتَّبِعُ مَا وَجَدۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ اٰبَآءَنَاؕ اَوَلَوۡ كَانَ الشَّيۡطٰنُ يَدۡعُوۡهُمۡ اِلٰي عَذَابِ السَّعِيۡرِ
quran.english: And when it is said to them, "Follow what Allah has revealed," they say, "Rather, we will follow that upon which we found our fathers." Even if Satan was inviting them to the punishment of the Blaze

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يُّسۡلِمۡ وَجۡهَهٗ٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِ وَهُوَ مُحۡسِنٌ فَقَدِ اسۡتَمۡسَكَ بِالۡعُرۡوَةِ الۡوُثۡقٰيؕ وَاِلَي اللّٰهِ عَاقِبَةُ الۡاُمُوۡرِ
quran.english: And whoever submits his face to Allah while he is a doer of good - then he has grasped the most trustworthy handhold. And to Allah will be the outcome of [all] matters

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ كَفَرَ فَلَا يَحۡزُنۡكَ كُفۡرُهٗؕ اِلَيۡنَا مَرۡجِعُهُمۡ فَنُنَبِّئُهُمۡ بِمَا عَمِلُوۡاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُوۡرِ
quran.english: And whoever has disbelieved - let not his disbelief grieve you. To Us is their return, and We will inform them of what they did. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of that within the breasts

quran.arabic: نُمَتِّعُهُمۡ قَلِيۡلًا ثُمَّ نَضۡطَرُّهُمۡ اِلٰي عَذَابٍ غَلِيۡظٍ
quran.english: We grant them enjoyment for a little; then We will force them to a massive punishment

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ سَاَلۡتَهُمۡ مَّنۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ لَيَقُوۡلُنَّ اللّٰهُؕ قُلِ الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِؕ بَلۡ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if you asked them, "Who created the heavens and earth?" they would surely say, "Allah." Say, "[All] praise is [due] to Allah "; but most of them do not know

quran.arabic: لِلّٰهِ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡغَنِيُّ الۡحَمِيۡدُ
quran.english: To Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and earth. Indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ اَنَّمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ مِنۡ شَجَرَةٍ اَقۡلَامٌ وَّالۡبَحۡرُ يَمُدُّهٗ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖ سَبۡعَةُ اَبۡحُرٍ مَّا نَفِدَتۡ كَلِمٰتُ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَزِيۡزٌ حَكِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And if whatever trees upon the earth were pens and the sea [was ink], replenished thereafter by seven [more] seas, the words of Allah would not be exhausted. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Wise

quran.arabic: مَا خَلۡقُكُمۡ وَلَا بَعۡثُكُمۡ اِلَّا كَنَفۡسٍ وَّاحِدَةٍؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ سَمِيۡعٌۭ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Your creation and your resurrection will not be but as that of a single soul. Indeed, Allah is Hearing and Seeing

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يُوۡلِجُ الَّيۡلَ فِي النَّهَارِ وَيُوۡلِجُ النَّهَارَ فِي الَّيۡلِ وَسَخَّرَ الشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَؗ كُلٌّ يَّجۡرِيۡ٘ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّي وَّاَنَّ اللّٰهَ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ خَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Do you not see that Allah causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and has subjected the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term, and that Allah, with whatever you do, is Acquainted

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡحَقُّ وَاَنَّ مَا يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهِ الۡبَاطِلُۙ وَاَنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡعَلِيُّ الۡكَبِيۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: That is because Allah is the Truth, and that what they call upon other than Him is falsehood, and because Allah is the Most High, the Grand

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ الۡفُلۡكَ تَجۡرِيۡ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ بِنِعۡمَتِ اللّٰهِ لِيُرِيَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٍ شَكُوۡرٍ
quran.english: Do you not see that ships sail through the sea by the favor of Allah that He may show you of His signs? Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا غَشِيَهُمۡ مَّوۡجٌ كَالظُّلَلِ دَعَوُا اللّٰهَ مُخۡلِصِيۡنَ لَهُ الدِّيۡنَ ࣢ۚ فَلَمَّا نَجّٰىهُمۡ اِلَي الۡبَرِّ فَمِنۡهُمۡ مُّقۡتَصِدٌؕ وَمَا يَجۡحَدُ بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اِلَّا كُلُّ خَتَّارٍ كَفُوۡرٍ
quran.english: And when waves come over them like canopies, they supplicate Allah, sincere to Him in religion. But when He delivers them to the land, there are [some] of them who are moderate [in faith]. And none rejects Our signs except everyone treacherous and ungrateful

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوۡا رَبَّكُمۡ وَاخۡشَوۡا يَوۡمًا لَّا يَجۡزِيۡ وَالِدٌ عَنۡ وَّلَدِهٖؗ وَلَا مَوۡلُوۡدٌ هُوَ جَازٍ عَنۡ وَّالِدِهٖ شَيۡـًٔاؕ اِنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّ فَلَا تَغُرَّنَّكُمُ الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَاࣟ وَلَا يَغُرَّنَّكُمۡ بِاللّٰهِ الۡغَرُوۡرُ
quran.english: O mankind, fear your Lord and fear a Day when no father will avail his son, nor will a son avail his father at all. Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allah by the Deceiver

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عِنۡدَهٗ عِلۡمُ السَّاعَةِۚ وَيُنَزِّلُ الۡغَيۡثَۚ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي الۡاَرۡحَامِؕ وَمَا تَدۡرِيۡ نَفۡسٌ مَّاذَا تَكۡسِبُ غَدًاؕ وَمَا تَدۡرِيۡ نَفۡسٌۭ بِاَيِّ اَرۡضٍ تَمُوۡتُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلِيۡمٌ خَبِيۡرٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Allah [alone] has knowledge of the Hour and sends down the rain and knows what is in the wombs. And no soul perceives what it will earn tomorrow, and no soul perceives in what land it will die. Indeed, Allah is Knowing and Acquainted
Alif, Lam, Meem

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلُ الۡكِتٰبِ لَا رَيۡبَ فِيۡهِ مِنۡ رَّبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: [This is] the revelation of the Book about which there is no doubt from the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ افۡتَرٰىهُۚ بَلۡ هُوَ الۡحَقُّ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ لِتُنۡذِرَ قَوۡمًا مَّا٘ اَتٰىهُمۡ مِّنۡ نَّذِيۡرٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or do they say, "He invented it"? Rather, it is the truth from your Lord, [O Muhammad], that you may warn a people to whom no warner has come before you [so] perhaps they will be guided

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِيۡ سِتَّةِ اَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ اسۡتَوٰي عَلَي الۡعَرۡشِؕ مَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مِنۡ وَّلِيٍّ وَّلَا شَفِيۡعٍؕ اَفَلَا تَتَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: It is Allah who created the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them in six days; then He established Himself above the Throne. You have not besides Him any protector or any intercessor; so will you not be reminded

quran.arabic: يُدَبِّرُ الۡاَمۡرَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ اِلَي الۡاَرۡضِ ثُمَّ يَعۡرُجُ اِلَيۡهِ فِيۡ يَوۡمٍ كَانَ مِقۡدَارُهٗ٘ اَلۡفَ سَنَةٍ مِّمَّا تَعُدُّوۡنَ
quran.english: He arranges [each] matter from the heaven to the earth; then it will ascend to Him in a Day, the extent of which is a thousand years of those which you count

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ عٰلِمُ الۡغَيۡبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: That is the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ٘ اَحۡسَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقَهٗ وَبَدَاَ خَلۡقَ الۡاِنۡسَانِ مِنۡ طِيۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: Who perfected everything which He created and began the creation of man from clay

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ جَعَلَ نَسۡلَهٗ مِنۡ سُلٰلَةٍ مِّنۡ مَّآءٍ مَّهِيۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: Then He made his posterity out of the extract of a liquid disdained

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ سَوّٰىهُ وَنَفَخَ فِيۡهِ مِنۡ رُّوۡحِهٖ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ السَّمۡعَ وَالۡاَبۡصَارَ وَالۡاَفۡـِٕدَةَؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then He proportioned him and breathed into him from His [created] soul and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡ٘ا ءَاِذَا ضَلَلۡنَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ ءَاِنَّا لَفِيۡ خَلۡقٍ جَدِيۡدٍ ࣢ؕ بَلۡ هُمۡ بِلِقَآءِ رَبِّهِمۡ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "When we are lost within the earth, will we indeed be [recreated] in a new creation?" Rather, they are, in [the matter of] the meeting with their Lord, disbelievers

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يَتَوَفّٰىكُمۡ مَّلَكُ الۡمَوۡتِ الَّذِيۡ وُكِّلَ بِكُمۡ ثُمَّ اِلٰي رَبِّكُمۡ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "The angel of death will take you who has been entrusted with you. Then to your Lord you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ تَرٰ٘ي اِذِ الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ نَاكِسُوۡا رُءُوۡسِهِمۡ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡؕ رَبَّنَا٘ اَبۡصَرۡنَا وَسَمِعۡنَا فَارۡجِعۡنَا نَعۡمَلۡ صَالِحًا اِنَّا مُوۡقِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: If you could but see when the criminals are hanging their heads before their Lord, [saying], "Our Lord, we have seen and heard, so return us [to the world]; we will work righteousness. Indeed, we are [now] certain

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ شِئۡنَا لَاٰتَيۡنَا كُلَّ نَفۡسٍ هُدٰىهَا وَلٰكِنۡ حَقَّ الۡقَوۡلُ مِنِّيۡ لَاَمۡلَـَٔنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنَ الۡجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَ
quran.english: And if We had willed, We could have given every soul its guidance, but the word from Me will come into effect [that] "I will surely fill Hell with jinn and people all together

quran.arabic: فَذُوۡقُوۡا بِمَا نَسِيۡتُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ هٰذَاۚ اِنَّا نَسِيۡنٰكُمۡ وَذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابَ الۡخُلۡدِ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: So taste [punishment] because you forgot the meeting of this, your Day; indeed, We have [accordingly] forgotten you. And taste the punishment of eternity for what you used to do

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا يُؤۡمِنُ بِاٰيٰتِنَا الَّذِيۡنَ اِذَا ذُكِّرُوۡا بِهَا خَرُّوۡا سُجَّدًا وَّسَبَّحُوۡا بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَهُمۡ لَا يَسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَࣛۚ‏
quran.english: Only those believe in Our verses who, when they are reminded by them, fall down in prostration and exalt [Allah] with praise of their Lord, and they are not arrogant

quran.arabic: تَتَجَافٰي جُنُوۡبُهُمۡ عَنِ الۡمَضَاجِعِ يَدۡعُوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡ خَوۡفًا وَّطَمَعًاؗ وَّمِمَّا رَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ يُنۡفِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: They arise from [their] beds; they supplicate their Lord in fear and aspiration, and from what We have provided them, they spend

quran.arabic: فَلَا تَعۡلَمُ نَفۡسٌ مَّا٘ اُخۡفِيَ لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ قُرَّةِ اَعۡيُنٍۚ جَزَآءًۭ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And no soul knows what has been hidden for them of comfort for eyes as reward for what they used to do

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ كَانَ مُؤۡمِنًا كَمَنۡ كَانَ فَاسِقًاؕؔ لَا يَسۡتَوٗنَ࣡‏
quran.english: Then is one who was a believer like one who was defiantly disobedient? They are not equal

quran.arabic: اَمَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ فَلَهُمۡ جَنّٰتُ الۡمَاۡوٰيؗ نُزُلًاۭ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: As for those who believed and did righteous deeds, for them will be the Gardens of Refuge as accommodation for what they used to do

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا الَّذِيۡنَ فَسَقُوۡا فَمَاۡوٰىهُمُ النَّارُؕ كُلَّمَا٘ اَرَادُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ يَّخۡرُجُوۡا مِنۡهَا٘ اُعِيۡدُوۡا فِيۡهَا وَقِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ ذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابَ النَّارِ الَّذِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَ
quran.english: But as for those who defiantly disobeyed, their refuge is the Fire. Every time they wish to emerge from it, they will be returned to it while it is said to them, "Taste the punishment of the Fire which you used to deny

quran.arabic: وَلَنُذِيۡقَنَّهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡعَذَابِ الۡاَدۡنٰي دُوۡنَ الۡعَذَابِ الۡاَكۡبَرِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And we will surely let them taste the nearer punishment short of the greater punishment that perhaps they will repent

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ اَظۡلَمُ مِمَّنۡ ذُكِّرَ بِاٰيٰتِ رَبِّهٖ ثُمَّ اَعۡرَضَ عَنۡهَاؕ اِنَّا مِنَ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ مُنۡتَقِمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the verses of his Lord; then he turns away from them? Indeed We, from the criminals, will take retribution

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسَي الۡكِتٰبَ فَلَا تَكُنۡ فِيۡ مِرۡيَةٍ مِّنۡ لِّقَآئِهٖ وَجَعَلۡنٰهُ هُدًي لِّبَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَۚ‏
quran.english: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture, so do not be in doubt over his meeting. And we made the Torah guidance for the Children of Israel

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ اَئِمَّةً يَّهۡدُوۡنَ بِاَمۡرِنَا لَمَّا صَبَرُوۡاࣞؕ وَكَانُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا يُوۡقِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our command when they were patient and [when] they were certain of Our signs

quran.arabic: اِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَفۡصِلُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ فِيۡمَا كَانُوۡا فِيۡهِ يَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَهۡدِ لَهُمۡ كَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ مِّنَ الۡقُرُوۡنِ يَمۡشُوۡنَ فِيۡ مَسٰكِنِهِمۡؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍؕ اَفَلَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them, [as] they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs; then do they not hear

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّا نَسُوۡقُ الۡمَآءَ اِلَي الۡاَرۡضِ الۡجُرُزِ فَنُخۡرِجُ بِهٖ زَرۡعًا تَاۡكُلُ مِنۡهُ اَنۡعَامُهُمۡ وَاَنۡفُسُهُمۡؕ اَفَلَا يُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Have they not seen that We drive the water [in clouds] to barren land and bring forth thereby crops from which their livestock eat and [they] themselves? Then do they not see

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَتٰي هٰذَا الۡفَتۡحُ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يَوۡمَ الۡفَتۡحِ لَا يَنۡفَعُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اِيۡمَانُهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنۡظَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "On the Day of Conquest the belief of those who had disbelieved will not benefit them, nor will they be reprieved

quran.arabic: فَاَعۡرِضۡ عَنۡهُمۡ وَانۡتَظِرۡ اِنَّهُمۡ مُّنۡتَظِرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So turn away from them and wait. Indeed, they are waiting

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ اتَّقِ اللّٰهَ وَلَا تُطِعِ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ وَالۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ كَانَ عَلِيۡمًا حَكِيۡمًاۙ‏
quran.english: O Prophet, fear Allah and do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: وَّاتَّبِعۡ مَا يُوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيۡكَ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ كَانَ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ خَبِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And follow that which is revealed to you from your Lord. Indeed Allah is ever, with what you do, Acquainted

quran.arabic: وَّتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَي اللّٰهِؕ وَكَفٰي بِاللّٰهِ وَكِيۡلًا
quran.english: And rely upon Allah; and sufficient is Allah as Disposer of affairs

quran.arabic: مَا جَعَلَ اللّٰهُ لِرَجُلٍ مِّنۡ قَلۡبَيۡنِ فِيۡ جَوۡفِهٖۚ وَمَا جَعَلَ اَزۡوَاجَكُمُ الّٰٓـِٔيۡ تُظٰهِرُوۡنَ مِنۡهُنَّ اُمَّهٰتِكُمۡۚ وَمَا جَعَلَ اَدۡعِيَآءَكُمۡ اَبۡنَآءَكُمۡؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ قَوۡلُكُمۡ بِاَفۡوَاهِكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَقُوۡلُ الۡحَقَّ وَهُوَ يَهۡدِي السَّبِيۡلَ
quran.english: Allah has not made for a man two hearts in his interior. And He has not made your wives whom you declare unlawful your mothers. And he has not made your adopted sons your [true] sons. That is [merely] your saying by your mouths, but Allah says the truth, and He guides to the [right] way

quran.arabic: اُدۡعُوۡهُمۡ لِاٰبَآئِهِمۡ هُوَ اَقۡسَطُ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِۚ فَاِنۡ لَّمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اٰبَآءَهُمۡ فَاِخۡوَانُكُمۡ فِي الدِّيۡنِ وَمَوَالِيۡكُمۡؕ وَلَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ جُنَاحٌ فِيۡمَا٘ اَخۡطَاۡتُمۡ بِهٖ وَلٰكِنۡ مَّا تَعَمَّدَتۡ قُلُوۡبُكُمۡؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرًا رَّحِيۡمًا
quran.english: Call them by [the names of] their fathers; it is more just in the sight of Allah. But if you do not know their fathers - then they are [still] your brothers in religion and those entrusted to you. And there is no blame upon you for that in which you have erred but [only for] what your hearts intended. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: اَلنَّبِيُّ اَوۡلٰي بِالۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ مِنۡ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ وَاَزۡوَاجُهٗ٘ اُمَّهٰتُهُمۡؕ وَاُولُوا الۡاَرۡحَامِ بَعۡضُهُمۡ اَوۡلٰي بِبَعۡضٍ فِيۡ كِتٰبِ اللّٰهِ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُهٰجِرِيۡنَ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ تَفۡعَلُوۡ٘ا اِلٰ٘ي اَوۡلِيٰٓـِٕكُمۡ مَّعۡرُوۡفًاؕ كَانَ ذٰلِكَ فِي الۡكِتٰبِ مَسۡطُوۡرًا
quran.english: The Prophet is more worthy of the believers than themselves, and his wives are [in the position of] their mothers.
