And those of [blood] relationship are more entitled [to inheritance] in the decree of Allah than the [other] believers and the emigrants, except that you may do to your close associates a kindness [through bequest]. That was in the Book inscribed

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ اَخَذۡنَا مِنَ النَّبِيّٖنَ مِيۡثَاقَهُمۡ وَمِنۡكَ وَمِنۡ نُّوۡحٍ وَّاِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَمُوۡسٰي وَعِيۡسَي ابۡنِ مَرۡيَمَࣕ وَاَخَذۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ مِّيۡثَاقًا غَلِيۡظًاۙ‏
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when We took from the prophets their covenant and from you and from Noah and Abraham and Moses and Jesus, the son of Mary; and We took from them a solemn covenant

quran.arabic: لِّيَسۡـَٔلَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ عَنۡ صِدۡقِهِمۡۚ وَاَعَدَّ لِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ عَذَابًا اَلِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: That He may question the truthful about their truth. And He has prepared for the disbelievers a painful punishment

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اذۡكُرُوۡا نِعۡمَةَ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ اِذۡ جَآءَتۡكُمۡ جُنُوۡدٌ فَاَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيۡحًا وَّجُنُوۡدًا لَّمۡ تَرَوۡهَاؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ بَصِيۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, remember the favor of Allah upon you when armies came to [attack] you and We sent upon them a wind and armies [of angels] you did not see. And ever is Allah, of what you do, Seeing

quran.arabic: اِذۡ جَآءُوۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ فَوۡقِكُمۡ وَمِنۡ اَسۡفَلَ مِنۡكُمۡ وَاِذۡ زَاغَتِ الۡاَبۡصَارُ وَبَلَغَتِ الۡقُلُوۡبُ الۡحَنَاجِرَ وَتَظُنُّوۡنَ بِاللّٰهِ الظُّنُوۡنَاؕ‏
quran.english: [Remember] when they came at you from above you and from below you, and when eyes shifted [in fear], and hearts reached the throats and you assumed about Allah [various] assumptions

quran.arabic: هُنَالِكَ ابۡتُلِيَ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ وَزُلۡزِلُوۡا زِلۡزَالًا شَدِيۡدًا
quran.english: There the believers were tested and shaken with a severe shaking

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ يَقُوۡلُ الۡمُنٰفِقُوۡنَ وَالَّذِيۡنَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّرَضٌ مَّا وَعَدَنَا اللّٰهُ وَرَسُوۡلُهٗ٘ اِلَّا غُرُوۡرًا
quran.english: And [remember] when the hypocrites and those in whose hearts is disease said, "Allah and His Messenger did not promise us except delusion

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَتۡ طَّآئِفَةٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ يٰ٘اَهۡلَ يَثۡرِبَ لَا مُقَامَ لَكُمۡ فَارۡجِعُوۡاۚ وَيَسۡتَاۡذِنُ فَرِيۡقٌ مِّنۡهُمُ النَّبِيَّ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اِنَّ بُيُوۡتَنَا عَوۡرَةٌؕۛ وَمَا هِيَ بِعَوۡرَةٍۚۛ اِنۡ يُّرِيۡدُوۡنَ اِلَّا فِرَارًا
quran.english: And when a faction of them said, "O people of Yathrib, there is no stability for you [here], so return [home]." And a party of them asked permission of the Prophet, saying, "Indeed, our houses are unprotected," while they were not exposed. They did not intend except to flee

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ دُخِلَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ اَقۡطَارِهَا ثُمَّ سُئِلُوا الۡفِتۡنَةَ لَاٰتَوۡهَا وَمَا تَلَبَّثُوۡا بِهَا٘ اِلَّا يَسِيۡرًا
quran.english: And if they had been entered upon from all its [surrounding] regions and fitnah had been demanded of them, they would have done it and not hesitated over it except briefly

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ كَانُوۡا عَاهَدُوا اللّٰهَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ لَا يُوَلُّوۡنَ الۡاَدۡبَارَؕ وَكَانَ عَهۡدُ اللّٰهِ مَسۡـُٔوۡلًا
quran.english: And they had already promised Allah before not to turn their backs and flee. And ever is the promise to Allah [that about which one will be] questioned

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّنۡ يَّنۡفَعَكُمُ الۡفِرَارُ اِنۡ فَرَرۡتُمۡ مِّنَ الۡمَوۡتِ اَوِ الۡقَتۡلِ وَاِذًا لَّا تُمَتَّعُوۡنَ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Never will fleeing benefit you if you should flee from death or killing; and then [if you did], you would not be given enjoyment [of life] except for a little

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَنۡ ذَا الَّذِيۡ يَعۡصِمُكُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ اِنۡ اَرَادَ بِكُمۡ سُوۡٓءًا اَوۡ اَرَادَ بِكُمۡ رَحۡمَةًؕ وَلَا يَجِدُوۡنَ لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ وَلِيًّا وَّلَا نَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: Say, "Who is it that can protect you from Allah if He intends for you an ill or intends for you a mercy?" And they will not find for themselves besides Allah any protector or any helper

quran.arabic: قَدۡ يَعۡلَمُ اللّٰهُ الۡمُعَوِّقِيۡنَ مِنۡكُمۡ وَالۡقَآئِلِيۡنَ لِاِخۡوَانِهِمۡ هَلُمَّ اِلَيۡنَاۚ وَلَا يَاۡتُوۡنَ الۡبَاۡسَ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Already Allah knows the hinderers among you and those [hypocrites] who say to their brothers, "Come to us," and do not go to battle, except for a few

quran.arabic: اَشِحَّةً عَلَيۡكُمۡۚۖ فَاِذَا جَآءَ الۡخَوۡفُ رَاَيۡتَهُمۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ اِلَيۡكَ تَدُوۡرُ اَعۡيُنُهُمۡ كَالَّذِيۡ يُغۡشٰي عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ الۡمَوۡتِۚ فَاِذَا ذَهَبَ الۡخَوۡفُ سَلَقُوۡكُمۡ بِاَلۡسِنَةٍ حِدَادٍ اَشِحَّةً عَلَي الۡخَيۡرِؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَمۡ يُؤۡمِنُوۡا فَاَحۡبَطَ اللّٰهُ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡؕ وَكَانَ ذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ يَسِيۡرًا
quran.english: Indisposed toward you. And when fear comes, you see them looking at you, their eyes revolving like one being overcome by death. But when fear departs, they lash you with sharp tongues, indisposed toward [any] good. Those have not believed, so Allah has rendered their deeds worthless, and ever is that, for Allah, easy

quran.arabic: يَحۡسَبُوۡنَ الۡاَحۡزَابَ لَمۡ يَذۡهَبُوۡاۚ وَاِنۡ يَّاۡتِ الۡاَحۡزَابُ يَوَدُّوۡا لَوۡ اَنَّهُمۡ بَادُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَعۡرَابِ يَسۡاَلُوۡنَ عَنۡ اَنۭۡ بَآئِكُمۡؕ وَلَوۡ كَانُوۡا فِيۡكُمۡ مَّا قٰتَلُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: They think the companies have not [yet] withdrawn. And if the companies should come [again], they would wish they were in the desert among the bedouins, inquiring [from afar] about your news. And if they should be among you, they would not fight except for a little

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ كَانَ لَكُمۡ فِيۡ رَسُوۡلِ اللّٰهِ اُسۡوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِّمَنۡ كَانَ يَرۡجُوا اللّٰهَ وَالۡيَوۡمَ الۡاٰخِرَ وَذَكَرَ اللّٰهَ كَثِيۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: There has certainly been for you in the Messenger of Allah an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in Allah and the Last Day and [who] remembers Allah often

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا رَاَ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ الۡاَحۡزَابَۙ قَالُوۡا هٰذَا مَا وَعَدَنَا اللّٰهُ وَرَسُوۡلُهٗ وَصَدَقَ اللّٰهُ وَرَسُوۡلُهٗؗ وَمَا زَادَهُمۡ اِلَّا٘ اِيۡمَانًا وَّتَسۡلِيۡمًاؕ‏
quran.english: And when the believers saw the companies, they said, "This is what Allah and His Messenger had promised us, and Allah and His Messenger spoke the truth." And it increased them only in faith and acceptance

quran.arabic: مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ رِجَالٌ صَدَقُوۡا مَا عَاهَدُوا اللّٰهَ عَلَيۡهِۚ فَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ قَضٰي نَحۡبَهٗ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ يَّنۡتَظِرُؗۖ وَمَا بَدَّلُوۡا تَبۡدِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Among the believers are men true to what they promised Allah. Among them is he who has fulfilled his vow [to the death], and among them is he who awaits [his chance]. And they did not alter [the terms of their commitment] by any alteration

quran.arabic: لِّيَجۡزِيَ اللّٰهُ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ بِصِدۡقِهِمۡ وَيُعَذِّبَ الۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ اِنۡ شَآءَ اَوۡ يَتُوۡبَ عَلَيۡهِمۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ كَانَ غَفُوۡرًا رَّحِيۡمًاۚ‏
quran.english: That Allah may reward the truthful for their truth and punish the hypocrites if He wills or accept their repentance. Indeed, Allah is ever Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَرَدَّ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِغَيۡظِهِمۡ لَمۡ يَنَالُوۡا خَيۡرًاؕ وَكَفَي اللّٰهُ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ الۡقِتَالَؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ قَوِيًّا عَزِيۡزًاۚ‏
quran.english: And Allah repelled those who disbelieved, in their rage, not having obtained any good. And sufficient was Allah for the believers in battle, and ever is Allah Powerful and Exalted in Might

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡزَلَ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَاهَرُوۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ اَهۡلِ الۡكِتٰبِ مِنۡ صَيَاصِيۡهِمۡ وَقَذَفَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمُ الرُّعۡبَ فَرِيۡقًا تَقۡتُلُوۡنَ وَتَاۡسِرُوۡنَ فَرِيۡقًاۚ‏
quran.english: And He brought down those who supported them among the People of the Scripture from their fortresses and cast terror into their hearts [so that] a party you killed, and you took captive a party

quran.arabic: وَاَوۡرَثَكُمۡ اَرۡضَهُمۡ وَدِيَارَهُمۡ وَاَمۡوَالَهُمۡ وَاَرۡضًا لَّمۡ تَطَـُٔوۡهَاؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And He caused you to inherit their land and their homes and their properties and a land which you have not trodden. And ever is Allah, over all things, competent

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ قُلۡ لِّاَزۡوَاجِكَ اِنۡ كُنۡتُنَّ تُرِدۡنَ الۡحَيٰوةَ الدُّنۡيَا وَزِيۡنَتَهَا فَتَعَالَيۡنَ اُمَتِّعۡكُنَّ وَاُسَرِّحۡكُنَّ سَرَاحًا جَمِيۡلًا
quran.english: O Prophet, say to your wives, "If you should desire the worldly life and its adornment, then come, I will provide for you and give you a gracious release

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ كُنۡتُنَّ تُرِدۡنَ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ وَالدَّارَ الۡاٰخِرَةَ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ اَعَدَّ لِلۡمُحۡسِنٰتِ مِنۡكُنَّ اَجۡرًا عَظِيۡمًا
quran.english: But if you should desire Allah and His Messenger and the home of the Hereafter - then indeed, Allah has prepared for the doers of good among you a great reward

quran.arabic: يٰنِسَآءَ النَّبِيِّ مَنۡ يَّاۡتِ مِنۡكُنَّ بِفَاحِشَةٍ مُّبَيِّنَةٍ يُّضٰعَفۡ لَهَا الۡعَذَابُ ضِعۡفَيۡنِؕ وَكَانَ ذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ يَسِيۡرًا
quran.english: O wives of the Prophet, whoever of you should commit a clear immorality - for her the punishment would be doubled two fold, and ever is that, for Allah, easy

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّقۡنُتۡ مِنۡكُنَّ لِلّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ وَتَعۡمَلۡ صَالِحًا نُّؤۡتِهَا٘ اَجۡرَهَا مَرَّتَيۡنِۙ وَاَعۡتَدۡنَا لَهَا رِزۡقًا كَرِيۡمًا
quran.english: And whoever of you devoutly obeys Allah and His Messenger and does righteousness - We will give her her reward twice; and We have prepared for her a noble provision

quran.arabic: يٰنِسَآءَ النَّبِيِّ لَسۡتُنَّ كَاَحَدٍ مِّنَ النِّسَآءِ اِنِ اتَّقَيۡتُنَّ فَلَا تَخۡضَعۡنَ بِالۡقَوۡلِ فَيَطۡمَعَ الَّذِيۡ فِيۡ قَلۡبِهٖ مَرَضٌ وَّقُلۡنَ قَوۡلًا مَّعۡرُوۡفًاۚ‏
quran.english: O wives of the Prophet, you are not like anyone among women. If you fear Allah, then do not be soft in speech [to men], lest he in whose heart is disease should covet, but speak with appropriate speech

quran.arabic: وَقَرۡنَ فِيۡ بُيُوۡتِكُنَّ وَلَا تَبَرَّجۡنَ تَبَرُّجَ الۡجَاهِلِيَّةِ الۡاُوۡلٰي وَاَقِمۡنَ الصَّلٰوةَ وَاٰتِيۡنَ الزَّكٰوةَ وَاَطِعۡنَ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗؕ اِنَّمَا يُرِيۡدُ اللّٰهُ لِيُذۡهِبَ عَنۡكُمُ الرِّجۡسَ اَهۡلَ الۡبَيۡتِ وَيُطَهِّرَكُمۡ تَطۡهِيۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: And abide in your houses and do not display yourselves as [was] the display of the former times of ignorance. And establish prayer and give zakah and obey Allah and His Messenger. Allah intends only to remove from you the impurity [of sin], O people of the [Prophet's] household, and to purify you with [extensive] purification

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡنَ مَا يُتۡلٰي فِيۡ بُيُوۡتِكُنَّ مِنۡ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ وَالۡحِكۡمَةِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ كَانَ لَطِيۡفًا خَبِيۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And remember what is recited in your houses of the verses of Allah and wisdom. Indeed, Allah is ever Subtle and Acquainted [with all things]

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَ وَالۡمُسۡلِمٰتِ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ وَالۡقٰنِتِيۡنَ وَالۡقٰنِتٰتِ وَالصّٰدِقِيۡنَ وَالصّٰدِقٰتِ وَالصّٰبِرِيۡنَ وَالصّٰبِرٰتِ وَالۡخٰشِعِيۡنَ وَالۡخٰشِعٰتِ وَالۡمُتَصَدِّقِيۡنَ وَالۡمُتَصَدِّقٰتِ وَالصَّآئِمِيۡنَ وَالصّٰٓئِمٰتِ وَالۡحٰفِظِيۡنَ فُرُوۡجَهُمۡ وَالۡحٰفِظٰتِ وَالذّٰكِرِيۡنَ اللّٰهَ كَثِيۡرًا وَّالذّٰكِرٰتِ اَعَدَّ اللّٰهُ لَهُمۡ مَّغۡفِرَةً وَّاَجۡرًا عَظِيۡمًا
quran.english: Indeed, the Muslim men and Muslim women, the believing men and believing women, the obedient men and obedient women, the truthful men and truthful women, the patient men and patient women, the humble men and humble women, the charitable men and charitable women, the fasting men and fasting women, the men who guard their private parts and the women who do so, and the men who remember Allah often and the women who do so - for them Allah has prepared forgiveness and a great reward

quran.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لِمُؤۡمِنٍ وَّلَا مُؤۡمِنَةٍ اِذَا قَضَي اللّٰهُ وَرَسُوۡلُهٗ٘ اَمۡرًا اَنۡ يَّكُوۡنَ لَهُمُ الۡخِيَرَةُ مِنۡ اَمۡرِهِمۡؕ وَمَنۡ يَّعۡصِ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ فَقَدۡ ضَلَّ ضَلٰلًا مُّبِيۡنًا
quran.english: It is not for a believing man or a believing woman, when Allah and His Messenger have decided a matter, that they should [thereafter] have any choice about their affair. And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger has certainly strayed into clear error

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ تَقُوۡلُ لِلَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡعَمَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِ وَاَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ اَمۡسِكۡ عَلَيۡكَ زَوۡجَكَ وَاتَّقِ اللّٰهَ وَتُخۡفِيۡ فِيۡ نَفۡسِكَ مَا اللّٰهُ مُبۡدِيۡهِ وَتَخۡشَي النَّاسَۚ وَاللّٰهُ اَحَقُّ اَنۡ تَخۡشٰىهُؕ فَلَمَّا قَضٰي زَيۡدٌ مِّنۡهَا وَطَرًا زَوَّجۡنٰكَهَا لِكَيۡ لَا يَكُوۡنَ عَلَي الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ حَرَجٌ فِيۡ٘ اَزۡوَاجِ اَدۡعِيَآئِهِمۡ اِذَا قَضَوۡا مِنۡهُنَّ وَطَرًاؕ وَكَانَ اَمۡرُ اللّٰهِ مَفۡعُوۡلًا
quran.english: And [remember, O Muhammad], when you said to the one on whom Allah bestowed favor and you bestowed favor, "Keep your wife and fear Allah," while you concealed within yourself that which Allah is to disclose. And you feared the people, while Allah has more right that you fear Him. So when Zayd had no longer any need for her, We married her to you in order that there not be upon the believers any discomfort concerning the wives of their adopted sons when they no longer have need of them. And ever is the command of Allah accomplished

quran.arabic: مَا كَانَ عَلَي النَّبِيِّ مِنۡ حَرَجٍ فِيۡمَا فَرَضَ اللّٰهُ لَهٗؕ سُنَّةَ اللّٰهِ فِي الَّذِيۡنَ خَلَوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلُؕ وَكَانَ اَمۡرُ اللّٰهِ قَدَرًا مَّقۡدُوۡرَاؗۙ‏
quran.english: There is not to be upon the Prophet any discomfort concerning that which Allah has imposed upon him. [This is] the established way of Allah with those [prophets] who have passed on before. And ever is the command of Allah a destiny decreed

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡنَ يُبَلِّغُوۡنَ رِسٰلٰتِ اللّٰهِ وَيَخۡشَوۡنَهٗ وَلَا يَخۡشَوۡنَ اَحَدًا اِلَّا اللّٰهَؕ وَكَفٰي بِاللّٰهِ حَسِيۡبًا
quran.english: [Allah praises] those who convey the messages of Allah and fear Him and do not fear anyone but Allah. And sufficient is Allah as Accountant

quran.arabic: مَا كَانَ مُحَمَّدٌ اَبَا٘ اَحَدٍ مِّنۡ رِّجَالِكُمۡ وَلٰكِنۡ رَّسُوۡلَ اللّٰهِ وَخَاتَمَ النَّبِيّٖنَؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Muhammad is not the father of [any] one of your men, but [he is] the Messenger of Allah and last of the prophets. And ever is Allah, of all things, Knowing

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اذۡكُرُوا اللّٰهَ ذِكۡرًا كَثِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, remember Allah with much remembrance

quran.arabic: وَّسَبِّحُوۡهُ بُكۡرَةً وَّاَصِيۡلًا
quran.english: And exalt Him morning and afternoon

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ يُصَلِّيۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَمَلٰٓئِكَتُهٗ لِيُخۡرِجَكُمۡ مِّنَ الظُّلُمٰتِ اِلَي النُّوۡرِؕ وَكَانَ بِالۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ رَحِيۡمًا
quran.english: It is He who confers blessing upon you, and His angels [ask Him to do so] that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And ever is He, to the believers, Merciful

quran.arabic: تَحِيَّتُهُمۡ يَوۡمَ يَلۡقَوۡنَهٗ سَلٰمٌۚۖ وَّاَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ اَجۡرًا كَرِيۡمًا
quran.english: Their greeting the Day they meet Him will be, "Peace." And He has prepared for them a noble reward

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ اِنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ شَاهِدًا وَّمُبَشِّرًا وَّنَذِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: O Prophet, indeed We have sent you as a witness and a bringer of good tidings and a warner

quran.arabic: وَّدَاعِيًا اِلَي اللّٰهِ بِاِذۡنِهٖ وَسِرَاجًا مُّنِيۡرًا
quran.english: And one who invites to Allah, by His permission, and an illuminating lamp

quran.arabic: وَبَشِّرِ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ بِاَنَّ لَهُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ فَضۡلًا كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: And give good tidings to the believers that they will have from Allah great bounty

quran.arabic: وَلَا تُطِعِ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ وَالۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ وَدَعۡ اَذٰىهُمۡ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَي اللّٰهِؕ وَكَفٰي بِاللّٰهِ وَكِيۡلًا
quran.english: And do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites but do not harm them, and rely upon Allah. And sufficient is Allah as Disposer of affairs

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِذَا نَكَحۡتُمُ الۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ ثُمَّ طَلَّقۡتُمُوۡهُنَّ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ تَمَسُّوۡهُنَّ فَمَا لَكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِنَّ مِنۡ عِدَّةٍ تَعۡتَدُّوۡنَهَاۚ فَمَتِّعُوۡهُنَّ وَسَرِّحُوۡهُنَّ سَرَاحًا جَمِيۡلًا
quran.english: O You who have believed, when you marry believing women and then divorce them before you have touched them, then there is not for you any waiting period to count concerning them. So provide for them and give them a gracious release

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ اِنَّا٘ اَحۡلَلۡنَا لَكَ اَزۡوَاجَكَ الّٰتِيۡ٘ اٰتَيۡتَ اُجُوۡرَهُنَّ وَمَا مَلَكَتۡ يَمِيۡنُكَ مِمَّا٘ اَفَآءَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡكَ وَبَنٰتِ عَمِّكَ وَبَنٰتِ عَمّٰتِكَ وَبَنٰتِ خَالِكَ وَبَنٰتِ خٰلٰتِكَ الّٰتِيۡ هَاجَرۡنَ مَعَكَؗ وَامۡرَاَةً مُّؤۡمِنَةً اِنۡ وَّهَبَتۡ نَفۡسَهَا لِلنَّبِيِّ اِنۡ اَرَادَ النَّبِيُّ اَنۡ يَّسۡتَنۡكِحَهَاࣗ خَالِصَةً لَّكَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَؕ قَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا مَا فَرَضۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ فِيۡ٘ اَزۡوَاجِهِمۡ وَمَا مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُهُمۡ لِكَيۡلَا يَكُوۡنَ عَلَيۡكَ حَرَجٌؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرًا رَّحِيۡمًا
quran.english: O Prophet, indeed We have made lawful to you your wives to whom you have given their due compensation and those your right hand possesses from what Allah has returned to you [of captives] and the daughters of your paternal uncles and the daughters of your paternal aunts and the daughters of your maternal uncles and the daughters of your maternal aunts who emigrated with you and a believing woman if she gives herself to the Prophet [and] if the Prophet wishes to marry her, [this is] only for you, excluding the [other] believers. We certainly know what We have made obligatory upon them concerning their wives and those their right hands possess, [but this is for you] in order that there will be upon you no discomfort. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: تُرۡجِيۡ مَنۡ تَشَآءُ مِنۡهُنَّ وَتُـٔۡوِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡكَ مَنۡ تَشَآءُؕ وَمَنِ ابۡتَغَيۡتَ مِمَّنۡ عَزَلۡتَ فَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيۡكَؕ ذٰلِكَ اَدۡنٰ٘ي اَنۡ تَقَرَّ اَعۡيُنُهُنَّ وَلَا يَحۡزَنَّ وَيَرۡضَيۡنَ بِمَا٘ اٰتَيۡتَهُنَّ كُلُّهُنَّؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِكُمۡؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمًا حَلِيۡمًا
quran.english: You, [O Muhammad], may put aside whom you will of them or take to yourself whom you will. And any that you desire of those [wives] from whom you had [temporarily] separated - there is no blame upon you [in returning her]. That is more suitable that they should be content and not grieve and that they should be satisfied with what you have given them - all of them. And Allah knows what is in your hearts. And ever is Allah Knowing and Forbearing

quran.arabic: لَا يَحِلُّ لَكَ النِّسَآءُ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدُ وَلَا٘ اَنۡ تَبَدَّلَ بِهِنَّ مِنۡ اَزۡوَاجٍ وَّلَوۡ اَعۡجَبَكَ حُسۡنُهُنَّ اِلَّا مَا مَلَكَتۡ يَمِيۡنُكَؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ رَّقِيۡبًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Not lawful to you, [O Muhammad], are [any additional] women after [this], nor [is it] for you to exchange them for [other] wives, even if their beauty were to please you, except what your right hand possesses. And ever is Allah, over all things, an Observer

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تَدۡخُلُوۡا بُيُوۡتَ النَّبِيِّ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يُّؤۡذَنَ لَكُمۡ اِلٰي طَعَامٍ غَيۡرَ نٰظِرِيۡنَ اِنٰىهُ وَلٰكِنۡ اِذَا دُعِيۡتُمۡ فَادۡخُلُوۡا فَاِذَا طَعِمۡتُمۡ فَانۡتَشِرُوۡا وَلَا مُسۡتَاۡنِسِيۡنَ لِحَدِيۡثٍؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكُمۡ كَانَ يُؤۡذِي النَّبِيَّ فَيَسۡتَحۡيٖ مِنۡكُمۡؗ وَاللّٰهُ لَا يَسۡتَحۡيٖ مِنَ الۡحَقِّؕ وَاِذَا سَاَلۡتُمُوۡهُنَّ مَتَاعًا فَسۡـَٔلُوۡهُنَّ مِنۡ وَّرَآءِ حِجَابٍؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ اَطۡهَرُ لِقُلُوۡبِكُمۡ وَقُلُوۡبِهِنَّؕ وَمَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ اَنۡ تُؤۡذُوۡا رَسُوۡلَ اللّٰهِ وَلَا٘ اَنۡ تَنۡكِحُوۡ٘ا اَزۡوَاجَهٗ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖ٘ اَبَدًاؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكُمۡ كَانَ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ عَظِيۡمًا
quran.english: O you who have believed, do not enter the houses of the Prophet except when you are permitted for a meal, without awaiting its readiness. But when you are invited, then enter; and when you have eaten, disperse without seeking to remain for conversation. Indeed, that [behavior] was troubling the Prophet, and he is shy of [dismissing] you. But Allah is not shy of the truth. And when you ask [his wives] for something, ask them from behind a partition. That is purer for your hearts and their hearts. And it is not [conceivable or lawful] for you to harm the Messenger of Allah or to marry his wives after him, ever. Indeed, that would be in the sight of Allah an enormity

quran.arabic: اِنۡ تُبۡدُوۡا شَيۡـًٔا اَوۡ تُخۡفُوۡهُ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ كَانَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمًا
quran.english: Whether you reveal a thing or conceal it, indeed Allah is ever, of all things, Knowing

quran.arabic: لَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيۡهِنَّ فِيۡ٘ اٰبَآئِهِنَّ وَلَا٘ اَبۡنَآئِهِنَّ وَلَا٘ اِخۡوَانِهِنَّ وَلَا٘ اَبۡنَآءِ اِخۡوَانِهِنَّ وَلَا٘ اَبۡنَآءِ اَخَوٰتِهِنَّ وَلَا نِسَآئِهِنَّ وَلَا مَا مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُهُنَّۚ وَاتَّقِيۡنَ اللّٰهَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ كَانَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ شَهِيۡدًا
quran.english: There is no blame upon women concerning their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their brothers' sons or their sisters' sons or their women or those their right hands possess. And fear Allah. Indeed Allah is ever, over all things, Witness

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ وَمَلٰٓئِكَتَهٗ يُصَلُّوۡنَ عَلَي النَّبِيِّؕ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا صَلُّوۡا عَلَيۡهِ وَسَلِّمُوۡا تَسۡلِيۡمًا
quran.english: Indeed, Allah confers blessing upon the Prophet, and His angels [ask Him to do so]. O you who have believed, ask [Allah to confer] blessing upon him and ask [Allah to grant him] peace

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُؤۡذُوۡنَ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ لَعَنَهُمُ اللّٰهُ فِي الدُّنۡيَا وَالۡاٰخِرَةِ وَاَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا مُّهِيۡنًا
quran.english: Indeed, those who abuse Allah and His Messenger - Allah has cursed them in this world and the Hereafter and prepared for them a humiliating punishment

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يُؤۡذُوۡنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ بِغَيۡرِ مَا اكۡتَسَبُوۡا فَقَدِ احۡتَمَلُوۡا بُهۡتَانًا وَّاِثۡمًا مُّبِيۡنًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And those who harm believing men and believing women for [something] other than what they have earned have certainly born upon themselves a slander and manifest sin

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ قُلۡ لِّاَزۡوَاجِكَ وَبَنٰتِكَ وَنِسَآءِ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ يُدۡنِيۡنَ عَلَيۡهِنَّ مِنۡ جَلَابِيۡبِهِنَّؕ ذٰلِكَ اَدۡنٰ٘ي اَنۡ يُّعۡرَفۡنَ فَلَا يُؤۡذَيۡنَؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرًا رَّحِيۡمًا
quran.english: O Prophet, tell your wives and your daughters and the women of the believers to bring down over themselves [part] of their outer garments. That is more suitable that they will be known and not be abused. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: لَئِنۡ لَّمۡ يَنۡتَهِ الۡمُنٰفِقُوۡنَ وَالَّذِيۡنَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّرَضٌ وَّالۡمُرۡجِفُوۡنَ فِي الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ لَنُغۡرِيَنَّكَ بِهِمۡ ثُمَّ لَا يُجَاوِرُوۡنَكَ فِيۡهَا٘ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًاۚۛ‏
quran.english: If the hypocrites and those in whose hearts is disease and those who spread rumors in al-Madinah do not cease, We will surely incite you against them; then they will not remain your neighbors therein except for a little

quran.arabic: مَّلۡعُوۡنِيۡنَۚۛ اَيۡنَمَا ثُقِفُوۡ٘ا اُخِذُوۡا وَقُتِّلُوۡا تَقۡتِيۡلًا
quran.english: Accursed wherever they are found, [being] seized and massacred completely

quran.arabic: سُنَّةَ اللّٰهِ فِي الَّذِيۡنَ خَلَوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلُۚ وَلَنۡ تَجِدَ لِسُنَّةِ اللّٰهِ تَبۡدِيۡلًا
quran.english: [This is] the established way of Allah with those who passed on before; and you will not find in the way of Allah any change

quran.arabic: يَسۡـَٔلُكَ النَّاسُ عَنِ السَّاعَةِؕ قُلۡ اِنَّمَا عِلۡمُهَا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِؕ وَمَا يُدۡرِيۡكَ لَعَلَّ السَّاعَةَ تَكُوۡنُ قَرِيۡبًا
quran.english: People ask you concerning the Hour. Say," Knowledge of it is only with Allah. And what may make you perceive? Perhaps the Hour is near

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَعَنَ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ وَاَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ سَعِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Allah has cursed the disbelievers and prepared for them a Blaze

quran.arabic: خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا٘ اَبَدًاۚ لَا يَجِدُوۡنَ وَلِيًّا وَّلَا نَصِيۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: Abiding therein forever, they will not find a protector or a helper

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تُقَلَّبُ وُجُوۡهُهُمۡ فِي النَّارِ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ يٰلَيۡتَنَا٘ اَطَعۡنَا اللّٰهَ وَاَطَعۡنَا الرَّسُوۡلَا
quran.english: The Day their faces will be turned about in the Fire, they will say, "How we wish we had obeyed Allah and obeyed the Messenger

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا٘ اِنَّا٘ اَطَعۡنَا سَادَتَنَا وَكُبَرَآءَنَا فَاَضَلُّوۡنَا السَّبِيۡلَا
quran.english: And they will say, "Our Lord, indeed we obeyed our masters and our dignitaries, and they led us astray from the [right] way

quran.arabic: رَبَّنَا٘ اٰتِهِمۡ ضِعۡفَيۡنِ مِنَ الۡعَذَابِ وَالۡعَنۡهُمۡ لَعۡنًا كَبِيۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Our Lord, give them double the punishment and curse them with a great curse

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تَكُوۡنُوۡا كَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰذَوۡا مُوۡسٰي فَبَرَّاَهُ اللّٰهُ مِمَّا قَالُوۡاؕ وَكَانَ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ وَجِيۡهًا
quran.english: O you who have believed, be not like those who abused Moses; then Allah cleared him of what they said. And he, in the sight of Allah, was distinguished

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَقُوۡلُوۡا قَوۡلًا سَدِيۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, fear Allah and speak words of appropriate justice

quran.arabic: يُّصۡلِحۡ لَكُمۡ اَعۡمَالَكُمۡ وَيَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡ ذُنُوۡبَكُمۡؕ وَمَنۡ يُّطِعِ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ فَقَدۡ فَازَ فَوۡزًا عَظِيۡمًا
quran.english: He will [then] amend for you your deeds and forgive you your sins. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger has certainly attained a great attainment

quran.arabic: اِنَّا عَرَضۡنَا الۡاَمَانَةَ عَلَي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَالۡجِبَالِ فَاَبَيۡنَ اَنۡ يَّحۡمِلۡنَهَا وَاَشۡفَقۡنَ مِنۡهَا وَحَمَلَهَا الۡاِنۡسَانُؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ ظَلُوۡمًا جَهُوۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, we offered the Trust to the heavens and the earth and the mountains, and they declined to bear it and feared it; but man [undertook to] bear it. Indeed, he was unjust and ignorant

quran.arabic: لِّيُعَذِّبَ اللّٰهُ الۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ وَالۡمُنٰفِقٰتِ وَالۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَ وَالۡمُشۡرِكٰتِ وَيَتُوۡبَ اللّٰهُ عَلَي الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرًا رَّحِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: [It was] so that Allah may punish the hypocrite men and hypocrite women and the men and women who associate others with Him and that Allah may accept repentance from the believing men and believing women. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ لَهٗ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَهُ الۡحَمۡدُ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِؕ وَهُوَ الۡحَكِيۡمُ الۡخَبِيۡرُ
quran.english: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, and to Him belongs [all] praise in the Hereafter. And He is the Wise, the Acquainted

quran.arabic: يَعۡلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهَا وَمَا يَنۡزِلُ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعۡرُجُ فِيۡهَاؕ وَهُوَ الرَّحِيۡمُ الۡغَفُوۡرُ
quran.english: He knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein. And He is the Merciful, the Forgiving

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَا تَاۡتِيۡنَا السَّاعَةُؕ قُلۡ بَلٰي وَرَبِّيۡ لَتَاۡتِيَنَّكُمۡۙ عٰلِمِ الۡغَيۡبِۚ لَا يَعۡزُبُ عَنۡهُ مِثۡقَالُ ذَرَّةٍ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَلَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَا٘ اَصۡغَرُ مِنۡ ذٰلِكَ وَلَا٘ اَكۡبَرُ اِلَّا فِيۡ كِتٰبٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: But those who disbelieve say, "The Hour will not come to us." Say, "Yes, by my Lord, it will surely come to you. [Allah is] the Knower of the unseen." Not absent from Him is an atom's weight within the heavens or within the earth or [what is] smaller than that or greater, except that it is in a clear register

quran.arabic: لِّيَجۡزِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ مَّغۡفِرَةٌ وَّرِزۡقٌ كَرِيۡمٌ
quran.english: That He may reward those who believe and do righteous deeds. Those will have forgiveness and noble provision

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ سَعَوۡ فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِنَا مُعٰجِزِيۡنَ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ مِّنۡ رِّجۡزٍ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: But those who strive against Our verses [seeking] to cause failure - for them will be a painful punishment of foul nature

quran.arabic: وَيَرَي الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اُنۡزِلَ اِلَيۡكَ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ هُوَ الۡحَقَّۙ وَيَهۡدِيۡ٘ اِلٰي صِرَاطِ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡحَمِيۡدِ
quran.english: And those who have been given knowledge see that what is revealed to you from your Lord is the truth, and it guides to the path of the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا هَلۡ نَدُلُّكُمۡ عَلٰي رَجُلٍ يُّنَبِّئُكُمۡ اِذَا مُزِّقۡتُمۡ كُلَّ مُمَزَّقٍۙ اِنَّكُمۡ لَفِيۡ خَلۡقٍ جَدِيۡدٍۚ‏
quran.english: But those who disbelieve say, "Shall we direct you to a man who will inform you [that] when you have disintegrated in complete disintegration, you will [then] be [recreated] in a new creation

quran.arabic: اَفۡتَرٰي عَلَي اللّٰهِ كَذِبًا اَمۡ بِهٖ جِنَّةٌؕ بَلِ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ فِي الۡعَذَابِ وَالضَّلٰلِ الۡبَعِيۡدِ
quran.english: Has he invented about Allah a lie or is there in him madness?" Rather, they who do not believe in the Hereafter will be in the punishment and [are in] extreme error

quran.arabic: اَفَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اِلٰي مَا بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ اِنۡ نَّشَاۡ نَخۡسِفۡ بِهِمُ الۡاَرۡضَ اَوۡ نُسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ كِسَفًا مِّنَ السَّمَآءِؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيَةً لِّكُلِّ عَبۡدٍ مُّنِيۡبٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Then, do they not look at what is before them and what is behind them of the heaven and earth? If We should will, We could cause the earth to swallow them or [could] let fall upon them fragments from the sky. Indeed in that is a sign for every servant turning back [to Allah]

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا دَاوٗدَ مِنَّا فَضۡلًاؕ يٰجِبَالُ اَوِّبِيۡ مَعَهٗ وَالطَّيۡرَۚ وَاَلَنَّا لَهُ الۡحَدِيۡدَۙ‏
quran.english: And We certainly gave David from Us bounty. [We said], "O mountains, repeat [Our] praises with him, and the birds [as well]." And We made pliable for him iron

quran.arabic: اَنِ اعۡمَلۡ سٰبِغٰتٍ وَّقَدِّرۡ فِي السَّرۡدِ وَاعۡمَلُوۡا صَالِحًاؕ اِنِّيۡ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: [Commanding him], "Make full coats of mail and calculate [precisely] the links, and work [all of you] righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Seeing

quran.arabic: وَلِسُلَيۡمٰنَ الرِّيۡحَ غُدُوُّهَا شَهۡرٌ وَّرَوَاحُهَا شَهۡرٌۚ وَاَسَلۡنَا لَهٗ عَيۡنَ الۡقِطۡرِؕ وَمِنَ الۡجِنِّ مَنۡ يَّعۡمَلُ بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِ بِاِذۡنِ رَبِّهٖؕ وَمَنۡ يَّزِغۡ مِنۡهُمۡ عَنۡ اَمۡرِنَا نُذِقۡهُ مِنۡ عَذَابِ السَّعِيۡرِ
quran.english: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind - its morning [journey was that of] a month - and its afternoon [journey was that of] a month, and We made flow for him a spring of [liquid] copper. And among the jinn were those who worked for him by the permission of his Lord. And whoever deviated among them from Our command - We will make him taste of the punishment of the Blaze

quran.arabic: يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ لَهٗ مَا يَشَآءُ مِنۡ مَّحَارِيۡبَ وَتَمَاثِيۡلَ وَجِفَانٍ كَالۡجَوَابِ وَقُدُوۡرٍ رّٰسِيٰتٍؕ اِعۡمَلُوۡ٘ا اٰلَ دَاوٗدَ شُكۡرًاؕ وَقَلِيۡلٌ مِّنۡ عِبَادِيَ الشَّكُوۡرُ
quran.english: They made for him what he willed of elevated chambers, statues, bowls like reservoirs, and stationary kettles. [We said], "Work, O family of David, in gratitude." And few of My servants are grateful

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا قَضَيۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ الۡمَوۡتَ مَا دَلَّهُمۡ عَلٰي مَوۡتِهٖ٘ اِلَّا دَآبَّةُ الۡاَرۡضِ تَاۡكُلُ مِنۡسَاَتَهٗۚ فَلَمَّا خَرَّ تَبَيَّنَتِ الۡجِنُّ اَنۡ لَّوۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ الۡغَيۡبَ مَا لَبِثُوۡا فِي الۡعَذَابِ الۡمُهِيۡنِ
quran.english: And when We decreed for Solomon death, nothing indicated to the jinn his death except a creature of the earth eating his staff. But when he fell, it became clear to the jinn that if they had known the unseen, they would not have remained in humiliating punishment

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ كَانَ لِسَبَاٍ فِيۡ مَسۡكَنِهِمۡ اٰيَةٌۚ جَنَّتٰنِ عَنۡ يَّمِيۡنٍ وَّشِمَالٍ ࣢ؕ كُلُوۡا مِنۡ رِّزۡقِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَاشۡكُرُوۡا لَهٗؕ بَلۡدَةٌ طَيِّبَةٌ وَّرَبٌّ غَفُوۡرٌ
quran.english: There was for [the tribe of] Saba' in their dwelling place a sign: two [fields of] gardens on the right and on the left. [They were told], "Eat from the provisions of your Lord and be grateful to Him. A good land [have you], and a forgiving Lord

quran.arabic: فَاَعۡرَضُوۡا فَاَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ سَيۡلَ الۡعَرِمِ وَبَدَّلۡنٰهُمۡ بِجَنَّتَيۡهِمۡ جَنَّتَيۡنِ ذَوَاتَيۡ اُكُلٍ خَمۡطٍ وَّاَثۡلٍ وَّشَيۡءٍ مِّنۡ سِدۡرٍ قَلِيۡلٍ
quran.english: But they turned away [refusing], so We sent upon them the flood of the dam, and We replaced their two [fields of] gardens with gardens of bitter fruit, tamarisks and something of sparse lote trees

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ جَزَيۡنٰهُمۡ بِمَا كَفَرُوۡاؕ وَهَلۡ نُجٰزِيۡ٘ اِلَّا الۡكَفُوۡرَ
quran.english: [By] that We repaid them because they disbelieved. And do We [thus] repay except the ungrateful

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا بَيۡنَهُمۡ وَبَيۡنَ الۡقُرَي الَّتِيۡ بٰرَكۡنَا فِيۡهَا قُرًي ظَاهِرَةً وَّقَدَّرۡنَا فِيۡهَا السَّيۡرَؕ سِيۡرُوۡا فِيۡهَا لَيَالِيَ وَاَيَّامًا اٰمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We placed between them and the cities which We had blessed [many] visible cities. And We determined between them the [distances of] journey, [saying], "Travel between them by night or day in safety

quran.arabic: فَقَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا بٰعِدۡ بَيۡنَ اَسۡفَارِنَا وَظَلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ فَجَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ اَحَادِيۡثَ وَمَزَّقۡنٰهُمۡ كُلَّ مُمَزَّقٍؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٍ شَكُوۡرٍ
quran.english: But [insolently] they said, "Our Lord, lengthen the distance between our journeys," and wronged themselves, so We made them narrations and dispersed them in total dispersion. Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ صَدَّقَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ اِبۡلِيۡسُ ظَنَّهٗ فَاتَّبَعُوۡهُ اِلَّا فَرِيۡقًا مِّنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And Iblees had already confirmed through them his assumption, so they followed him, except for a party of believers

quran.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لَهٗ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ سُلۡطٰنٍ اِلَّا لِنَعۡلَمَ مَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنُ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ مِمَّنۡ هُوَ مِنۡهَا فِيۡ شَكٍّؕ وَرَبُّكَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ حَفِيۡظٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And he had over them no authority except [it was decreed] that We might make evident who believes in the Hereafter from who is thereof in doubt. And your Lord, over all things, is Guardian

quran.arabic: قُلِ ادۡعُوا الَّذِيۡنَ زَعَمۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِۚ لَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَلَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا لَهُمۡ فِيۡهِمَا مِنۡ شِرۡكٍ وَّمَا لَهٗ مِنۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ ظَهِيۡرٍ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Invoke those you claim [as deities] besides Allah." They do not possess an atom's weight [of ability] in the heavens or on the earth, and they do not have therein any partnership [with Him], nor is there for Him from among them any assistant

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَنۡفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ عِنۡدَهٗ٘ اِلَّا لِمَنۡ اَذِنَ لَهٗؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا فُزِّعَ عَنۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ قَالُوۡا مَاذَاۙ قَالَ رَبُّكُمۡؕ قَالُوا الۡحَقَّۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَلِيُّ الۡكَبِيۡرُ
quran.english: And intercession does not benefit with Him except for one whom He permits. [And those wait] until, when terror is removed from their hearts, they will say [to one another], "What has your Lord said?" They will say, "The truth." And He is the Most High, the Grand

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَنۡ يَّرۡزُقُكُمۡ مِّنَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ قُلِ اللّٰهُۙ وَاِنَّا٘ اَوۡ اِيَّاكُمۡ لَعَلٰي هُدًي اَوۡ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: Say, "Who provides for you from the heavens and the earth?" Say, "Allah. And indeed, we or you are either upon guidance or in clear error

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّا تُسۡـَٔلُوۡنَ عَمَّا٘ اَجۡرَمۡنَا وَلَا نُسۡـَٔلُ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "You will not be asked about what we committed, and we will not be asked about what you do

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يَجۡمَعُ بَيۡنَنَا رَبُّنَا ثُمَّ يَفۡتَحُ بَيۡنَنَا بِالۡحَقِّؕ وَهُوَ الۡفَتَّاحُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: Say, "Our Lord will bring us together; then He will judge between us in truth. And He is the Knowing Judge

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرُوۡنِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَلۡحَقۡتُمۡ بِهٖ شُرَكَآءَ كَلَّاؕ بَلۡ هُوَ اللّٰهُ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Say, "Show me those whom you have attached to Him as partners. No! Rather, He [alone] is Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ اِلَّا كَآفَّةً لِّلنَّاسِ بَشِيۡرًا وَّنَذِيۡرًا وَّلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have not sent you except comprehensively to mankind as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. But most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَتٰي هٰذَا الۡوَعۡدُ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لَّكُمۡ مِّيۡعَادُ يَوۡمٍ لَّا تَسۡتَاۡخِرُوۡنَ عَنۡهُ سَاعَةً وَّلَا تَسۡتَقۡدِمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "For you is the appointment of a Day [when] you will not remain thereafter an hour, nor will you precede [it]

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَنۡ نُّؤۡمِنَ بِهٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنِ وَلَا بِالَّذِيۡ بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِؕ وَلَوۡ تَرٰ٘ي اِذِ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ مَوۡقُوۡفُوۡنَ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡۚۖ يَرۡجِعُ بَعۡضُهُمۡ اِلٰي بَعۡضِ اِۨلۡقَوۡلَۚ يَقُوۡلُ الَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتُضۡعِفُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡا لَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ لَكُنَّا مُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And those who disbelieve say, "We will never believe in this Qur'an nor in that before it." But if you could see when the wrongdoers are made to stand before their Lord, refuting each other's words... Those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant, "If not for you, we would have been believers

quran.arabic: قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتُضۡعِفُوۡ٘ا اَنَحۡنُ صَدَدۡنٰكُمۡ عَنِ الۡهُدٰي بَعۡدَ اِذۡ جَآءَكُمۡ بَلۡ كُنۡتُمۡ مُّجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Those who were arrogant will say to those who were oppressed, "Did we avert you from guidance after it had come to you? Rather, you were criminals

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتُضۡعِفُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡا بَلۡ مَكۡرُ الَّيۡلِ وَالنَّهَارِ اِذۡ تَاۡمُرُوۡنَنَا٘ اَنۡ نَّكۡفُرَ بِاللّٰهِ وَنَجۡعَلَ لَهٗ٘ اَنۡدَادًاؕ وَاَسَرُّوا النَّدَامَةَ لَمَّا رَاَوُا الۡعَذَابَؕ وَجَعَلۡنَا الۡاَغۡلٰلَ فِيۡ٘ اَعۡنَاقِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡاؕ هَلۡ يُجۡزَوۡنَ اِلَّا مَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant, "Rather, [it was your] conspiracy of night and day when you were ordering us to disbelieve in Allah and attribute to Him equals." But they will [all] confide regret when they see the punishment; and We will put shackles on the necks of those who disbelieved. Will they be recompensed except for what they used to do

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا فِيۡ قَرۡيَةٍ مِّنۡ نَّذِيۡرٍ اِلَّا قَالَ مُتۡرَفُوۡهَا٘ اِنَّا بِمَا٘ اُرۡسِلۡتُمۡ بِهٖ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We did not send into a city any warner except that its affluent said, "Indeed we, in that with which you were sent, are disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا نَحۡنُ اَكۡثَرُ اَمۡوَالًا وَّاَوۡلَادًاۙ وَّمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they said, "We are more [than the believers] in wealth and children, and we are not to be punished

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَقۡدِرُ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it], but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَمۡوَالُكُمۡ وَلَا٘ اَوۡلَادُكُمۡ بِالَّتِيۡ تُقَرِّبُكُمۡ عِنۡدَنَا زُلۡفٰ٘ي اِلَّا مَنۡ اٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًاؗ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ جَزَآءُ الضِّعۡفِ بِمَا عَمِلُوۡا وَهُمۡ فِي الۡغُرُفٰتِ اٰمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it is not your wealth or your children that bring you nearer to Us in position, but it is [by being] one who has believed and done righteousness. For them there will be the double reward for what they did, and they will be in the upper chambers [of Paradise], safe [and secure]

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَسۡعَوۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِنَا مُعٰجِزِيۡنَ اُولٰٓئِكَ فِي الۡعَذَابِ مُحۡضَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the ones who strive against Our verses to cause [them] failure - those will be brought into the punishment [to remain]

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهٖ وَيَقۡدِرُ لَهٗؕ وَمَا٘ اَنۡفَقۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍ فَهُوَ يُخۡلِفُهٗۚ وَهُوَ خَيۡرُ الرّٰزِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills of His servants and restricts [it] for him. But whatever thing you spend [in His cause] - He will compensate it; and He is the best of providers

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يَحۡشُرُهُمۡ جَمِيۡعًا ثُمَّ يَقُوۡلُ لِلۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ اَهٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ اِيَّاكُمۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention] the Day when He will gather them all and then say to the angels, "Did these [people] used to worship you

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا سُبۡحٰنَكَ اَنۡتَ وَلِيُّنَا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهِمۡۚ بَلۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَ الۡجِنَّۚ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ بِهِمۡ مُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: They will say, "Exalted are You! You, [O Allah], are our benefactor not them. Rather, they used to worship the jinn; most of them were believers in them

quran.arabic: فَالۡيَوۡمَ لَا يَمۡلِكُ بَعۡضُكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ نَّفۡعًا وَّلَا ضَرًّاؕ وَنَقُوۡلُ لِلَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا ذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابَ النَّارِ الَّتِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهَا تُكَذِّبُوۡنَ
quran.english: But today you do not hold for one another [the power of] benefit or harm, and We will say to those who wronged, "Taste the punishment of the Fire, which you used to deny

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتُنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ قَالُوۡا مَا هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا رَجُلٌ يُّرِيۡدُ اَنۡ يَّصُدَّكُمۡ عَمَّا كَانَ يَعۡبُدُ اٰبَآؤُكُمۡۚ وَقَالُوۡا مَا هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا٘ اِفۡكٌ مُّفۡتَرًيؕ وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لِلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡۙ اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا سِحۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And when our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, they say, "This is not but a man who wishes to avert you from that which your fathers were worshipping." And they say, "This is not except a lie invented." And those who disbelieve say of the truth when it has come to them, "This is not but obvious magic

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡ مِّنۡ كُتُبٍ يَّدۡرُسُوۡنَهَا وَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِمۡ قَبۡلَكَ مِنۡ نَّذِيۡرٍؕ‏
quran.english: And We had not given them any scriptures which they could study, and We had not sent to them before you, [O Muhammad], any warner

quran.arabic: وَكَذَّبَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡۙ وَمَا بَلَغُوۡا مِعۡشَارَ مَا٘ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡ فَكَذَّبُوۡا رُسُلِيۡࣞ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيۡرِࣖ‏
quran.english: And those before them denied, and the people of Makkah have not attained a tenth of what We had given them. But the former peoples denied My messengers, so how [terrible] was My reproach

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّمَا٘ اَعِظُكُمۡ بِوَاحِدَةٍۚ اَنۡ تَقُوۡمُوۡا لِلّٰهِ مَثۡنٰي وَفُرَادٰي ثُمَّ تَتَفَكَّرُوۡاࣞ مَا بِصَاحِبِكُمۡ مِّنۡ جِنَّةٍؕ اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا نَذِيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡ بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ عَذَابٍ شَدِيۡدٍ
quran.english: Say, "I only advise you of one [thing] - that you stand for Allah, [seeking truth] in pairs and individually, and then give thought." There is not in your companion any madness. He is only a warner to you before a severe punishment

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَا سَاَلۡتُكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَجۡرٍ فَهُوَ لَكُمۡؕ اِنۡ اَجۡرِيَ اِلَّا عَلَي اللّٰهِۚ وَهُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ شَهِيۡدٌ
quran.english: Say, "Whatever payment I might have asked of you - it is yours. My payment is only from Allah, and He is, over all things, Witness

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّ رَبِّيۡ يَقۡذِفُ بِالۡحَقِّۚ عَلَّامُ الۡغُيُوۡبِ
quran.english: Say, "Indeed, my Lord projects the truth. Knower of the unseen

quran.arabic: قُلۡ جَآءَ الۡحَقُّ وَمَا يُبۡدِئُ الۡبَاطِلُ وَمَا يُعِيۡدُ
quran.english: Say, "The truth has come, and falsehood can neither begin [anything] nor repeat [it]

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنۡ ضَلَلۡتُ فَاِنَّمَا٘ اَضِلُّ عَلٰي نَفۡسِيۡۚ وَاِنِ اهۡتَدَيۡتُ فَبِمَا يُوۡحِيۡ٘ اِلَيَّ رَبِّيۡؕ اِنَّهٗ سَمِيۡعٌ قَرِيۡبٌ
quran.english: Say, "If I should err, I would only err against myself. But if I am guided, it is by what my Lord reveals to me. Indeed, He is Hearing and near

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ تَرٰ٘ي اِذۡ فَزِعُوۡا فَلَا فَوۡتَ وَاُخِذُوۡا مِنۡ مَّكَانٍ قَرِيۡبٍۙ‏
quran.english: And if you could see when they are terrified but there is no escape, and they will be seized from a place nearby

quran.arabic: وَّقَالُوۡ٘ا اٰمَنَّا بِهٖۚ وَاَنّٰي لَهُمُ التَّنَاوُشُ مِنۡ مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍۚ‏
quran.english: And they will [then] say, "We believe in it!" But how for them will be the taking [of faith] from a place far away

quran.arabic: وَقَدۡ كَفَرُوۡا بِهٖ مِنۡ قَبۡلُۚ وَيَقۡذِفُوۡنَ بِالۡغَيۡبِ مِنۡ مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍ
quran.english: And they had already disbelieved in it before and would assault the unseen from a place far away

quran.arabic: وَحِيۡلَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ وَبَيۡنَ مَا يَشۡتَهُوۡنَ كَمَا فُعِلَ بِاَشۡيَاعِهِمۡ مِّنۡ قَبۡلُؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا فِيۡ شَكٍّ مُّرِيۡبٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And prevention will be placed between them and what they desire, as was done with their kind before. Indeed, they were in disquieting denial

quran.arabic: اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ فَاطِرِ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ جَاعِلِ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا اُولِيۡ٘ اَجۡنِحَةٍ مَّثۡنٰي وَثُلٰثَ وَرُبٰعَؕ يَزِيۡدُ فِي الۡخَلۡقِ مَا يَشَآءُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, [who] made the angels messengers having wings, two or three or four. He increases in creation what He wills. Indeed, Allah is over all things competent

quran.arabic: مَا يَفۡتَحِ اللّٰهُ لِلنَّاسِ مِنۡ رَّحۡمَةٍ فَلَا مُمۡسِكَ لَهَاۚ وَمَا يُمۡسِكۡۙ فَلَا مُرۡسِلَ لَهٗ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Whatever Allah grants to people of mercy - none can withhold it; and whatever He withholds - none can release it thereafter. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اذۡكُرُوۡا نِعۡمَتَ اللّٰهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡؕ هَلۡ مِنۡ خَالِقٍ غَيۡرُ اللّٰهِ يَرۡزُقُكُمۡ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَؗ فَاَنّٰي تُؤۡفَكُوۡنَ
quran.english: O mankind, remember the favor of Allah upon you. Is there any creator other than Allah who provides for you from the heaven and earth? There is no deity except Him, so how are you deluded

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ يُّكَذِّبُوۡكَ فَقَدۡ كُذِّبَتۡ رُسُلٌ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَؕ وَاِلَي اللّٰهِ تُرۡجَعُ الۡاُمُوۡرُ
quran.english: And if they deny you, [O Muhammad] - already were messengers denied before you. And to Allah are returned [all] matters

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اِنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّ فَلَا تَغُرَّنَّكُمُ الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَاࣟ وَلَا يَغُرَّنَّكُمۡ بِاللّٰهِ الۡغَرُوۡرُ
quran.english: O mankind, indeed the promise of Allah is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allah by the Deceiver

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الشَّيۡطٰنَ لَكُمۡ عَدُوٌّ فَاتَّخِذُوۡهُ عَدُوًّاؕ اِنَّمَا يَدۡعُوۡا حِزۡبَهٗ لِيَكُوۡنُوۡا مِنۡ اَصۡحٰبِ السَّعِيۡرِؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Satan is an enemy to you; so take him as an enemy. He only invites his party to be among the companions of the Blaze

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ شَدِيۡدٌ ࣢ؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَهُمۡ مَّغۡفِرَةٌ وَّاَجۡرٌ كَبِيۡرٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Those who disbelieve will have a severe punishment, and those who believe and do righteous deeds will have forgiveness and great reward

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ زُيِّنَ لَهٗ سُوۡٓءُ عَمَلِهٖ فَرَاٰهُ حَسَنًاؕ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُضِلُّ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؗۖ فَلَا تَذۡهَبۡ نَفۡسُكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَسَرٰتٍؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِمَا يَصۡنَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then is one to whom the evil of his deed has been made attractive so he considers it good [like one rightly guided]? For indeed, Allah sends astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. So do not let yourself perish over them in regret. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of what they do

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَرۡسَلَ الرِّيٰحَ فَتُثِيۡرُ سَحَابًا فَسُقۡنٰهُ اِلٰي بَلَدٍ مَّيِّتٍ فَاَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِ الۡاَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاؕ كَذٰلِكَ النُّشُوۡرُ
quran.english: And it is Allah who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds, and We drive them to a dead land and give life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness. Thus is the resurrection

quran.arabic: مَنۡ كَانَ يُرِيۡدُ الۡعِزَّةَ فَلِلّٰهِ الۡعِزَّةُ جَمِيۡعًاؕ اِلَيۡهِ يَصۡعَدُ الۡكَلِمُ الطَّيِّبُ وَالۡعَمَلُ الصَّالِحُ يَرۡفَعُهٗؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَمۡكُرُوۡنَ السَّيِّاٰتِ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ شَدِيۡدٌؕ وَمَكۡرُ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُوَ يَبُوۡرُ
quran.english: Whoever desires honor [through power] - then to Allah belongs all honor. To Him ascends good speech, and righteous work raises it. But they who plot evil deeds will have a severe punishment, and the plotting of those - it will perish

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ خَلَقَكُمۡ مِّنۡ تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَكُمۡ اَزۡوَاجًاؕ وَمَا تَحۡمِلُ مِنۡ اُنۡثٰي وَلَا تَضَعُ اِلَّا بِعِلۡمِهٖؕ وَمَا يُعَمَّرُ مِنۡ مُّعَمَّرٍ وَّلَا يُنۡقَصُ مِنۡ عُمُرِهٖ٘ اِلَّا فِيۡ كِتٰبٍؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ يَسِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And Allah created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop; then He made you mates. And no female conceives nor does she give birth except with His knowledge. And no aged person is granted [additional] life nor is his lifespan lessened but that it is in a register. Indeed, that for Allah is easy

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي الۡبَحۡرٰنِࣗۖ هٰذَا عَذۡبٌ فُرَاتٌ سَآئِغٌ شَرَابُهٗ وَهٰذَا مِلۡحٌ اُجَاجٌؕ وَمِنۡ كُلٍّ تَاۡكُلُوۡنَ لَحۡمًا طَرِيًّا وَّتَسۡتَخۡرِجُوۡنَ حِلۡيَةً تَلۡبَسُوۡنَهَاۚ وَتَرَي الۡفُلۡكَ فِيۡهِ مَوَاخِرَ لِتَبۡتَغُوۡا مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖ وَلَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And not alike are the two bodies of water. One is fresh and sweet, palatable for drinking, and one is salty and bitter. And from each you eat tender meat and extract ornaments which you wear, and you see the ships plowing through [them] that you might seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful

quran.arabic: يُوۡلِجُ الَّيۡلَ فِي النَّهَارِ وَيُوۡلِجُ النَّهَارَ فِي الَّيۡلِۙ وَسَخَّرَ الشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَؗۖ كُلٌّ يَّجۡرِيۡ لِاَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيؕ ذٰلِكُمُ اللّٰهُ رَبُّكُمۡ لَهُ الۡمُلۡكُؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ تَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ مِنۡ قِطۡمِيۡرٍؕ‏
quran.english: He causes the night to enter the day, and He causes the day to enter the night and has subjected the sun and the moon - each running [its course] for a specified term. That is Allah, your Lord; to Him belongs sovereignty. And those whom you invoke other than Him do not possess [as much as] the membrane of a date seed

quran.arabic: اِنۡ تَدۡعُوۡهُمۡ لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡا دُعَآءَكُمۡۚ وَلَوۡ سَمِعُوۡا مَا اسۡتَجَابُوۡا لَكُمۡؕ وَيَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ يَكۡفُرُوۡنَ بِشِرۡكِكُمۡؕ وَلَا يُنَبِّئُكَ مِثۡلُ خَبِيۡرٍࣖ‏
quran.english: If you invoke them, they do not hear your supplication; and if they heard, they would not respond to you. And on the Day of Resurrection they will deny your association. And none can inform you like [one] Acquainted [with all matters]

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اَنۡتُمُ الۡفُقَرَآءُ اِلَي اللّٰهِۚ وَاللّٰهُ هُوَ الۡغَنِيُّ الۡحَمِيۡدُ
quran.english: O mankind, you are those in need of Allah, while Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: اِنۡ يَّشَاۡ يُذۡهِبۡكُمۡ وَيَاۡتِ بِخَلۡقٍ جَدِيۡدٍۚ‏
quran.english: If He wills, He can do away with you and bring forth a new creation

quran.arabic: وَمَا ذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ بِعَزِيۡزٍ
quran.english: And that is for Allah not difficult

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِّزۡرَ اُخۡرٰيؕ وَاِنۡ تَدۡعُ مُثۡقَلَةٌ اِلٰي حِمۡلِهَا لَا يُحۡمَلۡ مِنۡهُ شَيۡءٌ وَّلَوۡ كَانَ ذَا قُرۡبٰيؕ اِنَّمَا تُنۡذِرُ الَّذِيۡنَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡ بِالۡغَيۡبِ وَاَقَامُوا الصَّلٰوةَؕ وَمَنۡ تَزَكّٰي فَاِنَّمَا يَتَزَكّٰي لِنَفۡسِهٖؕ وَاِلَي اللّٰهِ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: And no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. And if a heavily laden soul calls [another] to [carry some of] its load, nothing of it will be carried, even if he should be a close relative. You can only warn those who fear their Lord unseen and have established prayer. And whoever purifies himself only purifies himself for [the benefit of] his soul. And to Allah is the [final] destination

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي الۡاَعۡمٰي وَالۡبَصِيۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: Not equal are the blind and the seeing

quran.arabic: وَلَا الظُّلُمٰتُ وَلَا النُّوۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: Nor are the darknesses and the light

quran.arabic: وَلَا الظِّلُّ وَلَا الۡحَرُوۡرُۚ‏
quran.english: Nor are the shade and the heat

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي الۡاَحۡيَآءُ وَلَا الۡاَمۡوَاتُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُسۡمِعُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُۚ وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ بِمُسۡمِعٍ مَّنۡ فِي الۡقُبُوۡرِ
quran.english: And not equal are the living and the dead. Indeed, Allah causes to hear whom He wills, but you cannot make hear those in the graves

quran.arabic: اِنۡ اَنۡتَ اِلَّا نَذِيۡرٌ
quran.english: You, [O Muhammad], are not but a warner

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ بِالۡحَقِّ بَشِيۡرًا وَّنَذِيۡرًاؕ وَاِنۡ مِّنۡ اُمَّةٍ اِلَّا خَلَا فِيۡهَا نَذِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Indeed, We have sent you with the truth as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. And there was no nation but that there had passed within it a warner

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ يُّكَذِّبُوۡكَ فَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡۚ جَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ وَبِالزُّبُرِ وَبِالۡكِتٰبِ الۡمُنِيۡرِ
quran.english: And if they deny you - then already have those before them denied. Their messengers came to them with clear proofs and written ordinances and with the enlightening Scripture

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَخَذۡتُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيۡرِࣖ‏
quran.english: Then I seized the ones who disbelieved, and how [terrible] was My reproach

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ اَنۡزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءًۚ فَاَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهٖ ثَمَرٰتٍ مُّخۡتَلِفًا اَلۡوَانُهَاؕ وَمِنَ الۡجِبَالِ جُدَدٌۭ بِيۡضٌ وَّحُمۡرٌ مُّخۡتَلِفٌ اَلۡوَانُهَا وَغَرَابِيۡبُ سُوۡدٌ
quran.english: Do you not see that Allah sends down rain from the sky, and We produce thereby fruits of varying colors? And in the mountains are tracts, white and red of varying shades and [some] extremely black

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ النَّاسِ وَالدَّوَآبِّ وَالۡاَنۡعَامِ مُخۡتَلِفٌ اَلۡوَانُهٗ كَذٰلِكَؕ اِنَّمَا يَخۡشَي اللّٰهَ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِ الۡعُلَمٰٓؤُاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَزِيۡزٌ غَفُوۡرٌ
quran.english: And among people and moving creatures and grazing livestock are various colors similarly. Only those fear Allah, from among His servants, who have knowledge. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Forgiving

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يَتۡلُوۡنَ كِتٰبَ اللّٰهِ وَاَقَامُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاَنۡفَقُوۡا مِمَّا رَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ سِرًّا وَّعَلَانِيَةً يَّرۡجُوۡنَ تِجَارَةً لَّنۡ تَبُوۡرَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who recite the Book of Allah and establish prayer and spend [in His cause] out of what We have provided them, secretly and publicly, [can] expect a profit that will never perish

quran.arabic: لِيُوَفِّيَهُمۡ اُجُوۡرَهُمۡ وَيَزِيۡدَهُمۡ مِّنۡ فَضۡلِهٖؕ اِنَّهٗ غَفُوۡرٌ شَكُوۡرٌ
quran.english: That He may give them in full their rewards and increase for them of His bounty. Indeed, He is Forgiving and Appreciative

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ٘ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ مِنَ الۡكِتٰبِ هُوَ الۡحَقُّ مُصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ بِعِبَادِهٖ لَخَبِيۡرٌۭ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And that which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], of the Book is the truth, confirming what was before it. Indeed, Allah, of His servants, is Acquainted and Seeing

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَوۡرَثۡنَا الۡكِتٰبَ الَّذِيۡنَ اصۡطَفَيۡنَا مِنۡ عِبَادِنَاۚ فَمِنۡهُمۡ ظَالِمٌ لِّنَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مُّقۡتَصِدٌۚ وَمِنۡهُمۡ سَابِقٌۭ بِالۡخَيۡرٰتِ بِاِذۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الۡفَضۡلُ الۡكَبِيۡرُؕ‏
quran.english: Then we caused to inherit the Book those We have chosen of Our servants; and among them is he who wrongs himself, and among them is he who is moderate, and among them is he who is foremost in good deeds by permission of Allah. That [inheritance] is what is the great bounty

quran.arabic: جَنّٰتُ عَدۡنٍ يَّدۡخُلُوۡنَهَا يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيۡهَا مِنۡ اَسَاوِرَ مِنۡ ذَهَبٍ وَّلُؤۡلُؤًاۚ وَلِبَاسُهُمۡ فِيۡهَا حَرِيۡرٌ
quran.english: [For them are] gardens of perpetual residence which they will enter. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearls, and their garments therein will be silk

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوا الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَذۡهَبَ عَنَّا الۡحَزَنَؕ اِنَّ رَبَّنَا لَغَفُوۡرٌ شَكُوۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has removed from us [all] sorrow. Indeed, our Lord is Forgiving and Appreciative

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡ٘ اَحَلَّنَا دَارَ الۡمُقَامَةِ مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖۚ لَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيۡهَا نَصَبٌ وَّلَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيۡهَا لُغُوۡبٌ
quran.english: He who has settled us in the home of duration out of His bounty. There touches us not in it any fatigue, and there touches us not in it weariness [of mind]

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَهُمۡ نَارُ جَهَنَّمَۚ لَا يُقۡضٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ فَيَمُوۡتُوۡا وَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ عَذَابِهَاؕ كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِيۡ كُلَّ كَفُوۡرٍۚ‏
quran.english: And for those who disbelieve will be the fire of Hell. [Death] is not decreed for them so they may die, nor will its torment be lightened for them. Thus do we recompense every ungrateful one

quran.arabic: وَهُمۡ يَصۡطَرِخُوۡنَ فِيۡهَاۚ رَبَّنَا٘ اَخۡرِجۡنَا نَعۡمَلۡ صَالِحًا غَيۡرَ الَّذِيۡ كُنَّا نَعۡمَلُؕ اَوَلَمۡ نُعَمِّرۡكُمۡ مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُ فِيۡهِ مَنۡ تَذَكَّرَ وَجَآءَكُمُ النَّذِيۡرُؕ فَذُوۡقُوۡا فَمَا لِلظّٰلِمِيۡنَ مِنۡ نَّصِيۡرٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And they will cry out therein, "Our Lord, remove us; we will do righteousness - other than what we were doing!" But did We not grant you life enough for whoever would remember therein to remember, and the warner had come to you? So taste [the punishment], for there is not for the wrongdoers any helper

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عٰلِمُ غَيۡبِ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ اِنَّهٗ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُوۡرِ
quran.english: Indeed, Allah is Knower of the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and earth. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَكُمۡ خَلٰٓئِفَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ فَمَنۡ كَفَرَ فَعَلَيۡهِ كُفۡرُهٗؕ وَلَا يَزِيۡدُ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ كُفۡرُهُمۡ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡ اِلَّا مَقۡتًاۚ وَلَا يَزِيۡدُ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ كُفۡرُهُمۡ اِلَّا خَسَارًا
quran.english: It is He who has made you successors upon the earth. And whoever disbelieves - upon him will be [the consequence of] his disbelief. And the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them in the sight of their Lord except in hatred; and the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them except in loss

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ شُرَكَآءَكُمُ الَّذِيۡنَ تَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ اَرُوۡنِيۡ مَاذَا خَلَقُوۡا مِنَ الۡاَرۡضِ اَمۡ لَهُمۡ شِرۡكٌ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِۚ اَمۡ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡ كِتٰبًا فَهُمۡ عَلٰي بَيِّنَتٍ مِّنۡهُۚ بَلۡ اِنۡ يَّعِدُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ بَعۡضًا اِلَّا غُرُوۡرًا
quran.english: Say, "Have you considered your 'partners' whom you invoke besides Allah? Show me what they have created from the earth, or have they partnership [with Him] in the heavens? Or have We given them a book so they are [standing] on evidence therefrom? [No], rather, the wrongdoers do not promise each other except delusion

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُمۡسِكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ اَنۡ تَزُوۡلَا ࣢ۚ وَلَئِنۡ زَالَتَا٘ اِنۡ اَمۡسَكَهُمَا مِنۡ اَحَدٍ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ حَلِيۡمًا غَفُوۡرًا
quran.english: Indeed, Allah holds the heavens and the earth, lest they cease. And if they should cease, no one could hold them [in place] after Him. Indeed, He is Forbearing and Forgiving

quran.arabic: وَاَقۡسَمُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ جَهۡدَ اَيۡمَانِهِمۡ لَئِنۡ جَآءَهُمۡ نَذِيۡرٌ لَّيَكُوۡنُنَّ اَهۡدٰي مِنۡ اِحۡدَي الۡاُمَمِۚ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ نَذِيۡرٌ مَّا زَادَهُمۡ اِلَّا نُفُوۡرَاۙ‏
quran.english: And they swore by Allah their strongest oaths that if a warner came to them, they would be more guided than [any] one of the [previous] nations. But when a warner came to them, it did not increase them except in aversion

quran.arabic: اِۨسۡتِكۡبَارًا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَكۡرَ السَّيِّئِؕ وَلَا يَحِيۡقُ الۡمَكۡرُ السَّيِّئُ اِلَّا بِاَهۡلِهٖؕ فَهَلۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ اِلَّا سُنَّتَ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۚ فَلَنۡ تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ اللّٰهِ تَبۡدِيۡلًا ࣢ۚ وَلَنۡ تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ اللّٰهِ تَحۡوِيۡلًا
quran.english: [Due to] arrogance in the land and plotting of evil; but the evil plot does not encompass except its own people. Then do they await except the way of the former peoples? But you will never find in the way of Allah any change, and you will never find in the way of Allah any alteration

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَسِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَيَنۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ وَكَانُوۡ٘ا اَشَدَّ مِنۡهُمۡ قُوَّةًؕ وَمَا كَانَ اللّٰهُ لِيُعۡجِزَهٗ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَلَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ عَلِيۡمًا قَدِيۡرًا
quran.english: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? And they were greater than them in power. But Allah is not to be caused failure by anything in the heavens or on the earth. Indeed, He is ever Knowing and Competent

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ يُؤَاخِذُ اللّٰهُ النَّاسَ بِمَا كَسَبُوۡا مَا تَرَكَ عَلٰي ظَهۡرِهَا مِنۡ دَآبَّةٍ وَّلٰكِنۡ يُّؤَخِّرُهُمۡ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيۚ فَاِذَا جَآءَ اَجَلُهُمۡ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ كَانَ بِعِبَادِهٖ بَصِيۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: And if Allah were to impose blame on the people for what they have earned, He would not leave upon the earth any creature. But He defers them for a specified term. And when their time comes, then indeed Allah has ever been, of His servants, Seeing
Ya, Seen

quran.arabic: وَالۡقُرۡاٰنِ الۡحَكِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: By the wise Qur'an

quran.arabic: اِنَّكَ لَمِنَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed you, [O Muhammad], are from among the messengers

quran.arabic: عَلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍؕ‏
quran.english: On a straight path

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلَ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الرَّحِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: [This is] a revelation of the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: لِتُنۡذِرَ قَوۡمًا مَّا٘ اُنۡذِرَ اٰبَآؤُهُمۡ فَهُمۡ غٰفِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ حَقَّ الۡقَوۡلُ عَلٰ٘ي اَكۡثَرِهِمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Already the word has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe

quran.arabic: اِنَّا جَعَلۡنَا فِيۡ٘ اَعۡنَاقِهِمۡ اَغۡلٰلًا فَهِيَ اِلَي الۡاَذۡقَانِ فَهُمۡ مُّقۡمَحُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ سَدًّا وَّمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِمۡ سَدًّا فَاَغۡشَيۡنٰهُمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see

quran.arabic: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ءَاَنۡذَرۡتَهُمۡ اَمۡ لَمۡ تُنۡذِرۡهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا تُنۡذِرُ مَنِ اتَّبَعَ الذِّكۡرَ وَخَشِيَ الرَّحۡمٰنَ بِالۡغَيۡبِۚ فَبَشِّرۡهُ بِمَغۡفِرَةٍ وَّاَجۡرٍ كَرِيۡمٍ
quran.english: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward

quran.arabic: اِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيِ الۡمَوۡتٰي وَنَكۡتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوۡا وَاٰثَارَهُمۡؕؔ وَكُلَّ شَيۡءٍ اَحۡصَيۡنٰهُ فِيۡ٘ اِمَامٍ مُّبِيۡنٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register

quran.arabic: وَاضۡرِبۡ لَهُمۡ مَّثَلًا اَصۡحٰبَ الۡقَرۡيَةِۘ اِذۡ جَآءَهَا الۡمُرۡسَلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it

quran.arabic: اِذۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِمُ اثۡنَيۡنِ فَكَذَّبُوۡهُمَا فَعَزَّزۡنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا٘ اِلَيۡكُمۡ مُّرۡسَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened them with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا مَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُنَاۙ وَمَا٘ اَنۡزَلَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍۙ اِنۡ اَنۡتُمۡ اِلَّا تَكۡذِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "You are not but human beings like us, and the Most Merciful has not revealed a thing. You are only telling lies

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا رَبُّنَا يَعۡلَمُ اِنَّا٘ اِلَيۡكُمۡ لَمُرۡسَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Our Lord knows that we are messengers to you

quran.arabic: وَمَا عَلَيۡنَا٘ اِلَّا الۡبَلٰغُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: And we are not responsible except for clear notification

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا تَطَيَّرۡنَا بِكُمۡۚ لَئِنۡ لَّمۡ تَنۡتَهُوۡا لَنَرۡجُمَنَّكُمۡ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُمۡ مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: They said, "Indeed, we consider you a bad omen. If you do not desist, we will surely stone you, and there will surely touch you, from us, a painful punishment

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا طَآئِرُكُمۡ مَّعَكُمۡؕ اَئِنۡ ذُكِّرۡتُمۡؕ بَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ مُّسۡرِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Your omen is with yourselves. Is it because you were reminded? Rather, you are a transgressing people

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَ مِنۡ اَقۡصَا الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ رَجُلٌ يَّسۡعٰيؗ قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اتَّبِعُوا الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And there came from the farthest end of the city a man, running. He said, "O my people, follow the messengers

quran.arabic: اتَّبِعُوۡا مَنۡ لَّا يَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ اَجۡرًا وَّهُمۡ مُّهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Follow those who do not ask of you [any] payment, and they are [rightly] guided

quran.arabic: وَمَا لِيَ لَا٘ اَعۡبُدُ الَّذِيۡ فَطَرَنِيۡ وَاِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And why should I not worship He who created me and to whom you will be returned

quran.arabic: ءَاَتَّخِذُ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اٰلِهَةً اِنۡ يُّرِدۡنِ الرَّحۡمٰنُ بِضُرٍّ لَّا تُغۡنِ عَنِّيۡ شَفَاعَتُهُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا يُنۡقِذُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: Should I take other than Him [false] deities [while], if the Most Merciful intends for me some adversity, their intercession will not avail me at all, nor can they save me

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ٘ اِذًا لَّفِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: Indeed, I would then be in manifest error

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ٘ اٰمَنۡتُ بِرَبِّكُمۡ فَاسۡمَعُوۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I have believed in your Lord, so listen to me

quran.arabic: قِيۡلَ ادۡخُلِ الۡجَنَّةَؕ قَالَ يٰلَيۡتَ قَوۡمِيۡ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: It was said, "Enter Paradise." He said, "I wish my people could know

quran.arabic: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِيۡ رَبِّيۡ وَجَعَلَنِيۡ مِنَ الۡمُكۡرَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Of how my Lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honored

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلٰي قَوۡمِهٖ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖ مِنۡ جُنۡدٍ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنۡزِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven, nor would We have done so

quran.arabic: اِنۡ كَانَتۡ اِلَّا صَيۡحَةً وَّاحِدَةً فَاِذَا هُمۡ خٰمِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished

quran.arabic: يٰحَسۡرَةً عَلَي الۡعِبَادِۚ࣠ مَا يَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ رَّسُوۡلٍ اِلَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَ
quran.english: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا كَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡقُرُوۡنِ اَنَّهُمۡ اِلَيۡهِمۡ لَا يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيۡعٌ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us

quran.arabic: وَاٰيَةٌ لَّهُمُ الۡاَرۡضُ الۡمَيۡتَةُۚۖ اَحۡيَيۡنٰهَا وَاَخۡرَجۡنَا مِنۡهَا حَبًّا فَمِنۡهُ يَاۡكُلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيۡهَا جَنّٰتٍ مِّنۡ نَّخِيۡلٍ وَّاَعۡنَابٍ وَّفَجَّرۡنَا فِيۡهَا مِنَ الۡعُيُوۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs

quran.arabic: لِيَاۡكُلُوۡا مِنۡ ثَمَرِهٖۙ وَمَا عَمِلَتۡهُ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡؕ اَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful

quran.arabic: سُبۡحٰنَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ الۡاَزۡوَاجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۭۡ بِتُ الۡاَرۡضُ وَمِنۡ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know

quran.arabic: وَاٰيَةٌ لَّهُمُ الَّيۡلُۚۖ نَسۡلَخُ مِنۡهُ النَّهَارَ فَاِذَا هُمۡ مُّظۡلِمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it [the light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness

quran.arabic: وَالشَّمۡسُ تَجۡرِيۡ لِمُسۡتَقَرٍّ لَّهَاؕ ذٰلِكَ تَقۡدِيۡرُ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡعَلِيۡمِؕ‏
quran.english: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing

quran.arabic: وَالۡقَمَرَ قَدَّرۡنٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتّٰي عَادَ كَالۡعُرۡجُوۡنِ الۡقَدِيۡمِ
quran.english: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk

quran.arabic: لَا الشَّمۡسُ يَنۭۡ بَغِيۡ لَهَا٘ اَنۡ تُدۡرِكَ الۡقَمَرَ وَلَا الَّيۡلُ سَابِقُ النَّهَارِؕ وَكُلٌّ فِيۡ فَلَكٍ يَّسۡبَحُوۡنَ
quran.english: It is not allowable for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming

quran.arabic: وَاٰيَةٌ لَّهُمۡ اَنَّا حَمَلۡنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ فِي الۡفُلۡكِ الۡمَشۡحُوۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship

quran.arabic: وَخَلَقۡنَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ مِّثۡلِهٖ مَا يَرۡكَبُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ نَّشَاۡ نُغۡرِقۡهُمۡ فَلَا صَرِيۡخَ لَهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنۡقَذُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And if We should will, We could drown them; then no one responding to a cry would there be for them, nor would they be saved

quran.arabic: اِلَّا رَحۡمَةً مِّنَّا وَمَتَاعًا اِلٰي حِيۡنٍ
quran.english: Except as a mercy from Us and provision for a time

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمُ اتَّقُوۡا مَا بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡكُمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: But when it is said to them, "Beware of what is before you and what is behind you; perhaps you will receive mercy

quran.arabic: وَمَا تَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ اٰيَةٍ مِّنۡ اٰيٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ اِلَّا كَانُوۡا عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِيۡنَ
quran.english: And no sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord except that they are from it turning away

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ اَنۡفِقُوۡا مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ اللّٰهُۙ قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اَنُطۡعِمُ مَنۡ لَّوۡ يَشَآءُ اللّٰهُ اَطۡعَمَهٗ٘ࣗۖ اِنۡ اَنۡتُمۡ اِلَّا فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: And when it is said to them, "Spend from that which Allah has provided for you," those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Should we feed one whom, if Allah had willed, He would have fed? You are not but in clear error

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَتٰي هٰذَا الۡوَعۡدُ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: مَا يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ اِلَّا صَيۡحَةً وَّاحِدَةً تَاۡخُذُهُمۡ وَهُمۡ يَخِصِّمُوۡنَ
quran.english: They do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing

quran.arabic: فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَ تَوۡصِيَةً وَّلَا٘ اِلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِهِمۡ يَرۡجِعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return

quran.arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّوۡرِ فَاِذَا هُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَجۡدَاثِ اِلٰي رَبِّهِمۡ يَنۡسِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰوَيۡلَنَا مَنۭۡ بَعَثَنَا مِنۡ مَّرۡقَدِنَاۘࣝ࣠ هٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وَصَدَقَ الۡمُرۡسَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: They will say, "O woe to us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place?" [The reply will be], "This is what the Most Merciful had promised, and the messengers told the truth

quran.arabic: اِنۡ كَانَتۡ اِلَّا صَيۡحَةً وَّاحِدَةً فَاِذَا هُمۡ جَمِيۡعٌ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: It will not be but one blast, and at once they are all brought present before Us

quran.arabic: فَالۡيَوۡمَ لَا تُظۡلَمُ نَفۡسٌ شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ اِلَّا مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: So today no soul will be wronged at all, and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اَصۡحٰبَ الۡجَنَّةِ الۡيَوۡمَ فِيۡ شُغُلٍ فٰكِهُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed the companions of Paradise, that Day, will be amused in [joyful] occupation

quran.arabic: هُمۡ وَاَزۡوَاجُهُمۡ فِيۡ ظِلٰلٍ عَلَي الۡاَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: They and their spouses - in shade, reclining on adorned couches

quran.arabic: لَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا فَاكِهَةٌ وَّلَهُمۡ مَّا يَدَّعُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: For them therein is fruit, and for them is whatever they request [or wish]

quran.arabic: سَلٰمٌࣞ قَوۡلًا مِّنۡ رَّبٍّ رَّحِيۡمٍ
quran.english: [And] "Peace," a word from a Merciful Lord

quran.arabic: وَامۡتَازُوا الۡيَوۡمَ اَيُّهَا الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Then He will say], "But stand apart today, you criminals

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ اَعۡهَدۡ اِلَيۡكُمۡ يٰبَنِيۡ٘ اٰدَمَ اَنۡ لَّا تَعۡبُدُوا الشَّيۡطٰنَۚ اِنَّهٗ لَكُمۡ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy

quran.arabic: وَّاَنِ اعۡبُدُوۡنِيۡؕؔ هٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And that you worship [only] Me? This is a straight path

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَضَلَّ مِنۡكُمۡ جِبِلًّا كَثِيۡرًاؕ اَفَلَمۡ تَكُوۡنُوۡا تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And he had already led astray from among you much of creation, so did you not use reason

quran.arabic: هٰذِهٖ جَهَنَّمُ الَّتِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: This is the Hellfire which you were promised

quran.arabic: اِصۡلَوۡهَا الۡيَوۡمَ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَكۡفُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny

quran.arabic: اَلۡيَوۡمَ نَخۡتِمُ عَلٰ٘ي اَفۡوَاهِهِمۡ وَتُكَلِّمُنَا٘ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَتَشۡهَدُ اَرۡجُلُهُمۡ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَكۡسِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسۡنَا عَلٰ٘ي اَعۡيُنِهِمۡ فَاسۡتَبَقُوا الصِّرَاطَ فَاَنّٰي يُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخۡنٰهُمۡ عَلٰي مَكَانَتِهِمۡ فَمَا اسۡتَطَاعُوۡا مُضِيًّا وَّلَا يَرۡجِعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ نُّعَمِّرۡهُ نُنَكِّسۡهُ فِي الۡخَلۡقِؕ اَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand

quran.arabic: وَمَا عَلَّمۡنٰهُ الشِّعۡرَ وَمَا يَنۭۡ بَغِيۡ لَهٗؕ اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا ذِكۡرٌ وَّقُرۡاٰنٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: And We did not give Prophet Muhammad, knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur'an

quran.arabic: لِّيُنۡذِرَ مَنۡ كَانَ حَيًّا وَّيَحِقَّ الۡقَوۡلُ عَلَي الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: To warn whoever is alive and justify the word against the disbelievers

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّا خَلَقۡنَا لَهُمۡ مِّمَّا عَمِلَتۡ اَيۡدِيۡنَا٘ اَنۡعَامًا فَهُمۡ لَهَا مٰلِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners

quran.arabic: وَذَلَّلۡنٰهَا لَهُمۡ فَمِنۡهَا رَكُوۡبُهُمۡ وَمِنۡهَا يَاۡكُلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat

quran.arabic: وَلَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَنَافِعُ وَمَشَارِبُؕ اَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful

quran.arabic: وَاتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اٰلِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يُنۡصَرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: But they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped

quran.arabic: لَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَ نَصۡرَهُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَهُمۡ جُنۡدٌ مُّحۡضَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance

quran.arabic: فَلَا يَحۡزُنۡكَ قَوۡلُهُمۡۘ اِنَّا نَعۡلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّوۡنَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَ الۡاِنۡسَانُ اَنَّا خَلَقۡنٰهُ مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍ فَاِذَا هُوَ خَصِيۡمٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary

quran.arabic: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًا وَّنَسِيَ خَلۡقَهٗؕ قَالَ مَنۡ يُّحۡيِ الۡعِظَامَ وَهِيَ رَمِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And he presents for Us an example and forgets his [own] creation. He says, "Who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يُحۡيِيۡهَا الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡشَاَهَا٘ اَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍؕ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلۡقٍ عَلِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنَ الشَّجَرِ الۡاَخۡضَرِ نَارًا فَاِذَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ مِّنۡهُ تُوۡقِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: [It is] He who made for you from the green tree, fire, and then from it you ignite

quran.arabic: اَوَلَيۡسَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ بِقٰدِرٍ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّخۡلُقَ مِثۡلَهُمۡؕؔ بَلٰيࣗ وَهُوَ الۡخَلّٰقُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا٘ اَمۡرُهٗ٘ اِذَا٘ اَرَادَ شَيۡـًٔا اَنۡ يَّقُوۡلَ لَهٗ كُنۡ فَيَكُوۡنُ
quran.english: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is

quran.arabic: فَسُبۡحٰنَ الَّذِيۡ بِيَدِهٖ مَلَكُوۡتُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ وَّاِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So exalted is He in whose hand is the realm of all things, and to Him you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَالصّٰٓفّٰتِ صَفًّاۙ‏
quran.english: By those [angels] lined up in rows

quran.arabic: فَالزّٰجِرٰتِ زَجۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those who drive [the clouds]

quran.arabic: فَالتّٰلِيٰتِ ذِكۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those who recite the message

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اِلٰهَكُمۡ لَوَاحِدٌؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, your God is One

quran.arabic: رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ الۡمَشَارِقِؕ‏
quran.english: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises

quran.arabic: اِنَّا زَيَّنَّا السَّمَآءَ الدُّنۡيَا بِزِيۡنَةِ اِۨلۡكَوَاكِبِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars
