quran.arabic: وَحِفۡظًا مِّنۡ كُلِّ شَيۡطٰنٍ مَّارِدٍۚ‏
quran.english: And as protection against every rebellious devil

quran.arabic: لَا يَسَّمَّعُوۡنَ اِلَي الۡمَلَاِ الۡاَعۡلٰي وَيُقۡذَفُوۡنَ مِنۡ كُلِّ جَانِبٍࣗۙۖ‏
quran.english: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side

quran.arabic: دُحُوۡرًا وَّلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ وَّاصِبٌۙ‏
quran.english: Repelled; and for them is a constant punishment

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ خَطِفَ الۡخَطۡفَةَ فَاَتۡبَعَهٗ شِهَابٌ ثَاقِبٌ
quran.english: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness]

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ اَهُمۡ اَشَدُّ خَلۡقًا اَمۡ مَّنۡ خَلَقۡنَاؕ اِنَّا خَلَقۡنٰهُمۡ مِّنۡ طِيۡنٍ لَّازِبٍ
quran.english: Then inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Are they a stronger [or more difficult] creation or those [others] We have created?" Indeed, We created men from sticky clay

quran.arabic: بَلۡ عَجِبۡتَ وَيَسۡخَرُوۡنَࣕ‏
quran.english: But you wonder, while they mock

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا ذُكِّرُوۡا لَا يَذۡكُرُوۡنَࣕ‏
quran.english: And when they are reminded, they remember not

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاَوۡا اٰيَةً يَّسۡتَسۡخِرُوۡنَࣕ‏
quran.english: And when they see a sign, they ridicule

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا سِحۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۚۖ‏
quran.english: And say, "This is not but obvious magic

quran.arabic: ءَاِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَّعِظَامًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوۡثُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected

quran.arabic: اَوَ اٰبَآؤُنَا الۡاَوَّلُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And our forefathers [as well]

quran.arabic: قُلۡ نَعَمۡ وَاَنۡتُمۡ دَاخِرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Say, "Yes, and you will be [rendered] contemptible

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّمَا هِيَ زَجۡرَةٌ وَّاحِدَةٌ فَاِذَا هُمۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا يٰوَيۡلَنَا هٰذَا يَوۡمُ الدِّيۡنِ
quran.english: They will say, "O woe to us! This is the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: هٰذَا يَوۡمُ الۡفَصۡلِ الَّذِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: [They will be told], "This is the Day of Judgement which you used to deny

quran.arabic: اُحۡشُرُوا الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا وَاَزۡوَاجَهُمۡ وَمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [The angels will be ordered], "Gather those who committed wrong, their kinds, and what they used to worship

quran.arabic: مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ فَاهۡدُوۡهُمۡ اِلٰي صِرَاطِ الۡجَحِيۡمِࣔ‏
quran.english: Other than Allah, and guide them to the path of Hellfire

quran.arabic: وَقِفُوۡهُمۡ اِنَّهُمۡ مَّسۡـُٔوۡلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And stop them; indeed, they are to be questioned

quran.arabic: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَنَاصَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other

quran.arabic: بَلۡ هُمُ الۡيَوۡمَ مُسۡتَسۡلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: But they, that Day, are in surrender

quran.arabic: وَاَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ يَّتَسَآءَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they will approach one another blaming each other

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّكُمۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَاۡتُوۡنَنَا عَنِ الۡيَمِيۡنِ
quran.english: They will say, "Indeed, you used to come at us from the right

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا بَلۡ لَّمۡ تَكُوۡنُوۡا مُؤۡمِنِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: The oppressors will say, "Rather, you [yourselves] were not believers

quran.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ سُلۡطٰنٍۚ بَلۡ كُنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمًا طٰغِيۡنَ
quran.english: And we had over you no authority, but you were a transgressing people

quran.arabic: فَحَقَّ عَلَيۡنَا قَوۡلُ رَبِّنَا٘ࣗۖ اِنَّا لَذَآئِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: So the word of our Lord has come into effect upon us; indeed, we will taste [punishment]

quran.arabic: فَاَغۡوَيۡنٰكُمۡ اِنَّا كُنَّا غٰوِيۡنَ
quran.english: And we led you to deviation; indeed, we were deviators

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٍ فِي الۡعَذَابِ مُشۡتَرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: So indeed they, that Day, will be sharing in the punishment

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كَذٰلِكَ نَفۡعَلُ بِالۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡ٘ا اِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللّٰهُ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allah," were arrogant

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوۡ٘ا اٰلِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَّجۡنُوۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet

quran.arabic: بَلۡ جَآءَ بِالۡحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, the Prophet has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers

quran.arabic: اِنَّكُمۡ لَذَآئِقُوا الۡعَذَابِ الۡاَلِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, you [disbelievers] will be tasters of the painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ اِلَّا مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عِبَادَ اللّٰهِ الۡمُخۡلَصِيۡنَ
quran.english: But not the chosen servants of Allah

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ رِزۡقٌ مَّعۡلُوۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: Those will have a provision determined

quran.arabic: فَوَاكِهُۚ وَهُمۡ مُّكۡرَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Fruits; and they will be honored

quran.arabic: فِيۡ جَنّٰتِ النَّعِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: In gardens of pleasure

quran.arabic: عَلٰي سُرُرٍ مُّتَقٰبِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: On thrones facing one another

quran.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِكَاۡسٍ مِّنۡ مَّعِيۡنٍۭۙ‏
quran.english: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring

quran.arabic: بَيۡضَآءَ لَذَّةٍ لِّلشّٰرِبِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: White and delicious to the drinkers

quran.arabic: لَا فِيۡهَا غَوۡلٌ وَّلَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا يُنۡزَفُوۡنَ
quran.english: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated

quran.arabic: وَعِنۡدَهُمۡ قٰصِرٰتُ الطَّرۡفِ عِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes

quran.arabic: كَاَنَّهُنَّ بَيۡضٌ مَّكۡنُوۡنٌ
quran.english: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected

quran.arabic: فَاَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ يَّتَسَآءَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other

quran.arabic: قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ اِنِّيۡ كَانَ لِيۡ قَرِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth]

quran.arabic: يَّقُوۡلُ ءَاِنَّكَ لَمِنَ الۡمُصَدِّقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Who would say, 'Are you indeed of those who believe

quran.arabic: ءَاِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَّعِظَامًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَدِيۡنُوۡنَ
quran.english: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed

quran.arabic: قَالَ هَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ مُّطَّلِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: He will say, "Would you [care to] look

quran.arabic: فَاطَّلَعَ فَرَاٰهُ فِيۡ سَوَآءِ الۡجَحِيۡمِ
quran.english: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire

quran.arabic: قَالَ تَاللّٰهِ اِنۡ كِدۡتَّ لَتُرۡدِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: He will say, "By Allah, you almost ruined me

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا نِعۡمَةُ رَبِّيۡ لَكُنۡتُ مِنَ الۡمُحۡضَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell]

quran.arabic: اَفَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَيِّتِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then, are we not to die

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَوۡتَتَنَا الۡاُوۡلٰي وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا لَهُوَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡعَظِيۡمُ
quran.english: Indeed, this is the great attainment

quran.arabic: لِمِثۡلِ هٰذَا فَلۡيَعۡمَلِ الۡعٰمِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work

quran.arabic: اَذٰلِكَ خَيۡرٌ نُّزُلًا اَمۡ شَجَرَةُ الزَّقُّوۡمِ
quran.english: Is Paradise a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqum

quran.arabic: اِنَّا جَعَلۡنٰهَا فِتۡنَةً لِّلظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: اِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخۡرُجُ فِيۡ٘ اَصۡلِ الۡجَحِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire

quran.arabic: طَلۡعُهَا كَاَنَّهٗ رُءُوۡسُ الشَّيٰطِيۡنِ
quran.english: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّهُمۡ لَاٰكِلُوۡنَ مِنۡهَا فَمَالِـُٔوۡنَ مِنۡهَا الۡبُطُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّ لَهُمۡ عَلَيۡهَا لَشَوۡبًا مِّنۡ حَمِيۡمٍۚ‏
quran.english: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّ مَرۡجِعَهُمۡ لَا۠اِلَي الۡجَحِيۡمِ
quran.english: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ اَلۡفَوۡا اٰبَآءَهُمۡ ضَآلِّيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed they found their fathers astray

quran.arabic: فَهُمۡ عَلٰ٘ي اٰثٰرِهِمۡ يُهۡرَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ ضَلَّ قَبۡلَهُمۡ اَكۡثَرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا فِيۡهِمۡ مُّنۡذِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We had already sent among them warners

quran.arabic: فَانۡظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الۡمُنۡذَرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then look how was the end of those who were warned

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عِبَادَ اللّٰهِ الۡمُخۡلَصِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: But not the chosen servants of Allah

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ نَادٰىنَا نُوۡحٌ فَلَنِعۡمَ الۡمُجِيۡبُوۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders

quran.arabic: وَنَجَّيۡنٰهُ وَاَهۡلَهٗ مِنَ الۡكَرۡبِ الۡعَظِيۡمِؗۖ‏
quran.english: And We saved him and his family from the great affliction

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلۡنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهٗ هُمُ الۡبَاقِيۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]

quran.arabic: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations

quran.arabic: سَلٰمٌ عَلٰي نُوۡحٍ فِي الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Peace upon Noah among the worlds

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَغۡرَقۡنَا الۡاٰخَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then We drowned the disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ مِنۡ شِيۡعَتِهٖ لَاِبۡرٰهِيۡمَۘ‏
quran.english: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham

quran.arabic: اِذۡ جَآءَ رَبَّهٗ بِقَلۡبٍ سَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لِاَبِيۡهِ وَقَوۡمِهٖ مَاذَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [And] when he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship

quran.arabic: اَئِفۡكًا اٰلِهَةً دُوۡنَ اللّٰهِ تُرِيۡدُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Is it falsehood [as] gods other than Allah you desire

quran.arabic: فَمَا ظَنُّكُمۡ بِرَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then what is your thought about the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: فَنَظَرَ نَظۡرَةً فِي النُّجُوۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: And he cast a look at the stars

quran.arabic: فَقَالَ اِنِّيۡ سَقِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And said, "Indeed, I am [about to be] ill

quran.arabic: فَتَوَلَّوۡا عَنۡهُ مُدۡبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: So they turned away from him, departing

quran.arabic: فَرَاغَ اِلٰ٘ي اٰلِهَتِهِمۡ فَقَالَ اَلَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Then he turned to their gods and said, "Do you not eat

quran.arabic: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَنۡطِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: What is [wrong] with you that you do not speak

quran.arabic: فَرَاغَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضَرۡبًاۭ بِالۡيَمِيۡنِ
quran.english: And he turned upon them a blow with [his] right hand

quran.arabic: فَاَقۡبَلُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهِ يَزِفُّوۡنَ
quran.english: Then the people came toward him, hastening

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَتَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مَا تَنۡحِتُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: He said, "Do you worship that which you [yourselves] carve

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ خَلَقَكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: While Allah created you and that which you do

quran.arabic: قَالُوا ابۡنُوۡا لَهٗ بُنۡيَانًا فَاَلۡقُوۡهُ فِي الۡجَحِيۡمِ
quran.english: They said, "Construct for him a furnace and throw him into the burning fire

quran.arabic: فَاَرَادُوۡا بِهٖ كَيۡدًا فَجَعَلۡنٰهُمُ الۡاَسۡفَلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they intended for him a plan, but We made them the most debased

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ اِنِّيۡ ذَاهِبٌ اِلٰي رَبِّيۡ سَيَهۡدِيۡنِ
quran.english: And [then] he said, "Indeed, I will go to [where I am ordered by] my Lord; He will guide me

quran.arabic: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِيۡ مِنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: My Lord, grant me [a child] from among the righteous

quran.arabic: فَبَشَّرۡنٰهُ بِغُلٰمٍ حَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: So We gave him good tidings of a forbearing boy

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ السَّعۡيَ قَالَ يٰبُنَيَّ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَرٰي فِي الۡمَنَامِ اَنِّيۡ٘ اَذۡبَحُكَ فَانۡظُرۡ مَاذَا تَرٰيؕ قَالَ يٰ٘اَبَتِ افۡعَلۡ مَا تُؤۡمَرُؗ سَتَجِدُنِيۡ٘ اِنۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ مِنَ الصّٰبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when he reached with him [the age of] exertion, he said, "O my son, indeed I have seen in a dream that I [must] sacrifice you, so see what you think." He said, "O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allah wills, of the steadfast

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا٘ اَسۡلَمَا وَتَلَّهٗ لِلۡجَبِيۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: And when they had both submitted and he put him down upon his forehead

quran.arabic: وَنَادَيۡنٰهُ اَنۡ يّٰ٘اِبۡرٰهِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: We called to him, "O Abraham

quran.arabic: قَدۡ صَدَّقۡتَ الرُّءۡيَاۚ اِنَّا كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: You have fulfilled the vision." Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا لَهُوَ الۡبَلٰٓؤُا الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: Indeed, this was the clear trial

quran.arabic: وَفَدَيۡنٰهُ بِذِبۡحٍ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice

quran.arabic: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations

quran.arabic: سَلٰمٌ عَلٰ٘ي اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ
quran.english: Peace upon Abraham

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants

quran.arabic: وَبَشَّرۡنٰهُ بِاِسۡحٰقَ نَبِيًّا مِّنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We gave him good tidings of Isaac, a prophet from among the righteous

quran.arabic: وَبٰرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ وَعَلٰ٘ي اِسۡحٰقَؕ وَمِنۡ ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحۡسِنٌ وَّظَالِمٌ لِّنَفۡسِهٖ مُبِيۡنٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ مَنَنَّا عَلٰي مُوۡسٰي وَهٰرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We did certainly confer favor upon Moses and Aaron

quran.arabic: وَنَجَّيۡنٰهُمَا وَقَوۡمَهُمَا مِنَ الۡكَرۡبِ الۡعَظِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: And We saved them and their people from the great affliction

quran.arabic: وَنَصَرۡنٰهُمۡ فَكَانُوۡا هُمُ الۡغٰلِبِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We supported them so it was they who overcame

quran.arabic: وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُمَا الۡكِتٰبَ الۡمُسۡتَبِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We gave them the explicit Scripture

quran.arabic: وَهَدَيۡنٰهُمَا الصِّرَاطَ الۡمُسۡتَقِيۡمَۚ‏
quran.english: And We guided them on the straight path

quran.arabic: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمَا فِي الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَۙۖ‏
quran.english: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations

quran.arabic: سَلٰمٌ عَلٰي مُوۡسٰي وَهٰرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Peace upon Moses and Aaron

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمَا مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ اِلۡيَاسَ لَمِنَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهٖ٘ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: When he said to his people, "Will you not fear Allah

quran.arabic: اَتَدۡعُوۡنَ بَعۡلًا وَّتَذَرُوۡنَ اَحۡسَنَ الۡخٰلِقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Do you call upon Ba'l and leave the best of creators

quran.arabic: اللّٰهَ رَبَّكُمۡ وَرَبَّ اٰبَآئِكُمُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers

quran.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوۡهُ فَاِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they denied him, so indeed, they will be brought [for punishment]

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عِبَادَ اللّٰهِ الۡمُخۡلَصِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except the chosen servants of Allah

quran.arabic: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations

quran.arabic: سَلٰمٌ عَلٰ٘ي اِلۡ يَاسِيۡنَ
quran.english: Peace upon Elias

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ لُوۡطًا لَّمِنَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers

quran.arabic: اِذۡ نَجَّيۡنٰهُ وَاَهۡلَهٗ٘ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [So mention] when We saved him and his family, all

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عَجُوۡزًا فِي الۡغٰبِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except his wife among those who remained [with the evildoers]

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ دَمَّرۡنَا الۡاٰخَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then We destroyed the others

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّكُمۡ لَتَمُرُّوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مُّصۡبِحِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning

quran.arabic: وَبِالَّيۡلِؕ اَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And at night. Then will you not use reason

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ يُوۡنُسَ لَمِنَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed, Jonah was among the messengers

quran.arabic: اِذۡ اَبَقَ اِلَي الۡفُلۡكِ الۡمَشۡحُوۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship

quran.arabic: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ الۡمُدۡحَضِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And he drew lots and was among the losers

quran.arabic: فَالۡتَقَمَهُ الۡحُوۡتُ وَهُوَ مُلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Then the fish swallowed him, while he was blameworthy

quran.arabic: فَلَوۡلَا٘ اَنَّهٗ كَانَ مِنَ الۡمُسَبِّحِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And had he not been of those who exalt Allah

quran.arabic: لَلَبِثَ فِيۡ بَطۡنِهٖ٘ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected

quran.arabic: فَنَبَذۡنٰهُ بِالۡعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ سَقِيۡمٌۚ‏
quran.english: But We threw him onto the open shore while he was ill

quran.arabic: وَاَنۭۡ بَتۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ شَجَرَةً مِّنۡ يَّقۡطِيۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine

quran.arabic: وَاَرۡسَلۡنٰهُ اِلٰي مِائَةِ اَلۡفٍ اَوۡ يَزِيۡدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more

quran.arabic: فَاٰمَنُوۡا فَمَتَّعۡنٰهُمۡ اِلٰي حِيۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ اَلِرَبِّكَ الۡبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ الۡبَنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons

quran.arabic: اَمۡ خَلَقۡنَا الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةَ اِنَاثًا وَّهُمۡ شٰهِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or did We create the angels as females while they were witnesses

quran.arabic: اَلَا٘ اِنَّهُمۡ مِّنۡ اِفۡكِهِمۡ لَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say

quran.arabic: وَلَدَ اللّٰهُۙ وَاِنَّهُمۡ لَكٰذِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah has begotten," and indeed, they are liars

quran.arabic: اَصۡطَفَي الۡبَنَاتِ عَلَي الۡبَنِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Has He chosen daughters over sons

quran.arabic: مَا لَكُمۡࣞ كَيۡفَ تَحۡكُمُوۡنَ
quran.english: What is [wrong] with you? How do you make judgement

quran.arabic: اَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Then will you not be reminded

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَكُمۡ سُلۡطٰنٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: Or do you have a clear authority

quran.arabic: فَاۡتُوۡا بِكِتٰبِكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلُوۡا بَيۡنَهٗ وَبَيۡنَ الۡجِنَّةِ نَسَبًاؕ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمَتِ الۡجِنَّةُ اِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they have claimed between Him and the jinn a lineage, but the jinn have already known that they [who made such claims] will be brought to [punishment]

quran.arabic: سُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Exalted is Allah above what they describe

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عِبَادَ اللّٰهِ الۡمُخۡلَصِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except the chosen servants of Allah [who do not share in that sin]

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So indeed, you [disbelievers] and whatever you worship

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ بِفٰتِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: You cannot tempt [anyone] away from Him

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ هُوَ صَالِ الۡجَحِيۡمِ
quran.english: Except he who is to [enter and] burn in the Hellfire

quran.arabic: وَمَا مِنَّا٘ اِلَّا لَهٗ مَقَامٌ مَّعۡلُوۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: [The angels say], "There is not among us any except that he has a known position

quran.arabic: وَّاِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ الصَّآفُّوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And indeed, we are those who line up [for prayer]

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ الۡمُسَبِّحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, we are those who exalt Allah

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ كَانُوۡا لَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, the disbelievers used to say

quran.arabic: لَوۡ اَنَّ عِنۡدَنَا ذِكۡرًا مِّنَ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: If we had a message from [those of] the former peoples

quran.arabic: لَكُنَّا عِبَادَ اللّٰهِ الۡمُخۡلَصِيۡنَ
quran.english: We would have been the chosen servants of Allah

quran.arabic: فَكَفَرُوۡا بِهٖ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: But they disbelieved in it, so they are going to know

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ سَبَقَتۡ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: And Our word has already preceded for Our servants, the messengers

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ لَهُمُ الۡمَنۡصُوۡرُوۡنَࣕ‏
quran.english: [That] indeed, they would be those given victory

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ جُنۡدَنَا لَهُمُ الۡغٰلِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [that] indeed, Our soldiers will be those who overcome

quran.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ حَتّٰي حِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: So, [O Muhammad], leave them for a time

quran.arabic: وَّاَبۡصِرۡهُمۡ فَسَوۡفَ يُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And see [what will befall] them, for they are going to see

quran.arabic: اَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then for Our punishment are they impatient

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمۡ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ الۡمُنۡذَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: But when it descends in their territory, then evil is the morning of those who were warned

quran.arabic: وَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ حَتّٰي حِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: And leave them for a time

quran.arabic: وَّاَبۡصِرۡ فَسَوۡفَ يُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And see, for they are going to see

quran.arabic: سُبۡحٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الۡعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of might, above what they describe

quran.arabic: وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَي الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And peace upon the messengers

quran.arabic: وَالۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: صٓ وَالۡقُرۡاٰنِ ذِي الذِّكۡرِؕ‏
quran.english: Sad. By the Qur'an containing reminder

quran.arabic: بَلِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا فِيۡ عِزَّةٍ وَّشِقَاقٍ
quran.english: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension

quran.arabic: كَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡنٍ فَنَادَوۡا وَّلَاتَ حِيۡنَ مَنَاصٍ
quran.english: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape

quran.arabic: وَعَجِبُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ جَآءَهُمۡ مُّنۡذِرٌ مِّنۡهُمۡؗ وَقَالَ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ هٰذَا سٰحِرٌ كَذَّابٌۚۖ‏
quran.english: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar

quran.arabic: اَجَعَلَ الۡاٰلِهَةَ اِلٰهًا وَّاحِدًاۚۖ اِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَيۡءٌ عُجَابٌ
quran.english: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing

quran.arabic: وَانۡطَلَقَ الۡمَلَاُ مِنۡهُمۡ اَنِ امۡشُوۡا وَاصۡبِرُوۡا عَلٰ٘ي اٰلِهَتِكُمۡۚۖ اِنَّ هٰذَا لَشَيۡءٌ يُّرَادُۚ‏
quran.english: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], "Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended

quran.arabic: مَا سَمِعۡنَا بِهٰذَا فِي الۡمِلَّةِ الۡاٰخِرَةِۚۖ اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا اخۡتِلَاقٌۚۖ‏
quran.english: We have not heard of this in the latest religion. This is not but a fabrication

quran.arabic: ءَاُنۡزِلَ عَلَيۡهِ الذِّكۡرُ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِنَاؕ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِيۡ شَكٍّ مِّنۡ ذِكۡرِيۡۚ بَلۡ لَّمَّا يَذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابِؕ‏
quran.english: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment

quran.arabic: اَمۡ عِنۡدَهُمۡ خَزَآئِنُ رَحۡمَةِ رَبِّكَ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡوَهَّابِۚ‏
quran.english: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَهُمۡ مُّلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاࣞ فَلۡيَرۡتَقُوۡا فِي الۡاَسۡبَابِ
quran.english: Or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend through [any] ways of access

quran.arabic: جُنۡدٌ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهۡزُوۡمٌ مِّنَ الۡاَحۡزَابِ
quran.english: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers]

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوۡحٍ وَّعَادٌ وَّفِرۡعَوۡنُ ذُو الۡاَوۡتَادِۙ‏
quran.english: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] 'Aad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes

quran.arabic: وَثَمُوۡدُ وَقَوۡمُ لُوۡطٍ وَّاَصۡحٰبُ لۡـَٔيۡكَةِؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ الۡاَحۡزَابُ
quran.english: And [the tribe of] Thamud and the people of Lot and the companions of the thicket. Those are the companies

quran.arabic: اِنۡ كُلٌّ اِلَّا كَذَّبَ الرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِࣖ‏
quran.english: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَنۡظُرُ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ اِلَّا صَيۡحَةً وَّاحِدَةً مَّا لَهَا مِنۡ فَوَاقٍ
quran.english: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا عَجِّلۡ لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبۡلَ يَوۡمِ الۡحِسَابِ
quran.english: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account

quran.arabic: اِصۡبِرۡ عَلٰي مَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ وَاذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا دَاوٗدَ ذَا الۡاَيۡدِۚ اِنَّهٗ٘ اَوَّابٌ
quran.english: Be patient over what they say and remember Our servant, David, the possessor of strength; indeed, he was one who repeatedly turned back [to Allah]

quran.arabic: اِنَّا سَخَّرۡنَا الۡجِبَالَ مَعَهٗ يُسَبِّحۡنَ بِالۡعَشِيِّ وَالۡاِشۡرَاقِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We subjected the mountains [to praise] with him, exalting [Allah] in the [late] afternoon and [after] sunrise

quran.arabic: وَالطَّيۡرَ مَحۡشُوۡرَةًؕ كُلٌّ لَّهٗ٘ اَوَّابٌ
quran.english: And the birds were assembled, all with him repeating [praises]

quran.arabic: وَشَدَدۡنَا مُلۡكَهٗ وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُ الۡحِكۡمَةَ وَفَصۡلَ الۡخِطَابِ
quran.english: And We strengthened his kingdom and gave him wisdom and discernment in speech

quran.arabic: وَهَلۡ اَتٰىكَ نَبَؤُا الۡخَصۡمِۘ اِذۡ تَسَوَّرُوا الۡمِحۡرَابَۙ‏
quran.english: And has there come to you the news of the adversaries, when they climbed over the wall of [his] prayer chamber

quran.arabic: اِذۡ دَخَلُوۡا عَلٰي دَاوٗدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنۡهُمۡ قَالُوۡا لَا تَخَفۡۚ خَصۡمٰنِ بَغٰي بَعۡضُنَا عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ فَاحۡكُمۡ بَيۡنَنَا بِالۡحَقِّ وَلَا تُشۡطِطۡ وَاهۡدِنَا٘ اِلٰي سَوَآءِ الصِّرَاطِ
quran.english: When they entered upon David and he was alarmed by them? They said, "Fear not. [We are] two adversaries, one of whom has wronged the other, so judge between us with truth and do not exceed [it] and guide us to the sound path

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا٘ اَخِيۡࣞ لَهٗ تِسۡعٌ وَّتِسۡعُوۡنَ نَعۡجَةً وَّلِيَ نَعۡجَةٌ وَّاحِدَةٌࣞ فَقَالَ اَكۡفِلۡنِيۡهَا وَعَزَّنِيۡ فِي الۡخِطَابِ
quran.english: Indeed this, my brother, has ninety-nine ewes, and I have one ewe; so he said, 'Entrust her to me,' and he overpowered me in speech

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَقَدۡ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعۡجَتِكَ اِلٰي نِعَاجِهٖؕ وَاِنَّ كَثِيۡرًا مِّنَ الۡخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبۡغِيۡ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَقَلِيۡلٌ مَّا هُمۡؕ وَظَنَّ دَاوٗدُ اَنَّمَا فَتَنّٰهُ فَاسۡتَغۡفَرَ رَبَّهٗ وَخَرَّ رَاكِعًا وَّاَنَابَࣛ‏
quran.english: [David] said, "He has certainly wronged you in demanding your ewe [in addition] to his ewes. And indeed, many associates oppress one another, except for those who believe and do righteous deeds - and few are they." And David became certain that We had tried him, and he asked forgiveness of his Lord and fell down bowing [in prostration] and turned in repentance [to Allah]

quran.arabic: فَغَفَرۡنَا لَهٗ ذٰلِكَؕ وَاِنَّ لَهٗ عِنۡدَنَا لَزُلۡفٰي وَحُسۡنَ مَاٰبٍ
quran.english: So We forgave him that; and indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return

quran.arabic: يٰدَاوٗدُ اِنَّا جَعَلۡنٰكَ خَلِيۡفَةً فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَاحۡكُمۡ بَيۡنَ النَّاسِ بِالۡحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ الۡهَوٰي فَيُضِلَّكَ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يَضِلُّوۡنَ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ شَدِيۡدٌۭ بِمَا نَسُوۡا يَوۡمَ الۡحِسَابِࣖ‏
quran.english: [We said], "O David, indeed We have made you a successor upon the earth, so judge between the people in truth and do not follow [your own] desire, as it will lead you astray from the way of Allah." Indeed, those who go astray from the way of Allah will have a severe punishment for having forgotten the Day of Account

quran.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا السَّمَآءَ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا بَاطِلًاؕ ذٰلِكَ ظَنُّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡاۚ فَوَيۡلٌ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنَ النَّارِؕ‏
quran.english: And We did not create the heaven and the earth and that between them aimlessly. That is the assumption of those who disbelieve, so woe to those who disbelieve from the Fire

quran.arabic: اَمۡ نَجۡعَلُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ كَالۡمُفۡسِدِيۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِؗ اَمۡ نَجۡعَلُ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ كَالۡفُجَّارِ
quran.english: Or should we treat those who believe and do righteous deeds like corrupters in the land? Or should We treat those who fear Allah like the wicked

quran.arabic: كِتٰبٌ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ اِلَيۡكَ مُبٰرَكٌ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوۡ٘ا اٰيٰتِهٖ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ اُولُوا الۡاَلۡبَابِ
quran.english: [This is] a blessed Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], that they might reflect upon its verses and that those of understanding would be reminded

quran.arabic: وَوَهَبۡنَا لِدَاوٗدَ سُلَيۡمٰنَؕ نِعۡمَ الۡعَبۡدُؕ اِنَّهٗ٘ اَوَّابٌؕ‏
quran.english: And to David We gave Solomon. An excellent servant, indeed he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allah]

quran.arabic: اِذۡ عُرِضَ عَلَيۡهِ بِالۡعَشِيِّ الصّٰفِنٰتُ الۡجِيَادُۙ‏
quran.english: [Mention] when there were exhibited before him in the afternoon the poised [standing] racehorses

quran.arabic: فَقَالَ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَحۡبَبۡتُ حُبَّ الۡخَيۡرِ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِ رَبِّيۡۚ حَتّٰي تَوَارَتۡ بِالۡحِجَابِࣞ‏
quran.english: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until the sun disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]

quran.arabic: رُدُّوۡهَا عَلَيَّؕ فَطَفِقَ مَسۡحًاۭ بِالسُّوۡقِ وَالۡاَعۡنَاقِ
quran.english: [He said], "Return them to me," and set about striking [their] legs and necks

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ فَتَنَّا سُلَيۡمٰنَ وَاَلۡقَيۡنَا عَلٰي كُرۡسِيِّهٖ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ اَنَابَ
quran.english: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اغۡفِرۡ لِيۡ وَهَبۡ لِيۡ مُلۡكًا لَّا يَنۭۡ بَغِيۡ لِاَحَدٍ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِيۡۚ اِنَّكَ اَنۡتَ الۡوَهَّابُ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower

quran.arabic: فَسَخَّرۡنَا لَهُ الرِّيۡحَ تَجۡرِيۡ بِاَمۡرِهٖ رُخَآءً حَيۡثُ اَصَابَۙ‏
quran.english: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed

quran.arabic: وَالشَّيٰطِيۡنَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءٍ وَّغَوَّاصٍۙ‏
quran.english: And [also] the devils [of jinn] - every builder and diver

quran.arabic: وَّاٰخَرِيۡنَ مُقَرَّنِيۡنَ فِي الۡاَصۡفَادِ
quran.english: And others bound together in shackles

quran.arabic: هٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَامۡنُنۡ اَوۡ اَمۡسِكۡ بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٍ
quran.english: [We said], "This is Our gift, so grant or withhold without account

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ لَهٗ عِنۡدَنَا لَزُلۡفٰي وَحُسۡنَ مَاٰبٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا٘ اَيُّوۡبَۘ اِذۡ نَادٰي رَبَّهٗ٘ اَنِّيۡ مَسَّنِيَ الشَّيۡطٰنُ بِنُصۡبٍ وَّعَذَابٍؕ‏
quran.english: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment

quran.arabic: اُرۡكُضۡ بِرِجۡلِكَۚ هٰذَا مُغۡتَسَلٌۭ بَارِدٌ وَّشَرَابٌ
quran.english: [So he was told], "Strike [the ground] with your foot; this is a [spring for] a cool bath and drink

quran.arabic: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهٗ٘ اَهۡلَهٗ وَمِثۡلَهُمۡ مَّعَهُمۡ رَحۡمَةً مِّنَّا وَذِكۡرٰي لِاُولِي الۡاَلۡبَابِ
quran.english: And We granted him his family and a like [number] with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for those of understanding

quran.arabic: وَخُذۡ بِيَدِكَ ضِغۡثًا فَاضۡرِبۡ بِّهٖ وَلَا تَحۡنَثۡؕ اِنَّا وَجَدۡنٰهُ صَابِرًاؕ نِعۡمَ الۡعَبۡدُؕ اِنَّهٗ٘ اَوَّابٌ
quran.english: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allah]

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ عِبٰدَنَا٘ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَاِسۡحٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوۡبَ اُولِي الۡاَيۡدِيۡ وَالۡاَبۡصَارِ
quran.english: And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob - those of strength and [religious] vision

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَخۡلَصۡنٰهُمۡ بِخَالِصَةٍ ذِكۡرَي الدَّارِۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We chose them for an exclusive quality: remembrance of the home [of the Hereafter]

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهُمۡ عِنۡدَنَا لَمِنَ الۡمُصۡطَفَيۡنَ الۡاَخۡيَارِؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed they are, to Us, among the chosen and outstanding

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ اِسۡمٰعِيۡلَ وَالۡيَسَعَ وَذَا الۡكِفۡلِؕ وَكُلٌّ مِّنَ الۡاَخۡيَارِؕ‏
quran.english: And remember Ishmael, Elisha and Dhul-Kifl, and all are among the outstanding

quran.arabic: هٰذَا ذِكۡرٌؕ وَاِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ لَحُسۡنَ مَاٰبٍۙ‏
quran.english: This is a reminder. And indeed, for the righteous is a good place of return

quran.arabic: جَنّٰتِ عَدۡنٍ مُّفَتَّحَةً لَّهُمُ الۡاَبۡوَابُۚ‏
quran.english: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them

quran.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٕيۡنَ فِيۡهَا يَدۡعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا بِفَاكِهَةٍ كَثِيۡرَةٍ وَّشَرَابٍ
quran.english: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink

quran.arabic: وَعِنۡدَهُمۡ قٰصِرٰتُ الطَّرۡفِ اَتۡرَابٌ
quran.english: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances and of equal age

quran.arabic: هٰذَا مَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ لِيَوۡمِ الۡحِسَابِࣚ‏
quran.english: This is what you, [the righteous], are promised for the Day of Account

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا لَرِزۡقُنَا مَا لَهٗ مِنۡ نَّفَادٍۚۖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, this is Our provision; for it there is no depletion

quran.arabic: هٰذَاؕ وَاِنَّ لِلطّٰغِيۡنَ لَشَرَّ مَاٰبٍۙ‏
quran.english: This [is so]. But indeed, for the transgressors is an evil place of return

quran.arabic: جَهَنَّمَۚ يَصۡلَوۡنَهَاۚ فَبِئۡسَ الۡمِهَادُ
quran.english: Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the resting place

quran.arabic: هٰذَاۙ فَلۡيَذُوۡقُوۡهُ حَمِيۡمٌ وَّغَسَّاقٌۙ‏
quran.english: This - so let them taste it - is scalding water and [foul] purulence

quran.arabic: وَّاٰخَرُ مِنۡ شَكۡلِهٖ٘ اَزۡوَاجٌؕ‏
quran.english: And other [punishments] of its type [in various] kinds

quran.arabic: هٰذَا فَوۡجٌ مُّقۡتَحِمٌ مَّعَكُمۡۚ لَا مَرۡحَبًاۭ بِهِمۡؕ اِنَّهُمۡ صَالُوا النَّارِ
quran.english: [Its inhabitants will say], "This is a company bursting in with you. No welcome for them. Indeed, they will burn in the Fire

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا بَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡࣞ لَا مَرۡحَبًاۭ بِكُمۡؕ اَنۡتُمۡ قَدَّمۡتُمُوۡهُ لَنَاۚ فَبِئۡسَ الۡقَرَارُ
quran.english: They will say, "Nor you! No welcome for you. You, [our leaders], brought this upon us, and wretched is the settlement

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا مَنۡ قَدَّمَ لَنَا هٰذَا فَزِدۡهُ عَذَابًا ضِعۡفًا فِي النَّارِ
quran.english: They will say, "Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us - increase for him double punishment in the Fire

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا مَا لَنَا لَا نَرٰي رِجَالًا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَشۡرَارِؕ‏
quran.english: And they will say, "Why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst

quran.arabic: اَتَّخَذۡنٰهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّا اَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ الۡاَبۡصَارُ
quran.english: Is it [because] we took them in ridicule, or has [our] vision turned away from them

quran.arabic: اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ لَحَقٌّ تَخَاصُمُ اَهۡلِ النَّارِࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, that is truth - the quarreling of the people of the Fire

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّمَا٘ اَنَا مُنۡذِرٌࣗۖ وَّمَا مِنۡ اِلٰهٍ اِلَّا اللّٰهُ الۡوَاحِدُ الۡقَهَّارُۚ‏
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allah, the One, the Prevailing

quran.arabic: رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡغَفَّارُ
quran.english: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver

quran.arabic: قُلۡ هُوَ نَبَؤٌا عَظِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "It is great news

quran.arabic: اَنۡتُمۡ عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضُوۡنَ
quran.english: From which you turn away

quran.arabic: مَا كَانَ لِيَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۭ بِالۡمَلَاِ الۡاَعۡلٰ٘ي اِذۡ يَخۡتَصِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: I had no knowledge of the exalted assembly [of angels] when they were disputing [the creation of Adam]

quran.arabic: اِنۡ يُّوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيَّ اِلَّا٘ اَنَّمَا٘ اَنَا نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: It has not been revealed to me except that I am a clear warner

quran.arabic: اِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلٰٓئِكَةِ اِنِّيۡ خَالِقٌۭ بَشَرًا مِّنۡ طِيۡنٍ
quran.english: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهٗ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيۡهِ مِنۡ رُّوۡحِيۡ فَقَعُوۡا لَهٗ سٰجِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration

quran.arabic: فَسَجَدَ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ اَجۡمَعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely

quran.arabic: اِلَّا٘ اِبۡلِيۡسَؕ اِسۡتَكۡبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰ٘اِبۡلِيۡسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ اَنۡ تَسۡجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقۡتُ بِيَدَيَّؕ اَسۡتَكۡبَرۡتَ اَمۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الۡعَالِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Allah] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَنَا خَيۡرٌ مِّنۡهُؕ خَلَقۡتَنِيۡ مِنۡ نَّارٍ وَّخَلَقۡتَهٗ مِنۡ طِيۡنٍ
quran.english: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَاخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَاِنَّكَ رَجِيۡمٌۖۙ‏
quran.english: [Allah] said, "Then get out of Paradise, for indeed, you are expelled

quran.arabic: وَّاِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ لَعۡنَتِيۡ٘ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الدِّيۡنِ
quran.english: And indeed, upon you is My curse until the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَاَنۡظِرۡنِيۡ٘ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَاِنَّكَ مِنَ الۡمُنۡظَرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

quran.arabic: اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡوَقۡتِ الۡمَعۡلُوۡمِ
quran.english: Until the Day of the time well-known

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَاُغۡوِيَنَّهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Iblees] said, "By your might, I will surely mislead them all

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ الۡمُخۡلَصِيۡنَ
quran.english: Except, among them, Your chosen servants

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَالۡحَقُّؗ وَالۡحَقَّ اَقُوۡلُۚ‏
quran.english: [Allah] said, "The truth [is My oath], and the truth I say

quran.arabic: لَاَمۡلَـَٔنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنۡكَ وَمِمَّنۡ تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَ
quran.english: [That] I will surely fill Hell with you and those of them that follow you all together

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَا٘ اَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍ وَّمَا٘ اَنَا مِنَ الۡمُتَكَلِّفِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "I do not ask you for the Qur'an any payment, and I am not of the pretentious

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا ذِكۡرٌ لِّلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: It is but a reminder to the worlds

quran.arabic: وَلَتَعۡلَمُنَّ نَبَاَهٗ بَعۡدَ حِيۡنٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And you will surely know [the truth of] its information after a time

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلُ الۡكِتٰبِ مِنَ اللّٰهِ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡحَكِيۡمِ
quran.english: The revelation of the Qur'an is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ الۡكِتٰبَ بِالۡحَقِّ فَاعۡبُدِ اللّٰهَ مُخۡلِصًا لَّهُ الدِّيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have sent down to you the Book, [O Muhammad], in truth. So worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion

quran.arabic: اَلَا لِلّٰهِ الدِّيۡنُ الۡخَالِصُؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اَوۡلِيَآءَۘ مَا نَعۡبُدُهُمۡ اِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُوۡنَا٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِ زُلۡفٰيؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ فِيۡ مَا هُمۡ فِيۡهِ يَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ ࣢ؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ هُوَ كٰذِبٌ كَفَّارٌ
quran.english: Unquestionably, for Allah is the pure religion. And those who take protectors besides Him [say], "We only worship them that they may bring us nearer to Allah in position." Indeed, Allah will judge between them concerning that over which they differ. Indeed, Allah does not guide he who is a liar and [confirmed] disbeliever

quran.arabic: لَوۡ اَرَادَ اللّٰهُ اَنۡ يَّتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا لَّاصۡطَفٰي مِمَّا يَخۡلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُۙ سُبۡحٰنَهٗؕ هُوَ اللّٰهُ الۡوَاحِدُ الۡقَهَّارُ
quran.english: If Allah had intended to take a son, He could have chosen from what He creates whatever He willed. Exalted is He; He is Allah, the One, the Prevailing

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ بِالۡحَقِّۚ يُكَوِّرُ الَّيۡلَ عَلَي النَّهَارِ وَيُكَوِّرُ النَّهَارَ عَلَي الَّيۡلِ وَسَخَّرَ الشَّمۡسَ وَالۡقَمَرَؕ كُلٌّ يَّجۡرِيۡ لِاَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيؕ اَلَا هُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡغَفَّارُ
quran.english: He created the heavens and earth in truth. He wraps the night over the day and wraps the day over the night and has subjected the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term. Unquestionably, He is the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver

quran.arabic: خَلَقَكُمۡ مِّنۡ نَّفۡسٍ وَّاحِدَةٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنۡهَا زَوۡجَهَا وَاَنۡزَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَنۡعَامِ ثَمٰنِيَةَ اَزۡوَاجٍؕ يَخۡلُقُكُمۡ فِيۡ بُطُوۡنِ اُمَّهٰتِكُمۡ خَلۡقًا مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِ خَلۡقٍ فِيۡ ظُلُمٰتٍ ثَلٰثٍؕ ذٰلِكُمُ اللّٰهُ رَبُّكُمۡ لَهُ الۡمُلۡكُؕ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَۚ فَاَنّٰي تُصۡرَفُوۡنَ
quran.english: He created you from one soul. Then He made from it its mate, and He produced for you from the grazing livestock eight mates. He creates you in the wombs of your mothers, creation after creation, within three darknesses. That is Allah, your Lord; to Him belongs dominion. There is no deity except Him, so how are you averted

quran.arabic: اِنۡ تَكۡفُرُوۡا فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَنِيٌّ عَنۡكُمۡࣞ وَلَا يَرۡضٰي لِعِبَادِهِ الۡكُفۡرَۚ وَاِنۡ تَشۡكُرُوۡا يَرۡضَهُ لَكُمۡؕ وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِّزۡرَ اُخۡرٰيؕ ثُمَّ اِلٰي رَبِّكُمۡ مَّرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَيُنَبِّئُكُمۡ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَؕ اِنَّهٗ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُوۡرِ
quran.english: If you disbelieve - indeed, Allah is Free from need of you. And He does not approve for His servants disbelief. And if you are grateful, He approves it for you; and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, and He will inform you about what you used to do. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا مَسَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ ضُرٌّ دَعَا رَبَّهٗ مُنِيۡبًا اِلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ اِذَا خَوَّلَهٗ نِعۡمَةً مِّنۡهُ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلّٰهِ اَنۡدَادًا لِّيُضِلَّ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِهٖؕ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيۡلًاࣗۖ اِنَّكَ مِنۡ اَصۡحٰبِ النَّارِ
quran.english: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon his Lord, turning to Him [alone]; then when He bestows on him a favor from Himself, he forgets Him whom he called upon before, and he attributes to Allah equals to mislead [people] from His way. Say, "Enjoy your disbelief for a little; indeed, you are of the companions of the Fire

quran.arabic: اَمَّنۡ هُوَ قَانِتٌ اٰنَآءَ الَّيۡلِ سَاجِدًا وَّقَآئِمًا يَّحۡذَرُ الۡاٰخِرَةَ وَيَرۡجُوۡا رَحۡمَةَ رَبِّهٖؕ قُلۡ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِي الَّذِيۡنَ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ وَالَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَؕ اِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ اُولُوا الۡاَلۡبَابِࣖ‏
quran.english: Is one who is devoutly obedient during periods of the night, prostrating and standing [in prayer], fearing the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord, [like one who does not]? Say, "Are those who know equal to those who do not know?" Only they will remember [who are] people of understanding

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يٰعِبَادِ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اتَّقُوۡا رَبَّكُمۡؕ لِلَّذِيۡنَ اَحۡسَنُوۡا فِيۡ هٰذِهِ الدُّنۡيَا حَسَنَةٌؕ وَاَرۡضُ اللّٰهِ وَاسِعَةٌؕ اِنَّمَا يُوَفَّي الصّٰبِرُوۡنَ اَجۡرَهُمۡ بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٍ
quran.english: Say, "O My servants who have believed, fear your Lord. For those who do good in this world is good, and the earth of Allah is spacious. Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنِّيۡ٘ اُمِرۡتُ اَنۡ اَعۡبُدَ اللّٰهَ مُخۡلِصًا لَّهُ الدِّيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, I have been commanded to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion

quran.arabic: وَاُمِرۡتُ لِاَنۡ اَكُوۡنَ اَوَّلَ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And I have been commanded to be the first [among you] of the Muslims

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ اِنۡ عَصَيۡتُ رَبِّيۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Say, "Indeed I fear, if I should disobey my Lord, the punishment of a tremendous Day

quran.arabic: قُلِ اللّٰهَ اَعۡبُدُ مُخۡلِصًا لَّهٗ دِيۡنِيۡۚۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "Allah [alone] do I worship, sincere to Him in my religion

quran.arabic: فَاعۡبُدُوۡا مَا شِئۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِهٖؕ قُلۡ اِنَّ الۡخٰسِرِيۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ خَسِرُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ وَاَهۡلِيۡهِمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ اَلَا ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الۡخُسۡرَانُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: So worship what you will besides Him." Say, "Indeed, the losers are the ones who will lose themselves and their families on the Day of Resurrection. Unquestionably, that is the manifest loss

quran.arabic: لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ فَوۡقِهِمۡ ظُلَلٌ مِّنَ النَّارِ وَمِنۡ تَحۡتِهِمۡ ظُلَلٌؕ ذٰلِكَ يُخَوِّفُ اللّٰهُ بِهٖ عِبَادَهٗؕ يٰعِبَادِ فَاتَّقُوۡنِ
quran.english: They will have canopies of fire above them and below them, canopies. By that Allah threatens His servants. O My servants, then fear Me

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اجۡتَنَبُوا الطَّاغُوۡتَ اَنۡ يَّعۡبُدُوۡهَا وَاَنَابُوۡ٘ا اِلَي اللّٰهِ لَهُمُ الۡبُشۡرٰيۚ فَبَشِّرۡ عِبَادِۙ‏
quran.english: But those who have avoided Taghut, lest they worship it, and turned back to Allah - for them are good tidings. So give good tidings to My servants

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يَسۡتَمِعُوۡنَ الۡقَوۡلَ فَيَتَّبِعُوۡنَ اَحۡسَنَهٗؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ هَدٰىهُمُ اللّٰهُ وَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمۡ اُولُوا الۡاَلۡبَابِ
quran.english: Who listen to speech and follow the best of it. Those are the ones Allah has guided, and those are people of understanding

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ حَقَّ عَلَيۡهِ كَلِمَةُ الۡعَذَابِؕ اَفَاَنۡتَ تُنۡقِذُ مَنۡ فِي النَّارِۚ‏
quran.english: Then, is one who has deserved the decree of punishment [to be guided]? Then, can you save one who is in the Fire

quran.arabic: لٰكِنِ الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوۡا رَبَّهُمۡ لَهُمۡ غُرَفٌ مِّنۡ فَوۡقِهَا غُرَفٌ مَّبۡنِيَّةٌۙ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ ࣢ؕ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِؕ لَا يُخۡلِفُ اللّٰهُ الۡمِيۡعَادَ
quran.english: But those who have feared their Lord - for them are chambers, above them chambers built high, beneath which rivers flow. [This is] the promise of Allah. Allah does not fail in [His] promise

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ اَنۡزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَسَلَكَهٗ يَنَابِيۡعَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ ثُمَّ يُخۡرِجُ بِهٖ زَرۡعًا مُّخۡتَلِفًا اَلۡوَانُهٗ ثُمَّ يَهِيۡجُ فَتَرٰىهُ مُصۡفَرًّا ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهٗ حُطَامًاؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرٰي لِاُولِي الۡاَلۡبَابِࣖ‏
quran.english: Do you not see that Allah sends down rain from the sky and makes it flow as springs [and rivers] in the earth; then He produces thereby crops of varying colors; then they dry and you see them turned yellow; then He makes them [scattered] debris. Indeed in that is a reminder for those of understanding

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ شَرَحَ اللّٰهُ صَدۡرَهٗ لِلۡاِسۡلَامِ فَهُوَ عَلٰي نُوۡرٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهٖؕ فَوَيۡلٌ لِّلۡقٰسِيَةِ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡ مِّنۡ ذِكۡرِ اللّٰهِؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: So is one whose breast Allah has expanded to [accept] Islam and he is upon a light from his Lord [like one whose heart rejects it]? Then woe to those whose hearts are hardened against the remembrance of Allah. Those are in manifest error

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ نَزَّلَ اَحۡسَنَ الۡحَدِيۡثِ كِتٰبًا مُّتَشَابِهًا مَّثَانِيَ تَقۡشَعِرُّ مِنۡهُ جُلُوۡدُ الَّذِيۡنَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡۚ ثُمَّ تَلِيۡنُ جُلُوۡدُهُمۡ وَقُلُوۡبُهُمۡ اِلٰي ذِكۡرِ اللّٰهِؕ ذٰلِكَ هُدَي اللّٰهِ يَهۡدِيۡ بِهٖ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَمَنۡ يُّضۡلِلِ اللّٰهُ فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ هَادٍ
quran.english: Allah has sent down the best statement: a consistent Book wherein is reiteration. The skins shiver therefrom of those who fear their Lord; then their skins and their hearts relax at the remembrance of Allah. That is the guidance of Allah by which He guides whom He wills. And one whom Allah leaves astray - for him there is no guide

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ يَّتَّقِيۡ بِوَجۡهِهٖ سُوۡٓءَ الۡعَذَابِ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ وَقِيۡلَ لِلظّٰلِمِيۡنَ ذُوۡقُوۡا مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَكۡسِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then is he who will shield with his face the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection [like one secure from it]? And it will be said to the wrongdoers, "Taste what you used to earn

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَاَتٰىهُمُ الۡعَذَابُ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those before them denied, and punishment came upon them from where they did not perceive

quran.arabic: فَاَذَاقَهُمُ اللّٰهُ الۡخِزۡيَ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاۚ وَلَعَذَابُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ اَكۡبَرُۘ لَوۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: So Allah made them taste disgrace in worldly life. But the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ ضَرَبۡنَا لِلنَّاسِ فِيۡ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنِ مِنۡ كُلِّ مَثَلٍ لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We have certainly presented for the people in this Qur'an from every [kind of] example - that they might remember

quran.arabic: قُرۡاٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا غَيۡرَ ذِيۡ عِوَجٍ لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: [It is] an Arabic Qur'an, without any deviance that they might become righteous

quran.arabic: ضَرَبَ اللّٰهُ مَثَلًا رَّجُلًا فِيۡهِ شُرَكَآءُ مُتَشَاكِسُوۡنَ وَرَجُلًا سَلَمًا لِّرَجُلٍؕ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيٰنِ مَثَلًاؕ اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِؕ بَلۡ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah presents an example: a slave owned by quarreling partners and another belonging exclusively to one man - are they equal in comparison? Praise be to Allah! But most of them do not know

quran.arabic: اِنَّكَ مَيِّتٌ وَّاِنَّهُمۡ مَّيِّتُوۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: Indeed, you are to die, and indeed, they are to die

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّكُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ عِنۡدَ رَبِّكُمۡ تَخۡتَصِمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, before your Lord, will dispute

quran.arabic: فَمَنۡ اَظۡلَمُ مِمَّنۡ كَذَبَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ وَكَذَّبَ بِالصِّدۡقِ اِذۡ جَآءَهٗؕ اَلَيۡسَ فِيۡ جَهَنَّمَ مَثۡوًي لِّلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: So who is more unjust than one who lies about Allah and denies the truth when it has come to him? Is there not in Hell a residence for the disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ جَآءَ بِالصِّدۡقِ وَصَدَّقَ بِهٖ٘ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡمُتَّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the one who has brought the truth and [they who] believed in it - those are the righteous

quran.arabic: لَهُمۡ مَّا يَشَآءُوۡنَ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡؕ ذٰلِكَ جَزٰٓؤُا الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: They will have whatever they desire with their Lord. That is the reward of the doers of good

quran.arabic: لِيُكَفِّرَ اللّٰهُ عَنۡهُمۡ اَسۡوَاَ الَّذِيۡ عَمِلُوۡا وَيَجۡزِيَهُمۡ اَجۡرَهُمۡ بِاَحۡسَنِ الَّذِيۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: That Allah may remove from them the worst of what they did and reward them their due for the best of what they used to do

quran.arabic: اَلَيۡسَ اللّٰهُ بِكَافٍ عَبۡدَهٗؕ وَيُخَوِّفُوۡنَكَ بِالَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖؕ وَمَنۡ يُّضۡلِلِ اللّٰهُ فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ هَادٍۚ‏
quran.english: Is not Allah sufficient for His Servant [Prophet Muhammad]? And [yet], they threaten you with those [they worship] other than Him. And whoever Allah leaves astray - for him there is no guide

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّهۡدِ اللّٰهُ فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ مُّضِلٍّؕ اَلَيۡسَ اللّٰهُ بِعَزِيۡزٍ ذِي انۡتِقَامٍ
quran.english: And whoever Allah guides - for him there is no misleader. Is not Allah Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ سَاَلۡتَهُمۡ مَّنۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ لَيَقُوۡلُنَّ اللّٰهُؕ قُلۡ اَفَرَءَيۡتُمۡ مَّا تَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اِنۡ اَرَادَنِيَ اللّٰهُ بِضُرٍّ هَلۡ هُنَّ كٰشِفٰتُ ضُرِّهٖ٘ اَوۡ اَرَادَنِيۡ بِرَحۡمَةٍ هَلۡ هُنَّ مُمۡسِكٰتُ رَحۡمَتِهٖؕ قُلۡ حَسۡبِيَ اللّٰهُؕ عَلَيۡهِ يَتَوَكَّلُ الۡمُتَوَكِّلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if you asked them, "Who created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "Allah." Say, "Then have you considered what you invoke besides Allah? If Allah intended me harm, are they removers of His harm; or if He intended me mercy, are they withholders of His mercy?" Say, "Sufficient for me is Allah; upon Him [alone] rely the [wise] reliers

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يٰقَوۡمِ اعۡمَلُوۡا عَلٰي مَكَانَتِكُمۡ اِنِّيۡ عَامِلٌۚ فَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "O my people, work according to your position, [for] indeed, I am working; and you are going to know

quran.arabic: مَنۡ يَّاۡتِيۡهِ عَذَابٌ يُّخۡزِيۡهِ وَيَحِلُّ عَلَيۡهِ عَذَابٌ مُّقِيۡمٌ
quran.english: To whom will come a torment disgracing him and on whom will descend an enduring punishment

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ الۡكِتٰبَ لِلنَّاسِ بِالۡحَقِّۚ فَمَنِ اهۡتَدٰي فَلِنَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ ضَلَّ فَاِنَّمَا يَضِلُّ عَلَيۡهَاۚ وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِوَكِيۡلٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We sent down to you the Book for the people in truth. So whoever is guided - it is for [the benefit of] his soul; and whoever goes astray only goes astray to its detriment. And you are not a manager over them

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ يَتَوَفَّي الۡاَنۡفُسَ حِيۡنَ مَوۡتِهَا وَالَّتِيۡ لَمۡ تَمُتۡ فِيۡ مَنَامِهَاۚ فَيُمۡسِكُ الَّتِيۡ قَضٰي عَلَيۡهَا الۡمَوۡتَ وَيُرۡسِلُ الۡاُخۡرٰ٘ي اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّتَفَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah takes the souls at the time of their death, and those that do not die [He takes] during their sleep. Then He keeps those for which He has decreed death and releases the others for a specified term. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought

quran.arabic: اَمِ اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ شُفَعَآءَؕ قُلۡ اَوَلَوۡ كَانُوۡا لَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا يَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or have they taken other than Allah as intercessors? Say, "Even though they do not possess [power over] anything, nor do they reason

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لِّلّٰهِ الشَّفَاعَةُ جَمِيۡعًاؕ لَهٗ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ ثُمَّ اِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "To Allah belongs [the right to allow] intercession entirely. To Him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. Then to Him you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا ذُكِرَ اللّٰهُ وَحۡدَهُ اشۡمَاَزَّتۡ قُلُوۡبُ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِۚ وَاِذَا ذُكِرَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اِذَا هُمۡ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when Allah is mentioned alone, the hearts of those who do not believe in the Hereafter shrink with aversion, but when those [worshipped] other than Him are mentioned, immediately they rejoice

quran.arabic: قُلِ اللّٰهُمَّ فَاطِرَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ عٰلِمَ الۡغَيۡبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ اَنۡتَ تَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَ عِبَادِكَ فِيۡ مَا كَانُوۡا فِيۡهِ يَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "O Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, You will judge between your servants concerning that over which they used to differ

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ اَنَّ لِلَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا مَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ جَمِيۡعًا وَّمِثۡلَهٗ مَعَهٗ لَافۡتَدَوۡا بِهٖ مِنۡ سُوۡٓءِ الۡعَذَابِ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ وَبَدَا لَهُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ مَا لَمۡ يَكُوۡنُوۡا يَحۡتَسِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if those who did wrong had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it, they would [attempt to] ransom themselves thereby from the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection. And there will appear to them from Allah that which they had not taken into account

quran.arabic: وَبَدَا لَهُمۡ سَيِّاٰتُ مَا كَسَبُوۡا وَحَاقَ بِهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَ
quran.english: And there will appear to them the evils they had earned, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا مَسَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ ضُرٌّ دَعَانَاؗ ثُمَّ اِذَا خَوَّلۡنٰهُ نِعۡمَةً مِّنَّاۙ قَالَ اِنَّمَا٘ اُوۡتِيۡتُهٗ عَلٰي عِلۡمٍؕ بَلۡ هِيَ فِتۡنَةٌ وَّلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon Us; then when We bestow on him a favor from Us, he says, "I have only been given it because of [my] knowledge." Rather, it is a trial, but most of them do not know

quran.arabic: قَدۡ قَالَهَا الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَمَا٘ اَغۡنٰي عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَكۡسِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those before them had already said it, but they were not availed by what they used to earn

quran.arabic: فَاَصَابَهُمۡ سَيِّاٰتُ مَا كَسَبُوۡاؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا مِنۡ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ سَيُصِيۡبُهُمۡ سَيِّاٰتُ مَا كَسَبُوۡاۙ وَمَا هُمۡ بِمُعۡجِزِيۡنَ
quran.english: And the evil consequences of what they earned struck them. And those who have wronged of these [people] will be afflicted by the evil consequences of what they earned; and they will not cause failure

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَقۡدِرُؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Do they not know that Allah extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يٰعِبَادِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَسۡرَفُوۡا عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ لَا تَقۡنَطُوۡا مِنۡ رَّحۡمَةِ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَغۡفِرُ الذُّنُوۡبَ جَمِيۡعًاؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡغَفُوۡرُ الرَّحِيۡمُ
quran.english: Say, "O My servants who have transgressed against themselves [by sinning], do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed, Allah forgives all sins. Indeed, it is He who is the Forgiving, the Merciful

quran.arabic: وَاَنِيۡبُوۡ٘ا اِلٰي رَبِّكُمۡ وَاَسۡلِمُوۡا لَهٗ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَكُمُ الۡعَذَابُ ثُمَّ لَا تُنۡصَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And return [in repentance] to your Lord and submit to Him before the punishment comes upon you; then you will not be helped

quran.arabic: وَاتَّبِعُوۡ٘ا اَحۡسَنَ مَا٘ اُنۡزِلَ اِلَيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكُمۡ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَكُمُ الۡعَذَابُ بَغۡتَةً وَّاَنۡتُمۡ لَا تَشۡعُرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And follow the best of what was revealed to you from your Lord before the punishment comes upon you suddenly while you do not perceive

quran.arabic: اَنۡ تَقُوۡلَ نَفۡسٌ يّٰحَسۡرَتٰي عَلٰي مَا فَرَّطۡتُّ فِيۡ جَنۭۡ بِ اللّٰهِ وَاِنۡ كُنۡتُ لَمِنَ السّٰخِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Lest a soul should say, "Oh [how great is] my regret over what I neglected in regard to Allah and that I was among the mockers

quran.arabic: اَوۡ تَقُوۡلَ لَوۡ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ هَدٰىنِيۡ لَكُنۡتُ مِنَ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Or [lest] it say, "If only Allah had guided me, I would have been among the righteous

quran.arabic: اَوۡ تَقُوۡلَ حِيۡنَ تَرَي الۡعَذَابَ لَوۡ اَنَّ لِيۡ كَرَّةً فَاَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Or [lest] it say when it sees the punishment, "If only I had another turn so I could be among the doers of good

quran.arabic: بَلٰي قَدۡ جَآءَتۡكَ اٰيٰتِيۡ فَكَذَّبۡتَ بِهَا وَاسۡتَكۡبَرۡتَ وَكُنۡتَ مِنَ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: But yes, there had come to you My verses, but you denied them and were arrogant, and you were among the disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ تَرَي الَّذِيۡنَ كَذَبُوۡا عَلَي اللّٰهِ وُجُوۡهُهُمۡ مُّسۡوَدَّةٌؕ اَلَيۡسَ فِيۡ جَهَنَّمَ مَثۡوًي لِّلۡمُتَكَبِّرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And on the Day of Resurrection you will see those who lied about Allah [with] their faces blackened. Is there not in Hell a residence for the arrogant

quran.arabic: وَيُنَجِّي اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوۡا بِمَفَازَتِهِمۡؗ لَا يَمَسُّهُمُ السُّوۡٓءُ وَلَا هُمۡ يَحۡزَنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Allah will save those who feared Him by their attainment; no evil will touch them, nor will they grieve

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍؗ وَّهُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ وَّكِيۡلٌ
quran.english: Allah is the Creator of all things, and He is, over all things, Disposer of affairs

quran.arabic: لَهٗ مَقَالِيۡدُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡخٰسِرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: To Him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth. And they who disbelieve in the verses of Allah - it is those who are the losers

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَفَغَيۡرَ اللّٰهِ تَاۡمُرُوۡٓنِّيۡ٘ اَعۡبُدُ اَيُّهَا الۡجٰهِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Is it other than Allah that you order me to worship, O ignorant ones

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اُوۡحِيَ اِلَيۡكَ وَاِلَي الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَۚ لَئِنۡ اَشۡرَكۡتَ لَيَحۡبَطَنَّ عَمَلُكَ وَلَتَكُوۡنَنَّ مِنَ الۡخٰسِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And it was already revealed to you and to those before you that if you should associate [anything] with Allah, your work would surely become worthless, and you would surely be among the losers

quran.arabic: بَلِ اللّٰهَ فَاعۡبُدۡ وَكُنۡ مِّنَ الشّٰكِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, worship [only] Allah and be among the grateful

quran.arabic: وَمَا قَدَرُوا اللّٰهَ حَقَّ قَدۡرِهٖࣗۖ وَالۡاَرۡضُ جَمِيۡعًا قَبۡضَتُهٗ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ وَالسَّمٰوٰتُ مَطۡوِيّٰتٌۭ بِيَمِيۡنِهٖؕ سُبۡحٰنَهٗ وَتَعٰلٰي عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: They have not appraised Allah with true appraisal, while the earth entirely will be [within] His grip on the Day of Resurrection, and the heavens will be folded in His right hand. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him

quran.arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّوۡرِ فَصَعِقَ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَنۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ اِلَّا مَنۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُؕ ثُمَّ نُفِخَ فِيۡهِ اُخۡرٰي فَاِذَا هُمۡ قِيَامٌ يَّنۡظُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will fall dead except whom Allah wills. Then it will be blown again, and at once they will be standing, looking on

quran.arabic: وَاَشۡرَقَتِ الۡاَرۡضُ بِنُوۡرِ رَبِّهَا وَوُضِعَ الۡكِتٰبُ وَجِايۡٓءَ بِالنَّبِيّٖنَ وَالشُّهَدَآءِ وَقُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the earth will shine with the light of its Lord, and the record [of deeds] will be placed, and the prophets and the witnesses will be brought, and it will be judged between them in truth, and they will not be wronged

quran.arabic: وَوُفِّيَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٍ مَّا عَمِلَتۡ وَهُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And every soul will be fully compensated [for] what it did; and He is most knowing of what they do

quran.arabic: وَسِيۡقَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اِلٰي جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا جَآءُوۡهَا فُتِحَتۡ اَبۡوَابُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا٘ اَلَمۡ يَاۡتِكُمۡ رُسُلٌ مِّنۡكُمۡ يَتۡلُوۡنَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ اٰيٰتِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَيُنۡذِرُوۡنَكُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ هٰذَاؕ قَالُوۡا بَلٰي وَلٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ الۡعَذَابِ عَلَي الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And those who disbelieved will be driven to Hell in groups until, when they reach it, its gates are opened and its keepers will say, "Did there not come to you messengers from yourselves, reciting to you the verses of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this Day of yours?" They will say, "Yes, but the word of punishment has come into effect upon the disbelievers

quran.arabic: قِيۡلَ ادۡخُلُوۡ٘ا اَبۡوَابَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاۚ فَبِئۡسَ مَثۡوَي الۡمُتَكَبِّرِيۡنَ
quran.english: [To them] it will be said, "Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant

quran.arabic: وَسِيۡقَ الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوۡا رَبَّهُمۡ اِلَي الۡجَنَّةِ زُمَرًاؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا جَآءُوۡهَا وَفُتِحَتۡ اَبۡوَابُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ طِبۡتُمۡ فَادۡخُلُوۡهَا خٰلِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: But those who feared their Lord will be driven to Paradise in groups until, when they reach it while its gates have been opened and its keepers say, "Peace be upon you; you have become pure; so enter it to abide eternally therein," [they will enter]

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوا الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ صَدَقَنَا وَعۡدَهٗ وَاَوۡرَثَنَا الۡاَرۡضَ نَتَبَوَّاُ مِنَ الۡجَنَّةِ حَيۡثُ نَشَآءُۚ فَنِعۡمَ اَجۡرُ الۡعٰمِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has fulfilled for us His promise and made us inherit the earth [so] we may settle in Paradise wherever we will. And excellent is the reward of [righteous] workers

quran.arabic: وَتَرَي الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةَ حَآفِّيۡنَ مِنۡ حَوۡلِ الۡعَرۡشِ يُسَبِّحُوۡنَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡۚ وَقُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّ وَقِيۡلَ الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And you will see the angels surrounding the Throne, exalting [Allah] with praise of their Lord. And it will be judged between them in truth, and it will be said, "[All] praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds
Ha, Meem

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلُ الۡكِتٰبِ مِنَ اللّٰهِ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡعَلِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Knowing

quran.arabic: غَافِرِ الذَّنۭۡ بِ وَقَابِلِ التَّوۡبِ شَدِيۡدِ الۡعِقَابِ ذِي الطَّوۡلِؕ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَؕ اِلَيۡهِ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: The forgiver of sin, acceptor of repentance, severe in punishment, owner of abundance. There is no deity except Him; to Him is the destination

quran.arabic: مَا يُجَادِلُ فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا فَلَا يَغۡرُرۡكَ تَقَلُّبُهُمۡ فِي الۡبِلَادِ
quran.english: No one disputes concerning the signs of Allah except those who disbelieve, so be not deceived by their [uninhibited] movement throughout the land

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوۡحٍ وَّالۡاَحۡزَابُ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡࣕ وَهَمَّتۡ كُلُّ اُمَّةٍۭ بِرَسُوۡلِهِمۡ لِيَاۡخُذُوۡهُ وَجَادَلُوۡا بِالۡبَاطِلِ لِيُدۡحِضُوۡا بِهِ الۡحَقَّ فَاَخَذۡتُهُمۡࣞ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عِقَابِ
quran.english: The people of Noah denied before them and the [disbelieving] factions after them, and every nation intended [a plot] for their messenger to seize him, and they disputed by [using] falsehood to [attempt to] invalidate thereby the truth. So I seized them, and how [terrible] was My penalty

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَتُ رَبِّكَ عَلَي الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اَنَّهُمۡ اَصۡحٰبُ النَّارِۘؔ‏
quran.english: And thus has the word of your Lord come into effect upon those who disbelieved that they are companions of the Fire

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ يَحۡمِلُوۡنَ الۡعَرۡشَ وَمَنۡ حَوۡلَهٗ يُسَبِّحُوۡنَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِهٖ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡنَ لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡاۚ رَبَّنَا وَسِعۡتَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ رَّحۡمَةً وَّعِلۡمًا فَاغۡفِرۡ لِلَّذِيۡنَ تَابُوۡا وَاتَّبَعُوۡا سَبِيۡلَكَ وَقِهِمۡ عَذَابَ الۡجَحِيۡمِ
quran.english: Those [angels] who carry the Throne and those around it exalt [Allah] with praise of their Lord and believe in Him and ask forgiveness for those who have believed, [saying], "Our Lord, You have encompassed all things in mercy and knowledge, so forgive those who have repented and followed Your way and protect them from the punishment of Hellfire

quran.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَاَدۡخِلۡهُمۡ جَنّٰتِ عَدۡنِ اِۨلَّتِيۡ وَعَدۡتَّهُمۡ وَمَنۡ صَلَحَ مِنۡ اٰبَآئِهِمۡ وَاَزۡوَاجِهِمۡ وَذُرِّيّٰتِهِمۡؕ اِنَّكَ اَنۡتَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: Our Lord, and admit them to gardens of perpetual residence which You have promised them and whoever was righteous among their fathers, their spouses and their offspring. Indeed, it is You who is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَقِهِمُ السَّيِّاٰتِؕ وَمَنۡ تَقِ السَّيِّاٰتِ يَوۡمَئِذٍ فَقَدۡ رَحِمۡتَهٗؕ وَذٰلِكَ هُوَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡعَظِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And protect them from the evil consequences [of their deeds]. And he whom You protect from evil consequences that Day - You will have given him mercy. And that is the great attainment

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا يُنَادَوۡنَ لَمَقۡتُ اللّٰهِ اَكۡبَرُ مِنۡ مَّقۡتِكُمۡ اَنۡفُسَكُمۡ اِذۡ تُدۡعَوۡنَ اِلَي الۡاِيۡمَانِ فَتَكۡفُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, those who disbelieve will be addressed, "The hatred of Allah for you was [even] greater than your hatred of yourselves [this Day in Hell] when you were invited to faith, but you refused

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا رَبَّنَا٘ اَمَتَّنَا اثۡنَتَيۡنِ وَاَحۡيَيۡتَنَا اثۡنَتَيۡنِ فَاعۡتَرَفۡنَا بِذُنُوۡبِنَا فَهَلۡ اِلٰي خُرُوۡجٍ مِّنۡ سَبِيۡلٍ
quran.english: They will say, "Our Lord, You made us lifeless twice and gave us life twice, and we have confessed our sins. So is there to an exit any way

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكُمۡ بِاَنَّهٗ٘ اِذَا دُعِيَ اللّٰهُ وَحۡدَهٗ كَفَرۡتُمۡۚ وَاِنۡ يُّشۡرَكۡ بِهٖ تُؤۡمِنُوۡاؕ فَالۡحُكۡمُ لِلّٰهِ الۡعَلِيِّ الۡكَبِيۡرِ
quran.english: [They will be told], "That is because, when Allah was called upon alone, you disbelieved; but if others were associated with Him, you believed. So the judgement is with Allah, the Most High, the Grand

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ يُرِيۡكُمۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ وَيُنَزِّلُ لَكُمۡ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ رِزۡقًاؕ وَمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ اِلَّا مَنۡ يُّنِيۡبُ
quran.english: It is He who shows you His signs and sends down to you from the sky, provision. But none will remember except he who turns back [in repentance]

quran.arabic: فَادۡعُوا اللّٰهَ مُخۡلِصِيۡنَ لَهُ الدِّيۡنَ وَلَوۡ كَرِهَ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: So invoke Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, although the disbelievers dislike it

quran.arabic: رَفِيۡعُ الدَّرَجٰتِ ذُو الۡعَرۡشِۚ يُلۡقِي الرُّوۡحَ مِنۡ اَمۡرِهٖ عَلٰي مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهٖ لِيُنۡذِرَ يَوۡمَ التَّلَاقِۙ‏
quran.english: [He is] the Exalted above [all] degrees, Owner of the Throne; He places the inspiration of His command upon whom He wills of His servants to warn of the Day of Meeting

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ هُمۡ بَارِزُوۡنَ ࣢ۚ لَا يَخۡفٰي عَلَي اللّٰهِ مِنۡهُمۡ شَيۡءٌؕ لِمَنِ الۡمُلۡكُ الۡيَوۡمَؕ لِلّٰهِ الۡوَاحِدِ الۡقَهَّارِ
quran.english: The Day they come forth nothing concerning them will be concealed from Allah. To whom belongs [all] sovereignty this Day? To Allah, the One, the Prevailing

quran.arabic: اَلۡيَوۡمَ تُجۡزٰي كُلُّ نَفۡسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡؕ لَا ظُلۡمَ الۡيَوۡمَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ سَرِيۡعُ الۡحِسَابِ
quran.english: This Day every soul will be recompensed for what it earned. No injustice today! Indeed, Allah is swift in account

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡذِرۡهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡاٰزِفَةِ اِذِ الۡقُلُوۡبُ لَدَي الۡحَنَاجِرِ كَاظِمِيۡنَ ࣢ؕ مَا لِلظّٰلِمِيۡنَ مِنۡ حَمِيۡمٍ وَّلَا شَفِيۡعٍ يُّطَاعُؕ‏
quran.english: And warn them, [O Muhammad], of the Approaching Day, when hearts are at the throats, filled [with distress]. For the wrongdoers there will be no devoted friend and no intercessor [who is] obeyed

quran.arabic: يَعۡلَمُ خَآئِنَةَ الۡاَعۡيُنِ وَمَا تُخۡفِي الصُّدُوۡرُ
quran.english: He knows that which deceives the eyes and what the breasts conceal

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ يَقۡضِيۡ بِالۡحَقِّؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ لَا يَقۡضُوۡنَ بِشَيۡءٍؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡبَصِيۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: And Allah judges with truth, while those they invoke besides Him judge not with anything. Indeed, Allah - He is the Hearing, the Seeing

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَسِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَيَنۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَانُوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡؕ كَانُوۡا هُمۡ اَشَدَّ مِنۡهُمۡ قُوَّةً وَّاٰثَارًا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَاَخَذَهُمُ اللّٰهُ بِذُنُوۡبِهِمۡؕ وَمَا كَانَ لَهُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ وَّاقٍ
quran.english: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those who were before them? They were greater than them in strength and in impression on the land, but Allah seized them for their sins. And they had not from Allah any protector

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمۡ كَانَتۡ تَّاۡتِيۡهِمۡ رُسُلُهُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ فَكَفَرُوۡا فَاَخَذَهُمُ اللّٰهُؕ اِنَّهٗ قَوِيٌّ شَدِيۡدُ الۡعِقَابِ
quran.english: That was because their messengers were coming to them with clear proofs, but they disbelieved, so Allah seized them. Indeed, He is Powerful and severe in punishment

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مُوۡسٰي بِاٰيٰتِنَا وَسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: And We did certainly send Moses with Our signs and a clear authority

quran.arabic: اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَهَامٰنَ وَقَارُوۡنَ فَقَالُوۡا سٰحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ
quran.english: To Pharaoh, Haman and Qarun; but they said, "[He is] a magician and a liar

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّ مِنۡ عِنۡدِنَا قَالُوا اقۡتُلُوۡ٘ا اَبۡنَآءَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مَعَهٗ وَاسۡتَحۡيُوۡا نِسَآءَهُمۡؕ وَمَا كَيۡدُ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ اِلَّا فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ
quran.english: And when he brought them the truth from Us, they said, "Kill the sons of those who have believed with him and keep their women alive." But the plan of the disbelievers is not except in error

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ ذَرُوۡنِيۡ٘ اَقۡتُلۡ مُوۡسٰي وَلۡيَدۡعُ رَبَّهٗؕۚ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ اَنۡ يُّبَدِّلَ دِيۡنَكُمۡ اَوۡ اَنۡ يُّظۡهِرَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ الۡفَسَادَ
quran.english: And Pharaoh said, "Let me kill Moses and let him call upon his Lord. Indeed, I fear that he will change your religion or that he will cause corruption in the land

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اِنِّيۡ عُذۡتُ بِرَبِّيۡ وَرَبِّكُمۡ مِّنۡ كُلِّ مُتَكَبِّرٍ لَّا يُؤۡمِنُ بِيَوۡمِ الۡحِسَابِࣖ‏
quran.english: But Moses said, "Indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord from every arrogant one who does not believe in the Day of Account

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ رَجُلٌ مُّؤۡمِنٌࣗۖ مِّنۡ اٰلِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ يَكۡتُمُ اِيۡمَانَهٗ٘ اَتَقۡتُلُوۡنَ رَجُلًا اَنۡ يَّقُوۡلَ رَبِّيَ اللّٰهُ وَقَدۡ جَآءَكُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ مِنۡ رَّبِّكُمۡؕ وَاِنۡ يَّكُ كَاذِبًا فَعَلَيۡهِ كَذِبُهٗۚ وَاِنۡ يَّكُ صَادِقًا يُّصِبۡكُمۡ بَعۡضُ الَّذِيۡ يَعِدُكُمۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ هُوَ مُسۡرِفٌ كَذَّابٌ
quran.english: And a believing man from the family of Pharaoh who concealed his faith said, "Do you kill a man [merely] because he says, 'My Lord is Allah' while he has brought you clear proofs from your Lord? And if he should be lying, then upon him is [the consequence of] his lie; but if he should be truthful, there will strike you some of what he promises you. Indeed, Allah does not guide one who is a transgressor and a liar

quran.arabic: يٰقَوۡمِ لَكُمُ الۡمُلۡكُ الۡيَوۡمَ ظٰهِرِيۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِؗ فَمَنۡ يَّنۡصُرُنَا مِنۭۡ بَاۡسِ اللّٰهِ اِنۡ جَآءَنَاؕ قَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ مَا٘ اُرِيۡكُمۡ اِلَّا مَا٘ اَرٰي وَمَا٘ اَهۡدِيۡكُمۡ اِلَّا سَبِيۡلَ الرَّشَادِ
quran.english: O my people, sovereignty is yours today, [your being] dominant in the land. But who would protect us from the punishment of Allah if it came to us?" Pharaoh said, "I do not show you except what I see, and I do not guide you except to the way of right conduct

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اٰمَنَ يٰقَوۡمِ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّثۡلَ يَوۡمِ الۡاَحۡزَابِۙ‏
quran.english: And he who believed said, "O my people, indeed I fear for you [a fate] like the day of the companies

quran.arabic: مِثۡلَ دَاۡبِ قَوۡمِ نُوۡحٍ وَّعَادٍ وَّثَمُوۡدَ وَالَّذِيۡنَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡؕ وَمَا اللّٰهُ يُرِيۡدُ ظُلۡمًا لِّلۡعِبَادِ
quran.english: Like the custom of the people of Noah and of 'Aad and Thamud and those after them. And Allah wants no injustice for [His] servants

quran.arabic: وَيٰقَوۡمِ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ يَوۡمَ التَّنَادِۙ‏
quran.english: And O my people, indeed I fear for you the Day of Calling

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تُوَلُّوۡنَ مُدۡبِرِيۡنَۚ مَا لَكُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ عَاصِمٍۚ وَمَنۡ يُّضۡلِلِ اللّٰهُ فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ هَادٍ
quran.english: The Day you will turn your backs fleeing; there is not for you from Allah any protector. And whoever Allah leaves astray - there is not for him any guide

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَكُمۡ يُوۡسُفُ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ فَمَا زِلۡتُمۡ فِيۡ شَكٍّ مِّمَّا جَآءَكُمۡ بِهٖؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا هَلَكَ قُلۡتُمۡ لَنۡ يَّبۡعَثَ اللّٰهُ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖ رَسُوۡلًاؕ كَذٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ اللّٰهُ مَنۡ هُوَ مُسۡرِفٌ مُّرۡتَابُۚۖ‏
quran.english: And Joseph had already come to you before with clear proofs, but you remained in doubt of that which he brought to you, until when he died, you said, 'Never will Allah send a messenger after him.' Thus does Allah leave astray he who is a transgressor and skeptic

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡنَ يُجَادِلُوۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ بِغَيۡرِ سُلۡطٰنٍ اَتٰىهُمۡؕ كَبُرَ مَقۡتًا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ وَعِنۡدَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡاؕ كَذٰلِكَ يَطۡبَعُ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي كُلِّ قَلۡبِ مُتَكَبِّرٍ جَبَّارٍ
quran.english: Those who dispute concerning the signs of Allah without an authority having come to them - great is hatred [of them] in the sight of Allah and in the sight of those who have believed. Thus does Allah seal over every heart [belonging to] an arrogant tyrant

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ يٰهَامٰنُ ابۡنِ لِيۡ صَرۡحًا لَّعَلِّيۡ٘ اَبۡلُغُ الۡاَسۡبَابَۙ‏
quran.english: And Pharaoh said, "O Haman, construct for me a tower that I might reach the ways

quran.arabic: اَسۡبَابَ السَّمٰوٰتِ فَاَطَّلِعَ اِلٰ٘ي اِلٰهِ مُوۡسٰي وَاِنِّيۡ لَاَظُنُّهٗ كَاذِبًاؕ وَكَذٰلِكَ زُيِّنَ لِفِرۡعَوۡنَ سُوۡٓءُ عَمَلِهٖ وَصُدَّ عَنِ السَّبِيۡلِؕ وَمَا كَيۡدُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ اِلَّا فِيۡ تَبَابٍࣖ‏
quran.english: The ways into the heavens - so that I may look at the deity of Moses; but indeed, I think he is a liar." And thus was made attractive to Pharaoh the evil of his deed, and he was averted from the [right] way. And the plan of Pharaoh was not except in ruin

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اٰمَنَ يٰقَوۡمِ اتَّبِعُوۡنِ اَهۡدِكُمۡ سَبِيۡلَ الرَّشَادِۚ‏
quran.english: And he who believed said, "O my people, follow me, I will guide you to the way of right conduct

quran.arabic: يٰقَوۡمِ اِنَّمَا هٰذِهِ الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَا مَتَاعٌؗ وَّاِنَّ الۡاٰخِرَةَ هِيَ دَارُ الۡقَرَارِ
quran.english: O my people, this worldly life is only [temporary] enjoyment, and indeed, the Hereafter - that is the home of [permanent] settlement

quran.arabic: مَنۡ عَمِلَ سَيِّئَةً فَلَا يُجۡزٰ٘ي اِلَّا مِثۡلَهَاۚ وَمَنۡ عَمِلَ صَالِحًا مِّنۡ ذَكَرٍ اَوۡ اُنۡثٰي وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٌ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ يَدۡخُلُوۡنَ الۡجَنَّةَ يُرۡزَقُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٍ
