quran.english: Whoever does an evil deed will not be recompensed except by the like thereof; but whoever does righteousness, whether male or female, while he is a believer - those will enter Paradise, being given provision therein without account

quran.arabic: وَيٰقَوۡمِ مَا لِيۡ٘ اَدۡعُوۡكُمۡ اِلَي النَّجٰوةِ وَتَدۡعُوۡنَنِيۡ٘ اِلَي النَّارِؕ‏
quran.english: And O my people, how is it that I invite you to salvation while you invite me to the Fire

quran.arabic: تَدۡعُوۡنَنِيۡ لِاَكۡفُرَ بِاللّٰهِ وَاُشۡرِكَ بِهٖ مَا لَيۡسَ لِيۡ بِهٖ عِلۡمٌؗ وَّاَنَا اَدۡعُوۡكُمۡ اِلَي الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡغَفَّارِ
quran.english: You invite me to disbelieve in Allah and associate with Him that of which I have no knowledge, and I invite you to the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver

quran.arabic: لَا جَرَمَ اَنَّمَا تَدۡعُوۡنَنِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِ لَيۡسَ لَهٗ دَعۡوَةٌ فِي الدُّنۡيَا وَلَا فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ وَاَنَّ مَرَدَّنَا٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِ وَاَنَّ الۡمُسۡرِفِيۡنَ هُمۡ اَصۡحٰبُ النَّارِ
quran.english: Assuredly, that to which you invite me has no [response to a] supplication in this world or in the Hereafter; and indeed, our return is to Allah, and indeed, the transgressors will be companions of the Fire

quran.arabic: فَسَتَذۡكُرُوۡنَ مَا٘ اَقُوۡلُ لَكُمۡؕ وَاُفَوِّضُ اَمۡرِيۡ٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ بَصِيۡرٌۭ بِالۡعِبَادِ
quran.english: And you will remember what I [now] say to you, and I entrust my affair to Allah. Indeed, Allah is Seeing of [His] servants

quran.arabic: فَوَقٰىهُ اللّٰهُ سَيِّاٰتِ مَا مَكَرُوۡا وَحَاقَ بِاٰلِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ سُوۡٓءُ الۡعَذَابِۚ‏
quran.english: So Allah protected him from the evils they plotted, and the people of Pharaoh were enveloped by the worst of punishment

quran.arabic: اَلنَّارُ يُعۡرَضُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهَا غُدُوًّا وَّعَشِيًّاۚ وَيَوۡمَ تَقُوۡمُ السَّاعَةُࣞ اَدۡخِلُوۡ٘ا اٰلَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ اَشَدَّ الۡعَذَابِ
quran.english: The Fire, they are exposed to it morning and evening. And the Day the Hour appears [it will be said], "Make the people of Pharaoh enter the severest punishment

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ يَتَحَآجُّوۡنَ فِي النَّارِ فَيَقُوۡلُ الضُّعَفٰٓؤُا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا كُنَّا لَكُمۡ تَبَعًا فَهَلۡ اَنۡتُمۡ مُّغۡنُوۡنَ عَنَّا نَصِيۡبًا مِّنَ النَّارِ
quran.english: And [mention] when they will argue within the Fire, and the weak will say to those who had been arrogant, "Indeed, we were [only] your followers, so will you relieve us of a share of the Fire

quran.arabic: قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا كُلٌّ فِيۡهَا٘ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ قَدۡ حَكَمَ بَيۡنَ الۡعِبَادِ
quran.english: Those who had been arrogant will say, "Indeed, all [of us] are in it. Indeed, Allah has judged between the servants

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ فِي النَّارِ لِخَزَنَةِ جَهَنَّمَ ادۡعُوۡا رَبَّكُمۡ يُخَفِّفۡ عَنَّا يَوۡمًا مِّنَ الۡعَذَابِ
quran.english: And those in the Fire will say to the keepers of Hell, "Supplicate your Lord to lighten for us a day from the punishment

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اَوَلَمۡ تَكُ تَاۡتِيۡكُمۡ رُسُلُكُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِؕ قَالُوۡا بَلٰيؕ قَالُوۡا فَادۡعُوۡاۚ وَمَا دُعٰٓؤُا الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ اِلَّا فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍࣖ‏
quran.english: They will say, "Did there not come to you your messengers with clear proofs?" They will say, "Yes." They will reply, "Then supplicate [yourselves], but the supplication of the disbelievers is not except in error

quran.arabic: اِنَّا لَنَنۡصُرُ رُسُلَنَا وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا وَيَوۡمَ يَقُوۡمُ الۡاَشۡهَادُۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We will support Our messengers and those who believe during the life of this world and on the Day when the witnesses will stand

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ لَا يَنۡفَعُ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ مَعۡذِرَتُهُمۡ وَلَهُمُ اللَّعۡنَةُ وَلَهُمۡ سُوۡٓءُ الدَّارِ
quran.english: The Day their excuse will not benefit the wrongdoers, and they will have the curse, and they will have the worst home

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسَي الۡهُدٰي وَاَوۡرَثۡنَا بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ الۡكِتٰبَۙ‏
quran.english: And We had certainly given Moses guidance, and We caused the Children of Israel to inherit the Scripture

quran.arabic: هُدًي وَّذِكۡرٰي لِاُولِي الۡاَلۡبَابِ
quran.english: As guidance and a reminder for those of understanding

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ اِنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّ وَّاسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لِذَنۭۡ بِكَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ بِالۡعَشِيِّ وَالۡاِبۡكَارِ
quran.english: So be patient, [O Muhammad]. Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And ask forgiveness for your sin and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord in the evening and the morning

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُجَادِلُوۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ بِغَيۡرِ سُلۡطٰنٍ اَتٰىهُمۡۙ اِنۡ فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِهِمۡ اِلَّا كِبۡرٌ مَّا هُمۡ بِبَالِغِيۡهِۚ فَاسۡتَعِذۡ بِاللّٰهِؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡبَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: Indeed, those who dispute concerning the signs of Allah without [any] authority having come to them - there is not within their breasts except pride, [the extent of] which they cannot reach. So seek refuge in Allah. Indeed, it is He who is the Hearing, the Seeing

quran.arabic: لَخَلۡقُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ اَكۡبَرُ مِنۡ خَلۡقِ النَّاسِ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: The creation of the heavens and earth is greater than the creation of mankind, but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي الۡاَعۡمٰي وَالۡبَصِيۡرُ ࣢ۙ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَلَا الۡمُسِيۡٓءُؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تَتَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And not equal are the blind and the seeing, nor are those who believe and do righteous deeds and the evildoer. Little do you remember

quran.arabic: اِنَّ السَّاعَةَ لَاٰتِيَةٌ لَّا رَيۡبَ فِيۡهَاؗ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, the Hour is coming - no doubt about it - but most of the people do not believe

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ادۡعُوۡنِيۡ٘ اَسۡتَجِبۡ لَكُمۡؕ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَ عَنۡ عِبَادَتِيۡ سَيَدۡخُلُوۡنَ جَهَنَّمَ دٰخِرِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And your Lord says, "Call upon Me; I will respond to you." Indeed, those who disdain My worship will enter Hell [rendered] contemptible

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الَّيۡلَ لِتَسۡكُنُوۡا فِيۡهِ وَالنَّهَارَ مُبۡصِرًاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَذُوۡ فَضۡلٍ عَلَي النَّاسِ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: It is Allah who made for you the night that you may rest therein and the day giving sight. Indeed, Allah is full of bounty to the people, but most of the people are not grateful

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكُمُ اللّٰهُ رَبُّكُمۡ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍۘ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَؗ فَاَنّٰي تُؤۡفَكُوۡنَ
quran.english: That is Allah, your Lord, Creator of all things; there is no deity except Him, so how are you deluded

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ يُؤۡفَكُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَانُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ يَجۡحَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Thus were those [before you] deluded who were rejecting the signs of Allah

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الۡاَرۡضَ قَرَارًا وَّالسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَّصَوَّرَكُمۡ فَاَحۡسَنَ صُوَرَكُمۡ وَرَزَقَكُمۡ مِّنَ الطَّيِّبٰتِؕ ذٰلِكُمُ اللّٰهُ رَبُّكُمۡۚۖ فَتَبٰرَكَ اللّٰهُ رَبُّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: It is Allah who made for you the earth a place of settlement and the sky a ceiling and formed you and perfected your forms and provided you with good things. That is Allah, your Lord; then blessed is Allah, Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: هُوَ الۡحَيُّ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَ فَادۡعُوۡهُ مُخۡلِصِيۡنَ لَهُ الدِّيۡنَؕ اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: He is the Ever-Living; there is no deity except Him, so call upon Him, [being] sincere to Him in religion. [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنِّيۡ نُهِيۡتُ اَنۡ اَعۡبُدَ الَّذِيۡنَ تَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ لَمَّا جَآءَنِيَ الۡبَيِّنٰتُ مِنۡ رَّبِّيۡؗ وَاُمِرۡتُ اَنۡ اُسۡلِمَ لِرَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, I have been forbidden to worship those you call upon besides Allah once the clear proofs have come to me from my Lord, and I have been commanded to submit to the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ مِّنۡ تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍ ثُمَّ مِنۡ عَلَقَةٍ ثُمَّ يُخۡرِجُكُمۡ طِفۡلًا ثُمَّ لِتَبۡلُغُوۡ٘ا اَشُدَّكُمۡ ثُمَّ لِتَكُوۡنُوۡا شُيُوۡخًاۚ وَمِنۡكُمۡ مَّنۡ يُّتَوَفّٰي مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَلِتَبۡلُغُوۡ٘ا اَجَلًا مُّسَمًّي وَّلَعَلَّكُمۡ تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: It is He who created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop, then from a clinging clot; then He brings you out as a child; then [He develops you] that you reach your [time of] maturity, then [further] that you become elders. And among you is he who is taken in death before [that], so that you reach a specified term; and perhaps you will use reason

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ يُحۡيٖ وَيُمِيۡتُۚ فَاِذَا قَضٰ٘ي اَمۡرًا فَاِنَّمَا يَقُوۡلُ لَهٗ كُنۡ فَيَكُوۡنُࣖ‏
quran.english: He it is who gives life and causes death; and when He decrees a matter, He but says to it, "Be," and it is

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اِلَي الَّذِيۡنَ يُجَادِلُوۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِؕ اَنّٰي يُصۡرَفُوۡنَۙۛ‏
quran.english: Do you not consider those who dispute concerning the signs of Allah - how are they averted

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ كَذَّبُوۡا بِالۡكِتٰبِ وَبِمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا بِهٖ رُسُلَنَاࣞۛ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Those who deny the Book and that with which We sent Our messengers - they are going to know

quran.arabic: اِذِ الۡاَغۡلٰلُ فِيۡ٘ اَعۡنَاقِهِمۡ وَالسَّلٰسِلُؕ يُسۡحَبُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: When the shackles are around their necks and the chains; they will be dragged

quran.arabic: فِي الۡحَمِيۡمِ ࣢ۙ ثُمَّ فِي النَّارِ يُسۡجَرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: In boiling water; then in the Fire they will be filled [with flame]

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ قِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ اَيۡنَ مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تُشۡرِكُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]

quran.arabic: مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ قَالُوۡا ضَلُّوۡا عَنَّا بَلۡ لَّمۡ نَكُنۡ نَّدۡعُوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلُ شَيۡـًٔاؕ كَذٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ اللّٰهُ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Other than Allah?" They will say, "They have departed from us; rather, we did not used to invoke previously anything." Thus does Allah put astray the disbelievers

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكُمۡ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَفۡرَحُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ الۡحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَمۡرَحُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [The angels will say], "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently

quran.arabic: اُدۡخُلُوۡ٘ا اَبۡوَابَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاۚ فَبِئۡسَ مَثۡوَي الۡمُتَكَبِّرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ اِنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّۚ فَاِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعۡضَ الَّذِيۡ نَعِدُهُمۡ اَوۡ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَاِلَيۡنَا يُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: So be patient, [O Muhammad]; indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلًا مِّنۡ قَبۡلِكَ مِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ قَصَصۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ لَّمۡ نَقۡصُصۡ عَلَيۡكَؕ وَمَا كَانَ لِرَسُوۡلٍ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَ بِاٰيَةٍ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِ اللّٰهِۚ فَاِذَا جَآءَ اَمۡرُ اللّٰهِ قُضِيَ بِالۡحَقِّ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ الۡمُبۡطِلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We have already sent messengers before you. Among them are those [whose stories] We have related to you, and among them are those [whose stories] We have not related to you. And it was not for any messenger to bring a sign [or verse] except by permission of Allah. So when the command of Allah comes, it will be concluded in truth, and the falsifiers will thereupon lose [all]

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الۡاَنۡعَامَ لِتَرۡكَبُوۡا مِنۡهَا وَمِنۡهَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: It is Allah who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat

quran.arabic: وَلَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَنَافِعُ وَلِتَبۡلُغُوۡا عَلَيۡهَا حَاجَةً فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِكُمۡ وَعَلَيۡهَا وَعَلَي الۡفُلۡكِ تُحۡمَلُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And for you therein are [other] benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried

quran.arabic: وَيُرِيۡكُمۡ اٰيٰتِهٖࣗۖ فَاَيَّ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ تُنۡكِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And He shows you His signs. So which of the signs of Allah do you deny

quran.arabic: اَفَلَمۡ يَسِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَيَنۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡؕ كَانُوۡ٘ا اَكۡثَرَ مِنۡهُمۡ وَاَشَدَّ قُوَّةً وَّاٰثَارًا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَمَا٘ اَغۡنٰي عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَكۡسِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? They were more numerous than themselves and greater in strength and in impression on the land, but they were not availed by what they used to earn

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ فَرِحُوۡا بِمَا عِنۡدَهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡعِلۡمِ وَحَاقَ بِهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they [merely] rejoiced in what they had of knowledge, but they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَاَوۡا بَاۡسَنَا قَالُوۡ٘ا اٰمَنَّا بِاللّٰهِ وَحۡدَهٗ وَكَفَرۡنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهٖ مُشۡرِكِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when they saw Our punishment, they said," We believe in Allah alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with Him

quran.arabic: فَلَمۡ يَكُ يَنۡفَعُهُمۡ اِيۡمَانُهُمۡ لَمَّا رَاَوۡا بَاۡسَنَاؕ سُنَّتَ اللّٰهِ الَّتِيۡ قَدۡ خَلَتۡ فِيۡ عِبَادِهٖۚ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: But never did their faith benefit them once they saw Our punishment. [It is] the established way of Allah which has preceded among His servants. And the disbelievers thereupon lost [all]
Ha, Meem

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلٌ مِّنَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ الرَّحِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: [This is] a revelation from the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful

quran.arabic: كِتٰبٌ فُصِّلَتۡ اٰيٰتُهٗ قُرۡاٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: A Book whose verses have been detailed, an Arabic Qur'an for a people who know

quran.arabic: بَشِيۡرًا وَّنَذِيۡرًاۚ فَاَعۡرَضَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: As a giver of good tidings and a warner; but most of them turn away, so they do not hear

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا قُلُوۡبُنَا فِيۡ٘ اَكِنَّةٍ مِّمَّا تَدۡعُوۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِ وَفِيۡ٘ اٰذَانِنَا وَقۡرٌ وَّمِنۭۡ بَيۡنِنَا وَبَيۡنِكَ حِجَابٌ فَاعۡمَلۡ اِنَّنَا عٰمِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "Our hearts are within coverings from that to which you invite us, and in our ears is deafness, and between us and you is a partition, so work; indeed, we are working

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّمَا٘ اَنَا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُكُمۡ يُوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيَّ اَنَّمَا٘ اِلٰهُكُمۡ اِلٰهٌ وَّاحِدٌ فَاسۡتَقِيۡمُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهِ وَاسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡهُؕ وَوَيۡلٌ لِّلۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Say, O [Muhammad], "I am only a man like you to whom it has been revealed that your god is but one God; so take a straight course to Him and seek His forgiveness." And woe to those who associate others with Allah

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡتُوۡنَ الزَّكٰوةَ وَهُمۡ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ هُمۡ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those who do not give zakah, and in the Hereafter they are disbelievers

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَهُمۡ اَجۡرٌ غَيۡرُ مَمۡنُوۡنٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who believe and do righteous deeds - for them is a reward uninterrupted

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَئِنَّكُمۡ لَتَكۡفُرُوۡنَ بِالَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ الۡاَرۡضَ فِيۡ يَوۡمَيۡنِ وَتَجۡعَلُوۡنَ لَهٗ٘ اَنۡدَادًاؕ ذٰلِكَ رَبُّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Say, "Do you indeed disbelieve in He who created the earth in two days and attribute to Him equals? That is the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلَ فِيۡهَا رَوَاسِيَ مِنۡ فَوۡقِهَا وَبٰرَكَ فِيۡهَا وَقَدَّرَ فِيۡهَا٘ اَقۡوَاتَهَا فِيۡ٘ اَرۡبَعَةِ اَيَّامٍؕ سَوَآءً لِّلسَّآئِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And He placed on the earth firmly set mountains over its surface, and He blessed it and determined therein its [creatures'] sustenance in four days without distinction - for [the information] of those who ask

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اسۡتَوٰ٘ي اِلَي السَّمَآءِ وَهِيَ دُخَانٌ فَقَالَ لَهَا وَلِلۡاَرۡضِ ائۡتِيَا طَوۡعًا اَوۡ كَرۡهًاؕ قَالَتَا٘ اَتَيۡنَا طَآئِعِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then He directed Himself to the heaven while it was smoke and said to it and to the earth, "Come [into being], willingly or by compulsion." They said, "We have come willingly

quran.arabic: فَقَضٰىهُنَّ سَبۡعَ سَمٰوَاتٍ فِيۡ يَوۡمَيۡنِ وَاَوۡحٰي فِيۡ كُلِّ سَمَآءٍ اَمۡرَهَا وَزَيَّنَّا السَّمَآءَ الدُّنۡيَا بِمَصَابِيۡحَࣗۖ وَحِفۡظًاؕ ذٰلِكَ تَقۡدِيۡرُ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡعَلِيۡمِ
quran.english: And He completed them as seven heavens within two days and inspired in each heaven its command. And We adorned the nearest heaven with lamps and as protection. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ اَعۡرَضُوۡا فَقُلۡ اَنۡذَرۡتُكُمۡ صٰعِقَةً مِّثۡلَ صٰعِقَةِ عَادٍ وَّثَمُوۡدَؕ‏
quran.english: But if they turn away, then say, "I have warned you of a thunderbolt like the thunderbolt [that struck] 'Aad and Thamud

quran.arabic: اِذۡ جَآءَتۡهُمُ الرُّسُلُ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِمۡ اَلَّا تَعۡبُدُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا اللّٰهَؕ قَالُوۡا لَوۡ شَآءَ رَبُّنَا لَاَنۡزَلَ مَلٰٓئِكَةً فَاِنَّا بِمَا٘ اُرۡسِلۡتُمۡ بِهٖ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: [That occurred] when the messengers had come to them before them and after them, [saying], "Worship not except Allah." They said, "If our Lord had willed, He would have sent down the angels, so indeed we, in that with which you have been sent, are disbelievers

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا عَادٌ فَاسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ الۡحَقِّ وَقَالُوۡا مَنۡ اَشَدُّ مِنَّا قُوَّةًؕ اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّ اللّٰهَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَهُمۡ هُوَ اَشَدُّ مِنۡهُمۡ قُوَّةًؕ وَكَانُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا يَجۡحَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: As for 'Aad, they were arrogant upon the earth without right and said, "Who is greater than us in strength?" Did they not consider that Allah who created them was greater than them in strength? But they were rejecting Our signs

quran.arabic: فَاَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيۡحًا صَرۡصَرًا فِيۡ٘ اَيَّامٍ نَّحِسَاتٍ لِّنُذِيۡقَهُمۡ عَذَابَ الۡخِزۡيِ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاؕ وَلَعَذَابُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ اَخۡزٰي وَهُمۡ لَا يُنۡصَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: So We sent upon them a screaming wind during days of misfortune to make them taste the punishment of disgrace in the worldly life; but the punishment of the Hereafter is more disgracing, and they will not be helped

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا ثَمُوۡدُ فَهَدَيۡنٰهُمۡ فَاسۡتَحَبُّوا الۡعَمٰي عَلَي الۡهُدٰي فَاَخَذَتۡهُمۡ صٰعِقَةُ الۡعَذَابِ الۡهُوۡنِ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَكۡسِبُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And as for Thamud, We guided them, but they preferred blindness over guidance, so the thunderbolt of humiliating punishment seized them for what they used to earn

quran.arabic: وَنَجَّيۡنَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَكَانُوۡا يَتَّقُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We saved those who believed and used to fear Allah

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يُحۡشَرُ اَعۡدَآءُ اللّٰهِ اِلَي النَّارِ فَهُمۡ يُوۡزَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], the Day when the enemies of Allah will be gathered to the Fire while they are [driven] assembled in rows

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا مَا جَآءُوۡهَا شَهِدَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ سَمۡعُهُمۡ وَاَبۡصَارُهُمۡ وَجُلُوۡدُهُمۡ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Until, when they reach it, their hearing and their eyes and their skins will testify against them of what they used to do

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا لِجُلُوۡدِهِمۡ لِمَ شَهِدۡتُّمۡ عَلَيۡنَاؕ قَالُوۡ٘ا اَنۡطَقَنَا اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡطَقَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ وَّهُوَ خَلَقَكُمۡ اَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ وَّاِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they will say to their skins, "Why have you testified against us?" They will say, "We were made to speak by Allah, who has made everything speak; and He created you the first time, and to Him you are returned

quran.arabic: وَمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَسۡتَتِرُوۡنَ اَنۡ يَّشۡهَدَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ سَمۡعُكُمۡ وَلَا٘ اَبۡصَارُكُمۡ وَلَا جُلُوۡدُكُمۡ وَلٰكِنۡ ظَنَنۡتُمۡ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَعۡلَمُ كَثِيۡرًا مِّمَّا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And you were not covering yourselves, lest your hearing testify against you or your sight or your skins, but you assumed that Allah does not know much of what you do

quran.arabic: وَذٰلِكُمۡ ظَنُّكُمُ الَّذِيۡ ظَنَنۡتُمۡ بِرَبِّكُمۡ اَرۡدٰىكُمۡ فَاَصۡبَحۡتُمۡ مِّنَ الۡخٰسِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And that was your assumption which you assumed about your Lord. It has brought you to ruin, and you have become among the losers

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ يَّصۡبِرُوۡا فَالنَّارُ مَثۡوًي لَّهُمۡؕ وَاِنۡ يَّسۡتَعۡتِبُوۡا فَمَا هُمۡ مِّنَ الۡمُعۡتَبِيۡنَ
quran.english: So [even] if they are patient, the Fire is a residence for them; and if they ask to appease [Allah], they will not be of those who are allowed to appease

quran.arabic: وَقَيَّضۡنَا لَهُمۡ قُرَنَآءَ فَزَيَّنُوۡا لَهُمۡ مَّا بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ وَحَقَّ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡقَوۡلُ فِيۡ٘ اُمَمٍ قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ مِّنَ الۡجِنِّ وَالۡاِنۡسِۚ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا خٰسِرِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We appointed for them companions who made attractive to them what was before them and what was behind them [of sin], and the word has come into effect upon them among nations which had passed on before them of jinn and men. Indeed, they [all] were losers

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَا تَسۡمَعُوۡا لِهٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنِ وَالۡغَوۡا فِيۡهِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَغۡلِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: And those who disbelieve say, "Do not listen to this Qur'an and speak noisily during [the recitation of] it that perhaps you will overcome

quran.arabic: فَلَنُذِيۡقَنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا عَذَابًا شَدِيۡدًا وَّلَنَجۡزِيَنَّهُمۡ اَسۡوَاَ الَّذِيۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: But We will surely cause those who disbelieve to taste a severe punishment, and We will surely recompense them for the worst of what they had been doing

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ اَعۡدَآءِ اللّٰهِ النَّارُۚ لَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا دَارُ الۡخُلۡدِؕ جَزَآءًۭ بِمَا كَانُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا يَجۡحَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: That is the recompense of the enemies of Allah - the Fire. For them therein is the home of eternity as recompense for what they, of Our verses, were rejecting

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا رَبَّنَا٘ اَرِنَا الَّذَيۡنِ اَضَلّٰنَا مِنَ الۡجِنِّ وَالۡاِنۡسِ نَجۡعَلۡهُمَا تَحۡتَ اَقۡدَامِنَا لِيَكُوۡنَا مِنَ الۡاَسۡفَلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And those who disbelieved will [then] say, "Our Lord, show us those who misled us of the jinn and men [so] we may put them under our feet that they will be among the lowest

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ قَالُوۡا رَبُّنَا اللّٰهُ ثُمَّ اسۡتَقَامُوۡا تَتَنَزَّلُ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ اَلَّا تَخَافُوۡا وَلَا تَحۡزَنُوۡا وَاَبۡشِرُوۡا بِالۡجَنَّةِ الَّتِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, those who have said, "Our Lord is Allah " and then remained on a right course - the angels will descend upon them, [saying], "Do not fear and do not grieve but receive good tidings of Paradise, which you were promised

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ اَوۡلِيٰٓـُٔكُمۡ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا وَفِي الۡاٰخِرَةِۚ وَلَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِيۡ٘ اَنۡفُسُكُمۡ وَلَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا مَا تَدَّعُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: We [angels] were your allies in worldly life and [are so] in the Hereafter. And you will have therein whatever your souls desire, and you will have therein whatever you request [or wish]

quran.arabic: نُزُلًا مِّنۡ غَفُوۡرٍ رَّحِيۡمٍࣖ‏
quran.english: As accommodation from a [Lord who is] Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ اَحۡسَنُ قَوۡلًا مِّمَّنۡ دَعَا٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا وَّقَالَ اِنَّنِيۡ مِنَ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And who is better in speech than one who invites to Allah and does righteousness and says, "Indeed, I am of the Muslims

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَسۡتَوِي الۡحَسَنَةُ وَلَا السَّيِّئَةُؕ اِدۡفَعۡ بِالَّتِيۡ هِيَ اَحۡسَنُ فَاِذَا الَّذِيۡ بَيۡنَكَ وَبَيۡنَهٗ عَدَاوَةٌ كَاَنَّهٗ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And not equal are the good deed and the bad. Repel [evil] by that [deed] which is better; and thereupon the one whom between you and him is enmity [will become] as though he was a devoted friend

quran.arabic: وَمَا يُلَقّٰىهَا٘ اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ صَبَرُوۡاۚ وَمَا يُلَقّٰىهَا٘ اِلَّا ذُوۡ حَظٍّ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: But none is granted it except those who are patient, and none is granted it except one having a great portion [of good]

quran.arabic: وَاِمَّا يَنۡزَغَنَّكَ مِنَ الشَّيۡطٰنِ نَزۡغٌ فَاسۡتَعِذۡ بِاللّٰهِؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: And if there comes to you from Satan an evil suggestion, then seek refuge in Allah. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهِ الَّيۡلُ وَالنَّهَارُ وَالشَّمۡسُ وَالۡقَمَرُؕ لَا تَسۡجُدُوۡا لِلشَّمۡسِ وَلَا لِلۡقَمَرِ وَاسۡجُدُوۡا لِلّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَهُنَّ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ اِيَّاهُ تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And of His signs are the night and day and the sun and moon. Do not prostrate to the sun or to the moon, but prostate to Allah, who created them, if it should be Him that you worship

quran.arabic: فَاِنِ اسۡتَكۡبَرُوۡا فَالَّذِيۡنَ عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ يُسَبِّحُوۡنَ لَهٗ بِالَّيۡلِ وَالنَّهَارِ وَهُمۡ لَا يَسۡـَٔمُوۡنَࣛ‏
quran.english: But if they are arrogant - then those who are near your Lord exalt Him by night and by day, and they do not become weary

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ٘ اَنَّكَ تَرَي الۡاَرۡضَ خَاشِعَةً فَاِذَا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهَا الۡمَآءَ اهۡتَزَّتۡ وَرَبَتۡؕ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَحۡيَاهَا لَمُحۡيِ الۡمَوۡتٰيؕ اِنَّهٗ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And of His signs is that you see the earth stilled, but when We send down upon it rain, it quivers and grows. Indeed, He who has given it life is the Giver of Life to the dead. Indeed, He is over all things competent

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُلۡحِدُوۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِنَا لَا يَخۡفَوۡنَ عَلَيۡنَاؕ اَفَمَنۡ يُّلۡقٰي فِي النَّارِ خَيۡرٌ اَمۡ مَّنۡ يَّاۡتِيۡ٘ اٰمِنًا يَّوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ اِعۡمَلُوۡا مَا شِئۡتُمۡۙ اِنَّهٗ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Indeed, those who inject deviation into Our verses are not concealed from Us. So, is he who is cast into the Fire better or he who comes secure on the Day of Resurrection? Do whatever you will; indeed, He is Seeing of what you do

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِالذِّكۡرِ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡۚ وَاِنَّهٗ لَكِتٰبٌ عَزِيۡزٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who disbelieve in the message after it has come to them... And indeed, it is a mighty Book

quran.arabic: لَّا يَاۡتِيۡهِ الۡبَاطِلُ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِ يَدَيۡهِ وَلَا مِنۡ خَلۡفِهٖؕ تَنۡزِيۡلٌ مِّنۡ حَكِيۡمٍ حَمِيۡدٍ
quran.english: Falsehood cannot approach it from before it or from behind it; [it is] a revelation from a [Lord who is] Wise and Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: مَا يُقَالُ لَكَ اِلَّا مَا قَدۡ قِيۡلَ لِلرُّسُلِ مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُوۡ مَغۡفِرَةٍ وَّذُوۡ عِقَابٍ اَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Nothing is said to you, [O Muhammad], except what was already said to the messengers before you. Indeed, your Lord is a possessor of forgiveness and a possessor of painful penalty

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ جَعَلۡنٰهُ قُرۡاٰنًا اَعۡجَمِيًّا لَّقَالُوۡا لَوۡلَا فُصِّلَتۡ اٰيٰتُهٗؕ ءَاَۙعۡجَمِيٌّ وَّعَرَبِيٌّؕ قُلۡ هُوَ لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا هُدًي وَّشِفَآءٌؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اٰذَانِهِمۡ وَقۡرٌ وَّهُوَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ عَمًيؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ يُنَادَوۡنَ مِنۡ مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And if We had made it a non-Arabic Qur'an, they would have said, "Why are its verses not explained in detail [in our language]? Is it a foreign [recitation] and an Arab [messenger]?" Say, "It is, for those who believe, a guidance and cure." And those who do not believe - in their ears is deafness, and it is upon them blindness. Those are being called from a distant place

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا مُوۡسَي الۡكِتٰبَ فَاخۡتُلِفَ فِيۡهِؕ وَلَوۡلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتۡ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ لَقُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ وَاِنَّهُمۡ لَفِيۡ شَكٍّ مِّنۡهُ مُرِيۡبٍ
quran.english: And We had already given Moses the Scripture, but it came under disagreement. And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it would have been concluded between them. And indeed they are, concerning the Qur'an, in disquieting doubt

quran.arabic: مَنۡ عَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَلِنَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ اَسَآءَ فَعَلَيۡهَاؕ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِظَلَّامٍ لِّلۡعَبِيۡدِ
quran.english: Whoever does righteousness - it is for his [own] soul; and whoever does evil [does so] against it. And your Lord is not ever unjust to [His] servants

quran.arabic: اِلَيۡهِ يُرَدُّ عِلۡمُ السَّاعَةِؕ وَمَا تَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ ثَمَرٰتٍ مِّنۡ اَكۡمَامِهَا وَمَا تَحۡمِلُ مِنۡ اُنۡثٰي وَلَا تَضَعُ اِلَّا بِعِلۡمِهٖؕ وَيَوۡمَ يُنَادِيۡهِمۡ اَيۡنَ شُرَكَآءِيۡۙ قَالُوۡ٘ا اٰذَنّٰكَۙ مَامِنَّا مِنۡ شَهِيۡدٍۚ‏
quran.english: To him [alone] is attributed knowledge of the Hour. And fruits emerge not from their coverings nor does a female conceive or give birth except with His knowledge. And the Day He will call to them, "Where are My 'partners'?" they will say, "We announce to You that there is [no longer] among us any witness [to that]

quran.arabic: وَضَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَظَنُّوۡا مَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّحِيۡصٍ
quran.english: And lost from them will be those they were invoking before, and they will be certain that they have no place of escape

quran.arabic: لَا يَسۡـَٔمُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ مِنۡ دُعَآءِ الۡخَيۡرِؗ وَاِنۡ مَّسَّهُ الشَّرُّ فَيَـُٔوۡسٌ قَنُوۡطٌ
quran.english: Man is not weary of supplication for good [things], but if evil touches him, he is hopeless and despairing

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ اَذَقۡنٰهُ رَحۡمَةً مِّنَّا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ ضَرَّآءَ مَسَّتۡهُ لَيَقُوۡلَنَّ هٰذَا لِيۡۙ وَمَا٘ اَظُنُّ السَّاعَةَ قَآئِمَةًۙ وَّلَئِنۡ رُّجِعۡتُ اِلٰي رَبِّيۡ٘ اِنَّ لِيۡ عِنۡدَهٗ لَلۡحُسۡنٰيۚ فَلَنُنَبِّئَنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِمَا عَمِلُوۡاؗ وَلَنُذِيۡقَنَّهُمۡ مِّنۡ عَذَابٍ غَلِيۡظٍ
quran.english: And if We let him taste mercy from Us after an adversity which has touched him, he will surely say, "This is [due] to me, and I do not think the Hour will occur; and [even] if I should be returned to my Lord, indeed, for me there will be with Him the best." But We will surely inform those who disbelieved about what they did, and We will surely make them taste a massive punishment

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا٘ اَنۡعَمۡنَا عَلَي الۡاِنۡسَانِ اَعۡرَضَ وَنَاٰبِجَانِبِهٖۚ وَاِذَا مَسَّهُ الشَّرُّ فَذُوۡ دُعَآءٍ عَرِيۡضٍ
quran.english: And when We bestow favor upon man, he turns away and distances himself; but when evil touches him, then he is full of extensive supplication

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنۡ عِنۡدِ اللّٰهِ ثُمَّ كَفَرۡتُمۡ بِهٖ مَنۡ اَضَلُّ مِمَّنۡ هُوَ فِيۡ شِقَاقٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍ
quran.english: Say, "Have you considered: if the Qur'an is from Allah and you disbelieved in it, who would be more astray than one who is in extreme dissension

quran.arabic: سَنُرِيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتِنَا فِي الۡاٰفَاقِ وَفِيۡ٘ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ حَتّٰي يَتَبَيَّنَ لَهُمۡ اَنَّهُ الۡحَقُّؕ اَوَلَمۡ يَكۡفِ بِرَبِّكَ اَنَّهٗ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ شَهِيۡدٌ
quran.english: We will show them Our signs in the horizons and within themselves until it becomes clear to them that it is the truth. But is it not sufficient concerning your Lord that He is, over all things, a Witness

quran.arabic: اَلَا٘ اِنَّهُمۡ فِيۡ مِرۡيَةٍ مِّنۡ لِّقَآءِ رَبِّهِمۡؕ اَلَا٘ اِنَّهٗ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ مُّحِيۡطٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Unquestionably, they are in doubt about the meeting with their Lord. Unquestionably He is, of all things, encompassing
Ha, Meem

quran.arabic: عٓسٓقٓ
quran.english: Ayn, Seen, Qaf

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ يُوۡحِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡكَ وَاِلَي الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَۙ اللّٰهُ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Thus has He revealed to you, [O Muhammad], and to those before you - Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: لَهٗ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَلِيُّ الۡعَظِيۡمُ
quran.english: To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, and He is the Most High, the Most Great

quran.arabic: تَكَادُ السَّمٰوٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرۡنَ مِنۡ فَوۡقِهِنَّ وَالۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ يُسَبِّحُوۡنَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡنَ لِمَنۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ اَلَا٘ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡغَفُوۡرُ الرَّحِيۡمُ
quran.english: The heavens almost break from above them, and the angels exalt [Allah] with praise of their Lord and ask forgiveness for those on earth. Unquestionably, it is Allah who is the Forgiving, the Merciful

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اَوۡلِيَآءَ اللّٰهُ حَفِيۡظٌ عَلَيۡهِمۡؗۖ وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِوَكِيۡلٍ
quran.english: And those who take as allies other than Him - Allah is [yet] Guardian over them; and you, [O Muhammad], are not over them a manager

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ قُرۡاٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لِّتُنۡذِرَ اُمَّ الۡقُرٰي وَمَنۡ حَوۡلَهَا وَتُنۡذِرَ يَوۡمَ الۡجَمۡعِ لَا رَيۡبَ فِيۡهِؕ فَرِيۡقٌ فِي الۡجَنَّةِ وَفَرِيۡقٌ فِي السَّعِيۡرِ
quran.english: And thus We have revealed to you an Arabic Qur'an that you may warn the Mother of Cities [Makkah] and those around it and warn of the Day of Assembly, about which there is no doubt. A party will be in Paradise and a party in the Blaze

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ لَجَعَلَهُمۡ اُمَّةً وَّاحِدَةً وَّلٰكِنۡ يُّدۡخِلُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ فِيۡ رَحۡمَتِهٖؕ وَالظّٰلِمُوۡنَ مَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ وَّلِيٍّ وَّلَا نَصِيۡرٍ
quran.english: And if Allah willed, He could have made them [of] one religion, but He admits whom He wills into His mercy. And the wrongdoers have not any protector or helper

quran.arabic: اَمِ اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اَوۡلِيَآءَۚ فَاللّٰهُ هُوَ الۡوَلِيُّ وَهُوَ يُحۡيِ الۡمَوۡتٰيؗ وَهُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Or have they taken protectors [or allies] besides him? But Allah - He is the Protector, and He gives life to the dead, and He is over all things competent

quran.arabic: وَمَا اخۡتَلَفۡتُمۡ فِيۡهِ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍ فَحُكۡمُهٗ٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِؕ ذٰلِكُمُ اللّٰهُ رَبِّيۡ عَلَيۡهِ تَوَكَّلۡتُࣗۖ وَاِلَيۡهِ اُنِيۡبُ
quran.english: And in anything over which you disagree - its ruling is [to be referred] to Allah. [Say], "That is Allah, my Lord; upon Him I have relied, and to Him I turn back

quran.arabic: فَاطِرُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ جَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَنۡفُسِكُمۡ اَزۡوَاجًا وَّمِنَ الۡاَنۡعَامِ اَزۡوَاجًاۚ يَذۡرَؤُكُمۡ فِيۡهِؕ لَيۡسَ كَمِثۡلِهٖ شَيۡءٌۚ وَهُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡبَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: [He is] Creator of the heavens and the earth. He has made for you from yourselves, mates, and among the cattle, mates; He multiplies you thereby. There is nothing like unto Him, and He is the Hearing, the Seeing

quran.arabic: لَهٗ مَقَالِيۡدُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِۚ يَبۡسُطُ الرِّزۡقَ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَقۡدِرُؕ اِنَّهٗ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: To Him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth. He extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]. Indeed He is, of all things, Knowing

quran.arabic: شَرَعَ لَكُمۡ مِّنَ الدِّيۡنِ مَا وَصّٰي بِهٖ نُوۡحًا وَّالَّذِيۡ٘ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ وَمَا وَصَّيۡنَا بِهٖ٘ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَمُوۡسٰي وَعِيۡسٰ٘ي اَنۡ اَقِيۡمُوا الدِّيۡنَ وَلَا تَتَفَرَّقُوۡا فِيۡهِؕ كَبُرَ عَلَي الۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَ مَا تَدۡعُوۡهُمۡ اِلَيۡهِؕ اَللّٰهُ يَجۡتَبِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِ مَنۡ يُّنِيۡبُؕ‏
quran.english: He has ordained for you of religion what He enjoined upon Noah and that which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], and what We enjoined upon Abraham and Moses and Jesus - to establish the religion and not be divided therein. Difficult for those who associate others with Allah is that to which you invite them. Allah chooses for Himself whom He wills and guides to Himself whoever turns back [to Him]

quran.arabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا جَآءَهُمُ الۡعِلۡمُ بَغۡيًاۭ بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ وَلَوۡلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتۡ مِنۡ رَّبِّكَ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّي لَّقُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ وَاِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡرِثُوا الۡكِتٰبَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡ لَفِيۡ شَكٍّ مِّنۡهُ مُرِيۡبٍ
quran.english: And they did not become divided until after knowledge had come to them - out of jealous animosity between themselves. And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord [postponing the penalty] until a specified time, it would have been concluded between them. And indeed, those who were granted inheritance of the Scripture after them are, concerning it, in disquieting doubt

quran.arabic: فَلِذٰلِكَ فَادۡعُۚ وَاسۡتَقِمۡ كَمَا٘ اُمِرۡتَۚ وَلَا تَتَّبِعۡ اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡۚ وَقُلۡ اٰمَنۡتُ بِمَا٘ اَنۡزَلَ اللّٰهُ مِنۡ كِتٰبٍۚ وَاُمِرۡتُ لِاَعۡدِلَ بَيۡنَكُمۡؕ اَللّٰهُ رَبُّنَا وَرَبُّكُمۡؕ لَنَا٘ اَعۡمَالُنَا وَلَكُمۡ اَعۡمَالُكُمۡؕ لَا حُجَّةَ بَيۡنَنَا وَبَيۡنَكُمۡؕ اَللّٰهُ يَجۡمَعُ بَيۡنَنَاۚ وَاِلَيۡهِ الۡمَصِيۡرُؕ‏
quran.english: So to that [religion of Allah] invite, [O Muhammad], and remain on a right course as you are commanded and do not follow their inclinations but say, "I have believed in what Allah has revealed of the Qur'an, and I have been commanded to do justice among you. Allah is our Lord and your Lord. For us are our deeds, and for you your deeds. There is no [need for] argument between us and you. Allah will bring us together, and to Him is the [final] destination

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يُحَآجُّوۡنَ فِي اللّٰهِ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا اسۡتُجِيۡبَ لَهٗ حُجَّتُهُمۡ دَاحِضَةٌ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡ وَعَلَيۡهِمۡ غَضَبٌ وَّلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ شَدِيۡدٌ
quran.english: And those who argue concerning Allah after He has been responded to - their argument is invalid with their Lord, and upon them is [His] wrath, and for them is a severe punishment

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡزَلَ الۡكِتٰبَ بِالۡحَقِّ وَالۡمِيۡزَانَؕ وَمَا يُدۡرِيۡكَ لَعَلَّ السَّاعَةَ قَرِيۡبٌ
quran.english: It is Allah who has sent down the Book in truth and [also] the balance. And what will make you perceive? Perhaps the Hour is near

quran.arabic: يَسۡتَعۡجِلُ بِهَا الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِهَاۚ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مُشۡفِقُوۡنَ مِنۡهَاۙ وَيَعۡلَمُوۡنَ اَنَّهَا الۡحَقُّؕ اَلَا٘ اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُمَارُوۡنَ فِي السَّاعَةِ لَفِيۡ ضَلٰلٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍ
quran.english: Those who do not believe in it are impatient for it, but those who believe are fearful of it and know that it is the truth. Unquestionably, those who dispute concerning the Hour are in extreme error

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ لَطِيۡفٌۭ بِعِبَادِهٖ يَرۡزُقُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُۚ وَهُوَ الۡقَوِيُّ الۡعَزِيۡزُࣖ‏
quran.english: Allah is Subtle with His servants; He gives provisions to whom He wills. And He is the Powerful, the Exalted in Might

quran.arabic: مَنۡ كَانَ يُرِيۡدُ حَرۡثَ الۡاٰخِرَةِ نَزِدۡ لَهٗ فِيۡ حَرۡثِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ كَانَ يُرِيۡدُ حَرۡثَ الدُّنۡيَا نُؤۡتِهٖ مِنۡهَاۙ وَمَا لَهٗ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ مِنۡ نَّصِيۡبٍ
quran.english: Whoever desires the harvest of the Hereafter - We increase for him in his harvest. And whoever desires the harvest of this world - We give him thereof, but there is not for him in the Hereafter any share

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَهُمۡ شُرَكٰٓؤُا شَرَعُوۡا لَهُمۡ مِّنَ الدِّيۡنِ مَا لَمۡ يَاۡذَنۭۡ بِهِ اللّٰهُؕ وَلَوۡلَا كَلِمَةُ الۡفَصۡلِ لَقُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ وَاِنَّ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Or have they other deities who have ordained for them a religion to which Allah has not consented? But if not for the decisive word, it would have been concluded between them. And indeed, the wrongdoers will have a painful punishment

quran.arabic: تَرَي الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ مُشۡفِقِيۡنَ مِمَّا كَسَبُوۡا وَهُوَ وَاقِعٌۭ بِهِمۡؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ فِيۡ رَوۡضٰتِ الۡجَنّٰتِۚ لَهُمۡ مَّا يَشَآءُوۡنَ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡؕ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الۡفَضۡلُ الۡكَبِيۡرُ
quran.english: You will see the wrongdoers fearful of what they have earned, and it will [certainly] befall them. And those who have believed and done righteous deeds will be in lush regions of the gardens [in Paradise] having whatever they will in the presence of their Lord. That is what is the great bounty

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ الَّذِيۡ يُبَشِّرُ اللّٰهُ عِبَادَهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِؕ قُلۡ لَّا٘ اَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ اَجۡرًا اِلَّا الۡمَوَدَّةَ فِي الۡقُرۡبٰيؕ وَمَنۡ يَّقۡتَرِفۡ حَسَنَةً نَّزِدۡ لَهٗ فِيۡهَا حُسۡنًاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ شَكُوۡرٌ
quran.english: It is that of which Allah gives good tidings to His servants who believe and do righteous deeds. Say, [O Muhammad], "I do not ask you for this message any payment [but] only good will through kinship." And whoever commits a good deed - We will increase for him good therein. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Appreciative

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ افۡتَرٰي عَلَي اللّٰهِ كَذِبًاۚ فَاِنۡ يَّشَاِ اللّٰهُ يَخۡتِمۡ عَلٰي قَلۡبِكَؕ وَيَمۡحُ اللّٰهُ الۡبَاطِلَ وَيُحِقُّ الۡحَقَّ بِكَلِمٰتِهٖؕ اِنَّهٗ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُوۡرِ
quran.english: Or do they say, "He has invented about Allah a lie"? But if Allah willed, He could seal over your heart. And Allah eliminates falsehood and establishes the truth by His words. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ يَقۡبَلُ التَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهٖ وَيَعۡفُوۡا عَنِ السَّيِّاٰتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تَفۡعَلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And it is He who accepts repentance from his servants and pardons misdeeds, and He knows what you do

quran.arabic: وَيَسۡتَجِيۡبُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَيَزِيۡدُهُمۡ مِّنۡ فَضۡلِهٖؕ وَالۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ شَدِيۡدٌ
quran.english: And He answers [the supplication of] those who have believed and done righteous deeds and increases [for] them from His bounty. But the disbelievers will have a severe punishment

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ اللّٰهُ الرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهٖ لَبَغَوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلٰكِنۡ يُّنَزِّلُ بِقَدَرٍ مَّا يَشَآءُؕ اِنَّهٗ بِعِبَادِهٖ خَبِيۡرٌۭ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And if Allah had extended [excessively] provision for His servants, they would have committed tyranny throughout the earth. But He sends [it] down in an amount which He wills. Indeed He is, of His servants, Acquainted and Seeing

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ يُنَزِّلُ الۡغَيۡثَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُوۡا وَيَنۡشُرُ رَحۡمَتَهٗؕ وَهُوَ الۡوَلِيُّ الۡحَمِيۡدُ
quran.english: And it is He who sends down the rain after they had despaired and spreads His mercy. And He is the Protector, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ خَلۡقُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَثَّ فِيۡهِمَا مِنۡ دَآبَّةٍؕ وَهُوَ عَلٰي جَمۡعِهِمۡ اِذَا يَشَآءُ قَدِيۡرٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And of his signs is the creation of the heavens and earth and what He has dispersed throughout them of creatures. And He, for gathering them when He wills, is competent

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَصَابَكُمۡ مِّنۡ مُّصِيۡبَةٍ فَبِمَا كَسَبَتۡ اَيۡدِيۡكُمۡ وَيَعۡفُوۡا عَنۡ كَثِيۡرٍؕ‏
quran.english: And whatever strikes you of disaster - it is for what your hands have earned; but He pardons much

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ بِمُعۡجِزِيۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِۚۖ وَمَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ وَّلِيٍّ وَّلَا نَصِيۡرٍ
quran.english: And you will not cause failure [to Allah] upon the earth. And you have not besides Allah any protector or helper

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ اٰيٰتِهِ الۡجَوَارِ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ كَالۡاَعۡلَامِؕ‏
quran.english: And of His signs are the ships in the sea, like mountains

quran.arabic: اِنۡ يَّشَاۡ يُسۡكِنِ الرِّيۡحَ فَيَظۡلَلۡنَ رَوَاكِدَ عَلٰي ظَهۡرِهٖؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٍ شَكُوۡرٍۙ‏
quran.english: If He willed, He could still the wind, and they would remain motionless on its surface. Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يُوۡبِقۡهُنَّ بِمَا كَسَبُوۡا وَيَعۡفُ عَنۡ كَثِيۡرٍۙ‏
quran.english: Or He could destroy them for what they earned; but He pardons much

quran.arabic: وَّيَعۡلَمَ الَّذِيۡنَ يُجَادِلُوۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اٰيٰتِنَاؕ مَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّحِيۡصٍ
quran.english: And [that is so] those who dispute concerning Our signs may know that for them there is no place of escape

quran.arabic: فَمَا٘ اُوۡتِيۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍ فَمَتَاعُ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاۚ وَمَا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ خَيۡرٌ وَّاَبۡقٰي لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَلٰي رَبِّهِمۡ يَتَوَكَّلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: So whatever thing you have been given - it is but [for] enjoyment of the worldly life. But what is with Allah is better and more lasting for those who have believed and upon their Lord rely

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يَجۡتَنِبُوۡنَ كَبٰٓئِرَ الۡاِثۡمِ وَالۡفَوَاحِشَ وَاِذَا مَا غَضِبُوۡا هُمۡ يَغۡفِرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, and when they are angry, they forgive

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اسۡتَجَابُوۡا لِرَبِّهِمۡ وَاَقَامُوا الصَّلٰوةَࣕ وَاَمۡرُهُمۡ شُوۡرٰي بَيۡنَهُمۡࣕ وَمِمَّا رَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ يُنۡفِقُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And those who have responded to their lord and established prayer and whose affair is [determined by] consultation among themselves, and from what We have provided them, they spend

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اِذَا٘ اَصَابَهُمُ الۡبَغۡيُ هُمۡ يَنۡتَصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And those who, when tyranny strikes them, they defend themselves

quran.arabic: وَجَزٰٓؤُا سَيِّئَةٍ سَيِّئَةٌ مِّثۡلُهَاۚ فَمَنۡ عَفَا وَاَصۡلَحَ فَاَجۡرُهٗ عَلَي اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّهٗ لَا يُحِبُّ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And the retribution for an evil act is an evil one like it, but whoever pardons and makes reconciliation - his reward is [due] from Allah. Indeed, He does not like wrongdoers

quran.arabic: وَلَمَنِ انۡتَصَرَ بَعۡدَ ظُلۡمِهٖ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ مَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ سَبِيۡلٍؕ‏
quran.english: And whoever avenges himself after having been wronged - those have not upon them any cause [for blame]

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا السَّبِيۡلُ عَلَي الَّذِيۡنَ يَظۡلِمُوۡنَ النَّاسَ وَيَبۡغُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ الۡحَقِّؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: The cause is only against the ones who wrong the people and tyrannize upon the earth without right. Those will have a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَلَمَنۡ صَبَرَ وَغَفَرَ اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ لَمِنۡ عَزۡمِ الۡاُمُوۡرِࣖ‏
quran.english: And whoever is patient and forgives - indeed, that is of the matters [requiring] determination

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يُّضۡلِلِ اللّٰهُ فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ وَّلِيٍّ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِهٖؕ وَتَرَي الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ لَمَّا رَاَوُا الۡعَذَابَ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ هَلۡ اِلٰي مَرَدٍّ مِّنۡ سَبِيۡلٍۚ‏
quran.english: And he whom Allah sends astray - for him there is no protector beyond Him. And you will see the wrongdoers, when they see the punishment, saying, "Is there for return [to the former world] any way

quran.arabic: وَتَرٰىهُمۡ يُعۡرَضُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهَا خٰشِعِيۡنَ مِنَ الذُّلِّ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ مِنۡ طَرۡفٍ خَفِيٍّؕ وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِنَّ الۡخٰسِرِيۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ خَسِرُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَهُمۡ وَاَهۡلِيۡهِمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ اَلَا٘ اِنَّ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ فِيۡ عَذَابٍ مُّقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And you will see them being exposed to the Fire, humbled from humiliation, looking from [behind] a covert glance. And those who had believed will say, "Indeed, the [true] losers are the ones who lost themselves and their families on the Day of Resurrection. Unquestionably, the wrongdoers are in an enduring punishment

quran.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ اَوۡلِيَآءَ يَنۡصُرُوۡنَهُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ وَمَنۡ يُّضۡلِلِ اللّٰهُ فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ سَبِيۡلٍؕ‏
quran.english: And there will not be for them any allies to aid them other than Allah. And whoever Allah sends astray - for him there is no way

quran.arabic: اِسۡتَجِيۡبُوۡا لِرَبِّكُمۡ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَ يَوۡمٌ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهٗ مِنَ اللّٰهِؕ مَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّلۡجَاٍ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ وَّمَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ نَّكِيۡرٍ
quran.english: Respond to your Lord before a Day comes from Allah of which there is no repelling. No refuge will you have that day, nor for you will there be any denial

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ اَعۡرَضُوۡا فَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَفِيۡظًاؕ اِنۡ عَلَيۡكَ اِلَّا الۡبَلٰغُؕ وَاِنَّا٘ اِذَا٘ اَذَقۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ مِنَّا رَحۡمَةً فَرِحَ بِهَاۚ وَاِنۡ تُصِبۡهُمۡ سَيِّئَةٌۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَتۡ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ فَاِنَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ كَفُوۡرٌ
quran.english: But if they turn away - then We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], over them as a guardian; upon you is only [the duty of] notification. And indeed, when We let man taste mercy from us, he rejoices in it; but if evil afflicts him for what his hands have put forth, then indeed, man is ungrateful

quran.arabic: لِلّٰهِ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ يَخۡلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُؕ يَهَبُ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ اِنَاثًا وَّيَهَبُ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ الذُّكُوۡرَۙ‏
quran.english: To Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth; He creates what he wills. He gives to whom He wills female [children], and He gives to whom He wills males

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يُزَوِّجُهُمۡ ذُكۡرَانًا وَّاِنَاثًاۚ وَيَجۡعَلُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ عَقِيۡمًاؕ اِنَّهٗ عَلِيۡمٌ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Or He makes them [both] males and females, and He renders whom He wills barren. Indeed, He is Knowing and Competent

quran.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لِبَشَرٍ اَنۡ يُّكَلِّمَهُ اللّٰهُ اِلَّا وَحۡيًا اَوۡ مِنۡ وَّرَآئِ حِجَابٍ اَوۡ يُرۡسِلَ رَسُوۡلًا فَيُوۡحِيَ بِاِذۡنِهٖ مَا يَشَآءُؕ اِنَّهٗ عَلِيٌّ حَكِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And it is not for any human being that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a partition or that He sends a messenger to reveal, by His permission, what He wills. Indeed, He is Most High and Wise

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ اَوۡحَيۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ رُوۡحًا مِّنۡ اَمۡرِنَاؕ مَا كُنۡتَ تَدۡرِيۡ مَا الۡكِتٰبُ وَلَا الۡاِيۡمَانُ وَلٰكِنۡ جَعَلۡنٰهُ نُوۡرًا نَّهۡدِيۡ بِهٖ مَنۡ نَّشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَاؕ وَاِنَّكَ لَتَهۡدِيۡ٘ اِلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: And thus We have revealed to you an inspiration of Our command. You did not know what is the Book or [what is] faith, but We have made it a light by which We guide whom We will of Our servants. And indeed, [O Muhammad], you guide to a straight path

quran.arabic: صِرَاطِ اللّٰهِ الَّذِيۡ لَهٗ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ اَلَا٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِ تَصِيۡرُ الۡاُمُوۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: The path of Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Unquestionably, to Allah do [all] matters evolve
Ha, Meem

quran.arabic: وَالۡكِتٰبِ الۡمُبِيۡنِۛۙ‏
quran.english: By the clear Book

quran.arabic: اِنَّا جَعَلۡنٰهُ قُرۡءٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَعۡقِلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have made it an Arabic Qur'an that you might understand

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ فِيۡ٘ اُمِّ الۡكِتٰبِ لَدَيۡنَا لَعَلِيٌّ حَكِيۡمٌؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed it is, in the Mother of the Book with Us, exalted and full of wisdom

quran.arabic: اَفَنَضۡرِبُ عَنۡكُمُ الذِّكۡرَ صَفۡحًا اَنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمًا مُّسۡرِفِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then should We turn the message away, disregarding you, because you are a transgressing people

quran.arabic: وَكَمۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ نَّبِيٍّ فِي الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And how many a prophet We sent among the former peoples

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ نَّبِيٍّ اِلَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَ
quran.english: But there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him

quran.arabic: فَاَهۡلَكۡنَا٘ اَشَدَّ مِنۡهُمۡ بَطۡشًا وَّمَضٰي مَثَلُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We destroyed greater than them in [striking] power, and the example of the former peoples has preceded

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ سَاَلۡتَهُمۡ مَّنۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ لَيَقُوۡلُنَّ خَلَقَهُنَّ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡعَلِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: And if you should ask them, "Who has created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "They were created by the Exalted in Might, the Knowing

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الۡاَرۡضَ مَهۡدًا وَّجَعَلَ لَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَهۡتَدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ نَزَّلَ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ بِقَدَرٍۚ فَاَنۡشَرۡنَا بِهٖ بَلۡدَةً مَّيۡتًاۚ كَذٰلِكَ تُخۡرَجُوۡنَ
quran.english: And who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts, and We revive thereby a dead land - thus will you be brought forth

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ الۡاَزۡوَاجَ كُلَّهَا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡفُلۡكِ وَالۡاَنۡعَامِ مَا تَرۡكَبُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And who created the species, all of them, and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount

quran.arabic: لِتَسۡتَوٗا عَلٰي ظُهُوۡرِهٖ ثُمَّ تَذۡكُرُوۡا نِعۡمَةَ رَبِّكُمۡ اِذَا اسۡتَوَيۡتُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ وَتَقُوۡلُوۡا سُبۡحٰنَ الَّذِيۡ سَخَّرَ لَنَا هٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهٗ مُقۡرِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: That you may settle yourselves upon their backs and then remember the favor of your Lord when you have settled upon them and say. "Exalted is He who has subjected this to us, and we could not have [otherwise] subdued it

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّا٘ اِلٰي رَبِّنَا لَمُنۡقَلِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed we, to our Lord, will [surely] return

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلُوۡا لَهٗ مِنۡ عِبَادِهٖ جُزۡءًاؕ اِنَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ لَكَفُوۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌࣖؕ‏
quran.english: But they have attributed to Him from His servants a portion. Indeed, man is clearly ungrateful

quran.arabic: اَمِ اتَّخَذَ مِمَّا يَخۡلُقُ بَنٰتٍ وَّاَصۡفٰىكُمۡ بِالۡبَنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Or has He taken, out of what He has created, daughters and chosen you for [having] sons

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا بُشِّرَ اَحَدُهُمۡ بِمَا ضَرَبَ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ مَثَلًا ظَلَّ وَجۡهُهٗ مُسۡوَدًّا وَّهُوَ كَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And when one of them is given good tidings of that which he attributes to the Most Merciful in comparison, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief

quran.arabic: اَوَمَنۡ يُّنَشَّؤُا فِي الۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهُوَ فِي الۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: So is one brought up in ornaments while being during conflict unevident [attributed to Allah]

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلُوا الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةَ الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ عِبٰدُ الرَّحۡمٰنِ اِنَاثًاؕ اَشَهِدُوۡا خَلۡقَهُمۡ سَتُكۡتَبُ شَهَادَتُهُمۡ وَيُسۡـَٔلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they have made the angels, who are servants of the Most Merciful, females. Did they witness their creation? Their testimony will be recorded, and they will be questioned

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا لَوۡ شَآءَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ مَا عَبَدۡنٰهُمۡؕ مَا لَهُمۡ بِذٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍࣗ اِنۡ هُمۡ اِلَّا يَخۡرُصُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And they said, "If the Most Merciful had willed, we would not have worshipped them." They have of that no knowledge. They are not but falsifying

quran.arabic: اَمۡ اٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡ كِتٰبًا مِّنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ فَهُمۡ بِهٖ مُسۡتَمۡسِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or have We given them a book before the Qur'an to which they are adhering

quran.arabic: بَلۡ قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا وَجَدۡنَا٘ اٰبَآءَنَا عَلٰ٘ي اُمَّةٍ وَّاِنَّا عَلٰ٘ي اٰثٰرِهِمۡ مُّهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, they say, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are in their footsteps [rightly] guided

quran.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ مَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَ فِيۡ قَرۡيَةٍ مِّنۡ نَّذِيۡرٍ اِلَّا قَالَ مُتۡرَفُوۡهَا٘ۙ اِنَّا وَجَدۡنَا٘ اٰبَآءَنَا عَلٰ٘ي اُمَّةٍ وَّاِنَّا عَلٰ٘ي اٰثٰرِهِمۡ مُّقۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And similarly, We did not send before you any warner into a city except that its affluent said, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are, in their footsteps, following

quran.arabic: قٰلَ اَوَلَوۡ جِئۡتُكُمۡ بِاَهۡدٰي مِمَّا وَجَدۡتُّمۡ عَلَيۡهِ اٰبَآءَكُمۡؕ قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا بِمَا٘ اُرۡسِلۡتُمۡ بِهٖ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Each warner] said, "Even if I brought you better guidance than that [religion] upon which you found your fathers?" They said, "Indeed we, in that with which you were sent, are disbelievers

quran.arabic: فَانۡتَقَمۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ فَانۡظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So we took retribution from them; then see how was the end of the deniers

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمُ لِاَبِيۡهِ وَقَوۡمِهٖ٘ اِنَّنِيۡ بَرَآءٌ مِّمَّا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Abraham said to his father and his people, "Indeed, I am disassociated from that which you worship

quran.arabic: اِلَّا الَّذِيۡ فَطَرَنِيۡ فَاِنَّهٗ سَيَهۡدِيۡنِ
quran.english: Except for He who created me; and indeed, He will guide me

quran.arabic: وَجَعَلَهَا كَلِمَةًۭ بَاقِيَةً فِيۡ عَقِبِهٖ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return [to it]

quran.arabic: بَلۡ مَتَّعۡتُ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ وَاٰبَآءَهُمۡ حَتّٰي جَآءَهُمُ الۡحَقُّ وَرَسُوۡلٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: However, I gave enjoyment to these [people of Makkah] and their fathers until there came to them the truth and a clear Messenger

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ الۡحَقُّ قَالُوۡا هٰذَا سِحۡرٌ وَّاِنَّا بِهٖ كٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: But when the truth came to them, they said, "This is magic, and indeed we are, concerning it, disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا لَوۡلَا نُزِّلَ هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنُ عَلٰي رَجُلٍ مِّنَ الۡقَرۡيَتَيۡنِ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And they said, "Why was this Qur'an not sent down upon a great man from [one of] the two cities

quran.arabic: اَهُمۡ يَقۡسِمُوۡنَ رَحۡمَتَ رَبِّكَؕ نَحۡنُ قَسَمۡنَا بَيۡنَهُمۡ مَّعِيۡشَتَهُمۡ فِي الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَا وَرَفَعۡنَا بَعۡضَهُمۡ فَوۡقَ بَعۡضٍ دَرَجٰتٍ لِّيَتَّخِذَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ بَعۡضًا سُخۡرِيًّاؕ وَرَحۡمَتُ رَبِّكَ خَيۡرٌ مِّمَّا يَجۡمَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Do they distribute the mercy of your Lord? It is We who have apportioned among them their livelihood in the life of this world and have raised some of them above others in degrees [of rank] that they may make use of one another for service. But the mercy of your Lord is better than whatever they accumulate

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ يَّكُوۡنَ النَّاسُ اُمَّةً وَّاحِدَةً لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَنۡ يَّكۡفُرُ بِالرَّحۡمٰنِ لِبُيُوۡتِهِمۡ سُقُفًا مِّنۡ فِضَّةٍ وَّمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And if it were not that the people would become one community [of disbelievers], We would have made for those who disbelieve in the Most Merciful - for their houses - ceilings and stairways of silver upon which to mount

quran.arabic: وَلِبُيُوۡتِهِمۡ اَبۡوَابًا وَّسُرُرًا عَلَيۡهَا يَتَّكِـُٔوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And for their houses - doors and couches [of silver] upon which to recline

quran.arabic: وَزُخۡرُفًاؕ وَاِنۡ كُلُّ ذٰلِكَ لَمَّا مَتَاعُ الۡحَيٰوةِ الدُّنۡيَاؕ وَالۡاٰخِرَةُ عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And gold ornament. But all that is not but the enjoyment of worldly life. And the Hereafter with your Lord is for the righteous

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّعۡشُ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِ الرَّحۡمٰنِ نُقَيِّضۡ لَهٗ شَيۡطٰنًا فَهُوَ لَهٗ قَرِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهُمۡ لَيَصُدُّوۡنَهُمۡ عَنِ السَّبِيۡلِ وَيَحۡسَبُوۡنَ اَنَّهُمۡ مُّهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, the devils avert them from the way [of guidance] while they think that they are [rightly] guided

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا جَآءَنَا قَالَ يٰلَيۡتَ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنَكَ بُعۡدَ الۡمَشۡرِقَيۡنِ فَبِئۡسَ الۡقَرِيۡنُ
quran.english: Until, when he comes to Us [at Judgement], he says [to his companion], "Oh, I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west - how wretched a companion

quran.arabic: وَلَنۡ يَّنۡفَعَكُمُ الۡيَوۡمَ اِذۡ ظَّلَمۡتُمۡ اَنَّكُمۡ فِي الۡعَذَابِ مُشۡتَرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: And never will it benefit you that Day, when you have wronged, that you are [all] sharing in the punishment

quran.arabic: اَفَاَنۡتَ تُسۡمِعُ الصُّمَّ اَوۡ تَهۡدِي الۡعُمۡيَ وَمَنۡ كَانَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muhammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error

quran.arabic: فَاِمَّا نَذۡهَبَنَّ بِكَ فَاِنَّا مِنۡهُمۡ مُّنۡتَقِمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And whether [or not] We take you away [in death], indeed, We will take retribution upon them

quran.arabic: اَوۡ نُرِيَنَّكَ الَّذِيۡ وَعَدۡنٰهُمۡ فَاِنَّا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مُّقۡتَدِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or whether [or not] We show you that which We have promised them, indeed, We are Perfect in Ability

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَمۡسِكۡ بِالَّذِيۡ٘ اُوۡحِيَ اِلَيۡكَۚ اِنَّكَ عَلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: So adhere to that which is revealed to you. Indeed, you are on a straight path

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَذِكۡرٌ لَّكَ وَلِقَوۡمِكَۚ وَسَوۡفَ تُسۡـَٔلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, it is a remembrance for you and your people, and you [all] are going to be questioned

quran.arabic: وَسۡـَٔلۡ مَنۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مِنۡ قَبۡلِكَ مِنۡ رُّسُلِنَا٘ࣗ اَجَعَلۡنَا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ الرَّحۡمٰنِ اٰلِهَةً يُّعۡبَدُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا مُوۡسٰي بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَا۠ئِهٖ فَقَالَ اِنِّيۡ رَسُوۡلُ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And certainly did We send Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, and he said, "Indeed, I am the messenger of the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اِذَا هُمۡ مِّنۡهَا يَضۡحَكُوۡنَ
quran.english: But when he brought them Our signs, at once they laughed at them

quran.arabic: وَمَا نُرِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ اٰيَةٍ اِلَّا هِيَ اَكۡبَرُ مِنۡ اُخۡتِهَاؗ وَاَخَذۡنٰهُمۡ بِالۡعَذَابِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith]

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا يٰ٘اَيُّهَ السَّاحِرُ ادۡعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ بِمَا عَهِدَ عِنۡدَكَۚ اِنَّنَا لَمُهۡتَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they said [to Moses], "O magician, invoke for us your Lord by what He has promised you. Indeed, we will be guided

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا كَشَفۡنَا عَنۡهُمُ الۡعَذَابَ اِذَا هُمۡ يَنۡكُثُوۡنَ
quran.english: But when We removed from them the affliction, at once they broke their word

quran.arabic: وَنَادٰي فِرۡعَوۡنُ فِيۡ قَوۡمِهٖ قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اَلَيۡسَ لِيۡ مُلۡكُ مِصۡرَ وَهٰذِهِ الۡاَنۡهٰرُ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِيۡۚ اَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And Pharaoh called out among his people; he said, "O my people, does not the kingdom of Egypt belong to me, and these rivers flowing beneath me; then do you not see

quran.arabic: اَمۡ اَنَا خَيۡرٌ مِّنۡ هٰذَا الَّذِيۡ هُوَ مَهِيۡنٌ ࣢ۙ وَّلَا يَكَادُ يُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: Or am I [not] better than this one who is insignificant and hardly makes himself clear

quran.arabic: فَلَوۡلَا٘ اُلۡقِيَ عَلَيۡهِ اَسۡوِرَةٌ مِّنۡ ذَهَبٍ اَوۡ جَآءَ مَعَهُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ مُقۡتَرِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then why have there not been placed upon him bracelets of gold or come with him the angels in conjunction

quran.arabic: فَاسۡتَخَفَّ قَوۡمَهٗ فَاَطَاعُوۡهُؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَوۡمًا فٰسِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: So he bluffed his people, and they obeyed him. Indeed, they were [themselves] a people defiantly disobedient [of Allah]

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا٘ اٰسَفُوۡنَا انۡتَقَمۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ فَاَغۡرَقۡنٰهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And when they angered Us, We took retribution from them and drowned them all

quran.arabic: فَجَعَلۡنٰهُمۡ سَلَفًا وَّمَثَلًا لِّلۡاٰخِرِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We made them a precedent and an example for the later peoples

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا ضُرِبَ ابۡنُ مَرۡيَمَ مَثَلًا اِذَا قَوۡمُكَ مِنۡهُ يَصِدُّوۡنَ
quran.english: And when the son of Mary was presented as an example, immediately your people laughed aloud

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡ٘ا ءَاٰلِهَتُنَا خَيۡرٌ اَمۡ هُوَؕ مَا ضَرَبُوۡهُ لَكَ اِلَّا جَدَلًاؕ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٌ خَصِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they said, "Are your gods better, or is he?" They did not present the comparison except for [mere] argument. But, [in fact], they are a people prone to dispute

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا عَبۡدٌ اَنۡعَمۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ وَجَعَلۡنٰهُ مَثَلًا لِّبَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَؕ‏
quran.english: Jesus was not but a servant upon whom We bestowed favor, and We made him an example for the Children of Israel

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلۡنَا مِنۡكُمۡ مَّلٰٓئِكَةً فِي الۡاَرۡضِ يَخۡلُفُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if We willed, We could have made [instead] of you angels succeeding [one another] on the earth

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَعِلۡمٌ لِّلسَّاعَةِ فَلَا تَمۡتَرُنَّ بِهَا وَاتَّبِعُوۡنِؕ هٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And indeed, Jesus will be [a sign for] knowledge of the Hour, so be not in doubt of it, and follow Me. This is a straight path

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكُمُ الشَّيۡطٰنُۚ اِنَّهٗ لَكُمۡ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And never let Satan avert you. Indeed, he is to you a clear enemy

quran.arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَ عِيۡسٰي بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ قَالَ قَدۡ جِئۡتُكُمۡ بِالۡحِكۡمَةِ وَلِاُبَيِّنَ لَكُمۡ بَعۡضَ الَّذِيۡ تَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ فِيۡهِۚ فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِ
quran.english: And when Jesus brought clear proofs, he said, "I have come to you with wisdom and to make clear to you some of that over which you differ, so fear Allah and obey me

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ رَبِّيۡ وَرَبُّكُمۡ فَاعۡبُدُوۡهُؕ هٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Indeed, Allah is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. This is a straight path

quran.arabic: فَاخۡتَلَفَ الۡاَحۡزَابُ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِهِمۡۚ فَوَيۡلٌ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا مِنۡ عَذَابِ يَوۡمٍ اَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: But the denominations from among them differed [and separated], so woe to those who have wronged from the punishment of a painful Day

quran.arabic: هَلۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ اِلَّا السَّاعَةَ اَنۡ تَاۡتِيَهُمۡ بَغۡتَةً وَّهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Are they waiting except for the Hour to come upon them suddenly while they perceive not

quran.arabic: اَلۡاَخِلَّآءُ يَوۡمَئِذٍۭ بَعۡضُهُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ عَدُوٌّ اِلَّا الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَࣖؕ‏
quran.english: Close friends, that Day, will be enemies to each other, except for the righteous

quran.arabic: يٰعِبَادِ لَا خَوۡفٌ عَلَيۡكُمُ الۡيَوۡمَ وَلَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ تَحۡزَنُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [To whom Allah will say], "O My servants, no fear will there be concerning you this Day, nor will you grieve

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا وَكَانُوۡا مُسۡلِمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [You] who believed in Our verses and were Muslims

quran.arabic: اُدۡخُلُوا الۡجَنَّةَ اَنۡتُمۡ وَاَزۡوَاجُكُمۡ تُحۡبَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Enter Paradise, you and your kinds, delighted

quran.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِصِحَافٍ مِّنۡ ذَهَبٍ وَّاَكۡوَابٍۚ وَفِيۡهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِيۡهِ الۡاَنۡفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ الۡاَعۡيُنُۚ وَاَنۡتُمۡ فِيۡهَا خٰلِدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold. And therein is whatever the souls desire and [what] delights the eyes, and you will abide therein eternally

quran.arabic: وَتِلۡكَ الۡجَنَّةُ الَّتِيۡ٘ اُوۡرِثۡتُمُوۡهَا بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And that is Paradise which you are made to inherit for what you used to do

quran.arabic: لَكُمۡ فِيۡهَا فَاكِهَةٌ كَثِيۡرَةٌ مِّنۡهَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَ
quran.english: For you therein is much fruit from which you will eat

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ فِيۡ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the criminals will be in the punishment of Hell, abiding eternally

quran.arabic: لَا يُفَتَّرُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَهُمۡ فِيۡهِ مُبۡلِسُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: It will not be allowed to subside for them, and they, therein, are in despair

quran.arabic: وَمَا ظَلَمۡنٰهُمۡ وَلٰكِنۡ كَانُوۡا هُمُ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We did not wrong them, but it was they who were the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: وَنَادَوۡا يٰمٰلِكُ لِيَقۡضِ عَلَيۡنَا رَبُّكَؕ قَالَ اِنَّكُمۡ مّٰكِثُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they will call, "O Malik, let your Lord put an end to us!" He will say, "Indeed, you will remain

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ جِئۡنٰكُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَكُمۡ لِلۡحَقِّ كٰرِهُوۡنَ
quran.english: We had certainly brought you the truth, but most of you, to the truth, were averse

quran.arabic: اَمۡ اَبۡرَمُوۡ٘ا اَمۡرًا فَاِنَّا مُبۡرِمُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Or have they devised [some] affair? But indeed, We are devising [a plan]

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يَحۡسَبُوۡنَ اَنَّا لَا نَسۡمَعُ سِرَّهُمۡ وَنَجۡوٰىهُمۡؕ بَلٰي وَرُسُلُنَا لَدَيۡهِمۡ يَكۡتُبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or do they think that We hear not their secrets and their private conversations? Yes, [We do], and Our messengers are with them recording

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنۡ كَانَ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ وَلَدٌࣗۖ فَاَنَا اَوَّلُ الۡعٰبِدِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "If the Most Merciful had a son, then I would be the first of [his] worshippers

quran.arabic: سُبۡحٰنَ رَبِّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ رَبِّ الۡعَرۡشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: Exalted is the Lord of the heavens and the earth, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe

quran.arabic: فَذَرۡهُمۡ يَخُوۡضُوۡا وَيَلۡعَبُوۡا حَتّٰي يُلٰقُوۡا يَوۡمَهُمُ الَّذِيۡ يُوۡعَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ فِي السَّمَآءِ اِلٰهٌ وَّفِي الۡاَرۡضِ اِلٰهٌؕ وَهُوَ الۡحَكِيۡمُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: And it is Allah who is [the only] deity in the heaven, and on the earth [the only] deity. And He is the Wise, the Knowing

quran.arabic: وَتَبٰرَكَ الَّذِيۡ لَهٗ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۚ وَعِنۡدَهٗ عِلۡمُ السَّاعَةِۚ وَاِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And blessed is He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the Hour and to whom you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَمۡلِكُ الَّذِيۡنَ يَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهِ الشَّفَاعَةَ اِلَّا مَنۡ شَهِدَ بِالۡحَقِّ وَهُمۡ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know

quran.arabic: وَلَئِنۡ سَاَلۡتَهُمۡ مَّنۡ خَلَقَهُمۡ لَيَقُوۡلُنَّ اللّٰهُ فَاَنّٰي يُؤۡفَكُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allah." So how are they deluded

quran.arabic: وَقِيۡلِهٖ يٰرَبِّ اِنَّ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ قَوۡمٌ لَّا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۘ‏
quran.english: And [Allah acknowledges] his saying, "O my Lord, indeed these are a people who do not believe

quran.arabic: فَاصۡفَحۡ عَنۡهُمۡ وَقُلۡ سَلٰمٌؕ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So turn aside from them and say, "Peace." But they are going to know
Ha, Meem

quran.arabic: وَالۡكِتٰبِ الۡمُبِيۡنِۙۛ‏
quran.english: By the clear Book

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ فِيۡ لَيۡلَةٍ مُّبٰرَكَةٍ اِنَّا كُنَّا مُنۡذِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind]

quran.arabic: فِيۡهَا يُفۡرَقُ كُلُّ اَمۡرٍ حَكِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: On that night is made distinct every precise matter

quran.arabic: اَمۡرًا مِّنۡ عِنۡدِنَاؕ اِنَّا كُنَّا مُرۡسِلِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

quran.arabic: رَحۡمَةً مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ السَّمِيۡعُ الۡعَلِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing

quran.arabic: رَبِّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۘ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ مُّوۡقِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain

quran.arabic: لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَ يُحۡيٖ وَيُمِيۡتُؕ رَبُّكُمۡ وَرَبُّ اٰبَآئِكُمُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers

quran.arabic: بَلۡ هُمۡ فِيۡ شَكٍّ يَّلۡعَبُوۡنَ
quran.english: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves

quran.arabic: فَارۡتَقِبۡ يَوۡمَ تَاۡتِي السَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke

quran.arabic: يَّغۡشَي النَّاسَؕ هٰذَا عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Covering the people; this is a painful torment

quran.arabic: رَبَّنَا اكۡشِفۡ عَنَّا الۡعَذَابَ اِنَّا مُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers

quran.arabic: اَنّٰي لَهُمُ الذِّكۡرٰي وَقَدۡ جَآءَهُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوۡا عَنۡهُ وَقَالُوۡا مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجۡنُوۡنٌۘ‏
quran.english: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كَاشِفُوا الۡعَذَابِ قَلِيۡلًا اِنَّكُمۡ عَآئِدُوۡنَۘ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief]

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَبۡطِشُ الۡبَطۡشَةَ الۡكُبۡرٰيۚ اِنَّا مُنۡتَقِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ فَتَنَّا قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَجَآءَهُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ كَرِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger

quran.arabic: اَنۡ اَدُّوۡ٘ا اِلَيَّ عِبَادَ اللّٰهِؕ اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ رَسُوۡلٌ اَمِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allah. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

quran.arabic: وَّاَنۡ لَّا تَعۡلُوۡا عَلَي اللّٰهِؕ اِنِّيۡ٘ اٰتِيۡكُمۡ بِسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allah. Indeed, I have come to you with clear authority

quran.arabic: وَاِنِّيۡ عُذۡتُ بِرَبِّيۡ وَرَبِّكُمۡ اَنۡ تَرۡجُمُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ لَّمۡ تُؤۡمِنُوۡا لِيۡ فَاعۡتَزِلُوۡنِ
quran.english: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone

quran.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهٗ٘ اَنَّ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ قَوۡمٌ مُّجۡرِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people

quran.arabic: فَاَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِيۡ لَيۡلًا اِنَّكُمۡ مُّتَّبَعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Allah said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued

quran.arabic: وَاتۡرُكِ الۡبَحۡرَ رَهۡوًاؕ اِنَّهُمۡ جُنۡدٌ مُّغۡرَقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned

quran.arabic: كَمۡ تَرَكُوۡا مِنۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

quran.arabic: وَّزُرُوۡعٍ وَّمَقَامٍ كَرِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: And crops and noble sites

quran.arabic: وَّنَعۡمَةٍ كَانُوۡا فِيۡهَا فٰكِهِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And comfort wherein they were amused

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَࣞ وَاَوۡرَثۡنٰهَا قَوۡمًا اٰخَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people

quran.arabic: فَمَا بَكَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمُ السَّمَآءُ وَالۡاَرۡضُ وَمَا كَانُوۡا مُنۡظَرِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ نَجَّيۡنَا بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ مِنَ الۡعَذَابِ الۡمُهِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment

quran.arabic: مِنۡ فِرۡعَوۡنَؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ الۡمُسۡرِفِيۡنَ
quran.english: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدِ اخۡتَرۡنٰهُمۡ عَلٰي عِلۡمٍ عَلَي الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds

quran.arabic: وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاٰيٰتِ مَا فِيۡهِ بَلٰٓؤٌا مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هِيَ اِلَّا مَوۡتَتُنَا الۡاُوۡلٰي وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُنۡشَرِيۡنَ
quran.english: There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected

quran.arabic: فَاۡتُوۡا بِاٰبَآئِنَا٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: اَهُمۡ خَيۡرٌ اَمۡ قَوۡمُ تُبَّعٍۙ وَّالَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡؕ اَهۡلَكۡنٰهُمۡؗ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا مُجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Are they better or the people of Tubba' and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals

quran.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا لٰعِبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play

quran.arabic: مَا خَلَقۡنٰهُمَا٘ اِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know

quran.arabic: اِنَّ يَوۡمَ الۡفَصۡلِ مِيۡقَاتُهُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِيۡ مَوۡلًي عَنۡ مَّوۡلًي شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا هُمۡ يُنۡصَرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ رَّحِمَ اللّٰهُؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: Except those [believers] on whom Allah has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

quran.arabic: اِنَّ شَجَرَتَ الزَّقُّوۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the tree of zaqqum

quran.arabic: طَعَامُ الۡاَثِيۡمِۚۛۖ‏
quran.english: Is food for the sinful

quran.arabic: كَالۡمُهۡلِۚۛ يَغۡلِيۡ فِي الۡبُطُوۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies

quran.arabic: كَغَلۡيِ الۡحَمِيۡمِ
quran.english: Like the boiling of scalding water

quran.arabic: خُذُوۡهُ فَاعۡتِلُوۡهُ اِلٰي سَوَآءِ الۡجَحِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوۡا فَوۡقَ رَاۡسِهٖ مِنۡ عَذَابِ الۡحَمِيۡمِؕ‏
quran.english: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water

quran.arabic: ذُقۡۚۖ اِنَّكَ اَنۡتَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡكَرِيۡمُ
quran.english: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا مَا كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تَمۡتَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ فِيۡ مَقَامٍ اَمِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place

quran.arabic: فِيۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍۚۙ‏
quran.english: Within gardens and springs

quran.arabic: يَّلۡبَسُوۡنَ مِنۡ سُنۡدُسٍ وَّاِسۡتَبۡرَقٍ مُّتَقٰبِلِيۡنَۚۙ‏
quran.english: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَࣞ وَزَوَّجۡنٰهُمۡ بِحُوۡرٍ عِيۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes

quran.arabic: يَدۡعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا بِكُلِّ فَاكِهَةٍ اٰمِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure

quran.arabic: لَا يَذُوۡقُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا الۡمَوۡتَ اِلَّا الۡمَوۡتَةَ الۡاُوۡلٰيۚ وَوَقٰىهُمۡ عَذَابَ الۡجَحِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire

quran.arabic: فَضۡلًا مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَؕ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡعَظِيۡمُ
quran.english: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّمَا يَسَّرۡنٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, We have eased the Qur'an in your tongue that they might be reminded

quran.arabic: فَارۡتَقِبۡ اِنَّهُمۡ مُّرۡتَقِبُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So watch, [O Muhammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end]
Ha, Meem

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلُ الۡكِتٰبِ مِنَ اللّٰهِ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡحَكِيۡمِ
quran.english: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, within the heavens and earth are signs for the believers

quran.arabic: وَفِيۡ خَلۡقِكُمۡ وَمَا يَبُثُّ مِنۡ دَآبَّةٍ اٰيٰتٌ لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّوۡقِنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And in the creation of yourselves and what He disperses of moving creatures are signs for people who are certain [in faith]
