quran.arabic: وَاخۡتِلَافِ الَّيۡلِ وَالنَّهَارِ وَمَا٘ اَنۡزَلَ اللّٰهُ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مِنۡ رِّزۡقٍ فَاَحۡيَا بِهِ الۡاَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَا وَتَصۡرِيۡفِ الرِّيٰحِ اٰيٰتٌ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And [in] the alternation of night and day and [in] what Allah sends down from the sky of provision and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness and [in His] directing of the winds are signs for a people who reason

quran.arabic: تِلۡكَ اٰيٰتُ اللّٰهِ نَتۡلُوۡهَا عَلَيۡكَ بِالۡحَقِّۚ فَبِاَيِّ حَدِيۡثٍۭ بَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ وَاٰيٰتِهٖ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: These are the verses of Allah which We recite to you in truth. Then in what statement after Allah and His verses will they believe

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ لِّكُلِّ اَفَّاكٍ اَثِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: Woe to every sinful liar

quran.arabic: يَّسۡمَعُ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ يُصِرُّ مُسۡتَكۡبِرًا كَاَنۡ لَّمۡ يَسۡمَعۡهَاۚ فَبَشِّرۡهُ بِعَذَابٍ اَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Who hears the verses of Allah recited to him, then persists arrogantly as if he had not heard them. So give him tidings of a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا عَلِمَ مِنۡ اٰيٰتِنَا شَيۡـَٔا اِۨتَّخَذَهَا هُزُوًاؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ مُّهِيۡنٌؕ‏
quran.english: And when he knows anything of Our verses, he takes them in ridicule. Those will have a humiliating punishment

quran.arabic: مِنۡ وَّرَآئِهِمۡ جَهَنَّمُۚ وَلَا يُغۡنِيۡ عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَسَبُوۡا شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا مَا اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اَوۡلِيَآءَۚ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ عَظِيۡمٌؕ‏
quran.english: Before them is Hell, and what they had earned will not avail them at all nor what they had taken besides Allah as allies. And they will have a great punishment

quran.arabic: هٰذَا هُدًيۚ وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ مِّنۡ رِّجۡزٍ اَلِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: This [Qur'an] is guidance. And those who have disbelieved in the verses of their Lord will have a painful punishment of foul nature

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ سَخَّرَ لَكُمُ الۡبَحۡرَ لِتَجۡرِيَ الۡفُلۡكُ فِيۡهِ بِاَمۡرِهٖ وَلِتَبۡتَغُوۡا مِنۡ فَضۡلِهٖ وَلَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: It is Allah who subjected to you the sea so that ships may sail upon it by His command and that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful

quran.arabic: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمۡ مَّا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ جَمِيۡعًا مِّنۡهُؕ اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاٰيٰتٍ لِّقَوۡمٍ يَّتَفَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And He has subjected to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth - all from Him. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا يَغۡفِرُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَرۡجُوۡنَ اَيَّامَ اللّٰهِ لِيَجۡزِيَ قَوۡمًاۭ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَكۡسِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], to those who have believed that they [should] forgive those who expect not the days of Allah so that He may recompense a people for what they used to earn

quran.arabic: مَنۡ عَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَلِنَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ اَسَآءَ فَعَلَيۡهَاؗ ثُمَّ اِلٰي رَبِّكُمۡ تُرۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Whoever does a good deed - it is for himself; and whoever does evil - it is against the self. Then to your Lord you will be returned

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اٰتَيۡنَا بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ الۡكِتٰبَ وَالۡحُكۡمَ وَالنُّبُوَّةَ وَرَزَقۡنٰهُمۡ مِّنَ الطَّيِّبٰتِ وَفَضَّلۡنٰهُمۡ عَلَي الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We did certainly give the Children of Israel the Scripture and judgement and prophethood, and We provided them with good things and preferred them over the worlds

quran.arabic: وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُمۡ بَيِّنٰتٍ مِّنَ الۡاَمۡرِۚ فَمَا اخۡتَلَفُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا جَآءَهُمُ الۡعِلۡمُۙ بَغۡيًاۭ بَيۡنَهُمۡؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقۡضِيۡ بَيۡنَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ فِيۡمَا كَانُوۡا فِيۡهِ يَخۡتَلِفُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We gave them clear proofs of the matter [of religion]. And they did not differ except after knowledge had come to them - out of jealous animosity between themselves. Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ جَعَلۡنٰكَ عَلٰي شَرِيۡعَةٍ مِّنَ الۡاَمۡرِ فَاتَّبِعۡهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعۡ اَهۡوَآءَ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then We put you, [O Muhammad], on an ordained way concerning the matter [of religion]; so follow it and do not follow the inclinations of those who do not know

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ لَنۡ يُّغۡنُوۡا عَنۡكَ مِنَ اللّٰهِ شَيۡـًٔاؕ وَاِنَّ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ اَوۡلِيَآءُ بَعۡضٍۚ وَاللّٰهُ وَلِيُّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, they will never avail you against Allah at all. And indeed, the wrongdoers are allies of one another; but Allah is the protector of the righteous

quran.arabic: هٰذَا بَصَآئِرُ لِلنَّاسِ وَهُدًي وَّرَحۡمَةٌ لِّقَوۡمٍ يُّوۡقِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: This [Qur'an] is enlightenment for mankind and guidance and mercy for a people who are certain [in faith]

quran.arabic: اَمۡ حَسِبَ الَّذِيۡنَ اجۡتَرَحُوا السَّيِّاٰتِ اَنۡ نَّجۡعَلَهُمۡ كَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِۙ سَوَآءً مَّحۡيَاهُمۡ وَمَمَاتُهُمۡؕ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Or do those who commit evils think We will make them like those who have believed and done righteous deeds - [make them] equal in their life and their death? Evil is that which they judge

quran.arabic: وَخَلَقَ اللّٰهُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ بِالۡحَقِّ وَلِتُجۡزٰي كُلُّ نَفۡسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Allah created the heavens and earth in truth and so that every soul may be recompensed for what it has earned, and they will not be wronged

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتَ مَنِ اتَّخَذَ اِلٰهَهٗ هَوٰىهُ وَاَضَلَّهُ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي عِلۡمٍ وَّخَتَمَ عَلٰي سَمۡعِهٖ وَقَلۡبِهٖ وَجَعَلَ عَلٰي بَصَرِهٖ غِشٰوَةًؕ فَمَنۡ يَّهۡدِيۡهِ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ اللّٰهِؕ اَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Have you seen he who has taken as his god his [own] desire, and Allah has sent him astray due to knowledge and has set a seal upon his hearing and his heart and put over his vision a veil? So who will guide him after Allah? Then will you not be reminded

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا مَا هِيَ اِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا الدُّنۡيَا نَمُوۡتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَا٘ اِلَّا الدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُمۡ بِذٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۚ اِنۡ هُمۡ اِلَّا يَظُنُّوۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "There is not but our worldly life; we die and live, and nothing destroys us except time." And they have of that no knowledge; they are only assuming

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتُنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ مَّا كَانَ حُجَّتَهُمۡ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ قَالُوا ائۡتُوۡا بِاٰبَآئِنَا٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, their argument is only that they say, "Bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: قُلِ اللّٰهُ يُحۡيِيۡكُمۡ ثُمَّ يُمِيۡتُكُمۡ ثُمَّ يَجۡمَعُكُمۡ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِ لَا رَيۡبَ فِيۡهِ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "Allah causes you to live, then causes you to die; then He will assemble you for the Day of Resurrection, about which there is no doubt, but most of the people do not know

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَيَوۡمَ تَقُوۡمُ السَّاعَةُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّخۡسَرُ الۡمُبۡطِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And the Day the Hour appears - that Day the falsifiers will lose

quran.arabic: وَتَرٰي كُلَّ اُمَّةٍ جَاثِيَةًؕࣞ كُلُّ اُمَّةٍ تُدۡعٰ٘ي اِلٰي كِتٰبِهَاؕ اَلۡيَوۡمَ تُجۡزَوۡنَ مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And you will see every nation kneeling [from fear]. Every nation will be called to its record [and told], "Today you will be recompensed for what you used to do

quran.arabic: هٰذَا كِتٰبُنَا يَنۡطِقُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّؕ اِنَّا كُنَّا نَسۡتَنۡسِخُ مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: This, Our record, speaks about you in truth. Indeed, We were having transcribed whatever you used to do

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ فَيُدۡخِلُهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ فِيۡ رَحۡمَتِهٖؕ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: So as for those who believed and did righteous deeds, their Lord will admit them into His mercy. That is what is the clear attainment

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡاࣞ اَفَلَمۡ تَكُنۡ اٰيٰتِيۡ تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَاسۡتَكۡبَرۡتُمۡ وَكُنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمًا مُّجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: But as for those who disbelieved, [it will be said], "Were not Our verses recited to you, but you were arrogant and became a people of criminals

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ اِنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّ وَّالسَّاعَةُ لَا رَيۡبَ فِيۡهَا قُلۡتُمۡ مَّا نَدۡرِيۡ مَا السَّاعَةُۙ اِنۡ نَّظُنُّ اِلَّا ظَنًّا وَّمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُسۡتَيۡقِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when it was said, 'Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth and the Hour [is coming] - no doubt about it,' you said, 'We know not what is the Hour. We assume only assumption, and we are not convinced

quran.arabic: وَبَدَا لَهُمۡ سَيِّاٰتُ مَا عَمِلُوۡا وَحَاقَ بِهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the evil consequences of what they did will appear to them, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule

quran.arabic: وَقِيۡلَ الۡيَوۡمَ نَنۡسٰىكُمۡ كَمَا نَسِيۡتُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ هٰذَا وَمَاۡوٰىكُمُ النَّارُ وَمَا لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ نّٰصِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And it will be said, "Today We will forget you as you forgot the meeting of this Day of yours, and your refuge is the Fire, and for you there are no helpers

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكُمۡ بِاَنَّكُمُ اتَّخَذۡتُمۡ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ هُزُوًا وَّغَرَّتۡكُمُ الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَاۚ فَالۡيَوۡمَ لَا يُخۡرَجُوۡنَ مِنۡهَا وَلَا هُمۡ يُسۡتَعۡتَبُوۡنَ
quran.english: That is because you took the verses of Allah in ridicule, and worldly life deluded you." So that Day they will not be removed from it, nor will they be asked to appease [Allah]

quran.arabic: فَلِلّٰهِ الۡحَمۡدُ رَبِّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَرَبِّ الۡاَرۡضِ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then, to Allah belongs [all] praise - Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth, Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: وَلَهُ الۡكِبۡرِيَآءُ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: And to Him belongs [all] grandeur within the heavens and the earth, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise
Ha, Meem

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلُ الۡكِتٰبِ مِنَ اللّٰهِ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡحَكِيۡمِ
quran.english: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: مَا خَلَقۡنَا السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا٘ اِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَاَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا عَمَّا٘ اُنۡذِرُوۡا مُعۡرِضُوۡنَ
quran.english: We did not create the heavens and earth and what is between them except in truth and [for] a specified term. But those who disbelieve, from that of which they are warned, are turning away

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ مَّا تَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اَرُوۡنِيۡ مَاذَا خَلَقُوۡا مِنَ الۡاَرۡضِ اَمۡ لَهُمۡ شِرۡكٌ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِؕ اِيۡتُوۡنِيۡ بِكِتٰبٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِ هٰذَا٘ اَوۡ اَثٰرَةٍ مِّنۡ عِلۡمٍ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Have you considered that which you invoke besides Allah? Show me what they have created of the earth; or did they have partnership in [creation of] the heavens? Bring me a scripture [revealed] before this or a [remaining] trace of knowledge, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ اَضَلُّ مِمَّنۡ يَّدۡعُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ مَنۡ لَّا يَسۡتَجِيۡبُ لَهٗ٘ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِ وَهُمۡ عَنۡ دُعَآئِهِمۡ غٰفِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And who is more astray than he who invokes besides Allah those who will not respond to him until the Day of Resurrection, and they, of their invocation, are unaware

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا حُشِرَ النَّاسُ كَانُوۡا لَهُمۡ اَعۡدَآءً وَّكَانُوۡا بِعِبَادَتِهِمۡ كٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And when the people are gathered [that Day], they [who were invoked] will be enemies to them, and they will be deniers of their worship

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتُنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لِلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡۙ هٰذَا سِحۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌؕ‏
quran.english: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say of the truth when it has come to them, "This is obvious magic

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ افۡتَرٰىهُؕ قُلۡ اِنِ افۡتَرَيۡتُهٗ فَلَا تَمۡلِكُوۡنَ لِيۡ مِنَ اللّٰهِ شَيۡـًٔاؕ هُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا تُفِيۡضُوۡنَ فِيۡهِؕ كَفٰي بِهٖ شَهِيۡدًاۭ بَيۡنِيۡ وَبَيۡنَكُمۡؕ وَهُوَ الۡغَفُوۡرُ الرَّحِيۡمُ
quran.english: Or do they say, "He has invented it?" Say, "If I have invented it, you will not possess for me [the power of protection] from Allah at all. He is most knowing of that in which you are involved. Sufficient is He as Witness between me and you, and He is the Forgiving the Merciful

quran.arabic: قُلۡ مَا كُنۡتُ بِدۡعًا مِّنَ الرُّسُلِ وَمَا٘ اَدۡرِيۡ مَا يُفۡعَلُ بِيۡ وَلَا بِكُمۡؕ اِنۡ اَتَّبِعُ اِلَّا مَا يُوۡحٰ٘ي اِلَيَّ وَمَا٘ اَنَا اِلَّا نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: Say, "I am not something original among the messengers, nor do I know what will be done with me or with you. I only follow that which is revealed to me, and I am not but a clear warner

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنۡ عِنۡدِ اللّٰهِ وَكَفَرۡتُمۡ بِهٖ وَشَهِدَ شَاهِدٌ مِّنۭۡ بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ عَلٰي مِثۡلِهٖ فَاٰمَنَ وَاسۡتَكۡبَرۡتُمۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَهۡدِي الۡقَوۡمَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "Have you considered: if the Qur'an was from Allah, and you disbelieved in it while a witness from the Children of Israel has testified to something similar and believed while you were arrogant...?" Indeed, Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَوۡ كَانَ خَيۡرًا مَّا سَبَقُوۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡهِؕ وَاِذۡ لَمۡ يَهۡتَدُوۡا بِهٖ فَسَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ هٰذَا٘ اِفۡكٌ قَدِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And those who disbelieve say of those who believe, "If it had [truly] been good, they would not have preceded us to it." And when they are not guided by it, they will say, "This is an ancient falsehood

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ قَبۡلِهٖ كِتٰبُ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اِمَامًا وَّرَحۡمَةًؕ وَهٰذَا كِتٰبٌ مُّصَدِّقٌ لِّسَانًا عَرَبِيًّا لِّيُنۡذِرَ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡاࣗۖ وَبُشۡرٰي لِلۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And before it was the scripture of Moses to lead and as a mercy. And this is a confirming Book in an Arabic tongue to warn those who have wronged and as good tidings to the doers of good

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ قَالُوۡا رَبُّنَا اللّٰهُ ثُمَّ اسۡتَقَامُوۡا فَلَا خَوۡفٌ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يَحۡزَنُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who have said, "Our Lord is Allah," and then remained on a right course - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡجَنَّةِ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاۚ جَزَآءًۭ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those are the companions of Paradise, abiding eternally therein as reward for what they used to do

quran.arabic: وَوَصَّيۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ بِوَالِدَيۡهِ اِحۡسٰنًاؕ حَمَلَتۡهُ اُمُّهٗ كُرۡهًا وَّوَضَعَتۡهُ كُرۡهًاؕ وَحَمۡلُهٗ وَفِصٰلُهٗ ثَلٰثُوۡنَ شَهۡرًاؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا بَلَغَ اَشُدَّهٗ وَبَلَغَ اَرۡبَعِيۡنَ سَنَةًۙ قَالَ رَبِّ اَوۡزِعۡنِيۡ٘ اَنۡ اَشۡكُرَ نِعۡمَتَكَ الَّتِيۡ٘ اَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلٰي وَالِدَيَّ وَاَنۡ اَعۡمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرۡضٰىهُ وَاَصۡلِحۡ لِيۡ فِيۡ ذُرِّيَّتِيۡۚؕ اِنِّيۡ تُبۡتُ اِلَيۡكَ وَاِنِّيۡ مِنَ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: And We have enjoined upon man, to his parents, good treatment. His mother carried him with hardship and gave birth to him with hardship, and his gestation and weaning [period] is thirty months. [He grows] until, when he reaches maturity and reaches [the age of] forty years, he says, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to work righteousness of which You will approve and make righteous for me my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed, I am of the Muslims

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ نَتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمۡ اَحۡسَنَ مَا عَمِلُوۡا وَنَتَجَاوَزُ عَنۡ سَيِّاٰتِهِمۡ فِيۡ٘ اَصۡحٰبِ الۡجَنَّةِؕ وَعۡدَ الصِّدۡقِ الَّذِيۡ كَانُوۡا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Those are the ones from whom We will accept the best of what they did and overlook their misdeeds, [their being] among the companions of Paradise. [That is] the promise of truth which they had been promised

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ قَالَ لِوَالِدَيۡهِ اُفٍّ لَّكُمَا٘ اَتَعِدٰنِنِيۡ٘ اَنۡ اُخۡرَجَ وَقَدۡ خَلَتِ الۡقُرُوۡنُ مِنۡ قَبۡلِيۡۚ وَهُمَا يَسۡتَغِيۡثٰنِ اللّٰهَ وَيۡلَكَ اٰمِنۡࣗۖ اِنَّ وَعۡدَ اللّٰهِ حَقٌّۚ فَيَقُوۡلُ مَا هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا٘ اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: But one who says to his parents, "Uff to you; do you promise me that I will be brought forth [from the earth] when generations before me have already passed on [into oblivion]?" while they call to Allah for help [and to their son], "Woe to you! Believe! Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth." But he says, "This is not but legends of the former people

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ حَقَّ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡقَوۡلُ فِيۡ٘ اُمَمٍ قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ مِّنَ الۡجِنِّ وَالۡاِنۡسِؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا خٰسِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Those are the ones upon whom the word has come into effect, [who will be] among nations which had passed on before them of jinn and men. Indeed, they [all] were losers

quran.arabic: وَلِكُلٍّ دَرَجٰتٌ مِّمَّا عَمِلُوۡاۚ وَلِيُوَفِّيَهُمۡ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And for all there are degrees [of reward and punishment] for what they have done, and [it is] so that He may fully compensate them for their deeds, and they will not be wronged

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يُعۡرَضُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا عَلَي النَّارِؕ اَذۡهَبۡتُمۡ طَيِّبٰتِكُمۡ فِيۡ حَيَاتِكُمُ الدُّنۡيَا وَاسۡتَمۡتَعۡتُمۡ بِهَاۚ فَالۡيَوۡمَ تُجۡزَوۡنَ عَذَابَ الۡهُوۡنِ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ الۡحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَفۡسُقُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And the Day those who disbelieved are exposed to the Fire [it will be said], "You exhausted your pleasures during your worldly life and enjoyed them, so this Day you will be awarded the punishment of [extreme] humiliation because you were arrogant upon the earth without right and because you were defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرۡ اَخَا عَادٍ اِذۡ اَنۡذَرَ قَوۡمَهٗ بِالۡاَحۡقَافِ وَقَدۡ خَلَتِ النُّذُرُ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِ يَدَيۡهِ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهٖ٘ اَلَّا تَعۡبُدُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا اللّٰهَؕ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And mention, [O Muhammad], the brother of 'Aad, when he warned his people in the [region of] al-Ahqaf - and warners had already passed on before him and after him - [saying], "Do not worship except Allah. Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اَجِئۡتَنَا لِتَاۡفِكَنَا عَنۡ اٰلِهَتِنَاۚ فَاۡتِنَا بِمَا تَعِدُنَا٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Have you come to delude us away from our gods? Then bring us what you promise us, if you should be of the truthful

quran.arabic: قَالَ اِنَّمَا الۡعِلۡمُ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِؗ وَاُبَلِّغُكُمۡ مَّا٘ اُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهٖ وَلٰكِنِّيۡ٘ اَرٰىكُمۡ قَوۡمًا تَجۡهَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: He said, "Knowledge [of its time] is only with Allah, and I convey to you that with which I was sent; but I see you [to be] a people behaving ignorantly

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَاَوۡهُ عَارِضًا مُّسۡتَقۡبِلَ اَوۡدِيَتِهِمۡۙ قَالُوۡا هٰذَا عَارِضٌ مُّمۡطِرُنَاؕ بَلۡ هُوَ مَا اسۡتَعۡجَلۡتُمۡ بِهٖؕ رِيۡحٌ فِيۡهَا عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: And when they saw it as a cloud approaching their valleys, they said, "This is a cloud bringing us rain!" Rather, it is that for which you were impatient: a wind, within it a painful punishment

quran.arabic: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۭ بِاَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا فَاَصۡبَحُوۡا لَا يُرٰ٘ي اِلَّا مَسٰكِنُهُمۡؕ كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡقَوۡمَ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Destroying everything by command of its Lord. And they became so that nothing was seen [of them] except their dwellings. Thus do We recompense the criminal people

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ مَكَّنّٰهُمۡ فِيۡمَا٘ اِنۡ مَّكَّنّٰكُمۡ فِيۡهِ وَجَعَلۡنَا لَهُمۡ سَمۡعًا وَّاَبۡصَارًا وَّاَفۡـِٕدَةًؗۖ فَمَا٘ اَغۡنٰي عَنۡهُمۡ سَمۡعُهُمۡ وَلَا٘ اَبۡصَارُهُمۡ وَلَا٘ اَفۡـِٕدَتُهُمۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍ اِذۡ كَانُوۡا يَجۡحَدُوۡنَ بِاٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ وَحَاقَ بِهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And We had certainly established them in such as We have not established you, and We made for them hearing and vision and hearts. But their hearing and vision and hearts availed them not from anything [of the punishment] when they were [continually] rejecting the signs of Allah; and they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا مَا حَوۡلَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡقُرٰي وَصَرَّفۡنَا الۡاٰيٰتِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have already destroyed what surrounds you of [those] cities, and We have diversified the signs [or verses] that perhaps they might return [from disbelief]

quran.arabic: فَلَوۡلَا نَصَرَهُمُ الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ قُرۡبَانًا اٰلِهَةًؕ بَلۡ ضَلُّوۡا عَنۡهُمۡۚ وَذٰلِكَ اِفۡكُهُمۡ وَمَا كَانُوۡا يَفۡتَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then why did those they took besides Allah as deities by which to approach [Him] not aid them? But they had strayed from them. And that was their falsehood and what they were inventing

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ صَرَفۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكَ نَفَرًا مِّنَ الۡجِنِّ يَسۡتَمِعُوۡنَ الۡقُرۡاٰنَۚ فَلَمَّا حَضَرُوۡهُ قَالُوۡ٘ا اَنۡصِتُوۡاۚ فَلَمَّا قُضِيَ وَلَّوۡا اِلٰي قَوۡمِهِمۡ مُّنۡذِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when We directed to you a few of the jinn, listening to the Qur'an. And when they attended it, they said, "Listen quietly." And when it was concluded, they went back to their people as warners

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰقَوۡمَنَا٘ اِنَّا سَمِعۡنَا كِتٰبًا اُنۡزِلَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مُوۡسٰي مُصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِ يَهۡدِيۡ٘ اِلَي الۡحَقِّ وَاِلٰي طَرِيۡقٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: They said, "O our people, indeed we have heard a [recited] Book revealed after Moses confirming what was before it which guides to the truth and to a straight path

quran.arabic: يٰقَوۡمَنَا٘ اَجِيۡبُوۡا دَاعِيَ اللّٰهِ وَاٰمِنُوۡا بِهٖ يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ ذُنُوۡبِكُمۡ وَيُجِرۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ عَذَابٍ اَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: O our people, respond to the Messenger of Allah and believe in him; Allah will forgive for you your sins and protect you from a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ لَّا يُجِبۡ دَاعِيَ اللّٰهِ فَلَيۡسَ بِمُعۡجِزٍ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَيۡسَ لَهٗ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ٘ اَوۡلِيَآءُؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: But he who does not respond to the Caller of Allah will not cause failure [to Him] upon earth, and he will not have besides Him any protectors. Those are in manifest error

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اَنَّ اللّٰهَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَلَمۡ يَعۡيَ بِخَلۡقِهِنَّ بِقٰدِرٍ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ يُّحۡيِۦَ الۡمَوۡتٰيؕ بَلٰ٘ي اِنَّهٗ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Do they not see that Allah, who created the heavens and earth and did not fail in their creation, is able to give life to the dead? Yes. Indeed, He is over all things competent

quran.arabic: وَيَوۡمَ يُعۡرَضُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا عَلَي النَّارِؕ اَلَيۡسَ هٰذَا بِالۡحَقِّؕ قَالُوۡا بَلٰي وَرَبِّنَاؕ قَالَ فَذُوۡقُوا الۡعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَكۡفُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the Day those who disbelieved are exposed to the Fire [it will be said], "Is this not the truth?" They will say, "Yes, by our Lord." He will say, "Then taste the punishment because you used to disbelieve

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ كَمَا صَبَرَ اُولُوا الۡعَزۡمِ مِنَ الرُّسُلِ وَلَا تَسۡتَعۡجِلۡ لَّهُمۡؕ كَاَنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَ يَرَوۡنَ مَا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَۙ لَمۡ يَلۡبَثُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا سَاعَةً مِّنۡ نَّهَارٍؕ بَلٰغٌۚ فَهَلۡ يُهۡلَكُ اِلَّا الۡقَوۡمُ الۡفٰسِقُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So be patient, [O Muhammad], as were those of determination among the messengers and do not be impatient for them. It will be - on the Day they see that which they are promised - as though they had not remained [in the world] except an hour of a day. [This is] notification. And will [any] be destroyed except the defiantly disobedient people

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَصَدُّوۡا عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ اَضَلَّ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Those who disbelieve and avert [people] from the way of Allah - He will waste their deeds

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَاٰمَنُوۡا بِمَا نُزِّلَ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَّهُوَ الۡحَقُّ مِنۡ رَّبِّهِمۡۙ كَفَّرَ عَنۡهُمۡ سَيِّاٰتِهِمۡ وَاَصۡلَحَ بَالَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: And those who believe and do righteous deeds and believe in what has been sent down upon Muhammad - and it is the truth from their Lord - He will remove from them their misdeeds and amend their condition

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوا اتَّبَعُوا الۡبَاطِلَ وَاَنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اتَّبَعُوا الۡحَقَّ مِنۡ رَّبِّهِمۡؕ كَذٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ اللّٰهُ لِلنَّاسِ اَمۡثَالَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: That is because those who disbelieve follow falsehood, and those who believe follow the truth from their Lord. Thus does Allah present to the people their comparisons

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا لَقِيۡتُمُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا فَضَرۡبَ الرِّقَابِؕ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا٘ اَثۡخَنۡتُمُوۡهُمۡ فَشُدُّوا الۡوَثَاقَۙ فَاِمَّا مَنًّاۭ بَعۡدُ وَاِمَّا فِدَآءً حَتّٰي تَضَعَ الۡحَرۡبُ اَوۡزَارَهَا ࣢ۚࣞۛ ذٰلِكَؕۛ وَلَوۡ يَشَآءُ اللّٰهُ لَانۡتَصَرَ مِنۡهُمۡۙ وَلٰكِنۡ لِّيَبۡلُوَا۠ بَعۡضَكُمۡ بِبَعۡضٍؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ قُتِلُوۡا فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ فَلَنۡ يُّضِلَّ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: So when you meet those who disbelieve [in battle], strike [their] necks until, when you have inflicted slaughter upon them, then secure their bonds, and either [confer] favor afterwards or ransom [them] until the war lays down its burdens. That [is the command]. And if Allah had willed, He could have taken vengeance upon them [Himself], but [He ordered armed struggle] to test some of you by means of others. And those who are killed in the cause of Allah - never will He waste their deeds

quran.arabic: سَيَهۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَيُصۡلِحُ بَالَهُمۡۚ‏
quran.english: He will guide them and amend their condition

quran.arabic: وَيُدۡخِلُهُمُ الۡجَنَّةَ عَرَّفَهَا لَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: And admit them to Paradise, which He has made known to them

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ تَنۡصُرُوا اللّٰهَ يَنۡصُرۡكُمۡ وَيُثَبِّتۡ اَقۡدَامَكُمۡ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, if you support Allah, He will support you and plant firmly your feet

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا فَتَعۡسًا لَّهُمۡ وَاَضَلَّ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: But those who disbelieve - for them is misery, and He will waste their deeds

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمۡ كَرِهُوۡا مَا٘ اَنۡزَلَ اللّٰهُ فَاَحۡبَطَ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: That is because they disliked what Allah revealed, so He rendered worthless their deeds

quran.arabic: اَفَلَمۡ يَسِيۡرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ فَيَنۡظُرُوۡا كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡؕ دَمَّرَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡؗ وَلِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ اَمۡثَالُهَا
quran.english: Have they not traveled through the land and seen how was the end of those before them? Allah destroyed [everything] over them, and for the disbelievers is something comparable

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّ اللّٰهَ مَوۡلَي الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَاَنَّ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ لَا مَوۡلٰي لَهُمۡࣖ‏
quran.english: That is because Allah is the protector of those who have believed and because the disbelievers have no protector

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُدۡخِلُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا يَتَمَتَّعُوۡنَ وَيَاۡكُلُوۡنَ كَمَا تَاۡكُلُ الۡاَنۡعَامُ وَالنَّارُ مَثۡوًي لَّهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Allah will admit those who have believed and done righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow, but those who disbelieve enjoy themselves and eat as grazing livestock eat, and the Fire will be a residence for them

quran.arabic: وَكَاَيِّنۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ هِيَ اَشَدُّ قُوَّةً مِّنۡ قَرۡيَتِكَ الَّتِيۡ٘ اَخۡرَجَتۡكَۚ اَهۡلَكۡنٰهُمۡ فَلَا نَاصِرَ لَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: And how many a city was stronger than your city [Makkah] which drove you out? We destroyed them; and there was no helper for them

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ كَانَ عَلٰي بَيِّنَةٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهٖ كَمَنۡ زُيِّنَ لَهٗ سُوۡٓءُ عَمَلِهٖ وَاتَّبَعُوۡ٘ا اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: So is he who is on clear evidence from his Lord like him to whom the evil of his work has been made attractive and they follow their [own] desires

quran.arabic: مَثَلُ الۡجَنَّةِ الَّتِيۡ وُعِدَ الۡمُتَّقُوۡنَؕ فِيۡهَا٘ اَنۡهٰرٌ مِّنۡ مَّآءٍ غَيۡرِ اٰسِنٍۚ وَاَنۡهٰرٌ مِّنۡ لَّبَنٍ لَّمۡ يَتَغَيَّرۡ طَعۡمُهٗۚ وَاَنۡهٰرٌ مِّنۡ خَمۡرٍ لَّذَّةٍ لِّلشّٰرِبِيۡنَ ࣢ۚ وَاَنۡهٰرٌ مِّنۡ عَسَلٍ مُّصَفًّيؕ وَلَهُمۡ فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ الثَّمَرٰتِ وَمَغۡفِرَةٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهِمۡؕ كَمَنۡ هُوَ خَالِدٌ فِي النَّارِ وَسُقُوۡا مَآءً حَمِيۡمًا فَقَطَّعَ اَمۡعَآءَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Is the description of Paradise, which the righteous are promised, wherein are rivers of water unaltered, rivers of milk the taste of which never changes, rivers of wine delicious to those who drink, and rivers of purified honey, in which they will have from all [kinds of] fruits and forgiveness from their Lord, like [that of] those who abide eternally in the Fire and are given to drink scalding water that will sever their intestines

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡهُمۡ مَّنۡ يَّسۡتَمِعُ اِلَيۡكَۚ حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا خَرَجُوۡا مِنۡ عِنۡدِكَ قَالُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَ مَاذَا قَالَ اٰنِفًاࣞ اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ طَبَعَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ وَاتَّبَعُوۡ٘ا اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: And among them, [O Muhammad], are those who listen to you, until when they depart from you, they say to those who were given knowledge, "What has he said just now?" Those are the ones of whom Allah has sealed over their hearts and who have followed their [own] desires

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اهۡتَدَوۡا زَادَهُمۡ هُدًي وَّاٰتٰىهُمۡ تَقۡوٰىهُمۡ‏
quran.english: And those who are guided - He increases them in guidance and gives them their righteousness

quran.arabic: فَهَلۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ اِلَّا السَّاعَةَ اَنۡ تَاۡتِيَهُمۡ بَغۡتَةًۚ فَقَدۡ جَآءَ اَشۡرَاطُهَاۚ فَاَنّٰي لَهُمۡ اِذَا جَآءَتۡهُمۡ ذِكۡرٰىهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Then do they await except that the Hour should come upon them unexpectedly? But already there have come [some of] its indications. Then what good to them, when it has come, will be their remembrance

quran.arabic: فَاعۡلَمۡ اَنَّهٗ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللّٰهُ وَاسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لِذَنۭۡ بِكَ وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ مُتَقَلَّبَكُمۡ وَمَثۡوٰىكُمۡࣖ‏
quran.english: So know, [O Muhammad], that there is no deity except Allah and ask forgiveness for your sin and for the believing men and believing women. And Allah knows of your movement and your resting place

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَوۡلَا نُزِّلَتۡ سُوۡرَةٌۚ فَاِذَا٘ اُنۡزِلَتۡ سُوۡرَةٌ مُّحۡكَمَةٌ وَّذُكِرَ فِيۡهَا الۡقِتَالُۙ رَاَيۡتَ الَّذِيۡنَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّرَضٌ يَّنۡظُرُوۡنَ اِلَيۡكَ نَظَرَ الۡمَغۡشِيِّ عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ الۡمَوۡتِؕ فَاَوۡلٰي لَهُمۡۚ‏
quran.english: Those who believe say, "Why has a surah not been sent down? But when a precise surah is revealed and fighting is mentioned therein, you see those in whose hearts is hypocrisy looking at you with a look of one overcome by death. And more appropriate for them [would have been]

quran.arabic: طَاعَةٌ وَّقَوۡلٌ مَّعۡرُوۡفٌࣞ فَاِذَا عَزَمَ الۡاَمۡرُࣞ فَلَوۡ صَدَقُوا اللّٰهَ لَكَانَ خَيۡرًا لَّهُمۡۚ‏
quran.english: Obedience and good words. And when the matter [of fighting] was determined, if they had been true to Allah, it would have been better for them

quran.arabic: فَهَلۡ عَسَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ تَوَلَّيۡتُمۡ اَنۡ تُفۡسِدُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَتُقَطِّعُوۡ٘ا اَرۡحَامَكُمۡ‏
quran.english: So would you perhaps, if you turned away, cause corruption on earth and sever your [ties of] relationship

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ لَعَنَهُمُ اللّٰهُ فَاَصَمَّهُمۡ وَاَعۡمٰ٘ي اَبۡصَارَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Those [who do so] are the ones that Allah has cursed, so He deafened them and blinded their vision

quran.arabic: اَفَلَا يَتَدَبَّرُوۡنَ الۡقُرۡاٰنَ اَمۡ عَلٰي قُلُوۡبٍ اَقۡفَالُهَا
quran.english: Then do they not reflect upon the Qur'an, or are there locks upon [their] hearts

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ ارۡتَدُّوۡا عَلٰ٘ي اَدۡبَارِهِمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا تَبَيَّنَ لَهُمُ الۡهُدَيۙ الشَّيۡطٰنُ سَوَّلَ لَهُمۡؕ وَاَمۡلٰي لَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who reverted back [to disbelief] after guidance had become clear to them - Satan enticed them and prolonged hope for them

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمۡ قَالُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ كَرِهُوۡا مَا نَزَّلَ اللّٰهُ سَنُطِيۡعُكُمۡ فِيۡ بَعۡضِ الۡاَمۡرِۚ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ اِسۡرَارَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: That is because they said to those who disliked what Allah sent down, "We will obey you in part of the matter." And Allah knows what they conceal

quran.arabic: فَكَيۡفَ اِذَا تَوَفَّتۡهُمُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ يَضۡرِبُوۡنَ وُجُوۡهَهُمۡ وَاَدۡبَارَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Then how [will it be] when the angels take them in death, striking their faces and their backs

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمُ اتَّبَعُوۡا مَا٘ اَسۡخَطَ اللّٰهَ وَكَرِهُوۡا رِضۡوَانَهٗ فَاَحۡبَطَ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡࣖ‏
quran.english: That is because they followed what angered Allah and disliked [what earns] His pleasure, so He rendered worthless their deeds

quran.arabic: اَمۡ حَسِبَ الَّذِيۡنَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّرَضٌ اَنۡ لَّنۡ يُّخۡرِجَ اللّٰهُ اَضۡغَانَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Or do those in whose hearts is disease think that Allah would never expose their [feelings of] hatred

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَاَرَيۡنٰكَهُمۡ فَلَعَرَفۡتَهُمۡ بِسِيۡمٰهُمۡؕ وَلَتَعۡرِفَنَّهُمۡ فِيۡ لَحۡنِ الۡقَوۡلِؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ اَعۡمَالَكُمۡ‏
quran.english: And if We willed, We could show them to you, and you would know them by their mark; but you will surely know them by the tone of [their] speech. And Allah knows your deeds

quran.arabic: وَلَنَبۡلُوَنَّكُمۡ حَتّٰي نَعۡلَمَ الۡمُجٰهِدِيۡنَ مِنۡكُمۡ وَالصّٰبِرِيۡنَۙ وَنَبۡلُوَا۠ اَخۡبَارَكُمۡ‏
quran.english: And We will surely test you until We make evident those who strive among you [for the cause of Allah] and the patient, and We will test your affairs

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَصَدُّوۡا عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ وَشَآقُّوا الرَّسُوۡلَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا تَبَيَّنَ لَهُمُ الۡهُدٰيۙ لَنۡ يَّضُرُّوا اللّٰهَ شَيۡـًٔاؕ وَسَيُحۡبِطُ اَعۡمَالَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who disbelieved and averted [people] from the path of Allah and opposed the Messenger after guidance had become clear to them - never will they harm Allah at all, and He will render worthless their deeds

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اَطِيۡعُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوا الرَّسُوۡلَ وَلَا تُبۡطِلُوۡ٘ا اَعۡمَالَكُمۡ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, obey Allah and obey the Messenger and do not invalidate your deeds

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَصَدُّوۡا عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ ثُمَّ مَاتُوۡا وَهُمۡ كُفَّارٌ فَلَنۡ يَّغۡفِرَ اللّٰهُ لَهُمۡ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who disbelieved and averted [people] from the path of Allah and then died while they were disbelievers - never will Allah forgive them

quran.arabic: فَلَا تَهِنُوۡا وَتَدۡعُوۡ٘ا اِلَي السَّلۡمِࣗۖ وَاَنۡتُمُ الۡاَعۡلَوۡنَࣗۖ وَاللّٰهُ مَعَكُمۡ وَلَنۡ يَّتِرَكُمۡ اَعۡمَالَكُمۡ‏
quran.english: So do not weaken and call for peace while you are superior; and Allah is with you and will never deprive you of [the reward of] your deeds

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَا لَعِبٌ وَّلَهۡوٌؕ وَاِنۡ تُؤۡمِنُوۡا وَتَتَّقُوۡا يُؤۡتِكُمۡ اُجُوۡرَكُمۡ وَلَا يَسۡـَٔلۡكُمۡ اَمۡوَالَكُمۡ‏
quran.english: [This] worldly life is only amusement and diversion. And if you believe and fear Allah, He will give you your rewards and not ask you for your properties

quran.arabic: اِنۡ يَّسۡـَٔلۡكُمُوۡهَا فَيُحۡفِكُمۡ تَبۡخَلُوۡا وَيُخۡرِجۡ اَضۡغَانَكُمۡ‏
quran.english: If He should ask you for them and press you, you would withhold, and He would expose your unwillingness

quran.arabic: هٰ٘اَنۡتُمۡ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ تُدۡعَوۡنَ لِتُنۡفِقُوۡا فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِۚ فَمِنۡكُمۡ مَّنۡ يَّبۡخَلُۚ وَمَنۡ يَّبۡخَلۡ فَاِنَّمَا يَبۡخَلُ عَنۡ نَّفۡسِهٖؕ وَاللّٰهُ الۡغَنِيُّ وَاَنۡتُمُ الۡفُقَرَآءُۚ وَاِنۡ تَتَوَلَّوۡا يَسۡتَبۡدِلۡ قَوۡمًا غَيۡرَكُمۡۙ ثُمَّ لَا يَكُوۡنُوۡ٘ا اَمۡثَالَكُمۡࣖ‏
quran.english: Here you are - those invited to spend in the cause of Allah - but among you are those who withhold [out of greed]. And whoever withholds only withholds [benefit] from himself; and Allah is the Free of need, while you are the needy. And if you turn away, He will replace you with another people; then they will not be the likes of you

quran.arabic: اِنَّا فَتَحۡنَا لَكَ فَتۡحًا مُّبِيۡنًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have given you, [O Muhammad], a clear conquest

quran.arabic: لِّيَغۡفِرَ لَكَ اللّٰهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنۡ ذَنۭۡ بِكَ وَمَا تَاَخَّرَ وَيُتِمَّ نِعۡمَتَهٗ عَلَيۡكَ وَيَهۡدِيَكَ صِرَاطًا مُّسۡتَقِيۡمًاۙ‏
quran.english: That Allah may forgive for you what preceded of your sin and what will follow and complete His favor upon you and guide you to a straight path

quran.arabic: وَّيَنۡصُرَكَ اللّٰهُ نَصۡرًا عَزِيۡزًا
quran.english: And [that] Allah may aid you with a mighty victory

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡزَلَ السَّكِيۡنَةَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ لِيَزۡدَادُوۡ٘ا اِيۡمَانًا مَّعَ اِيۡمَانِهِمۡؕ وَلِلّٰهِ جُنُوۡدُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمًا حَكِيۡمًاۙ‏
quran.english: It is He who sent down tranquillity into the hearts of the believers that they would increase in faith along with their [present] faith. And to Allah belong the soldiers of the heavens and the earth, and ever is Allah Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: لِّيُدۡخِلَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا وَيُكَفِّرَ عَنۡهُمۡ سَيِّاٰتِهِمۡؕ وَكَانَ ذٰلِكَ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ فَوۡزًا عَظِيۡمًاۙ‏
quran.english: [And] that He may admit the believing men and the believing women to gardens beneath which rivers flow to abide therein eternally and remove from them their misdeeds - and ever is that, in the sight of Allah, a great attainment

quran.arabic: وَّيُعَذِّبَ الۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ وَالۡمُنٰفِقٰتِ وَالۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَ وَالۡمُشۡرِكٰتِ الظَّآنِّيۡنَ بِاللّٰهِ ظَنَّ السَّوۡءِؕ عَلَيۡهِمۡ دَآئِرَةُ السَّوۡءِۚ وَغَضِبَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَعَنَهُمۡ وَاَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ جَهَنَّمَؕ وَسَآءَتۡ مَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: And [that] He may punish the hypocrite men and hypocrite women, and the polytheist men and polytheist women - those who assume about Allah an assumption of evil nature. Upon them is a misfortune of evil nature; and Allah has become angry with them and has cursed them and prepared for them Hell, and evil it is as a destination

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ جُنُوۡدُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ عَزِيۡزًا حَكِيۡمًا
quran.english: And to Allah belong the soldiers of the heavens and the earth. And ever is Allah Exalted in Might and Wise

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنٰكَ شَاهِدًا وَّمُبَشِّرًا وَّنَذِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have sent you as a witness and a bringer of good tidings and a warner

quran.arabic: لِّتُؤۡمِنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ وَتُعَزِّرُوۡهُ وَتُوَقِّرُوۡهُؕ وَتُسَبِّحُوۡهُ بُكۡرَةً وَّاَصِيۡلًا
quran.english: That you [people] may believe in Allah and His Messenger and honor him and respect the Prophet and exalt Allah morning and afternoon

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُبَايِعُوۡنَكَ اِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُوۡنَ اللّٰهَؕ يَدُ اللّٰهِ فَوۡقَ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡۚ فَمَنۡ نَّكَثَ فَاِنَّمَا يَنۡكُثُ عَلٰي نَفۡسِهٖۚ وَمَنۡ اَوۡفٰي بِمَا عٰهَدَ عَلَيۡهُ اللّٰهَ فَسَيُؤۡتِيۡهِ اَجۡرًا عَظِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to you, [O Muhammad] - they are actually pledging allegiance to Allah. The hand of Allah is over their hands. So he who breaks his word only breaks it to the detriment of himself. And he who fulfills that which he has promised Allah - He will give him a great reward

quran.arabic: سَيَقُوۡلُ لَكَ الۡمُخَلَّفُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡاَعۡرَابِ شَغَلَتۡنَا٘ اَمۡوَالُنَا وَاَهۡلُوۡنَا فَاسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَنَاۚ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ بِاَلۡسِنَتِهِمۡ مَّا لَيۡسَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡؕ قُلۡ فَمَنۡ يَّمۡلِكُ لَكُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ شَيۡـًٔا اِنۡ اَرَادَ بِكُمۡ ضَرًّا اَوۡ اَرَادَ بِكُمۡ نَفۡعًاؕ بَلۡ كَانَ اللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ خَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: Those who remained behind of the bedouins will say to you, "Our properties and our families occupied us, so ask forgiveness for us." They say with their tongues what is not within their hearts. Say, "Then who could prevent Allah at all if He intended for you harm or intended for you benefit? Rather, ever is Allah, with what you do, Acquainted

quran.arabic: بَلۡ ظَنَنۡتُمۡ اَنۡ لَّنۡ يَّنۡقَلِبَ الرَّسُوۡلُ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ اِلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِيۡهِمۡ اَبَدًا وَّزُيِّنَ ذٰلِكَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِكُمۡ وَظَنَنۡتُمۡ ظَنَّ السَّوۡءِۚۖ وَكُنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمًاۭ بُوۡرًا
quran.english: But you thought that the Messenger and the believers would never return to their families, ever, and that was made pleasing in your hearts. And you assumed an assumption of evil and became a people ruined

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ لَّمۡ يُؤۡمِنۭۡ بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ فَاِنَّا٘ اَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ سَعِيۡرًا
quran.english: And whoever has not believed in Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers a Blaze

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ يَغۡفِرُ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيُعَذِّبُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرًا رَّحِيۡمًا
quran.english: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. He forgives whom He wills and punishes whom He wills. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: سَيَقُوۡلُ الۡمُخَلَّفُوۡنَ اِذَا انۡطَلَقۡتُمۡ اِلٰي مَغَانِمَ لِتَاۡخُذُوۡهَا ذَرُوۡنَا نَتَّبِعۡكُمۡۚ يُرِيۡدُوۡنَ اَنۡ يُّبَدِّلُوۡا كَلٰمَ اللّٰهِؕ قُلۡ لَّنۡ تَتَّبِعُوۡنَا كَذٰلِكُمۡ قَالَ اللّٰهُ مِنۡ قَبۡلُۚ فَسَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ بَلۡ تَحۡسُدُوۡنَنَاؕ بَلۡ كَانُوۡا لَا يَفۡقَهُوۡنَ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًا
quran.english: Those who remained behind will say when you set out toward the war booty to take it, "Let us follow you." They wish to change the words of Allah. Say, "Never will you follow us. Thus did Allah say before." So they will say, "Rather, you envy us." But [in fact] they were not understanding except a little

quran.arabic: قُلۡ لِّلۡمُخَلَّفِيۡنَ مِنَ الۡاَعۡرَابِ سَتُدۡعَوۡنَ اِلٰي قَوۡمٍ اُولِيۡ بَاۡسٍ شَدِيۡدٍ تُقَاتِلُوۡنَهُمۡ اَوۡ يُسۡلِمُوۡنَۚ فَاِنۡ تُطِيۡعُوۡا يُؤۡتِكُمُ اللّٰهُ اَجۡرًا حَسَنًاۚ وَاِنۡ تَتَوَلَّوۡا كَمَا تَوَلَّيۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ قَبۡلُ يُعَذِّبۡكُمۡ عَذَابًا اَلِيۡمًا
quran.english: Say to those who remained behind of the bedouins, "You will be called to [face] a people of great military might; you may fight them, or they will submit. So if you obey, Allah will give you a good reward; but if you turn away as you turned away before, He will punish you with a painful punishment

quran.arabic: لَيۡسَ عَلَي الۡاَعۡمٰي حَرَجٌ وَّلَا عَلَي الۡاَعۡرَجِ حَرَجٌ وَّلَا عَلَي الۡمَرِيۡضِ حَرَجٌؕ وَمَنۡ يُّطِعِ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ يُدۡخِلۡهُ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُۚ وَمَنۡ يَّتَوَلَّ يُعَذِّبۡهُ عَذَابًا اَلِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: There is not upon the blind any guilt or upon the lame any guilt or upon the ill any guilt [for remaining behind]. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger - He will admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow; but whoever turns away - He will punish him with a painful punishment

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ رَضِيَ اللّٰهُ عَنِ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ اِذۡ يُبَايِعُوۡنَكَ تَحۡتَ الشَّجَرَةِ فَعَلِمَ مَا فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ فَاَنۡزَلَ السَّكِيۡنَةَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَاَثَابَهُمۡ فَتۡحًا قَرِيۡبًاۙ‏
quran.english: Certainly was Allah pleased with the believers when they pledged allegiance to you, [O Muhammad], under the tree, and He knew what was in their hearts, so He sent down tranquillity upon them and rewarded them with an imminent conquest

quran.arabic: وَّمَغَانِمَ كَثِيۡرَةً يَّاۡخُذُوۡنَهَاؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ عَزِيۡزًا حَكِيۡمًا
quran.english: And much war booty which they will take. And ever is Allah Exalted in Might and Wise

quran.arabic: وَعَدَكُمُ اللّٰهُ مَغَانِمَ كَثِيۡرَةً تَاۡخُذُوۡنَهَا فَعَجَّلَ لَكُمۡ هٰذِهٖ وَكَفَّ اَيۡدِيَ النَّاسِ عَنۡكُمۡۚ وَلِتَكُوۡنَ اٰيَةً لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَيَهۡدِيَكُمۡ صِرَاطًا مُّسۡتَقِيۡمًاۙ‏
quran.english: Allah has promised you much booty that you will take [in the future] and has hastened for you this [victory] and withheld the hands of people from you - that it may be a sign for the believers and [that] He may guide you to a straight path

quran.arabic: وَّاُخۡرٰي لَمۡ تَقۡدِرُوۡا عَلَيۡهَا قَدۡ اَحَاطَ اللّٰهُ بِهَاؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرًا
quran.english: And [He promises] other [victories] that you were [so far] unable to [realize] which Allah has already encompassed. And ever is Allah, over all things, competent

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ قَاتَلَكُمُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَوَلَّوُا الۡاَدۡبَارَ ثُمَّ لَا يَجِدُوۡنَ وَلِيًّا وَّلَا نَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: And if those [Makkans] who disbelieve had fought you, they would have turned their backs [in flight]. Then they would not find a protector or a helper

quran.arabic: سُنَّةَ اللّٰهِ الَّتِيۡ قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِنۡ قَبۡلُۚۖ وَلَنۡ تَجِدَ لِسُنَّةِ اللّٰهِ تَبۡدِيۡلًا
quran.english: [This is] the established way of Allah which has occurred before. And never will you find in the way of Allah any change

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِيۡ كَفَّ اَيۡدِيَهُمۡ عَنۡكُمۡ وَاَيۡدِيَكُمۡ عَنۡهُمۡ بِبَطۡنِ مَكَّةَ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ اَنۡ اَظۡفَرَكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ بَصِيۡرًا
quran.english: And it is He who withheld their hands from you and your hands from them within [the area of] Makkah after He caused you to overcome them. And ever is Allah of what you do, Seeing

quran.arabic: هُمُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَصَدُّوۡكُمۡ عَنِ الۡمَسۡجِدِ الۡحَرَامِ وَالۡهَدۡيَ مَعۡكُوۡفًا اَنۡ يَّبۡلُغَ مَحِلَّهٗؕ وَلَوۡلَا رِجَالٌ مُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ وَنِسَآءٌ مُّؤۡمِنٰتٌ لَّمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡهُمۡ اَنۡ تَطَـُٔوۡهُمۡ فَتُصِيۡبَكُمۡ مِّنۡهُمۡ مَّعَرَّةٌۭ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٍۚ لِيُدۡخِلَ اللّٰهُ فِيۡ رَحۡمَتِهٖ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُۚ لَوۡ تَزَيَّلُوۡا لَعَذَّبۡنَا الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡهُمۡ عَذَابًا اَلِيۡمًا
quran.english: They are the ones who disbelieved and obstructed you from al-Masjid al-Haram while the offering was prevented from reaching its place of sacrifice. And if not for believing men and believing women whom you did not know - that you might trample them and there would befall you because of them dishonor without [your] knowledge - [you would have been permitted to enter Makkah]. [This was so] that Allah might admit to His mercy whom He willed. If they had been apart [from them], We would have punished those who disbelieved among them with painful punishment

quran.arabic: اِذۡ جَعَلَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمُ الۡحَمِيَّةَ حَمِيَّةَ الۡجَاهِلِيَّةِ فَاَنۡزَلَ اللّٰهُ سَكِيۡنَتَهٗ عَلٰي رَسُوۡلِهٖ وَعَلَي الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَاَلۡزَمَهُمۡ كَلِمَةَ التَّقۡوٰي وَكَانُوۡ٘ا اَحَقَّ بِهَا وَاَهۡلَهَاؕ وَكَانَ اللّٰهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: When those who disbelieved had put into their hearts chauvinism - the chauvinism of the time of ignorance. But Allah sent down His tranquillity upon His Messenger and upon the believers and imposed upon them the word of righteousness, and they were more deserving of it and worthy of it. And ever is Allah, of all things, Knowing

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ صَدَقَ اللّٰهُ رَسُوۡلَهُ الرُّءۡيَا بِالۡحَقِّۚ لَتَدۡخُلُنَّ الۡمَسۡجِدَ الۡحَرَامَ اِنۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ اٰمِنِيۡنَۙ مُحَلِّقِيۡنَ رُءُوۡسَكُمۡ وَمُقَصِّرِيۡنَۙ لَا تَخَافُوۡنَؕ فَعَلِمَ مَا لَمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡا فَجَعَلَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ ذٰلِكَ فَتۡحًا قَرِيۡبًا
quran.english: Certainly has Allah showed to His Messenger the vision in truth. You will surely enter al-Masjid al-Haram, if Allah wills, in safety, with your heads shaved and [hair] shortened, not fearing [anyone]. He knew what you did not know and has arranged before that a conquest near [at hand]

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَرۡسَلَ رَسُوۡلَهٗ بِالۡهُدٰي وَدِيۡنِ الۡحَقِّ لِيُظۡهِرَهٗ عَلَي الدِّيۡنِ كُلِّهٖؕ وَكَفٰي بِاللّٰهِ شَهِيۡدًاؕ‏
quran.english: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion. And sufficient is Allah as Witness

quran.arabic: مُحَمَّدٌ رَّسُوۡلُ اللّٰهِؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ مَعَهٗ٘ اَشِدَّآءُ عَلَي الۡكُفَّارِ رُحَمَآءُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ تَرٰىهُمۡ رُكَّعًا سُجَّدًا يَّبۡتَغُوۡنَ فَضۡلًا مِّنَ اللّٰهِ وَرِضۡوَانًاؗ سِيۡمَاهُمۡ فِيۡ وُجُوۡهِهِمۡ مِّنۡ اَثَرِ السُّجُوۡدِؕ ذٰلِكَ مَثَلُهُمۡ فِي التَّوۡرٰىةِۚۖۛ وَمَثَلُهُمۡ فِي الۡاِنۡجِيۡلِۚࣞۛ كَزَرۡعٍ اَخۡرَجَ شَطۡاَهٗ فَاٰزَرَهٗ فَاسۡتَغۡلَظَ فَاسۡتَوٰي عَلٰي سُوۡقِهٖ يُعۡجِبُ الزُّرَّاعَ لِيَغِيۡظَ بِهِمُ الۡكُفَّارَؕ وَعَدَ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ مِنۡهُمۡ مَّغۡفِرَةً وَّاَجۡرًا عَظِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; and those with him are forceful against the disbelievers, merciful among themselves. You see them bowing and prostrating [in prayer], seeking bounty from Allah and [His] pleasure. Their mark is on their faces from the trace of prostration. That is their description in the Torah. And their description in the Gospel is as a plant which produces its offshoots and strengthens them so they grow firm and stand upon their stalks, delighting the sowers - so that Allah may enrage by them the disbelievers. Allah has promised those who believe and do righteous deeds among them forgiveness and a great reward

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تُقَدِّمُوۡا بَيۡنَ يَدَيِ اللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ سَمِيۡعٌ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, do not put [yourselves] before Allah and His Messenger but fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Hearing and Knowing

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تَرۡفَعُوۡ٘ا اَصۡوَاتَكُمۡ فَوۡقَ صَوۡتِ النَّبِيِّ وَلَا تَجۡهَرُوۡا لَهٗ بِالۡقَوۡلِ كَجَهۡرِ بَعۡضِكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ اَنۡ تَحۡبَطَ اَعۡمَالُكُمۡ وَاَنۡتُمۡ لَا تَشۡعُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, do not raise your voices above the voice of the Prophet or be loud to him in speech like the loudness of some of you to others, lest your deeds become worthless while you perceive not

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يَغُضُّوۡنَ اَصۡوَاتَهُمۡ عِنۡدَ رَسُوۡلِ اللّٰهِ اُولٰٓئِكَ الَّذِيۡنَ امۡتَحَنَ اللّٰهُ قُلُوۡبَهُمۡ لِلتَّقۡوٰيؕ لَهُمۡ مَّغۡفِرَةٌ وَّاَجۡرٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Indeed, those who lower their voices before the Messenger of Allah - they are the ones whose hearts Allah has tested for righteousness. For them is forgiveness and great reward

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُنَادُوۡنَكَ مِنۡ وَّرَآءِ الۡحُجُرٰتِ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, those who call you, [O Muhammad], from behind the chambers - most of them do not use reason

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ اَنَّهُمۡ صَبَرُوۡا حَتّٰي تَخۡرُجَ اِلَيۡهِمۡ لَكَانَ خَيۡرًا لَّهُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And if they had been patient until you [could] come out to them, it would have been better for them. But Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ جَآءَكُمۡ فَاسِقٌۭ بِنَبَاٍ فَتَبَيَّنُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ تُصِيۡبُوۡا قَوۡمًاۭ بِجَهَالَةٍ فَتُصۡبِحُوۡا عَلٰي مَا فَعَلۡتُمۡ نٰدِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, if there comes to you a disobedient one with information, investigate, lest you harm a people out of ignorance and become, over what you have done, regretful

quran.arabic: وَاعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّ فِيۡكُمۡ رَسُوۡلَ اللّٰهِؕ لَوۡ يُطِيۡعُكُمۡ فِيۡ كَثِيۡرٍ مِّنَ الۡاَمۡرِ لَعَنِتُّمۡ وَلٰكِنَّ اللّٰهَ حَبَّبَ اِلَيۡكُمُ الۡاِيۡمَانَ وَزَيَّنَهٗ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِكُمۡ وَكَرَّهَ اِلَيۡكُمُ الۡكُفۡرَ وَالۡفُسُوۡقَ وَالۡعِصۡيَانَؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الرّٰشِدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And know that among you is the Messenger of Allah. If he were to obey you in much of the matter, you would be in difficulty, but Allah has endeared to you the faith and has made it pleasing in your hearts and has made hateful to you disbelief, defiance and disobedience. Those are the [rightly] guided

quran.arabic: فَضۡلًا مِّنَ اللّٰهِ وَنِعۡمَةًؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌ حَكِيۡمٌ
quran.english: [It is] as bounty from Allah and favor. And Allah is Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ طَآئِفَتٰنِ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ اقۡتَتَلُوۡا فَاَصۡلِحُوۡا بَيۡنَهُمَاۚ فَاِنۭۡ بَغَتۡ اِحۡدٰىهُمَا عَلَي الۡاُخۡرٰي فَقَاتِلُوا الَّتِيۡ تَبۡغِيۡ حَتّٰي تَفِيۡٓءَ اِلٰ٘ي اَمۡرِ اللّٰهِۚ فَاِنۡ فَآءَتۡ فَاَصۡلِحُوۡا بَيۡنَهُمَا بِالۡعَدۡلِ وَاَقۡسِطُوۡاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُحِبُّ الۡمُقۡسِطِيۡنَ
quran.english: And if two factions among the believers should fight, then make settlement between the two. But if one of them oppresses the other, then fight against the one that oppresses until it returns to the ordinance of Allah. And if it returns, then make settlement between them in justice and act justly. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ اِخۡوَةٌ فَاَصۡلِحُوۡا بَيۡنَ اَخَوَيۡكُمۡۚ وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: The believers are but brothers, so make settlement between your brothers. And fear Allah that you may receive mercy

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا يَسۡخَرۡ قَوۡمٌ مِّنۡ قَوۡمٍ عَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّكُوۡنُوۡا خَيۡرًا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا نِسَآءٌ مِّنۡ نِّسَآءٍ عَسٰ٘ي اَنۡ يَّكُنَّ خَيۡرًا مِّنۡهُنَّۚ وَلَا تَلۡمِزُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَكُمۡ وَلَا تَنَابَزُوۡا بِالۡاَلۡقَابِؕ بِئۡسَ الاِسۡمُ الۡفُسُوۡقُ بَعۡدَ الۡاِيۡمَانِۚ وَمَنۡ لَّمۡ يَتُبۡ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, let not a people ridicule [another] people; perhaps they may be better than them; nor let women ridicule [other] women; perhaps they may be better than them. And do not insult one another and do not call each other by [offensive] nicknames. Wretched is the name of disobedience after [one's] faith. And whoever does not repent - then it is those who are the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اجۡتَنِبُوۡا كَثِيۡرًا مِّنَ الظَّنِّؗ اِنَّ بَعۡضَ الظَّنِّ اِثۡمٌ وَّلَا تَجَسَّسُوۡا وَلَا يَغۡتَبۡ بَّعۡضُكُمۡ بَعۡضًاؕ اَيُحِبُّ اَحَدُكُمۡ اَنۡ يَّاۡكُلَ لَحۡمَ اَخِيۡهِ مَيۡتًا فَكَرِهۡتُمُوۡهُؕ وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ تَوَّابٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, avoid much [negative] assumption. Indeed, some assumption is sin. And do not spy or backbite each other. Would one of you like to eat the flesh of his brother when dead? You would detest it. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is Accepting of repentance and Merciful

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اِنَّا خَلَقۡنٰكُمۡ مِّنۡ ذَكَرٍ وَّاُنۡثٰي وَجَعَلۡنٰكُمۡ شُعُوۡبًا وَّقَبَآئِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوۡاؕ اِنَّ اَكۡرَمَكُمۡ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ اَتۡقٰىكُمۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلِيۡمٌ خَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: O mankind, indeed We have created you from male and female and made you peoples and tribes that you may know one another. Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allah is the most righteous of you. Indeed, Allah is Knowing and Acquainted

quran.arabic: قَالَتِ الۡاَعۡرَابُ اٰمَنَّاؕ قُلۡ لَّمۡ تُؤۡمِنُوۡا وَلٰكِنۡ قُوۡلُوۡ٘ا اَسۡلَمۡنَا وَلَمَّا يَدۡخُلِ الۡاِيۡمَانُ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِكُمۡؕ وَاِنۡ تُطِيۡعُوا اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ لَا يَلِتۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَعۡمَالِكُمۡ شَيۡـًٔاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: The bedouins say, "We have believed." Say, "You have not [yet] believed; but say [instead], 'We have submitted,' for faith has not yet entered your hearts. And if you obey Allah and His Messenger, He will not deprive you from your deeds of anything. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَرۡتَابُوۡا وَجٰهَدُوۡا بِاَمۡوَالِهِمۡ وَاَنۡفُسِهِمۡ فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الصّٰدِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: The believers are only the ones who have believed in Allah and His Messenger and then doubt not but strive with their properties and their lives in the cause of Allah. It is those who are the truthful

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَتُعَلِّمُوۡنَ اللّٰهَ بِدِيۡنِكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Say, "Would you acquaint Allah with your religion while Allah knows whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth, and Allah is Knowing of all things

quran.arabic: يَمُنُّوۡنَ عَلَيۡكَ اَنۡ اَسۡلَمُوۡاؕ قُلۡ لَّا تَمُنُّوۡا عَلَيَّ اِسۡلَامَكُمۡۚ بَلِ اللّٰهُ يَمُنُّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ اَنۡ هَدٰىكُمۡ لِلۡاِيۡمَانِ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: They consider it a favor to you that they have accepted Islam. Say, "Do not consider your Islam a favor to me. Rather, Allah has conferred favor upon you that He has guided you to the faith, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يَعۡلَمُ غَيۡبَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَاللّٰهُ بَصِيۡرٌۭ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Allah knows the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth. And Allah is Seeing of what you do

quran.arabic: قٓࣞ وَالۡقُرۡاٰنِ الۡمَجِيۡدِۚ‏
quran.english: Qaf. By the honored Qur'an

quran.arabic: بَلۡ عَجِبُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ جَآءَهُمۡ مُّنۡذِرٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَقَالَ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ هٰذَا شَيۡءٌ عَجِيۡبٌۚ‏
quran.english: But they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves, and the disbelievers say, "This is an amazing thing

quran.arabic: ءَاِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًاۚ ذٰلِكَ رَجۡعٌۭ بَعِيۡدٌ
quran.english: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant return

quran.arabic: قَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا مَا تَنۡقُصُ الۡاَرۡضُ مِنۡهُمۡۚ وَعِنۡدَنَا كِتٰبٌ حَفِيۡظٌ
quran.english: We know what the earth diminishes of them, and with Us is a retaining record

quran.arabic: بَلۡ كَذَّبُوۡا بِالۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيۡ٘ اَمۡرٍ مَّرِيۡجٍ
quran.english: But they denied the truth when it came to them, so they are in a confused condition

quran.arabic: اَفَلَمۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡ٘ا اِلَي السَّمَآءِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ كَيۡفَ بَنَيۡنٰهَا وَزَيَّنّٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِنۡ فُرُوۡجٍ
quran.english: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts

quran.arabic: وَالۡاَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنٰهَا وَاَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيۡهَا رَوَاسِيَ وَاَنۭۡ بَتۡنَا فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ زَوۡجٍۭ بَهِيۡجٍۙ‏
quran.english: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind

quran.arabic: تَبۡصِرَةً وَّذِكۡرٰي لِكُلِّ عَبۡدٍ مُّنِيۡبٍ
quran.english: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allah]

quran.arabic: وَنَزَّلۡنَا مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً مُّبٰرَكًا فَاَنۭۡ بَتۡنَا بِهٖ جَنّٰتٍ وَّحَبَّ الۡحَصِيۡدِۙ‏
quran.english: And We have sent down blessed rain from the sky and made grow thereby gardens and grain from the harvest

quran.arabic: وَالنَّخۡلَ بٰسِقٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلۡعٌ نَّضِيۡدٌۙ‏
quran.english: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers

quran.arabic: رِّزۡقًا لِّلۡعِبَادِۙ وَاَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهٖ بَلۡدَةً مَّيۡتًاؕ كَذٰلِكَ الۡخُرُوۡجُ
quran.english: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the resurrection

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوۡحٍ وَّاَصۡحٰبُ الرَّسِّ وَثَمُوۡدُۙ‏
quran.english: The people of Noah denied before them, and the companions of the well and Thamud

quran.arabic: وَعَادٌ وَّفِرۡعَوۡنُ وَاِخۡوَانُ لُوۡطٍۙ‏
quran.english: And 'Aad and Pharaoh and the brothers of Lot

quran.arabic: وَّاَصۡحٰبُ الۡاَيۡكَةِ وَقَوۡمُ تُبَّعٍؕ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ الرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيۡدِ
quran.english: And the companions of the thicket and the people of Tubba'. All denied the messengers, so My threat was justly fulfilled

quran.arabic: اَفَعَيِيۡنَا بِالۡخَلۡقِ الۡاَوَّلِؕ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِيۡ لَبۡسٍ مِّنۡ خَلۡقٍ جَدِيۡدٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ وَنَعۡلَمُ مَا تُوَسۡوِسُ بِهٖ نَفۡسُهٗۚۖ وَنَحۡنُ اَقۡرَبُ اِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ حَبۡلِ الۡوَرِيۡدِ
quran.english: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein

quran.arabic: اِذۡ يَتَلَقَّي الۡمُتَلَقِّيٰنِ عَنِ الۡيَمِيۡنِ وَعَنِ الشِّمَالِ قَعِيۡدٌ
quran.english: When the two receivers receive, seated on the right and on the left

quran.arabic: مَا يَلۡفِظُ مِنۡ قَوۡلٍ اِلَّا لَدَيۡهِ رَقِيۡبٌ عَتِيۡدٌ
quran.english: Man does not utter any word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record]

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَتۡ سَكۡرَةُ الۡمَوۡتِ بِالۡحَقِّؕ ذٰلِكَ مَا كُنۡتَ مِنۡهُ تَحِيۡدُ
quran.english: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid

quran.arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّوۡرِؕ ذٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ الۡوَعِيۡدِ
quran.english: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٍ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌ وَّشَهِيۡدٌ
quran.english: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ كُنۡتَ فِيۡ غَفۡلَةٍ مِّنۡ هٰذَا فَكَشَفۡنَا عَنۡكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ الۡيَوۡمَ حَدِيۡدٌ
quran.english: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ قَرِيۡنُهٗ هٰذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيۡدٌؕ‏
quran.english: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared

quran.arabic: اَلۡقِيَا فِيۡ جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: [Allah will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever

quran.arabic: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدٍ مُّرِيۡبِۙ‏
quran.english: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَ فَاَلۡقِيٰهُ فِي الۡعَذَابِ الشَّدِيۡدِ
quran.english: Who made [as equal] with Allah another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment

quran.arabic: قَالَ قَرِيۡنُهٗ رَبَّنَا مَا٘ اَطۡغَيۡتُهٗ وَلٰكِنۡ كَانَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍۭ بَعِيۡدٍ
quran.english: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error

quran.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخۡتَصِمُوۡا لَدَيَّ وَقَدۡ قَدَّمۡتُ اِلَيۡكُمۡ بِالۡوَعِيۡدِ
quran.english: [Allah] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the warning

quran.arabic: مَا يُبَدَّلُ الۡقَوۡلُ لَدَيَّ وَمَا٘ اَنَا بِظَلَّامٍ لِّلۡعَبِيۡدِࣖ‏
quran.english: The word will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَقُوۡلُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ امۡتَلَاۡتِ وَتَقُوۡلُ هَلۡ مِنۡ مَّزِيۡدٍ
quran.english: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more

quran.arabic: وَاُزۡلِفَتِ الۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيۡدٍ
quran.english: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far

quran.arabic: هٰذَا مَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ لِكُلِّ اَوَّابٍ حَفِيۡظٍۚ‏
quran.english: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allah] and keeper [of His covenant]

quran.arabic: مَنۡ خَشِيَ الرَّحۡمٰنَ بِالۡغَيۡبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلۡبٍ مُّنِيۡبِۙ‏
quran.english: Who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance]

quran.arabic: اِۨدۡخُلُوۡهَا بِسَلٰمٍؕ ذٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ الۡخُلُوۡدِ
quran.english: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity

quran.arabic: لَهُمۡ مَّا يَشَآءُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا وَلَدَيۡنَا مَزِيۡدٌ
quran.english: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more

quran.arabic: وَكَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ اَشَدُّ مِنۡهُمۡ بَطۡشًا فَنَقَّبُوۡا فِي الۡبِلَادِؕ هَلۡ مِنۡ مَّحِيۡصٍ
quran.english: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرٰي لِمَنۡ كَانَ لَهٗ قَلۡبٌ اَوۡ اَلۡقَي السَّمۡعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيۡدٌ
quran.english: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind]

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِيۡ سِتَّةِ اَيَّامٍࣗۖ وَّمَا مَسَّنَا مِنۡ لُّغُوۡبٍ
quran.english: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ عَلٰي مَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوۡعِ الشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ الۡغُرُوۡبِۚ‏
quran.english: So be patient, [O Muhammad], over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ الَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَاَدۡبَارَ السُّجُوۡدِ
quran.english: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration

quran.arabic: وَاسۡتَمِعۡ يَوۡمَ يُنَادِ الۡمُنَادِ مِنۡ مَّكَانٍ قَرِيۡبٍۙ‏
quran.english: And listen on the Day when the Caller will call out from a place that is near

quran.arabic: يَّوۡمَ يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ الصَّيۡحَةَ بِالۡحَقِّؕ ذٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ الۡخُرُوۡجِ
quran.english: The Day they will hear the blast [of the Horn] in truth. That is the Day of Emergence [from the graves]

quran.arabic: اِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيٖ وَنُمِيۡتُ وَاِلَيۡنَا الۡمَصِيۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَشَقَّقُ الۡاَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمۡ سِرَاعًاؕ ذٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيۡرٌ
quran.english: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ وَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِجَبَّارٍࣞ فَذَكِّرۡ بِالۡقُرۡاٰنِ مَنۡ يَّخَافُ وَعِيۡدِࣖ‏
quran.english: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur'an whoever fears My threat

quran.arabic: وَالذّٰرِيٰتِ ذَرۡوًاۙ‏
quran.english: By those [winds] scattering [dust] dispersing

quran.arabic: فَالۡحٰمِلٰتِ وِقۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those [clouds] carrying a load [of water]

quran.arabic: فَالۡجٰرِيٰتِ يُسۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those [ships] sailing with ease

quran.arabic: فَالۡمُقَسِّمٰتِ اَمۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those [angels] apportioning [each] matter

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ لَصَادِقٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, what you are promised is true

quran.arabic: وَّاِنَّ الدِّيۡنَ لَوَاقِعٌؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed, the recompense is to occur

quran.arabic: وَالسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ الۡحُبُكِۙ‏
quran.english: By the heaven containing pathways

quran.arabic: اِنَّكُمۡ لَفِيۡ قَوۡلٍ مُّخۡتَلِفٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, you are in differing speech

quran.arabic: يُّؤۡفَكُ عَنۡهُ مَنۡ اُفِكَؕ‏
quran.english: Deluded away from the Qur'an is he who is deluded

quran.arabic: قُتِلَ الۡخَرّٰصُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Destroyed are the falsifiers

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ فِيۡ غَمۡرَةٍ سَاهُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless

quran.arabic: يَسۡـَٔلُوۡنَ اَيَّانَ يَوۡمُ الدِّيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: They ask, "When is the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ هُمۡ عَلَي النَّارِ يُفۡتَنُوۡنَ
quran.english: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire

quran.arabic: ذُوۡقُوۡا فِتۡنَتَكُمۡؕ هٰذَا الَّذِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ فِيۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs

quran.arabic: اٰخِذِيۡنَ مَا٘ اٰتٰىهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَبۡلَ ذٰلِكَ مُحۡسِنِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good

quran.arabic: كَانُوۡا قَلِيۡلًا مِّنَ الَّيۡلِ مَا يَهۡجَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: They used to sleep but little of the night

quran.arabic: وَبِالۡاَسۡحَارِ هُمۡ يَسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness

quran.arabic: وَفِيۡ٘ اَمۡوَالِهِمۡ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَالۡمَحۡرُوۡمِ
quran.english: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived

quran.arabic: وَفِي الۡاَرۡضِ اٰيٰتٌ لِّلۡمُوۡقِنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]

quran.arabic: وَفِيۡ٘ اَنۡفُسِكُمۡؕ اَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And in yourselves. Then will you not see

quran.arabic: وَفِي السَّمَآءِ رِزۡقُكُمۡ وَمَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised

quran.arabic: فَوَرَبِّ السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ اِنَّهٗ لَحَقٌّ مِّثۡلَ مَا٘ اَنَّكُمۡ تَنۡطِقُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking

quran.arabic: هَلۡ اَتٰىكَ حَدِيۡثُ ضَيۡفِ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ الۡمُكۡرَمِيۡنَۘ‏
quran.english: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham

quran.arabic: اِذۡ دَخَلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُوۡا سَلٰمًاؕ قَالَ سَلٰمٌۚ قَوۡمٌ مُّنۡكَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: When they entered upon him and said, "[We greet you with] peace." He answered, "[And upon you] peace, [you are] a people unknown

quran.arabic: فَرَاغَ اِلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِهٖ فَجَآءَ بِعِجۡلٍ سَمِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf

quran.arabic: فَقَرَّبَهٗ٘ اِلَيۡهِمۡ قَالَ اَلَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَؗ‏
quran.english: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat

quran.arabic: فَاَوۡجَسَ مِنۡهُمۡ خِيۡفَةًؕ قَالُوۡا لَا تَخَفۡؕ وَبَشَّرُوۡهُ بِغُلٰمٍ عَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy

quran.arabic: فَاَقۡبَلَتِ امۡرَاَتُهٗ فِيۡ صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتۡ وَجۡهَهَا وَقَالَتۡ عَجُوۡزٌ عَقِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, "[I am] a barren old woman

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا كَذٰلِكِۙ قَالَ رَبُّكِؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡحَكِيۡمُ الۡعَلِيۡمُ
quran.english: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing

quran.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ اَيُّهَا الۡمُرۡسَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا٘ اُرۡسِلۡنَا٘ اِلٰي قَوۡمٍ مُّجۡرِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals

quran.arabic: لِنُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةً مِّنۡ طِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: To send down upon them stones of clay

quran.arabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُسۡرِفِيۡنَ
quran.english: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors

quran.arabic: فَاَخۡرَجۡنَا مَنۡ كَانَ فِيۡهَا مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: So We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers

quran.arabic: فَمَا وَجَدۡنَا فِيۡهَا غَيۡرَ بَيۡتٍ مِّنَ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims

quran.arabic: وَتَرَكۡنَا فِيۡهَا٘ اٰيَةً لِّلَّذِيۡنَ يَخَافُوۡنَ الۡعَذَابَ الۡاَلِيۡمَؕ‏
quran.english: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَفِيۡ مُوۡسٰ٘ي اِذۡ اَرۡسَلۡنٰهُ اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority

quran.arabic: فَتَوَلّٰي بِرُكۡنِهٖ وَقَالَ سٰحِرٌ اَوۡ مَجۡنُوۡنٌ
quran.english: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman

quran.arabic: فَاَخَذۡنٰهُ وَجُنُوۡدَهٗ فَنَبَذۡنٰهُمۡ فِي الۡيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيۡمٌؕ‏
quran.english: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy

quran.arabic: وَفِيۡ عَادٍ اِذۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُ الرِّيۡحَ الۡعَقِيۡمَۚ‏
quran.english: And in 'Aad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind

quran.arabic: مَا تَذَرُ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍ اَتَتۡ عَلَيۡهِ اِلَّا جَعَلَتۡهُ كَالرَّمِيۡمِؕ‏
quran.english: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins

quran.arabic: وَفِيۡ ثَمُوۡدَ اِذۡ قِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ تَمَتَّعُوۡا حَتّٰي حِيۡنٍ
quran.english: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time

quran.arabic: فَعَتَوۡا عَنۡ اَمۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ فَاَخَذَتۡهُمُ الصّٰعِقَةُ وَهُمۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on

quran.arabic: فَمَا اسۡتَطَاعُوۡا مِنۡ قِيَامٍ وَّمَا كَانُوۡا مُنۡتَصِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves

quran.arabic: وَقَوۡمَ نُوۡحٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلُؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَوۡمًا فٰسِقِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: وَالسَّمَآءَ بَنَيۡنٰهَا بِاَيۡىدٍ وَّاِنَّا لَمُوۡسِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander

quran.arabic: وَالۡاَرۡضَ فَرَشۡنٰهَا فَنِعۡمَ الۡمٰهِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And of all things We created two mates; perhaps you will remember

quran.arabic: فَفِرُّوۡ٘ا اِلَي اللّٰهِؕ اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡهُ نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۚ‏
quran.english: So flee to Allah. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَجۡعَلُوۡا مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَؕ اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡهُ نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ مَا٘ اَتَي الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ مِّنۡ رَّسُوۡلٍ اِلَّا قَالُوۡا سَاحِرٌ اَوۡ مَجۡنُوۡنٌࣞ‏
quran.english: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, "A magician or a madman

quran.arabic: اَتَوَاصَوۡا بِهٖۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٌ طَاغُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Did they suggest it to them? Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people

quran.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ فَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ بِمَلُوۡمٍؗ‏
quran.english: So leave them, [O Muhammad], for you are not to be blamed

quran.arabic: وَّذَكِّرۡ فَاِنَّ الذِّكۡرٰي تَنۡفَعُ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers

quran.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقۡتُ الۡجِنَّ وَالۡاِنۡسَ اِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُوۡنِ
quran.english: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اُرِيۡدُ مِنۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ رِّزۡقٍ وَّمَا٘ اُرِيۡدُ اَنۡ يُّطۡعِمُوۡنِ
quran.english: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الرَّزَّاقُ ذُو الۡقُوَّةِ الۡمَتِيۡنُ
quran.english: Indeed, it is Allah who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّ لِلَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا ذَنُوۡبًا مِّثۡلَ ذَنُوۡبِ اَصۡحٰبِهِمۡ فَلَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُوۡنِ
quran.english: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their predecessors, so let them not impatiently urge Me

quran.arabic: فَوَيۡلٌ لِّلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ يَّوۡمِهِمُ الَّذِيۡ يُوۡعَدُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised

quran.arabic: وَالطُّوۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: By the mount

quran.arabic: وَكِتٰبٍ مَّسۡطُوۡرٍۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] a Book inscribed

quran.arabic: فِيۡ رَقٍّ مَّنۡشُوۡرٍۙ‏
quran.english: In parchment spread open

quran.arabic: وَّالۡبَيۡتِ الۡمَعۡمُوۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the frequented House

quran.arabic: وَالسَّقۡفِ الۡمَرۡفُوۡعِۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the heaven raised high

quran.arabic: وَالۡبَحۡرِ الۡمَسۡجُوۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the sea filled [with fire]

quran.arabic: اِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَاقِعٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur

quran.arabic: مَّا لَهٗ مِنۡ دَافِعٍۙ‏
quran.english: Of it there is no preventer

quran.arabic: يَّوۡمَ تَمُوۡرُ السَّمَآءُ مَوۡرًا
quran.english: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion

quran.arabic: وَّتَسِيۡرُ الۡجِبَالُ سَيۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And the mountains will pass on, departing

quran.arabic: فَوَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ فِيۡ خَوۡضٍ يَّلۡعَبُوۡنَۘ‏
quran.english: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يُدَعُّوۡنَ اِلٰي نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّاؕ‏
quran.english: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say]

quran.arabic: هٰذِهِ النَّارُ الَّتِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهَا تُكَذِّبُوۡنَ
quran.english: This is the Fire which you used to deny

quran.arabic: اَفَسِحۡرٌ هٰذَا٘ اَمۡ اَنۡتُمۡ لَا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then is this magic, or do you not see

quran.arabic: اِصۡلَوۡهَا فَاصۡبِرُوۡ٘ا اَوۡ لَا تَصۡبِرُوۡاۚ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡؕ اِنَّمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ فِيۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّنَعِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure

quran.arabic: فٰكِهِيۡنَ بِمَا٘ اٰتٰىهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡۚ وَوَقٰىهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ عَذَابَ الۡجَحِيۡمِ
quran.english: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire

quran.arabic: كُلُوۡا وَاشۡرَبُوۡا هَنِيۡٓـًٔاۭ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do

quran.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٕيۡنَ عَلٰي سُرُرٍ مَّصۡفُوۡفَةٍۚ وَزَوَّجۡنٰهُمۡ بِحُوۡرٍ عِيۡنٍ
quran.english: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَاتَّبَعَتۡهُمۡ ذُرِّيَّتُهُمۡ بِاِيۡمَانٍ اَلۡحَقۡنَا بِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ وَمَا٘ اَلَتۡنٰهُمۡ مِّنۡ عَمَلِهِمۡ مِّنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ كُلُّ امۡرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained

quran.arabic: وَاَمۡدَدۡنٰهُمۡ بِفَاكِهَةٍ وَّلَحۡمٍ مِّمَّا يَشۡتَهُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire

quran.arabic: يَتَنَازَعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا كَاۡسًا لَّا لَغۡوٌ فِيۡهَا وَلَا تَاۡثِيۡمٌ
quran.english: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin

quran.arabic: وَيَطُوۡفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ غِلۡمَانٌ لَّهُمۡ كَاَنَّهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤٌ مَّكۡنُوۡنٌ
quran.english: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected

quran.arabic: وَاَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ يَّتَسَآءَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا كُنَّا قَبۡلُ فِيۡ٘ اَهۡلِنَا مُشۡفِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allah]

quran.arabic: فَمَنَّ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡنَا وَوَقٰىنَا عَذَابَ السَّمُوۡمِ
quran.english: So Allah conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كُنَّا مِنۡ قَبۡلُ نَدۡعُوۡهُؕ اِنَّهٗ هُوَ الۡبَرُّ الرَّحِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful

quran.arabic: فَذَكِّرۡ فَمَا٘ اَنۡتَ بِنِعۡمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَّلَا مَجۡنُوۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: So remind [O Muhammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهٖ رَيۡبَ الۡمَنُوۡنِ
quran.english: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time
