quran.arabic: قُلۡ تَرَبَّصُوۡا فَاِنِّيۡ مَعَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡمُتَرَبِّصِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters

quran.arabic: اَمۡ تَاۡمُرُهُمۡ اَحۡلَامُهُمۡ بِهٰذَا٘ اَمۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٌ طَاغُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ تَقَوَّلَهٗۚ بَلۡ لَّا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe

quran.arabic: فَلۡيَاۡتُوۡا بِحَدِيۡثٍ مِّثۡلِهٖ٘ اِنۡ كَانُوۡا صٰدِقِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful

quran.arabic: اَمۡ خُلِقُوۡا مِنۡ غَيۡرِ شَيۡءٍ اَمۡ هُمُ الۡخٰلِقُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]

quran.arabic: اَمۡ خَلَقُوا السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَۚ بَلۡ لَّا يُوۡقِنُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain

quran.arabic: اَمۡ عِنۡدَهُمۡ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ اَمۡ هُمُ الۡمُصَۜيۡطِرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَهُمۡ سُلَّمٌ يَّسۡتَمِعُوۡنَ فِيۡهِۚ فَلۡيَاۡتِ مُسۡتَمِعُهُمۡ بِسُلۡطٰنٍ مُّبِيۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَهُ الۡبَنٰتُ وَلَكُمُ الۡبَنُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Or has He daughters while you have sons

quran.arabic: اَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ اَجۡرًا فَهُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّغۡرَمٍ مُّثۡقَلُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down

quran.arabic: اَمۡ عِنۡدَهُمُ الۡغَيۡبُ فَهُمۡ يَكۡتُبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يُرِيۡدُوۡنَ كَيۡدًاؕ فَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا هُمُ الۡمَكِيۡدُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَهُمۡ اِلٰهٌ غَيۡرُ اللّٰهِؕ سُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ يَّرَوۡا كِسۡفًا مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَّقُوۡلُوۡا سَحَابٌ مَّرۡكُوۡمٌ
quran.english: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up

quran.arabic: فَذَرۡهُمۡ حَتّٰي يُلٰقُوۡا يَوۡمَهُمُ الَّذِيۡ فِيۡهِ يُصۡعَقُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِيۡ عَنۡهُمۡ كَيۡدُهُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا هُمۡ يُنۡصَرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ لِلَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا عَذَابًا دُوۡنَ ذٰلِكَ وَلٰكِنَّ اَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know

quran.arabic: وَاصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ فَاِنَّكَ بِاَعۡيُنِنَا وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ حِيۡنَ تَقُوۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord when you arise

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ الَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَاِدۡبَارَ النُّجُوۡمِࣖ‏
quran.english: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars

quran.arabic: وَالنَّجۡمِ اِذَا هَوٰيۙ‏
quran.english: By the star when it descends

quran.arabic: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمۡ وَمَا غَوٰيۚ‏
quran.english: Your companion [Muhammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَنۡطِقُ عَنِ الۡهَوٰيؕۚ‏
quran.english: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا وَحۡيٌ يُّوۡحٰيۙ‏
quran.english: It is not but a revelation revealed

quran.arabic: عَلَّمَهٗ شَدِيۡدُ الۡقُوٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Taught to him by one intense in strength

quran.arabic: ذُوۡ مِرَّةٍؕ فَاسۡتَوٰيۙ‏
quran.english: One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ بِالۡاُفُقِ الۡاَعۡلٰيؕ‏
quran.english: While he was in the higher [part of the] horizon

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ دَنَا فَتَدَلّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Then he approached and descended

quran.arabic: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوۡسَيۡنِ اَوۡ اَدۡنٰيۚ‏
quran.english: And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer

quran.arabic: فَاَوۡحٰ٘ي اِلٰي عَبۡدِهٖ مَا٘ اَوۡحٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed

quran.arabic: مَا كَذَبَ الۡفُؤَادُ مَا رَاٰي
quran.english: The heart did not lie [about] what it saw

quran.arabic: اَفَتُمٰرُوۡنَهٗ عَلٰي مَا يَرٰي
quran.english: So will you dispute with him over what he saw

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ رَاٰهُ نَزۡلَةً اُخۡرٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And he certainly saw him in another descent

quran.arabic: عِنۡدَ سِدۡرَةِ الۡمُنۡتَهٰي
quran.english: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary

quran.arabic: عِنۡدَهَا جَنَّةُ الۡمَاۡوٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Near it is the Garden of Refuge

quran.arabic: اِذۡ يَغۡشَي السِّدۡرَةَ مَا يَغۡشٰيۙ‏
quran.english: When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it]

quran.arabic: مَا زَاغَ الۡبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغٰي
quran.english: The sight [of the Prophet] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit]

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ رَاٰي مِنۡ اٰيٰتِ رَبِّهِ الۡكُبۡرٰي
quran.english: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتُمُ اللّٰتَ وَالۡعُزّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: So have you considered al-Lat and al-'Uzza

quran.arabic: وَمَنٰوةَ الثَّالِثَةَ الۡاُخۡرٰي
quran.english: And Manat, the third - the other one

quran.arabic: اَلَكُمُ الذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ الۡاُنۡثٰي
quran.english: Is the male for you and for Him the female

quran.arabic: تِلۡكَ اِذًا قِسۡمَةٌ ضِيۡزٰي
quran.english: That, then, is an unjust division

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هِيَ اِلَّا٘ اَسۡمَآءٌ سَمَّيۡتُمُوۡهَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ وَاٰبَآؤُكُمۡ مَّا٘ اَنۡزَلَ اللّٰهُ بِهَا مِنۡ سُلۡطٰنٍؕ اِنۡ يَّتَّبِعُوۡنَ اِلَّا الظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهۡوَي الۡاَنۡفُسُۚ وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُمۡ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهِمُ الۡهُدٰيؕ‏
quran.english: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allah has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لِلۡاِنۡسَانِ مَا تَمَنّٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: Or is there for man whatever he wishes

quran.arabic: فَلِلّٰهِ الۡاٰخِرَةُ وَالۡاُوۡلٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: Rather, to Allah belongs the Hereafter and the first [life]

quran.arabic: وَكَمۡ مِّنۡ مَّلَكٍ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغۡنِيۡ شَفَاعَتُهُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا اِلَّا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ اَنۡ يَّاۡذَنَ اللّٰهُ لِمَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَرۡضٰي
quran.english: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allah has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِالۡاٰخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّوۡنَ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةَ تَسۡمِيَةَ الۡاُنۡثٰي
quran.english: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names

quran.arabic: وَمَا لَهُمۡ بِهٖ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍؕ اِنۡ يَّتَّبِعُوۡنَ اِلَّا الظَّنَّۚ وَاِنَّ الظَّنَّ لَا يُغۡنِيۡ مِنَ الۡحَقِّ شَيۡـًٔاۚ‏
quran.english: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all

quran.arabic: فَاَعۡرِضۡ عَنۡ مَّنۡ تَوَلّٰي ࣢ۙ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِنَا وَلَمۡ يُرِدۡ اِلَّا الۡحَيٰوةَ الدُّنۡيَاؕ‏
quran.english: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ مَبۡلَغُهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡعِلۡمِؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنۡ ضَلَّ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِهٖ وَهُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنِ اهۡتَدٰي
quran.english: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided

quran.arabic: وَلِلّٰهِ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِۙ لِيَجۡزِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَسَآءُوۡا بِمَا عَمِلُوۡا وَيَجۡزِيَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَحۡسَنُوۡا بِالۡحُسۡنٰيۚ‏
quran.english: And to Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward]

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ يَجۡتَنِبُوۡنَ كَبٰٓئِرَ الۡاِثۡمِ وَالۡفَوَاحِشَ اِلَّا اللَّمَمَؕ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَاسِعُ الۡمَغۡفِرَةِؕ هُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِكُمۡ اِذۡ اَنۡشَاَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَرۡضِ وَاِذۡ اَنۡتُمۡ اَجِنَّةٌ فِيۡ بُطُوۡنِ اُمَّهٰتِكُمۡۚ فَلَا تُزَكُّوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَكُمۡؕ هُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنِ اتَّقٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتَ الَّذِيۡ تَوَلّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Have you seen the one who turned away

quran.arabic: وَاَعۡطٰي قَلِيۡلًا وَّاَكۡدٰي
quran.english: And gave a little and [then] refrained

quran.arabic: اَعِنۡدَهٗ عِلۡمُ الۡغَيۡبِ فَهُوَ يَرٰي
quran.english: Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَمۡ يُنَبَّاۡ بِمَا فِيۡ صُحُفِ مُوۡسٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses

quran.arabic: وَاِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ الَّذِيۡ وَفّٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations]

quran.arabic: اَلَّا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِّزۡرَ اُخۡرٰيۙ‏
quran.english: That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡ لَّيۡسَ لِلۡاِنۡسَانِ اِلَّا مَا سَعٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّ سَعۡيَهٗ سَوۡفَ يُرٰي
quran.english: And that his effort is going to be seen

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ يُجۡزٰىهُ الۡجَزَآءَ الۡاَوۡفٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Then he will be recompensed for it with the fullest recompense

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّ اِلٰي رَبِّكَ الۡمُنۡتَهٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And that to your Lord is the finality

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّهٗ هُوَ اَضۡحَكَ وَاَبۡكٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّهٗ هُوَ اَمَاتَ وَاَحۡيَاۙ‏
quran.english: And that it is He who causes death and gives life

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّهٗ خَلَقَ الزَّوۡجَيۡنِ الذَّكَرَ وَالۡاُنۡثٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And that He creates the two mates - the male and female

quran.arabic: مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍ اِذَا تُمۡنٰيࣕ‏
quran.english: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّ عَلَيۡهِ النَّشۡاَةَ الۡاُخۡرٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And that [incumbent] upon Him is the next creation

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّهٗ هُوَ اَغۡنٰي وَاَقۡنٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And that it is He who enriches and suffices

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّهٗ هُوَ رَبُّ الشِّعۡرٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius

quran.arabic: وَاَنَّهٗ٘ اَهۡلَكَ عَادَا اِۨلۡاُوۡلٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And that He destroyed the first [people of] 'Aad

quran.arabic: وَثَمُوۡدَا۠ فَمَا٘ اَبۡقٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And Thamud - and He did not spare [them]

quran.arabic: وَقَوۡمَ نُوۡحٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلُؕ اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا هُمۡ اَظۡلَمَ وَاَطۡغٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And the people of Noah before. Indeed, it was they who were [even] more unjust and oppressing

quran.arabic: وَالۡمُؤۡتَفِكَةَ اَهۡوٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And the overturned towns He hurled down

quran.arabic: فَغَشّٰىهَا مَا غَشّٰيۚ‏
quran.english: And covered them by that which He covered

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارٰي
quran.english: Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt

quran.arabic: هٰذَا نَذِيۡرٌ مِّنَ النُّذُرِ الۡاُوۡلٰي
quran.english: This [Prophet] is a warner like the former warners

quran.arabic: اَزِفَتِ الۡاٰزِفَةُۚ‏
quran.english: The Approaching Day has approached

quran.arabic: لَيۡسَ لَهَا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ كَاشِفَةٌؕ‏
quran.english: Of it, [from those] besides Allah, there is no remover

quran.arabic: اَفَمِنۡ هٰذَا الۡحَدِيۡثِ تَعۡجَبُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then at this statement do you wonder

quran.arabic: وَتَضۡحَكُوۡنَ وَلَا تَبۡكُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And you laugh and do not weep

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡتُمۡ سٰمِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: While you are proudly sporting

quran.arabic: فَاسۡجُدُوۡا لِلّٰهِ وَاعۡبُدُوۡاࣛࣖ‏
quran.english: So prostrate to Allah and worship [Him]

quran.arabic: اِقۡتَرَبَتِ السَّاعَةُ وَانۡشَقَّ الۡقَمَرُ
quran.english: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two]

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ يَّرَوۡا اٰيَةً يُّعۡرِضُوۡا وَيَقُوۡلُوۡا سِحۡرٌ مُّسۡتَمِرٌّ
quran.english: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic

quran.arabic: وَكَذَّبُوۡا وَاتَّبَعُوۡ٘ا اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ وَكُلُّ اَمۡرٍ مُّسۡتَقِرٌّ
quran.english: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَنۭۡ بَآءِ مَا فِيۡهِ مُزۡدَجَرٌۙ‏
quran.english: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence

quran.arabic: حِكۡمَةٌۭ بَالِغَةٌ فَمَا تُغۡنِ النُّذُرُۙ‏
quran.english: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them]

quran.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡۘ يَوۡمَ يَدۡعُ الدَّاعِ اِلٰي شَيۡءٍ نُّكُرٍۙ‏
quran.english: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding

quran.arabic: خُشَّعًا اَبۡصَارُهُمۡ يَخۡرُجُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡاَجۡدَاثِ كَاَنَّهُمۡ جَرَادٌ مُّنۡتَشِرٌۙ‏
quran.english: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading

quran.arabic: مُّهۡطِعِيۡنَ اِلَي الدَّاعِؕ يَقُوۡلُ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ هٰذَا يَوۡمٌ عَسِرٌ
quran.english: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوۡحٍ فَكَذَّبُوۡا عَبۡدَنَا وَقَالُوۡا مَجۡنُوۡنٌ وَّازۡدُجِرَ
quran.english: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled

quran.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهٗ٘ اَنِّيۡ مَغۡلُوۡبٌ فَانۡتَصِرۡ‏
quran.english: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help

quran.arabic: فَفَتَحۡنَا٘ اَبۡوَابَ السَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنۡهَمِرٍؗۖ‏
quran.english: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down

quran.arabic: وَّفَجَّرۡنَا الۡاَرۡضَ عُيُوۡنًا فَالۡتَقَي الۡمَآءُ عَلٰ٘ي اَمۡرٍ قَدۡ قُدِرَۚ‏
quran.english: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined

quran.arabic: وَحَمَلۡنٰهُ عَلٰي ذَاتِ اَلۡوَاحٍ وَّدُسُرٍۙ‏
quran.english: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails

quran.arabic: تَجۡرِيۡ بِاَعۡيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَنۡ كَانَ كُفِرَ
quran.english: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ تَّرَكۡنٰهَا٘ اٰيَةً فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ
quran.english: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember

quran.arabic: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِيۡ وَنُذُرِ
quran.english: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ
quran.english: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادٌ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِيۡ وَنُذُرِ
quran.english: Aad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيۡحًا صَرۡصَرًا فِيۡ يَوۡمِ نَحۡسٍ مُّسۡتَمِرٍّۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِعُ النَّاسَۙ كَاَنَّهُمۡ اَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٍ مُّنۡقَعِرٍ
quran.english: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted

quran.arabic: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِيۡ وَنُذُرِ
quran.english: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُوۡدُ بِالنُّذُرِ
quran.english: Thamud denied the warning

quran.arabic: فَقَالُوۡ٘ا اَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَاحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهٗ٘ۙ اِنَّا٘ اِذًا لَّفِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ وَّسُعُرٍ
quran.english: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness

quran.arabic: ءَاُلۡقِيَ الذِّكۡرُ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِنَا بَلۡ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ اَشِرٌ
quran.english: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar

quran.arabic: سَيَعۡلَمُوۡنَ غَدًا مَّنِ الۡكَذَّابُ الۡاَشِرُ
quran.english: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar

quran.arabic: اِنَّا مُرۡسِلُوا النَّاقَةِ فِتۡنَةً لَّهُمۡ فَارۡتَقِبۡهُمۡ وَاصۡطَبِرۡؗ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient

quran.arabic: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ اَنَّ الۡمَآءَ قِسۡمَةٌۭ بَيۡنَهُمۡۚ كُلُّ شِرۡبٍ مُّحۡتَضَرٌ
quran.english: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn]

quran.arabic: فَنَادَوۡا صَاحِبَهُمۡ فَتَعَاطٰي فَعَقَرَ
quran.english: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her]

quran.arabic: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِيۡ وَنُذُرِ
quran.english: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ صَيۡحَةً وَّاحِدَةً فَكَانُوۡا كَهَشِيۡمِ الۡمُحۡتَظِرِ
quran.english: Indeed, We sent upon them one blast from the sky, and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ
quran.english: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ لُوۡطٍۭ بِالنُّذُرِ
quran.english: The people of Lot denied the warning

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَاصِبًا اِلَّا٘ اٰلَ لُوۡطٍؕ نَجَّيۡنٰهُمۡ بِسَحَرٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn

quran.arabic: نِّعۡمَةً مِّنۡ عِنۡدِنَاؕ كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِيۡ مَنۡ شَكَرَ
quran.english: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَنۡذَرَهُمۡ بَطۡشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوۡا بِالنُّذُرِ
quran.english: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ رَاوَدُوۡهُ عَنۡ ضَيۡفِهٖ فَطَمَسۡنَا٘ اَعۡيُنَهُمۡ فَذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابِيۡ وَنُذُرِ
quran.english: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ صَبَّحَهُمۡ بُكۡرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسۡتَقِرٌّۚ‏
quran.english: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment

quran.arabic: فَذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابِيۡ وَنُذُرِ
quran.english: So taste My punishment and warning

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَ اٰلَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ النُّذُرُۚ‏
quran.english: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning

quran.arabic: كَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَاَخَذۡنٰهُمۡ اَخۡذَ عَزِيۡزٍ مُّقۡتَدِرٍ
quran.english: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability

quran.arabic: اَكُفَّارُكُمۡ خَيۡرٌ مِّنۡ اُولٰٓئِكُمۡ اَمۡ لَكُمۡ بَرَآءَةٌ فِي الزُّبُرِۚ‏
quran.english: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scripture

quran.arabic: اَمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ نَحۡنُ جَمِيۡعٌ مُّنۡتَصِرٌ
quran.english: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]

quran.arabic: سَيُهۡزَمُ الۡجَمۡعُ وَيُوَلُّوۡنَ الدُّبُرَ
quran.english: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat]

quran.arabic: بَلِ السَّاعَةُ مَوۡعِدُهُمۡ وَالسَّاعَةُ اَدۡهٰي وَاَمَرُّ
quran.english: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ وَّسُعُرٍۘ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يُسۡحَبُوۡنَ فِي النَّارِ عَلٰي وُجُوۡهِهِمۡؕ ذُوۡقُوۡا مَسَّ سَقَرَ
quran.english: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
quran.english: Indeed, all things We created with predestination

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَمۡرُنَا٘ اِلَّا وَاحِدَةٌ كَلَمۡحٍۭ بِالۡبَصَرِ
quran.english: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا٘ اَشۡيَاعَكُمۡ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ
quran.english: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember

quran.arabic: وَكُلُّ شَيۡءٍ فَعَلُوۡهُ فِي الزُّبُرِ
quran.english: And everything they did is in written records

quran.arabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيۡرٍ وَّكَبِيۡرٍ مُّسۡتَطَرٌ
quran.english: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ فِيۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّنَهَرٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers

quran.arabic: فِيۡ مَقۡعَدِ صِدۡقٍ عِنۡدَ مَلِيۡكٍ مُّقۡتَدِرٍࣖ‏
quran.english: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability

quran.arabic: اَلرَّحۡمٰنُۙ‏
quran.english: The Most Merciful

quran.arabic: عَلَّمَ الۡقُرۡاٰنَؕ‏
quran.english: Taught the Qur'an

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ الۡاِنۡسَانَۙ‏
quran.english: Created man

quran.arabic: عَلَّمَهُ الۡبَيَانَ
quran.english: [And] taught him eloquence

quran.arabic: اَلشَّمۡسُ وَالۡقَمَرُ بِحُسۡبَانٍۙ‏
quran.english: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation

quran.arabic: وَّالنَّجۡمُ وَالشَّجَرُ يَسۡجُدٰنِ
quran.english: And the stars and trees prostrate

quran.arabic: وَالسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ الۡمِيۡزَانَۙ‏
quran.english: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance

quran.arabic: اَلَّا تَطۡغَوۡا فِي الۡمِيۡزَانِ
quran.english: That you not transgress within the balance

quran.arabic: وَاَقِيۡمُوا الۡوَزۡنَ بِالۡقِسۡطِ وَلَا تُخۡسِرُوا الۡمِيۡزَانَ
quran.english: And establish weight in justice and do not make deficient the balance

quran.arabic: وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلۡاَنَامِۙ‏
quran.english: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures

quran.arabic: فِيۡهَا فَاكِهَةٌ وَّالنَّخۡلُ ذَاتُ الۡاَكۡمَامِۖ‏
quran.english: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]

quran.arabic: وَالۡحَبُّ ذُو الۡعَصۡفِ وَالرَّيۡحَانُۚ‏
quran.english: And grain having husks and scented plants

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ الۡاِنۡسَانَ مِنۡ صَلۡصَالٍ كَالۡفَخَّارِۙ‏
quran.english: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery

quran.arabic: وَخَلَقَ الۡجَآنَّ مِنۡ مَّارِجٍ مِّنۡ نَّارٍۚ‏
quran.english: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: رَبُّ الۡمَشۡرِقَيۡنِ وَرَبُّ الۡمَغۡرِبَيۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: مَرَجَ الۡبَحۡرَيۡنِ يَلۡتَقِيٰنِۙ‏
quran.english: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side]

quran.arabic: بَيۡنَهُمَا بَرۡزَخٌ لَّا يَبۡغِيٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهُمَا اللُّؤۡلُؤُ وَالۡمَرۡجَانُۚ‏
quran.english: From both of them emerge pearl and coral

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: وَلَهُ الۡجَوَارِ الۡمُنۡشَاٰتُ فِي الۡبَحۡرِ كَالۡاَعۡلَامِۚ‏
quran.english: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِࣖ‏
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: كُلُّ مَنۡ عَلَيۡهَا فَانٍۚۖ‏
quran.english: Everyone upon the earth will perish

quran.arabic: وَّيَبۡقٰي وَجۡهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو الۡجَلٰلِ وَالۡاِكۡرَامِۚ‏
quran.english: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: يَسۡـَٔلُهٗ مَنۡ فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ كُلَّ يَوۡمٍ هُوَ فِيۡ شَاۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: سَنَفۡرُغُ لَكُمۡ اَيُّهَ الثَّقَلٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: We will attend to you, O prominent beings

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: يٰمَعۡشَرَ الۡجِنِّ وَالۡاِنۡسِ اِنِ اسۡتَطَعۡتُمۡ اَنۡ تَنۡفُذُوۡا مِنۡ اَقۡطَارِ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ فَانۡفُذُوۡاؕ لَا تَنۡفُذُوۡنَ اِلَّا بِسُلۡطٰنٍۚ‏
quran.english: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allah]

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: يُرۡسَلُ عَلَيۡكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّنۡ نَّارٍ ࣢ۙ وَّنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنۡتَصِرٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: There will be sent upon you a flame of fire and smoke, and you will not defend yourselves

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا انۡشَقَّتِ السَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتۡ وَرۡدَةً كَالدِّهَانِۚ‏
quran.english: And when the heaven is split open and becomes rose-colored like oil

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: فَيَوۡمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسۡـَٔلُ عَنۡ ذَنۭۡ بِهٖ٘ اِنۡسٌ وَّلَا جَآنٌّۚ‏
quran.english: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: يُعۡرَفُ الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَ بِسِيۡمٰهُمۡ فَيُؤۡخَذُ بِالنَّوَاصِيۡ وَالۡاَقۡدَامِۚ‏
quran.english: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: هٰذِهٖ جَهَنَّمُ الَّتِيۡ يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا الۡمُجۡرِمُوۡنَۘ‏
quran.english: This is Hell, which the criminals deny

quran.arabic: يَطُوۡفُوۡنَ بَيۡنَهَا وَبَيۡنَ حَمِيۡمٍ اٰنٍۚ‏
quran.english: They will go around between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree]

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِࣖ‏
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: وَلِمَنۡ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهٖ جَنَّتٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِۙ‏
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: ذَوَاتَا٘ اَفۡنَانٍۚ‏
quran.english: Having [spreading] branches

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: فِيۡهِمَا عَيۡنٰنِ تَجۡرِيٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: In both of them are two springs, flowing

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: فِيۡهِمَا مِنۡ كُلِّ فَاكِهَةٍ زَوۡجٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٕيۡنَ عَلٰي فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنۡ اِسۡتَبۡرَقٍؕ وَجَنَا الۡجَنَّتَيۡنِ دَانٍۚ‏
quran.english: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: فِيۡهِنَّ قٰصِرٰتُ الطَّرۡفِۙ لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ اِنۡسٌ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنٌّۚ‏
quran.english: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: كَاَنَّهُنَّ الۡيَاقُوۡتُ وَالۡمَرۡجَانُۚ‏
quran.english: As if they were rubies and coral

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: هَلۡ جَزَآءُ الۡاِحۡسَانِ اِلَّا الۡاِحۡسَانُۚ‏
quran.english: Is the reward for good [anything] but good

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ دُوۡنِهِمَا جَنَّتٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِۙ‏
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: مُدۡهَآمَّتٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: Dark green [in color]

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: فِيۡهِمَا عَيۡنٰنِ نَضَّاخَتٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: In both of them are two springs, spouting

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: فِيۡهِمَا فَاكِهَةٌ وَّنَخۡلٌ وَّرُمَّانٌۚ‏
quran.english: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِۚ‏
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: فِيۡهِنَّ خَيۡرٰتٌ حِسَانٌۚ‏
quran.english: In them are good and beautiful women

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: حُوۡرٌ مَّقۡصُوۡرٰتٌ فِي الۡخِيَامِۚ‏
quran.english: Fair ones reserved in pavilions

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ اِنۡسٌ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنٌّۚ‏
quran.english: Untouched before them by man or jinni

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٕيۡنَ عَلٰي رَفۡرَفٍ خُضۡرٍ وَّعَبۡقَرِيٍّ حِسَانٍۚ‏
quran.english: Reclining on green cushions and beautiful fine carpets

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ اٰلَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبٰنِ
quran.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny

quran.arabic: تَبٰرَكَ اسۡمُ رَبِّكَ ذِي الۡجَلٰلِ وَالۡاِكۡرَامِࣖ‏
quran.english: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor

quran.arabic: اِذَا وَقَعَتِ الۡوَاقِعَةُۙ‏
quran.english: When the Occurrence occurs

quran.arabic: لَيۡسَ لِوَقۡعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌۘ‏
quran.english: There is, at its occurrence, no denial

quran.arabic: خَافِضَةٌ رَّافِعَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others]

quran.arabic: اِذَا رُجَّتِ الۡاَرۡضُ رَجًّاۙ‏
quran.english: When the earth is shaken with convulsion

quran.arabic: وَّبُسَّتِ الۡجِبَالُ بَسًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling

quran.arabic: فَكَانَتۡ هَبَآءً مُّنۭۡ بَثًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And become dust dispersing

quran.arabic: وَّكُنۡتُمۡ اَزۡوَاجًا ثَلٰثَةًؕ‏
quran.english: And you become [of] three kinds

quran.arabic: فَاَصۡحٰبُ الۡمَيۡمَنَةِ ࣢ۙ مَا٘ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡمَيۡمَنَةِؕ‏
quran.english: Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right

quran.arabic: وَاَصۡحٰبُ الۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِ ࣢ۙ مَا٘ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِؕ‏
quran.english: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left

quran.arabic: وَالسّٰبِقُوۡنَ السّٰبِقُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And the forerunners, the forerunners

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ الۡمُقَرَّبُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]

quran.arabic: فِيۡ جَنّٰتِ النَّعِيۡمِ
quran.english: In the Gardens of Pleasure

quran.arabic: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: A [large] company of the former peoples

quran.arabic: وَقَلِيۡلٌ مِّنَ الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And a few of the later peoples

quran.arabic: عَلٰي سُرُرٍ مَّوۡضُوۡنَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: On thrones woven [with ornament]

quran.arabic: مُّتَّكِـِٕيۡنَ عَلَيۡهَا مُتَقٰبِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: Reclining on them, facing each other

quran.arabic: يَطُوۡفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَانٌ مُّخَلَّدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal

quran.arabic: بِاَكۡوَابٍ وَّاَبَارِيۡقَ ࣢ۙ وَكَاۡسٍ مِّنۡ مَّعِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring

quran.arabic: لَّا يُصَدَّعُوۡنَ عَنۡهَا وَلَا يُنۡزِفُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated

quran.arabic: وَفَاكِهَةٍ مِّمَّا يَتَخَيَّرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And fruit of what they select

quran.arabic: وَلَحۡمِ طَيۡرٍ مِّمَّا يَشۡتَهُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire

quran.arabic: وَحُوۡرٌ عِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes

quran.arabic: كَاَمۡثَالِ اللُّؤۡلُؤِ الۡمَكۡنُوۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: The likenesses of pearls well-protected

quran.arabic: جَزَآءًۭ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: As reward for what they used to do

quran.arabic: لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا لَغۡوًا وَّلَا تَاۡثِيۡمًاۙ‏
quran.english: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin

quran.arabic: اِلَّا قِيۡلًا سَلٰمًا سَلٰمًا
quran.english: Only a saying: "Peace, peace

quran.arabic: وَاَصۡحٰبُ الۡيَمِيۡنِ ࣢ۙ مَا٘ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡيَمِيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right

quran.arabic: فِيۡ سِدۡرٍ مَّخۡضُوۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed

quran.arabic: وَّطَلۡحٍ مَّنۡضُوۡدٍۙ‏
quran.english: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]
And shade extended

quran.arabic: وَّمَآءٍ مَّسۡكُوۡبٍۙ‏
quran.english: And water poured out

quran.arabic: وَّفَاكِهَةٍ كَثِيۡرَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: And fruit, abundant [and varied]

quran.arabic: لَّا مَقۡطُوۡعَةٍ وَّلَا مَمۡنُوۡعَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden

quran.arabic: وَّفُرُشٍ مَّرۡفُوۡعَةٍؕ‏
quran.english: And [upon] beds raised high

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَنۡشَاۡنٰهُنَّ اِنۡشَآءًۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation

quran.arabic: فَجَعَلۡنٰهُنَّ اَبۡكَارًاۙ‏
quran.english: And made them virgins

quran.arabic: عُرُبًا اَتۡرَابًاۙ‏
quran.english: Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age

quran.arabic: لِّاَصۡحٰبِ الۡيَمِيۡنِࣖؕ‏
quran.english: For the companions of the right [who are]

quran.arabic: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: A company of the former peoples

quran.arabic: وَثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And a company of the later peoples

quran.arabic: وَاَصۡحٰبُ الشِّمَالِ ࣢ۙ مَا٘ اَصۡحٰبُ الشِّمَالِؕ‏
quran.english: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left

quran.arabic: فِيۡ سَمُوۡمٍ وَّحَمِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water
And a shade of black smoke

quran.arabic: لَّا بَارِدٍ وَّلَا كَرِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Neither cool nor beneficial

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَبۡلَ ذٰلِكَ مُتۡرَفِيۡنَۚۖ‏
quran.english: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence

quran.arabic: وَكَانُوۡا يُصِرُّوۡنَ عَلَي الۡحِنۡثِ الۡعَظِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: And they used to persist in the great violation

quran.arabic: وَكَانُوۡا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ ࣢ۙ اَئِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَّعِظَامًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوۡثُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected

quran.arabic: اَوَ اٰبَآؤُنَا الۡاَوَّلُوۡنَ
quran.english: And our forefathers [as well]

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ وَالۡاٰخِرِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples

quran.arabic: لَمَجۡمُوۡعُوۡنَ ࣢ۙ اِلٰي مِيۡقَاتِ يَوۡمٍ مَّعۡلُوۡمٍ
quran.english: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّكُمۡ اَيُّهَا الضَّآلُّوۡنَ الۡمُكَذِّبُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers

quran.arabic: لَاٰكِلُوۡنَ مِنۡ شَجَرٍ مِّنۡ زَقُّوۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum

quran.arabic: فَمَالِـُٔوۡنَ مِنۡهَا الۡبُطُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And filling with it your bellies

quran.arabic: فَشٰرِبُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ الۡحَمِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: And drinking on top of it from scalding water

quran.arabic: فَشٰرِبُوۡنَ شُرۡبَ الۡهِيۡمِؕ‏
quran.english: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels

quran.arabic: هٰذَا نُزُلُهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الدِّيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: That is their accommodation on the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ خَلَقۡنٰكُمۡ فَلَوۡلَا تُصَدِّقُوۡنَ
quran.english: We have created you, so why do you not believe

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتُمۡ مَّا تُمۡنُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Have you seen that which you emit

quran.arabic: ءَاَنۡتُمۡ تَخۡلُقُوۡنَهٗ٘ اَمۡ نَحۡنُ الۡخٰلِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ قَدَّرۡنَا بَيۡنَكُمُ الۡمَوۡتَ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوۡقِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone

quran.arabic: عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ نُّبَدِّلَ اَمۡثَالَكُمۡ وَنُنۡشِئَكُمۡ فِيۡ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ النَّشۡاَةَ الۡاُوۡلٰي فَلَوۡلَا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتُمۡ مَّا تَحۡرُثُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow

quran.arabic: ءَاَنۡتُمۡ تَزۡرَعُوۡنَهٗ٘ اَمۡ نَحۡنُ الزّٰرِعُوۡنَ
quran.english: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower

quran.arabic: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلۡنٰهُ حُطَامًا فَظَلۡتُمۡ تَفَكَّهُوۡنَ
quran.english: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder

quran.arabic: اِنَّا لَمُغۡرَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt

quran.arabic: بَلۡ نَحۡنُ مَحۡرُوۡمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, we have been deprived

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتُمُ الۡمَآءَ الَّذِيۡ تَشۡرَبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And have you seen the water that you drink

quran.arabic: ءَاَنۡتُمۡ اَنۡزَلۡتُمُوۡهُ مِنَ الۡمُزۡنِ اَمۡ نَحۡنُ الۡمُنۡزِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down

quran.arabic: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ جَعَلۡنٰهُ اُجَاجًا فَلَوۡلَا تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful

quran.arabic: اَفَرَءَيۡتُمُ النَّارَ الَّتِيۡ تُوۡرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And have you seen the fire that you ignite

quran.arabic: ءَاَنۡتُمۡ اَنۡشَاۡتُمۡ شَجَرَتَهَا٘ اَمۡ نَحۡنُ الۡمُنۡشِـُٔوۡنَ
quran.english: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ جَعَلۡنٰهَا تَذۡكِرَةً وَّمَتَاعًا لِّلۡمُقۡوِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers

quran.arabic: فَسَبِّحۡ بِاسۡمِ رَبِّكَ الۡعَظِيۡمِࣚۚࣖ‏
quran.english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great

quran.arabic: فَلَا٘ اُقۡسِمُ بِمَوٰقِعِ النُّجُوۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: Then I swear by the setting of the stars

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَقَسَمٌ لَّوۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ عَظِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, it is an oath - if you could know - [most] great

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ لَقُرۡاٰنٌ كَرِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is a noble Qur'an

quran.arabic: فِيۡ كِتٰبٍ مَّكۡنُوۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: In a Register well-protected

quran.arabic: لَّا يَمَسُّهٗ٘ اِلَّا الۡمُطَهَّرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: None touch it except the purified

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: اَفَبِهٰذَا الۡحَدِيۡثِ اَنۡتُمۡ مُّدۡهِنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent

quran.arabic: وَتَجۡعَلُوۡنَ رِزۡقَكُمۡ اَنَّكُمۡ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَ
quran.english: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]

quran.arabic: فَلَوۡلَا٘ اِذَا بَلَغَتِ الۡحُلۡقُوۡمَۙ‏
quran.english: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡتُمۡ حِيۡنَئِذٍ تَنۡظُرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And you are at that time looking on

quran.arabic: وَنَحۡنُ اَقۡرَبُ اِلَيۡهِ مِنۡكُمۡ وَلٰكِنۡ لَّا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see

quran.arabic: فَلَوۡلَا٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ غَيۡرَ مَدِيۡنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed

quran.arabic: تَرۡجِعُوۡنَهَا٘ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Bring it back, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا٘ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنَ الۡمُقَرَّبِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah

quran.arabic: فَرَوۡحٌ وَّرَيۡحَانٌ ࣢ۙ وَّجَنَّتُ نَعِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا٘ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنۡ اَصۡحٰبِ الۡيَمِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And if he was of the companions of the right

quran.arabic: فَسَلٰمٌ لَّكَ مِنۡ اَصۡحٰبِ الۡيَمِيۡنِ
quran.english: Then [the angels will say], "Peace for you; [you are] from the companions of the right

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا٘ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنَ الۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ الضَّآلِّيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray

quran.arabic: فَنُزُلٌ مِّنۡ حَمِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water

quran.arabic: وَّتَصۡلِيَةُ جَحِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And burning in Hellfire

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ الۡيَقِيۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, this is the true certainty

quran.arabic: فَسَبِّحۡ بِاسۡمِ رَبِّكَ الۡعَظِيۡمِࣖ‏
quran.english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great

quran.arabic: سَبَّحَ لِلّٰهِ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: لَهٗ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِۚ يُحۡيٖ وَيُمِيۡتُۚ وَهُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things competent

quran.arabic: هُوَ الۡاَوَّلُ وَالۡاٰخِرُ وَالظَّاهِرُ وَالۡبَاطِنُۚ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ فِيۡ سِتَّةِ اَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ اسۡتَوٰي عَلَي الۡعَرۡشِؕ يَعۡلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهَا وَمَا يَنۡزِلُ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعۡرُجُ فِيۡهَاؕ وَهُوَ مَعَكُمۡ اَيۡنَ مَا كُنۡتُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: It is He who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne. He knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein; and He is with you wherever you are. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing

quran.arabic: لَهٗ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَاِلَي اللّٰهِ تُرۡجَعُ الۡاُمُوۡرُ
quran.english: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. And to Allah are returned [all] matters

quran.arabic: يُوۡلِجُ الَّيۡلَ فِي النَّهَارِ وَيُوۡلِجُ النَّهَارَ فِي الَّيۡلِؕ وَهُوَ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُوۡرِ
quran.english: He causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night, and he is Knowing of that within the breasts

quran.arabic: اٰمِنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ وَاَنۡفِقُوۡا مِمَّا جَعَلَكُمۡ مُّسۡتَخۡلَفِيۡنَ فِيۡهِؕ فَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مِنۡكُمۡ وَاَنۡفَقُوۡا لَهُمۡ اَجۡرٌ كَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Believe in Allah and His Messenger and spend out of that in which He has made you successors. For those who have believed among you and spent, there will be a great reward

quran.arabic: وَمَا لَكُمۡ لَا تُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِاللّٰهِۚ وَالرَّسُوۡلُ يَدۡعُوۡكُمۡ لِتُؤۡمِنُوۡا بِرَبِّكُمۡ وَقَدۡ اَخَذَ مِيۡثَاقَكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And why do you not believe in Allah while the Messenger invites you to believe in your Lord and He has taken your covenant, if you should [truly] be believers

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ يُنَزِّلُ عَلٰي عَبۡدِهٖ٘ اٰيٰتٍۭ بَيِّنٰتٍ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُمۡ مِّنَ الظُّلُمٰتِ اِلَي النُّوۡرِؕ وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ بِكُمۡ لَرَءُوۡفٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: It is He who sends down upon His Servant [Muhammad] verses of clear evidence that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And indeed, Allah is to you Kind and Merciful

quran.arabic: وَمَا لَكُمۡ اَلَّا تُنۡفِقُوۡا فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ وَلِلّٰهِ مِيۡرَاثُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ لَا يَسۡتَوِيۡ مِنۡكُمۡ مَّنۡ اَنۡفَقَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ الۡفَتۡحِ وَقَاتَلَؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ اَعۡظَمُ دَرَجَةً مِّنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَنۡفَقُوۡا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدُ وَقَاتَلُوۡاؕ وَكُلًّا وَّعَدَ اللّٰهُ الۡحُسۡنٰيؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ خَبِيۡرٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And why do you not spend in the cause of Allah while to Allah belongs the heritage of the heavens and the earth? Not equal among you are those who spent before the conquest [of Makkah] and fought [and those who did so after it]. Those are greater in degree than they who spent afterwards and fought. But to all Allah has promised the best [reward]. And Allah, with what you do, is Acquainted

quran.arabic: مَنۡ ذَا الَّذِيۡ يُقۡرِضُ اللّٰهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنًا فَيُضٰعِفَهٗ لَهٗ وَلَهٗ٘ اَجۡرٌ كَرِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Who is it that would loan Allah a goodly loan so He will multiply it for him and he will have a noble reward

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَرَي الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ يَسۡعٰي نُوۡرُهُمۡ بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَبِاَيۡمَانِهِمۡ بُشۡرٰىكُمُ الۡيَوۡمَ جَنّٰتٌ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡعَظِيۡمُۚ‏
quran.english: On the Day you see the believing men and believing women, their light proceeding before them and on their right, [it will be said], "Your good tidings today are [of] gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein you will abide eternally." That is what is the great attainment

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَقُوۡلُ الۡمُنٰفِقُوۡنَ وَالۡمُنٰفِقٰتُ لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا انۡظُرُوۡنَا نَقۡتَبِسۡ مِنۡ نُّوۡرِكُمۡۚ قِيۡلَ ارۡجِعُوۡا وَرَآءَكُمۡ فَالۡتَمِسُوۡا نُوۡرًاؕ فَضُرِبَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ بِسُوۡرٍ لَّهٗ بَابٌؕ بَاطِنُهٗ فِيۡهِ الرَّحۡمَةُ وَظَاهِرُهٗ مِنۡ قِبَلِهِ الۡعَذَابُؕ‏
quran.english: On the [same] Day the hypocrite men and hypocrite women will say to those who believed, "Wait for us that we may acquire some of your light." It will be said, "Go back behind you and seek light." And a wall will be placed between them with a door, its interior containing mercy, but on the outside of it is torment

quran.arabic: يُنَادُوۡنَهُمۡ اَلَمۡ نَكُنۡ مَّعَكُمۡؕ قَالُوۡا بَلٰي وَلٰكِنَّكُمۡ فَتَنۡتُمۡ اَنۡفُسَكُمۡ وَتَرَبَّصۡتُمۡ وَارۡتَبۡتُمۡ وَغَرَّتۡكُمُ الۡاَمَانِيُّ حَتّٰي جَآءَ اَمۡرُ اللّٰهِ وَغَرَّكُمۡ بِاللّٰهِ الۡغَرُوۡرُ
quran.english: The hypocrites will call to the believers, "Were we not with you?" They will say, "Yes, but you afflicted yourselves and awaited [misfortune for us] and doubted, and wishful thinking deluded you until there came the command of Allah. And the Deceiver deceived you concerning Allah

quran.arabic: فَالۡيَوۡمَ لَا يُؤۡخَذُ مِنۡكُمۡ فِدۡيَةٌ وَّلَا مِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡاؕ مَاۡوٰىكُمُ النَّارُؕ هِيَ مَوۡلٰىكُمۡؕ وَبِئۡسَ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: So today no ransom will be taken from you or from those who disbelieved. Your refuge is the Fire. It is most worthy of you, and wretched is the destination

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَاۡنِ لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ اللّٰهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ الۡحَقِّۙ وَلَا يَكُوۡنُوۡا كَالَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡكِتٰبَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡاَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوۡبُهُمۡؕ وَكَثِيۡرٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ فٰسِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Has the time not come for those who have believed that their hearts should become humbly submissive at the remembrance of Allah and what has come down of the truth? And let them not be like those who were given the Scripture before, and a long period passed over them, so their hearts hardened; and many of them are defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: اِعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يُحۡيِ الۡاَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاؕ قَدۡ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ الۡاٰيٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Know that Allah gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. We have made clear to you the signs; perhaps you will understand

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُصَّدِّقِيۡنَ وَالۡمُصَّدِّقٰتِ وَاَقۡرَضُوا اللّٰهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنًا يُّضٰعَفُ لَهُمۡ وَلَهُمۡ اَجۡرٌ كَرِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Indeed, the men who practice charity and the women who practice charity and [they who] have loaned Allah a goodly loan - it will be multiplied for them, and they will have a noble reward

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَرُسُلِهٖ٘ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الصِّدِّيۡقُوۡنَࣗۖ وَالشُّهَدَآءُ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡؕ لَهُمۡ اَجۡرُهُمۡ وَنُوۡرُهُمۡؕ وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَكَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اُولٰٓئِكَ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡجَحِيۡمِࣖ‏
quran.english: And those who have believed in Allah and His messengers - those are [in the ranks of] the supporters of truth and the martyrs, with their Lord. For them is their reward and their light. But those who have disbelieved and denied Our verses - those are the companions of Hellfire

quran.arabic: اِعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّمَا الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَا لَعِبٌ وَّلَهۡوٌ وَّزِيۡنَةٌ وَّتَفَاخُرٌۭ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَتَكَاثُرٌ فِي الۡاَمۡوَالِ وَالۡاَوۡلَادِؕ كَمَثَلِ غَيۡثٍ اَعۡجَبَ الۡكُفَّارَ نَبَاتُهٗ ثُمَّ يَهِيۡجُ فَتَرٰىهُ مُصۡفَرًّا ثُمَّ يَكُوۡنُ حُطَامًاؕ وَفِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ عَذَابٌ شَدِيۡدٌۙ وَّمَغۡفِرَةٌ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ وَرِضۡوَانٌؕ وَمَا الۡحَيٰوةُ الدُّنۡيَا٘ اِلَّا مَتَاعُ الۡغُرُوۡرِ
quran.english: Know that the life of this world is but amusement and diversion and adornment and boasting to one another and competition in increase of wealth and children - like the example of a rain whose [resulting] plant growth pleases the tillers; then it dries and you see it turned yellow; then it becomes [scattered] debris. And in the Hereafter is severe punishment and forgiveness from Allah and approval. And what is the worldly life except the enjoyment of delusion

quran.arabic: سَابِقُوۡ٘ا اِلٰي مَغۡفِرَةٍ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكُمۡ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرۡضُهَا كَعَرۡضِ السَّمَآءِ وَالۡاَرۡضِۙ اُعِدَّتۡ لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَرُسُلِهٖؕ ذٰلِكَ فَضۡلُ اللّٰهِ يُؤۡتِيۡهِ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَاللّٰهُ ذُو الۡفَضۡلِ الۡعَظِيۡمِ
quran.english: Race toward forgiveness from your Lord and a Garden whose width is like the width of the heavens and earth, prepared for those who believed in Allah and His messengers. That is the bounty of Allah which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَصَابَ مِنۡ مُّصِيۡبَةٍ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَا فِيۡ٘ اَنۡفُسِكُمۡ اِلَّا فِيۡ كِتٰبٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ نَّبۡرَاَهَاؕ اِنَّ ذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ يَسِيۡرٌۙ‏
quran.english: No disaster strikes upon the earth or among yourselves except that it is in a register before We bring it into being - indeed that, for Allah, is easy

quran.arabic: لِّكَيۡلَا تَاۡسَوۡا عَلٰي مَا فَاتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَفۡرَحُوۡا بِمَا٘ اٰتٰىكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخۡتَالٍ فَخُوۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: In order that you not despair over what has eluded you and not exult [in pride] over what He has given you. And Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡنَ يَبۡخَلُوۡنَ وَيَاۡمُرُوۡنَ النَّاسَ بِالۡبُخۡلِؕ وَمَنۡ يَّتَوَلَّ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡغَنِيُّ الۡحَمِيۡدُ
quran.english: [Those] who are stingy and enjoin upon people stinginess. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلَنَا بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ وَاَنۡزَلۡنَا مَعَهُمُ الۡكِتٰبَ وَالۡمِيۡزَانَ لِيَقُوۡمَ النَّاسُ بِالۡقِسۡطِۚ وَاَنۡزَلۡنَا الۡحَدِيۡدَ فِيۡهِ بَاۡسٌ شَدِيۡدٌ وَّمَنَافِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعۡلَمَ اللّٰهُ مَنۡ يَّنۡصُرُهٗ وَرُسُلَهٗ بِالۡغَيۡبِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ قَوِيٌّ عَزِيۡزٌࣖ‏
quran.english: We have already sent Our messengers with clear evidences and sent down with them the Scripture and the balance that the people may maintain [their affairs] in justice. And We sent down iron, wherein is great military might and benefits for the people, and so that Allah may make evident those who support Him and His messengers unseen. Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ اَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوۡحًا وَّاِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيۡ ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا النُّبُوَّةَ وَالۡكِتٰبَ فَمِنۡهُمۡ مُّهۡتَدٍۚ وَكَثِيۡرٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ فٰسِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We have already sent Noah and Abraham and placed in their descendants prophethood and scripture; and among them is he who is guided, but many of them are defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ قَفَّيۡنَا عَلٰ٘ي اٰثَارِهِمۡ بِرُسُلِنَا وَقَفَّيۡنَا بِعِيۡسَي ابۡنِ مَرۡيَمَ وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُ الۡاِنۡجِيۡلَ ࣢ۙ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِ الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّبَعُوۡهُ رَاۡفَةً وَّرَحۡمَةًؕ وَرَهۡبَانِيَّةَ اِۨبۡتَدَعُوۡهَا مَا كَتَبۡنٰهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ اِلَّا ابۡتِغَآءَ رِضۡوَانِ اللّٰهِ فَمَا رَعَوۡهَا حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهَاۚ فَاٰتَيۡنَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مِنۡهُمۡ اَجۡرَهُمۡۚ وَكَثِيۡرٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ فٰسِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then We sent following their footsteps Our messengers and followed [them] with Jesus, the son of Mary, and gave him the Gospel. And We placed in the hearts of those who followed him compassion and mercy and monasticism, which they innovated; We did not prescribe it for them except [that they did so] seeking the approval of Allah. But they did not observe it with due observance. So We gave the ones who believed among them their reward, but many of them are defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَاٰمِنُوۡا بِرَسُوۡلِهٖ يُؤۡتِكُمۡ كِفۡلَيۡنِ مِنۡ رَّحۡمَتِهٖ وَيَجۡعَلۡ لَّكُمۡ نُوۡرًا تَمۡشُوۡنَ بِهٖ وَيَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, fear Allah and believe in His Messenger; He will [then] give you a double portion of His mercy and make for you a light by which you will walk and forgive you; and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: لِّئَلَّا يَعۡلَمَ اَهۡلُ الۡكِتٰبِ اَلَّا يَقۡدِرُوۡنَ عَلٰي شَيۡءٍ مِّنۡ فَضۡلِ اللّٰهِ وَاَنَّ الۡفَضۡلَ بِيَدِ اللّٰهِ يُؤۡتِيۡهِ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَاللّٰهُ ذُو الۡفَضۡلِ الۡعَظِيۡمِࣖ‏
quran.english: [This is] so that the People of the Scripture may know that they are not able [to obtain] anything from the bounty of Allah and that [all] bounty is in the hand of Allah; He gives it to whom He wills. And Allah is the possessor of great bounty

quran.arabic: قَدۡ سَمِعَ اللّٰهُ قَوۡلَ الَّتِيۡ تُجَادِلُكَ فِيۡ زَوۡجِهَا وَ تَشۡتَكِيۡ٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِࣗۖ وَاللّٰهُ يَسۡمَعُ تَحَاوُرَكُمَاؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ سَمِيۡعٌۭ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Certainly has Allah heard the speech of the one who argues with you, [O Muhammad], concerning her husband and directs her complaint to Allah. And Allah hears your dialogue; indeed, Allah is Hearing and Seeing

quran.arabic: اَلَّذِيۡنَ يُظٰهِرُوۡنَ مِنۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ نِّسَآئِهِمۡ مَّا هُنَّ اُمَّهٰتِهِمۡؕ اِنۡ اُمَّهٰتُهُمۡ اِلَّا الّٰٓـِٔيۡ وَلَدۡنَهُمۡؕ وَاِنَّهُمۡ لَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مُنۡكَرًا مِّنَ الۡقَوۡلِ وَزُوۡرًاؕ وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَعَفُوٌّ غَفُوۡرٌ
quran.english: Those who pronounce thihar among you [to separate] from their wives - they are not [consequently] their mothers. Their mothers are none but those who gave birth to them. And indeed, they are saying an objectionable statement and a falsehood. But indeed, Allah is Pardoning and Forgiving

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يُظٰهِرُوۡنَ مِنۡ نِّسَآئِهِمۡ ثُمَّ يَعُوۡدُوۡنَ لِمَا قَالُوۡا فَتَحۡرِيۡرُ رَقَبَةٍ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّتَمَآسَّاؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ تُوۡعَظُوۡنَ بِهٖؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ خَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And those who pronounce thihar from their wives and then [wish to] go back on what they said - then [there must be] the freeing of a slave before they touch one another. That is what you are admonished thereby; and Allah is Acquainted with what you do

quran.arabic: فَمَنۡ لَّمۡ يَجِدۡ فَصِيَامُ شَهۡرَيۡنِ مُتَتَابِعَيۡنِ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّتَمَآسَّاؕ فَمَنۡ لَّمۡ يَسۡتَطِعۡ فَاِطۡعَامُ سِتِّيۡنَ مِسۡكِيۡنًاؕ ذٰلِكَ لِتُؤۡمِنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖؕ وَتِلۡكَ حُدُوۡدُ اللّٰهِؕ وَلِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: And he who does not find [a slave] - then a fast for two months consecutively before they touch one another; and he who is unable - then the feeding of sixty poor persons. That is for you to believe [completely] in Allah and His Messenger; and those are the limits [set by] Allah. And for the disbelievers is a painful punishment

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُحَآدُّوۡنَ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ كُبِتُوۡا كَمَا كُبِتَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ وَقَدۡ اَنۡزَلۡنَا٘ اٰيٰتٍۭ بَيِّنٰتٍؕ وَلِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ عَذَابٌ مُّهِيۡنٌۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who oppose Allah and His Messenger are abased as those before them were abased. And We have certainly sent down verses of clear evidence. And for the disbelievers is a humiliating punishment

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَبۡعَثُهُمُ اللّٰهُ جَمِيۡعًا فَيُنَبِّئُهُمۡ بِمَا عَمِلُوۡاؕ اَحۡصٰىهُ اللّٰهُ وَنَسُوۡهُؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ شَهِيۡدٌࣖ‏
quran.english: On the Day when Allah will resurrect them all and inform them of what they did. Allah had enumerated it, while they forgot it; and Allah is, over all things, Witness

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِؕ مَا يَكُوۡنُ مِنۡ نَّجۡوٰي ثَلٰثَةٍ اِلَّا هُوَ رَابِعُهُمۡ وَلَا خَمۡسَةٍ اِلَّا هُوَ سَادِسُهُمۡ وَلَا٘ اَدۡنٰي مِنۡ ذٰلِكَ وَلَا٘ اَكۡثَرَ اِلَّا هُوَ مَعَهُمۡ اَيۡنَ مَا كَانُوۡاۚ ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُهُمۡ بِمَا عَمِلُوۡا يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Have you not considered that Allah knows what is in the heavens and what is on the earth? There is in no private conversation three but that He is the fourth of them, nor are there five but that He is the sixth of them - and no less than that and no more except that He is with them [in knowledge] wherever they are. Then He will inform them of what they did, on the Day of Resurrection. Indeed Allah is, of all things, Knowing

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اِلَي الَّذِيۡنَ نُهُوۡا عَنِ النَّجۡوٰي ثُمَّ يَعُوۡدُوۡنَ لِمَا نُهُوۡا عَنۡهُ وَيَتَنٰجَوۡنَ بِالۡاِثۡمِ وَالۡعُدۡوَانِ وَمَعۡصِيَتِ الرَّسُوۡلِؗ وَاِذَا جَآءُوۡكَ حَيَّوۡكَ بِمَا لَمۡ يُحَيِّكَ بِهِ اللّٰهُۙ وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ لَوۡلَا يُعَذِّبُنَا اللّٰهُ بِمَا نَقُوۡلُؕ حَسۡبُهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُۚ يَصۡلَوۡنَهَاۚ فَبِئۡسَ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: Have you not considered those who were forbidden from private conversation, then they return to that which they were forbidden and converse among themselves about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger? And when they come to you, they greet you with that [word] by which Allah does not greet you and say among themselves, "Why does Allah not punish us for what we say?" Sufficient for them is Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the destination

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِذَا تَنَاجَيۡتُمۡ فَلَا تَتَنَاجَوۡا بِالۡاِثۡمِ وَالۡعُدۡوَانِ وَمَعۡصِيَتِ الرَّسُوۡلِ وَتَنَاجَوۡا بِالۡبِرِّ وَالتَّقۡوٰيؕ وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اِلَيۡهِ تُحۡشَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, when you converse privately, do not converse about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger but converse about righteousness and piety. And fear Allah, to whom you will be gathered

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا النَّجۡوٰي مِنَ الشَّيۡطٰنِ لِيَحۡزُنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَلَيۡسَ بِضَآرِّهِمۡ شَيۡـًٔا اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ وَعَلَي اللّٰهِ فَلۡيَتَوَكَّلِ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Private conversation is only from Satan that he may grieve those who have believed, but he will not harm them at all except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِذَا قِيۡلَ لَكُمۡ تَفَسَّحُوۡا فِي الۡمَجٰلِسِ فَافۡسَحُوۡا يَفۡسَحِ اللّٰهُ لَكُمۡۚ وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ انۡشُزُوۡا فَانۡشُزُوۡا يَرۡفَعِ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مِنۡكُمۡۙ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡعِلۡمَ دَرَجٰتٍؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ خَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, when you are told, "Space yourselves" in assemblies, then make space; Allah will make space for you. And when you are told, "Arise," then arise; Allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge, by degrees. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِذَا نَاجَيۡتُمُ الرَّسُوۡلَ فَقَدِّمُوۡا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ نَجۡوٰىكُمۡ صَدَقَةًؕ ذٰلِكَ خَيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡ وَاَطۡهَرُؕ فَاِنۡ لَّمۡ تَجِدُوۡا فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, when you [wish to] privately consult the Messenger, present before your consultation a charity. That is better for you and purer. But if you find not [the means] - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: ءَاَشۡفَقۡتُمۡ اَنۡ تُقَدِّمُوۡا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ نَجۡوٰىكُمۡ صَدَقٰتٍؕ فَاِذۡ لَمۡ تَفۡعَلُوۡا وَتَابَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَاَقِيۡمُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاٰتُوا الزَّكٰوةَ وَاَطِيۡعُوا اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗؕ وَاللّٰهُ خَبِيۡرٌۭ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Have you feared to present before your consultation charities? Then when you do not and Allah has forgiven you, then [at least] establish prayer and give zakah and obey Allah and His Messenger. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اِلَي الَّذِيۡنَ تَوَلَّوۡا قَوۡمًا غَضِبَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡؕ مَا هُمۡ مِّنۡكُمۡ وَلَا مِنۡهُمۡۙ وَيَحۡلِفُوۡنَ عَلَي الۡكَذِبِ وَهُمۡ يَعۡلَمُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Have you not considered those who make allies of a people with whom Allah has become angry? They are neither of you nor of them, and they swear to untruth while they know [they are lying]

quran.arabic: اَعَدَّ اللّٰهُ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا شَدِيۡدًاؕ اِنَّهُمۡ سَآءَ مَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment. Indeed, it was evil that they were doing

quran.arabic: اِتَّخَذُوۡ٘ا اَيۡمَانَهُمۡ جُنَّةً فَصَدُّوۡا عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ فَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ مُّهِيۡنٌ
quran.english: They took their [false] oaths as a cover, so they averted [people] from the way of Allah, and for them is a humiliating punishment

quran.arabic: لَنۡ تُغۡنِيَ عَنۡهُمۡ اَمۡوَالُهُمۡ وَلَا٘ اَوۡلَادُهُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ شَيۡـًٔاؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ اَصۡحٰبُ النَّارِؕ هُمۡ فِيۡهَا خٰلِدُوۡنَ
quran.english: Never will their wealth or their children avail them against Allah at all. Those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَبۡعَثُهُمُ اللّٰهُ جَمِيۡعًا فَيَحۡلِفُوۡنَ لَهٗ كَمَا يَحۡلِفُوۡنَ لَكُمۡ وَيَحۡسَبُوۡنَ اَنَّهُمۡ عَلٰي شَيۡءٍؕ اَلَا٘ اِنَّهُمۡ هُمُ الۡكٰذِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: On the Day Allah will resurrect them all, and they will swear to Him as they swear to you and think that they are [standing] on something. Unquestionably, it is they who are the liars

quran.arabic: اِسۡتَحۡوَذَ عَلَيۡهِمُ الشَّيۡطٰنُ فَاَنۡسٰىهُمۡ ذِكۡرَ اللّٰهِؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ حِزۡبُ الشَّيۡطٰنِؕ اَلَا٘ اِنَّ حِزۡبَ الشَّيۡطٰنِ هُمُ الۡخٰسِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of Allah. Those are the party of Satan. Unquestionably, the party of Satan - they will be the losers

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُحَآدُّوۡنَ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ٘ اُولٰٓئِكَ فِي الۡاَذَلِّيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, the ones who oppose Allah and His Messenger - those will be among the most humbled

quran.arabic: كَتَبَ اللّٰهُ لَاَغۡلِبَنَّ اَنَا وَرُسُلِيۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ قَوِيٌّ عَزِيۡزٌ
quran.english: Allah has written, "I will surely overcome, I and My messengers." Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might

quran.arabic: لَا تَجِدُ قَوۡمًا يُّؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِاللّٰهِ وَالۡيَوۡمِ الۡاٰخِرِ يُوَآدُّوۡنَ مَنۡ حَآدَّ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ وَلَوۡ كَانُوۡ٘ا اٰبَآءَهُمۡ اَوۡ اَبۡنَآءَهُمۡ اَوۡ اِخۡوَانَهُمۡ اَوۡ عَشِيۡرَتَهُمۡؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ كَتَبَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمُ الۡاِيۡمَانَ وَاَيَّدَهُمۡ بِرُوۡحٍ مِّنۡهُؕ وَيُدۡخِلُهُمۡ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ رَضِيَ اللّٰهُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَرَضُوۡا عَنۡهُؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ حِزۡبُ اللّٰهِؕ اَلَا٘ اِنَّ حِزۡبَ اللّٰهِ هُمُ الۡمُفۡلِحُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: You will not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day having affection for those who oppose Allah and His Messenger, even if they were their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred. Those - He has decreed within their hearts faith and supported them with spirit from Him. And We will admit them to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. Allah is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him - those are the party of Allah. Unquestionably, the party of Allah - they are the successful

quran.arabic: سَبَّحَ لِلّٰهِ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَخۡرَجَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ اَهۡلِ الۡكِتٰبِ مِنۡ دِيَارِهِمۡ لِاَوَّلِ الۡحَشۡرِؕؔ مَا ظَنَنۡتُمۡ اَنۡ يَّخۡرُجُوۡا وَظَنُّوۡ٘ا اَنَّهُمۡ مَّا نِعَتُهُمۡ حُصُوۡنُهُمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ فَاَتٰىهُمُ اللّٰهُ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ لَمۡ يَحۡتَسِبُوۡا وَقَذَفَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمُ الرُّعۡبَ يُخۡرِبُوۡنَ بُيُوۡتَهُمۡ بِاَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَاَيۡدِي الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَࣗ فَاعۡتَبِرُوۡا يٰ٘اُولِي الۡاَبۡصَارِ
quran.english: It is He who expelled the ones who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture from their homes at the first gathering. You did not think they would leave, and they thought that their fortresses would protect them from Allah; but [the decree of] Allah came upon them from where they had not expected, and He cast terror into their hearts [so] they destroyed their houses by their [own] hands and the hands of the believers. So take warning, O people of vision

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ كَتَبَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡجَلَآءَ لَعَذَّبَهُمۡ فِي الدُّنۡيَاؕ وَلَهُمۡ فِي الۡاٰخِرَةِ عَذَابُ النَّارِ
quran.english: And if not that Allah had decreed for them evacuation, He would have punished them in [this] world, and for them in the Hereafter is the punishment of the Fire

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمۡ شَآقُّوا اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗۚ وَمَنۡ يُّشَآقِّ اللّٰهَ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ شَدِيۡدُ الۡعِقَابِ
quran.english: That is because they opposed Allah and His Messenger. And whoever opposes Allah - then indeed, Allah is severe in penalty

quran.arabic: مَا قَطَعۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ لِّيۡنَةٍ اَوۡ تَرَكۡتُمُوۡهَا قَآئِمَةً عَلٰ٘ي اُصُوۡلِهَا فَبِاِذۡنِ اللّٰهِ وَلِيُخۡزِيَ الۡفٰسِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Whatever you have cut down of [their] palm trees or left standing on their trunks - it was by permission of Allah and so He would disgrace the defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَفَآءَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي رَسُوۡلِهٖ مِنۡهُمۡ فَمَا٘ اَوۡجَفۡتُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ خَيۡلٍ وَّلَا رِكَابٍ وَّلٰكِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُسَلِّطُ رُسُلَهٗ عَلٰي مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: And what Allah restored [of property] to His Messenger from them - you did not spur for it [in an expedition] any horses or camels, but Allah gives His messengers power over whom He wills, and Allah is over all things competent

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَفَآءَ اللّٰهُ عَلٰي رَسُوۡلِهٖ مِنۡ اَهۡلِ الۡقُرٰي فَلِلّٰهِ وَلِلرَّسُوۡلِ وَلِذِي الۡقُرۡبٰي وَالۡيَتٰمٰي وَالۡمَسٰكِيۡنِ وَابۡنِ السَّبِيۡلِۙ كَيۡ لَا يَكُوۡنَ دُوۡلَةًۭ بَيۡنَ الۡاَغۡنِيَآءِ مِنۡكُمۡؕ وَمَا٘ اٰتٰىكُمُ الرَّسُوۡلُ فَخُذُوۡهُۚ وَمَا نَهٰىكُمۡ عَنۡهُ فَانۡتَهُوۡاۚ وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ شَدِيۡدُ الۡعِقَابِۘ‏
quran.english: And what Allah restored to His Messenger from the people of the towns - it is for Allah and for the Messenger and for [his] near relatives and orphans and the [stranded] traveler - so that it will not be a perpetual distribution among the rich from among you. And whatever the Messenger has given you - take; and what he has forbidden you - refrain from. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is severe in penalty

quran.arabic: لِلۡفُقَرَآءِ الۡمُهٰجِرِيۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُخۡرِجُوۡا مِنۡ دِيَارِهِمۡ وَاَمۡوَالِهِمۡ يَبۡتَغُوۡنَ فَضۡلًا مِّنَ اللّٰهِ وَرِضۡوَانًا وَّيَنۡصُرُوۡنَ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الصّٰدِقُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: For the poor emigrants who were expelled from their homes and their properties, seeking bounty from Allah and [His] approval and supporting Allah and His Messenger, [there is also a share]. Those are the truthful

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ تَبَوَّءُو الدَّارَ وَالۡاِيۡمَانَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ يُحِبُّوۡنَ مَنۡ هَاجَرَ اِلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا يَجِدُوۡنَ فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِهِمۡ حَاجَةً مِّمَّا٘ اُوۡتُوۡا وَيُؤۡثِرُوۡنَ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡفُسِهِمۡ وَلَوۡ كَانَ بِهِمۡ خَصَاصَةٌؕࣞ وَمَنۡ يُّوۡقَ شُحَّ نَفۡسِهٖ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡمُفۡلِحُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And [also for] those who were settled in al-Madinah and [adopted] the faith before them. They love those who emigrated to them and find not any want in their breasts of what the emigrants were given but give [them] preference over themselves, even though they are in privation. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ جَآءُوۡ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِهِمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ رَبَّنَا اغۡفِرۡ لَنَا وَلِاِخۡوَانِنَا الَّذِيۡنَ سَبَقُوۡنَا بِالۡاِيۡمَانِ وَلَا تَجۡعَلۡ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِنَا غِلًّا لِّلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا رَبَّنَا٘ اِنَّكَ رَءُوۡفٌ رَّحِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: And [there is a share for] those who came after them, saying, "Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith and put not in our hearts [any] resentment toward those who have believed. Our Lord, indeed You are Kind and Merciful

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اِلَي الَّذِيۡنَ نَافَقُوۡا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ لِاِخۡوَانِهِمُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ اَهۡلِ الۡكِتٰبِ لَئِنۡ اُخۡرِجۡتُمۡ لَنَخۡرُجَنَّ مَعَكُمۡ وَلَا نُطِيۡعُ فِيۡكُمۡ اَحَدًا اَبَدًاۙ وَّاِنۡ قُوۡتِلۡتُمۡ لَنَنۡصُرَنَّكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَشۡهَدُ اِنَّهُمۡ لَكٰذِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Have you not considered those who practice hypocrisy, saying to their brothers who have disbelieved among the People of the Scripture, "If you are expelled, we will surely leave with you, and we will not obey, in regard to you, anyone - ever; and if you are fought, we will surely aid you." But Allah testifies that they are liars

quran.arabic: لَئِنۡ اُخۡرِجُوۡا لَا يَخۡرُجُوۡنَ مَعَهُمۡۚ وَلَئِنۡ قُوۡتِلُوۡا لَا يَنۡصُرُوۡنَهُمۡۚ وَلَئِنۡ نَّصَرُوۡهُمۡ لَيُوَلُّنَّ الۡاَدۡبَارَࣞ ثُمَّ لَا يُنۡصَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: If they are expelled, they will not leave with them, and if they are fought, they will not aid them. And [even] if they should aid them, they will surely turn their backs; then [thereafter] they will not be aided

quran.arabic: لَاَنۡتُمۡ اَشَدُّ رَهۡبَةً فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِهِمۡ مِّنَ اللّٰهِؕ ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمۡ قَوۡمٌ لَّا يَفۡقَهُوۡنَ
quran.english: You [believers] are more fearful within their breasts than Allah. That is because they are a people who do not understand

quran.arabic: لَا يُقَاتِلُوۡنَكُمۡ جَمِيۡعًا اِلَّا فِيۡ قُرًي مُّحَصَّنَةٍ اَوۡ مِنۡ وَّرَآءِ جُدُرٍؕ بَاۡسُهُمۡ بَيۡنَهُمۡ شَدِيۡدٌؕ تَحۡسَبُهُمۡ جَمِيۡعًا وَّقُلُوۡبُهُمۡ شَتّٰيؕ ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمۡ قَوۡمٌ لَّا يَعۡقِلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: They will not fight you all except within fortified cities or from behind walls. Their violence among themselves is severe. You think they are together, but their hearts are diverse. That is because they are a people who do not reason

quran.arabic: كَمَثَلِ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ قَرِيۡبًا ذَاقُوۡا وَبَالَ اَمۡرِهِمۡۚ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌۚ‏
quran.english: [Theirs is] like the example of those shortly before them: they tasted the bad consequence of their affair, and they will have a painful punishment

quran.arabic: كَمَثَلِ الشَّيۡطٰنِ اِذۡ قَالَ لِلۡاِنۡسَانِ اكۡفُرۡۚ فَلَمَّا كَفَرَ قَالَ اِنِّيۡ بَرِيۡٓءٌ مِّنۡكَ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَخَافُ اللّٰهَ رَبَّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: [The hypocrites are] like the example of Satan when he says to man, "Disbelieve." But when he disbelieves, he says, "Indeed, I am disassociated from you. Indeed, I fear Allah, Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: فَكَانَ عَاقِبَتَهُمَا٘ اَنَّهُمَا فِي النَّارِ خَالِدَيۡنِ فِيۡهَاؕ وَذٰلِكَ جَزٰٓؤُا الظّٰلِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: So the outcome for both of them is that they will be in the Fire, abiding eternally therein. And that is the recompense of the wrong-doers

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ وَلۡتَنۡظُرۡ نَفۡسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتۡ لِغَدٍۚ وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ خَبِيۡرٌۭ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, fear Allah. And let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow - and fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what you do

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَكُوۡنُوۡا كَالَّذِيۡنَ نَسُوا اللّٰهَ فَاَنۡسٰىهُمۡ اَنۡفُسَهُمۡؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡفٰسِقُوۡنَ
quran.english: And be not like those who forgot Allah, so He made them forget themselves. Those are the defiantly disobedient

quran.arabic: لَا يَسۡتَوِيۡ٘ اَصۡحٰبُ النَّارِ وَاَصۡحٰبُ الۡجَنَّةِؕ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡجَنَّةِ هُمُ الۡفَآئِزُوۡنَ
quran.english: Not equal are the companions of the Fire and the companions of Paradise. The companions of Paradise - they are the attainers [of success]

quran.arabic: لَوۡ اَنۡزَلۡنَا هٰذَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ عَلٰي جَبَلٍ لَّرَاَيۡتَهٗ خَاشِعًا مُّتَصَدِّعًا مِّنۡ خَشۡيَةِ اللّٰهِؕ وَتِلۡكَ الۡاَمۡثَالُ نَضۡرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَفَكَّرُوۡنَ
quran.english: If We had sent down this Qur'an upon a mountain, you would have seen it humbled and coming apart from fear of Allah. And these examples We present to the people that perhaps they will give thought

quran.arabic: هُوَ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَۚ عٰلِمُ الۡغَيۡبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِۚ هُوَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ الرَّحِيۡمُ
quran.english: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed. He is the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful

quran.arabic: هُوَ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَۚ اَلۡمَلِكُ الۡقُدُّوۡسُ السَّلٰمُ الۡمُؤۡمِنُ الۡمُهَيۡمِنُ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡجَبَّارُ الۡمُتَكَبِّرُؕ سُبۡحٰنَ اللّٰهِ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُوۡنَ
quran.english: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Perfection, the Bestower of Faith, the Overseer, the Exalted in Might, the Compeller, the Superior. Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him

quran.arabic: هُوَ اللّٰهُ الۡخَالِقُ الۡبَارِئُ الۡمُصَوِّرُ لَهُ الۡاَسۡمَآءُ الۡحُسۡنٰيؕ يُسَبِّحُ لَهٗ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: He is Allah, the Creator, the Inventor, the Fashioner; to Him belong the best names. Whatever is in the heavens and earth is exalting Him. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تَتَّخِذُوۡا عَدُوِّيۡ وَعَدُوَّكُمۡ اَوۡلِيَآءَ تُلۡقُوۡنَ اِلَيۡهِمۡ بِالۡمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدۡ كَفَرُوۡا بِمَا جَآءَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡحَقِّۚ يُخۡرِجُوۡنَ الرَّسُوۡلَ وَاِيَّاكُمۡ اَنۡ تُؤۡمِنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ رَبِّكُمۡؕ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ خَرَجۡتُمۡ جِهَادًا فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِيۡ وَابۡتِغَآءَ مَرۡضَاتِيۡ تُسِرُّوۡنَ اِلَيۡهِمۡ بِالۡمَوَدَّةِࣗۖ وَاَنَا اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا٘ اَخۡفَيۡتُمۡ وَمَا٘ اَعۡلَنۡتُمۡؕ وَمَنۡ يَّفۡعَلۡهُ مِنۡكُمۡ فَقَدۡ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ السَّبِيۡلِ
quran.english: O you who have believed, do not take My enemies and your enemies as allies, extending to them affection while they have disbelieved in what came to you of the truth, having driven out the Prophet and yourselves [only] because you believe in Allah, your Lord. If you have come out for jihad in My cause and seeking means to My approval, [take them not as friends]. You confide to them affection, but I am most knowing of what you have concealed and what you have declared. And whoever does it among you has certainly strayed from the soundness of the way

quran.arabic: اِنۡ يَّثۡقَفُوۡكُمۡ يَكُوۡنُوۡا لَكُمۡ اَعۡدَآءً وَّيَبۡسُطُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡكُمۡ اَيۡدِيَهُمۡ وَاَلۡسِنَتَهُمۡ بِالسُّوۡٓءِ وَوَدُّوۡا لَوۡ تَكۡفُرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: If they gain dominance over you, they would be to you as enemies and extend against you their hands and their tongues with evil, and they wish you would disbelieve

quran.arabic: لَنۡ تَنۡفَعَكُمۡ اَرۡحَامُكُمۡ وَلَا٘ اَوۡلَادُكُمۡۚۛ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِۚۛ يَفۡصِلُ بَيۡنَكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Never will your relatives or your children benefit you; the Day of Resurrection He will judge between you. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing

quran.arabic: قَدۡ كَانَتۡ لَكُمۡ اُسۡوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ فِيۡ٘ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَالَّذِيۡنَ مَعَهٗۚ اِذۡ قَالُوۡا لِقَوۡمِهِمۡ اِنَّا بُرَءٰٓؤُا مِنۡكُمۡ وَمِمَّا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِؗ كَفَرۡنَا بِكُمۡ وَبَدَا بَيۡنَنَا وَبَيۡنَكُمُ الۡعَدَاوَةُ وَالۡبَغۡضَآءُ اَبَدًا حَتّٰي تُؤۡمِنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَحۡدَهٗ٘ اِلَّا قَوۡلَ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ لِاَبِيۡهِ لَاَسۡتَغۡفِرَنَّ لَكَ وَمَا٘ اَمۡلِكُ لَكَ مِنَ اللّٰهِ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍؕ رَبَّنَا عَلَيۡكَ تَوَكَّلۡنَا وَاِلَيۡكَ اَنَبۡنَا وَاِلَيۡكَ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: There has already been for you an excellent pattern in Abraham and those with him, when they said to their people, "Indeed, we are disassociated from you and from whatever you worship other than Allah. We have denied you, and there has appeared between us and you animosity and hatred forever until you believe in Allah alone" except for the saying of Abraham to his father, "I will surely ask forgiveness for you, but I have not [power to do] for you anything against Allah. Our Lord, upon You we have relied, and to You we have returned, and to You is the destination

quran.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجۡعَلۡنَا فِتۡنَةً لِّلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَاغۡفِرۡ لَنَا رَبَّنَاۚ اِنَّكَ اَنۡتَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Our Lord, make us not [objects of] torment for the disbelievers and forgive us, our Lord. Indeed, it is You who is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ كَانَ لَكُمۡ فِيۡهِمۡ اُسۡوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِّمَنۡ كَانَ يَرۡجُوا اللّٰهَ وَالۡيَوۡمَ الۡاٰخِرَؕ وَمَنۡ يَّتَوَلَّ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ الۡغَنِيُّ الۡحَمِيۡدُࣖ‏
quran.english: There has certainly been for you in them an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in Allah and the Last Day. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: عَسَي اللّٰهُ اَنۡ يَّجۡعَلَ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَبَيۡنَ الَّذِيۡنَ عَادَيۡتُمۡ مِّنۡهُمۡ مَّوَدَّةًؕ وَاللّٰهُ قَدِيۡرٌؕ وَاللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Perhaps Allah will put, between you and those to whom you have been enemies among them, affection. And Allah is competent, and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: لَا يَنۡهٰىكُمُ اللّٰهُ عَنِ الَّذِيۡنَ لَمۡ يُقَاتِلُوۡكُمۡ فِي الدِّيۡنِ وَلَمۡ يُخۡرِجُوۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ دِيَارِكُمۡ اَنۡ تَبَرُّوۡهُمۡ وَتُقۡسِطُوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهِمۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُحِبُّ الۡمُقۡسِطِيۡنَ
