quran.english: Allah does not forbid you from those who do not fight you because of religion and do not expel you from your homes - from being righteous toward them and acting justly toward them. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا يَنۡهٰىكُمُ اللّٰهُ عَنِ الَّذِيۡنَ قَاتَلُوۡكُمۡ فِي الدِّيۡنِ وَاَخۡرَجُوۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ دِيَارِكُمۡ وَظَاهَرُوۡا عَلٰ٘ي اِخۡرَاجِكُمۡ اَنۡ تَوَلَّوۡهُمۡۚ وَمَنۡ يَّتَوَلَّهُمۡ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah only forbids you from those who fight you because of religion and expel you from your homes and aid in your expulsion - [forbids] that you make allies of them. And whoever makes allies of them, then it is those who are the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِذَا جَآءَكُمُ الۡمُؤۡمِنٰتُ مُهٰجِرٰتٍ فَامۡتَحِنُوۡهُنَّؕ اَللّٰهُ اَعۡلَمُ بِاِيۡمَانِهِنَّۚ فَاِنۡ عَلِمۡتُمُوۡهُنَّ مُؤۡمِنٰتٍ فَلَا تَرۡجِعُوۡهُنَّ اِلَي الۡكُفَّارِؕ لَا هُنَّ حِلٌّ لَّهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يَحِلُّوۡنَ لَهُنَّؕ وَاٰتُوۡهُمۡ مَّا٘ اَنۡفَقُوۡاؕ وَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ اَنۡ تَنۡكِحُوۡهُنَّ اِذَا٘ اٰتَيۡتُمُوۡهُنَّ اُجُوۡرَهُنَّؕ وَلَا تُمۡسِكُوۡا بِعِصَمِ الۡكَوَافِرِ وَسۡـَٔلُوۡا مَا٘ اَنۡفَقۡتُمۡ وَلۡيَسۡـَٔلُوۡا مَا٘ اَنۡفَقُوۡاؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ حُكۡمُ اللّٰهِؕ يَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌ حَكِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, when the believing women come to you as emigrants, examine them. Allah is most knowing as to their faith. And if you know them to be believers, then do not return them to the disbelievers; they are not lawful [wives] for them, nor are they lawful [husbands] for them. But give the disbelievers what they have spent. And there is no blame upon you if you marry them when you have given them their due compensation. And hold not to marriage bonds with disbelieving women, but ask for what you have spent and let them ask for what they have spent. That is the judgement of Allah; He judges between you. And Allah is Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ فَاتَكُمۡ شَيۡءٌ مِّنۡ اَزۡوَاجِكُمۡ اِلَي الۡكُفَّارِ فَعَاقَبۡتُمۡ فَاٰتُوا الَّذِيۡنَ ذَهَبَتۡ اَزۡوَاجُهُمۡ مِّثۡلَ مَا٘ اَنۡفَقُوۡاؕ وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ مُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: And if you have lost any of your wives to the disbelievers and you subsequently obtain [something], then give those whose wives have gone the equivalent of what they had spent. And fear Allah, in whom you are believers

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ اِذَا جَآءَكَ الۡمُؤۡمِنٰتُ يُبَايِعۡنَكَ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ لَّا يُشۡرِكۡنَ بِاللّٰهِ شَيۡـًٔا وَّلَا يَسۡرِقۡنَ وَلَا يَزۡنِيۡنَ وَلَا يَقۡتُلۡنَ اَوۡلَادَهُنَّ وَلَا يَاۡتِيۡنَ بِبُهۡتَانٍ يَّفۡتَرِيۡنَهٗ بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡهِنَّ وَاَرۡجُلِهِنَّ وَلَا يَعۡصِيۡنَكَ فِيۡ مَعۡرُوۡفٍ فَبَايِعۡهُنَّ وَاسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَهُنَّ اللّٰهَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O Prophet, when the believing women come to you pledging to you that they will not associate anything with Allah, nor will they steal, nor will they commit unlawful sexual intercourse, nor will they kill their children, nor will they bring forth a slander they have invented between their arms and legs, nor will they disobey you in what is right - then accept their pledge and ask forgiveness for them of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تَتَوَلَّوۡا قَوۡمًا غَضِبَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ قَدۡ يَئِسُوۡا مِنَ الۡاٰخِرَةِ كَمَا يَئِسَ الۡكُفَّارُ مِنۡ اَصۡحٰبِ الۡقُبُوۡرِࣖ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, do not make allies of a people with whom Allah has become angry. They have despaired of [reward in] the Hereafter just as the disbelievers have despaired of [meeting] the inhabitants of the graves

quran.arabic: سَبَّحَ لِلّٰهِ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لِمَ تَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَا لَا تَفۡعَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do

quran.arabic: كَبُرَ مَقۡتًا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ اَنۡ تَقُوۡلُوۡا مَا لَا تَفۡعَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: Great is hatred in the sight of Allah that you say what you do not do

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اللّٰهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذِيۡنَ يُقَاتِلُوۡنَ فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِهٖ صَفًّا كَاَنَّهُمۡ بُنۡيَانٌ مَّرۡصُوۡصٌ
quran.english: Indeed, Allah loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَ مُوۡسٰي لِقَوۡمِهٖ يٰقَوۡمِ لِمَ تُؤۡذُوۡنَنِيۡ وَقَدۡ تَّعۡلَمُوۡنَ اَنِّيۡ رَسُوۡلُ اللّٰهِ اِلَيۡكُمۡؕ فَلَمَّا زَاغُوۡ٘ا اَزَاغَ اللّٰهُ قُلُوۡبَهُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ لَا يَهۡدِي الۡقَوۡمَ الۡفٰسِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Moses said to his people, "O my people, why do you harm me while you certainly know that I am the messenger of Allah to you?" And when they deviated, Allah caused their hearts to deviate. And Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ قَالَ عِيۡسَي ابۡنُ مَرۡيَمَ يٰبَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ اِنِّيۡ رَسُوۡلُ اللّٰهِ اِلَيۡكُمۡ مُّصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيَّ مِنَ التَّوۡرٰىةِ وَمُبَشِّرًاۭ بِرَسُوۡلٍ يَّاۡتِيۡ مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِي اسۡمُهٗ٘ اَحۡمَدُؕ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ قَالُوۡا هٰذَا سِحۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And [mention] when Jesus, the son of Mary, said, "O children of Israel, indeed I am the messenger of Allah to you confirming what came before me of the Torah and bringing good tidings of a messenger to come after me, whose name is Ahmad." But when he came to them with clear evidences, they said, "This is obvious magic

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ اَظۡلَمُ مِمَّنِ افۡتَرٰي عَلَي اللّٰهِ الۡكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدۡعٰ٘ي اِلَي الۡاِسۡلَامِؕ وَاللّٰهُ لَا يَهۡدِي الۡقَوۡمَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah untruth while he is being invited to Islam. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: يُرِيۡدُوۡنَ لِيُطۡفِـُٔوۡا نُوۡرَ اللّٰهِ بِاَفۡوَاهِهِمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ مُتِمُّ نُوۡرِهٖ وَلَوۡ كَرِهَ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: They want to extinguish the light of Allah with their mouths, but Allah will perfect His light, although the disbelievers dislike it

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَرۡسَلَ رَسُوۡلَهٗ بِالۡهُدٰي وَدِيۡنِ الۡحَقِّ لِيُظۡهِرَهٗ عَلَي الدِّيۡنِ كُلِّهٖۙ وَلَوۡ كَرِهَ الۡمُشۡرِكُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion, although those who associate others with Allah dislike it

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا هَلۡ اَدُلُّكُمۡ عَلٰي تِجَارَةٍ تُنۡجِيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ عَذَابٍ اَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: O you who have believed, shall I guide you to a transaction that will save you from a painful punishment

quran.arabic: تُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ وَتُجَاهِدُوۡنَ فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِ بِاَمۡوَالِكُمۡ وَاَنۡفُسِكُمۡؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ خَيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [It is that] you believe in Allah and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allah with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you should know

quran.arabic: يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡ ذُنُوۡبَكُمۡ وَيُدۡخِلۡكُمۡ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ وَمَسٰكِنَ طَيِّبَةً فِيۡ جَنّٰتِ عَدۡنٍؕ ذٰلِكَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡعَظِيۡمُۙ‏
quran.english: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment

quran.arabic: وَاُخۡرٰي تُحِبُّوۡنَهَاؕ نَصۡرٌ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ وَفَتۡحٌ قَرِيۡبٌؕ وَبَشِّرِ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: And [you will obtain] another [favor] that you love - victory from Allah and an imminent conquest; and give good tidings to the believers

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا كُوۡنُوۡ٘ا اَنۡصَارَ اللّٰهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيۡسَي ابۡنُ مَرۡيَمَ لِلۡحَوَارِيّٖنَ مَنۡ اَنۡصَارِيۡ٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِؕ قَالَ الۡحَوَارِيُّوۡنَ نَحۡنُ اَنۡصَارُ اللّٰهِ فَاٰمَنَتۡ طَّآئِفَةٌ مِّنۭۡ بَنِيۡ٘ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ وَكَفَرَتۡ طَّآئِفَةٌۚ فَاَيَّدۡنَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا عَلٰي عَدُوِّهِمۡ فَاَصۡبَحُوۡا ظٰهِرِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: O you who have believed, be supporters of Allah, as when Jesus, the son of Mary, said to the disciples, "Who are my supporters for Allah?" The disciples said, "We are supporters of Allah." And a faction of the Children of Israel believed and a faction disbelieved. So We supported those who believed against their enemy, and they became dominant

quran.arabic: يُسَبِّحُ لِلّٰهِ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ الۡمَلِكِ الۡقُدُّوۡسِ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡحَكِيۡمِ
quran.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ بَعَثَ فِي الۡاُمِّيّٖنَ رَسُوۡلًا مِّنۡهُمۡ يَتۡلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتِهٖ وَيُزَكِّيۡهِمۡ وَيُعَلِّمُهُمُ الۡكِتٰبَ وَالۡحِكۡمَةَࣗ وَاِنۡ كَانُوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلُ لَفِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: It is He who has sent among the unlettered a Messenger from themselves reciting to them His verses and purifying them and teaching them the Book and wisdom - although they were before in clear error

quran.arabic: وَّاٰخَرِيۡنَ مِنۡهُمۡ لَمَّا يَلۡحَقُوۡا بِهِمۡؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: And [to] others of them who have not yet joined them. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ فَضۡلُ اللّٰهِ يُؤۡتِيۡهِ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَاللّٰهُ ذُو الۡفَضۡلِ الۡعَظِيۡمِ
quran.english: That is the bounty of Allah, which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty

quran.arabic: مَثَلُ الَّذِيۡنَ حُمِّلُوا التَّوۡرٰىةَ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَحۡمِلُوۡهَا كَمَثَلِ الۡحِمَارِ يَحۡمِلُ اَسۡفَارًاؕ بِئۡسَ مَثَلُ الۡقَوۡمِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِؕ وَاللّٰهُ لَا يَهۡدِي الۡقَوۡمَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: The example of those who were entrusted with the Torah and then did not take it on is like that of a donkey who carries volumes [of books]. Wretched is the example of the people who deny the signs of Allah. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ هَادُوۡ٘ا اِنۡ زَعَمۡتُمۡ اَنَّكُمۡ اَوۡلِيَآءُ لِلّٰهِ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ النَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا الۡمَوۡتَ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "O you who are Jews, if you claim that you are allies of Allah, excluding the [other] people, then wish for death, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَتَمَنَّوۡنَهٗ٘ اَبَدًاۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَتۡ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِالظّٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: But they will not wish for it, ever, because of what their hands have put forth. And Allah is Knowing of the wrongdoers

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّ الۡمَوۡتَ الَّذِيۡ تَفِرُّوۡنَ مِنۡهُ فَاِنَّهٗ مُلٰقِيۡكُمۡ ثُمَّ تُرَدُّوۡنَ اِلٰي عٰلِمِ الۡغَيۡبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُمۡ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "Indeed, the death from which you flee - indeed, it will meet you. Then you will be returned to the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He will inform you about what you used to do

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِذَا نُوۡدِيَ لِلصَّلٰوةِ مِنۡ يَّوۡمِ الۡجُمُعَةِ فَاسۡعَوۡا اِلٰي ذِكۡرِ اللّٰهِ وَذَرُوا الۡبَيۡعَؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ خَيۡرٌ لَّكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, when [the adhan] is called for the prayer on the day of Jumu'ah [Friday], then proceed to the remembrance of Allah and leave trade. That is better for you, if you only knew

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا قُضِيَتِ الصَّلٰوةُ فَانۡتَشِرُوۡا فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَابۡتَغُوۡا مِنۡ فَضۡلِ اللّٰهِ وَاذۡكُرُوا اللّٰهَ كَثِيۡرًا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تُفۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when the prayer has been concluded, disperse within the land and seek from the bounty of Allah, and remember Allah often that you may succeed

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاَوۡا تِجَارَةً اَوۡ لَهۡوَا اِۨنۡفَضُّوۡ٘ا اِلَيۡهَا وَتَرَكُوۡكَ قَآئِمًاؕ قُلۡ مَا عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ خَيۡرٌ مِّنَ اللَّهۡوِ وَمِنَ التِّجَارَةِؕ وَاللّٰهُ خَيۡرُ الرّٰزِقِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: But when they saw a transaction or a diversion, [O Muhammad], they rushed to it and left you standing. Say, "What is with Allah is better than diversion and than a transaction, and Allah is the best of providers

quran.arabic: اِذَا جَآءَكَ الۡمُنٰفِقُوۡنَ قَالُوۡا نَشۡهَدُ اِنَّكَ لَرَسُوۡلُ اللّٰهِۘ وَاللّٰهُ يَعۡلَمُ اِنَّكَ لَرَسُوۡلُهٗؕ وَاللّٰهُ يَشۡهَدُ اِنَّ الۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ لَكٰذِبُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: When the hypocrites come to you, [O Muhammad], they say, "We testify that you are the Messenger of Allah." And Allah knows that you are His Messenger, and Allah testifies that the hypocrites are liars

quran.arabic: اِتَّخَذُوۡ٘ا اَيۡمَانَهُمۡ جُنَّةً فَصَدُّوۡا عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِؕ اِنَّهُمۡ سَآءَ مَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: They have taken their oaths as a cover, so they averted [people] from the way of Allah. Indeed, it was evil that they were doing

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهُمۡ اٰمَنُوۡا ثُمَّ كَفَرُوۡا فَطُبِعَ عَلٰي قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يَفۡقَهُوۡنَ
quran.english: That is because they believed, and then they disbelieved; so their hearts were sealed over, and they do not understand

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاَيۡتَهُمۡ تُعۡجِبُكَ اَجۡسَامُهُمۡؕ وَاِنۡ يَّقُوۡلُوۡا تَسۡمَعۡ لِقَوۡلِهِمۡؕ كَاَنَّهُمۡ خُشُبٌ مُّسَنَّدَةٌؕ يَحۡسَبُوۡنَ كُلَّ صَيۡحَةٍ عَلَيۡهِمۡؕ هُمُ الۡعَدُوُّ فَاحۡذَرۡهُمۡؕ قَاتَلَهُمُ اللّٰهُؗ اَنّٰي يُؤۡفَكُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when you see them, their forms please you, and if they speak, you listen to their speech. [They are] as if they were pieces of wood propped up - they think that every shout is against them. They are the enemy, so beware of them. May Allah destroy them; how are they deluded

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ تَعَالَوۡا يَسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡ رَسُوۡلُ اللّٰهِ لَوَّوۡا رُءُوۡسَهُمۡ وَرَاَيۡتَهُمۡ يَصُدُّوۡنَ وَهُمۡ مُّسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when it is said to them, "Come, the Messenger of Allah will ask forgiveness for you," they turn their heads aside and you see them evading while they are arrogant

quran.arabic: سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡهِمۡ اَسۡتَغۡفَرۡتَ لَهُمۡ اَمۡ لَمۡ تَسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَهُمۡؕ لَنۡ يَّغۡفِرَ اللّٰهُ لَهُمۡؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ لَا يَهۡدِي الۡقَوۡمَ الۡفٰسِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: It is all the same for them whether you ask forgiveness for them or do not ask forgiveness for them; never will Allah forgive them. Indeed, Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people

quran.arabic: هُمُ الَّذِيۡنَ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ لَا تُنۡفِقُوۡا عَلٰي مَنۡ عِنۡدَ رَسُوۡلِ اللّٰهِ حَتّٰي يَنۡفَضُّوۡاؕ وَلِلّٰهِ خَزَآئِنُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَلٰكِنَّ الۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ لَا يَفۡقَهُوۡنَ
quran.english: They are the ones who say, "Do not spend on those who are with the Messenger of Allah until they disband." And to Allah belongs the depositories of the heavens and the earth, but the hypocrites do not understand

quran.arabic: يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ لَئِنۡ رَّجَعۡنَا٘ اِلَي الۡمَدِيۡنَةِ لَيُخۡرِجَنَّ الۡاَعَزُّ مِنۡهَا الۡاَذَلَّؕ وَلِلّٰهِ الۡعِزَّةُ وَلِرَسُوۡلِهٖ وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَلٰكِنَّ الۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: They say, "If we return to al-Madinah, the more honored [for power] will surely expel therefrom the more humble." And to Allah belongs [all] honor, and to His Messenger, and to the believers, but the hypocrites do not know

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا لَا تُلۡهِكُمۡ اَمۡوَالُكُمۡ وَلَا٘ اَوۡلَادُكُمۡ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِ اللّٰهِۚ وَمَنۡ يَّفۡعَلۡ ذٰلِكَ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡخٰسِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, let not your wealth and your children divert you from remembrance of Allah. And whoever does that - then those are the losers

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡفِقُوۡا مِنۡ مَّا رَزَقۡنٰكُمۡ مِّنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَ اَحَدَكُمُ الۡمَوۡتُ فَيَقُوۡلَ رَبِّ لَوۡلَا٘ اَخَّرۡتَنِيۡ٘ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ قَرِيۡبٍۙ فَاَصَّدَّقَ وَاَكُنۡ مِّنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And spend [in the way of Allah] from what We have provided you before death approaches one of you and he says, "My Lord, if only You would delay me for a brief term so I would give charity and be among the righteous

quran.arabic: وَلَنۡ يُّؤَخِّرَ اللّٰهُ نَفۡسًا اِذَا جَآءَ اَجَلُهَاؕ وَاللّٰهُ خَبِيۡرٌۭ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: But never will Allah delay a soul when its time has come. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do

quran.arabic: يُسَبِّحُ لِلّٰهِ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِي الۡاَرۡضِۚ لَهُ الۡمُلۡكُ وَلَهُ الۡحَمۡدُؗ وَهُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs [all] praise, and He is over all things competent

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ فَمِنۡكُمۡ كَافِرٌ وَّمِنۡكُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنٌؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: It is He who created you, and among you is the disbeliever, and among you is the believer. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ بِالۡحَقِّ وَصَوَّرَكُمۡ فَاَحۡسَنَ صُوَرَكُمۡۚ وَاِلَيۡهِ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: He created the heavens and earth in truth and formed you and perfected your forms; and to Him is the [final] destination

quran.arabic: يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّوۡنَ وَمَا تُعۡلِنُوۡنَؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُوۡرِ
quran.english: He knows what is within the heavens and earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare. And Allah is Knowing of that within the breasts

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَاۡتِكُمۡ نَبَؤُا الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ قَبۡلُؗ فَذَاقُوۡا وَبَالَ اَمۡرِهِمۡ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Has there not come to you the news of those who disbelieved before? So they tasted the bad consequence of their affair, and they will have a painful punishment

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ بِاَنَّهٗ كَانَتۡ تَّاۡتِيۡهِمۡ رُسُلُهُمۡ بِالۡبَيِّنٰتِ فَقَالُوۡ٘ا اَبَشَرٌ يَّهۡدُوۡنَنَاؗ فَكَفَرُوۡا وَتَوَلَّوۡا وَّاسۡتَغۡنَي اللّٰهُؕ وَاللّٰهُ غَنِيٌّ حَمِيۡدٌ
quran.english: That is because their messengers used to come to them with clear evidences, but they said, "Shall human beings guide us?" and disbelieved and turned away. And Allah dispensed [with them]; and Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: زَعَمَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡ٘ا اَنۡ لَّنۡ يُّبۡعَثُوۡاؕ قُلۡ بَلٰي وَرَبِّيۡ لَتُبۡعَثُنَّ ثُمَّ لَتُنَبَّؤُنَّ بِمَا عَمِلۡتُمۡؕ وَذٰلِكَ عَلَي اللّٰهِ يَسِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Those who disbelieve have claimed that they will never be resurrected. Say, "Yes, by my Lord, you will surely be resurrected; then you will surely be informed of what you did. And that, for Allah, is easy

quran.arabic: فَاٰمِنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ وَرَسُوۡلِهٖ وَالنُّوۡرِ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡزَلۡنَاؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ خَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: So believe in Allah and His Messenger and the Qur'an which We have sent down. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَجۡمَعُكُمۡ لِيَوۡمِ الۡجَمۡعِ ذٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ التَّغَابُنِؕ وَمَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنۭۡ بِاللّٰهِ وَيَعۡمَلۡ صَالِحًا يُّكَفِّرۡ عَنۡهُ سَيِّاٰتِهٖ وَيُدۡخِلۡهُ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا٘ اَبَدًاؕ ذٰلِكَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡعَظِيۡمُ
quran.english: The Day He will assemble you for the Day of Assembly - that is the Day of Deprivation. And whoever believes in Allah and does righteousness - He will remove from him his misdeeds and admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever. That is the great attainment

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَكَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا٘ اُولٰٓئِكَ اَصۡحٰبُ النَّارِ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ وَبِئۡسَ الۡمَصِيۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: But the ones who disbelieved and denied Our verses - those are the companions of the Fire, abiding eternally therein; and wretched is the destination

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَصَابَ مِنۡ مُّصِيۡبَةٍ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ وَمَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنۭۡ بِاللّٰهِ يَهۡدِ قَلۡبَهٗؕ وَاللّٰهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: No disaster strikes except by permission of Allah. And whoever believes in Allah - He will guide his heart. And Allah is Knowing of all things

quran.arabic: وَاَطِيۡعُوا اللّٰهَ وَاَطِيۡعُوا الرَّسُوۡلَۚ فَاِنۡ تَوَلَّيۡتُمۡ فَاِنَّمَا عَلٰي رَسُوۡلِنَا الۡبَلٰغُ الۡمُبِيۡنُ
quran.english: And obey Allah and obey the Messenger; but if you turn away - then upon Our Messenger is only [the duty of] clear notification

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَؕ وَعَلَي اللّٰهِ فَلۡيَتَوَكَّلِ الۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah - there is no deity except Him. And upon Allah let the believers rely

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِنَّ مِنۡ اَزۡوَاجِكُمۡ وَاَوۡلَادِكُمۡ عَدُوًّا لَّكُمۡ فَاحۡذَرُوۡهُمۡۚ وَاِنۡ تَعۡفُوۡا وَتَصۡفَحُوۡا وَتَغۡفِرُوۡا فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, indeed, among your wives and your children are enemies to you, so beware of them. But if you pardon and overlook and forgive - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا٘ اَمۡوَالُكُمۡ وَاَوۡلَادُكُمۡ فِتۡنَةٌؕ وَاللّٰهُ عِنۡدَهٗ٘ اَجۡرٌ عَظِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Your wealth and your children are but a trial, and Allah has with Him a great reward

quran.arabic: فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ مَا اسۡتَطَعۡتُمۡ وَاسۡمَعُوۡا وَاَطِيۡعُوۡا وَاَنۡفِقُوۡا خَيۡرًا لِّاَنۡفُسِكُمۡؕ وَمَنۡ يُّوۡقَ شُحَّ نَفۡسِهٖ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡمُفۡلِحُوۡنَ
quran.english: So fear Allah as much as you are able and listen and obey and spend [in the way of Allah]; it is better for your selves. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful

quran.arabic: اِنۡ تُقۡرِضُوا اللّٰهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنًا يُّضٰعِفۡهُ لَكُمۡ وَيَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡؕ وَاللّٰهُ شَكُوۡرٌ حَلِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: If you loan Allah a goodly loan, He will multiply it for you and forgive you. And Allah is Most Appreciative and Forbearing

quran.arabic: عٰلِمُ الۡغَيۡبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡحَكِيۡمُࣖ‏
quran.english: Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ اِذَا طَلَّقۡتُمُ النِّسَآءَ فَطَلِّقُوۡهُنَّ لِعِدَّتِهِنَّ وَاَحۡصُوا الۡعِدَّةَۚ وَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ رَبَّكُمۡۚ لَا تُخۡرِجُوۡهُنَّ مِنۭۡ بُيُوۡتِهِنَّ وَلَا يَخۡرُجۡنَ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيۡنَ بِفَاحِشَةٍ مُّبَيِّنَةٍؕ وَتِلۡكَ حُدُوۡدُ اللّٰهِؕ وَمَنۡ يَّتَعَدَّ حُدُوۡدَ اللّٰهِ فَقَدۡ ظَلَمَ نَفۡسَهٗؕ لَا تَدۡرِيۡ لَعَلَّ اللّٰهَ يُحۡدِثُ بَعۡدَ ذٰلِكَ اَمۡرًا
quran.english: O Prophet, when you [Muslims] divorce women, divorce them for [the commencement of] their waiting period and keep count of the waiting period, and fear Allah, your Lord. Do not turn them out of their [husbands'] houses, nor should they [themselves] leave [during that period] unless they are committing a clear immorality. And those are the limits [set by] Allah. And whoever transgresses the limits of Allah has certainly wronged himself. You know not; perhaps Allah will bring about after that a [different] matter

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا بَلَغۡنَ اَجَلَهُنَّ فَاَمۡسِكُوۡهُنَّ بِمَعۡرُوۡفٍ اَوۡ فَارِقُوۡهُنَّ بِمَعۡرُوۡفٍ وَّاَشۡهِدُوۡا ذَوَيۡ عَدۡلٍ مِّنۡكُمۡ وَاَقِيۡمُوا الشَّهَادَةَ لِلّٰهِؕ ذٰلِكُمۡ يُوۡعَظُ بِهٖ مَنۡ كَانَ يُؤۡمِنُ بِاللّٰهِ وَالۡيَوۡمِ الۡاٰخِرِ ࣢ؕ وَمَنۡ يَّتَّقِ اللّٰهَ يَجۡعَلۡ لَّهٗ مَخۡرَجًاۙ‏
quran.english: And when they have [nearly] fulfilled their term, either retain them according to acceptable terms or part with them according to acceptable terms. And bring to witness two just men from among you and establish the testimony for [the acceptance of] Allah. That is instructed to whoever should believe in Allah and the Last day. And whoever fears Allah - He will make for him a way out

quran.arabic: وَّيَرۡزُقۡهُ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَحۡتَسِبُؕ وَمَنۡ يَّتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَي اللّٰهِ فَهُوَ حَسۡبُهٗؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ بَالِغُ اَمۡرِهٖؕ قَدۡ جَعَلَ اللّٰهُ لِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدۡرًا
quran.english: And will provide for him from where he does not expect. And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him. Indeed, Allah will accomplish His purpose. Allah has already set for everything a [decreed] extent

quran.arabic: وَالّٰٓـِٔيۡ يَئِسۡنَ مِنَ الۡمَحِيۡضِ مِنۡ نِّسَآئِكُمۡ اِنِ ارۡتَبۡتُمۡ فَعِدَّتُهُنَّ ثَلٰثَةُ اَشۡهُرٍ وَّالّٰٓـِٔيۡ لَمۡ يَحِضۡنَؕ وَاُولَاتُ الۡاَحۡمَالِ اَجَلُهُنَّ اَنۡ يَّضَعۡنَ حَمۡلَهُنَّؕ وَمَنۡ يَّتَّقِ اللّٰهَ يَجۡعَلۡ لَّهٗ مِنۡ اَمۡرِهٖ يُسۡرًا
quran.english: And those who no longer expect menstruation among your women - if you doubt, then their period is three months, and [also for] those who have not menstruated. And for those who are pregnant, their term is until they give birth. And whoever fears Allah - He will make for him of his matter ease

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ اَمۡرُ اللّٰهِ اَنۡزَلَهٗ٘ اِلَيۡكُمۡؕ وَمَنۡ يَّتَّقِ اللّٰهَ يُكَفِّرۡ عَنۡهُ سَيِّاٰتِهٖ وَيُعۡظِمۡ لَهٗ٘ اَجۡرًا
quran.english: That is the command of Allah, which He has sent down to you; and whoever fears Allah - He will remove for him his misdeeds and make great for him his reward

quran.arabic: اَسۡكِنُوۡهُنَّ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ سَكَنۡتُمۡ مِّنۡ وُّجۡدِكُمۡ وَلَا تُضَآرُّوۡهُنَّ لِتُضَيِّقُوۡا عَلَيۡهِنَّؕ وَاِنۡ كُنَّ اُولَاتِ حَمۡلٍ فَاَنۡفِقُوۡا عَلَيۡهِنَّ حَتّٰي يَضَعۡنَ حَمۡلَهُنَّۚ فَاِنۡ اَرۡضَعۡنَ لَكُمۡ فَاٰتُوۡهُنَّ اُجُوۡرَهُنَّۚ وَاۡتَمِرُوۡا بَيۡنَكُمۡ بِمَعۡرُوۡفٍۚ وَاِنۡ تَعَاسَرۡتُمۡ فَسَتُرۡضِعُ لَهٗ٘ اُخۡرٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Lodge them [in a section] of where you dwell out of your means and do not harm them in order to oppress them. And if they should be pregnant, then spend on them until they give birth. And if they breastfeed for you, then give them their payment and confer among yourselves in the acceptable way; but if you are in discord, then there may breastfeed for the father another woman

quran.arabic: لِيُنۡفِقۡ ذُوۡ سَعَةٍ مِّنۡ سَعَتِهٖؕ وَمَنۡ قُدِرَ عَلَيۡهِ رِزۡقُهٗ فَلۡيُنۡفِقۡ مِمَّا٘ اٰتٰىهُ اللّٰهُؕ لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللّٰهُ نَفۡسًا اِلَّا مَا٘ اٰتٰىهَاؕ سَيَجۡعَلُ اللّٰهُ بَعۡدَ عُسۡرٍ يُّسۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Let a man of wealth spend from his wealth, and he whose provision is restricted - let him spend from what Allah has given him. Allah does not charge a soul except [according to] what He has given it. Allah will bring about, after hardship, ease

quran.arabic: وَكَاَيِّنۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ عَتَتۡ عَنۡ اَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا وَرُسُلِهٖ فَحَاسَبۡنٰهَا حِسَابًا شَدِيۡدًا وَّعَذَّبۡنٰهَا عَذَابًا نُّكۡرًا
quran.english: And how many a city was insolent toward the command of its Lord and His messengers, so We took it to severe account and punished it with a terrible punishment

quran.arabic: فَذَاقَتۡ وَبَالَ اَمۡرِهَا وَكَانَ عَاقِبَةُ اَمۡرِهَا خُسۡرًا
quran.english: And it tasted the bad consequence of its affair, and the outcome of its affair was loss

quran.arabic: اَعَدَّ اللّٰهُ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا شَدِيۡدًاۙ فَاتَّقُوا اللّٰهَ يٰ٘اُولِي الۡاَلۡبَابِ ࣢ۚۖۛ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡاۚۛ قَدۡ اَنۡزَلَ اللّٰهُ اِلَيۡكُمۡ ذِكۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment; so fear Allah, O you of understanding who have believed. Allah has sent down to you the Qur'an

quran.arabic: رَّسُوۡلًا يَّتۡلُوۡا عَلَيۡكُمۡ اٰيٰتِ اللّٰهِ مُبَيِّنٰتٍ لِّيُخۡرِجَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ مِنَ الظُّلُمٰتِ اِلَي النُّوۡرِؕ وَمَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنۭۡ بِاللّٰهِ وَيَعۡمَلۡ صَالِحًا يُّدۡخِلۡهُ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا٘ اَبَدًاؕ قَدۡ اَحۡسَنَ اللّٰهُ لَهٗ رِزۡقًا
quran.english: [He sent] a Messenger [Muhammad] reciting to you the distinct verses of Allah that He may bring out those who believe and do righteous deeds from darknesses into the light. And whoever believes in Allah and does righteousness - He will admit him into gardens beneath which rivers flow to abide therein forever. Allah will have perfected for him a provision

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ سَبۡعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ وَّمِنَ الۡاَرۡضِ مِثۡلَهُنَّؕ يَتَنَزَّلُ الۡاَمۡرُ بَيۡنَهُنَّ لِتَعۡلَمُوۡ٘ا اَنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌۙ وَّاَنَّ اللّٰهَ قَدۡ اَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عِلۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: It is Allah who has created seven heavens and of the earth, the like of them. [His] command descends among them so you may know that Allah is over all things competent and that Allah has encompassed all things in knowledge

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ لِمَ تُحَرِّمُ مَا٘ اَحَلَّ اللّٰهُ لَكَۚ تَبۡتَغِيۡ مَرۡضَاتَ اَزۡوَاجِكَؕ وَاللّٰهُ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌ
quran.english: O Prophet, why do you prohibit [yourself from] what Allah has made lawful for you, seeking the approval of your wives? And Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: قَدۡ فَرَضَ اللّٰهُ لَكُمۡ تَحِلَّةَ اَيۡمَانِكُمۡۚ وَاللّٰهُ مَوۡلٰىكُمۡۚ وَهُوَ الۡعَلِيۡمُ الۡحَكِيۡمُ
quran.english: Allah has already ordained for you [Muslims] the dissolution of your oaths. And Allah is your protector, and He is the Knowing, the Wise

quran.arabic: وَاِذۡ اَسَرَّ النَّبِيُّ اِلٰي بَعۡضِ اَزۡوَاجِهٖ حَدِيۡثًاۚ فَلَمَّا نَبَّاَتۡ بِهٖ وَاَظۡهَرَهُ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِ عَرَّفَ بَعۡضَهٗ وَاَعۡرَضَ عَنۭۡ بَعۡضٍۚ فَلَمَّا نَبَّاَهَا بِهٖ قَالَتۡ مَنۡ اَنۭۡ بَاَكَ هٰذَاؕ قَالَ نَبَّاَنِيَ الۡعَلِيۡمُ الۡخَبِيۡرُ
quran.english: And [remember] when the Prophet confided to one of his wives a statement; and when she informed [another] of it and Allah showed it to him, he made known part of it and ignored a part. And when he informed her about it, she said, "Who told you this?" He said, "I was informed by the Knowing, the Acquainted

quran.arabic: اِنۡ تَتُوۡبَا٘ اِلَي اللّٰهِ فَقَدۡ صَغَتۡ قُلُوۡبُكُمَاۚ وَاِنۡ تَظٰهَرَا عَلَيۡهِ فَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ هُوَ مَوۡلٰىهُ وَجِبۡرِيۡلُ وَصَالِحُ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَۚ وَالۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ بَعۡدَ ذٰلِكَ ظَهِيۡرٌ
quran.english: If you two [wives] repent to Allah, [it is best], for your hearts have deviated. But if you cooperate against him - then indeed Allah is his protector, and Gabriel and the righteous of the believers and the angels, moreover, are [his] assistants

quran.arabic: عَسٰي رَبُّهٗ٘ اِنۡ طَلَّقَكُنَّ اَنۡ يُّبۡدِلَهٗ٘ اَزۡوَاجًا خَيۡرًا مِّنۡكُنَّ مُسۡلِمٰتٍ مُّؤۡمِنٰتٍ قٰنِتٰتٍ تٰٓئِبٰتٍ عٰبِدٰتٍ سٰٓئِحٰتٍ ثَيِّبٰتٍ وَّاَبۡكَارًا
quran.english: Perhaps his Lord, if he divorced you [all], would substitute for him wives better than you - submitting [to Allah], believing, devoutly obedient, repentant, worshipping, and traveling - [ones] previously married and virgins

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا قُوۡ٘ا اَنۡفُسَكُمۡ وَاَهۡلِيۡكُمۡ نَارًا وَّقُوۡدُهَا النَّاسُ وَالۡحِجَارَةُ عَلَيۡهَا مَلٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌ شِدَادٌ لَّا يَعۡصُوۡنَ اللّٰهَ مَا٘ اَمَرَهُمۡ وَيَفۡعَلُوۡنَ مَا يُؤۡمَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: O you who have believed, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones, over which are [appointed] angels, harsh and severe; they do not disobey Allah in what He commands them but do what they are commanded

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَا تَعۡتَذِرُوا الۡيَوۡمَؕ اِنَّمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: O you who have disbelieved, make no excuses that Day. You will only be recompensed for what you used to do

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا تُوۡبُوۡ٘ا اِلَي اللّٰهِ تَوۡبَةً نَّصُوۡحًاؕ عَسٰي رَبُّكُمۡ اَنۡ يُّكَفِّرَ عَنۡكُمۡ سَيِّاٰتِكُمۡ وَيُدۡخِلَكُمۡ جَنّٰتٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُۙ يَوۡمَ لَا يُخۡزِي اللّٰهُ النَّبِيَّ وَالَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مَعَهٗۚ نُوۡرُهُمۡ يَسۡعٰي بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡهِمۡ وَبِاَيۡمَانِهِمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ رَبَّنَا٘ اَتۡمِمۡ لَنَا نُوۡرَنَا وَاغۡفِرۡ لَنَاۚ اِنَّكَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرٌ
quran.english: O you who have believed, repent to Allah with sincere repentance. Perhaps your Lord will remove from you your misdeeds and admit you into gardens beneath which rivers flow [on] the Day when Allah will not disgrace the Prophet and those who believed with him. Their light will proceed before them and on their right; they will say, "Our Lord, perfect for us our light and forgive us. Indeed, You are over all things competent

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ جَاهِدِ الۡكُفَّارَ وَالۡمُنٰفِقِيۡنَ وَاغۡلُظۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡؕ وَمَاۡوٰىهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُؕ وَبِئۡسَ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: O Prophet, strive against the disbelievers and the hypocrites and be harsh upon them. And their refuge is Hell, and wretched is the destination

quran.arabic: ضَرَبَ اللّٰهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوا امۡرَاَتَ نُوۡحٍ وَّامۡرَاَتَ لُوۡطٍؕ كَانَتَا تَحۡتَ عَبۡدَيۡنِ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا صَالِحَيۡنِ فَخَانَتٰهُمَا فَلَمۡ يُغۡنِيَا عَنۡهُمَا مِنَ اللّٰهِ شَيۡـًٔا وَّقِيۡلَ ادۡخُلَا النَّارَ مَعَ الدّٰخِلِيۡنَ
quran.english: Allah presents an example of those who disbelieved: the wife of Noah and the wife of Lot. They were under two of Our righteous servants but betrayed them, so those prophets did not avail them from Allah at all, and it was said, "Enter the Fire with those who enter

quran.arabic: وَضَرَبَ اللّٰهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوا امۡرَاَتَ فِرۡعَوۡنَۘ اِذۡ قَالَتۡ رَبِّ ابۡنِ لِيۡ عِنۡدَكَ بَيۡتًا فِي الۡجَنَّةِ وَنَجِّنِيۡ مِنۡ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَعَمَلِهٖ وَنَجِّنِيۡ مِنَ الۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And Allah presents an example of those who believed: the wife of Pharaoh, when she said, "My Lord, build for me near You a house in Paradise and save me from Pharaoh and his deeds and save me from the wrongdoing people

quran.arabic: وَمَرۡيَمَ ابۡنَتَ عِمۡرٰنَ الَّتِيۡ٘ اَحۡصَنَتۡ فَرۡجَهَا فَنَفَخۡنَا فِيۡهِ مِنۡ رُّوۡحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتۡ بِكَلِمٰتِ رَبِّهَا وَكُتُبِهٖ وَكَانَتۡ مِنَ الۡقٰنِتِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And [the example of] Mary, the daughter of 'Imran, who guarded her chastity, so We blew into [her garment] through Our angel, and she believed in the words of her Lord and His scriptures and was of the devoutly obedient

quran.arabic: تَبٰرَكَ الَّذِيۡ بِيَدِهِ الۡمُلۡكُؗ وَهُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ قَدِيۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ الۡمَوۡتَ وَالۡحَيٰوةَ لِيَبۡلُوَكُمۡ اَيُّكُمۡ اَحۡسَنُ عَمَلًاؕ وَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الۡغَفُوۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: [He] who created death and life to test you [as to] which of you is best in deed - and He is the Exalted in Might, the Forgiving

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ سَبۡعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًاؕ مَا تَرٰي فِيۡ خَلۡقِ الرَّحۡمٰنِ مِنۡ تَفٰوُتٍؕ فَارۡجِعِ الۡبَصَرَۙ هَلۡ تَرٰي مِنۡ فُطُوۡرٍ
quran.english: [And] who created seven heavens in layers. You do not see in the creation of the Most Merciful any inconsistency. So return [your] vision [to the sky]; do you see any breaks

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ ارۡجِعِ الۡبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيۡنِ يَنۡقَلِبۡ اِلَيۡكَ الۡبَصَرُ خَاسِئًا وَّهُوَ حَسِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Then return [your] vision twice again. [Your] vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ زَيَّنَّا السَّمَآءَ الدُّنۡيَا بِمَصَابِيۡحَ وَجَعَلۡنٰهَا رُجُوۡمًا لِّلشَّيٰطِيۡنِ وَاَعۡتَدۡنَا لَهُمۡ عَذَابَ السَّعِيۡرِ
quran.english: And We have certainly beautified the nearest heaven with stars and have made [from] them what is thrown at the devils and have prepared for them the punishment of the Blaze

quran.arabic: وَلِلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِرَبِّهِمۡ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَؕ وَبِئۡسَ الۡمَصِيۡرُ
quran.english: And for those who disbelieved in their Lord is the punishment of Hell, and wretched is the destination

quran.arabic: اِذَا٘ اُلۡقُوۡا فِيۡهَا سَمِعُوۡا لَهَا شَهِيۡقًا وَّهِيَ تَفُوۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up

quran.arabic: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ الۡغَيۡظِؕ كُلَّمَا٘ اُلۡقِيَ فِيۡهَا فَوۡجٌ سَاَلَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا٘ اَلَمۡ يَاۡتِكُمۡ نَذِيۡرٌ
quran.english: It almost bursts with rage. Every time a company is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, "Did there not come to you a warner

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا بَلٰي قَدۡ جَآءَنَا نَذِيۡرٌ ࣢ۙ فَكَذَّبۡنَا وَقُلۡنَا مَا نَزَّلَ اللّٰهُ مِنۡ شَيۡءٍۚۖ اِنۡ اَنۡتُمۡ اِلَّا فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ كَبِيۡرٍ
quran.english: They will say," Yes, a warner had come to us, but we denied and said, 'Allah has not sent down anything. You are not but in great error

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا لَوۡ كُنَّا نَسۡمَعُ اَوۡ نَعۡقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِيۡ٘ اَصۡحٰبِ السَّعِيۡرِ
quran.english: And they will say, "If only we had been listening or reasoning, we would not be among the companions of the Blaze

quran.arabic: فَاعۡتَرَفُوۡا بِذَنۭۡ بِهِمۡۚ فَسُحۡقًا لِّاَصۡحٰبِ السَّعِيۡرِ
quran.english: And they will admit their sin, so [it is] alienation for the companions of the Blaze

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡ بِالۡغَيۡبِ لَهُمۡ مَّغۡفِرَةٌ وَّاَجۡرٌ كَبِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Indeed, those who fear their Lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward

quran.arabic: وَاَسِرُّوۡا قَوۡلَكُمۡ اَوِ اجۡهَرُوۡا بِهٖؕ اِنَّهٗ عَلِيۡمٌۭ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُوۡرِ
quran.english: And conceal your speech or publicize it; indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts

quran.arabic: اَلَا يَعۡلَمُ مَنۡ خَلَقَؕ وَهُوَ اللَّطِيۡفُ الۡخَبِيۡرُࣖ‏
quran.english: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Acquainted

quran.arabic: هُوَ الَّذِيۡ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الۡاَرۡضَ ذَلُوۡلًا فَامۡشُوۡا فِيۡ مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوۡا مِنۡ رِّزۡقِهٖؕ وَاِلَيۡهِ النُّشُوۡرُ
quran.english: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection

quran.arabic: ءَاَمِنۡتُمۡ مَّنۡ فِي السَّمَآءِ اَنۡ يَّخۡسِفَ بِكُمُ الۡاَرۡضَ فَاِذَا هِيَ تَمُوۡرُۙ‏
quran.english: Do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not cause the earth to swallow you and suddenly it would sway

quran.arabic: اَمۡ اَمِنۡتُمۡ مَّنۡ فِي السَّمَآءِ اَنۡ يُّرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ حَاصِبًاؕ فَسَتَعۡلَمُوۡنَ كَيۡفَ نَذِيۡرِ
quran.english: Or do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not send against you a storm of stones? Then you would know how [severe] was My warning

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ الَّذِيۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيۡرِ
quran.english: And already had those before them denied, and how [terrible] was My reproach

quran.arabic: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اِلَي الطَّيۡرِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ صٰٓفّٰتٍ وَّيَقۡبِضۡنَؔۘؕ مَا يُمۡسِكُهُنَّ اِلَّا الرَّحۡمٰنُؕ اِنَّهٗ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍۭ بَصِيۡرٌ
quran.english: Do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and [sometimes] folded in? None holds them [aloft] except the Most Merciful. Indeed He is, of all things, Seeing

quran.arabic: اَمَّنۡ هٰذَا الَّذِيۡ هُوَ جُنۡدٌ لَّكُمۡ يَنۡصُرُكُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ الرَّحۡمٰنِؕ اِنِ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ اِلَّا فِيۡ غُرُوۡرٍۚ‏
quran.english: Or who is it that could be an army for you to aid you other than the Most Merciful? The disbelievers are not but in delusion

quran.arabic: اَمَّنۡ هٰذَا الَّذِيۡ يَرۡزُقُكُمۡ اِنۡ اَمۡسَكَ رِزۡقَهٗۚ بَلۡ لَّجُّوۡا فِيۡ عُتُوٍّ وَّنُفُوۡرٍ
quran.english: Or who is it that could provide for you if He withheld His provision? But they have persisted in insolence and aversion

quran.arabic: اَفَمَنۡ يَّمۡشِيۡ مُكِبًّا عَلٰي وَجۡهِهٖ٘ اَهۡدٰ٘ي اَمَّنۡ يَّمۡشِيۡ سَوِيًّا عَلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path

quran.arabic: قُلۡ هُوَ الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡشَاَكُمۡ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ السَّمۡعَ وَالۡاَبۡصَارَ وَالۡاَفۡـِٕدَةَؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful

quran.arabic: قُلۡ هُوَ الَّذِيۡ ذَرَاَكُمۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَاِلَيۡهِ تُحۡشَرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Say, "It is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered

quran.arabic: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ مَتٰي هٰذَا الۡوَعۡدُ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّمَا الۡعِلۡمُ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِࣕ وَاِنَّمَا٘ اَنَا نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ
quran.english: Say, "The knowledge is only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَاَوۡهُ زُلۡفَةً سِيۡٓـَٔتۡ وُجُوۡهُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا وَقِيۡلَ هٰذَا الَّذِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تَدَّعُوۡنَ
quran.english: But when they see it approaching, the faces of those who disbelieve will be distressed, and it will be said, "This is that for which you used to call

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ اَهۡلَكَنِيَ اللّٰهُ وَمَنۡ مَّعِيَ اَوۡ رَحِمَنَاۙ فَمَنۡ يُّجِيۡرُ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ اَلِيۡمٍ
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Have you considered: whether Allah should cause my death and those with me or have mercy upon us, who can protect the disbelievers from a painful punishment

quran.arabic: قُلۡ هُوَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ اٰمَنَّا بِهٖ وَعَلَيۡهِ تَوَكَّلۡنَاۚ فَسَتَعۡلَمُوۡنَ مَنۡ هُوَ فِيۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ
quran.english: Say, "He is the Most Merciful; we have believed in Him, and upon Him we have relied. And you will [come to] know who it is that is in clear error

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَرَءَيۡتُمۡ اِنۡ اَصۡبَحَ مَآؤُكُمۡ غَوۡرًا فَمَنۡ يَّاۡتِيۡكُمۡ بِمَآءٍ مَّعِيۡنٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Say, "Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water

quran.arabic: نٓ وَالۡقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسۡطُرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Nun. By the pen and what they inscribe

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَنۡتَ بِنِعۡمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجۡنُوۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: You are not, [O Muhammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ لَكَ لَاَجۡرًا غَيۡرَ مَمۡنُوۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: And indeed, for you is a reward uninterrupted

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّكَ لَعَلٰي خُلُقٍ عَظِيۡمٍ
quran.english: And indeed, you are of a great moral character

quran.arabic: فَسَتُبۡصِرُ وَيُبۡصِرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So you will see and they will see

quran.arabic: بِاَيِّىكُمُ الۡمَفۡتُوۡنُ
quran.english: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil]

quran.arabic: اِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنۡ ضَلَّ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِهٖࣕ وَهُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِالۡمُهۡتَدِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided

quran.arabic: فَلَا تُطِعِ الۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then do not obey the deniers

quran.arabic: وَدُّوۡا لَوۡ تُدۡهِنُ فَيُدۡهِنُوۡنَ
quran.english: They wish that you would soften [in your position], so they would soften [toward you]

quran.arabic: وَلَا تُطِعۡ كُلَّ حَلَّافٍ مَّهِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: And do not obey every worthless habitual swearer

quran.arabic: هَمَّازٍ مَّشَّآءٍۭ بِنَمِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: [And] scorner, going about with malicious gossip

quran.arabic: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدٍ اَثِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: A preventer of good, transgressing and sinful

quran.arabic: عُتُلٍّۭ بَعۡدَ ذٰلِكَ زَنِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: Cruel, moreover, and an illegitimate pretender

quran.arabic: اَنۡ كَانَ ذَا مَالٍ وَّبَنِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Because he is a possessor of wealth and children

quran.arabic: اِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِ اٰيٰتُنَا قَالَ اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples

quran.arabic: سَنَسِمُهٗ عَلَي الۡخُرۡطُوۡمِ
quran.english: We will brand him upon the snout

quran.arabic: اِنَّا بَلَوۡنٰهُمۡ كَمَا بَلَوۡنَا٘ اَصۡحٰبَ الۡجَنَّةِۚ اِذۡ اَقۡسَمُوۡا لَيَصۡرِمُنَّهَا مُصۡبِحِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have tried them as We tried the companions of the garden, when they swore to cut its fruit in the [early] morning

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَسۡتَثۡنُوۡنَ
quran.english: Without making exception

quran.arabic: فَطَافَ عَلَيۡهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَ وَهُمۡ نَآئِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep

quran.arabic: فَاَصۡبَحَتۡ كَالصَّرِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: And it became as though reaped

quran.arabic: فَتَنَادَوۡا مُصۡبِحِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And they called one another at morning

quran.arabic: اَنِ اغۡدُوۡا عَلٰي حَرۡثِكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit

quran.arabic: فَانۡطَلَقُوۡا وَهُمۡ يَتَخَافَتُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So they set out, while lowering their voices

quran.arabic: اَنۡ لَّا يَدۡخُلَنَّهَا الۡيَوۡمَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّسۡكِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: [Saying], "There will surely not enter it today upon you [any] poor person

quran.arabic: وَّغَدَوۡا عَلٰي حَرۡدٍ قٰدِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able

quran.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَاَوۡهَا قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا لَضَآلُّوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost

quran.arabic: بَلۡ نَحۡنُ مَحۡرُوۡمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Rather, we have been deprived

quran.arabic: قَالَ اَوۡسَطُهُمۡ اَلَمۡ اَقُلۡ لَّكُمۡ لَوۡلَا تُسَبِّحُوۡنَ
quran.english: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, 'Why do you not exalt [Allah]

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا سُبۡحٰنَ رَبِّنَا٘ اِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers

quran.arabic: فَاَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلٰي بَعۡضٍ يَّتَلَاوَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then they approached one another, blaming each other

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا يٰوَيۡلَنَا٘ اِنَّا كُنَّا طٰغِيۡنَ
quran.english: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors

quran.arabic: عَسٰي رَبُّنَا٘ اَنۡ يُّبۡدِلَنَا خَيۡرًا مِّنۡهَا٘ اِنَّا٘ اِلٰي رَبِّنَا رٰغِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Perhaps our Lord will substitute for us [one] better than it. Indeed, we are toward our Lord desirous

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ الۡعَذَابُؕ وَلَعَذَابُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ اَكۡبَرُۘ لَوۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Such is the punishment [of this world]. And the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew

quran.arabic: اِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡ جَنّٰتِ النَّعِيۡمِ
quran.english: Indeed, for the righteous with their Lord are the Gardens of Pleasure

quran.arabic: اَفَنَجۡعَلُ الۡمُسۡلِمِيۡنَ كَالۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then will We treat the Muslims like the criminals

quran.arabic: مَا لَكُمۡࣞ كَيۡفَ تَحۡكُمُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: What is [the matter] with you? How do you judge

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَكُمۡ كِتٰبٌ فِيۡهِ تَدۡرُسُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Or do you have a scripture in which you learn

quran.arabic: اِنَّ لَكُمۡ فِيۡهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: That indeed for you is whatever you choose

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَكُمۡ اَيۡمَانٌ عَلَيۡنَا بَالِغَةٌ اِلٰي يَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِۙ اِنَّ لَكُمۡ لَمَا تَحۡكُمُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Or do you have oaths [binding] upon Us, extending until the Day of Resurrection, that indeed for you is whatever you judge

quran.arabic: سَلۡهُمۡ اَيُّهُمۡ بِذٰلِكَ زَعِيۡمٌۚۛ‏
quran.english: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible

quran.arabic: اَمۡ لَهُمۡ شُرَكَآءُۚۛ فَلۡيَاۡتُوۡا بِشُرَكَآئِهِمۡ اِنۡ كَانُوۡا صٰدِقِيۡنَ
quran.english: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يُكۡشَفُ عَنۡ سَاقٍ وَّيُدۡعَوۡنَ اِلَي السُّجُوۡدِ فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: The Day the shin will be uncovered and they are invited to prostration but the disbelievers will not be able

quran.arabic: خَاشِعَةً اَبۡصَارُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةٌؕ وَقَدۡ كَانُوۡا يُدۡعَوۡنَ اِلَي السُّجُوۡدِ وَهُمۡ سٰلِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. And they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound

quran.arabic: فَذَرۡنِيۡ وَمَنۡ يُّكَذِّبُ بِهٰذَا الۡحَدِيۡثِؕ سَنَسۡتَدۡرِجُهُمۡ مِّنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So leave Me, [O Muhammad], with [the matter of] whoever denies the Qur'an. We will progressively lead them [to punishment] from where they do not know

quran.arabic: وَاُمۡلِيۡ لَهُمۡؕ اِنَّ كَيۡدِيۡ مَتِيۡنٌ
quran.english: And I will give them time. Indeed, My plan is firm

quran.arabic: اَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ اَجۡرًا فَهُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّغۡرَمٍ مُّثۡقَلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down

quran.arabic: اَمۡ عِنۡدَهُمُ الۡغَيۡبُ فَهُمۡ يَكۡتُبُوۡنَ
quran.english: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُنۡ كَصَاحِبِ الۡحُوۡتِۘ اِذۡ نَادٰي وَهُوَ مَكۡظُوۡمٌؕ‏
quran.english: Then be patient for the decision of your Lord, [O Muhammad], and be not like the companion of the fish when he called out while he was distressed

quran.arabic: لَوۡلَا٘ اَنۡ تَدٰرَكَهٗ نِعۡمَةٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهٖ لَنُبِذَ بِالۡعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذۡمُوۡمٌ
quran.english: If not that a favor from his Lord overtook him, he would have been thrown onto the naked shore while he was censured

quran.arabic: فَاجۡتَبٰىهُ رَبُّهٗ فَجَعَلَهٗ مِنَ الصّٰلِحِيۡنَ
quran.english: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous

quran.arabic: وَاِنۡ يَّكَادُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَيُزۡلِقُوۡنَكَ بِاَبۡصَارِهِمۡ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا الذِّكۡرَ وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اِنَّهٗ لَمَجۡنُوۡنٌۘ‏
quran.english: And indeed, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes when they hear the message, and they say, "Indeed, he is mad

quran.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ اِلَّا ذِكۡرٌ لِّلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds

quran.arabic: اَلۡحَآقَّةُۙ‏
quran.english: The Inevitable Reality

quran.arabic: مَا الۡحَآقَّةُۚ‏
quran.english: What is the Inevitable Reality

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا الۡحَآقَّةُؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُوۡدُ وَعَادٌۭ بِالۡقَارِعَةِ
quran.english: Thamud and 'Aad denied the Striking Calamity

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا ثَمُوۡدُ فَاُهۡلِكُوۡا بِالطَّاغِيَةِ
quran.english: So as for Thamud, they were destroyed by the overpowering [blast]

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا عَادٌ فَاُهۡلِكُوۡا بِرِيۡحٍ صَرۡصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: And as for 'Aad, they were destroyed by a screaming, violent wind

quran.arabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ سَبۡعَ لَيَالٍ وَّثَمٰنِيَةَ اَيَّامٍۙ حُسُوۡمًا فَتَرَي الۡقَوۡمَ فِيۡهَا صَرۡعٰيۙ كَاَنَّهُمۡ اَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٍ خَاوِيَةٍۚ‏
quran.english: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees

quran.arabic: فَهَلۡ تَرٰي لَهُمۡ مِّنۭۡ بَاقِيَةٍ
quran.english: Then do you see of them any remains

quran.arabic: وَجَآءَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ وَمَنۡ قَبۡلَهٗ وَالۡمُؤۡتَفِكٰتُ بِالۡخَاطِئَةِۚ‏
quran.english: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin

quran.arabic: فَعَصَوۡا رَسُوۡلَ رَبِّهِمۡ فَاَخَذَهُمۡ اَخۡذَةً رَّابِيَةً
quran.english: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity]

quran.arabic: اِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا الۡمَآءُ حَمَلۡنٰكُمۡ فِي الۡجَارِيَةِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship

quran.arabic: لِنَجۡعَلَهَا لَكُمۡ تَذۡكِرَةً وَّتَعِيَهَا٘ اُذُنٌ وَّاعِيَةٌ
quran.english: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا نُفِخَ فِي الصُّوۡرِ نَفۡخَةٌ وَّاحِدَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast

quran.arabic: وَّحُمِلَتِ الۡاَرۡضُ وَالۡجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَّاحِدَةًۙ‏
quran.english: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow

quran.arabic: فَيَوۡمَئِذٍ وَّقَعَتِ الۡوَاقِعَةُۙ‏
quran.english: Then on that Day, the Resurrection will occur

quran.arabic: وَانۡشَقَّتِ السَّمَآءُ فَهِيَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ وَّاهِيَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm

quran.arabic: وَّالۡمَلَكُ عَلٰ٘ي اَرۡجَآئِهَاؕ وَيَحۡمِلُ عَرۡشَ رَبِّكَ فَوۡقَهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٍ ثَمٰنِيَةٌؕ‏
quran.english: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them]

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَئِذٍ تُعۡرَضُوۡنَ لَا تَخۡفٰي مِنۡكُمۡ خَافِيَةٌ
quran.english: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا مَنۡ اُوۡتِيَ كِتٰبَهٗ بِيَمِيۡنِهٖ فَيَقُوۡلُ هَآؤُمُ اقۡرَءُوۡا كِتٰبِيَهۡۚ‏
quran.english: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record

quran.arabic: اِنِّيۡ ظَنَنۡتُ اَنِّيۡ مُلٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهۡۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account

quran.arabic: فَهُوَ فِيۡ عِيۡشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: So he will be in a pleasant life

quran.arabic: فِيۡ جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: In an elevated garden

quran.arabic: قُطُوۡفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ
quran.english: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near

quran.arabic: كُلُوۡا وَاشۡرَبُوۡا هَنِيۡٓـًٔاۭ بِمَا٘ اَسۡلَفۡتُمۡ فِي الۡاَيَّامِ الۡخَالِيَةِ
quran.english: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا مَنۡ اُوۡتِيَ كِتٰبَهٗ بِشِمَالِهٖ ࣢ۙ فَيَقُوۡلُ يٰلَيۡتَنِيۡ لَمۡ اُوۡتَ كِتٰبِيَهۡۚ‏
quran.english: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

quran.arabic: وَلَمۡ اَدۡرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهۡۚ‏
quran.english: And had not known what is my account

quran.arabic: يٰلَيۡتَهَا كَانَتِ الۡقَاضِيَةَۚ‏
quran.english: I wish my death had been the decisive one

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَغۡنٰي عَنِّيۡ مَالِيَهۡۚ‏
quran.english: My wealth has not availed me

quran.arabic: هَلَكَ عَنِّيۡ سُلۡطٰنِيَهۡۚ‏
quran.english: Gone from me is my authority

quran.arabic: خُذُوۡهُ فَغُلُّوۡهُۙ‏
quran.english: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ الۡجَحِيۡمَ صَلُّوۡهُۙ‏
quran.english: Then into Hellfire drive him

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ فِيۡ سِلۡسِلَةٍ ذَرۡعُهَا سَبۡعُوۡنَ ذِرَاعًا فَاسۡلُكُوۡهُؕ‏
quran.english: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ كَانَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُ بِاللّٰهِ الۡعَظِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلٰي طَعَامِ الۡمِسۡكِيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor

quran.arabic: فَلَيۡسَ لَهُ الۡيَوۡمَ هٰهُنَا حَمِيۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend

quran.arabic: وَّلَا طَعَامٌ اِلَّا مِنۡ غِسۡلِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds

quran.arabic: لَّا يَاۡكُلُهٗ٘ اِلَّا الۡخٰطِـُٔوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: None will eat it except the sinners

quran.arabic: فَلَا٘ اُقۡسِمُ بِمَا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So I swear by what you see

quran.arabic: وَمَا لَا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And what you do not see

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ لَقَوۡلُ رَسُوۡلٍ كَرِيۡمٍۚۙ‏
quran.english: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is the word of a noble Messenger

quran.arabic: وَّمَا هُوَ بِقَوۡلِ شَاعِرٍؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe

quran.arabic: وَلَا بِقَوۡلِ كَاهِنٍؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember

quran.arabic: تَنۡزِيۡلٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ
quran.english: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: وَلَوۡ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيۡنَا بَعۡضَ الۡاَقَاوِيۡلِۙ‏
quran.english: And if Muhammad had made up about Us some [false] sayings

quran.arabic: لَاَخَذۡنَا مِنۡهُ بِالۡيَمِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: We would have seized him by the right hand

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعۡنَا مِنۡهُ الۡوَتِيۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: Then We would have cut from him the aorta

quran.arabic: فَمَا مِنۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَحَدٍ عَنۡهُ حٰجِزِيۡنَ
quran.english: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَتَذۡكِرَةٌ لِّلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, the Qur'an is a reminder for the righteous

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّا لَنَعۡلَمُ اَنَّ مِنۡكُمۡ مُّكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَحَسۡرَةٌ عَلَي الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: And indeed, it will be [a cause of] regret upon the disbelievers

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لَحَقُّ الۡيَقِيۡنِ
quran.english: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty

quran.arabic: فَسَبِّحۡ بِاسۡمِ رَبِّكَ الۡعَظِيۡمِࣖ‏
quran.english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great

quran.arabic: سَاَلَ سَآئِلٌۭ بِعَذَابٍ وَّاقِعٍۙ‏
quran.english: A supplicant asked for a punishment bound to happen

quran.arabic: لِّلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ لَيۡسَ لَهٗ دَافِعٌۙ‏
quran.english: To the disbelievers; of it there is no preventer

quran.arabic: مِّنَ اللّٰهِ ذِي الۡمَعَارِجِؕ‏
quran.english: [It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent

quran.arabic: تَعۡرُجُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ وَالرُّوۡحُ اِلَيۡهِ فِيۡ يَوۡمٍ كَانَ مِقۡدَارُهٗ خَمۡسِيۡنَ اَلۡفَ سَنَةٍۚ‏
quran.english: The angels and the Spirit will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ صَبۡرًا جَمِيۡلًا
quran.english: So be patient with gracious patience

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ يَرَوۡنَهٗ بَعِيۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, they see it [as] distant

quran.arabic: وَّنَرٰىهُ قَرِيۡبًاؕ‏
quran.english: But We see it [as] near

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَكُوۡنُ السَّمَآءُ كَالۡمُهۡلِۙ‏
quran.english: On the Day the sky will be like murky oil

quran.arabic: وَتَكُوۡنُ الۡجِبَالُ كَالۡعِهۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And the mountains will be like wool

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَسۡـَٔلُ حَمِيۡمٌ حَمِيۡمًاۚۙ‏
quran.english: And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend

quran.arabic: يُّبَصَّرُوۡنَهُمۡؕ يَوَدُّ الۡمُجۡرِمُ لَوۡ يَفۡتَدِيۡ مِنۡ عَذَابِ يَوۡمِئِذٍۭ بِبَنِيۡهِۙ‏
quran.english: They will be shown each other. The criminal will wish that he could be ransomed from the punishment of that Day by his children

quran.arabic: وَصَاحِبَتِهٖ وَاَخِيۡهِۙ‏
quran.english: And his wife and his brother

quran.arabic: وَفَصِيۡلَتِهِ الَّتِيۡ تُـٔۡوِيۡهِۙ‏
quran.english: And his nearest kindred who shelter him

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ جَمِيۡعًاۙ ثُمَّ يُنۡجِيۡهِۙ‏
quran.english: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him

quran.arabic: كَلَّاؕ اِنَّهَا لَظٰيۙ‏
quran.english: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell]

quran.arabic: نَزَّاعَةً لِّلشَّوٰيۚۖ‏
quran.english: A remover of exteriors

quran.arabic: تَدۡعُوۡا مَنۡ اَدۡبَرَ وَتَوَلّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]

quran.arabic: وَجَمَعَ فَاَوۡعٰي
quran.english: And collected [wealth] and hoarded

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ خُلِقَ هَلُوۡعًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, mankind was created anxious

quran.arabic: اِذَا مَسَّهُ الشَّرُّ جَزُوۡعًاۙ‏
quran.english: When evil touches him, impatient

quran.arabic: وَّاِذَا مَسَّهُ الۡخَيۡرُ مَنُوۡعًاۙ‏
quran.english: And when good touches him, withholding [of it]

quran.arabic: اِلَّا الۡمُصَلِّيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Except the observers of prayer

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ عَلٰي صَلَاتِهِمۡ دَآئِمُوۡنَۙࣕ‏
quran.english: Those who are constant in their prayer

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ فِيۡ٘ اَمۡوَالِهِمۡ حَقٌّ مَّعۡلُوۡمٌۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And those within whose wealth is a known right

quran.arabic: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَالۡمَحۡرُوۡمِۙࣕ‏
quran.english: For the petitioner and the deprived

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ يُصَدِّقُوۡنَ بِيَوۡمِ الدِّيۡنِۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And those who believe in the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِمۡ مُّشۡفِقُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: And those who are fearful of the punishment of their Lord

quran.arabic: اِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّهِمۡ غَيۡرُ مَاۡمُوۡنٍࣕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the punishment of their Lord is not that from which one is safe

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ لِفُرُوۡجِهِمۡ حٰفِظُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And those who guard their private parts

quran.arabic: اِلَّا عَلٰ٘ي اَزۡوَاجِهِمۡ اَوۡ مَا مَلَكَتۡ اَيۡمَانُهُمۡ فَاِنَّهُمۡ غَيۡرُ مَلُوۡمِيۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they are not to be blamed

quran.arabic: فَمَنِ ابۡتَغٰي وَرَآءَ ذٰلِكَ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡعٰدُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ لِاَمٰنٰتِهِمۡ وَعَهۡدِهِمۡ رٰعُوۡنَࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ بِشَهٰدٰتِهِمۡ قَآئِمُوۡنَۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And those who are in their testimonies upright

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ عَلٰي صَلَاتِهِمۡ يُحَافِظُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ فِيۡ جَنّٰتٍ مُّكۡرَمُوۡنَࣖؕ‏
quran.english: They will be in gardens, honored

quran.arabic: فَمَالِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا قِبَلَكَ مُهۡطِعِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So what is [the matter] with those who disbelieve, hastening [from] before you, [O Muhammad]

quran.arabic: عَنِ الۡيَمِيۡنِ وَعَنِ الشِّمَالِ عِزِيۡنَ
quran.english: [To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups

quran.arabic: اَيَطۡمَعُ كُلُّ امۡرِئٍ مِّنۡهُمۡ اَنۡ يُّدۡخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure

quran.arabic: كَلَّاؕ اِنَّا خَلَقۡنٰهُمۡ مِّمَّا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know

quran.arabic: فَلَا٘ اُقۡسِمُ بِرَبِّ الۡمَشٰرِقِ وَالۡمَغٰرِبِ اِنَّا لَقٰدِرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able

quran.arabic: عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ نُّبَدِّلَ خَيۡرًا مِّنۡهُمۡۙ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوۡقِيۡنَ
quran.english: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone

quran.arabic: فَذَرۡهُمۡ يَخُوۡضُوۡا وَيَلۡعَبُوۡا حَتّٰي يُلٰقُوۡا يَوۡمَهُمُ الَّذِيۡ يُوۡعَدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَخۡرُجُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡاَجۡدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَاَنَّهُمۡ اِلٰي نُصُبٍ يُّوۡفِضُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening

quran.arabic: خَاشِعَةً اَبۡصَارُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةٌؕ ذٰلِكَ الۡيَوۡمُ الَّذِيۡ كَانُوۡا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوۡحًا اِلٰي قَوۡمِهٖ٘ اَنۡ اَنۡذِرۡ قَوۡمَكَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِ اَنۡ يَّاۡتِيَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ اَلِيۡمٌ
quran.english: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment

quran.arabic: قَالَ يٰقَوۡمِ اِنِّيۡ لَكُمۡ نَذِيۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌۙ‏
quran.english: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner

quran.arabic: اَنِ اعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ وَاتَّقُوۡهُ وَاَطِيۡعُوۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: [Saying], 'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me

quran.arabic: يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡ مِّنۡ ذُنُوۡبِكُمۡ وَيُؤَخِّرۡكُمۡ اِلٰ٘ي اَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّيؕ اِنَّ اَجَلَ اللّٰهِ اِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُۘ لَوۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew

quran.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّيۡ دَعَوۡتُ قَوۡمِيۡ لَيۡلًا وَّنَهَارًاۙ‏
quran.english: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day

quran.arabic: فَلَمۡ يَزِدۡهُمۡ دُعَآءِيۡ٘ اِلَّا فِرَارًا
quran.english: But my invitation increased them not except in flight

quran.arabic: وَاِنِّيۡ كُلَّمَا دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ لِتَغۡفِرَ لَهُمۡ جَعَلُوۡ٘ا اَصَابِعَهُمۡ فِيۡ٘ اٰذَانِهِمۡ وَاسۡتَغۡشَوۡا ثِيَابَهُمۡ وَاَصَرُّوۡا وَاسۡتَكۡبَرُوا اسۡتِكۡبَارًاۚ‏
quran.english: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنِّيۡ دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ جِهَارًاۙ‏
quran.english: Then I invited them publicly

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنِّيۡ٘ اَعۡلَنۡتُ لَهُمۡ وَاَسۡرَرۡتُ لَهُمۡ اِسۡرَارًاۙ‏
quran.english: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly

quran.arabic: فَقُلۡتُ اسۡتَغۡفِرُوۡا رَبَّكُمۡࣞ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ غَفَّارًاۙ‏
quran.english: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver

quran.arabic: يُّرۡسِلِ السَّمَآءَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّدۡرَارًاۙ‏
quran.english: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers

quran.arabic: وَّيُمۡدِدۡكُمۡ بِاَمۡوَالٍ وَّبَنِيۡنَ وَيَجۡعَلۡ لَّكُمۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّيَجۡعَلۡ لَّكُمۡ اَنۡهٰرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers

quran.arabic: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَرۡجُوۡنَ لِلّٰهِ وَقَارًاۚ‏
quran.english: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur

quran.arabic: وَقَدۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ اَطۡوَارًا
quran.english: While He has created you in stages

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَوۡا كَيۡفَ خَلَقَ اللّٰهُ سَبۡعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ طِبَاقًاۙ‏
quran.english: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلَ الۡقَمَرَ فِيۡهِنَّ نُوۡرًا وَّجَعَلَ الشَّمۡسَ سِرَاجًا
quran.english: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ اَنۭۡ بَتَكُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَرۡضِ نَبَاتًاۙ‏
quran.english: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيۡدُكُمۡ فِيۡهَا وَيُخۡرِجُكُمۡ اِخۡرَاجًا
quran.english: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الۡاَرۡضَ بِسَاطًاۙ‏
quran.english: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse

quran.arabic: لِّتَسۡلُكُوۡا مِنۡهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًاࣖ‏
quran.english: That you may follow therein roads of passage

quran.arabic: قَالَ نُوۡحٌ رَّبِّ اِنَّهُمۡ عَصَوۡنِيۡ وَاتَّبَعُوۡا مَنۡ لَّمۡ يَزِدۡهُ مَالُهٗ وَوَلَدُهٗ٘ اِلَّا خَسَارًاۚ‏
quran.english: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss

quran.arabic: وَمَكَرُوۡا مَكۡرًا كُبَّارًاۚ‏
quran.english: And they conspired an immense conspiracy

quran.arabic: وَقَالُوۡا لَا تَذَرُنَّ اٰلِهَتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَّلَا سُوَاعًا ࣢ۙ وَّلَا يَغُوۡثَ وَيَعُوۡقَ وَنَسۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr

quran.arabic: وَقَدۡ اَضَلُّوۡا كَثِيۡرًا ࣢ۚ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ اِلَّا ضَلٰلًا
quran.english: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error

quran.arabic: مِمَّا خَطِيۡٓـٰٔتِهِمۡ اُغۡرِقُوۡا فَاُدۡخِلُوۡا نَارًا ࣢ۙ فَلَمۡ يَجِدُوۡا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اَنۡصَارًا
quran.english: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ نُوۡحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرۡ عَلَي الۡاَرۡضِ مِنَ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ دَيَّارًا
quran.english: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant

quran.arabic: اِنَّكَ اِنۡ تَذَرۡهُمۡ يُضِلُّوۡا عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
quran.english: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever

quran.arabic: رَبِّ اغۡفِرۡ لِيۡ وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَنۡ دَخَلَ بَيۡتِيَ مُؤۡمِنًا وَّلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِؕ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ اِلَّا تَبَارًاࣖ‏
quran.english: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اُوۡحِيَ اِلَيَّ اَنَّهُ اسۡتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ الۡجِنِّ فَقَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّا سَمِعۡنَا قُرۡاٰنًا عَجَبًاۙ‏
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur'an

quran.arabic: يَّهۡدِيۡ٘ اِلَي الرُّشۡدِ فَاٰمَنَّا بِهٖؕ وَلَنۡ نُّشۡرِكَ بِرَبِّنَا٘ اَحَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّهٗ تَعٰلٰي جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا اتَّخَذَ صَاحِبَةً وَّلَا وَلَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And [it teaches] that exalted is the nobleness of our Lord; He has not taken a wife or a son

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّهٗ كَانَ يَقُوۡلُ سَفِيۡهُنَا عَلَي اللّٰهِ شَطَطًاۙ‏
quran.english: And that our foolish one has been saying about Allah an excessive transgression

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّا ظَنَنَّا٘ اَنۡ لَّنۡ تَقُوۡلَ الۡاِنۡسُ وَالۡجِنُّ عَلَي اللّٰهِ كَذِبًاۙ‏
quran.english: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allah a lie

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّهٗ كَانَ رِجَالٌ مِّنَ الۡاِنۡسِ يَعُوۡذُوۡنَ بِرِجَالٍ مِّنَ الۡجِنِّ فَزَادُوۡهُمۡ رَهَقًاۙ‏
quran.english: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّهُمۡ ظَنُّوۡا كَمَا ظَنَنۡتُمۡ اَنۡ لَّنۡ يَّبۡعَثَ اللّٰهُ اَحَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allah would never send anyone [as a messenger]

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّا لَمَسۡنَا السَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدۡنٰهَا مُلِئَتۡ حَرَسًا شَدِيۡدًا وَّشُهُبًاۙ‏
quran.english: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّا كُنَّا نَقۡعُدُ مِنۡهَا مَقَاعِدَ لِلسَّمۡعِؕ فَمَنۡ يَّسۡتَمِعِ الۡاٰنَ يَجِدۡ لَهٗ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّا لَا نَدۡرِيۡ٘ اَشَرٌّ اُرِيۡدَ بِمَنۡ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ اَمۡ اَرَادَ بِهِمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ رَشَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّا مِنَّا الصّٰلِحُوۡنَ وَمِنَّا دُوۡنَ ذٰلِكَؕ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّا ظَنَنَّا٘ اَنۡ لَّنۡ نُّعۡجِزَ اللّٰهَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ وَلَنۡ نُّعۡجِزَهٗ هَرَبًاۙ‏
quran.english: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allah upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعۡنَا الۡهُدٰ٘ي اٰمَنَّا بِهٖؕ فَمَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنۭۡ بِرَبِّهٖ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخۡسًا وَّلَا رَهَقًاۙ‏
quran.english: And when we heard the guidance, we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّا مِنَّا الۡمُسۡلِمُوۡنَ وَمِنَّا الۡقٰسِطُوۡنَؕ فَمَنۡ اَسۡلَمَ فَاُولٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوۡا رَشَدًا
quran.english: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allah], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا الۡقٰسِطُوۡنَ فَكَانُوۡا لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًاۙ‏
quran.english: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood

quran.arabic: وَّاَنۡ لَّوِ اسۡتَقَامُوۡا عَلَي الطَّرِيۡقَةِ لَاَسۡقَيۡنٰهُمۡ مَّآءً غَدَقًاۙ‏
quran.english: And [Allah revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant provision

quran.arabic: لِّنَفۡتِنَهُمۡ فِيۡهِؕ وَمَنۡ يُّعۡرِضۡ عَنۡ ذِكۡرِ رَبِّهٖ يَسۡلُكۡهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord He will put into arduous punishment

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّ الۡمَسٰجِدَ لِلّٰهِ فَلَا تَدۡعُوۡا مَعَ اللّٰهِ اَحَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allah, so do not invoke with Allah anyone

quran.arabic: وَّاَنَّهٗ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبۡدُ اللّٰهِ يَدۡعُوۡهُ كَادُوۡا يَكُوۡنُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِ لِبَدًاؕࣖ‏
quran.english: And that when the Servant of Allah stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنَّمَا٘ اَدۡعُوۡا رَبِّيۡ وَلَا٘ اُشۡرِكُ بِهٖ٘ اَحَدًا
quran.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنِّيۡ لَا٘ اَمۡلِكُ لَكُمۡ ضَرًّا وَّلَا رَشَدًا
quran.english: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنِّيۡ لَنۡ يُّجِيۡرَنِيۡ مِنَ اللّٰهِ اَحَدٌ ࣢ۙ وَّلَنۡ اَجِدَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهٖ مُلۡتَحَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allah anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge

quran.arabic: اِلَّا بَلٰغًا مِّنَ اللّٰهِ وَرِسٰلٰتِهٖؕ وَمَنۡ يَّعۡصِ اللّٰهَ وَرَسُوۡلَهٗ فَاِنَّ لَهٗ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا٘ اَبَدًاؕ‏
quran.english: But [I have for you] only notification from Allah, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اِذَا رَاَوۡا مَا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَ فَسَيَعۡلَمُوۡنَ مَنۡ اَضۡعَفُ نَاصِرًا وَّاَقَلُّ عَدَدًا
quran.english: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اِنۡ اَدۡرِيۡ٘ اَقَرِيۡبٌ مَّا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ اَمۡ يَجۡعَلُ لَهٗ رَبِّيۡ٘ اَمَدًا
quran.english: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period

quran.arabic: عٰلِمُ الۡغَيۡبِ فَلَا يُظۡهِرُ عَلٰي غَيۡبِهٖ٘ اَحَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنِ ارۡتَضٰي مِنۡ رَّسُوۡلٍ فَاِنَّهٗ يَسۡلُكُ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِ يَدَيۡهِ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهٖ رَصَدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before each messenger and behind him observers

quran.arabic: لِّيَعۡلَمَ اَنۡ قَدۡ اَبۡلَغُوۡا رِسٰلٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَاَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيۡهِمۡ وَاَحۡصٰي كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ عَدَدًاࣖ‏
quran.english: That he may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡمُزَّمِّلُۙ‏
quran.english: O you who wraps himself [in clothing]

quran.arabic: قُمِ الَّيۡلَ اِلَّا قَلِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little

quran.arabic: نِّصۡفَهٗ٘ اَوِ انۡقُصۡ مِنۡهُ قَلِيۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: Half of it - or subtract from it a little

quran.arabic: اَوۡ زِدۡ عَلَيۡهِ وَرَتِّلِ الۡقُرۡاٰنَ تَرۡتِيۡلًاؕ‏
quran.english: Or add to it, and recite the Qur'an with measured recitation

quran.arabic: اِنَّا سَنُلۡقِيۡ عَلَيۡكَ قَوۡلًا ثَقِيۡلًا
quran.english: Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word

quran.arabic: اِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ الَّيۡلِ هِيَ اَشَدُّ وَطۡاً وَّاَقۡوَمُ قِيۡلًاؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words

quran.arabic: اِنَّ لَكَ فِي النَّهَارِ سَبۡحًا طَوِيۡلًاؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرِ اسۡمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلۡ اِلَيۡهِ تَبۡتِيۡلًاؕ‏
quran.english: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion

quran.arabic: رَبُّ الۡمَشۡرِقِ وَالۡمَغۡرِبِ لَا٘ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَ فَاتَّخِذۡهُ وَكِيۡلًا
quran.english: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs

quran.arabic: وَاصۡبِرۡ عَلٰي مَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ وَاهۡجُرۡهُمۡ هَجۡرًا جَمِيۡلًا
quran.english: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance

quran.arabic: وَذَرۡنِيۡ وَالۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ اُولِي النَّعۡمَةِ وَمَهِّلۡهُمۡ قَلِيۡلًا
quran.english: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little

quran.arabic: اِنَّ لَدَيۡنَا٘ اَنۡكَالًا وَّجَحِيۡمًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire

quran.arabic: وَّطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ وَّعَذَابًا اَلِيۡمًاࣞ‏
quran.english: And food that chokes and a painful punishment

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَرۡجُفُ الۡاَرۡضُ وَالۡجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ الۡجِبَالُ كَثِيۡبًا مَّهِيۡلًا
quran.english: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا٘ اِلَيۡكُمۡ رَسُوۡلًا ࣢ۙ شَاهِدًا عَلَيۡكُمۡ كَمَا٘ اَرۡسَلۡنَا٘ اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ رَسُوۡلًاؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger

quran.arabic: فَعَصٰي فِرۡعَوۡنُ الرَّسُوۡلَ فَاَخَذۡنٰهُ اَخۡذًا وَّبِيۡلًا
quran.english: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a ruinous seizure

quran.arabic: فَكَيۡفَ تَتَّقُوۡنَ اِنۡ كَفَرۡتُمۡ يَوۡمًا يَّجۡعَلُ الۡوِلۡدَانَ شِيۡبَاۙۖࣗ‏
quran.english: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white- haired

quran.arabic: اِۨلسَّمَآءُ مُنۡفَطِرٌۭ بِهٖؕ كَانَ وَعۡدُهٗ مَفۡعُوۡلًا
quran.english: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذِهٖ تَذۡكِرَةٌۚ فَمَنۡ شَآءَ اتَّخَذَ اِلٰي رَبِّهٖ سَبِيۡلًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way

quran.arabic: اِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعۡلَمُ اَنَّكَ تَقُوۡمُ اَدۡنٰي مِنۡ ثُلُثَيِ الَّيۡلِ وَنِصۡفَهٗ وَثُلُثَهٗ وَطَآئِفَةٌ مِّنَ الَّذِيۡنَ مَعَكَؕ وَاللّٰهُ يُقَدِّرُ الَّيۡلَ وَالنَّهَارَؕ عَلِمَ اَنۡ لَّنۡ تُحۡصُوۡهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَاقۡرَءُوۡا مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ الۡقُرۡاٰنِؕ عَلِمَ اَنۡ سَيَكُوۡنُ مِنۡكُمۡ مَّرۡضٰيۙ وَاٰخَرُوۡنَ يَضۡرِبُوۡنَ فِي الۡاَرۡضِ يَبۡتَغُوۡنَ مِنۡ فَضۡلِ اللّٰهِۙ وَاٰخَرُوۡنَ يُقَاتِلُوۡنَ فِيۡ سَبِيۡلِ اللّٰهِؗۖ فَاقۡرَءُوۡا مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنۡهُۙ وَاَقِيۡمُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاٰتُوا الزَّكٰوةَ وَاَقۡرِضُوا اللّٰهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنًاؕ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوۡا لِاَنۡفُسِكُمۡ مِّنۡ خَيۡرٍ تَجِدُوۡهُ عِنۡدَ اللّٰهِ هُوَ خَيۡرًا وَّاَعۡظَمَ اَجۡرًاؕ وَاسۡتَغۡفِرُوا اللّٰهَؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ غَفُوۡرٌ رَّحِيۡمٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, your Lord knows, [O Muhammad], that you stand [in prayer] almost two thirds of the night or half of it or a third of it, and [so do] a group of those with you. And Allah determines [the extent of] the night and the day. He has known that you [Muslims] will not be able to do it and has turned to you in forgiveness, so recite what is easy [for you] of the Qur'an. He has known that there will be among you those who are ill and others traveling throughout the land seeking [something] of the bounty of Allah and others fighting for the cause of Allah. So recite what is easy from it and establish prayer and give zakah and loan Allah a goodly loan. And whatever good you put forward for yourselves - you will find it with Allah. It is better and greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡمُدَّثِّرُۙ‏
quran.english: O you who covers himself [with a garment]

quran.arabic: قُمۡ فَاَنۡذِرۡۙ‏
quran.english: Arise and warn

quran.arabic: وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرۡۙ‏
quran.english: And your Lord glorify

quran.arabic: وَثِيَابَكَ فَطَهِّرۡۙ‏
quran.english: And your clothing purify

quran.arabic: وَالرُّجۡزَ فَاهۡجُرۡۙ‏
quran.english: And uncleanliness avoid

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَمۡنُنۡ تَسۡتَكۡثِرُۙ‏
quran.english: And do not confer favor to acquire more

quran.arabic: وَلِرَبِّكَ فَاصۡبِرۡؕ‏
quran.english: But for your Lord be patient

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا نُقِرَ فِي النَّاقُوۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: And when the trumpet is blown

quran.arabic: فَذٰلِكَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّوۡمٌ عَسِيۡرٌۙ‏
quran.english: That Day will be a difficult day

quran.arabic: عَلَي الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ غَيۡرُ يَسِيۡرٍ
quran.english: For the disbelievers - not easy

quran.arabic: ذَرۡنِيۡ وَمَنۡ خَلَقۡتُ وَحِيۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Leave Me with the one I created alone

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلۡتُ لَهٗ مَالًا مَّمۡدُوۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And to whom I granted extensive wealth

quran.arabic: وَّبَنِيۡنَ شُهُوۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And children present [with him]

quran.arabic: وَّمَهَّدۡتُّ لَهٗ تَمۡهِيۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: And spread [everything] before him, easing [his life]

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ يَطۡمَعُ اَنۡ اَزِيۡدَۙ‏
quran.english: Then he desires that I should add more

quran.arabic: كَلَّاؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ لِاٰيٰتِنَا عَنِيۡدًاؕ‏
