quran.english: No! Indeed, he has been toward Our verses obstinate

quran.arabic: سَاُرۡهِقُهٗ صَعُوۡدًاؕ‏
quran.english: I will cover him with arduous torment

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, he thought and deliberated

quran.arabic: فَقُتِلَ كَيۡفَ قَدَّرَۙ‏
quran.english: So may he be destroyed [for] how he deliberated

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ قُتِلَ كَيۡفَ قَدَّرَۙ‏
quran.english: Then may he be destroyed [for] how he deliberated
Then he considered [again]

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ عَبَسَ وَبَسَرَۙ‏
quran.english: Then he frowned and scowled

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَدۡبَرَ وَاسۡتَكۡبَرَۙ‏
quran.english: Then he turned back and was arrogant

quran.arabic: فَقَالَ اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا سِحۡرٌ يُّؤۡثَرُۙ‏
quran.english: And said, "This is not but magic imitated [from others]

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هٰذَا٘ اِلَّا قَوۡلُ الۡبَشَرِؕ‏
quran.english: This is not but the word of a human being

quran.arabic: سَاُصۡلِيۡهِ سَقَرَ
quran.english: I will drive him into Saqar

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا سَقَرُؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is Saqar

quran.arabic: لَا تُبۡقِيۡ وَلَا تَذَرُۚ‏
quran.english: It lets nothing remain and leaves nothing [unburned]

quran.arabic: لَوَّاحَةٌ لِّلۡبَشَرِۚ‏
quran.english: Blackening the skins

quran.arabic: عَلَيۡهَا تِسۡعَةَ عَشَرَؕ‏
quran.english: Over it are nineteen [angels]

quran.arabic: وَمَا جَعَلۡنَا٘ اَصۡحٰبَ النَّارِ اِلَّا مَلٰٓئِكَةًࣕ وَّمَا جَعَلۡنَا عِدَّتَهُمۡ اِلَّا فِتۡنَةً لِّلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡاۙ لِيَسۡتَيۡقِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡكِتٰبَ وَيَزۡدَادَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡ٘ا اِيۡمَانًا وَّلَا يَرۡتَابَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡكِتٰبَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۙ وَلِيَقُوۡلَ الَّذِيۡنَ فِيۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّرَضٌ وَّالۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ مَاذَا٘ اَرَادَ اللّٰهُ بِهٰذَا مَثَلًاؕ كَذٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ اللّٰهُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِيۡ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُؕ وَمَا يَعۡلَمُ جُنُوۡدَ رَبِّكَ اِلَّا هُوَؕ وَمَا هِيَ اِلَّا ذِكۡرٰي لِلۡبَشَرِࣖ‏
quran.english: And We have not made the keepers of the Fire except angels. And We have not made their number except as a trial for those who disbelieve - that those who were given the Scripture will be convinced and those who have believed will increase in faith and those who were given the Scripture and the believers will not doubt and that those in whose hearts is hypocrisy and the disbelievers will say, "What does Allah intend by this as an example?" Thus does Allah leave astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. And none knows the soldiers of your Lord except Him. And mention of the Fire is not but a reminder to humanity

quran.arabic: كَلَّا وَالۡقَمَرِۙ‏
quran.english: No! By the moon

quran.arabic: وَالَّيۡلِ اِذۡ اَدۡبَرَۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the night when it departs

quran.arabic: وَالصُّبۡحِ اِذَا٘ اَسۡفَرَۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the morning when it brightens

quran.arabic: اِنَّهَا لَاِحۡدَي الۡكُبَرِۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the Fire is of the greatest [afflictions]

quran.arabic: نَذِيۡرًا لِّلۡبَشَرِۙ‏
quran.english: As a warning to humanity

quran.arabic: لِمَنۡ شَآءَ مِنۡكُمۡ اَنۡ يَّتَقَدَّمَ اَوۡ يَتَاَخَّرَؕ‏
quran.english: To whoever wills among you to proceed or stay behind

quran.arabic: كُلُّ نَفۡسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡ رَهِيۡنَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: Every soul, for what it has earned, will be retained

quran.arabic: اِلَّا٘ اَصۡحٰبَ الۡيَمِيۡنِؕۛ‏
quran.english: Except the companions of the right

quran.arabic: فِيۡ جَنّٰتٍࣞۛ يَتَسَآءَلُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [Who will be] in gardens, questioning each other

quran.arabic: عَنِ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: About the criminals

quran.arabic: مَا سَلَكَكُمۡ فِيۡ سَقَرَ
quran.english: [And asking them], "What put you into Saqar

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا لَمۡ نَكُ مِنَ الۡمُصَلِّيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: They will say, "We were not of those who prayed

quran.arabic: وَلَمۡ نَكُ نُطۡعِمُ الۡمِسۡكِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Nor did we used to feed the poor

quran.arabic: وَكُنَّا نَخُوۡضُ مَعَ الۡخَآئِضِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it]

quran.arabic: وَكُنَّا نُكَذِّبُ بِيَوۡمِ الدِّيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And we used to deny the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: حَتّٰ٘ي اَتٰىنَا الۡيَقِيۡنُؕ‏
quran.english: Until there came to us the certainty

quran.arabic: فَمَا تَنۡفَعُهُمۡ شَفَاعَةُ الشّٰفِعِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: So there will not benefit them the intercession of [any] intercessors

quran.arabic: فَمَا لَهُمۡ عَنِ التَّذۡكِرَةِ مُعۡرِضِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away

quran.arabic: كَاَنَّهُمۡ حُمُرٌ مُّسۡتَنۡفِرَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: As if they were alarmed donkeys

quran.arabic: فَرَّتۡ مِنۡ قَسۡوَرَةٍؕ‏
quran.english: Fleeing from a lion

quran.arabic: بَلۡ يُرِيۡدُ كُلُّ امۡرِئٍ مِّنۡهُمۡ اَنۡ يُّؤۡتٰي صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةًۙ‏
quran.english: Rather, every person among them desires that he would be given scriptures spread about

quran.arabic: كَلَّاؕ بَلۡ لَّا يَخَافُوۡنَ الۡاٰخِرَةَؕ‏
quran.english: No! But they do not fear the Hereafter

quran.arabic: كَلَّا٘ اِنَّهٗ تَذۡكِرَةٌۚ‏
quran.english: No! Indeed, the Qur'an is a reminder

quran.arabic: فَمَنۡ شَآءَ ذَكَرَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: Then whoever wills will remember it

quran.arabic: وَمَا يَذۡكُرُوۡنَ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يَّشَآءَ اللّٰهُؕ هُوَ اَهۡلُ التَّقۡوٰي وَاَهۡلُ الۡمَغۡفِرَةِࣖ‏
quran.english: And they will not remember except that Allah wills. He is worthy of fear and adequate for [granting] forgiveness

quran.arabic: لَا٘ اُقۡسِمُ بِيَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِۙ‏
quran.english: I swear by the Day of Resurrection

quran.arabic: وَلَا٘ اُقۡسِمُ بِالنَّفۡسِ اللَّوَّامَةِ
quran.english: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection]

quran.arabic: اَيَحۡسَبُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ اَلَّنۡ نَّجۡمَعَ عِظَامَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones

quran.arabic: بَلٰي قٰدِرِيۡنَ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهٗ
quran.english: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips

quran.arabic: بَلۡ يُرِيۡدُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ لِيَفۡجُرَ اَمَامَهٗۚ‏
quran.english: But man desires to continue in sin

quran.arabic: يَسۡـَٔلُ اَيَّانَ يَوۡمُ الۡقِيٰمَةِؕ‏
quran.english: He asks, "When is the Day of Resurrection

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا بَرِقَ الۡبَصَرُۙ‏
quran.english: So when vision is dazzled

quran.arabic: وَخَسَفَ الۡقَمَرُۙ‏
quran.english: And the moon darkens

quran.arabic: وَجُمِعَ الشَّمۡسُ وَالۡقَمَرُۙ‏
quran.english: And the sun and the moon are joined

quran.arabic: يَقُوۡلُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ اَيۡنَ الۡمَفَرُّۚ‏
quran.english: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape

quran.arabic: كَلَّا لَا وَزَرَؕ‏
quran.english: No! There is no refuge

quran.arabic: اِلٰي رَبِّكَ يَوۡمَئِذِ اِۨلۡمُسۡتَقَرُّؕ‏
quran.english: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence

quran.arabic: يُنَبَّؤُا الۡاِنۡسَانُ يَوۡمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَاَخَّرَؕ‏
quran.english: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back

quran.arabic: بَلِ الۡاِنۡسَانُ عَلٰي نَفۡسِهٖ بَصِيۡرَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness

quran.arabic: وَّلَوۡ اَلۡقٰي مَعَاذِيۡرَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: Even if he presents his excuses

quran.arabic: لَا تُحَرِّكۡ بِهٖ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعۡجَلَ بِهٖؕ‏
quran.english: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muhammad], to hasten with recitation of the Qur'an

quran.arabic: اِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا جَمۡعَهٗ وَقُرۡاٰنَهٗۚۖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا قَرَاۡنٰهُ فَاتَّبِعۡ قُرۡاٰنَهٗۚ‏
quran.english: So when We have recited it [through Gabriel], then follow its recitation

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا بَيَانَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you]

quran.arabic: كَلَّا بَلۡ تُحِبُّوۡنَ الۡعَاجِلَةَۙ‏
quran.english: No! But you love the immediate

quran.arabic: وَتَذَرُوۡنَ الۡاٰخِرَةَؕ‏
quran.english: And leave the Hereafter

quran.arabic: وُجُوۡهٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ نَّاضِرَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant

quran.arabic: اِلٰي رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٌۚ‏
quran.english: Looking at their Lord

quran.arabic: وَوُجُوۡهٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍۭ بَاسِرَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted

quran.arabic: تَظُنُّ اَنۡ يُّفۡعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةٌؕ‏
quran.english: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking

quran.arabic: كَلَّا٘ اِذَا بَلَغَتِ التَّرَاقِيَۙ‏
quran.english: No! When the soul has reached the collar bones

quran.arabic: وَقِيۡلَ مَنۡࣝ رَاقٍۙ‏
quran.english: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]

quran.arabic: وَّظَنَّ اَنَّهُ الۡفِرَاقُۙ‏
quran.english: And the dying one is certain that it is the [time of] separation

quran.arabic: وَالۡتَفَّتِ السَّاقُ بِالسَّاقِۙ‏
quran.english: And the leg is wound about the leg

quran.arabic: اِلٰي رَبِّكَ يَوۡمَئِذِ اِۨلۡمَسَاقُؕࣖ‏
quran.english: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession

quran.arabic: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed

quran.arabic: وَلٰكِنۡ كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: But [instead], he denied and turned away

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ اِلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِهٖ يَتَمَطّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride]

quran.arabic: اَوۡلٰي لَكَ فَاَوۡلٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Woe to you, and woe

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَوۡلٰي لَكَ فَاَوۡلٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Then woe to you, and woe

quran.arabic: اَيَحۡسَبُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ اَنۡ يُّتۡرَكَ سُدًيؕ‏
quran.english: Does man think that he will be left neglected

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَكُ نُطۡفَةً مِّنۡ مَّنِيٍّ يُّمۡنٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Had he not been a sperm from semen emitted

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقَ فَسَوّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allah] created [his form] and proportioned [him]

quran.arabic: فَجَعَلَ مِنۡهُ الزَّوۡجَيۡنِ الذَّكَرَ وَالۡاُنۡثٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And made of him two mates, the male and the female

quran.arabic: اَلَيۡسَ ذٰلِكَ بِقٰدِرٍ عَلٰ٘ي اَنۡ يُّحۡيِۦَ الۡمَوۡتٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead

quran.arabic: هَلۡ اَتٰي عَلَي الۡاِنۡسَانِ حِيۡنٌ مِّنَ الدَّهۡرِ لَمۡ يَكُنۡ شَيۡـًٔا مَّذۡكُوۡرًا
quran.english: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned

quran.arabic: اِنَّا خَلَقۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍ اَمۡشَاجٍࣗۖ نَّبۡتَلِيۡهِ فَجَعَلۡنٰهُ سَمِيۡعًاۭ بَصِيۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing

quran.arabic: اِنَّا هَدَيۡنٰهُ السَّبِيۡلَ اِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَّاِمَّا كَفُوۡرًا
quran.english: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ سَلٰسِلَا۠ وَاَغۡلٰلًا وَّسَعِيۡرًا
quran.english: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡاَبۡرَارَ يَشۡرَبُوۡنَ مِنۡ كَاۡسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُوۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kafur

quran.arabic: عَيۡنًا يَّشۡرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ اللّٰهِ يُفَجِّرُوۡنَهَا تَفۡجِيۡرًا
quran.english: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance]

quran.arabic: يُوۡفُوۡنَ بِالنَّذۡرِ وَيَخَافُوۡنَ يَوۡمًا كَانَ شَرُّهٗ مُسۡتَطِيۡرًا
quran.english: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread

quran.arabic: وَيُطۡعِمُوۡنَ الطَّعَامَ عَلٰي حُبِّهٖ مِسۡكِيۡنًا وَّيَتِيۡمًا وَّاَسِيۡرًا
quran.english: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا نُطۡعِمُكُمۡ لِوَجۡهِ اللّٰهِ لَا نُرِيۡدُ مِنۡكُمۡ جَزَآءً وَّلَا شُكُوۡرًا
quran.english: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude

quran.arabic: اِنَّا نَخَافُ مِنۡ رَّبِّنَا يَوۡمًا عَبُوۡسًا قَمۡطَرِيۡرًا
quran.english: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful

quran.arabic: فَوَقٰىهُمُ اللّٰهُ شَرَّ ذٰلِكَ الۡيَوۡمِ وَلَقّٰىهُمۡ نَضۡرَةً وَّسُرُوۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

quran.arabic: وَجَزٰىهُمۡ بِمَا صَبَرُوۡا جَنَّةً وَّحَرِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments]

quran.arabic: مُّتَّكِـِٕيۡنَ فِيۡهَا عَلَي الۡاَرَآئِكِۚ لَا يَرَوۡنَ فِيۡهَا شَمۡسًا وَّلَا زَمۡهَرِيۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold

quran.arabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيۡهِمۡ ظِلٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتۡ قُطُوۡفُهَا تَذۡلِيۡلًا
quran.english: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance

quran.arabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِاٰنِيَةٍ مِّنۡ فِضَّةٍ وَّاَكۡوَابٍ كَانَتۡ قَوَارِيۡرَا۠ۙ‏
quran.english: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass]

quran.arabic: قَوَارِيۡرَا۠ مِنۡ فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوۡهَا تَقۡدِيۡرًا
quran.english: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure

quran.arabic: وَيُسۡقَوۡنَ فِيۡهَا كَاۡسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنۡجَبِيۡلًاۚ‏
quran.english: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

quran.arabic: عَيۡنًا فِيۡهَا تُسَمّٰي سَلۡسَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel

quran.arabic: وَيَطُوۡفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَانٌ مُّخَلَّدُوۡنَۚ اِذَا رَاَيۡتَهُمۡ حَسِبۡتَهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤًا مَّنۡثُوۡرًا
quran.english: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاَيۡتَ ثَمَّ رَاَيۡتَ نَعِيۡمًا وَّمُلۡكًا كَبِيۡرًا
quran.english: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion

quran.arabic: عٰلِيَهُمۡ ثِيَابُ سُنۡدُسٍ خُضۡرٌ وَّاِسۡتَبۡرَقٌؗ وَّحُلُّوۡ٘ا اَسَاوِرَ مِنۡ فِضَّةٍۚ وَسَقٰىهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ شَرَابًا طَهُوۡرًا
quran.english: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ جَزَآءً وَّكَانَ سَعۡيُكُمۡ مَّشۡكُوۡرًاࣖ‏
quran.english: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated

quran.arabic: اِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ الۡقُرۡاٰنَ تَنۡزِيۡلًاۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur'an progressively

quran.arabic: فَاصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعۡ مِنۡهُمۡ اٰثِمًا اَوۡ كَفُوۡرًاۚ‏
quran.english: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever]

quran.arabic: وَاذۡكُرِ اسۡمَ رَبِّكَ بُكۡرَةً وَّاَصِيۡلًاۖۚ‏
quran.english: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening

quran.arabic: وَمِنَ الَّيۡلِ فَاسۡجُدۡ لَهٗ وَسَبِّحۡهُ لَيۡلًا طَوِيۡلًا
quran.english: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt Him a long [part of the] night

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّوۡنَ الۡعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُوۡنَ وَرَآءَهُمۡ يَوۡمًا ثَقِيۡلًا
quran.english: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day

quran.arabic: نَحۡنُ خَلَقۡنٰهُمۡ وَشَدَدۡنَا٘ اَسۡرَهُمۡۚ وَاِذَا شِئۡنَا بَدَّلۡنَا٘ اَمۡثَالَهُمۡ تَبۡدِيۡلًا
quran.english: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذِهٖ تَذۡكِرَةٌۚ فَمَنۡ شَآءَ اتَّخَذَ اِلٰي رَبِّهٖ سَبِيۡلًا
quran.english: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way

quran.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُوۡنَ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يَّشَآءَ اللّٰهُؕ اِنَّ اللّٰهَ كَانَ عَلِيۡمًا حَكِيۡمًاࣗۙۖ‏
quran.english: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise

quran.arabic: يُّدۡخِلُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ فِيۡ رَحۡمَتِهٖؕ وَالظّٰلِمِيۡنَ اَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا اَلِيۡمًاࣖ‏
quran.english: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment

quran.arabic: وَالۡمُرۡسَلٰتِ عُرۡفًاۙ‏
quran.english: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts

quran.arabic: فَالۡعٰصِفٰتِ عَصۡفًاۙ‏
quran.english: And the winds that blow violently

quran.arabic: وَّالنّٰشِرٰتِ نَشۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the winds that spread [clouds]

quran.arabic: فَالۡفٰرِقٰتِ فَرۡقًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those [angels] who bring criterion

quran.arabic: فَالۡمُلۡقِيٰتِ ذِكۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those [angels] who deliver a message

quran.arabic: عُذۡرًا اَوۡ نُذۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: As justification or warning

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ لَوَاقِعٌؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا النُّجُوۡمُ طُمِسَتۡۙ‏
quran.english: So when the stars are obliterated

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا السَّمَآءُ فُرِجَتۡۙ‏
quran.english: And when the heaven is opened

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡجِبَالُ نُسِفَتۡۙ‏
quran.english: And when the mountains are blown away

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الرُّسُلُ اُقِّتَتۡؕ‏
quran.english: And when the messengers' time has come

quran.arabic: لِاَيِّ يَوۡمٍ اُجِّلَتۡؕ‏
quran.english: For what Day was it postponed

quran.arabic: لِيَوۡمِ الۡفَصۡلِۚ‏
quran.english: For the Day of Judgement

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا يَوۡمُ الۡفَصۡلِؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is the Day of Judgement

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ نُهۡلِكِ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Did We not destroy the former peoples

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ نُتۡبِعُهُمُ الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَ
quran.english: Then We will follow them with the later ones

quran.arabic: كَذٰلِكَ نَفۡعَلُ بِالۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ
quran.english: Thus do We deal with the criminals

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ نَخۡلُقۡكُّمۡ مِّنۡ مَّآءٍ مَّهِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained

quran.arabic: فَجَعَلۡنٰهُ فِيۡ قَرَارٍ مَّكِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: And We placed it in a firm lodging

quran.arabic: اِلٰي قَدَرٍ مَّعۡلُوۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: For a known extent

quran.arabic: فَقَدَرۡنَاࣗۖ فَنِعۡمَ الۡقٰدِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ نَجۡعَلِ الۡاَرۡضَ كِفَاتًاۙ‏
quran.english: Have We not made the earth a container

quran.arabic: اَحۡيَآءً وَّاَمۡوَاتًاۙ‏
quran.english: Of the living and the dead

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلۡنَا فِيۡهَا رَوَاسِيَ شٰمِخٰتٍ وَّاَسۡقَيۡنٰكُمۡ مَّآءً فُرَاتًاؕ‏
quran.english: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: اِنۡطَلِقُوۡ٘ا اِلٰي مَا كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny

quran.arabic: اِنۡطَلِقُوۡ٘ا اِلٰي ظِلٍّ ذِيۡ ثَلٰثِ شُعَبٍۙ‏
quran.english: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns

quran.arabic: لَّا ظَلِيۡلٍ وَّلَا يُغۡنِيۡ مِنَ اللَّهَبِؕ‏
quran.english: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame

quran.arabic: اِنَّهَا تَرۡمِيۡ بِشَرَرٍ كَالۡقَصۡرِۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress

quran.arabic: كَاَنَّهٗ جِمٰلَتٌ صُفۡرٌؕ‏
quran.english: As if they were yellowish [black] camels

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: هٰذَا يَوۡمُ لَا يَنۡطِقُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: This is a Day they will not speak

quran.arabic: وَلَا يُؤۡذَنُ لَهُمۡ فَيَعۡتَذِرُوۡنَ
quran.english: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: هٰذَا يَوۡمُ الۡفَصۡلِۚ جَمَعۡنٰكُمۡ وَالۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ
quran.english: This is the Day of Judgement; We will have assembled you and the former peoples

quran.arabic: فَاِنۡ كَانَ لَكُمۡ كَيۡدٌ فَكِيۡدُوۡنِ
quran.english: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ فِيۡ ظِلٰلٍ وَّعُيُوۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs

quran.arabic: وَّفَوَاكِهَ مِمَّا يَشۡتَهُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And fruits from whatever they desire

quran.arabic: كُلُوۡا وَاشۡرَبُوۡا هَنِيۡٓـًٔاۭ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do

quran.arabic: اِنَّا كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ
quran.english: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: كُلُوۡا وَتَمَتَّعُوۡا قَلِيۡلًا اِنَّكُمۡ مُّجۡرِمُوۡنَ
quran.english: [O disbelievers], eat and enjoy yourselves a little; indeed, you are criminals

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمُ ارۡكَعُوۡا لَا يَرۡكَعُوۡنَ
quran.english: And when it is said to them, "Bow [in prayer]," they do not bow

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: فَبِاَيِّ حَدِيۡثٍۭ بَعۡدَهٗ يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Then in what statement after the Qur'an will they believe

quran.arabic: عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُوۡنَۚ‏
quran.english: About what are they asking one another

quran.arabic: عَنِ النَّبَاِ الۡعَظِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: About the great news

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ هُمۡ فِيۡهِ مُخۡتَلِفُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: That over which they are in disagreement

quran.arabic: كَلَّا سَيَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: No! They are going to know

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
quran.english: Then, no! They are going to know

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ نَجۡعَلِ الۡاَرۡضَ مِهٰدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Have We not made the earth a resting place

quran.arabic: وَّالۡجِبَالَ اَوۡتَادًاۙ‏
quran.english: And the mountains as stakes

quran.arabic: وَّخَلَقۡنٰكُمۡ اَزۡوَاجًاۙ‏
quran.english: And We created you in pairs

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلۡنَا نَوۡمَكُمۡ سُبَاتًاۙ‏
quran.english: And made your sleep [a means for] rest

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلۡنَا الَّيۡلَ لِبَاسًاۙ‏
quran.english: And made the night as clothing

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلۡنَا النَّهَارَ مَعَاشًاۚ‏
quran.english: And made the day for livelihood

quran.arabic: وَبَنَيۡنَا فَوۡقَكُمۡ سَبۡعًا شِدَادًاۙ‏
quran.english: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens]

quran.arabic: وَّجَعَلۡنَا سِرَاجًا وَّهَّاجًاۙ‏
quran.english: And made [therein] a burning lamp

quran.arabic: وَّاَنۡزَلۡنَا مِنَ الۡمُعۡصِرٰتِ مَآءً ثَجَّاجًاۙ‏
quran.english: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water

quran.arabic: لِّنُخۡرِجَ بِهٖ حَبًّا وَّنَبَاتًاۙ‏
quran.english: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation

quran.arabic: وَّجَنّٰتٍ اَلۡفَافًاؕ‏
quran.english: And gardens of entwined growth

quran.arabic: اِنَّ يَوۡمَ الۡفَصۡلِ كَانَ مِيۡقَاتًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is an appointed time

quran.arabic: يَّوۡمَ يُنۡفَخُ فِي الصُّوۡرِ فَتَاۡتُوۡنَ اَفۡوَاجًاۙ‏
quran.english: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes

quran.arabic: وَّفُتِحَتِ السَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتۡ اَبۡوَابًاۙ‏
quran.english: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways

quran.arabic: وَّسُيِّرَتِ الۡجِبَالُ فَكَانَتۡ سَرَابًاؕ‏
quran.english: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage

quran.arabic: اِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتۡ مِرۡصَادًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait

quran.arabic: لِّلطّٰغِيۡنَ مَاٰبًاۙ‏
quran.english: For the transgressors, a place of return

quran.arabic: لّٰبِثِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا٘ اَحۡقَابًاۚ‏
quran.english: In which they will remain for ages [unending]

quran.arabic: لَا يَذُوۡقُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا بَرۡدًا وَّلَا شَرَابًاۙ‏
quran.english: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink

quran.arabic: اِلَّا حَمِيۡمًا وَّغَسَّاقًاۙ‏
quran.english: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence

quran.arabic: جَزَآءً وِّفَاقًاؕ‏
quran.english: An appropriate recompense

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا لَا يَرۡجُوۡنَ حِسَابًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, they were not expecting an account

quran.arabic: وَّكَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا كِذَّابًاؕ‏
quran.english: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial

quran.arabic: وَكُلَّ شَيۡءٍ اَحۡصَيۡنٰهُ كِتٰبًاۙ‏
quran.english: But all things We have enumerated in writing

quran.arabic: فَذُوۡقُوۡا فَلَنۡ نَّزِيۡدَكُمۡ اِلَّا عَذَابًاࣖ‏
quran.english: So taste [the penalty], and never will We increase you except in torment

quran.arabic: اِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ مَفَازًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment

quran.arabic: حَدَآئِقَ وَاَعۡنَابًاۙ‏
quran.english: Gardens and grapevines

quran.arabic: وَّكَوَاعِبَ اَتۡرَابًاۙ‏
quran.english: And full-breasted [companions] of equal age

quran.arabic: وَّكَاۡسًا دِهَاقًاؕ‏
quran.english: And a full cup

quran.arabic: لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا لَغۡوًا وَّلَا كِذّٰبًاۚۖ‏
quran.english: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood

quran.arabic: جَزَآءً مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابًاۙ‏
quran.english: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account

quran.arabic: رَّبِّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا الرَّحۡمٰنِ لَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ مِنۡهُ خِطَابًاۚ‏
quran.english: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَقُوۡمُ الرُّوۡحُ وَالۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّاؕࣗۙ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُوۡنَ اِلَّا مَنۡ اَذِنَ لَهُ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا
quran.english: The Day that the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct

quran.arabic: ذٰلِكَ الۡيَوۡمُ الۡحَقُّۚ فَمَنۡ شَآءَ اتَّخَذَ اِلٰي رَبِّهٖ مَاٰبًا
quran.english: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَنۡذَرۡنٰكُمۡ عَذَابًا قَرِيۡبًا ࣢ۚۖ يَّوۡمَ يَنۡظُرُ الۡمَرۡءُ مَا قَدَّمَتۡ يَدٰهُ وَيَقُوۡلُ الۡكَافِرُ يٰلَيۡتَنِيۡ كُنۡتُ تُرٰبًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have warned you of a near punishment on the Day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth and the disbeliever will say, "Oh, I wish that I were dust

quran.arabic: وَالنّٰزِعٰتِ غَرۡقًاۙ‏
quran.english: By those [angels] who extract with violence

quran.arabic: وَّالنّٰشِطٰتِ نَشۡطًاۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] those who remove with ease

quran.arabic: وَّالسّٰبِحٰتِ سَبۡحًاۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming

quran.arabic: فَالسّٰبِقٰتِ سَبۡقًاۙ‏
quran.english: And those who race each other in a race

quran.arabic: فَالۡمُدَبِّرٰتِ اَمۡرًاۘ‏
quran.english: And those who arrange [each] matter

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَرۡجُفُ الرَّاجِفَةُۙ‏
quran.english: On the Day the blast [of the Horn] will convulse [creation]

quran.arabic: تَتۡبَعُهَا الرَّادِفَةُؕ‏
quran.english: There will follow it the subsequent [one]

quran.arabic: قُلُوۡبٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ وَّاجِفَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: Hearts, that Day, will tremble

quran.arabic: اَبۡصَارُهَا خَاشِعَةٌۘ‏
quran.english: Their eyes humbled

quran.arabic: يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ ءَاِنَّا لَمَرۡدُوۡدُوۡنَ فِي الۡحَافِرَةِؕ‏
quran.english: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]

quran.arabic: ءَاِذَا كُنَّا عِظَامًا نَّخِرَةًؕ‏
quran.english: Even if we should be decayed bones

quran.arabic: قَالُوۡا تِلۡكَ اِذًا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌۘ‏
quran.english: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّمَا هِيَ زَجۡرَةٌ وَّاحِدَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it will be but one shout

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا هُمۡ بِالسَّاهِرَةِؕ‏
quran.english: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth's surface

quran.arabic: هَلۡ اَتٰىكَ حَدِيۡثُ مُوۡسٰيۘ‏
quran.english: Has there reached you the story of Moses

quran.arabic: اِذۡ نَادٰىهُ رَبُّهٗ بِالۡوَادِ الۡمُقَدَّسِ طُوًيۚ‏
quran.english: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa

quran.arabic: اِذۡهَبۡ اِلٰي فِرۡعَوۡنَ اِنَّهٗ طَغٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed

quran.arabic: فَقُلۡ هَلۡ لَّكَ اِلٰ٘ي اَنۡ تَزَكّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And say to him, 'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself

quran.arabic: وَاَهۡدِيَكَ اِلٰي رَبِّكَ فَتَخۡشٰيۚ‏
quran.english: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]

quran.arabic: فَاَرٰىهُ الۡاٰيَةَ الۡكُبۡرٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: And he showed him the greatest sign

quran.arabic: فَكَذَّبَ وَعَصٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: But Pharaoh denied and disobeyed

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَدۡبَرَ يَسۡعٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: Then he turned his back, striving

quran.arabic: فَحَشَرَࣞ فَنَادٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: And he gathered [his people] and called out

quran.arabic: فَقَالَ اَنَا رَبُّكُمُ الۡاَعۡلٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: And said, "I am your most exalted lord

quran.arabic: فَاَخَذَهُ اللّٰهُ نَكَالَ الۡاٰخِرَةِ وَالۡاُوۡلٰيؕ‏
quran.english: So Allah seized him in exemplary punishment for the last and the first [transgression]

quran.arabic: اِنَّ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةً لِّمَنۡ يَّخۡشٰيؕࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah]

quran.arabic: ءَاَنۡتُمۡ اَشَدُّ خَلۡقًا اَمِ السَّمَآءُؕ بَنٰىهَاࣞ‏
quran.english: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it

quran.arabic: رَفَعَ سَمۡكَهَا فَسَوّٰىهَاۙ‏
quran.english: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it

quran.arabic: وَاَغۡطَشَ لَيۡلَهَا وَاَخۡرَجَ ضُحٰىهَاࣕ‏
quran.english: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness

quran.arabic: وَالۡاَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ ذٰلِكَ دَحٰىهَاؕ‏
quran.english: And after that He spread the earth

quran.arabic: اَخۡرَجَ مِنۡهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرۡعٰىهَاࣕ‏
quran.english: He extracted from it its water and its pasture

quran.arabic: وَالۡجِبَالَ اَرۡسٰىهَاۙ‏
quran.english: And the mountains He set firmly

quran.arabic: مَتَاعًا لَّكُمۡ وَ لِاَنۡعَامِكُمۡؕ‏
quran.english: As provision for you and your grazing livestock

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا جَآءَتِ الطَّآمَّةُ الۡكُبۡرٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَتَذَكَّرُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ مَا سَعٰيۙ‏
quran.english: The Day when man will remember that for which he strove

quran.arabic: وَبُرِّزَتِ الۡجَحِيۡمُ لِمَنۡ يَّرٰي
quran.english: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا مَنۡ طَغٰيۙ‏
quran.english: So as for he who transgressed

quran.arabic: وَاٰثَرَ الۡحَيٰوةَ الدُّنۡيَاۙ‏
quran.english: And preferred the life of the world

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّ الۡجَحِيۡمَ هِيَ الۡمَاۡوٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا مَنۡ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهٖ وَنَهَي النَّفۡسَ عَنِ الۡهَوٰيۙ‏
quran.english: But as for he who feared the position of his Lord and prevented the soul from [unlawful] inclination

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّ الۡجَنَّةَ هِيَ الۡمَاۡوٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge

quran.arabic: يَسۡـَٔلُوۡنَكَ عَنِ السَّاعَةِ اَيَّانَ مُرۡسٰىهَاؕ‏
quran.english: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival

quran.arabic: فِيۡمَ اَنۡتَ مِنۡ ذِكۡرٰىهَاؕ‏
quran.english: In what [position] are you that you should mention it

quran.arabic: اِلٰي رَبِّكَ مُنۡتَهٰىهَاؕ‏
quran.english: To your Lord is its finality

quran.arabic: اِنَّمَا٘ اَنۡتَ مُنۡذِرُ مَنۡ يَّخۡشٰىهَاؕ‏
quran.english: You are only a warner for those who fear it

quran.arabic: كَاَنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَ يَرَوۡنَهَا لَمۡ يَلۡبَثُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا عَشِيَّةً اَوۡ ضُحٰىهَاࣖ‏
quran.english: It will be, on the Day they see it, as though they had not remained [in the world] except for an afternoon or a morning thereof

quran.arabic: عَبَسَ وَتَوَلّٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: The Prophet frowned and turned away

quran.arabic: اَنۡ جَآءَهُ الۡاَعۡمٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting]

quran.arabic: وَمَا يُدۡرِيۡكَ لَعَلَّهٗ يَزَّكّٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified

quran.arabic: اَوۡ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنۡفَعَهُ الذِّكۡرٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him

quran.arabic: اَمَّا مَنِ اسۡتَغۡنٰيۙ‏
quran.english: As for he who thinks himself without need

quran.arabic: فَاَنۡتَ لَهٗ تَصَدّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: To him you give attention

quran.arabic: وَمَا عَلَيۡكَ اَلَّا يَزَّكّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And not upon you [is any blame] if he will not be purified

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا مَنۡ جَآءَكَ يَسۡعٰيۙ‏
quran.english: But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ يَخۡشٰيۙ‏
quran.english: While he fears [Allah]

quran.arabic: فَاَنۡتَ عَنۡهُ تَلَهّٰيۚ‏
quran.english: From him you are distracted

quran.arabic: كَلَّا٘ اِنَّهَا تَذۡكِرَةٌۚ‏
quran.english: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder

quran.arabic: فَمَنۡ شَآءَ ذَكَرَهٗۘ‏
quran.english: So whoever wills may remember it

quran.arabic: فِيۡ صُحُفٍ مُّكَرَّمَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: [It is recorded] in honored sheets

quran.arabic: مَّرۡفُوۡعَةٍ مُّطَهَّرَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: Exalted and purified

quran.arabic: ۭ بِاَيۡدِيۡ سَفَرَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: [Carried] by the hands of messenger-angels

quran.arabic: كِرَامٍۭ بَرَرَةٍؕ‏
quran.english: Noble and dutiful

quran.arabic: قُتِلَ الۡاِنۡسَانُ مَا٘ اَكۡفَرَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he

quran.arabic: مِنۡ اَيِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: From what substance did He create him

quran.arabic: مِنۡ نُّطۡفَةٍؕ خَلَقَهٗ فَقَدَّرَهٗۙ‏
quran.english: From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ السَّبِيۡلَ يَسَّرَهٗۙ‏
quran.english: Then He eased the way for him

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اَمَاتَهٗ فَاَقۡبَرَهٗۙ‏
quran.english: Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِذَا شَآءَ اَنۡشَرَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: Then when He wills, He will resurrect him

quran.arabic: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقۡضِ مَا٘ اَمَرَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him

quran.arabic: فَلۡيَنۡظُرِ الۡاِنۡسَانُ اِلٰي طَعَامِهٖ٘ۙ‏
quran.english: Then let mankind look at his food

quran.arabic: اَنَّا صَبَبۡنَا الۡمَآءَ صَبًّاۙ‏
quran.english: How We poured down water in torrents

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ شَقَقۡنَا الۡاَرۡضَ شَقًّاۙ‏
quran.english: Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts]

quran.arabic: فَاَنۭۡ بَتۡنَا فِيۡهَا حَبًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And caused to grow within it grain

quran.arabic: وَّعِنَبًا وَّقَضۡبًاۙ‏
quran.english: And grapes and herbage

quran.arabic: وَّزَيۡتُوۡنًا وَّنَخۡلًاۙ‏
quran.english: And olive and palm trees

quran.arabic: وَّحَدَآئِقَ غُلۡبًاۙ‏
quran.english: And gardens of dense shrubbery

quran.arabic: وَّفَاكِهَةً وَّاَبًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And fruit and grass

quran.arabic: مَّتَاعًا لَّكُمۡ وَلِاَنۡعَامِكُمۡؕ‏
quran.english: [As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا جَآءَتِ الصَّآخَّةُؗ‏
quran.english: But when there comes the Deafening Blast

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَفِرُّ الۡمَرۡءُ مِنۡ اَخِيۡهِۙ‏
quran.english: On the Day a man will flee from his brother

quran.arabic: وَاُمِّهٖ وَاَبِيۡهِۙ‏
quran.english: And his mother and his father

quran.arabic: وَصَاحِبَتِهٖ وَبَنِيۡهِؕ‏
quran.english: And his wife and his children

quran.arabic: لِكُلِّ امۡرِئٍ مِّنۡهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٍ شَاۡنٌ يُّغۡنِيۡهِؕ‏
quran.english: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him

quran.arabic: وُجُوۡهٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ مُّسۡفِرَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: [Some] faces, that Day, will be bright

quran.arabic: ضَاحِكَةٌ مُّسۡتَبۡشِرَةٌۚ‏
quran.english: Laughing, rejoicing at good news

quran.arabic: وَوُجُوۡهٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ عَلَيۡهَا غَبَرَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust

quran.arabic: تَرۡهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌؕ‏
quran.english: Blackness will cover them

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمُ الۡكَفَرَةُ الۡفَجَرَةُࣖ‏
quran.english: Those are the disbelievers, the wicked ones

quran.arabic: اِذَا الشَّمۡسُ كُوِّرَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا النُّجُوۡمُ انۡكَدَرَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when the stars fall, dispersing

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when the mountains are removed

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡعِشَارُ عُطِّلَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when full-term she-camels are neglected

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡوُحُوۡشُ حُشِرَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when the wild beasts are gathered

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡبِحَارُ سُجِّرَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when the seas are filled with flame

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا النُّفُوۡسُ زُوِّجَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when the souls are paired

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡمَوۡءٗدَةُ سُئِلَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked

quran.arabic: بِاَيِّ ذَنۭۡ بٍ قُتِلَتۡۚ‏
quran.english: For what sin she was killed

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الصُّحُفُ نُشِرَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when the pages are made public

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا السَّمَآءُ كُشِطَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when the sky is stripped away

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡجَحِيۡمُ سُعِّرَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when Hellfire is set ablaze

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡجَنَّةُ اُزۡلِفَتۡࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And when Paradise is brought near

quran.arabic: عَلِمَتۡ نَفۡسٌ مَّا٘ اَحۡضَرَتۡؕ‏
quran.english: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it]

quran.arabic: فَلَا٘ اُقۡسِمُ بِالۡخُنَّسِۙ‏
quran.english: So I swear by the retreating stars

quran.arabic: الۡجَوَارِ الۡكُنَّسِۙ‏
quran.english: Those that run [their courses] and disappear

quran.arabic: وَالَّيۡلِ اِذَا عَسۡعَسَۙ‏
quran.english: And by the night as it closes in

quran.arabic: وَالصُّبۡحِ اِذَا تَنَفَّسَۙ‏
quran.english: And by the dawn when it breathes

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ لَقَوۡلُ رَسُوۡلٍ كَرِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger

quran.arabic: ذِيۡ قُوَّةٍ عِنۡدَ ذِي الۡعَرۡشِ مَكِيۡنٍۙ‏
quran.english: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position]

quran.arabic: مُّطَاعٍ ثَمَّ اَمِيۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy

quran.arabic: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُمۡ بِمَجۡنُوۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: And your companion is not [at all] mad

quran.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ رَاٰهُ بِالۡاُفُقِ الۡمُبِيۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon

quran.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَي الۡغَيۡبِ بِضَنِيۡنٍۚ‏
quran.english: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen

quran.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوۡلِ شَيۡطٰنٍ رَّجِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: And the Qur'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens]

quran.arabic: فَاَيۡنَ تَذۡهَبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: So where are you going

quran.arabic: اِنۡ هُوَ اِلَّا ذِكۡرٌ لِّلۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: It is not except a reminder to the worlds

quran.arabic: لِمَنۡ شَآءَ مِنۡكُمۡ اَنۡ يَّسۡتَقِيۡمَؕ‏
quran.english: For whoever wills among you to take a right course

quran.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُوۡنَ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يَّشَآءَ اللّٰهُ رَبُّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: اِذَا السَّمَآءُ انۡفَطَرَتۡۙ‏
quran.english: When the sky breaks apart

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡكَوَاكِبُ انۡتَثَرَتۡۙ‏
quran.english: And when the stars fall, scattering

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡبِحَارُ فُجِّرَتۡۙ‏
quran.english: And when the seas are erupted

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡقُبُوۡرُ بُعۡثِرَتۡۙ‏
quran.english: And when the [contents of] graves are scattered

quran.arabic: عَلِمَتۡ نَفۡسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتۡ وَاَخَّرَتۡؕ‏
quran.english: A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡاِنۡسَانُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ الۡكَرِيۡمِۙ‏
quran.english: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَكَ فَسَوّٰىكَ فَعَدَلَكَۙ‏
quran.english: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you

quran.arabic: فِيۡ٘ اَيِّ صُوۡرَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَؕ‏
quran.english: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you

quran.arabic: كَلَّا بَلۡ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَ بِالدِّيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: No! But you deny the Recompense

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ لَحٰفِظِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers

quran.arabic: كِرَامًا كٰتِبِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Noble and recording

quran.arabic: يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ مَا تَفۡعَلُوۡنَ
quran.english: They know whatever you do

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡاَبۡرَارَ لَفِيۡ نَعِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure

quran.arabic: وَّاِنَّ الۡفُجَّارَ لَفِيۡ جَحِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire

quran.arabic: يَّصۡلَوۡنَهَا يَوۡمَ الدِّيۡنِ
quran.english: They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: وَمَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا بِغَآئِبِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And never therefrom will they be absent

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا يَوۡمُ الدِّيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ مَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا يَوۡمُ الدِّيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٌ لِّنَفۡسٍ شَيۡـًٔاؕ وَالۡاَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلّٰهِࣖ‏
quran.english: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allah

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ لِّلۡمُطَفِّفِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Woe to those who give less [than due]

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ اِذَا اكۡتَالُوۡا عَلَي النَّاسِ يَسۡتَوۡفُوۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا كَالُوۡهُمۡ اَوۡ وَّزَنُوۡهُمۡ يُخۡسِرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss

quran.arabic: اَلَا يَظُنُّ اُولٰٓئِكَ اَنَّهُمۡ مَّبۡعُوۡثُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Do they not think that they will be resurrected

quran.arabic: لِيَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: For a tremendous Day

quran.arabic: يَّوۡمَ يَقُوۡمُ النَّاسُ لِرَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds

quran.arabic: كَلَّا٘ اِنَّ كِتٰبَ الۡفُجَّارِ لَفِيۡ سِجِّيۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا سِجِّيۡنٌؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is sijjeen

quran.arabic: كِتٰبٌ مَّرۡقُوۡمٌؕ‏
quran.english: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ يُكَذِّبُوۡنَ بِيَوۡمِ الدِّيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: Who deny the Day of Recompense

quran.arabic: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهٖ٘ اِلَّا كُلُّ مُعۡتَدٍ اَثِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor

quran.arabic: اِذَا تُتۡلٰي عَلَيۡهِ اٰيٰتُنَا قَالَ اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples

quran.arabic: كَلَّا بَلۡࣝ رَانَ عَلٰي قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يَكۡسِبُوۡنَ
quran.english: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning

quran.arabic: كَلَّا٘ اِنَّهُمۡ عَنۡ رَّبِّهِمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٍ لَّمَحۡجُوۡبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّهُمۡ لَصَالُوا الۡجَحِيۡمِؕ‏
quran.english: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هٰذَا الَّذِيۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny

quran.arabic: كَلَّا٘ اِنَّ كِتٰبَ الۡاَبۡرَارِ لَفِيۡ عِلِّيِّيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in 'illiyyun

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا عِلِّيُّوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is 'illiyyun

quran.arabic: كِتٰبٌ مَّرۡقُوۡمٌۙ‏
quran.english: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed

quran.arabic: يَّشۡهَدُهُ الۡمُقَرَّبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah]

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡاَبۡرَارَ لَفِيۡ نَعِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure

quran.arabic: عَلَي الۡاَرَآئِكِ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: On adorned couches, observing

quran.arabic: تَعۡرِفُ فِيۡ وُجُوۡهِهِمۡ نَضۡرَةَ النَّعِيۡمِۚ‏
quran.english: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure

quran.arabic: يُسۡقَوۡنَ مِنۡ رَّحِيۡقٍ مَّخۡتُوۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed

quran.arabic: خِتٰمُهٗ مِسۡكٌؕ وَفِيۡ ذٰلِكَ فَلۡيَتَنَافَسِ الۡمُتَنٰفِسُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete

quran.arabic: وَمِزَاجُهٗ مِنۡ تَسۡنِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: And its mixture is of Tasneem

quran.arabic: عَيۡنًا يَّشۡرَبُ بِهَا الۡمُقَرَّبُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اَجۡرَمُوۡا كَانُوۡا مِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا يَضۡحَكُوۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا مَرُّوۡا بِهِمۡ يَتَغَامَزُوۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا انۡقَلَبُوۡ٘ا اِلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِهِمُ انۡقَلَبُوۡا فَكِهِيۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا رَاَوۡهُمۡ قَالُوۡ٘ا اِنَّ هٰ٘ؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اُرۡسِلُوۡا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حٰفِظِيۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: But they had not been sent as guardians over them

quran.arabic: فَالۡيَوۡمَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا مِنَ الۡكُفَّارِ يَضۡحَكُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers

quran.arabic: عَلَي الۡاَرَآئِكِۙ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: On adorned couches, observing

quran.arabic: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ الۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوۡا يَفۡعَلُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do

quran.arabic: اِذَا السَّمَآءُ انۡشَقَّتۡۙ‏
quran.english: When the sky has split [open]

quran.arabic: وَاَذِنَتۡ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتۡۙ‏
quran.english: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا الۡاَرۡضُ مُدَّتۡؕ‏
quran.english: And when the earth has been extended

quran.arabic: وَاَلۡقَتۡ مَا فِيۡهَا وَتَخَلَّتۡۙ‏
quran.english: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]

quran.arabic: وَاَذِنَتۡ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتۡؕ‏
quran.english: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡاِنۡسَانُ اِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ اِلٰي رَبِّكَ كَدۡحًا فَمُلٰقِيۡهِۚ‏
quran.english: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا مَنۡ اُوۡتِيَ كِتٰبَهٗ بِيَمِيۡنِهٖۙ‏
quran.english: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand

quran.arabic: فَسَوۡفَ يُحَاسَبُ حِسَابًا يَّسِيۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: He will be judged with an easy account

quran.arabic: وَّيَنۡقَلِبُ اِلٰ٘ي اَهۡلِهٖ مَسۡرُوۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And return to his people in happiness

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا مَنۡ اُوۡتِيَ كِتٰبَهٗ وَرَآءَ ظَهۡرِهٖۙ‏
quran.english: But as for he who is given his record behind his back

quran.arabic: فَسَوۡفَ يَدۡعُوۡا ثُبُوۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: He will cry out for destruction

quran.arabic: وَّيَصۡلٰي سَعِيۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ كَانَ فِيۡ٘ اَهۡلِهٖ مَسۡرُوۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness
Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah]

quran.arabic: بَلٰ٘يۚۛ اِنَّ رَبَّهٗ كَانَ بِهٖ بَصِيۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing

quran.arabic: فَلَا٘ اُقۡسِمُ بِالشَّفَقِۙ‏
quran.english: So I swear by the twilight glow

quran.arabic: وَالَّيۡلِ وَمَا وَسَقَۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the night and what it envelops

quran.arabic: وَالۡقَمَرِ اِذَا اتَّسَقَۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the moon when it becomes full

quran.arabic: لَتَرۡكَبُنَّ طَبَقًا عَنۡ طَبَقٍؕ‏
quran.english: [That] you will surely experience state after state

quran.arabic: فَمَا لَهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe

quran.arabic: وَاِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيۡهِمُ الۡقُرۡاٰنُ لَا يَسۡجُدُوۡنَࣛؕ‏
quran.english: And when the Qur'an is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allah]

quran.arabic: بَلِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا يُكَذِّبُوۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: But those who have disbelieved deny

quran.arabic: وَاللّٰهُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يُوۡعُوۡنَؗۖ‏
quran.english: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves

quran.arabic: فَبَشِّرۡهُمۡ بِعَذَابٍ اَلِيۡمٍۙ‏
quran.english: So give them tidings of a painful punishment

quran.arabic: اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَهُمۡ اَجۡرٌ غَيۡرُ مَمۡنُوۡنٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted

quran.arabic: وَالسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ الۡبُرُوۡجِۙ‏
quran.english: By the sky containing great stars

quran.arabic: وَالۡيَوۡمِ الۡمَوۡعُوۡدِۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the promised Day

quran.arabic: وَشَاهِدٍ وَّمَشۡهُوۡدٍؕ‏
quran.english: And [by] the witness and what is witnessed

quran.arabic: قُتِلَ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡاُخۡدُوۡدِۙ‏
quran.english: Cursed were the companions of the trench

quran.arabic: النَّارِ ذَاتِ الۡوَقُوۡدِۙ‏
quran.english: [Containing] the fire full of fuel

quran.arabic: اِذۡ هُمۡ عَلَيۡهَا قُعُوۡدٌۙ‏
quran.english: When they were sitting near it

quran.arabic: وَّهُمۡ عَلٰي مَا يَفۡعَلُوۡنَ بِالۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ شُهُوۡدٌؕ‏
quran.english: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses

quran.arabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوۡا مِنۡهُمۡ اِلَّا٘ اَنۡ يُّؤۡمِنُوۡا بِاللّٰهِ الۡعَزِيۡزِ الۡحَمِيۡدِۙ‏
quran.english: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ لَهٗ مُلۡكُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِؕ وَاللّٰهُ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ شَهِيۡدٌؕ‏
quran.english: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ فَتَنُوا الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَتُوۡبُوۡا فَلَهُمۡ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابُ الۡحَرِيۡقِؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ لَهُمۡ جَنّٰتٌ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُؕ ذٰلِكَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡكَبِيۡرُؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment

quran.arabic: اِنَّ بَطۡشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيۡدٌؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ هُوَ يُبۡدِئُ وَيُعِيۡدُۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats

quran.arabic: وَهُوَ الۡغَفُوۡرُ الۡوَدُوۡدُۙ‏
quran.english: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate

quran.arabic: ذُو الۡعَرۡشِ الۡمَجِيۡدُۙ‏
quran.english: Honorable Owner of the Throne

quran.arabic: فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيۡدُؕ‏
quran.english: Effecter of what He intends

quran.arabic: هَلۡ اَتٰىكَ حَدِيۡثُ الۡجُنُوۡدِۙ‏
quran.english: Has there reached you the story of the soldiers

quran.arabic: فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَثَمُوۡدَؕ‏
quran.english: [Those of] Pharaoh and Thamud

quran.arabic: بَلِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا فِيۡ تَكۡذِيۡبٍۙ‏
quran.english: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial

quran.arabic: وَّاللّٰهُ مِنۡ وَّرَآئِهِمۡ مُّحِيۡطٌۚ‏
quran.english: While Allah encompasses them from behind

quran.arabic: بَلۡ هُوَ قُرۡاٰنٌ مَّجِيۡدٌۙ‏
quran.english: But this is an honored Qur'an

quran.arabic: فِيۡ لَوۡحٍ مَّحۡفُوۡظٍࣖ‏
quran.english: [Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate

quran.arabic: وَالسَّمَآءِ وَالطَّارِقِۙ‏
quran.english: By the sky and the night comer

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا الطَّارِقُۙ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is the night comer

quran.arabic: النَّجۡمُ الثَّاقِبُۙ‏
quran.english: It is the piercing star

quran.arabic: اِنۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٌؕ‏
quran.english: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector

quran.arabic: فَلۡيَنۡظُرِ الۡاِنۡسَانُ مِمَّ خُلِقَؕ‏
quran.english: So let man observe from what he was created

quran.arabic: خُلِقَ مِنۡ مَّآءٍ دَافِقٍۙ‏
quran.english: He was created from a fluid, ejected

quran.arabic: يَّخۡرُجُ مِنۭۡ بَيۡنِ الصُّلۡبِ وَالتَّرَآئِبِؕ‏
quran.english: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ عَلٰي رَجۡعِهٖ لَقَادِرٌؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ تُبۡلَي السَّرَآئِرُۙ‏
quran.english: The Day when secrets will be put on trial

quran.arabic: فَمَا لَهٗ مِنۡ قُوَّةٍ وَّلَا نَاصِرٍؕ‏
quran.english: Then man will have no power or any helper

quran.arabic: وَالسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ الرَّجۡعِۙ‏
quran.english: By the sky which returns [rain]

quran.arabic: وَالۡاَرۡضِ ذَاتِ الصَّدۡعِۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the earth which cracks open

quran.arabic: اِنَّهٗ لَقَوۡلٌ فَصۡلٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, the Qur'an is a decisive statement

quran.arabic: وَّمَا هُوَ بِالۡهَزۡلِؕ‏
quran.english: And it is not amusement

quran.arabic: اِنَّهُمۡ يَكِيۡدُوۡنَ كَيۡدًاۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, they are planning a plan

quran.arabic: وَّاَكِيۡدُ كَيۡدًاۚۖ‏
quran.english: But I am planning a plan

quran.arabic: فَمَهِّلِ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ اَمۡهِلۡهُمۡ رُوَيۡدًاࣖ‏
quran.english: So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile

quran.arabic: سَبِّحِ اسۡمَ رَبِّكَ الۡاَعۡلَيۙ‏
quran.english: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَ فَسَوّٰيࣕۙ‏
quran.english: Who created and proportioned

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ قَدَّرَ فَهَدٰيࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And who destined and [then] guided

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡ٘ اَخۡرَجَ الۡمَرۡعٰيࣕۙ‏
quran.english: And who brings out the pasture

quran.arabic: فَجَعَلَهٗ غُثَآءً اَحۡوٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And [then] makes it black stubble

quran.arabic: سَنُقۡرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنۡسٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَا شَآءَ اللّٰهُؕ اِنَّهٗ يَعۡلَمُ الۡجَهۡرَ وَمَا يَخۡفٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden

quran.arabic: وَنُيَسِّرُكَ لِلۡيُسۡرٰيۚۖ‏
quran.english: And We will ease you toward ease

quran.arabic: فَذَكِّرۡ اِنۡ نَّفَعَتِ الذِّكۡرٰيؕ‏
quran.english: So remind, if the reminder should benefit

quran.arabic: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَنۡ يَّخۡشٰيۙ‏
quran.english: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded

quran.arabic: وَيَتَجَنَّبُهَا الۡاَشۡقَيۙ‏
quran.english: But the wretched one will avoid it

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ يَصۡلَي النَّارَ الۡكُبۡرٰيۚ‏
quran.english: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوۡتُ فِيۡهَا وَلَا يَحۡيٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Neither dying therein nor living

quran.arabic: قَدۡ اَفۡلَحَ مَنۡ تَزَكّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself

quran.arabic: وَذَكَرَ اسۡمَ رَبِّهٖ فَصَلّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays

quran.arabic: بَلۡ تُؤۡثِرُوۡنَ الۡحَيٰوةَ الدُّنۡيَاۙ‏
quran.english: But you prefer the worldly life

quran.arabic: وَالۡاٰخِرَةُ خَيۡرٌ وَّاَبۡقٰيؕ‏
quran.english: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring

quran.arabic: اِنَّ هٰذَا لَفِي الصُّحُفِ الۡاُوۡلٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures

quran.arabic: صُحُفِ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَمُوۡسٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses

quran.arabic: هَلۡ اَتٰىكَ حَدِيۡثُ الۡغَاشِيَةِؕ‏
quran.english: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]

quran.arabic: وُجُوۡهٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ خَاشِعَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled

quran.arabic: عَامِلَةٌ نَّاصِبَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: Working [hard] and exhausted

quran.arabic: تَصۡلٰي نَارًا حَامِيَةًۙ‏
quran.english: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire

quran.arabic: تُسۡقٰي مِنۡ عَيۡنٍ اٰنِيَةٍؕ‏
quran.english: They will be given drink from a boiling spring

quran.arabic: لَيۡسَ لَهُمۡ طَعَامٌ اِلَّا مِنۡ ضَرِيۡعٍۙ‏
quran.english: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant

quran.arabic: لَّا يُسۡمِنُ وَلَا يُغۡنِيۡ مِنۡ جُوۡعٍؕ‏
quran.english: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger

quran.arabic: وُجُوۡهٌ يَّوۡمَئِذٍ نَّاعِمَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure

quran.arabic: لِّسَعۡيِهَا رَاضِيَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: With their effort [they are] satisfied

quran.arabic: فِيۡ جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: In an elevated garden

quran.arabic: لَّا تَسۡمَعُ فِيۡهَا لَاغِيَةًؕ‏
quran.english: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech

quran.arabic: فِيۡهَا عَيۡنٌ جَارِيَةٌۘ‏
quran.english: Within it is a flowing spring

quran.arabic: فِيۡهَا سُرُرٌ مَّرۡفُوۡعَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: Within it are couches raised high

quran.arabic: وَّاَكۡوَابٌ مَّوۡضُوۡعَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: And cups put in place

quran.arabic: وَّنَمَارِقُ مَصۡفُوۡفَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: And cushions lined up

quran.arabic: وَّزَرَابِيُّ مَبۡثُوۡثَةٌؕ‏
quran.english: And carpets spread around

quran.arabic: اَفَلَا يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ اِلَي الۡاِبِلِ كَيۡفَ خُلِقَتۡࣟ‏
quran.english: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created

quran.arabic: وَاِلَي السَّمَآءِ كَيۡفَ رُفِعَتۡࣟ‏
quran.english: And at the sky - how it is raised

quran.arabic: وَاِلَي الۡجِبَالِ كَيۡفَ نُصِبَتۡࣟ‏
quran.english: And at the mountains - how they are erected

quran.arabic: وَاِلَي الۡاَرۡضِ كَيۡفَ سُطِحَتۡ‏
quran.english: And at the earth - how it is spread out

quran.arabic: فَذَكِّرۡࣞ اِنَّمَا٘ اَنۡتَ مُذَكِّرٌؕ‏
quran.english: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder

quran.arabic: لَسۡتَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِمُصَۜيۡطِرٍۙ‏
quran.english: You are not over them a controller

quran.arabic: اِلَّا مَنۡ تَوَلّٰي وَكَفَرَۙ‏
quran.english: However, he who turns away and disbelieves

quran.arabic: فَيُعَذِّبُهُ اللّٰهُ الۡعَذَابَ الۡاَكۡبَرَؕ‏
quran.english: Then Allah will punish him with the greatest punishment

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اِلَيۡنَا٘ اِيَابَهُمۡۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, to Us is their return

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ اِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا حِسَابَهُمۡࣖ‏
quran.english: Then indeed, upon Us is their account

quran.arabic: وَالۡفَجۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: By the dawn

quran.arabic: وَلَيَالٍ عَشۡرٍۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] ten nights

quran.arabic: وَّالشَّفۡعِ وَالۡوَتۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the even [number] and the odd

quran.arabic: وَالَّيۡلِ اِذَا يَسۡرِۚ‏
quran.english: And [by] the night when it passes

quran.arabic: هَلۡ فِيۡ ذٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِيۡ حِجۡرٍؕ‏
quran.english: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍۙࣕ‏
quran.english: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with 'Aad

quran.arabic: اِرَمَ ذَاتِ الۡعِمَادِۙࣕ‏
quran.english: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars

quran.arabic: الَّتِيۡ لَمۡ يُخۡلَقۡ مِثۡلُهَا فِي الۡبِلَادِۙࣕ‏
quran.english: The likes of whom had never been created in the land

quran.arabic: وَثَمُوۡدَ الَّذِيۡنَ جَابُوا الصَّخۡرَ بِالۡوَادِۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley

quran.arabic: وَفِرۡعَوۡنَ ذِي الۡاَوۡتَادِۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ طَغَوۡا فِي الۡبِلَادِۙࣕ‏
quran.english: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands

quran.arabic: فَاَكۡثَرُوۡا فِيۡهَا الۡفَسَادَۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And increased therein the corruption

quran.arabic: فَصَبَّ عَلَيۡهِمۡ رَبُّكَ سَوۡطَ عَذَابٍۙۚ‏
quran.english: So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment

quran.arabic: اِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِالۡمِرۡصَادِؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, your Lord is in observation

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا الۡاِنۡسَانُ اِذَا مَا ابۡتَلٰىهُ رَبُّهٗ فَاَكۡرَمَهٗ وَنَعَّمَهٗ ࣢ۙ فَيَقُوۡلُ رَبِّيۡ٘ اَكۡرَمَنِؕ‏
quran.english: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا٘ اِذَا مَا ابۡتَلٰىهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيۡهِ رِزۡقَهٗ ࣢ۙ فَيَقُوۡلُ رَبِّيۡ٘ اَهَانَنِۚ‏
quran.english: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me

quran.arabic: كَلَّا بَلۡ لَّا تُكۡرِمُوۡنَ الۡيَتِيۡمَۙ‏
quran.english: No! But you do not honor the orphan

quran.arabic: وَلَا تَحٰٓضُّوۡنَ عَلٰي طَعَامِ الۡمِسۡكِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor

quran.arabic: وَتَاۡكُلُوۡنَ التُّرَاثَ اَكۡلًا لَّمًّاۙ‏
quran.english: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether

quran.arabic: وَّتُحِبُّوۡنَ الۡمَالَ حُبًّا جَمًّاؕ‏
quran.english: And you love wealth with immense love

quran.arabic: كَلَّا٘ اِذَا دُكَّتِ الۡاَرۡضُ دَكًّا دَكًّاۙ‏
quran.english: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed

quran.arabic: وَّجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَالۡمَلَكُ صَفًّا صَفًّاۚ‏
quran.english: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank

quran.arabic: وَجِايۡٓءَ يَوۡمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ࣢ۙ يَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّتَذَكَّرُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ وَاَنّٰي لَهُ الذِّكۡرٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance

quran.arabic: يَقُوۡلُ يٰلَيۡتَنِيۡ قَدَّمۡتُ لِحَيَاتِيۡۚ‏
quran.english: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life

quran.arabic: فَيَوۡمَئِذٍ لَّا يُعَذِّبُ عَذَابَهٗ٘ اَحَدٌۙ‏
quran.english: So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment

quran.arabic: وَّلَا يُوۡثِقُ وَثَاقَهٗ٘ اَحَدٌؕ‏
quran.english: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers]

quran.arabic: يٰ٘اَيَّتُهَا النَّفۡسُ الۡمُطۡمَئِنَّةُۙࣗ‏
quran.english: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul

quran.arabic: ارۡجِعِيۡ٘ اِلٰي رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرۡضِيَّةًۚ‏
quran.english: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him]

quran.arabic: فَادۡخُلِيۡ فِيۡ عِبٰدِيۡۙ‏
quran.english: And enter among My [righteous] servants

quran.arabic: وَادۡخُلِيۡ جَنَّتِيۡࣖ‏
quran.english: And enter My Paradise

quran.arabic: لَا٘ اُقۡسِمُ بِهٰذَا الۡبَلَدِۙ‏
quran.english: I swear by this city, Makkah

quran.arabic: وَاَنۡتَ حِلٌّۭ بِهٰذَا الۡبَلَدِۙ‏
quran.english: And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city

quran.arabic: وَوَالِدٍ وَّمَا وَلَدَۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him]

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ فِيۡ كَبَدٍؕ‏
quran.english: We have certainly created man into hardship

quran.arabic: اَيَحۡسَبُ اَنۡ لَّنۡ يَّقۡدِرَ عَلَيۡهِ اَحَدٌۘ‏
quran.english: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him

quran.arabic: يَقُوۡلُ اَهۡلَكۡتُ مَالًا لُّبَدًاؕ‏
quran.english: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance

quran.arabic: اَيَحۡسَبُ اَنۡ لَّمۡ يَرَهٗ٘ اَحَدٌؕ‏
quran.english: Does he think that no one has seen him

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ نَجۡعَلۡ لَّهٗ عَيۡنَيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: Have We not made for him two eyes

quran.arabic: وَلِسَانًا وَّشَفَتَيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And a tongue and two lips

quran.arabic: وَهَدَيۡنٰهُ النَّجۡدَيۡنِۚ‏
quran.english: And have shown him the two ways

quran.arabic: فَلَا اقۡتَحَمَ الۡعَقَبَةَؗۖ‏
quran.english: But he has not broken through the difficult pass

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا الۡعَقَبَةُؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass

quran.arabic: فَكُّ رَقَبَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: It is the freeing of a slave

quran.arabic: اَوۡ اِطۡعٰمٌ فِيۡ يَوۡمٍ ذِيۡ مَسۡغَبَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger

quran.arabic: يَّتِيۡمًا ذَا مَقۡرَبَةٍۙ‏
quran.english: An orphan of near relationship

quran.arabic: اَوۡ مِسۡكِيۡنًا ذَا مَتۡرَبَةٍؕ‏
quran.english: Or a needy person in misery

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَتَوَاصَوۡا بِالصَّبۡرِ وَتَوَاصَوۡا بِالۡمَرۡحَمَةِؕ‏
quran.english: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion

quran.arabic: اُولٰٓئِكَ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡمَيۡمَنَةِؕ‏
quran.english: Those are the companions of the right

quran.arabic: وَالَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا هُمۡ اَصۡحٰبُ الۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِؕ‏
quran.english: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left

quran.arabic: عَلَيۡهِمۡ نَارٌ مُّؤۡصَدَةٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Over them will be fire closed in

quran.arabic: وَالشَّمۡسِ وَضُحٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: By the sun and its brightness

quran.arabic: وَالۡقَمَرِ اِذَا تَلٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And [by] the moon when it follows it

quran.arabic: وَالنَّهَارِ اِذَا جَلّٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And [by] the day when it displays it

quran.arabic: وَالَّيۡلِ اِذَا يَغۡشٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And [by] the night when it covers it

quran.arabic: وَالسَّمَآءِ وَمَا بَنٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it

quran.arabic: وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا طَحٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And [by] the earth and He who spread it

quran.arabic: وَنَفۡسٍ وَّمَا سَوّٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it

quran.arabic: فَاَلۡهَمَهَا فُجُوۡرَهَا وَتَقۡوٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness

quran.arabic: قَدۡ اَفۡلَحَ مَنۡ زَكّٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: He has succeeded who purifies it

quran.arabic: وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنۡ دَسّٰىهَاؕ‏
quran.english: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption]

quran.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُوۡدُ بِطَغۡوٰىهَا٘ۙࣕ‏
quran.english: Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression

quran.arabic: اِذِ انۭۡ بَعَثَ اَشۡقٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: When the most wretched of them was sent forth

quran.arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُمۡ رَسُوۡلُ اللّٰهِ نَاقَةَ اللّٰهِ وَسُقۡيٰهَاؕ‏
quran.english: And the messenger of Allah [Salih] said to them, "[Do not harm] the she-camel of Allah or [prevent her from] her drink

quran.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوۡهُ فَعَقَرُوۡهَا ࣢ۙࣕ فَدَمۡدَمَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ بِذَنۭۡ بِهِمۡ فَسَوّٰىهَاۙࣕ‏
quran.english: But they denied him and hamstrung her. So their Lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal [upon all of them]

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَخَافُ عُقۡبٰهَاࣖ‏
quran.english: And He does not fear the consequence thereof

quran.arabic: وَالَّيۡلِ اِذَا يَغۡشٰيۙ‏
quran.english: By the night when it covers

quran.arabic: وَالنَّهَارِ اِذَا تَجَلّٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the day when it appears

quran.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقَ الذَّكَرَ وَالۡاُنۡثٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] He who created the male and female

quran.arabic: اِنَّ سَعۡيَكُمۡ لَشَتّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, your efforts are diverse

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا مَنۡ اَعۡطٰي وَاتَّقٰيۙ‏
quran.english: As for he who gives and fears Allah

quran.arabic: وَصَدَّقَ بِالۡحُسۡنٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And believes in the best [reward]

quran.arabic: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهٗ لِلۡيُسۡرٰيؕ‏
quran.english: We will ease him toward ease

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا مَنۭۡ بَخِلَ وَاسۡتَغۡنٰيۙ‏
quran.english: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need

quran.arabic: وَكَذَّبَ بِالۡحُسۡنٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And denies the best [reward]

quran.arabic: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهٗ لِلۡعُسۡرٰيؕ‏
quran.english: We will ease him toward difficulty

quran.arabic: وَمَا يُغۡنِيۡ عَنۡهُ مَالُهٗ٘ اِذَا تَرَدّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls

quran.arabic: اِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا لَلۡهُدٰيؗۖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّ لَنَا لَلۡاٰخِرَةَ وَالۡاُوۡلٰي
quran.english: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life]

quran.arabic: فَاَنۡذَرۡتُكُمۡ نَارًا تَلَظّٰيۚ‏
quran.english: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing

quran.arabic: لَا يَصۡلٰىهَا٘ اِلَّا الۡاَشۡقَيۙ‏
quran.english: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Who had denied and turned away

quran.arabic: وَسَيُجَنَّبُهَا الۡاَتۡقَيۙ‏
quran.english: But the righteous one will avoid it

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ يُؤۡتِيۡ مَالَهٗ يَتَزَكّٰيۚ‏
quran.english: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself

quran.arabic: وَمَا لِاَحَدٍ عِنۡدَهٗ مِنۡ نِّعۡمَةٍ تُجۡزٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded

quran.arabic: اِلَّا ابۡتِغَآءَ وَجۡهِ رَبِّهِ الۡاَعۡلٰيۚ‏
quran.english: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High

quran.arabic: وَلَسَوۡفَ يَرۡضٰيࣖ‏
quran.english: And he is going to be satisfied

quran.arabic: وَالضُّحٰيۙ‏
quran.english: By the morning brightness

quran.arabic: وَالَّيۡلِ اِذَا سَجٰيۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] the night when it covers with darkness

quran.arabic: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you]

quran.arabic: وَلَلۡاٰخِرَةُ خَيۡرٌ لَّكَ مِنَ الۡاُوۡلٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life]

quran.arabic: وَلَسَوۡفَ يُعۡطِيۡكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرۡضٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَجِدۡكَ يَتِيۡمًا فَاٰوٰيࣕ‏
quran.english: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge

quran.arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ ضَآلًّا فَهَدٰيࣕ‏
quran.english: And He found you lost and guided [you]

quran.arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلًا فَاَغۡنٰيؕ‏
quran.english: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا الۡيَتِيۡمَ فَلَا تَقۡهَرۡؕ‏
quran.english: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him]

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا السَّآئِلَ فَلَا تَنۡهَرۡؕ‏
quran.english: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him]

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا بِنِعۡمَةِ رَبِّكَ فَحَدِّثۡࣖ‏
quran.english: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it]

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ نَشۡرَحۡ لَكَ صَدۡرَكَۙ‏
quran.english: Did We not expand for you, [O Muhammad], your breast

quran.arabic: وَوَضَعۡنَا عَنۡكَ وِزۡرَكَۙ‏
quran.english: And We removed from you your burden

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ٘ اَنۡقَضَ ظَهۡرَكَۙ‏
quran.english: Which had weighed upon your back

quran.arabic: وَرَفَعۡنَا لَكَ ذِكۡرَكَؕ‏
quran.english: And raised high for you your repute

quran.arabic: فَاِنَّ مَعَ الۡعُسۡرِ يُسۡرًاۙ‏
quran.english: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease

quran.arabic: اِنَّ مَعَ الۡعُسۡرِ يُسۡرًاؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease

quran.arabic: فَاِذَا فَرَغۡتَ فَانۡصَبۡۙ‏
quran.english: So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship]

quran.arabic: وَاِلٰي رَبِّكَ فَارۡغَبۡࣖ‏
quran.english: And to your Lord direct [your] longing

quran.arabic: وَالتِّيۡنِ وَالزَّيۡتُوۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: By the fig and the olive

quran.arabic: وَطُوۡرِ سِيۡنِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] Mount Sinai

quran.arabic: وَهٰذَا الۡبَلَدِ الۡاَمِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: And [by] this secure city [Makkah]

quran.arabic: لَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ فِيۡ٘ اَحۡسَنِ تَقۡوِيۡمٍؗ‏
quran.english: We have certainly created man in the best of stature

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ رَدَدۡنٰهُ اَسۡفَلَ سٰفِلِيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Then We return him to the lowest of the low

quran.arabic: اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ فَلَهُمۡ اَجۡرٌ غَيۡرُ مَمۡنُوۡنٍؕ‏
quran.english: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted

quran.arabic: فَمَا يُكَذِّبُكَ بَعۡدُ بِالدِّيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense

quran.arabic: اَلَيۡسَ اللّٰهُ بِاَحۡكَمِ الۡحٰكِمِيۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: Is not Allah the most just of judges

quran.arabic: اِقۡرَاۡ بِاسۡمِ رَبِّكَ الَّذِيۡ خَلَقَۚ‏
quran.english: Recite in the name of your Lord who created

quran.arabic: خَلَقَ الۡاِنۡسَانَ مِنۡ عَلَقٍۚ‏
quran.english: Created man from a clinging substance

quran.arabic: اِقۡرَاۡ وَرَبُّكَ الۡاَكۡرَمُۙ‏
quran.english: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ عَلَّمَ بِالۡقَلَمِۙ‏
quran.english: Who taught by the pen

quran.arabic: عَلَّمَ الۡاِنۡسَانَ مَا لَمۡ يَعۡلَمۡؕ‏
quran.english: Taught man that which he knew not

quran.arabic: كَلَّا٘ اِنَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ لَيَطۡغٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: No! [But] indeed, man transgresses

quran.arabic: اَنۡ رَّاٰهُ اسۡتَغۡنٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Because he sees himself self-sufficient

quran.arabic: اِنَّ اِلٰي رَبِّكَ الرُّجۡعٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, to your Lord is the return

quran.arabic: اَرَءَيۡتَ الَّذِيۡ يَنۡهٰيۙ‏
quran.english: Have you seen the one who forbids

quran.arabic: عَبۡدًا اِذَا صَلّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: A servant when he prays

quran.arabic: اَرَءَيۡتَ اِنۡ كَانَ عَلَي الۡهُدٰ٘يۙ‏
quran.english: Have you seen if he is upon guidance

quran.arabic: اَوۡ اَمَرَ بِالتَّقۡوٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Or enjoins righteousness

quran.arabic: اَرَءَيۡتَ اِنۡ كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلّٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Have you seen if he denies and turns away

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَعۡلَمۡ بِاَنَّ اللّٰهَ يَرٰيؕ‏
quran.english: Does he not know that Allah sees

quran.arabic: كَلَّا لَئِنۡ لَّمۡ يَنۡتَهِ ࣢ۙ لَنَسۡفَعًاۭ بِالنَّاصِيَةِۙ‏
quran.english: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock

quran.arabic: نَاصِيَةٍ كَاذِبَةٍ خَاطِئَةٍۚ‏
quran.english: A lying, sinning forelock

quran.arabic: فَلۡيَدۡعُ نَادِيَهٗۙ‏
quran.english: Then let him call his associates

quran.arabic: سَنَدۡعُ الزَّبَانِيَةَۙ‏
quran.english: We will call the angels of Hell

quran.arabic: كَلَّاؕ لَا تُطِعۡهُ وَاسۡجُدۡ وَاقۡتَرِبۡࣛࣖ‏
quran.english: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah]

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَنۡزَلۡنٰهُ فِيۡ لَيۡلَةِ الۡقَدۡرِۚۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا لَيۡلَةُ الۡقَدۡرِؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree

quran.arabic: لَيۡلَةُ الۡقَدۡرِ ࣢ۙ خَيۡرٌ مِّنۡ اَلۡفِ شَهۡرٍؕؔ‏
quran.english: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months

quran.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ الۡمَلٰٓئِكَةُ وَالرُّوۡحُ فِيۡهَا بِاِذۡنِ رَبِّهِمۡ مِّنۡ كُلِّ اَمۡرٍۙۛ‏
quran.english: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter

quran.arabic: سَلٰمٌࣞۛ هِيَ حَتّٰي مَطۡلَعِ الۡفَجۡرِࣖ‏
quran.english: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn

quran.arabic: لَمۡ يَكُنِ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ اَهۡلِ الۡكِتٰبِ وَالۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَ مُنۡفَكِّيۡنَ حَتّٰي تَاۡتِيَهُمُ الۡبَيِّنَةُۙ‏
quran.english: Those who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted [from misbelief] until there came to them clear evidence

quran.arabic: رَسُوۡلٌ مِّنَ اللّٰهِ يَتۡلُوۡا صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةًۙ‏
quran.english: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures

quran.arabic: فِيۡهَا كُتُبٌ قَيِّمَةٌؕ‏
quran.english: Within which are correct writings

quran.arabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡكِتٰبَ اِلَّا مِنۭۡ بَعۡدِ مَا جَآءَتۡهُمُ الۡبَيِّنَةُؕ‏
quran.english: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اُمِرُوۡ٘ا اِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُوا اللّٰهَ مُخۡلِصِيۡنَ لَهُ الدِّيۡنَ ࣢ۙ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيۡمُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَيُؤۡتُوا الزَّكٰوةَ وَذٰلِكَ دِيۡنُ الۡقَيِّمَةِؕ‏
quran.english: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ اَهۡلِ الۡكِتٰبِ وَالۡمُشۡرِكِيۡنَ فِيۡ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَاؕ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمۡ شَرُّ الۡبَرِيَّةِؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِۙ اُولٰٓئِكَ هُمۡ خَيۡرُ الۡبَرِيَّةِؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures

quran.arabic: جَزَآؤُهُمۡ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡ جَنّٰتُ عَدۡنٍ تَجۡرِيۡ مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَا الۡاَنۡهٰرُ خٰلِدِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا٘ اَبَدًاؕ رَضِيَ اللّٰهُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَرَضُوۡا عَنۡهُؕ ذٰلِكَ لِمَنۡ خَشِيَ رَبَّهٗࣖ‏
quran.english: Their reward with Allah will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allah being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord

quran.arabic: اِذَا زُلۡزِلَتِ الۡاَرۡضُ زِلۡزَالَهَاۙ‏
quran.english: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake

quran.arabic: وَاَخۡرَجَتِ الۡاَرۡضُ اَثۡقَالَهَاۙ‏
quran.english: And the earth discharges its burdens

quran.arabic: وَقَالَ الۡاِنۡسَانُ مَا لَهَاۚ‏
quran.english: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ اَخۡبَارَهَاؕ‏
quran.english: That Day, it will report its news

quran.arabic: بِاَنَّ رَبَّكَ اَوۡحٰي لَهَاؕ‏
quran.english: Because your Lord has commanded it

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَئِذٍ يَّصۡدُرُ النَّاسُ اَشۡتَاتًا ࣢ۙ لِّيُرَوۡا اَعۡمَالَهُمۡؕ‏
quran.english: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds

quran.arabic: فَمَنۡ يَّعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيۡرًا يَّرَهٗؕ‏
quran.english: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it

quran.arabic: وَمَنۡ يَّعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَّرَهٗࣖ‏
quran.english: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it

quran.arabic: وَالۡعٰدِيٰتِ ضَبۡحًاۙ‏
quran.english: By the racers, panting

quran.arabic: فَالۡمُوۡرِيٰتِ قَدۡحًاۙ‏
quran.english: And the producers of sparks [when] striking

quran.arabic: فَالۡمُغِيۡرٰتِ صُبۡحًاۙ‏
quran.english: And the chargers at dawn

quran.arabic: فَاَثَرۡنَ بِهٖ نَقۡعًاۙ‏
quran.english: Stirring up thereby [clouds of] dust

quran.arabic: فَوَسَطۡنَ بِهٖ جَمۡعًاۙ‏
quran.english: Arriving thereby in the center collectively

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ لِرَبِّهٖ لَكَنُوۡدٌۚ‏
quran.english: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ عَلٰي ذٰلِكَ لَشَهِيۡدٌۚ‏
quran.english: And indeed, he is to that a witness

quran.arabic: وَاِنَّهٗ لِحُبِّ الۡخَيۡرِ لَشَدِيۡدٌؕ‏
quran.english: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense

quran.arabic: اَفَلَا يَعۡلَمُ اِذَا بُعۡثِرَ مَا فِي الۡقُبُوۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered

quran.arabic: وَحُصِّلَ مَا فِي الصُّدُوۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: And that within the breasts is obtained

quran.arabic: اِنَّ رَبَّهُمۡ بِهِمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٍ لَّخَبِيۡرٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted

quran.arabic: اَلۡقَارِعَةُۙ‏
quran.english: The Striking Calamity

quran.arabic: مَا الۡقَارِعَةُۚ‏
quran.english: What is the Striking Calamity

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا الۡقَارِعَةُؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity

quran.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَكُوۡنُ النَّاسُ كَالۡفَرَاشِ الۡمَبۡثُوۡثِۙ‏
quran.english: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed

quran.arabic: وَتَكُوۡنُ الۡجِبَالُ كَالۡعِهۡنِ الۡمَنۡفُوۡشِؕ‏
quran.english: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up

quran.arabic: فَاَمَّا مَنۡ ثَقُلَتۡ مَوَازِيۡنُهٗۙ‏
quran.english: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds]

quran.arabic: فَهُوَ فِيۡ عِيۡشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍؕ‏
