quran.english: He will be in a pleasant life

quran.arabic: وَاَمَّا مَنۡ خَفَّتۡ مَوَازِيۡنُهٗۙ‏
quran.english: But as for one whose scales are light

quran.arabic: فَاُمُّهٗ هَاوِيَةٌؕ‏
quran.english: His refuge will be an abyss

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا هِيَهۡؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what that is

quran.arabic: نَارٌ حَامِيَةٌࣖ‏
quran.english: It is a Fire, intensely hot

quran.arabic: اَلۡهٰىكُمُ التَّكَاثُرُۙ‏
quran.english: Competition in [worldly] increase diverts you

quran.arabic: حَتّٰي زُرۡتُمُ الۡمَقَابِرَؕ‏
quran.english: Until you visit the graveyards

quran.arabic: كَلَّا سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: No! You are going to know

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَؕ‏
quran.english: Then no! You are going to know

quran.arabic: كَلَّا لَوۡ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ عِلۡمَ الۡيَقِيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty

quran.arabic: لَتَرَوُنَّ الۡجَحِيۡمَۙ‏
quran.english: You will surely see the Hellfire

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ لَتَرَوُنَّهَا عَيۡنَ الۡيَقِيۡنِۙ‏
quran.english: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty

quran.arabic: ثُمَّ لَتُسۡـَٔلُنَّ يَوۡمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِيۡمِࣖ‏
quran.english: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure

quran.arabic: وَالۡعَصۡرِۙ‏
quran.english: By time

quran.arabic: اِنَّ الۡاِنۡسَانَ لَفِيۡ خُسۡرٍۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, mankind is in loss

quran.arabic: اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوۡا بِالۡحَقِّ ࣢ۙ وَتَوَاصَوۡا بِالصَّبۡرِࣖ‏
quran.english: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience

quran.arabic: وَيۡلٌ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍ لُّمَزَةِۙ‏
quran.english: Woe to every scorner and mocker

quran.arabic: اِۨلَّذِيۡ جَمَعَ مَالًا وَّعَدَّدَهٗۙ‏
quran.english: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it

quran.arabic: يَحۡسَبُ اَنَّ مَالَهٗ٘ اَخۡلَدَهٗۚ‏
quran.english: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal

quran.arabic: كَلَّا لَيُنۭۡ بَذَنَّ فِي الۡحُطَمَةِؗۖ‏
quran.english: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher

quran.arabic: وَمَا٘ اَدۡرٰىكَ مَا الۡحُطَمَةُؕ‏
quran.english: And what can make you know what is the Crusher

quran.arabic: نَارُ اللّٰهِ الۡمُوۡقَدَةُۙ‏
quran.english: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled

quran.arabic: الَّتِيۡ تَطَّلِعُ عَلَي الۡاَفۡـِٕدَةِؕ‏
quran.english: Which mounts directed at the hearts

quran.arabic: اِنَّهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مُّؤۡصَدَةٌۙ‏
quran.english: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them

quran.arabic: فِيۡ عَمَدٍ مُّمَدَّدَةٍࣖ‏
quran.english: In extended columns

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِاَصۡحٰبِ الۡفِيۡلِؕ‏
quran.english: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant

quran.arabic: اَلَمۡ يَجۡعَلۡ كَيۡدَهُمۡ فِيۡ تَضۡلِيۡلٍۙ‏
quran.english: Did He not make their plan into misguidance

quran.arabic: وَّاَرۡسَلَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ طَيۡرًا اَبَابِيۡلَۙ‏
quran.english: And He sent against them birds in flocks

quran.arabic: تَرۡمِيۡهِمۡ بِحِجَارَةٍ مِّنۡ سِجِّيۡلٍۙ‏
quran.english: Striking them with stones of hard clay

quran.arabic: فَجَعَلَهُمۡ كَعَصۡفٍ مَّاۡكُوۡلٍࣖ‏
quran.english: And He made them like eaten straw

quran.arabic: لِاِيۡلٰفِ قُرَيۡشٍۙ‏
quran.english: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh

quran.arabic: اٖلٰفِهِمۡ رِحۡلَةَ الشِّتَآءِ وَالصَّيۡفِۚ‏
quran.english: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer

quran.arabic: فَلۡيَعۡبُدُوۡا رَبَّ هٰذَا الۡبَيۡتِۙ‏
quran.english: Let them worship the Lord of this House

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ٘ اَطۡعَمَهُمۡ مِّنۡ جُوۡعٍ ࣢ۙ وَّاٰمَنَهُمۡ مِّنۡ خَوۡفٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear

quran.arabic: اَرَءَيۡتَ الَّذِيۡ يُكَذِّبُ بِالدِّيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense

quran.arabic: فَذٰلِكَ الَّذِيۡ يَدُعُّ الۡيَتِيۡمَۙ‏
quran.english: For that is the one who drives away the orphan

quran.arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلٰي طَعَامِ الۡمِسۡكِيۡنِؕ‏
quran.english: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor

quran.arabic: فَوَيۡلٌ لِّلۡمُصَلِّيۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: So woe to those who pray

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ عَنۡ صَلَاتِهِمۡ سَاهُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: [But] who are heedless of their prayer

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ يُرَآءُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Those who make show [of their deeds]

quran.arabic: وَيَمۡنَعُوۡنَ الۡمَاعُوۡنَࣖ‏
quran.english: And withhold [simple] assistance

quran.arabic: اِنَّا٘ اَعۡطَيۡنٰكَ الۡكَوۡثَرَؕ‏
quran.english: Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muhammad], al-Kawthar

quran.arabic: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَانۡحَرۡؕ‏
quran.english: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone]

quran.arabic: اِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ الۡاَبۡتَرُࣖ‏
quran.english: Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off

quran.arabic: قُلۡ يٰ٘اَيُّهَا الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "O disbelievers

quran.arabic: لَا٘ اَعۡبُدُ مَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَۙ‏
quran.english: I do not worship what you worship

quran.arabic: وَلَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ عٰبِدُوۡنَ مَا٘ اَعۡبُدُۚ‏
quran.english: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship

quran.arabic: وَلَا٘ اَنَا عَابِدٌ مَّا عَبَدۡتُّمۡۙ‏
quran.english: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship

quran.arabic: وَلَا٘ اَنۡتُمۡ عٰبِدُوۡنَ مَا٘ اَعۡبُدُؕ‏
quran.english: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship

quran.arabic: لَكُمۡ دِيۡنُكُمۡ وَلِيَ دِيۡنِࣖ‏
quran.english: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion

quran.arabic: اِذَا جَآءَ نَصۡرُ اللّٰهِ وَالۡفَتۡحُۙ‏
quran.english: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest

quran.arabic: وَرَاَيۡتَ النَّاسَ يَدۡخُلُوۡنَ فِيۡ دِيۡنِ اللّٰهِ اَفۡوَاجًاۙ‏
quran.english: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes

quran.arabic: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَاسۡتَغۡفِرۡهُؕؔ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ تَوَّابًاࣖ‏
quran.english: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance

quran.arabic: تَبَّتۡ يَدَا٘ اَبِيۡ لَهَبٍ وَّتَبَّؕ‏
quran.english: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he

quran.arabic: مَا٘ اَغۡنٰي عَنۡهُ مَالُهٗ وَمَا كَسَبَؕ‏
quran.english: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained

quran.arabic: سَيَصۡلٰي نَارًا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍۙ‏
quran.english: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame

quran.arabic: وَّامۡرَاَتُهٗؕ حَمَّالَةَ الۡحَطَبِۚ‏
quran.english: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood

quran.arabic: فِيۡ جِيۡدِهَا حَبۡلٌ مِّنۡ مَّسَدٍࣖ‏
quran.english: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber

quran.arabic: قُلۡ هُوَ اللّٰهُ اَحَدٌۚ‏
quran.english: Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One

quran.arabic: اَللّٰهُ الصَّمَدُۚ‏
quran.english: Allah, the Eternal Refuge

quran.arabic: لَمۡ يَلِدۡ ࣢ۙ وَلَمۡ يُوۡلَدۡۙ‏
quran.english: He neither begets nor is born

quran.arabic: وَلَمۡ يَكُنۡ لَّهٗ كُفُوًا اَحَدٌࣖ‏
quran.english: Nor is there to Him any equivalent

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ الۡفَلَقِۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak

quran.arabic: مِنۡ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَۙ‏
quran.english: From the evil of that which He created

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ اِذَا وَقَبَۙ‏
quran.english: And from the evil of darkness when it settles

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ شَرِّ النَّفّٰثٰتِ فِي الۡعُقَدِۙ‏
quran.english: And from the evil of the blowers in knots

quran.arabic: وَمِنۡ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ اِذَا حَسَدَࣖ‏
quran.english: And from the evil of an envier when he envies

quran.arabic: قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِۙ‏
quran.english: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind

quran.arabic: مَلِكِ النَّاسِۙ‏
quran.english: The Sovereign of mankind

quran.arabic: اِلٰهِ النَّاسِۙ‏
quran.english: The God of mankind

quran.arabic: مِنۡ شَرِّ الۡوَسۡوَاسِ ࣢ۙ الۡخَنَّاسِۙ‏
quran.english: From the evil of the retreating whisperer

quran.arabic: الَّذِيۡ يُوَسۡوِسُ فِيۡ صُدُوۡرِ النَّاسِۙ‏
quran.english: Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind

quran.arabic: مِنَ الۡجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِࣖ‏
quran.english: From among the jinn and mankind
